comments: My stay in Latoya's airbnb was really pleasent , everything was spotless, really breathable space! I would definitely stay at Latoya's airbnb again! And would definitely recommend her as a great host! thank you you made my stay stress-free
Jonathan was a phenomenal host!! His place is adorable, well situated, safe and so beautiful! We loved staying there and will choose it again if the opportunity presents itself.
Perfect nyc hotel stay very close to multiple subway lines
Very cozy place with everything you need. Well deserving of a 5 star rating.

The studio looks exactly like the pictures. The host was very accommodating and allowed us to store our luggage prior to check in so we could explore the city. The studio is near a lot of restaurants and not too far from the subway. I loved staying here.

LOVED staying here! Had work in Brooklyn from October to November and chose Gordon's place. Couldn't have been a better pick for my needs and comfort level. It's cozy, pretty and homey yet still feels like you can make it yours. The decor is lovely, and it's CLEAN. I also loved the neighborhood - so walkable and calm. The windows didn't let in too much street noise; I've never slept better in New York in my life! Thanks to the central heat, it was warm on cold days and, thanks to the AC, got cool quickly on hot days. After a long day of work, I truly felt like I was coming home. I was really happy here and would definitely stay here again.

What an amazing experience. This place looks better than the pictures. The owner responds extremely fast. This place has LED lights everywhere and alexa speakers in every room. It came equipped with everything you need including a spa chair.
Henry was a great host. Everything looks like the pictures and he was so kind and friendly. I would choose his house again.

In general it's good. The room is not too large, like a studio with 3 beds inside. The small kitchen and fridge are bouns for us. The best thing is the location, in K town, close to anywhere. So you only look for a place for night sleep and spend the day touring in NYC, it's recommended.
Hosts were super responsive and helpful, no complaints at all!

Everything about this hotel was much better than I had expected. I was just expecting to stay at a good place very close to Times Square but it ended up being a great place in a great location. I will definitely be looking to return again in the future!!!
Excelente lugar en Manhattan a un excelente precio.
Dini’s place is clean and spacious! The T station is just right around the corner! Highly recommend!

I had a great stay at Sebastian and Andrea’s place in Astoria. They are truly wonderful hosts who were more than accommodating during my time there. I just relocated to NYC for a new job and Sebastian and Andrea were extremely kind and helpful and wanting to make sure I had a good layout of the city, places for eat, and their favorite spots. I couldn’t have been luckier to have such great hosts for the month. I would highly recommend their property for any short-term or long-term stay as the room was clean and well taken care of. There is a giant flatscreen TV with all major streaming services, a well functioning window AC unit, and a comfortable bed, as well. There is a large sectional couch and plenty of closet space, too.
They are genuinely kind and gracious hosts, which seems to be a rarity these days. All in all, you won’t be disappointed, book it!
Great location! Close to everything you need. Small space but worked for our little family.

Had a great stay for a couple of nights at this place. Very reasonably priced place according to the location and was a quick walk away from the train station. Roy was very accommodating and actively responded to any questions and concerns I had.

Jas was a great host! The place was clean, it had a full kitchen with a proper oven so we cooked many of our meals at home. The area is quite safe and close to all types of public transport, the bus stop is literally outside the house. Definitely recommend this place! 10/10 points.
Amazing location, beautiful neighborhood, super comfy bed!

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour au Placemakr. L’hôtel est bien situé, proche du métro et il faut environ 20 minutes pour aller à Times Square. L’emplacement est plutôt calme. Le personnel est très aimable et à l’écoute . La déco de l’hôtel est très sympa. Le studio+ qu’on avait réservé était spacieux (on était 4) et la déco, également sympa. Il y avait juste quelques petits défauts (tuyau de douche très abîmé, tiroirs qui s’ouvrent très mal…) qui pourraient facilement être améliorés. Il y a beaucoup de rangement, c’était bien pratique. Bref, si on revient à New York, nous n’hésiterons pas à réserver de nouveau au Placemakr.
Great place
Jordan was very helpful and communicative. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at his apartment!
great host, scary neighborhood but I knew what I was signing up for and inside and host were lovely.

Die Unterkunft von Edgar ist gut erreichbar und liegt im jûdischen Viertel, man bekommt Eindrücke über das tägliche Leben dort.
Alles ist sehr sauber und Edgar ist sehr freundlich und man kann gut mit ihm kommunizieren.
Wir haben uns bei ihm und Digi sehr wohl gefühlt und können seine Unterkunft uneingeschränkt empfehlen.
Wouldnt stay again
Jean was great. Very responsive and attentive all the time. The place is well equipped with all that you need.

En este hotel el ascensor estuvo dañado y la habitación tenía muy mal olor. Por el precio que pagamos esperábamos mejor limpieza y fácil uso de ascensor. Además el desayuno fue pésimo! No recomendamos el lugar

Our family of 4 stayed for almost 2 weeks. The apartment provided enough room for us all, the AC worked great (it was very hot in NYC) and we slept very comfortably. The hosts were always quick to respond when we needed trash pickup or had questions about the city. The location was perfect for seeing shows, eating out, visiting Times Square, and taking the subway.
I would definitely stay here again during out next visit to NYC.

Inexpensive for central location. Arrival bag of water and snack and free breakfast with hot options, fruit, and coffee appreciated. Reasonably clean, however, room and floor had a bit of a urine-y odor. Overall, for location near to Times Square,  midtown, and lots of train lines, it’s a solid for budget accommodation.
This was a great place to stay.  . Quiet and clean
Lugar precioso, muy cómodo , limpio y tranquilo. Se los recomiendo, estube estube 4 dias con mi familia y quedaron encantados.
Anne was amazing, very easy to comunicate with. Very clean an cozy space. Close to The Subway And treat us very well.
It was a great stay. Definitely recommend

From booking to checkout we were impressed. Donna was communicative, clear and concise, her home was well-maintained and beautiful plus the area was quiet with stores and restaurants within walking distance. This is the kind of experience Airbnb hosts should always seek to provide.

Brinton is a fantastic host. Communication was flawless. Brinton recommended the best places to eat and what to do, extremely friendly guy.
The place itself is cosy and exactly as described. the 125th lines 2-3 subway station is 2 mins walk making the entire city easily accessible. Whole Foods and Traders Joe are just a few mins walk from the apt making grocery shopping a breeze.
Lovely stay,
We spent a good time here. The location of the apartment is great. Very clean inside. Super communication with the owner. We recommend.
The place is a great location
Johnny on mahtava isäntä ja huoneisto täydellinen vierailuun. Keskustelu ja vieraanvaraisuus ihailtavaa. Kaikki toimi aina loistavasti. Kiitos Johnny.
好
Cristian was a great host incredibly responsive. I would definitely stay again.

Beautiful and private apartment, very fun vibe while still feeling very safe and clean. Was a great last minute stay. I know this is listed as a shared space but this is super private as the shared part is the hall separated with a door.
Great location! Sara was responsive and flexible with check-in and check-out, too. Cute decor.
It’s okay if you’re in the situation where you have to stay somewhere for a day or two.
Great location with lots of options of where to eat! Safe neighborhood and walkable to anything you may need. Front office staff is friendly and very helpful! I look forward to staying here again :)
We really enjoyed our stay. Toby was very responsive and helpful. The location is perfect, easy subway access to Manhattan. We felt safe and comfortable here.
Just what you need in New York, the hostess responds quickly. Thank you for your kindness
Helen & Alfred's place was great. Nice and close to restaurants, shops and subway. It was clean and we had everything we needed and more. Would stay here again.
Easy hassle free check in and great location. Definitely will stay again!

I have stayed at numerous Airbnb’s in nyc and this Airbnb is by far the nicest and quietest one I have ever stayed at.  When we arrived, Dimitri’s son helped carry my bag when he saw me outside.  Such a sweet family!  The space is beautiful and smells good too!! The beds are sooooo comfy.  Everything is brand new and so nice.   We slept out in the living room and it was so quiet at night.  The neighborhood is beautiful and the shops are right up the street.  Amazing restaurants and coffee shops and a sweet live music venue all within walking distance.  We will DEFINITELY stay here again!
Accurate description! Answered all my questions. Very clean

Anna’s place was amazing. Perfect for two people. You have everything you need and it is located in a great area of Brooklyn. Really easy to go to or from Manhattan or Queens. It was our first time in NYC and the location allowed us to do so much! Everything was perfect. From cleanliness to clear instructions! Will definitely stay again in the future

Tonya était très avenante, très disponible !
Fidèle à la description
J'y reviendrais sûrement !

We had a great stay at Maria’s. The room was clean and spacious, with very comfortable beds. Walkable to two train stations for a quick ride into Manhattan, endless options for food, drink, and shopping in the neighborhood. There is a great brewery right across the street, Keg & Lantern, get the tater tots! We would certainly stay here again.

logement très bien situé, très propre.
accueil très chaleureux.

Andreas was a great host! Very responsive. We felt very homey and taken care of with all the amenities that came with the place! He even has AC units in the bedrooms and living room incase it gets to hot. Would recommend this listing!!

Great location can walk to so many places but quiet neighborhood   Very clean. No railing on wall to third floor and very steep stairs. No issue for most but was difficult for my 85 yr old mother to climb and come down confidently

Armando is an amazing host who was so helpful and had great recommendations! Location is easy to get to train and has a lot of coffee shops and bodegas nearby! Space was perfect for two couples! But couch would not be comfy to stay on so highly recommended only two couples or ok to stay with other person in same bed. Ac was great!

If you want a swanky, grownup version of a college dorm, this is it! Placemakr offers small-but-stylish apartments in the heart of a bustling neighborhood, with the perfect slate of amenities: a high-quality gym, a free laundry room with ping pong and pool tables, community kitchens and an outdoor terrace. My husband, three kids and I used a four-bedroom apartment here as our home base to explore New York. We appreciated the strategic use of small spaces, the luxurious showers and nice bath products, the view of the Brooklyn Bridge and the friendly staff in the lobby. We also loved being able to walk right across the street to the waterfront, and a few blocks the other direction to a subway stop. We'd absolutely stay here again!
Ruhige Gegend. Gut eingerichtetes Haus. Abisoye ist ein guter Gastgeber.
close to subway line and host was very responsive!
This is a lovely bungalow that is updated, clean, and comfortable. We stayed here for a month and had one plumbing issue, which the host resolved ASAP. Her quick response is a huge plus!
Brian was wonderful at communicating with you about anything. He really made everything feel like you were at home and just a lovely person overall
Amazing place

My stay here was lovely! Beautiful hotel! Friendly staff. My only complaint was the extra fees required to be paid at the hotel after paying for everything online. I feel that it’ll be best if everything is charged at once to avoid any confusion. But I understand that hotels have their own policies so it’s no fault to hosts. Overall. They were great host!
地點離時代廣場跟百老匯都很近，走路就可以到，入住退房簡單，房間與照片相符

I had an amazing stay, the place was very clean and well maintained, very close to a subway station and in a safe area. The host is very friendly and would definitely recommend this place to anyone planning to stay in Brooklyn.
An impeccably decorated home that was a cozy restful spot after busy days. It’s close to the 6 line and I love the neighbourhood. It’s not too busy or overwhelming.
I really liked my stay at Agustin's beautiful apartment!  Viva Bushwick!
Unfortunately I had to leave early due to a family emergency. I only spent one night of my stay there. No complaints, nice overall location.

it was simply an amazing place to be!
They know what they are doing and they are absolutely thoughtful!!!

The room was clean, but the bathroom was not. Our towels had stains on them and neither of us could sleep due to the loud noise. Upon first entering, the woman at the front desk was quite short with us and not clear on instructions. Additionally, we both received multiple bug bites overnight and noticed a horde of ants in the front lounge area. Wouldn’t go again just because of the hygienic situation tbh

Quarto espaçoso e confortável, a cozinha poderia ter uma mesa com cadeiras para as refeições e um espaço de estar mas não tem nada, tal e qual como mostra a foto. A limpeza do apartamento nunca foi feita durante o período da estadia, a casa de banho estava sempre muito suja. A caldeira esteve sempre avariada durante a estadia e ninguém a reparou.

This stay is in a great location right next to a lot of restaurants, coffee shops, and a Whole Foods. My wife and I enjoyed our stay and our dog loved the quick access to Central Park. The apartment was clean and well furnished but was missing a couple items needed for a long term stay. Those being pans for the oven and dish towels for cleaning. Other than that, the place was just as described in the listing.
Happy with the stay

Aron’s place is the garden of Eden in the heart of Brooklyn. We loved our stay at his cozy home away from home. The entry way makes this subterranean apartment feel like paradise. The attention to detail in
Aron’s place surpassed any Airbnb we have stayed at. We cannot wait to return. Thank you so much!
Great stay and helpful host!

Not only was Rose’s place so roomy and inviting, but her attentiveness and quickness to respond was what really made the stay worthwhile. It felt no different than letting a friend come over to stay. Everything we needed, from a steamer, to learn how to turn on the air conditioner, we would get a response within minutes of asking. At one point, we had a problem with the blanket in the bedroom, and Rose immediately had a new one shipped to the home so we could be comfortable for the rest of our stay. I had a two-year-old daughter who just loved running around the empty space. we are so grateful for a perfect stay here. Def worth it 💯

Kimberly was a very friendly host who was also there to answer questions. Very uncomplicated. It was great that we could leave our luggage on the day of departure after check-out and pick it up later.
The location is very good.
With a little more attention to detail in the interior design, a lot could be made of the apartment.

We had a wonderful stay at Tuan’s. The room was very comfortable and private. The bathroom was extremely clean and had great amenities. Tuan himself was very responsive and would get back to any questions we had promptly. He also offers cleaning of your room every week and he does it quickly and meticulously. The house was also nice and quiet. The room had a small personal fridge and a TV which we found very convenient. The location was very good with it being a little over a five minute walk to the 5 train, which takes you in directly to the city. I would highly recommend staying at Tuan’s for his excellent service, value and location!
Great place, especially for a family with a child! Lots of fun toys. Beautiful space. Great neighborhood close to so many things including a great park with a playground.

Kerri and Andrae's place was very accessible and a short drive away to the airport. They were very responsive to any issues that I had and made things comfortable during my stay. Unfortunately, the AC was having issues at the time, but Kerri and Andrae were able to accommodate, and a shower and lots of water did the trick to keep me cool!

Apartment is exactly as described and appears as the photos.  Check-in with Allan was great, who also provided awesome local food recommendations.  Location is superb.  Super close to subway etc.  Would easily stay again if we have the opportunity.
They made me feel right at home. A convenient place to stay when visiting the city.

Mi primera ves en NYC no pudo ser mejor y esto también gracias al buen Steve, un excelente anfitrión, atento en todo momento, flexible en la llegada, siempre respondió mis dudas, mi esposa y yo pasamos una semana en la casa de Steve y en verdad la casa está impecable, los cuartos super cómodos, la zona super tranquila, la estación de trenes a unas cuadras de la casa, en verdad es una super opción alojarte aqui , esperamos regresar el próximo año y volver a coincidir con Steve 👋🏻
Good

Positivo: la ubicación es excelente, cerca de todo! Es un buen lugar para 2/3 personas máximo.
Cosas a mejorar: para dormir entra mucha luz, estaría bueno tener alguna cortina que se pueda usar el aire y entre menos luz.
Súper recomendable precio/calidad.

This property was a great find and a much better value than a hotel. German was a fantastic host, super responsive and the home meet our expectations exactly with a true city vibe. Very clean and thoughtful touches like the awesome herbal tea selections…again this property accommodated our family well. Thanks German!

Sandari is the best host
She communicates well with her and is very generous
The accommodation was clean and the bedding and mattress were very soft, so I slept well.
I had a happy time in a lovely hostel
Beautiful place to stay good location , Anna was a lovely host responded to anything I needed clear instructions, fridge was topped up with some goodies and snacks too which was nice gesture.

It was a nice and clean. Not the biggest room but perfectly fine for a short trip to New York. The location is great and public transport, restaurants etc. is very close by. After some issues with the check-in code, we had a good stay.

Thanks Art. My family and I really appreciated your hospitality
Would gladly recommend to anyone
Great place to stay.    I highly recommend!
Clean and quiet! Lovely accommodation.

Arielle’s place was a perfect fit for my semi long term stay. It’s near the ACBD. Two express  stops puts you right in midtown. It was cozy, and comfortable. Arielle’s was extremely welcoming and truly accommodated me on such short notice. I’d stay here again and again and again.
Great stay :)

The hosts were friendly and responsive. The apartment could have been cleaner, and it tends to get very hot because of no A/C. It's an overall okay place to stay if you don't plan on being home during the day.
Great location, flexible check-in and check-out, and clean, cozy space.
Excellent host and place to stay

Farhan was a great host, he was kind, friendly and gave us an in-depth tour of the home upon arrival. The home was spotless and very cozy with great furnishings and style. There were also many smart home features that made our stay more enjoyable! The bathrooms were extremely clean and comfortable as well as the rest of the space. We enjoyed this stay 10/10 would recommend!
Shelley ist eine sehr freundliche und zuverlässige Adresse. Die Wohnung ist sehr sauber und gepflegt.

Please book here! Wonderful home and host. Kara communicated promptly and helped make our stay comfortable. Loved the location because we were 2.5 blocks from the subway and half a block from a deli. This is a great home to stay.
Lola is an amazing host. She is kind and friendly. We always felt safe and comfortable at her place. I highly recommend her! If we go back to NYC, we would definitely stay at her place. Thanks Lola!

This is a great place to stay in lower Manhattan. Lots to see in the immediate area and great food/amenities. Excellent access to subways to get anywhere in NYC. Room was very large and comfortable for the family.  We had a great time and would definitely recommend.

-Excelente localização
- Casa espaçosa para um casal e muito limpa.
I had a very comfortable and relaxing stay here. David and Janet were very easy to communicate with. The place was spacious, clean, and the interior decoration + architecture were very nice.
Nyesha’s place was great for our family of five. It was very clean and spacious. Tons of food options nearby. We had a great time!

Thoroughly enjoyed staying at Lindsee and Peter's place. It gave us a snapshot of what it might feel like to live in Nolita/Soho. Very cozy and comfortable and Lindsee and Peter were helpful and responsive, and checked in frequently, even though they were in a different timezone. I spent part of the time working remotely from the dining room table - which worked great.
The views from the balcony were spectacular - the World Trade Center in one direction and the Empire State Building in the other. And views of the lovely Elizabeth Street Garden from the apartment. Also really liked the decor and art around the place.
It is a 5th floor walk-up, and the bedroom us up a narrow spiral staircase (which you can see in the pictures) - wasn't a problem for us, but something to consider.

Die Wohnung hat eine sehr gute Lage - mittendrin. Vieles ist zu Fuss erreichbar, viele Restaurants in der Nähe und auch mehrere Subway Stationen. Elena hat immer rasch reagiert und das Check-In hat super funktioniert. Elena hat klar kommuniziert, dass die Wohnung nicht neu ist - also nichts Schönes erwarten. Auf den Fotos sieht die Wohnung allerdings heller aus, als sie wirklich ist.

Had a great stay.Very spacious.
Mahbuba was friendly and very helpful.
pokój mały ale tylko w nim spaliśmy. miałem obawy, że wspólne łazienki nie będą dobra opcją ale na miejscu okazało się, że są OK. Świetne miejsce jako baza wypadowa na Manhatann.
This is the spot 🔥❤️😍❤️ I love it

We loved our stay, you get what you pay for an space to rest and visit the city, very accessible to public transportation but gotta say the parking situation was an absolute nightmare, even tho it’s not the host responsibility at all it’s good to have it in mind.

Helen was very accomodating and personable and overall an excellent host. She responded quickly to our requests through the app. Shower pressure was great in the bathroom. Room was a bit noisy, but was fine with earplugs. Close location to subway station.

Great location - a few minutes from Bedford St. where you can jump on the direct line to Manhattan. Rooms are small but when you’re booking in a pod hotel, you should expect accordingly. Highly recommend for an affordable stay in NYC!

Sara’s place was larger than we expected, very spacious bedroom and a little study alongside it.  It is right beside a great park. Her place is dog friendly which is awesome. The closest subway is the G line which only goes between Brooklyn and Queens meaning an extra change or two for any Manhattan locations. Within Brooklyn we usually found ourselves walking to Williamsburg or other parts. Sara was a kind and friendly host and got back to us literally within seconds whenever we had questions.

Staff very nice and accommodating. Even when our initial room wasn’t ready when we arrived they were quick to find a solution and give perks to make up for any inconvenience. Location was nice and easy to find. Very quick communication. Great views too.
Great, he give me earlier check-in and late check out, its very helpfull
Junior was a fantastic host! We were able to check in early which was great . He greeted us at the door and went over everything with us very accommodating
Clean, comfy, a great base to explore Queens from.
Cute, little space in brooklyn with walking distance of the subways and of downtown Brooklyn. Host communicates in timely manner.

The apartment was nice and clean. Had enough space as a studio for two of us. Place looked just like the pictures. Ran into an issue when trying to drop off the keys, but Edward was very responsive and was able to help us out.
It was a nice cosy house, home away from home and what truely stands out is the backyard. I just loved it. Definitely recommend to everyone visitng Newyork.

Our group liked this place. It’s walkable and close to a train station.
A few notes: one of the bathrooms is small and leaks water all over the floor. If you’re coming in the winter, there is barely any heat in the apartment, even when we asked it to be raised. While we primarily used it as a place to just sleep and shower, we found that there weren’t many towels, laundry soap, or extra blankets. There was also hair, and it was quite dusty inside. The dining room chairs are falling apart and it’s definitely a cheap feel apartment. Use this apartment for just the basics for a weekend trip.
This place is in the perfect location! within walking/subway distance of everything you would want to see in the city. the cute balcony was everything to me. definitely recommend!!

Overall good quality/price.
Patricia instruction to check-in and out with local recommendations was clear and useful.
Place was exactly like the photos and descriptions. Very accessible with public transportation down the street.

We were glad that there was an additional heater and big blanket when it was freezing outside. Make it very cozy inside.
The area is pretty quiet. The studio could be improved bit with maybe a bit more ustensiles in the kitchen and renew some parts but it was not an inconvenience for us. (you can hear the water/heating in the pipes when other are using it in the building and the toaster was sometime flipping out).
There was a confusion with another appartement rented in the building by Patricia that she was very quick to clarify and fix.
Great homey place. Located very close to J train and lots of stores and restaurants. Walked everywhere. Enjoyed the place!
It was a pleasure staying at Jose’s place. Jose and Ernesto are very responsive, friendly and always willing to help. The room was great and spotless. I would stay again.

מיקום מעולה, נקי , מרווח, חדרים גדולים ומושקעים עם כל האיבזור הנדרש.
נוח מאוד גם לעבודה וגם לתיירים.
מומלץ!
This is a calm place and host maintains cleanliness.

Brilliant location and lovely apartment. A very short walk from Central Park. Short walk to subway.  Joe gave clear instructions on how to check in. Really nice place, comfortable beds. We just used it as a base but the kitchen looked well stocked. Thank you

For this room to not even be big enough for me to unfold my suitcase, you would think it would be about $50 a night. Only two of the outlets in the room were functioning. You could hear everything in the hallway as if the walls were made from paper! The housekeeping staff was quite annoying asking to clean our “cubbie” everyday. The “bathroom” space was so small I literally felt as if I were in an upscale portable bathroom. This was not worth the price at all whatsoever. No space for your items that you bring let alone yourself. This room would be good for someone who travels with just a book bag. Nowhere to eat besides in the bed, nowhere to store your food or warm it up or anything. If I could give a 0/10 I would.

I arrived on crutches and the receptionist gave us a room upgrade. 10 min walk to Times Square. I wouldn’t want to stay any closer as it’s so loud and busy. We spent most of our time exploring the rest of NYC. There were lots of coffee shops and food options downstairs. Breakfast included was great and they have takeaway coffee cups available all day. You could walk in any direction to see the sights. We could see the Empire State Building from our room. Check out was easy and we were able to store our baggage safely until we needed to leave in the evening. They also offer a shuttle service. A man employed by the hotel took us to the airport. We paid him and not the hotel but he was hired to be there. This service wasn’t advertised.  I asked prior to arrival and they said they didn’t offer this service for some reason. It would have been helpful to use it on arrival as well. We just waited out the front of the hotel and one of the hotel staff were interacting with a suited up driver wh
Alhaj and If we're very kind and gracious hosts. They were generous and very quick to respond. The apartment is in a safe area.

Moying is a fabulous host. The room is spacious and comfortable. You can reach any part of the city from here. Moying is full of recommendations for the area.
I especially recommend her for solo travellers. She always open for a chat and also very understanding if you aren't. For someone like me, who is chatty in the morning but too exhausted to hold a proper conversation in the evening, this was perfect.
I felt like a real New Yorker with Moying as my roommate and local friend. :)
Great 5 day stay, would do it again to avoid big name hotels.Easy check-in and check-out , breakfast drink and pastry were an extra plus!
I highly recommend this places I would stay there again ❤️❤️

Hermoso departamento en el corazón de Manhattan, vamos a volver.
Gracias por todo
Excellent place! Super comfortable bed and air mattress for two guests. Lots of room and very clean.
everything was great! space was private and clean.

Despite the hustle and bustle of the convenient location​ close to all sorts of shops and transport, the room feels like a refuge as it's semi-private and quiet. ​The bed is comfortable, and ​the room​ is large with nice little touches​ added for convenience/comfort.  ​The host, Mike​, offers exceptional hospitality. ​He is welcoming, accommodating, ​considerate and respectful of ​a guest's privacy​, y​et if one feels like socializing, he's an interesting conversationalist. ​Overall, a wonderful human being. Thanks, Mike, for a wonderful stay!!
Danforth Prince graciously welcomes you into his curated, fascinating, astonishingly decorated home. I felt instantly enveloped in warmth and wonder. Expert to be amazed! Have fun!
We had a good time at this rental. The room is small, but comfortable enough, beautifully decorated and, what's more, quiet. Easy access to all major attractions.  Karen and Scott are great hosts.
Все було чітко, метро поруч, до Манхеттена 20 хв
It might have been good but will never know

When coming to New York we really only needed a place to sleep that was close to a subway. Michelle’s beautiful home was perfect. The room was clean with a refrigerator, microwave, and a closet. Just what we needed. It’s only a 5-7 min walk to Nostrand which can connect to pretty much anywhere.
The bathroom is shared with two other rooms and there may be some cross over but it was never an issue. It was cleaned and had fresh towels daily.
Would definitely recommend!

Great Apartment in the heart of Brooklyn. Lots of space and light in the rooms. Quick walks to Trainstations, Cafés, Restaurants. Guglielmo was always quick to respond and very helpful. Will definitely come back, thank you for everything!
My husband and I had a great stay at Sharmila’s condo. Everything was exactly as described and check in and check out was a breeze. Hope to come back!

I visited Michelle's place for second time. And again I was delighted. The house in on a beautiful street, close to train/underground station, shops.
Clean and quiet. Michelle is very helpful and communication with her is great!
We loved being only a couple blocks from Central Park! Also, a subway station across the street, walking distance to Broadway shows & a bunch of restaurants. Great location!

Great spot for what we needed family birthday , catchup and reunion
out of the hussele and busslw but walking distance to all the main areas
clean and friendly. definitely book with you again.

The location couldn’t be better – close to supermarkets, metro etc. - just everything u need.
A special highlight was his cute cat louie😍 The apartment itself was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. I can’t recommend this place enough and would gladly stay here again in the future 😇

Location is perfect related to Penn Station. Amenities and room are just as described in the listing. Room runs hot and unfortunately, the window AC unit even when turned to 60 does not sufficiently cool down the room.
Great stay
Excelente lugar recomendado

You cannot beat the location of Boris' place!! And the building is quiet too. It is larger than the photos suggest, and Boris has many great touches (snacks, interesting art, video game set, etc.) The kitchen is well equipped, the water pressure was excellent, and the heat was just right. Boris' is gracious and communicative, and everything was smooth. Thank you!
This place is extremely well located in a nice neighborhood just steps away of Q line. The place is great, well equiped and well mantained. Great deal.
Lakisha was very communicative and the area was nice
Staying here felt like being at home - moving here from out of state was stressful, but Ervita made sure my girlfriend and I were taken care of, always.

The location was perfect! Jessica was an amazing host and went above and beyond to make this trip perfect. Definitely my favorite spot in Brooklyn and now permanently bookmarked for future trips. Thank you Jessica!
Place was perfect for what I needed
Would definitely consider again. Was a cozy experience.
Great place to stay. Thank you
I’d stay with Maggie again!

Eu gostei muito da localização, fiz muita coisa a pé, e o metrô era super perto! Estacionamento quase que do lado só atravessei a rua e fui para o hotel! Perfeito voltarei na primavye ficarei no mesmo hotel! Não tenho nada a reclamar
really spacious, clean and homey. Great stay!

Amazing location, right in the heart of Dumbo, local Deli’s a short walk for everything you need,.  York St subway is visible from the accommodation, and was the quickest and easiest way in to Manhattan and Brooklyn.

We stayed at Nina’s beautiful Airbnb in Park Slope for over a month. The location is nestled in Park Slope, Brooklyn. Lots to do, and it was always so pleasant to walk back home into a brownstone. Thank you for the lovely stay!
Good place to stay! Good value

Perfect location and willingness to help. The space is not big (nothing new in NYC) but it is confortable and clean. You don't need much more. And then again: extraordinary follow up and communication.
Good location, great building.  Missing some basic linens and kitchenware

Thank you so much for allowing us to stay in your interesting and original corky space ! It’s super swanky and as a super host delivered on all levels . Tons of amenities that over exceeds anyones needs . Thank you for having us and hopefully will be back to stay sometime soon ! This place is 10 out of 10 ! Touché !!

We had a great stay at Richard’s place. We were barely in there due to exploring all around the city, but it was lovely to come back to. It was very impressive to our family members and had lots of space. An amazing  place and we would stay again.
Great place for needing a room while exploring Brooklyn. Perfect deli/store across the sidewalk for pretty much all you could need for a short trip and so so so close to the L train.
Great place, very small, but very clean!
Sheena is a great host! Her place was very clean and tidy. Would definitely be coming back again !
great host!
Loved The Ridge Hotel! Amazing location for night life. About the space it’s definitely tight but great for 1!
Good
Everything was alright, would recommend. Very clean and nice
This was a beautiful apartment. It was close to the subways and plenty of restaurants. Had a great time staying here!

I was ending my 2 week trip and it was great place to stay to really knock out. I slept very well and it was a good place to catch-up on some sleep. I was out the next morning and they provided great help.
Such a beautiful home can wait to share my experience with my family and friends

I really enjoyed my stay here.
Train is about a 10 minute walk and has easy access to Manhattan. Linda provided great recommendations nearby as well
Linda was also flexible with check-in and check-out, which was a huge help.
It was a great stay.

Wir haben eine Suite im 25. Stock Penthouse gebucht mit Terrasse und Sicht nach Osten/Süden und Westen über die Nachbarterrasse. Beim Checkin über das Hotel wurde uns ein Zimmer ohne Balkon/ Terrasse zugewiesen, aber sofort nach Vorzeigen der Buchungsbestätigung korrigiert. Gepäckservice inkl.
Sehr grosszügige Räume.
Das dritte Bett (ca.120 Ausziehsofa) wurde umgehend nach Meldung bereitgestellt.
Die Fenster lassen sich öffnen, aber nur einen Spalt, ausreichend für frische Luft und ohne Sorgen, rauszufallen.
Grosses Bad mit grosser vielseitiger Dusche. Etwas wenig Ablagefläche aber dafür 4 Aufhänger für Kleider oder Duschtücher.
Im Schlafzimmer gibt es einen Einbauschrank mit Kleiderbügel, aber keine weiteren Ablage- oder Schrankmöglichkeiten, ausser schmalen Schubladen im Bett. Diese haben wir nicht benutzt, dafür das Bügelbrett als Ablage und aus den Koffern gelebt, da gebührend Platz war am Boden.
Das Restaurant war nur wenig offen, eine Bar oder Getränke abends wäre nett.
Buena ubicación ; la habitación se uso solamente para dormir

Great value place to stay at New York. Located at heart of Maspeth. It's easy to gain access everywhere. There is a bus stop right on the main road so all you need is a metro card. Would recommend to anyone.

Good option for a NYC stay, nice kitchen and bathroom, spacious unit, nicely appointed, quiet neighbors.  It’s called the 17 John Hotel, but the vibe is more like an apt building with 24-7 security.  Felt secure, busy neighborhood, lots of restaurants and coffee shops, etc.
It's a great place to stay in Brooklyn.

This is my second time booking Laurence's place. He kindly accommodated my friends and they absolutely loved it!
Laurence is a great host, very welcoming and always goes the extra mile.
The location is perfect close to subways and shops nearby.
I will definitely book again!

Well felt right at home staying at this location. The host was very responsive, friendly, and a joy to speak with. We initially had booked another Airbnb that did not meet our standards and Jules was accommodating ensuring we were well taken care of. If we find ourselves in NYC again, we would gladly book again!

Excellent stay at Kurt's place! He was very clear about checking in and checking out. Answered questions in a timely manner. The place was clean and exactly what was pictured. I was very pleased with this stay! For our purposes the location want the greatest, but that's because I didn't know what I was doing when I booked it. We worked with it. It was very close to JFK which was convenient but quite noisy. I wouldn't hesitate to book with Kurt again!

The hotel is in Times Square elevators were plentiful. 52 floors with great views of NYC. Quite clean room with staff above and beyond. Ice on every floor. Plenty of coffee, towels and cleaning service available daily. We were so pleased booked another trip during Christmas/NYE to further explore the City. Close to subway stations. Concierge had printed instructions how to get to each Iconic landmark one may wish to visit.

It was a pleasure for us to stay at Jose’s place. He was very polite and supportive. The house was clean and tidy, equipped with everything you need. Location is good for exploring New York. The metro line F is just about 5 min away. I highly recommend Jose’s property!
Thank you, Anderson! Everything was nice! I enjoyed my stay!
This is a very peaceful place in the Bronx. The hosts were lovely and helpful. I’d recommend it to anyone!
Very good hosts
Great spot with a lot to do around the area

Disfrutamos mucho de nuestra estadía en NYC, la casa fue perfecta para nuestra visita porque se encontraba cerca de
todo

Our stay was wonderful. We felt safe and at home. Raymond & Kymme were very responsive. Our home away from home had everything we needed and more! Our only regret is that we didn't use the backyard area! It looked awesome.

Super séjour chez Christina, à 5 en famille, on se sentait à l'aise, comme à la maison ! Appartement confortable et très bien équipé, avec des chauffages efficaces dans toutes les pièces, et tout ce qu'il nous fallait (des draps, serviettes de toilette, lave et sèche-linge à tout le nécessaire de cuisine, épices, sauces, etc.), très agréable d'avoir tout à disposition ! Un truc génial et pas si gadget que ça en fait : musique et lumières colorées dans la magnifique douche, parfait pour bien commencer sa journée new-yorkaise ! On a pu profiter de la sympathique cour arrière avec son canapé sous pergola autour d'une table à feu, son vidéo-projecteur, son brasero… et même un barbecue top classe ! Enfin, last but not least, Christina se montre la meilleure des hôtes possible : discrète mais présente, réactive à chaque demande, de bon conseil, charmante, attentionnée, une très belle personne ! Le café du quartier est en effet un super lieu ! Et merci pour la bouteille de vin, délicieux !
Front desk charged me 2 deposits and never gave me a clear answer as to why and now I have to go up there Monday morning to speak with someone.
Rob’s listing was in a wonderful location and had all the listed amenities! Super clean and bright and only a 5 minute walk to the station. Highly recommend!

I could not recommend this place higher. It is my best Airbnb experience so far. Everything is just spot on - location, cleanliness, appliances. It is more than comfortable enough for that price. On top of that, Vigil is one of the most wonderful and kind people I have ever met in my life. Do not think twice, book it! I will definitely come back again and again.

Araz fue muy serio y atento. Siempre a disposición de nosotros. El lugar esta en una zona residencial, hermosa y segura. A una cuadra del mar. Lo recomiendo y volvería sin ninguna duda. A poca distancia de la zona comercial de Brighton Beach, a 50 metros de dos lineas de bus y cerca del metro. Bien comunicado con el centro de Brooklyn. Pasamos 3 días muy lindos. Araz se ofreció para llevarnos al aeropuerto y lo hicimos.  Excelente en todo sentido

Mark was very responsive to any questions that I had. His house is in a nice part of Ozone Park, close to the subway, restaurants, delis, etc. The place was nice with a wood interior and a tile floor, fast WiFi and lots of entertainment on the TV. Great place to stay in Queens!
Great place to stay! Host was very responsive!

It makes sense that people talk about Henri; he's very friendly and responsible. The venue was amazing. The water pipes smell a bit odd, and the hairdryer doesn't work.  But it doesn't discount the value of the place.

Ian’s place was super cute and cozy! Check in was smooth and he was very warm and friendly - periodically checking in to make sure I had everything I needed. I felt right at home during my stay. Loved the neighborhood as well, convenient to get around most parts of BK!
P.S. the Liza painting and (selfmade) disco ball planter was a fab touch

The house and neighborhood was gorgeous!! The decor was very homey & there were even little things to match our moon room bedroom that was a cute little touch. Amanda was extremely helpful and very responsive every time I messaged her to make sure I had a PERFECT stay. She also helped me plan a surprise for my boyfriend and decorated our room for us that made me know she took her time with prepping for our stay. She also allowed us to use the hot tub which was very sweet of her. Check in and check out was also very smooth. If you’re looking for a 5 star experience this is the place to stay!!

I stayed at Cindy's place from the 28th of April until 5th May. I was extremely pleased with the accommodation. The configuration of the apartment is as per the description and as seen in the photos.The apartment was neat, clean and within close proximity to the areas that I was interested in. It was also quite comfortable and homely. It was exactly what I was looking for, needless to say that my expectations were exceeded.
I found Cindy to be a very thorough, personable and hospitable person. She was prompt to respond to my queries prior to booking. Her responses were detailed, honest and accurate. She maintained the same disposition to resolve issues (minor) that were encountered during the stay.
She was also very thoughtful. I found that the welcome note, water cooler and snacks provided were an excellent touch and what I would refer to as the " cherry on top". It came in handy for me as I was travelling and was tired, hungry and a bit dehydrated upon arrival.
Thank you Cindy for being a wonderful hostess. Best wishes to you!
It is a great place and a convenient location.  Best of all, it's your own place, no sharing!

Joshua was super kind and really good at answering any inquiry I had.
Place was nice and peaceful too.

Great space, wonderful for a couple!
Great location and Charles is a nice guy and also answer fast if you need something. We really recommend that place for anyone

Great host, Adam went out of their to meet my travel needs. He was very quick to respond to my needs which I appreciated. The location is great and super convenient, would highly recommend this spot if you are traveling through NYC. Easy access to the L train will get you anywhere in the city. Thanks Adam for making my stay in NYC a breeze!
Zina was an amazing host and very responsive to all of our needs and questions. She even provided us a desk as we are students and needed a place to study. Overall we had a comfortable 1 month stay.

Really enjoyed my stay! Location was walking distance from everything great Williamsburg has to offer. Martin was very responsive and made check-in easy. I did plenty of cooking and kitchen was well stocked with everything I needed. Would recommend!
Great guy, great and safe place to stay. Thanks Gerry 👍🏻
Ming is an incredibly warm and welcoming host! We had a great stay in her lovely Park Slope brownstone. Ming has excellent stories and her singing is beautiful

een prima verblijf met een goede prijskwaliteit verhouding.  Buurt niet de meest luxe, maar geen gedoe en geen herrie. mensen allemaal aardig en op zichzelf. lekker dicht bij hoofd metrostation nr 7. Al met al een top lokatie
Carl war sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Er war immer super erreichbar und seine Tipps zu Restaurants, Sehenswürdigkeiten und so weiter waren sehr gut. Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt sehr genossen.

Again - my stay here was amazing.
The hospitality, the generous manner, the availability - all and many more things are on the very highest level. The whole team (Saul, David, Juan, Omar, the cleaning lady) is tremendous.
I recommend highly this building and especially apartment 6CD, which is the best in town.
Thank you!

The location is excellent and safe. You can walk to Central Park in 2 minutes and the Museum of Natural History in 9 Minutes. Several subway lines are close to make getting around the city quite simple. It's close to many great restaurants. The studio is clean. There is a well stocked kitchen so that you can cook at home. I love the comfy bed and the best spray in the bathroom. The host is quick to answer any questions you may have. Everything is perfect. Highly recommended.
Great stay again! Free coffee and pastries is a nice touch!
Great little spot! Host was very responsive and accommodating. Would recommend to anyone staying in the area.
i would stay there again when am in new york very nice opposite park.
I enjoyed my stay here wasn't the first and i will definitely be back. close to alot of restaurants. a nice park is like 5 mins walk  . Both host were friendly and the place is clean!!
Foi tudo ótimo, estação de metrô pertinho facilitou tudo, obrigada

First of all, Zachary was an absolute SUPER host! He was so responsive and helpful throughout the whole month we stayed in the place. The apartment itself was great. No complaints at all. Couldn't recommend this place more!
We enjoyed our stay! Perfect for a weekend trip! Clean and beds were comfortable
Great location right in koreatown! Super close to Madison square garden & subway station. Room is kinda small but bed is huge. Lit
Great place, good location in a quiet neighbourhood.

This place truly exceeded expectations. The moment we walked in, we were struck by the airy layout and dramatic high ceilings — it has that chic loft feel with open spaces and exposed brick walls all over the apartment you rarely find in the city. All 4 bedrooms are impressively large and positioned apart, other thing even more unique! According to the standard of Nyc,
offering total privacy, plus tons of closet space which was a huge bonus.
The private backyard is a dream feature — a peaceful spot to unwind, sip coffee in the morning, or enjoy a quiet evening outdoors. Having a space like that in Midtown felt almost unreal.
The home was spotless, stylish, and extremely comfortable, and the location is unbeatable. You’re steps away from restaurants, theaters, and the best of Manhattan, yet inside it feels calm and tucked away.
A fantastic stay from start to finish.
Very Responsive management
Great location and stay for the price.
Es war sehr toll bei Connie. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt und Connie ist eine fantastische Gastgeberin. Gerne wieder! :)
Super Lage man hat die Metro ganz in der Nähe.
Responsive and friendly host. Good neighborhood

This unit was a great place to stay. It had everything that you could need whether exploring Brooklyn or staying in and cooking. The host was also very responsive and helpful when an issue was brought up. We would highly recommend staying here if you are looking for a great Brooklyn Airbnb.

Stayed with one other adult and two 13 year old boys. Was close by to everything we wanted to experience. The boys loved the pool!
Room was clean & Beds were way more comfortable than expected! We would stay again for sure !
Amazing stay. Very private
Good private location. I would consider coming back In the future
We enjoyed our stay at the apartment. The location was near two metro stations. Grocery stores and a few restaurants were close by.
Perfect place for short term tourists

The apartment is located in a very nice neighbourhood, with a good number of restaurants, grocery stores nearby. The apartment is also very well equipped with all necessary amenities for a long stay. Will definitely stay again when traveling to NYC!
Good host—super responsive and always ready to help with anything we needed. The place is in a great location, surrounded by markets and plenty of spots to explore. Definitely recommend!

Casey was a fantastic host, and made sure that we had a great stay in her beautiful home. The space was clean, with several amenities like a coffee machine and a mini fridge, which made us feel cozy, comfortable, and welcomed from the moment we stepped in. Meeting her dog Benny was a sweet surprise and unexpected highlight! The location was the only challenge at times, as we were visiting friends in West Brooklyn and Manhattan, so we were a little out of the way. However, we nonetheless felt that the superb accommodation made it worth it!  If distance is not a top priority this is a fantastic choice for anybody.
Wonderful atmosphere. Friendly and helpful host!
Nice place for a weekend trip. If looking to go into the city, there is no train station walkable from the house so plan accordingly.
a destacar la buena comunicación con Manhattan,la Línea D es perfecta para poder llegar fácilmente y a tan sólo 5 min del apartamento
100 % recommended, that were pretty diligent with me. This trip has been one of the best for me, the Lord bless you guys!
Booked super last minute and Shayara gave a great deal. The house looked just as depicted in the pictures and had no complaints about the overall experience.
Great location. The room was super spacious and clean. Lain was a very responsive host as well. Thank you!
Very clean unit. Great location. Very friendly and welcoming hosts
Great place to stay. Highly recommend.
Very central and quiet in a very busy city. Metro up the road. Lovely restaurants across the road. Attractions within walking distance. Great location. Unit suitable for 2 couples.

Nice quiet 2 bedroom apartment that is close to a subway station to get into Manhattan. List of pros and cons below.
Pros:
- Cameras for safety outside and in building hallway
- Very Spacious apartment
- Comfortable beds
- Nice big tv in living room
- Less than 10 minute walk to subway
- Food options available for a 5-10 minute walk
- Quiet neighborhood at night
- Nice tub/ shower
- Nice kitchen appliances
- Uber pickup and drop-off was very easy
- 25 minute ride to JFK airport.
Cons:
- Outlets in the front room did not work
- Floors were noisy in some parts of the apartment
- Host did not reply to my question about the outlets for a couple of days (but not that big of a deal since we used other outlets in the apartment)
- Curtains in the kitchen barely give any privacy
- Construction/loud noise early one morning
- No railing for stairs (maybe a con if you need a handle)
- No bedside lamps on sidetables/nightstands
- No outlet right by the beds sidetables/nightstands
Overall all was a nice apartment and was good for what we needed.
Great stay would stay again thank you!

Great first time Brooklyn experience. Been to Manhattan dozens of times - don’t really care to go back to manhattan now that I’ve gotten a “local resident” feel.
Great restaurants , markets. The vibe is energetic yet, raw and authentic. I couldn’t get over how quiet the neighborhoods are!!
House was as described and immaculately clean.
Thank you so much!

This was my first time in New York with my family. We loved the location, Winda was a great host and very responsive. My family and I were very comfortable during our stay. We will definitely be back! Thanks Winda.
Nicole was a wonderful host and I highly enjoyed my stay! It was a lovely experience.

Great host! Super easy to communicate with. Room was clean and hotel staff went above and beyond including letting us store our luggage after checkout! Great location close to a ton of sights in the city!
Perfect to experience New York in a quiet and well-connected neighbourghood.
Amazing host. We will surely book his place next time.
Luis place is the perfect get away spot words can’t explain how clean Mr Luis place is I will definitely stay here again lovely and immaculate thank you for Mr Luis job well done🙏🏾

Wonderful place to stay in Williamsburg! Priscilla was very patient and accommodating with my changing travel plans and was generally a great host. Super convenient location and friendly neighbourhood. I had everything I needed in the apartment, apart from a washing machine/dryer but there was a laundrette nearby so it was ok. Would definitely stay again!
Great location. great price

Tricia’s apartment is perfect: my parents came to visit us so they stayed at her place, and they had a wonderful time. The place is very pretty, perfectly located (lots of coffee, supermarkets, parks, restaurants around, and 15’ min away from the city by metro). My parents got to enjoy the garden and Tricia was a very nice host (always willing to help, very reactive and friendly). Highly recommended!

Très bon séjour chez Cara, quand je viens sur New-York j’espère toujours que son logement est disponible. Cara est une hôte très agréable et gentille. Son logement est idéalement placé pour tout faire à pied
Respond to you immediately if you need her very nice lady

We really enjoyed our five week stay here.   The place was exceptionally clean and Ben was very helpful and responsive to questions.  The apartment was surprisingly bigger than it looks in the photos.   Bed is comfortable. The building itself was very quiet,  The neighbors were friendly and location  convenient to everything we needed including subway 10 minutes walk.  Grocery store is across the street. It was really a great place to call home and live the NY city lifestyle.
Apartment is as stated. Pictures accurate. Pleasant stay. Doors slamming and banging at 5am each morning. Bring earplugs
Very clean, comfortable bed, and pleasant well put together space.
Great place for single person occupancy. Very pretty and clean.

Marks' place was nice and clean. The check-in instructions were easy to understand, but the lock is set to re-lock after 5 seconds, so unless you rush in or out, you have to unlock the door twice every time you open it. The couch and bed were very comfortable, and the blankets and bedding smelled amazing. The shower was very hot and lasted a while with medium water pressure and a detachable shower head. Unfortunately, they only had 1 ply toilet paper. The kitchen included a low power microwave and medium-sized fridge(that shut off or stopped working halfway through, causing all my food and drinks to go bad). The coffee pot had no instructions, and my friend ended up making a bit of a mess (the check-in book said there would be instructions  inside). Most of my stay,I could hear a lot of running upstairs,which was a distraction while I worked,but that happens when you have a family above you. Check out requested wash dishes but I have allergies and didn't know what kind of soap they had

Monica is such an amazing host very warm and helpful.
Highly recommend to stay

My family and I visited Kareem's place and upon entry we felt at home. This was my families first time at an Airbnb, and it was a great experience. Kareem was a great host. He went out of his way to make sure that we had what we needed. If ever i need a getaway, Kareem's place would be my go-to. My daughter said that she will miss the shower...lol

Everything matched description. Place was very clean and location was just perfect for that  price! Walkable to Times Square and Rockfeller center. A huge variety of restaurants nearby and markets.   A small kitchen but it has everything you need. If we go to NYC again, I definitely stay here.
Nice cozy place in Brooklyn and well located near a subway station. Bathroom was spotless and the shower heat and pressure was really good as well. Thanks!
The space was bright and beautiful. The location is perfect for all things midtown. We loved our stay.

We loved the space, the view, and how convenient the location was—perfect for exploring nearby spots. It is on the pricier side, but if you take advantage of the extras like breakfast and discounted drinks by paying the additional fee, it can be worth it. If you're simply looking for a place to sleep and shower, though, more affordable options are available nearby.

This building is in a safe area and conveniently located to major transportation, Central Park, multi shops and services . A wide variety of restaurants abound.
Everything we needed for a one month stay was provided and the hosts quickly responded to our texts.
The studio was clean, cozy and comfortable with good lighting and a well appreciated enclosed kitchen and dining area.
As former New Yorkers it was a pleasure returning to this vibrantly residential neighborhood we once called “home”.
Great Stay!

We had the most wonderful time at 17 John. The apartment is spacious, fully renovated, the check in was seamless and the laundry & dryer machines came really handy. The lounge area is lovely, we definitely appreciated the coffee & water machine. The location is also extremely convenient, lots of coffee shops, restaurants and shops around. We will definitely return and can recommend to anyone.
Great, convenient stay! Rooms are comfortable. Check in was very easy
She was very accommodating with my late check in. Her place was spotless and tastefully decorated. The mattress was so comfortable. I’ll be back whenever I visit NYC.

We were incredibly comfortable at Gin’s place. First off, it’s very private and quiet which we really appreciated. There are two subway stations conveniently located about 8 minutes away. We felt very safe walking around the area at night as well. The parking was free and we were lucky to get a spot right in front of Gin’s place (make sure you read the signs about alternating parking due to street cleaning). Overall a wonderful place to stay, and we will definitely love to stay here again in the future.
Side note-one of the most comfortable beds we’ve ever slept on!
Beautiful studio apartment, perfect for 1-2 people.  Check in was the most thoughtful and helpful I’ve experienced at an Airbnb!
She was very responsive whenever I had a question and assisted in anything around the apartment. Her and Niji were very sweet people and easy to talk to. Really enjoyed my stay there!

Very clean, comfortable and peaceful.  Perfect location, great neighborhood and very easy to get up or downtown between the subway, taxis, or rideshare.  Eduardo was a super responsive host - thank you!

Location, location, location! The Sweet Boho Oasis room was nice and cozy and only a block away from the Empire Outlets, Staten Island Ferry to Manhattan, and a wonderful waterfront to relax and enjoy the Manhattan and Brooklyn skylines. You can also see some of this from your room window. My hosts were fabulous and friendly and their apartment was artsy in a really cool way. If I had to say anything bad about my experience it would be that I didn’t have enough free time to get to know these really cool and interesting people. If you want access to shopping and Manhattan, with more of a laid back vibe, give The Sweet Oasis Room a try.

El lugar es perfecto para descansar, si tú plan es conocer la ciudad y solo tener un lugar a donde llegar es perfecto para ti. La ubicación es perfecta, relativamente céntrico y accesible. El único detalle es que el baño necesita una buena limpieza, se ve que lo lavan superficialmente y las toallas ya se ven poco confiables. El espacio para la cantidad de personas si son familia es Perfecto. El precio es adecuado para el espacio que es.
Great hosts. We did have an issue with the wifi not working but it was resolved after a few days. Clean apt and great location.
Watermelon refreshments surprised us a few times. Thank you for your hospitality!
We waren heel enthousiast over dit verblijf. Enorm ruim appartement en handige metro in de buurt.
Amazing location, close to everything you need. The perfect place to use as a crash pad as you explore the city. It was clean, and the 24-hour security crew was helpful and friendly.
We appreciated the flexibility when we arrived early and they still let us check in. Overall highly recommend.
Kyoko was very kind and helpful. Place was as described but still very clean. You can get anywhere with bus or train so the location isn’t really a problem even though it may appear so at first.
Clean place with great amenities in the room. Subway is extremely close.

Great deal on a nice sized unit that was clean, private, and on a quiet street just steps from the subway.  Host was warm, responsive, and check in/check out was simple, especially with the private entrance.  I stayed for three nights and would definitely stay here again.
Lugar muy cómodo para 3 personas. Limpio y bien equipado. Buena relación precio -calidad.
Idéal pour un séjour dans Manhattan

Jeremy is a gem! Our flight was delayed and we ended up landing at 2 am, making check in a challenge. Jeremy was responsive and ensured it all went flawlessly! The space is gorgeous. There is a no elevator but this is nothing but good news for getting those buns of steal especially since you’re around the best places to eat! Loved every detail of the space!

Nice little apartment in a great location. Times Sq, Central Park all walkable. Some really great restaurants and bars right on the doorstep. This is not a quiet location. It’s a busy spot but a great value place to sleep while you explore New York without having to waste your time on transport.
Felt very comfortable and right at home would definitely stay again !

Description was not as described. Entry was difficult with late responses to check-in. Room was too hot and thermostat did not operate properly. The bathroom ceiling had mold growing in the corner. The bed was blazing hot from being against the radiator behind it. Chelsea out is its new name.
Felt very safe in the neighborhood, was so close to the subway and nice stores.  Loved the clean kitchen with the wonderful tea selection!!

We had a great time at Yana‘s apartement. It is Very clean and cosy. It was perfect for the five of us. Two bedrooms are really silent and dark - we had the best sleep even with our jetlag;-)
We knew the area bevor and love it. You will find everything you need in a few minutes walk: Shops, Restaurants, Bagels, coffee, playgrounds and the subway near by.
Thanks a lot Yana! We would love to stay again.
Ken was a great friendly and responsive host! Brooklyn Brownstone apartment was exactly as published. We would definitely stay again!

This apartment  was so much better than advertised.  The communication that the hosts had with us was above five star. They really know how to be hosts for a traveler.  We have rented many places through Airbnb and VRBO ( as well as direct with owners) and the one issue has always been the ability to be in contact if there is a problem or a question.  The hosts checked in on us prior to us landing and after we checked in.  The apartment was spotless, great views, little things like cable TV, Lots of dishes and towels, comfy bed, etc.  Fabulous neighborhood and great location in the neighborhood, easy access to the subway, grocery stores, places to eat, tours,  etc.  Our host also had made her only NYC guide that we used extensively.   We cannot give a more glowing recommendation.  Thank you so much.

Everything was perfect about this place -- the decor, the amenities, the location, the graciousness and helpfulness of our host John. My husband and I were in New York for a family vacation with our two kids (16 and 10) and we all thought it was the best Airbnb experience ever. All aspects exceeded our expectations. If you are looking for a safe, cozy, quiet and perfectly appointed home base for a trip to New York, this is the place. We also loved all the neighbourhood restaurants and of course the spectacular Prospect Park nearby.

Dobra lokacija nastanitve za odkrivanje znamenitosti v mestu in bližina javnega prometa.
Gostiteljica je prijazno pomagala ob najini nastanitvi ob zelo pozni uri.

We had a very nice time at this apartment. Everything was in good condition and small problems were dellt with immediately by our hosts. The apartment was well equipped and we had what we needed. We had the whole apartment for ourselves (4 guests).
The Apartment was in a Neighborhood in Brooklyn and the time you needed to get to Downtown Manhattan (Wallstreet) was about 30-35min in total. Good connection to the city with Metroline J. The Metrostation is just a 7min walk. A few Buslines were also good for moving around Brooklyn.
Some little supermarkets in the area around the trainstation. The neighborhood is safe but its better to walk in a group (we were 4). In the night we think it would be a bit strange to walk alone.
Considering everything it was a good choice for our 10 days in NY. Good quality for a good price.
Thank you to our hosts Alexis and Gerard!
We had a great stay! Marjorie was super helpful and responsible and the space was very clean
Very friendly, clean and had options for parking.

El apartamento ha sido todo un hallazgo. Nos hemos sentido como en casa; amplio, cálido, cómodo, bonito... no le falta detalle y es precioso. Se encuentra a escasos 5 minutos del embarcadero y en otros 10 minutos estás en la zona sur de Manhattan. Nunca he tardado tan poco en llegar a Manhattan y menos con semejantes vistas por el camino.
El barrio ha sido la sorpresa del viaje. Tranquilo, con carácter y con unos locales para desayunar, cenar o tomar una cerveza realmente bonitos. Nos hemos enamorado de Red Hook.
Hemos visitado New York en varias ocasiones y éste ha sido el alojamiento y barrio que más nos ha gustado.
Gracias Risha.

We had such a wonderful stay at Jack’s cozy basement apt. It went beyond our expectations and we felt right at home. From the moment we arrived we had an authentic Long Island living experience which is sooo much better than a hotel! We walked 2mins to the train and went into NYC. We walked down the street to an amazing wood oven pizzeria with delicious food! And a few of the nights we went across the street to the sweetest neighborhood Italian Restaurant, where we were greeted like friends while enjoying amazing drinks and conversation!
While Jack’s place was clean and tidy and perfect for our needs, his incredible communication and recommendations were what made the trip over the top pleasurable! We felt welcomed, like we were staying with friends, and it was clear he wanted us to have the best experience! We hope to be back in that area again and will definitely be staying at Jack’s.

Denise’s place was spacious, clean and comfortable. The outside space was a bonus and we used it quite a bit, but there was ample space without it. The apartment was stylish and very tasteful.
The kitchen was well equipped and we cooked often. Denise and neighbours were friendly and made us feel completely welcome. I would absolutely recommend this to friends.

The listing was as described.  The host was very welcoming and always available to assist with any problems that might occur. Quiet and pleasant neighborhood. My family and I would definitely consider staying there again.
this was a great stay that's very close to the airport, has a bus stop, and is walking distance to restaurants. would stay there again
Great location and comfortable beds
Great stay! Highly recommend.

Un lugar espectacular, las camas súper cómodas, todo súper accesible.
Éramos 5 y estuvimos super cómodos.
Lo recomiendo y por supuesto, volvería!
La ubicación es genial.

Vielen Dank für einen wirklich tollen Aufenthalt. Es hat an nichts gefehlt und Sam war super zuvorkommend.
Ich kann diese Unterkunft sowie die Gastgeber nur weiterempfehlen.
在new york upper east 是相對便宜、cp值高的住宿，早上會聽到鳥叫聲，步行可以到達the met、supermarket，走路6分鐘左右可以搭地鐵，有什麼問題房東會快速回覆。
It was a very pleasant stay. When I return to Brooklyn, I plan on staying here again if it's available.
Dee and the House is very neat, rules are clear and everyone comply with these. my staying was very good. the neighborhood is very calmed and the restaurant variety is ample here.
The building staff were incredibly helpful.
The location is close to the R subway station, so easy to hop onto Manhattan area. The owner lives downstairs, so when there is an issue, he is there to help out. We enjoyed the stay!

Wonderful trip! Very nice people and always responsive whenever we needed them (even around 9:30pm). Would recommend these hosts.
5 minutes walk to the subway - if you are staying for more than a few days, it is worth getting the 1 week unlimited pass for the subway. Endless things to get into both around the apartment and in the city!
체크인 방식을 몰라 당황스러웠지만 늦은 시간에도 노크를 듣고 열쇠를 내어주어 잘 해결되었습니다. 방은 아주 좋았고, 동네는 평화로웠으며, 근처에 끼니를 해결할 곳도 있어 좋았습니다
Very clean

My adult daughter & I had such a wonderful stay here. The space was exactly what we needed and felt safe, calm, and welcoming from the moment we arrived. One of the things we appreciated most was the sense of security. Knowing the family was there made us feel even more at ease, especially coming and going on the NYC subway. (they were in their private space)
The location was super convenient, the neighborhood felt comfortable, and everything was clean and thoughtfully set up. It was truly the perfect home base for our time exploring the city.
We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a peaceful, safe, and well-situated place in NYC.

Cosa dire? La localizzazione é ottima, ma la zona (un po’ come tutta New York) é sporca…
L’appartamento ha bisogno di sistemare la zona cottura che é obsoleta…
Materasso da cambiare cosi come l’asciugacapelli che é vecchio e non scalda…
Insomma, ho trovato questa disponibilità ed ho prenotato, viaggiavo per lavoro e sono stato poco in casa… ma nel mondo ci sono appartamenti bem migliori…

Stefan's place is awesome. As long as this location is available when I need to go to NY, I will always look for this location. Great smoothie/juice spot next door and the subway is up the street. Thank you again!

Book this place asap.  Great location in slope park.  Walking distance to transportation and newly remodeled.  John is very quick to respond to any questions and friendly.  The apt is perfect and in excellent condition. Fully functional kitchen and it is a great space  with 2 bedrooms and one full bath.
Amazing location, host communication was excellent.
Perfectly located and comfortable place for families!  Really a good value for this space. Will definitely stay again if the need arises.
Enough space. Not bathroom shared but common area like laundry, kitchen and living room is shared. Host responds quickly.

Overall it was really good. However, be aware of a few things before you book this place…
If you are travelling with large bags be prepared to haul them up six flights of narrow stairs.
Also the neighbours were quite loud from time to time and it was made worse with the thin walls separating us from them. The neighbours also left a lot of junk in the hallways which was not really nice to see and was also a trip hazard at times, especially when you have bags to carry.
Brian made sure he was available, the place was very clean and we advertised, awesome location within walking distance to a lot of great spots.
100% recomendado un espacio totalmente privado y de calidad
nice spot for a good price right in the thick of things

I spent several months in this apartment and everything went very well. The roommates were very nice, the room and the apartment in general were clean. Kaz was very responsive to my every question and very accommodating.
The neighborhood is quiet and pleasant. The laundromat right in front of the apartment is very convenient.
Mark, was a great host! He communicated throughout the whole time and the place is well-kept. I will definitely consider in the near future staying again.
Best Airbnb in the Bronx
Had an amazing stay and easy check in.

Everything went great , everybody was friendly, place was clean , they were very open about everything gave me recommendations to have fun , offer food drinks etc  I would say if you smoke ASK Which they was fine with it but Chris had a problem with the smell so make sure you just keep things in your place wrap up or sealed ( which mines was ) but hey smoke does travel … either then that I’ll come again and ill recommend
Perfect location for a quick weekend trip to NYC.
my stay was lovely and relaxing. Just what I needed:)
Very beautiful home!!
We had a great time on our long-weekend vacation!  There was so much to see and do around and the place was great!
Nice host, good location, quiet and safe environment with lots of groceries - recommandable overall but a bit dark and cramped (as everywhere u hear AC,…)

Aleks place is in a wonderful location and is impeccably clean. Check in/check out was very easy and he provided detailed information on how to access the building. If I am ever in Williamsburg again this will be my go-to place to stay!

My friend and I were planning to visit NY for a few days and Natalia’s place was a great find. This place is cozy and is perfect for two people. It’s also very close to the subway and near a diverse range of restaurants (Tibetan food in Jackson Heights is a must!). Additionally, Natalia is a wonderful host; she promptly responded to messages and was eager to help when we didn’t know how to turn on the stove. I highly recommend this place if you want to experience local NY areas but also want convenient access to the city!

Not as big or spacious as expected but still very comfortable & easy to access. Romel responsive time was great & we enjoyed our stay. Very convenient location. Will recommend booking for small parties.

The location and the view were incredible. There were 3 separate rooms with 4 total beds which is crazy for NY. One room had an amazing balcony and all the rooms had a beautiful view. We hope to stay here again the next time we're in NY!
Great quiet stay at Alla's place in Harlem. Very close to express subways and felt safe in the neighborhood even at night. Comfortable apt with reliable A/C!

Excellent place to stay in Brooklyn! Very clean, spacious and comfortable. It was difficult to catch taxis in the area for whatever reason so that is a bit of a downside but other than that strongly recommend this place, truly awesome!
Very clean and exactly as described! So close to the subway which was awesome. Would recommend for a work trip/ exploring Brooklyn !
Tudo muito impecável. Consegui descansar bem e me sentir em casa. Obrigada por tudo Johan
Great spot! Would recommend
Had a great stay, host was very nice, thank you very much!
The place was great! Affordable and in a nice location. The host seemed nice  and quick to respond if I had any questions. I would definitely come back to stay again if I'm in New York.

Menachem and Fatima's place was everything we needed for our weekend trip. Check-in and check-out were smooth and simple, bag storage was much appreciated, the beds were comfortable, and all linens and towels were clean and fresh.

Muy limpio y espacioso, con todo lo necesario para hacer la estancia cómoda. La ubicación es buena, cerca del metro y tiendas y restaurantes. Es el sur de Brooklyn entonces esperar un vecindario más movido de lo habitual.

Great place to stay outskirts of NYC. As it is connected to the city by metro every 10 min, it's easy to reach NYC from Airbnb. The house was spotless, and all necessary toiletries and cooking utensils were provided. Although the place looks small and is located in the basement, it is very reasonable for the price given. Vie was very accommodating and was there to help us whenever required. Overall great place for small groups of economic travellers!
It’s been a very good place to stay to visit easier New York. Near Manhattan with twenty minutes by metro and comfortable neighborhood if one night you would like to eat or stay there. I recommend ✌🏻
Great small place to stay! everything clean and organized, near of the train good place to stay
Wendell’s place was a great , quiet place to stay . Snacks and toiletries were available for my use . Wendell was a delight  as well as his home.
Gracious host and great place
