Ashley was a great host and staying at her property was wonderful. Everything was extremely clean, well stocked and organized. Ashley had very easy to understand instructions which made everything very convenient and easy for us. Getting into the city was very easy as well, as it was a 5 minute walk to the subway line. Highly recommend and would 100% love to stay again.
Good location close to jfk and points south. Parking was difficult to find in the area.
super Lage, da viele Metrostation in der nähe sind. Check-in ging sehr schnell und das Personal ist immer hilfreich und freundlich. immer wieder gerne.
Marco’s place was nice . A touch smaller than we expected but a good stay for a quick NYC weekend.
Muy buen servicio siempre que viajo a nueva york procuro quedarme en este lugar, conveniente para un viaje rapido
Great place. Very clean

Great stay!! even though it was small we only needed a place to call temporary home base during our very busy trip filled with lots of places to visit, and a cozy warm bed! The location is amazing. Not much space but has all the basic essentials and charm of a small studio. And if you're in this area that's all you really need. When we were exploring the busier parts of the city we got "homesick" for the East Village/Union square area of our airbnb. Literally perfect. Also very cute and well decorated (simple and adorable). Thanks again to Pon!

Wonderful space for a night stay, two nights if needed. Wouldn’t do an extended stay.
The view was amazing and the location was within walking distance of great NYC landmarks.
My stay was great. Scandia and tunde helped me out a lot and communicated back as soon as they could
Everything was really clean and comfortable, the inside is really pretty! it was a great experience !
Thank you! We will be staying here again in the future!

Studio is spacious and comfortable for two people. The neighborhood was residential but had a lot of cute cafes and restaurants within walking distance. The hosts were incredibly responsive. We had a great stay and would highly recommend this space to others!

Zubia was a great host. She was easy to reach  if we needed anything and reaches out to you to make sure everything was going well. The place was great. Two of our children was going to stay with their grandparents but decided to stay with us in the Airbnb and their was much space for our family of 7. Everything we needed was there. If you are healthy eater however, bring your own food lol. Not many healthy food items. Other than that. I’ll be back here!
Top class stay in super location, check in was seamless and staff were super helpful throughout. Will be back!

Andy was so kind, flexible, and responsive. A great and quiet location, close to the metro.
We were spending our days out in the city, walking around, so our stay didn’t have to be luxurious. Andy let us store luggage for a few hours after check-out, which helped us enjoy our last day in NYC better as well. The mini fridge in the room was also very convenient.
Great hospitality, Alfred was so kind and the place was peaceful for sleeping

Andrea’s is and excellent host
She’s always in touch
Cleaning apartment excellent service
Nice stay. It is near major station. Safe neighbourhood. Worth the money, highly recommended for everyone visiting New York!

Great spot! We made our reservation and communication was really smooth with Radeisha the entire time. With all the busy weekends going on in NYC this was definitely a great option for us. The decor, the cleanliness, the communication were all perfect!
Awesome place, very clean, responsive host, private parking. Will definitely stay here next time I’m in town.

Nous étions 8 personnes venues de France pour un séjour d'une semaine à New York. Tout était parfait : l'appartement très bien équipé et approvisionné ! Même à 8 personnes nous avions de l'espace. La proximité du métro, d'un supermarché ...tout était parfait. Nous conservons l'adresse pour la communiquer à d'autres personnes désirant visiter New York. Merci Michael pour tout

Lovely neighbourhood, loads of local food spots, easy access to transit. Apartment is as described, very comfortable and livable. Esther is very kind, and keen to make the stay nothing but pleasant. Easily recommended, would absolutely go back.

Wir durften bei Negra zu Gast sein und unsere Familie (4) war froh, diese schöne und gute ausgestattete Wohnung gefunden zu haben. Alles war sehr sauber und man fühlte sich gleich wohl. Die R-Linie der U-Bahn ist in wenigen Schritten erreicht - hier kommt man auf direktem Wege nach Manhatten, was ein großes Plus war. Wir würden auf jeden Fall wiederkommen! Negra hat immer sehr schnell reagiert, alles war sehr problemlos und freundlich. Vielen Dank und liebe Grüsse aus Deutschland!

We loved our stay! Comfortable beds and every amenity you needed. Yaniv and Co. were very responsive, helpful and even offered early check in. We were able to walk to multiple restaurants and were in a Quiet, safe neighborhood. We would definitely come back again.
Nice hotel

Nous étions à deux avec ma fille pour quelques jours à New-York.
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour. Christophe est très accueillant. Il sait à la fois être discret et très agréable à discuter lors de moments plus conviviaux, comme lorsque nous faisions la cuisine. Bref, un hôte parfait !
L'appartement est très agréable, reposant et idéalement placé dans Brooklyn, dans un quartier à la fois calme mais également avec un grand nombre de restaurants et commerces facilement accessibles à pied. Les transports en commun ne sont pas loin non plus ce qui permet d'être à Manhattan très rapidement. Il est également possible de garer sa voiture gratuitement dans les rues alentours, ce qui a été très pratique pour nous.
Si nous revenons à New-York, nous repasserons sans aucun doute chez Christophe !

The whole experience at Brandon’s place was great, the Airbnb was very clean and ideally located, and Brandon was very helpful. The surroundings were very calm so there was no noise at night, but there were also great bars and restaurants in the area. All in all, I totally recommend.
the bed was comfy and there was a cool dog. but wouldn't stay in that neighborhood again.
muy buen lugar centrico, exelente comunicación sin un duda un buen lugar para quedarse :) 100% recomendado
Close to the train and very comfortable beds. This suited our needs perfectly.

Logement très bien situé, propre et fonctionnel.  Restaurants, supermarchés, et activités à proximité, au centre de nombreuses visites à New York. Une des chambres est située côté rue donc assez bruyante, les deux autres couchages sont au calme. La salle de bain est assez vétuste, mais acceptable pour un court séjour. L'hôte a été très réactif, notamment lors de l'arrivée où la clef a du être récupérée dans une laverie en face. Très satisfait
Perfect location and near to everything at NYC, Times Square.

Me encanto el lugar, muy limpio y tranquilo, aquí puedes dormir en total silencio, es tal cual se describe y las fotos son exactamente lo mismo, sin lugar a dudas volvería a hospedarme aquí… Kerry siempre responde y es muy amable aunque no tuve la oportunidad de conocerla
great stay!

The Cozy Nook was immaculately clean and organized.  The bed, pillows, and linens were very comfortable, clean, and fresh.  All AirBnB’s should follow Esther’s example by using blackout curtains, offering welcome snacks, and meeting guests in person upon check-in.  Esther was friendly and responsive.  She offered suggestions for things to do and made sure we parked in a good location- even offering her covered garage spot.
nice place breakfast no good

We have family in Park Slope and have stayed at Karen’s place many times since 2021.  We love it and don’t want to stay anywhere else.  We actually plan our trip dates around when it’s available. In particular the bed is very comfortable and Karen is the nicest and most accommodating host we’ve experienced. We highly recommend Karen’s place.
Convenient location (close to subway lines 4-5-6), clean apartment, responsive host.

Our lengthy, 60-day stay was everything thing we expected at this spacious apartment. As per the description, the location is absolutely wonderful and Barry was attentive and always a pleasant host. We highly recommend this apartment and host!

This was a great stay. Adam & his family are super friendly - Adam was very welcoming & communicative over our stay. The room was very large for New York and we had enough space for everything. The bathroom was a little bit small but that was no problem. All in all I can only recommend to stay there if you want to have a peaceful place to stay while you are in New York!
Clean, safe, close to affordable and unique shops and restaurants. Responsive host. Free use of washer and dryer is a plus. Would stay again!
Amazing hotel room of great comfort and luxury in south Manhattan. Simply crazy ! I loved it and so did my girlfriend !
Great location at a reasonable rate for NYC. Leo was a  v helpful host

I recently stayed at Deniz's Airbnb and had a wonderful experience. The neighborhood is great, with easy connections to Manhattan and several interesting points of interest nearby. Deniz was an excellent host, always communicative and friendly. He even shared some of his cooked dinner and we had a blast jamming on musical instruments together. One thing to note is that there is another room with additional guests, which I felt like could be better communicated in the listing. Nonetheless, I had a good night's sleep and was generally satisfied with my stay. I highly recommend this Airbnb for a reasonably priced stay near Manhattan.

Can't say enough how friendly and helpful Henri was for my group
We had bags that needed to stay behind in order to enjoy the day and were able to safely and securely leave them in his office
Thank you Henri

An excellent apartment less than five minutes walking from the subway. The place was cozy, clean, easy to get in and out of, and central to about everything in Brooklyn. Plus, the subway station a block away has an express line directly to midtown.
all in all, can't recommend it enough
a nice little place in NYC, cute animals, what else can one ask for?
Excellent

Convenient location to explore New York, close to transport links.
The apartment is clean, tidy and easy to find. Susan is a friendly host, great with communication and instructions. Recommended.
Beautiful space, perfectly appointed and tastefully decorated with an ideal location.  I will for sure be staying here again!

Genial estancia en el apartamento de Paul. Limpieza de 10, área segura con metro y restaurantes cerca. Metro muy bien conectado. El apartamento cuidado incluso en los detalles, lo que te hace sentir bien. Sin duda una gran elección.
房间总体不错，设施设备也比较新！整个房间干净整洁舒适！房东人也不错沟通比较及时！这次入住体检比较愉快！虽然在入住时有小的差错，最终还是比较热情友好的解决了！也为房东点赞👍！
Great hosts. Easy check-in. Quick walk to the subway. Nice, clean apartment. We were very grateful for the snacks and beverages upon our arrival after a long journey!

Simone’s place was perfect for our long weekend. She was flexible during check-in and check-out, and overall great at communicating. The space was big enough for the 4 of us with one sleeping on the couch and another on a foldout bed. The upstairs bathroom was preferable to the downstairs one, which was difficult to shut. In the end, we are very grateful for Simone’s hosting and would definitely stay here again!

Terrick had exceptional hospitality and very fast communication. I had a lovely stay it was very homey and cozy! Had plenty of space too and each room was clean and comfy. Would definitely stay again.
This is actually a private, separate flat in a lovely home near great restaurants.
Ama fue fantástica ayudó a que mi viaje fuera super agradable y la confianza fue estupenda.
Veronica is awesome
Beautiful home in a great location. I would recommend to a friend :)

Our stay at Kito‘s studio was very nice. The studio itself has everything you need, a comfy bed, a clean kitchen and bathroom, a big tv (for those lazy nights) and even came with welcome snacks. Kito was more than accommodating to our wishes during our stay. The area and street feels very safe and is quiet at night, different subway station are easy to reach and Manhattan or bushwick are only half an hour away. Would definitely recommend staying at Kito‘s again.
Proche des métros, spacieux et pratique.
Very good for our family… plenty of room to spread out.  We would do it again.
Clean apt, nice area. Host was responsive and accommodating.

Arthouse tem uma localização perfeita, pois fica próximo a estações de metrô, restaurantes, teatros, cafés, farmácia, lojas e tudo mais que a cidade possa oferecer. Além disso, fica a poucos minutos do Central Park e é fácil se locomover pela cidade a partir daí, inclusive caminhando. As instalações foram um ponto memorável da minha experiência, tanto pelo quarto, quanto pelo bar e café. Por último e não menos importante, o lugar é seguro e amigável para pessoas da comunidade lgbt. Por tudo isso, o considero totalmente recomendado.
Great stay beautiful and clean. Host is very nice and reliable to communicate. Very clean and spacious.
Great stay in a great neighborhood
very close to Penn station, 2blocks away, Me. Alfred was very friendly, could keep baggage & go around

Wir haben uns bei Jasmin direkt wie Zuhause gefühlt. Jederzeit konnten wir mit ihr kommunizieren. Wichtige Informationen haben wir pünktlich erhalten.
Das Haus liegt absolut ruhig und ist ein toller Ort, abseits der lauten City. Wir konnten sehr gut entspannen und waren zu Fuss in ca. 20 Minuten am Bahnhof Woodside. Auf dem Heimweg liegt der Key Food Markt sehr günstig für den Einkauf.
Wir besuchen Jasmin gerne wieder. Vielen Dank für alles!! Gabi & Peter

Smooth check in and out.
Bathroom very clean.
Bedroom very clean .
Services was very nice.
Next time to New York will be there again ☺️
Host was super kind and accommodating. The place was very clean and was in a great location.
Rajesh was very helpful, and communication was very good, the house was clean and tidy, and easy to find.

My stay at this Airbnb was absolutely amazing! The place looked exactly like the photos, clean, stylish, and very comfortable. From the moment I booked, the communication was quick and easy, and any questions I had were answered right away. The host, Madelyn, was incredibly kind, helpful, and welcoming, which made the entire experience even better. She went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect during my stay. The location was convenient, the space was peaceful, and all the little details made it feel like a home away from home. I really appreciated how thoughtful Madelyn was and how smooth the check-in process went. Everything was spotless and well-maintained, and I could tell a lot of care goes into this property. I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area. Thank you, Madelyn, for being such a wonderful host and making my trip truly enjoyable!
Good

We really enjoyed our 7-day stay in this apartment. The apartment is very comfortable, having a central air-conditioning,  so that every room can be cooled down. In every room there is a TV. We didn't use the kitchen devices, but there is everything you need. The next subway station is approx 10 minutes away. The Brighton beach is also in walking distance.
L appartement est très bien , la rue est très animé mais très calme la nuit . L appartement est très propre juste à côté du métro, il y a pleins de commerçants à proximité.

The experience at Lunara's home was very positive. The house was small but comfortable and very clean. Lunara was very discreet, it seemed to have the whole house to ourselves. Lunara also gave us tips on things to do and was always kind and helpful. The only problem we had was that the power of the electric current was low and due to this our hair dryer didn't work well. I really recommend staying at Lunara's house, the location is very convenient (just 10 minutes by subway from Times Square with a stop really close to the house!) Also near the house there is a panoramic point from which you can see a beautiful skyline! Thank you so much Lunara, it was a pleasure.
The check in went smoothly and the room was a described

A Review of Our Stay at Digna’s Place in Queens, New York (August 21st - 24th, 2024)
My sister and I stayed had a pleasant stay. Digna's place is a short drive from the JFK Airport. The host stays on the premises, warmly welcomed us as, and we had privacy for the entire stay.
Our room was clean and well-kept, offering a comfortable space to relax. As a book enthusiast, my sister appreciated the selection of books and board games available. The mini refrigerator and a TV with Netflix in the room added to our comfort.
Digna thoughtfully provided helpful instructions notes around the house, making it easy for us to settle in. The dedicated Wi-Fi network in the room was a great perk! The bathroom was clean too.
It was near stores like Target, restaurants etc. so we were able to eat out, as well as get supplies to cook in-house.
Overall, I highly recommend Digna’s place: as it is close to the JFK airport, serene with great amenities, and Digna is a truly hospitable host!

Great location and great accommodations! Just be sure to pay attention to the instructions for finding the location, Google Maps will drop you a few blocks away with just the address, Ingrid's directions will get you where you need to go.
Awesome stay to explore NYC at your leisure! Great places to eat nearby and transportation to Manhattan is a short walk away
This is a great location and has fantastic cafes/bakeries nearby. The host is very good about communication and answers texts very quickly. Also, good size bedroom for NYC. Overall, wonderful!
Everything was nice and clean we went to sleep for an layover me and my my boyfriend they have door dash in the area everything went smooth ❤️

Acomodações de acordo com o anúncio. Tudo perfeito e de bom gosto. Achamos que íamos compartilhar o espaço da cozinha, mas tivemos uso exclusivo, o que agradou muito. O lugar é agradável e dormimos super bem. Mahatham não fica perto, mas o metrô atende muito bem. Não tivemos nenhuma dificuldade para nos locomover, mesmo nos dias em que chegamos tarde da noite , pois a parada é muito próxima ao airbnb  Além disso, o lugar é tranquilo. Recomendo!
Wonderful
Perfect for a no frills short stay in NYC!
Tip location. Bit small for 6 but with a group of guys that's no issue
The place was nicer than in the pictures! Everything was very smooth.
Best stay I have had in the city
Just as described.  Great space. Very clean.  Great communication. Very clear and easy process to get in and out.
Great place to stay.

My friend I had a wonderful stay at Chrys's place. The location was quiet and in a safe neighborhood, and within walking distance from a subway line straight to Manhattan. The room was stocked with amenities and Chrys was readily on hand to answer any questions. Would definitely stay here again on my next trip to NYC!
I enjoyed my stay here. Rawn is a very friendly and accommodating host. The same can be said for his two cats. This is a great and affordable location if you don't mind taking transit into Manhattan.
The room was overly warm and we had to shut the heat and open the windows for the duration of our stay IN FEBRUARY. We also requested extra pillows that were promised but never arrived.

Staying at William's place with my husband and daughter was the best! The apartment is located in a classic New York brownstone and impressed us with every detail, from the most beautiful wooden doors and ornate moldings to the stunningly classic bathroom. It was so warm and cozy that we hardly wanted to leave. The neighborhood is amazing, we enjoyed jazz at Bill’s Place, wandered along 125th Street, and attended a lecture at the fantastic local bookstore Revolution Books. William's apartment is the most beautiful way to experience  New York, it is warm and charming. Viva el Harlem!

I can’t say enough about my experience. First of all Hakim is so deserving of his Superhost status! He truly is the most pleasant person and goes the extra mile to make sure you’re comfortable and have everything you need. The apartment is very well designed and the room was so comfortable that I wanted to ignore my alarm! It was super clean which is paramount for me. It’s an excellent choice if you’re in NYC. It was a great experience and I’ll be going back.
Lovely room. Close to transit.

a really great place to stay, had toothbrushes / toothpaste / pads / shampoo + shower gel etc ready for use. amazing location and a lot of street parking and it is so close to Manhattan. great host as well!

I had a great stay! Michael is welcoming and helpful.  The house was clean, and the room, though small, is private, quiet, cozy, and filled with nice natural light. The location is ideal, close to the subway and a laundromat

The space was beautiful, clean, and looked as described. The only thing that our small group would note is that we had an issue with the refrigerator but it wasn’t a deal breaker. We were kind of concerned about leaving the sliding doors open while we were venturing out during the day but we just ended up locking them with the latch and used another door with a code to come in and out. It was close to the trains as Kristopher mentioned and it was definitely worth every penny. If we plan another trip to New York, we would stay here again in a heartbeat.

Maintenance closets near my door, the staff would SLAM them multiple times in middle of night with no regard to guests. Several young staff members were rude and would push in ahead of guests on elevators  with serving carts and boxes. the beds created from being so worn out and hard. the vents were a solid mass of dist and debris, so it fell out in small pieces constantly and got on everything I had in the bathroom. The smell was poor. Using the AC on lowest temp would only get down to 72 maybe. The valves on the shower were worn out so they would fall down from desired temp to scolding hot bo matter what. The carpets were stained everywhere. When the complaints were brought up to the staff upon check out, they blamed a third party booking (AIRBNB) for their convenient excuse that they couldn't do anything to rectify my issues. Its still a Hilton... they still have to keep the room to a certain standard. They did not. The stay was a nightmare. every single guest complained.

El alojamiento de Wendy es increíble! Excelente ubicación, limpio y una excelente comunicación m, Wendy es la persona más amable y divertida, te hace sentir como en casa, sin duda recomiendo su alojamiento, 5 estrellas se quedan cortas, gracias por todo Wendy!

super responsive, nice and clean room. can't complain at all!
really amazing for what I needed
Great stay!

The apartment was perfect for a long holiday in New York. Great location walking distance to many restaurants and shops, with many public transport options around. The apartment came with all the amenities you will need, we especially appreciated that there was a 24 hr laundry in the building.
The only thing I would say is the kitchen is very minimally equipped, so not the best if you plan to cook a lot.
Overall we really enjoyed our stay there and would be happy to return!

Had a lovely stay at the Village House! Exactly as described, what it lacks in space it more than makes up for in its location in the heart of NYC. We were provided everything that we needed, and the communication was excellent. Thank you very much!
Janet et son logement, ont été pour beaucoup dans la réussite de nos vacances. Nous nous sommes sentis en confiance et avons pu nous reposer dans son logement très bien situé. Je recommande fortement
Small, clean, beautiful space in a nice building! Very walkable neighborhood with the train and good coffee and pizza right nearby- really enjoyed our stay!
Place as in the advertisement. Great location. All basic stuff available (towels, slipon, hand soap). Vladimir quick to respond
So amazing! The place was so nice and had such a great price, and Marcela is the best host!
Sonya was there to help whenever needed and nothing but positive vibes, making everyone feel at home! Would recommend whenever going to the New York area!
Very comfortable and cozy spot just a few bocks from the G.
las camas están muy cómodas, tiene 2 cuartos las litera estaban un poco incómodas, muy amables siempre
Jiang and his wife were very warm and welcoming. The room was great and has a nice sunset view of the city skyline.
Many thanks Elyse, Kelly and co! Really nice place to stay, very clean, organised and thoughtful. Warm and considerate hosts. Highly recommend

Edward was very friendly and easy to communicate. The place was exactly as described and it was a great deal for the location that you can’t easily find in the middle of Manhattan. The only downside is that this unit is in the basement and the room can be very hot because of the heat pipe but there is an AC so I was able to adjust the temperature. I’d recommend this place if you are looking for an affordable option in Manhattan.
We really enjoyed staying in Nick's place.  It was very comfortable and well-maintained.  We liked being close to the park, restaurants and shops.  It met all our needs.

Le logement était très bien placé dans East Village à côté de plusieurs quartiers intéressant comme Soho. Plusieurs restaurants, café et bar à proximité, rue assez tranquille pour Manhattan.
Concernant la chambre la tête de lit à un revêtement en faux cuir très vieux qui ce désintègre et donc plein de bout de tissus ce retrouve dans le lit. Il y avait beaucoup de poussière sur les meubles de la chambre et dans la salle de bain.
Nous partagions l’appartement avec un autre couple super sympa, cependant une troisième personne était dans l’appartement. Il avait l’air d’aider Charlie dans la gestion de l’Airbnb, il ne s’est jamais présenté et ne nous regardait pas quand il nous répondait. Il est resté dormir 2 nuit à l’appartement sur notre séjour de 9 nuit. L’ambiance de l’appartement était plus pesante lorsqu’il était là.
Le gros plus de l’appartement est vraiment son emplacement, si vous compter juste dormir et passer votre journée dehors, c’est parfait!

KP's place was exactly what I needed while looking for a permanent place in NYC. Check-in and check-out were flexible; she was gracious when I ran a bit late due to issues w/ another check-out. KP and her partner helped get my luggage up to the apt, useful as there are 6 steps down at the entrance to the building. This is no problem if you can climb a few steps and don't have as many bags as me lol. Everything was very clean, well-decorated and ready to use, even toiletries and PLENTY OF kitchenware, kitchen staples and cleaning supplies. The only things I'd suggest adding are a can opener, cutting board and scissors. The heating is GREAT but makes some noise so I got a couple of startles lol. The area feels safe, vibrant and full of convenient shops, two blocks from the subway. KP was super responsive to questions and when minor issues arose w/ my laundry card and dishwasher, always replying ASAP and accommodating my needs. The WiFi is strong, the bed is comfy. I didn't want to leave!
A hospedagem foi perfeita,Eliza sempre pronta para atender todos os meus pedidos com rapidez, é muito educada e gentil , voltaremos muitas vezes, a localização era nota 10 obrigada

Chris and his wife are lovely people. We had a great stay loved the beautiful surroundings and the place. Extremely well connected with local transport to Manhattan.. took just around 20 min to reach any of the tourist spots in NYC area. Lots of shopping areas nearby at Barclays and great food joints nearby. Would love to be back again .

We picked the perfect place for our 1st trip to New York. Paul & Brian are great communicators as well as friendly, helpful & well organized hosts. Their place is clean, well appointed and an easy 10-15 minute walk to the subway. With stellar restaurants & cafes inside their energetic neighbourhood that felt safe to wander,  I know you'll enjoy staying at Paul's place as much as we did.

This was a great spot to stay in NY. There were many buses and it was also walkable to most things in Lower Manhattan if you don’t mind walking around. The apartment was easy to find and although only a studio size it was still spacious. We’d be happy to stay here again!

Very well located, nice and quiet neighborhood with a lot of services on the surroundings, the 96th station is half block away. Same with bus stops.
The apartment is just like described. Perfect for long stays. Beds are comfortable and overall it’s well equipped and maintained.
So far one of my best Airbnb experiences!
Great spot. Would definitely stay again.
It was a good place to stay. Host were very helpful and prompt with their replies.
My mom and sister were visiting from out of town and loved staying at Neanna’s place. Very cozy and with everything you need to cook!
Clean room, easy commute to SIUH. Would recommend.

This was a perfect home for my group of 5 (2 couples, 1 single), and the home was in a great location for our activities. Really comfortable beds, warm and generally well-decorated space. Gabriel was super responsive and flexible to our needs. Would definitely rent again!

We absolutely loved this apartment and truly felt at home from the moment we arrived. The space is beautifully updated, very well maintained, and modern throughout. One of the biggest highlights is how incredibly quiet the building is, especially for New York. Being very close to a school and a park makes the area feel calm and peaceful at night, which is a rare and valuable bonus in the city.
On top of that, this apartment is an amazing deal compared to many other places in NYC. Friends staying elsewhere paid much more for far less comfort. Everything felt thoughtfully renovated, clean, and practical, making everyday living easy and enjoyable. We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a calm, cozy, and great-value place in New York.
Amazing place ! Exceeded expectations and was very clean

Very close to transportation and convenient stores, should you need them. Bowser was awesome and we loved him, extremely friendly and loving. The vibe room and adjacent quarters were very warm and cozy. Great place.
We had a lovely stay!! Great space for my husband and I, we would definitely recommend!!

Luba‘s place is perfect if you stay for a few nights and are out all day. If the weather is good you can enjoy sitting on the terrace. The area is quiet and close to Myrtle Avenue, I didn’t feel so comfortable though, as there are other areas in Brooklyn much more alive. It always depends on what you need. Personally speaking the flat was too crowded, she had friends around, that are very nice and warm-hearted people, but if you need a place to calm down a bit and rest you should look for another place. But if you are out all day anyway or love to chat with people I can recommend this place. The room is located next to the kitchen and common area, so you hear almost everything, but nothing that earplugs can’t fix and I have very light sleep, so maybe I’m too sensitive towards noise. All in all I liked her and her friend a lot, they were very welcoming and really polite and gave me advice what to see in the city.
perfect airbnb for week stay close to all transportation
Kate fue una gran host

We stayed at this Vibe location for a few months while our home was being renovated.  Vibe staff were highly responsive and accommodating.  The location is fantastic quintessential   upper west side.  We found great restaurants and venues.
I really enjoyed my stay there very clean and the host was amazing

Estephanie was incredible! From beginning to end! Very respectful, quick response time, gave tailored advice on local sights and attractions, that were AMAZING!
The area is nice, local food that’s great and affordable.
Subway was about 15 min walk, (it’s possible there was closer ones depending on where your heading.)
The space was perfect! There was easy access, step by step instructions with pictures that show EXACTLY where the key is. Trash was easily accessible.
The coffee was delicious! Cups super cute.
Room was clean, and cute one day bed and a regular bed. Daybed had instructions which were helpful. (Remember to pull the cover off of the couch).
This was a great KICK STARTER to our trip!
If you’re a SPIDER-MAN LOVER the local Trader Joe’s is AMAZING COMIC LIKE THEME. Which was cool, there was also a cool comic book store on Selfridge street.
Which is close to “Aunt Mae’s house”.
We will be back!
Wonderful stay, great location, clean, safe and homey! 100% recommend, places like this make me want to stay in AirBNBs instead of hotels. Lovely home!
Fun in Brooklyn.  Easy to get to.  Nice deli store on corner. MTA access at corner. Clean great place to stay
Everything went perfectly smooth. Loved the stay.

Everything good , clean tidy apartament
Forth for good for legs 😉
Over all everything was good place , very good location will be back
Tamika’s place was neat and tidy! The description on the site was accurate and Tamika was very responsive.
Small and dirty room. Great location. Noisy place.

Affordable stay, friendly staff, 10 min walk to Soho but I must say it is right on Canal St in Chinatown with very busy crowds - even for NY. The hallways smelled of smoke and the rooms are extremely small with no microwave (there is one in the lobby) and minifrig only offered at an additional cost. Overall clean but there were stains. The walls are this so you could also hear your neighbors
I didnt have a bad experience, so if you're looking for cost effective/proximity to Soho I would recommend but likely would not stay again myself because it was not a very comfortable stay
For this time of the year, the room was a bit cold, but everything else, very good.
Comfy,cozy place
We had a great stay! The hosts went above and beyond to be helpful. Everything was perfectly clean, and the house looked exactly like the photo!

We had a lovely stay, our room was clean, nicely designed and quiet. We were impressed with the breakfast pastries and enjoyed the hotel's vibe. It was well located for us, off the main roads but near the subway and restaurants. Would recommend.

gracias Michael por la estadía, el detalle de la bienvenida y comida fue increíble, recomiendo muchísimo el lugar súper agradable, cómodo y cerca de la estación del tren tranquilo.
esperamos poder ir de nuevo

The room was very cute, clean and cozy! Only flaw was the entrance being at the side of the house and you have to enter from the neighbor’s steps but other than that the stay was amazing and I’d stay here again

Sarah is a very nice person, but clearly one who doesn’t like sharing her home. The apartment was ok, bed could be more comfy and the area not that great but not too far out.
The rules of staying seemed endless, including cancelling the possibility of preparing breakfast in the mornings. Permission to make coffee was not granted..
in short, ok option if you’re on a budget but don’t expect a homely feeling.

Candice's place was very clean and welcoming. She was very good at communicating. Great location next to Columbia University.
I stayed just one overnight but it was easy to get to and safe and cozy.
Thank you!

- Location was not as displayed on the map
- Location had no heat
- Location was a mess of extension chords and old space heaters in an attempt to keep temps down (temps were around 5 F)
- Old house so fuses blew in the middle of the night with all his space heaters (he set them up before we arrived).
- Owner saw and ignored our requests for help with the fuse despite leaving our family devoid of heat.
- House smells like smoke and is a poorly renovated old Brooklyn home.
- Someone living in the basement playing music in the early AM
- Lukewarm water
- Toilet that clogged regularly
- No idea how they got these other reviews as they don’t match the location at all.
