Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans l’appartement d’Autumn à New York. L’appartement est très bien situé, à lower Manhattan près de Chinatown et du pont de Brooklyn. Le métro est très proche ce qui est pratique et équidistant pour les différentes visites (au sud pour la statue de la liberté, Brooklyn et le mémorial du 11 septembre, au nord pour Central Park, les musées et Times Square). Le quartier est vivant et il y a de tout pour faire les courses, manger chinois ou prendre un petit déjeuner, un café etc. Le soir, c’est calme et tranquille pour dormir. L’appartement est bien équipé et nous n’avons manqué de rien. C’était notre premier voyage à New York et nous recommandons sans problème cet appartement.
We had a lovely time at Autumn’s place in NY. The apartment is ideally located, in lower Manhattan next to Chinatown and the Brooklyn bridge. The subway station is very close so it’s easy and fast to go uptown for the visits. You’ll find everything you need to eat in the neighborhood, from pizzas to Chinese food, coffee, groceries etc. The apartment is well furnished so you won’t need anything. We recommend this place for your next trip to NY!

Silva is the perfect host. She takes care to make sure you have a great stay.
The best ! Can'twait for my next trip. Will definitely stay here again.
Thank you so much, Silva
Definitely comfortable and clean. Would definitely stay here again
Great quiet location, with a subway terminal just 1.5 blocks away.  The hosts are extremely friendly, and are very knowledgeable about the area.
Nice place, close to the airport. Friendly, responsive host.
Absolutely amazing. Reginald was very responsive to answer our questions. The location was great and the private parking was an added bonus. I would definitely stay here again.

Johns place is very simple. Amazing Sunset Park is right around the corner, amazing restaurants and bars nearby. Easy to get to Manhattan from 36th st.
Stayed for a month, the room was very private, but the shared spaces felt a bit old.
This place was perfect for a weekend in the city. I was very impressed by this hotel.

Cet appartement offre un emplacement au dessus de Central Park de quelques blocs, au coeur de Harlem, dans une rue calme, dans un quartier qui mérite d'être vécu.
Metro tout près pour aller où vous voulez. Et les CityBike pour sillonner la ville sont partout à NY, c'est top.!
L'appartement offre un jardin et est d'un calme magique.
Frédérique est juste parfaite.! On va revenir c'est certain.
Place was great good location friendly owner. No complaints except lack of washcloths lol. Would stay again when visiting. Also the barber shop across the street is convenient.

We loved our stay in this beautiful home. After having to find a new reservation after there were issues with our previous reservation, we are so grateful that the host was kind, responsive, and accommodating. The neighborhood is walkable and safe. The home is immaculate and comfortable. Will definitely stay again
Excellent spot in Flushing!
great host! communicative & friendly!

Staying at Paul’s made my experience in New York City so much better. Place is conveniently located near the subway station and the home is set up in a way that feels cozy and comfortable. Paul was an incredible host; kind, helpful and generous. The room was spacious and clean. I had everything I needed.
10/10 would recommend.
Perfect stay, exactly as advertised, Sunny the cat is such a sweetie! 🐈
Sammirs home was so nice to stay at if your with a family. Super easy to get set up and super close to the train. I’ll be staying here again if I ever need to come back.
Great place! Would definitely come again

lugar limpio , cama cómoda , privacidad,  todo perfecto , a unos 10 minutos andando del metro , barrio residencial tranquilo , buen precio (para ser New York) perfecta atención por parte de Jacinta , en resumen , sitio 100% recomendable.
Hassle free stay. Everything was perfect.

We stayed here for one night for Thanksgiving. The positives were that the room was very clean and the fittings had been updated recently it seemed. Comfortable bed. Complementary coffee was very basic but there’s a good coffee house just 2 doors away. Subway station was just 200 yards away. There didn’t seem to be that much available in the immediate area, but a 10 to 15 minute walk gets you into busier and nicer areas. The negative was the bar area. Real bland, no atmosphere and we were not impressed by the staff . Ordered two cocktails from a Barman who wasn’t professional or engaging in any way. Took far too long to make the drinks which were diluted by huge chunks of ice. A sprig of rosemary thrown in to a G&T was weird. At $25 each way too expensive. So the rooms are cost, the bar area bland so very average with expensive poor quality drinks
This is a fantantic place! Very clean and I loved the backyard. Felt like home to me. I would definitely come back. Michael was a phenomenal host. He responded to every request in a timely manner.
No better place where to stay in NYC. Very recommended
We needed a cot for the room and were accommodated readily.
Great place to stay for a night in New York City. Absolutely no complaints.
Definitely Good deal!!!

No frills room kind of like being in a nun’s room or on some religious retreat. For me as one person it was perfect and so close to the Irving Park Plaza where I attended for two nights. I was able to take a while to meet my favorite artist with no worries about getting back late to my room. Yeah got music from the bar below but to me it was muffled enough to deal with. It was the occasional noise upside loud car music or someone yelling at the top of his lungs  that were more annoying buts that’s the fun of NY. If I had one problem with the room it was the toilet that was slow to flush so that’s to be fixed otherwise I’d use the room again for the proximity to the Irving Park Place.
Bardzo komunikatywny I pomocny. Jak na rumor na temat Bronx okolica spokojna. Metro I sklepy w zasiegu reki

I would like to thank Jian, her mother and uncle for the hospitality. Jian’s place is located in a small chinatown in Brooklyn. Its a very SAFE neighbourhood (very important in NY). Lots of restaurant to choose for. Easy connection to and from Manhattan via N train from the 8th Ave metro station. We felt very SAFE at the station (very important as well).
You have everyhting you need for. Jian’s mother and uncle always looking to help as much as possible despite languange barriers (we use g00gle translate). They provided us with breakfast and fruits during our 14 nights stay. Plus also doing our laundry. Jian’s uncle waited for us for check in and also help us with our luggages during check out. They also help to arrange cheap transportation to JFK.
I will be back. Thanks Jian. Hope your mother and uncle have a good health and fortune always. Many thanks.
We really enjoyed our stay!!  Very easy to check-in and a great location.
So good! I love it here
Great place
Awesome place to stay! Charlie was amazing and helped us a lot!
Great stay if you are wanting to explore nyc! Rooms are basic but clean & everything you need for a city break
I know US is an expensive country, but I paid $744 for 4 nights in a noisy room and there wasn't even free toothpaste. :(

Thoroughly enjoyed my stay. Room was clean, bed was comfortable, and Juniors was  quick to respond to my messages. The best part for me were Junior’s pets, who made the space feel especially welcoming and homey. I don’t think I’ve ever met a cat more friendly and affectionate than Patches, who immediately wanted to hang out with me in the room when I arrived. The two German shepherds were equally as friendly and cute and I loved giving them pets. There is also a beautiful tuxedo cat who is a bit more shy. I would definitely stay at Junior’s space again.
Solid baby - soliiiiid!

The place was very clean, welcoming and homey. Has plenty of amenities- everything you'd need especially if traveling with kids. The location is super convenient as it's 2 minutes walking distance from the G line, as well as lots of markets, coffee shops etc. I love it when the property matches and in this case even tops the description and photos on airbnb.

Al’s place was an absolute gem in Brooklyn! It was beautifully decorated and cared for, spotlessly clean, incredibly comfortable, and an excellent home base for our trip to the city. It was a less than ten minute walk to multiple subway stations and bus lines, making it easy to get into Manhattan or to other parts of Brooklyn. Although our paths unfortunately never crossed during our stay, Al was nothing but kind, welcoming, hospitable, and flexible- we were able to drop our bags off before check-in so we could explore unencumbered, and could have left them after checkout as well if we had wanted to. We would absolutely stay here again!
A wonderful place to stay with a short walk to the subway. Plenty of places to eat around, and quiet place to lay down at night. No issues and would stay again.

Staying at Eva's Airbnb unit for the past few months has been exactly what I needed while looking for my own apartment in NYC. Budget-wise, it was a stretch, but well worth it! The unit itself is lovely. It's charmingly decorated, and everything is in excellent working order (fridge, stovetop, appliances, shower, air conditioning, etc.). And the bed is big and comfortable.
The neighborhood is very walkable — low-key and peaceful along the hilltop streets where the apartment is located, then bustling and lively down the hill, especially along Broadway, which offers a variety of restaurants, cafes, grocery stores, shops, and other services, as well as subway and bus stops. And best of all, there's an amazing park only a five-minute walk from the apartment: Inwood Hill Park. I spent time there almost every day.
As for hosting, Eva and Tom are the best. They are incredibly gracious, friendly, kind, and helpful. I'm grateful to have stayed here and gotten to know them.
great place, excellent location, and. ery friendly and communicative owner.
Great place, beautiful neighborhood, short walk to the park, the subway, and restaurants. 10/10 would recommend for anyone visiting NYC for any occasion!
Great value for money. Good location for transport links to J and A trains, good buses to the L and downtown BK. Can be a little noisy at night. Overall a good deal.

Will's place was wonderful! It was just as described. It has beautiful natural light and street parking was easy. Will was communicative and always responded promptly when we had a question. We look forward to staying at his place next time we're in town.
Great place stay!
The apartment is in a fantastic location, very conveniently located, and the neighborhood is super cool!

The appartment is not where the add shows. It really is in teardrop park in south tribecca.
Having said that. It is really nice and excellent surroundings.
Nice! We enjoyed our stay.  Clean, quiet, easy to find.

My 23 year old daughter and I really enjoyed our stay here.  We both work remotely, and the apartment was set up so that we could do that when we were there.  Location is near enough to Times Square to easily catch shows, but far enough away.  Enjoyed the Hell’s Kitchen vibe.  Apartment building was easily accessible and no issues with the rental.
Good place to stay, good host
Abdon was a great host! He did a great job communicating during the trip.  The air bnb itself was in a great area for a good price.  Would definitely stay there again!
It was my first time in New York and I had a fantastic time! This place is super solid and simple and you are in the middle of Manhattan so that's great! Will definitely be back!
Host gave very clear instructions and was very responsive when I needed something. Great place to stay!
I recommend 100%
Beautiful home. Enjoyed our Stay and I recommend to anyone looking for a beautiful place to stay.
Robert was very friendly and on time with his response. We had a little miscommunication at first but he fixed the situation asap.

Paula was very responsive and was able to have my room available an hour before originally noted. The directions were very clear. The room is in the heart of midtown so if you want quiet, this is likely not the room for you. But if you want hyper local and accessible to everything (because of its distance to Columbus Circle Metro) then stay here.

Extremely disappointing — definitely not worth the money!
The apartment is right next to a tunnel, and the only room with a window is unbearably noisy — you can’t sleep because of the constant traffic. The A/C is poorly installed with a broken plastic panel and a huge gap letting cold air in.
The other two “rooms” are fake — just one room divided by a thin wall, no windows, no ventilation, no privacy. You can hear everything even if you're talking in a whisper. The windowsills and windows haven't been cleaned for about 20 years. Everything inside is dirty: broken couch, stained furniture, disgusting bathroom, and I even had to buy my own light bulbs.
They gave three people only one key for a week and treated us terribly. After I moved out, my Amazon package disappeared — the new tenant took it, and the management said it was my fault. Only after I threatened the police did they react.
Terrible experience. Not worth 7,6k per month. Stay away.
Atento amable buen lugar fácil acceso

Handy place
friendly people
safe environment

Sara and Fabien were fabulous hosts, the space was clean, spacious and quiet and the amenities were great. Sara and Fabien were easy to communicate with and happy to provide local recommendations as needed. This place is a gem in the heart of a gorgeous neighborhood.
Clean space and great host.
Alot of noise because of the road traffic in night and subway, and also the neighbourhood.

We loved our stay here! There were 7 of us on a girls trip and we felt the value was the best of anywhere we looked. Being in the financial district was great for us, the area is beautiful and we got everywhere we wanted with ease! Would absolutely stay here again!
Everything was great and Kam was wonderful. My party had 5 guests and everyone was comfortable.
Amazing neighborhood, beautiful home, and Marlyn was wonderful.
Nice and private studio! This location worked really well being a block away from the train. Really enjoyed my stay here.
Lovely
We had a wonderful stay in New York at Kareem's apartment. Lovely place, very comfortable and right next to the subway. Fully recommended!
Good spot for exploring a great neighborhood at a budget-friendly price. Hamza is a great communicator.

Thank you to Wayne who was so helpful and kind during my first trip of 2026! He was extra accommodating and let me drop my bags on a cold January 1st. The airbnb was absolutely spotless, filled with natural light, and well designed. I wish I could have stayed longer and enjoyed using the kitchen more! Thank you again, Wayne!

We loved our NYC stay. Walked many places but also not far from Grand Central so very convenient. Bed was very comfortable and we felt safe (traveled with all girls). Would def recommend and stay again!

Sammy’s place was exactly like shown in the photos. He was the best host ever, responded immediately and the check in was very easy. Beautiful apartment in great neighborhood. Would totally recommend!
Great Host! Good communication. The room was very clean and really confortable! Thanks Lakisha
Loved my stay.

Perfect location for us. Clean, very comfortable bed. Only issue was temp in apt. Even turning down radiator and opening windows, still too warm
Common problem in NYC

The apartment was great; super spacious, nicely decorated with lots of original art, everything was well stocked. Would love to stay there again in the future! Nice big kitchen with lots of utensils and tools. We loved our stay there! And the neighborhood was great! Super walkable with all the stores and restaurants we needed! We had a nice relaxing stay!

We were happy to meet Annie and stay at her place. We found everything a family with teenage kids needs like TV, internet, books and games to relax after a day of adventures outside discovering New York. Annie was very responsive and proactive. She always cared if we felt comfortable and reminded to contact her at any time.
Good communication
great location and good design!
Volvería de nuevo sitio excelente para pasarla con familia
Super buen host. Sitio muy céntrico. Sin duda me volvería a quedar ahí si vuelvo a New York.
Great stay great area

Jack and I were very happy staying at Ivana's place with its attractive furnishings, comfortable bed, great kitchen, good A/C (it was a hot week), fast electric water kettle and wonderful coffeemaker. The unit is in a well-maintained building on a pleasant block which is very close to an excellent grocery and just a few blocks from the subway station. I recommend it highly!
Milton war sehr nett und unser Aufenthalt verlief schnell und ohne Probleme. Danke für alles und wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!
I had a great stay at Mariana’s. The place is super quiet, comfortable and clean. Mariana was quick to respond and helpful throughout the stay. I hope to be back!

Jason and Raquel are, without a doubt, the best hosts ever! The place is spacious, very clean, and perfectly suited for long stays like mine. They were always attentive, responsive, and made sure I had everything I needed throughout my time there.
The neighborhood is very quiet, just a short walk from the 46St subway station and several bus stops. There’s a laundromat right next door, markets on the corner, and just a few blocks away there's a lively area full of restaurants and shops.
I can’t thank them enough for how well they treated me and us during all these months. I 100% recommend staying here and will definitely come back when I return to New York. I wish them all the very best!

Ames home is truly beautiful. The spacious room with its own bathroom is on the first floor of the lovingly furnished house. The accommodation is located in a nice neighborhood. There are many cafés, restaurants and shops in the immediate vicinity (within walking distance). Nevertheless, it is quiet in the evenings and at night. For us it was the perfect starting point to explore the city. The subway station is just a few minutes walk away. There is also a direct connection to JFK Airport within walking distance.
Ame is a great, incredibly warm and open minded host. She makes you feel welcome in her home. Communication with her is easy and she responds to questions within a few minutes. On request she gives helpful tips about New York. We immediately felt completely comfortable.
We can highly recommend Ame and her accommodation!

I looked at so many Staten Island rentals. His had everything that was important and more at an amazing price.
We actually planned our trip to fit available days at Duanes rental.
There were many at double the price but did not offer the peace and quiet of this rental.
If you pick Duane, you will not be disappointed.
Kimberly was and amazing host! Shaker clean very responsible when arriving late or anything! Just loved this space I slept like a baby definitely can’t wait to book again!

The room was cool just a lot smaller than pictures made out to be. Toilet is on the other side of the shower with no closing so if you are there with someone you have to hear them poop. Almost like how a prison cell would be, but you can leave. Staff were super friendly! CAUTION. Parking garage staff will say it’s full and tell you for a good tip they will get it in. Garage parking is already 60 a day then the parking staff hustles you to thinking there’s no space. Not sure if hotel knows about this, but that was unacceptable. Also the parking staff hustles won’t let you put anything in your car and hold your key hostage until you are ready to leave. It’s a very shady system. Again hotel staff were nice. Over all it felt crowded there. Are is located in a good spot for walking. Lots to do. Madison square garden a few blocks away and plenty of stores and bars.
My stay was very pleasant.

Apartment was lovely and clean and comfortably fit 4 of us .. great location walking distance to lots of central attractions! Had everything you could need for a stay in NYC and Gypsy was so accommodating! Would highly recommend!
Freehand is a beautiful hotel in a great location. The club/restaurants onsite had great atmosphere, and the front desk staff were so funny! We will definitely be back.

WHAT A GEM! A lovely brownstone in a quiet street in the heart of Harlem.
The place was clean and spacious with beautiful original detailing. We loved the full kitchen, large windows and claw foot tub. Even the closet space was generous.
The location is great also with many express trains in close proximity, it’s easy to navigate the area. There’s many delicious restaurants in close proximity such as Sottocasa (one of my favorite pizza spots), Red Rooster, Bo’s Bagels, and Sylvia’s to name a few. A few places for coffee and treats (big shout out to Lee Lee’s- don’t miss out of this!), and the famed Apollo Theatre. Central Park is also a short walk away. The Conservatory Garden and North Woods are some of my favorite parts of the park and are located on the north end.
Beatrice was an excellent host and was extraordinarily welcoming. She made sure we had the WiFi password and we were familiar with the area before setting off. We had a very comfortable stay and would love to stay again.

Patricia and Cherrise are wonderful and warm hosts, and it was truly a delight to be able to start my visit in NYC with them. The room was very cozy and clean, and had a small desk with enough space to set up a laptop and get online. I was able to settle in comfortably, and there were drawers and hangers for my clothes so I could unpack and have some room to stretch. The home itself is so very charming indeed and full of art and life. The communal spaces were welcoming and truly filled with community and connection, and I was able to make use of the refrigerator and kitchen, often lounging with my morning coffee.
The nearby neighborhood is definitely bustling and there are many options for amazing food within walking distance. There are several markets as well and the train station is a short walk away. Despite being a rather urban area I still felt safe walking back from the train in the evening.
I also absolutely adored getting to know the household cats!

The staff was friendly and helpful. My partner and I arrived 3 hours before the check-in time and they offered us a similar room but without views that was ready. We took it since we preferred to leave our things there and not worry about it for the rest of the day. This room was just in front of the elevators and that made us worry about the noise, but we were pleasently surprised by the absolut silence we enjoyed. The bed was comfortable, the room temperature perfect, we didn't even have to use A/C, the bathroom was clean and spacious. The bedroom was small but tidy, and there was space for our luggage so that was not a problem. The location of this hotel is superb, walking distance to Bryant Park, Madison Square Park and Times Square. Lots to see and eat around. For the price that was a great deal.
Amazing house. Great location. Amazing host would book again.

The Airbnb is in a great location. Not only walking distance to the trains but also short walk from the Guggenheim museum, the MET and Central Park.
The host was very responsive, I had issues accessing the WiFi and they were able to help me immediately.
Over all I will recommend anyone to stay at the Lara.

This is truly a gem in NYC! You get a large space, full privacy, and yet close to everything! There are tons of great restaurants and shops as well as subway stations in the neighborhood, and you are close to Manhattan for all the activities there. The house is spacious, clean, has all what you need. I highly recommend staying here and would stay again if we were to come back to NYC!
Pettrina helped us feel right at home. Lovely neighborhood and super walkable area, too.

A nice welcome to the appartment was waiting for us with snacks and water bottles. We appreciate the nice attention. The appartment is very clean and it's the perfect brooklyn airbnb. The appartment has permitted us to have a superb weekend in NYC, and we enjoyed every second of it !
Thank you Mary Ann for answering all our questions rapidly and with great kindness. I would recommend to all my friends.
Eric
good

Tracey our host ans her husband  was amazing and pleasant!! They were so kind and easy to communicate with. She made sure we were cozy and comfortable as promised. Her photos doesn’t do her place justice! We booked 4 days for my wedding and it’s was a perfect fit !  I traveled with my 2 younger children and had everything I needed to cook meals for them without having to leave. The washer/dryer made things very easy for me. The location was Near to several shops, restaurants and a mall. Parking was very easy as well. I recommend her place and will be booking for my returning trips to queens. Thanks again for pleasant experience. If your looking for a glamorous luxurious experience just Book it!! You won’t regret.
We had a wonderful time again at Mohammed’s place! Had everything we needed, peaceful and felt like home
Great location, very tight rooms.

We really enjoyed having this space as a "home base."  Getting to the train was an easy and quick walk when going to the Yankees game.  We also had a great dinner at f&j pine, which was one of Yulia and Amine's suggestions.  The space was clean and comfortable, and we enjoyed our stay.  Thank you!

We had a great time at Liz's ! Liz is a friendly, caring and reactive host. She always answered our questions very quickly and make us feel confortable at her home. The apartment is well located in Brooklyn. Park Slope is a wonderful district. It was so nice to come back there at night after spending the day in Manhattan. Plenty of coffee shops, restaurants and nice shops around. Prospect Park and The Botanic garden are just 15min away. We loved strolling in this neighbourhood. Thank you Liz, Teddy and Izzy. We hope to come back one day !

Siddharth was a great host who was very communicative from beginning to end. The place is cozy and in a great area. The projector on the wall is pretty great. Any issues that came up he was always super prompt to address. Definitely recommend.
Great location, quiet and clean
Great location! Easy check in and out

Steven is a great host. He took care of everything we needed in advance. The unit was great. Clean, well furnished and accessorized. Location is great, a fun and convenient neighborhood with lots to do and walking to so many NYC highlights. Will look to stay here next time in the city.
If you need to be near NYU Langone/Tisch hospital there cannot be a better spot (6 minute walk).

Victoria was very proactive and easy to deal with.  She consistently responded to messages quickly. The place looks just like the pictures.  Lots of books to keep us busy when relaxing, or in for the night.  Tree lined section of town with calm, residential feel.  Apartment itself is comfortable and quiet.  Slept well.  Lots of excellent restaurants/bars nearby.  Less than 10 minute walk to a couple of major subway lines.  Would stay there again in a heartbeat.

This is probably the best air bnb I’ve ever stayed in. Alex was SUPER helpful and communicative. The space was amazing a super cozy/clean. And I’ve never slept better while traveling. I’ll definitely be back!
Super plan ! Communication facile, emplacement parfait, propreté convenable notamment la sdb commune ! Bref je recommande 👍🏽
For people who want to enjoy the food in Flushing, it’s a great place to stay. Home is very clean and host is very nice and easy going :)

I highly recommend Aron’s place!! The home was beautiful: spacious, full of Brooklyn charm, clean, beautifully and thoughtfully decorated, and has a fully stocked and expansive kitchen, spa-level upstairs bathroom and shower, and even a back patio and grill. It was the perfect place for our family to gather, and offered both privacy and shared space for meals and hangouts. The location is also terrific, by beautiful Greenwood Cemetery and an easy walk to the treasure that is Prospect Park. Grocers and small corner stores were also conveniently nearby. Finally, Aron was a lovely and communicative host. My family had a few questions in advance of our stay and Aron was helpful and so quick in his responses. Highly recommend!

Convenient location and close to Times Square. The hosts are very responsive and would check in via text if I needed anything during my stay. It was nice to have the hot breakfast because I was able to get out and start my day earlier. The only downside was it can get pretty crowded in the cafeteria room during breakfast & there's only 2 elevators for the whole hotel so there can be a wait depending on when you need it.

Such a pleasure to stay in an AirBnB with a real kitchen. This place is spacious, comfortable and has everything you need. We loved the location and it’s easy to get a bus and the Metro is only a 10 minute walk away. Great neighborhood with lots of good restaurants and food stores nearby. Comfortable bed and quiet at night. Would definitely stay here again. Jeremy was helpful and clear in communicating with us.
Apartment was clean and as described. Well sized space, especially in NYC and had everything I needed. note The wall between the other apartment is a bit thin so you can hear the other resident.
The rooms are always clean and the staff is helpful but are rarely needed as staying there is incredibly straight forward. Very nice location in Brooklyn.
It was great!
Very nice, very clean, super friendly employees!
Great location and the host had a lot of thoughtful touches to the apartment! Would stay again
Chloe was so sweet and welcoming to me and her home was both clean and stylish! A really lovely experience overall.

Great location for staying overnight by the airport. Shuttle was easy, but they started running after 6 am, not earlier unfortunately, so I had to take my own transportation. They did offer to call a taxi for me.

Sonya was very responsive from start to finish. She made an accommodation for our group after one person came down ill and our plans changed. We were so grateful for her flexibility! She also went out of her way to ask if we needed anything given the circumstances.
The proximity to the park was very nice, where you could see all sorts of wildlife. Every night, the mockingbirds had a constant conversation which our group found amusing.
Sonya’s place was also very clean and the kitchen was well stocked with cooking gear. When we were there, there were no ACs installed, so be aware of that if booking in late spring. It cooled down at night and we slept comfortably.

Wilda's place is a very warm and welcoming home away from home. It's spotlessly clean and very well kept. We've stayed at a lot of AirBnb's earlier, but this one's the most well stocked. Be it the linen, towels, toiletries or pantry, it was way beyond what one expects. The pantry especially was loaded with eggs, coffee, pasta, spices, what not. Wilda was even kind enough to stock a packet of Basmati Rice for us, knowing we were Indian and vegetarian perhaps. The bathroom's a bit small, but the perfectly hot water and all the generous toiletries, more than makes up. The only real disadvantage, is if one wants to go into Manhattan or any of the tourist hotspots, is the distance. The nearest subway station is a 15 min walk. But once you get there, it's a breeze to navigate the system and get to pretty much anywhere in the city. We had to go into town everyday, so we spent a lot of time traveling. But, that's really on us.
Thanks a lot Wilda !!!

I had a great stay, would come again.
This cute place in a very picturesque street in brooklyn was perfect for my stay in nyc.
The room was spatiosus, clean and very adorable, the entire home was very unique.
bathroom was clean and comfortable.
The train to manhattan was right by the home, easy traveling.
Omar who was managing the property was an absolute sweetheart and very helpful.
Thank you all for my pleasant stay.
Greetings from Amsterdam.
Anthony’s place felt like a steal! Great location, safe street, larger than I expected. Felt elevated and comfortable inside. I hope to stay here again next time I’m in town!

We arrived there at 4:30 pm and the room was not ready even if the check-in was at 4 pm. The host didn't answer our messages and calls. After 10 minutes a man answer the door and told us that the room is not ready yet because they had some problems and will be ready in 10 minutes. We waited 30 minutes more. The host didn't bothered to send us at least a message after that in order to explain the situation.
The room looks like in the pictures, but it was a little messy. In the room there is a micro and a fridge but no glasses. So if you want a tea or coffee... Good luck.
Also, during 2 nights (of 5) the tv in the other room was very loud and the child of the family kept screaming and we couldn't sleep until 1-2 am.
Bonus points for the neighborhood: it was safe and nice. Close to the stores and restaurants, but in order to go to the city centre you should take a bus (or walk 20 minutes) and then the subway or train: 40-60 min total.
Ok, but won't come again.

Lots of local walkable bars and restaurants, very close the train, and just liked the vibe of the neighborhood. As other people have warned- if you've been on a Navy ship or in a mine, the stairs to the sleeping area will make you feel right at home. If you have serious balance issues, I'd look elsewhere. We had no issues, but my twenty-years-from-now self might have second thoughts. Great place to stay!
Great location and great host. Really enjoyed our stay in all respects.

Really convenient location from JFK and LIRR train stations. Deborah was also really accommodating of us since we had to do the self check-in very late and also booked the Airbnb somewhat last minute. The home itself was very clean and comfortable.
What not the most obvious from this listing unless you clicked on Deborah’s other listings was that you’d be sharing the home with other Airbnb guests. I have no problem doing shared private rooms but usually only when it’s the host who’s staying with me. This was not at all due to Deborah as she could not control this situation (she was extremely apologetic) but the other Airbnb guests in the home with us were loud and disrespectful. They knew we came in at around 2-3am but decided to wake us up in the early morning by knocking on our door, singing, slamming in kitchen - this is not due at all to Deborah or her place but in any situation where your other guests are strangers from Airbnb, there will be a risk you have to accept.
Me and the girls had a great time at Selims place thanks for having us
Yu’s place was a good spot to rest up from a long night. Comfortable beds and wonderful amenities!

Me and my boyfriend had the best stay at Jennifer’s houses, we definitely loved New York more than expected because we felt so at home at Jennifer’s house
She gave us pages of recommendations and was extremely welcoming and helpful (and has the cutest dog !!)
The room was great and we had our own private bathroom which were both beautiful.
I couldn’t recommend Jennifer’s airbnb more !
Gina and Pucci are the sweetest! Gina was always very responsive, caring, and welcoming. The shared spaces (bathroom and kitchen) were always spotless! The area is very residential and felt safe.

Le logement était très agréable et calme, parfait pour se reposer. À mon arrivée, Yakima m’a transmis toutes les informations de manière claire et il a eu la gentillesse de m’accueillir plus tôt en fonction de mon vol. Cela m’a beaucoup facilité le séjour. Merci encore, c’était une excellente expérience !
Tanya was a wonderful host.Her place is nice and cozy!Well past my expectations.I will definitely be booking with her again whenever I’m in NYC.Thank you Tanya!
Great hosts will stay with them again!

Jallal, you’ve been amazing! Most friendly, hospitable host I’ve ever had. His home was very clean and organized. He was very helpful throughout my entire stay and he has great conversation! I really appreciate your allowance of my stay. Will come back if time permits.
Great time with Dawud's house on Vacation
Emel’s place is good. 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

Very charming and extremely clean. I appreciated that Ben had things readily available and labeled. The check in process was simple, Ben offered help whenever we needed it. I definitely recommend the cabin.
Great visit. Michele was helpful and friendly.
convenient place to stay!
Anthony was a great host.  Quick responses very accommodating overall I had a great stay.  Anthony thank you for your hospitality greatly appreciated !!
La habitación es súper amplia, con todo los elementos necesarios de aseo. Te entregan toallas. La Estacion de metro 7 se encuentra a 5 minutos.

I've stayed here twice so far, and could easily see a third visit in the future.
Pearline's place feels like a home, while being incredibly efficient and convenient.
Easy to follow instructions for self-check in. Even then, she went out of her way to look out for me and ensure I got in ok.
Once you get in, you're wanting for nothing. The home is fully kitted with whatever amenities you might need in your own home. And then some.
I love the design and arrangement of the space too. Very tastefully furnished, really feels good and easy to spend all your time indoors. Again, she goes way beyond the bare minimum for an airbnb. I get the feeling that hospitality may be a genuine passion of hers.
On that note, there's nothing like finding an unexpected jug of cold lemonade in the fridge after a long and hectic travel -- just an indication of the kind of operation being run here.
Recommend unconditionally if you're looking for a stress-free home away from home in the Canarsie area.

It's my second time staying at Melissa's place and always feels like home! As usual, she recommends the best places around, makes the suitable for our needs and is always on hand to solve any issues that may arise! It's my go-to spot in Brooklyn with great Metro connections in and out of the borough and a peaceful neighbourhood. Especially great for large groups and families if they want a place to relax in. Great TV and vinyl selection too!

I loved staying at Lee’s place. I was a little worried about not having the “entire place” but the guest room was larger and better than expected. It was a perfect studio. Lee was a great host, always responded quickly and made sure we were having a good stay.

it's a spacious 3 bedroom duplex condo that designed around the stylish gourmet kitchen, in an very quiet and safe part of Harlem community. I stayed there for a month and a half. The owner responded very promptly to all questions and dealt with them immediately. The place was very clean. Subways and busses are all within a few blocks. Direct accessibility to the open backyard and Japanese style shower toilets are a major plus. I highly recommend this place.
It is a clean hotel located in a nice area of NYC.  It is a boutique hotel and the rooms are very small.
Leo una persona fantastica, gentile, e molto simpatico. alloggio pulito comodo
Nice place we had a nice stay there

Positives:  the location is wonderful and may supersede anything I say next.  Also there was a very nice living room with a tv and a large dining room table.  However, The apartment lacked amenities that would’ve made it more comfortable like closets, adequate drawer space, decent cooking pots, pans and cooking utensils (there is no large knife, spatula or measuring cups), there is a dishwasher but we couldn’t find soap for it, towel racks, soap dishes in shower for soap and shampoo, an appropriate window covering for bedroom on the sunny street side instead of a fitted bed sheet that barely fit.  This all made it very hard to unpack, I ended up spreading my clothes on the floor.

The parking isn’t the best. Although there is some sort of discount it doesn’t offer much. With understanding that it’s not part of YOTEL or under the same company there should be a better way for guests to park.

Excellent hotel Airbnb , les chambres sont parfaite. accueil personnel au top. Extremement bien situé à proximité des métros et restaurant.
Je recommande fortement
My stay at Heng’s was cozy, peaceful, clean and safe! Perfect for a little getaway :)
Great place and host.

Emplacement parfait, à 2 minutes de Central Park, chambre et salle de bains super propre! Restaurants et métro a proximité.
Jaleh souhaite que votre séjour se passe bien et est toujours disponible pour vous rendre service. Je recommande vivement.
Very nice host.
Great room to stay in the city. Michael is super nice and accommodating

Simone is the best hostess ever! She responds asap and is there for whatever you need. She took very good care of us. If you stay at Simone‘s you are in really good hands.
The bed was so comfortable, we slept so well this entire week. You can go anywhere from there. In approximately 10 minutes you’ll arrive at Central Park or at Subway-/bus stations. There are also supermarkets or fast food restaurants right next to the apartment in case you need something. It was also really quiet there. We’ll definitely come back again!

Very Nice room, easy access, close to supermarkets and walking distance from everything you need in lower East side. Only concern was the big poster in the entrance saying no Airbnb rentals in the building - I was in doubt what to say if anyone asked why I was there.
Muy buena habitación, cómoda y agradable, fácil acceso a times square y lugares iconicos.
Great place to live
Perfect location in NYC. Conrad’s place was exactly what we were looking for. Go for it ☺️
Everything just as described, great communication with the host, the bed was very comfortable, private bathroom adds a lot of comfort. It was a perfect place for a short stay for us!

This home is wonderful, and Chunhsien is an incredible host! Everything in the space is well kept, clean, and nicely maintained. Chunhsien is very kind, friendly, responsive, and most helpful. The neighborhood is also incredibly peaceful and safe, with many parks and places of worship nearby. I also love that the location is accessible to many buses to get to Flushing, and to the train to head into Manhattan. I would definitely recommend this place, and would be more than happy to stay again in the future. Thank you Chunhsien!
Overall stay was great for the price. Quiet neighborhood, it was a cute little apartment. Charles was very responsive whenever I contacted him.

Top notch all the way around. Henry and his team are excellent. As expected, the indoor space is fairly tight but our family of six did just fine — it’s very efficient. The bathroom and kitchen area exceeded expectations and were well equipped. The outdoor space and view of Empire State Building are unmatched for a place at this price point (or even 2-3x higher, frankly). Would love to return. Thanks Henry!!
Great location and privacy. A real Brooklyn experience.
Except for the steps everything was perfect .

Place is OK, too much rules for a host, I personally I  need to shower after a whole day walking up and down visiting NYC but we weren’t able to do it because of the house rules, bed needs a new mattress, the rest was clean and Natalie was responsive when needed. I would say this place is just OK.
I enjoyed the stay!  Inwood is a great location and Ronnie and his mom were nice.  It is easy to work from the bedroom.
Great location, great host, would definitely stay again!
grate stay loved every moment the view from the fire escape he went out of his way to buy us all new bedding and towels I would for sure stay again
I really recommend!
Great stay, very nice,kind and funny staff. You can see in the suite that it needs bit of remodellling and new furnitute. Definitely recommend
One of my best trips on AirBNB so far. Great and comfortable location with plenty of space. Easy to get to and navigate from. Highly recommend. Will be staying here again next trip
Excellent Park Slope location and wonderful thoughtful hosts!  Great communication and easy lock box for entry.  Highly recommend.

We had a great stay at Adam’s place! The location was excellent and convenient for getting around NYC, with plenty of food options nearby, and just far enough from the crowds to provide a quiet space. We felt safe and comfortable. I would recommend Adam’s place for anyone going to NYC. Only giving 4 stars because I was unable to receive response from Adam- only automated messages.

Jimmy’s check-in process was both time-efficient and enjoyable (like an Easter egg hunt). His succinct and to the point directions led to an overall effortless arrival.
I would consider Jimmy to be an overall excellent host because he made me feel welcome and treated me like family. He periodically checks in to make sure that your stay is going smoothly and responds to any queries within minutes. As a person, he is very accessible and affable.
The accommodations provided for excellent sleep and a dedicated workspace made my working remotely extra productive. The area is logistically perfect for any guest transiting from either JFK or LGA. There is ample street parking available.
Without a doubt, Jimmy is a tremendous asset for AirBnb! I would not hesitate to book again at any of Jimmy’s properties. In fact, I am already planning another stay at his beautiful home :)

This is a great location - so close to subway and shops. The street is quiet. The apartment is clean and new, and everything works well. Good cooking facilities with oven, cooktop and microwave, so easy to eat in.
The support provided by the host Andre and his property manager has been exceptional – very quick response to any minor issues. In particular I was extremely impressed with the contact from host prior to our arrival, to check if we had any new queries and confirm time of arrival. This was extremely reassuring as we were travelling to NY from another country and arriving late afternoon to an unfamiliar location.
I can highly recommend this - we stayed for 18 days.

Jakir un excelente anfitrión. Muy recomendable. La zona está bien pero lo único que el departamento está arriba de un pub y hay ruidos sobre todo el fin de semana. La estación Greenpoint del subway está a poco más de 100 metros. Si vas con mucho equipaje pesado debes tener en cuenta que para llegar al departamento hay 2 subidas bien empinadas de escaleras. Por todo lo demás impecable. Sin lugar a dudas volvería.

M was a great host! As soon as we entered the space we immediately noticed the cleanliness. The location is great as well as the kitchen. She provided instant communication before and after we arrived. My family and I will definitely be back here for our next NYC trip. Thank you again M!
Clean, comfortable, and minimalist apartment located close to the Subway with easy commute into the city! Excellent coffee and breakfast within walking distance at Pando’s.
Me encantó …la habitación  ,  el lugar y el servicio son excelentes y sin duda será una opción la próxima vez
Muy bien situado, personal amigable y con buena disposición, instalaciones impecables.
Our family had a great stay at this apartment. Clean and quiet. We will be back again, thank you!
Bin was the perfect host and his place was perfect for our needs.
Friendly welcome. Very good parking place. Please repair the light in the bathroom.
very good
Very responsive host with clear instructions, and they were able to help whenever we needed it. Airbnb itself was spacious and rooms were clean.

We had four adults, and the plenty of beds for all of us.  It could accommodate three more small to medium size guests.  Mattresses were comfortable, with good linens.  It's mid town Manhattan, so space is tight, but plenty of luggage space under the beds.  Not as noisy as we feared.  Adjacent street has light traffic.   There is a cooktop, but I wouldn't plan on cooking and eating in the unit.   Go out.   Unique eateries all around.

Francisco is a very hospitable host who shares another bedroom and is willing to promptly address guests’ requests. He greeted personally for a smooth check-in. The building might be too old to install elevator, but the room was maintained to be clean and tidy enough.

Dan's place is accurately described!  Very convenient location, just 3 mins walk to the subway which brings you directly to Manhatten in 40 mins.  The place also has many restaurants nearby which is excellent.  We were a group of 5 but I can see how it could fit 9 comfortably too.  Would stay again when I'm back in NYC :)

If it were possible to give Anna and Tom 5+ stars, we would. They are incredible hosts and we highly recommend you stay in their adorable apartment! It’s clean and homely and has more space than expected. We were super close to the J and C trains and were also walking distance from great coffee shops and restaurants. Anna was quick to answer any questions we had about the place and made us feel at home. We hope to stay again!

Fue un placer quedarse estos días aquí. El trato de Mahmood y su mujer fue increíble, nos sentimos a gusto todo el tiempo.
La cama es muy cómoda, la habitación amplia y el baño también.
La zona es muy tranquila, a unos 8 minutos en bus del Ferry de Staten Island que conecta con Manhattan.
Recomiendo 100%
Si no tienes problemas de salir de la isla, este es el alojamiento ideal.
Lupas, el gato, se ganó un lugar en nuestros corazones.
Very enjoyable stay, Stephen was extremely helpful during my stay at the apartment.

Ivan's place was clean, spacious and comfortable, it was just perfect for my parents who were visiting town to see their grandkids. Ivan was very accommodating and responsive.
I'd highly recommend this place.
Excelente
The room is very large and spacious. Inside there is everything you need: refrigerator, TV, fresh towels. Great neighbors. Patrick is a very hospitable host. Thanks
Safiya has been a great host. She is very open to input on what would make my stay better. Her kindness is extraordinary in going the extra mile for me again and again.
Sehr schön und gut gelegen!
Shirrod’s place is the best place I’ve ever stayed in hands down peaceful and quiet. I would definitely stay here again. Was so good I extended my stay 3 weeks extra 😭

Was very happy we selected this hotel for our two day stay in NYC to celebrate our anniversary. The room, although small, was very comfortable and well laid out. The bathroom was a good size and the bed very comfortable. The location is in a perfect as it is in close proximity to the theater but far away from the crowds of Times Square. Lots of good restaurants in the area, Central Park and shopping all close by. I would definitely stay at Le Meridian again when I return to NYC.
Everything was great! Thank you so much

Aneerban's place is as described on Airbnb.  Only a few blocks away from the Rockaway-Canarsie subway station (L train).  However if you need to transfer to the 3 train, there are lots of stairs to take at the Livonia Ave and Junius St station.  Not so convenient if traveling with an elderly.  Aneerban was very proactive in giving us tips about where to find the closest supermarket, and other tips.  The only very minor part about the apartment was that the middle leg of the bed in the singles room sticks out a bit and we got slightly injured so we had to wrap that leg around with paper towels so to make it easier to see.  Overall we had a great experience.
Great location if you want to stay in the city and explore. We would stay here again!

Nice and clean place. Bathroom and kitchen were extremely clean. Shower had super good water pressure. Good location metro stations are in walk-able distance.  Lots and lots food places around. Next time I need to stay in south Brooklyn, I'll try to book Suliman's place again.
Good place to stay in a great location! Being so close to the subway was very helpful! Nice space and the hosts were so kind and friendly!!! Comfy bed and pillows too!
Place was cozy and lovely furniture, Andrew was nice and friendly. However the area is a bit sketchy when the sun goes down.

If you just need a place to sleep and don’t plan to spend much time in the room, then this place is ideal given it is significantly cheaper than most hotels. It was clean, very small, and in a good location. Bring earplugs and you’ll sleep well! The bed was pretty comfortable.
excelente lugar, me sentí como en casa, su mamá muy atenta, muy limpio todo, cama súper cómoda y baño muy limpio, volvería!
Staying at Michelle’s was really nice! It is a good place for a reasonable price, so the price-quality ratio is excellent!
Everything is as described. I really liked to stay at this apt. Marlyn is a great host. I will come back!

Positiv:
- Metro Anbindung
- gut ausgestattet
Negativ:
-viele Kakerlaken
- sehr laut, man hört jeden Schritt in der Etage darüber
- renovierungsbedürftig
- nicht besonders sauber (Flecken auf der Couch)
ich würde die Unterkunft kein zweites Mal buchen.
Amazing, Cozy place to stay for a quick weekend get away. Responsive host & very accommodating to whatever needs you have. Would recommend to anyone traveling to Ny.
Appreciated how fast the response was with any questions I had. The place was very clean and looked just like the pictures! 100% recommend!

Bardzo udany pobyt (w sumie 4 osoby, w tym trzej dorośli synowie). Miejsce w centrum Manhattanu, wszędzie blisko, możliwość swobodnego wyboru kierunków zwiedzania. Dostęp do komunikacji miejskiej. Nie odnotowano żadnych problemów i zagrożeń. Pobyt w lutym ma swoje wyzwania, jednak był to bardzo dobrze spędzony czas. W apartamencie duże łóżka, wszystko co potrzebne do kilkudniowego, normalnego pobytu (wyspania się po i przed zwiedzaniem). Internet działa bez problemu. Jest lodówka, kuchenka elektryczna, naczynia. Okno wychodzi na "ślepe" ściany.  Sugerowałbym jedynie dodanie do kontaktów elektrycznych "europejskiego" adaptera (końcówki wtykowej). Nie mamy w zasadzie żadnych uwag. Polecamy!!!

Estadía perfecta, lugar súper limpio, agradable, los anfitriones con muy buena predisposición siempre, check in Perfecto, la ubicación es muy buena (una parada en metro de Manhattan). Fue una estadía impecable.
Great spacious room, kind host, and cool location!
Gute Wohnung aber schlechte Gegend.

Location is really great and Jim was an excellent host. The apartment was just as it appears in the listing. Well stocked kitchen for cooking and making your own coffee. Minor issues were the living room was a bit cold and you can hear a lot of foot traffic in the apartment above but all around a good experience.
Great spot. This neighborhood rocks

We had a good time in Leigh’s place, He was a really welcoming host and communicated everything clearly. And his airbnb had excellent space and was really cozy, just like the photos. The metro station was really near and many places to eat and shop. We recommend staying here in your next trip to NYC.
Great location, and a great stay! Mark was very flexible with check-in, and was very responsive as we transitioned Airbnbs throughout NY. Thanks Mark!
A little noisy from upstairs one night, but other than that was a great stay.

Great spot in Brooklyn to relax and local places to eat. The private bathroom was really great, the bed super comfortable.
Will love to be back.
We enjoyed our stay. The bedrooms are spacious and the shower is great.

El piso está muy bien , amplio y cómodo .Ideal para ir en familia Cerca de una parada de metro que te lleva en 30 minutos a Manhattan. En la zona hay un buen supermercado ( Key Food) para abastecerse .

Jessica was a great host - replied almost immediately and let us store our bags when our flight changed. The apartment is in a great location - 2 mins from Barclays Centre which is very well connected. The back garden would be great in summer! It is a little rustic and dated (as the pictures show) but it had everything we needed.

pros:
- breakfast included
- cool grafites, common spaces, bar in the rooftop
- decoration
- nice shower and comfy bed
- close to a couple of subway stations
cons:
- no privacy in the bathroom (toiled is next to bed and the door does’t close completely)
- almost no storage in the room
Identique aux photos, chambre propre tout comme les espaces communs.

Beautiful place. Clinton was able to accommodate us after a really long day in the city with my mom visiting me from Argentina and truly appreciate it. Nice and clean, very comfortable! We will definitely book again!
Amazing communication, location and cleanliness. I was well accommodated by staff, the location provides free complementary breakfast and I enjoyed the terrace view of the city.

The apartment is exactly as advertised. The beds are very comfortable and I especially appreciated the white linen. It is also close to public transit.
Felix is an amazing host. He knew I was in NY to celebrate my birthday and a box of delicious pastry was in the fridge for me and a nice bottle of wine on the counter. Felix's thoughtfulness definitely started our week in the best way possible. Thank you Felix
Love the space in a very happening location. Especially the rooftop!
Defining the word Superhost!

I spend 40 nights at Natalie’s and it was great. Although we barely saw each other, communication was great. I felt like Natalie gave me space, which I really appreciated. If I needed anything, I could easily text her.
The room was more spacious than it seems on the pictures. I slept well! It does get warm, but she provided a fan, and an AC when necessary.
The location was conveniently located between 4 subways (L, G, J and M train are all on a 10’ walk). It’s a more quite area but great to escape the bussle of the city while still being close enough to walk to various bars, restaurants and hangout spots.
Great location, such responsive communication and a perfect place for a sightseeing/shopping  trip to NYC.
Exactly what I was looking for in a place to stay. Would definitely stay there again.

Wanly’s place was exactly as described. I was able to self check in, camera by the door for security, WiFi worked fine, great food nearby, and parking fairly close. It felt like my own little studio in Brooklyn (without the NYC prices). Towels were provided, and the place was clean. The ONLY complaint I have is the tiny bathroom. There’s not much room to move about if you’re getting ready especially for the bigger folks. As for me personally, it was fine. 5 stars over all.
Wanly responded within minutes of asking a question. Very professional. Thank you.
I had a great stay with Adam!! He was very responsive and helpful with the stay. I really enjoyed the location and the surrounding area!! Thanks for the great stay, would easily stay again!
Kyoko was very nice and easy to talk to. The area is ideal for me: close to lots of restaurants, shops and central park.

Overall this was a great place to stay and one that we would return to. The apartment was clean and comfortable. Michelle was friendly, helpful, and prompt and clear with communication. The best part was how close it was to fantastic restaurants, coffee shops, and subway stations. It was an excellent stay, thank you!
The host was friendly and apartment was clean! Subway was really close too! Everything was really good!
AP Lindo
Marisol's place was perfect for us. cute Cozy spot and super close to the Laguardia Airport. She was very accommodating. Would definitely stay here again.
Clean, central location with impeccably fast & helpful responses from Krasimir. Recommended!
came back a second time and loved it!
Halil is an awesome host! He is so welcoming and kind! His place is in a fantastic location and I can’t fault him at all.
Ben was super responsive and his home was very well located. Thanks for letting us spend the weekend there!

The place was what it advertised.
We were well pleased.

A truly amazing experience!
I stayed at Johnny’s for a week and wow, it was such a wonderful time. He is an incredibly gracious, interesting and kind person. It felt like home in the city. I absolutely recommend staying here.
Thank you again Johnny!

My friends and I stayed here for just a night so it was fine; had the basics. Host did not make clear to me that the house is shared with others and although you have your own space (the second floor, with kitchen, living room etc) there is someone who walks through to get from the top floor to bottom floor, and who plays loud music in the attic. Not a big deal, just didn’t love how he communicated when I asked about it, and we had expected to have full privacy while there. Overall a decent place to stay for a night or two when visiting NYC.
Cerca del transporte y ofrecen un muy buen desayuno.

Thank you, Jurell for sharing your home! This home was the perfect stay for my daughter’s college graduation trip! I wanted her to experience New York in true New York fashion and we did just that! His home was close to the LIRR which took us everywhere we needed to go. I’m a queens girl at heart so his location was perfect! Jurell’s home is located right across the street from a soccer field so we got to sit on the porch and watch a few soccer games and witness some pure talent, it was a true pleasure. His game room was perfect entertainment. I would definitely book again! 10/10! Thank you again for lending your home!
Чистая, уютная, тихая квартира. Однозначно стоит своих денег.
Great place great host great location. So so close to the metro, easy to get Downtown. Safe neighbourhood. Would 100% recommend and rebook.
Loved our stay! Great location and close to transit. Alex and Athena were extremely friendly and helpful. Would stay again!

El hospedaje con Michelle estuvo bien, la habitacion y el baño es limpio, la llegada al lugar fue facil, lo unico que quizas deba mejorar es el WIFI no tuvimos buena señal algunos dias de nuestra estadia, el internet era intermitente y se caia contantemente.
Perfect little air bnb, very safe for female travellers. Great location/value.

I stayed at Sabina’s apartment for a month. It’s a compact space with strong Wi-Fi and laundry access. Check-in was smooth and Sabina was responsive and respectful throughout. A few issues came up—hot water outages and a mouse sighting—but they were handled fairly quickly.
The apartment is best for solo travelers with minimal luggage. It’s too small for two people to live or work comfortably. There’s no view—one window faces a hospital/church parking lot, the other faces another building.
The neighborhood deserves an honest note. While I was never in danger, there were frequent street fights, public drug use, and people calling out things like “white boy” at night. It felt intense and uncomfortable after 10.00pm. I wouldn’t recommend this area for couples, families, or solo female travelers. That said, the subway is nearby, Empire Deli is great, and Central Park is accessible.
Overall: it’s a functional place for solo male travelers who are street-smart and need good transit access.

Spring's apartment is extremely well located with plenty of restaurants and beautiful parks nearby. The apartment is tidy and the shared bathrooms and shower were clean and easy to use. However, there are some small cockroaches in the kitchen area. This seems to be a building problem and not a result of the apartment's cleanliness. Nonetheless, we did not cook or eat in the apartment and would not recommend doing so because of this.
干净卫生

Paying for the location more than anything with plenty of things on your doorstep. Melisa was also responsive and flexible with our check in and check out times.
We found hairs on the bedding and had issues with noise as the window didn't close. I can imagine in winter that it would be freezing. Also the space appears to be 3 rooms that are all Airbnbs so felt a bit more like a hostel.
Ok for a night or two where you are spending most of the time out and about in Manhattan.

I was pleased to book Ruby's place for the holiday weekend. The premises is well kept & the lower-level unit was lovely. The space is modern, impeccably clean, simple & comfortable; w/ complete range cooking, fridge, TV, Wifi, easy street parking. The host puts a classy & personal touch on welcoming guests w/ snacks & a thank you card. This is an excellent place for a single person or a couple in a quiet neighborhood. I plan to book here in the future & highly recommend this listing.
Close to the Subway, spacious and very responsive and helpful host.
Very easy check in/out and the apartment was perfect for our needs. Great communication with hosts. Very cool neighborhood with tons to do!
Enjoyed staying here.
Convenient location and host was very communicative.
A great place to stay, close to everything,. Everyone was friendly and helpful.
Maribel was very responsive and helpful. Place was clean. Location very convenient.
unit was nice, building staff wonderful, furniture is cheap and uncomfortable.
Great!

I understand NY is expensive, but this did not feel value. Cramped space, no cutlery and incredibly hot and stuffy. Huge heat problem. Radiator on constant, plus large hot water pipe running straight through room. Despite -2c outside at night, had to sleep with constant air con and window open. Bath backed up to shin height with dirty brown water when shower used. Only 2 toilet rolls given for 2 people for 7 night stay, had to buy our own. Communal lounge is not so, it’s just an apartment building basic lobby.

Bright, quiet, clean and lovely studio. Great location for Park Slope visit!
I would highly recommend!
Their place was clean and there was everything we needed. The location was also suitable for traveling and staying. They were also kind and willing to reach out when we needed help.

Beautiful accommodations that comfort the body, and relax the mind.  Location next to Prospect Park is perfect for long morning walks or afternoon runs. Lively and interesting restaurants walking distance. Geoffrey’s place provides the charm of by gone Brooklyn architecture with all the modern conveniences of a luxury boutique hotel.   We look forward to our returns.
The space was as pictured. Check in was easy! Thank you Susan!
Very easy and accessible check-in, great neighborhood, clean and comfortable apartment. Overall very satisfied with this stay.
Strait forward no games. Very nice place in the heat of Time Square. Excellent location where every thing near. Very responsive host.
Before arriving, I had questions about getting around.  Irfan was quite helpful in getting directions to me that were easy to understand and follow.  His response times were always quick.

Everything was absolutely perfect for us. So far, it has been our best Airbnb experience! Ainslie and John were warm and welcoming from the very first second, gave us excellent recommendations, and were always happy to chat. We highly recommend this wonderful place as a perfect starting point for exploring New York, located in a quiet and calm neighborhood. Thank you!

HEAR ME OUT! This place is beautiful, make your reservation! The neighborhood is quiet, away from the bustle of the city. You have a parking spot if you are driving and the near subway station is within a 15 minutes walk or less. The apartment is so comfortable, beautifully decorated, a very neat place that has many amenities. Michele is so kind, before arriving she gives you detailed instructions, and there is a guest handbook where every detail is also explained. There is also a complimentary basket with some goodies for you like snacks, tea and instant soups. We did not get to spend a lot of time in the airbnb because of the nature of our trip, and we will definitely come back! 💕

Wir haben lange gesucht, um das perfekte Apartment für unseren ersten NY Besuch zu finden - Simon hat es. Top Lage, zentral und auch ruhig (Vögel am Morgen! 😍), tolles Haus, fantastische, stylische Wohnung, sehr gute Betreuung, unbedingt zu empfehlen! Und das Bad ist sogar moderner als auf den Fotos. Danke, Simon!

foarte confortabil, primitor, comunicativ.
locul curat, linistit 20 de min de manhatan!

Stayed for a few days. It was great being in Astoria and going to the shops and restaurants near by. Hal was very responsive and allowed a flexible check in when my flight was delayed. Overall a great place to settle for a few days or weeks and he is very attentive and kind. Would love to stay again.
Great stay and great location, close to subway!
Absolutely loved the place. Looked just like the pictures. Very clean. My favorite part was the outside set up. Excellent communication.

This Airbnb is conveniently located, especially for those with a car, as it's just a 15-minute walk to the subway. The room itself is nice, but being on the first floor near a busy intersection can make it a bit noisy at times.
The host and their partner are very pleasant people, though there were occasions when the house felt crowded with their friends, and it didn't always seem like guests were warmly welcomed. This may have been just my perception, and I acknowledge that as a former host, I understand the challenges of managing space and guests' expectations.
I attempted to extend my stay by another month but was informed that the space was already booked. However, I noticed that shortly after my departure, there was a significant price drop and availability opened up. Nonetheless, this led me to find a much better and more affordable place nearby, closer to my temporary workplace.
Cat is very friendly and adorable she will learn you just same day.

My friend and I had a wonderful stay in this beautiful apartment! The view is gorgeous and the unit had everything we needed. Very clean and check-in was easy. ~10 min walk to the subway. We hope to be back in the future!

Catias place was very conveniently located close to the public transportation to explore the city! We had some issues with the sink but Catia got right on it and fixed promptly without hassle! She was so friendly and approachable responding very quickly to our messages if we had any questions. I would definitely recommend staying here!!
Our stay at the ‘ Cozy Cave ‘ was great! Also good location for things to do and places to eat!

Only a 15’ walk from subway line 7 which connects directly to Central Station and in a very safe, quiet and green neighbourhood  (called ‘Sunnyside’) with nice restaurants and shops, I can 100% recommendate José’s accomodation.  Airy and comfortable room, practical common kitchen and bathroom and a cosy livingroom.  Yes, I come back!
Ming is an amazing hostess. Right away I felt right at home. She had lots of options for breakfast and coffee/tea. I will definitely be staying with my new friend, Ming, in the future!!
Spacious room, very modest but substantial amenities. Typical NYC parking, plan to walk several blocks.
Thanks Eja, you were very helpful when it came to directions, instructions, and you had great suggestions.

Our stay was comfortable and everything we needed was at the apartment. We drove to most places, but the location was central enough that those drives were short. I’d recommend this place/stay here again.

My stay at Dindial’s Airbnb lasted 3 months. This was my first home in NY, so it will forever hold a special place in my heart. Dindial welcomed me with open arms. He always checked in with me to ensure that I was comfortable throughout my stay. When an issue came up or a request was made, he always responded amicably and within a timely manner. The other guests were respectful and the place always felt peaceful to go back to. I highly recommend staying at Dindial’s!

Emmanuel’s place felt just like a second home. The hosts are so caring and hospitable. The place and the neighborhood are so clean and peaceful. I would gladly stay there anytime. Stayed there for over two months and don’t have a single regret.
Alaric’s place was fantastic in every way - it’s comfortable and the location can’t be beat. Alaric is an excellent host as well. I would stay again and again!

Merci Martha pour ta disponibilité, et ta gentilesse.
Je me suis très bien sentie chez toi. Merci pour ta petite attention dans la chambre à mon égard.
Luna va me manquer. 😀
Good location but some missing or confusing amenities.
Had a great visit at this place!    The location was great, apt was clean and Jinha was very responsive.   And in a quiet neighborhood !
Bardzo dobra komunikacja z Hostem. Spokojne i dobrze skomunikowane miejsce.
very good location and roommate is nice, the place is very noisy because the building is very old.
Great transport links and very communicable host; solid value for money, I would definitely stay here again.
All good, recommend it
Emmanuel’s place was perfect for my short stay. It accommodated my uncle who is visually impaired . Communication from Emmanuel was greatly appreciated!

Room was exactly what we expected for New York City. We just needed a place to sleep and it did the job. Location was perfect for our liking. Walking distance to all the attractions like time square, Bryant park and Macy’s. The best Korean around also

I enjoyed my stay, the room was upgraded at no charge. The only issue is the placement of luggage after checking out, given that my suitcase was in a basement open to the public and I paid a $10 fee for that service. Other than that, no complaint.
Great stay convenient to get to the city.
We had a great stay, the apartment was perfect for our family.

I came on a business trip for a week and really enjoyed my stay at Omar's place.
The apartment is spotless and very well equipped (pots, pans, plates, glasses, etc).
I also very much appreciated the big coffee can and other small touches that show Omar has thought out all the details (a USB charger in the cutlery drawer, iron and board in the pantry and many towels for all uses).
I also really enjoyed the access to the terrace and garden, where I could watch squirrels and birds in the morning.
Omar lives upstairs with family and you may hear them sometimes (footsteps), so if you are intolerant to any noise, i wouldn't recommend it, but for me (and most people) it was totally fine and acceptable.
Walk 10-15 min to two different stations and different lines with direct access to Manhattan.
Thanks Omar for a great stay!
Great location, but sometimes during the night it was noisy outside (but aren’t we expected that from NYC)

Great location. Easy walk to Prospect Park. Easy walk to subway (and even better now that the subway is contactless!).
John was super responsive to any questions we had. The place was comfortable and had everything we needed.
I would definitely stay here again.
Always a pleasure staying at Cheryl place great place to stay
The entire team was extremely responsive, accommodating, polite, and considerate. A terrific experience for my long term stay. Highly, highly recommend!!

This place was excellent. The location was perfect and accessible. Checking in was easy and no issues. The accommodations was awesome. It was clean and well organized. It had everything we needed. It even had a laundry room. The bedrooms were beautifully put together and Yes! The beds were comfortable. The kitchen and dining area was also lovely and the sitting room was comfortable equipped with recliners and throw blankets and pillows. It made us not want to leave. The host was extremely nice and hospitable. Would book again in a heartbeat…. 👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾❤️

Perfect stay for a getaway.
Will be back.
Comfortable and clean.  Quiet neighborhood.  Great location close to subway and Prospect Park.  Enjoyed our stay and look forward to future stays.

Such an amazing stay. Jorge and Nancy made everything easy and comfortable. Great initial communication, helpful instructions, simple check-in, lovely apartment, responsive to questions throughout, friendly... the list goes on! The house is beautiful and is on a lovely street, if I could live there I would.
I would highly recommend a stay here to anyone.

Meredith Wohnung ist wirklich wunderschön. Sie ist sehr gepflegt, sauber und sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtet. Die Küchenausstattung ist praktisch und total ausreichend. Der Check-in war easy, die Kommunikation mit Meredith ebenso. Die Wohnung liegt im ruhigen Viertel Caroll Gardens, wo wir uns superwohl gefühlt haben. Schöne Cafés und Restaurants um die Ecke, ebenso die Metro. Kurz und knapp: Wohnung, Lage und Gastgeberin sind perfekt für einen angenehmen Aufenthalt in New York City.

PROS: separate gate entrance, cozy feeling of place, mini cooking oven just in case cooking is needed, keypad check in(you won’t have to stress losing a key), overall you will feel safe inside and not worry, if you have anxiety with others places.
Cons: The bed did have hair on it still. ordering delivery service you have to get up every time to meet them at the gate as it always has to be locked. not enough natural light in my opinion. No bathroom rug to dry feet on after shower(had to use a towel). It is directly in someone’s back yard, so didn’t like the fact that it didn’t feel completely private.
Overall I enjoyed my stay and the host was very responsive, so grateful for that. Very very cosy feeling to the place, I always appreciate the feeling of “it feels like home” whenever I leave home. Although I have cons, it’s more for those who are picky and appreciate these kind of reviews and rundowns of a place. However I had a great stay overall and would recommend to others!

Everything was great. Lovely host, very cosy apartment, great location in safe and nice neighborhood with direct access to the subway. We had a wonderful stay. Will for sure come back to stay here when visiting New York City again.

the place looked like the pictures, they were responsive host. they didn’t have a microwave, and there are other rooms in the house that others stayed in which made it a bit hard to sleep. other than that it was fine.
Was perfect I love it

We absolutely loved our time at Meggie’s place. It was in a brownstone in a quite leafy street in Brooklyn.
The place was within easy walking distance to Carroll Park station and Smith-9 St. We regularly jumped on the F-train to arrive in Manhattan within 15 mins, and the G-train took us up to Williamsburg.
We loved the fact that there were two Citi Bike stations literally 3 minutes walk from the house and also, a private bike rental shop with a lovely owner that rented us bikes for the whole day.
The accommodation was lovely with lots of character. The kitchen was great and had everything we needed to cook meals at home, including a brand new stove.
The bed was very comfortable.
Meggie was very friendly and responsive to any needs we had. For example, on our last night, I had to weigh our luggage and needed scales. Within minutes of asking, Meggie lent us her scales.
Note: there’s a bodega on the corner at the end of the street, and inside that bodega resides a friendly cat.
Beautiful building, well run. Complimentary coffee until 11am. Walkable neighborhood. Really cute rooms (small, but cute).
Great accommodation,  great hospitality
