My husband and I enjoyed our stay in Brooklyn very much. Everything in the apartment was spotless with cozy rooms decorated exactly like the photos. We enjoyed our morning beverages, pleased that a teapot, Keurig and Espresso machine were all provided. The full-sized fridge made it possible to stock up on milk and eggs, so we saved money by making our own breakfast every morning. Our best memory will be that of watching movies on the comfy, roomy couch. The provided throw blankets were a cozy addition. By the way, having a washer and dryer made our visit super nice because we didn’t have to pack so many clothes. Both my husband and I are happy to recommend this beautiful place to all who desire the comforts of a “home away from home!”

The location is great.
The window ac was installed unprofessionally, therefore there’re some loud noise all night plus other street noise. There’s a grocery store’s delivery dock right downstairs, so the noise didn’t stop all night. You need ear plugs!!! A friend of mine stayed a block away, but didn’t hear any noise because the window ac was installed professionally.
The apartment was owned by one company and rented by another. The person work there works 10-6. When we get back from sightseeing, she’s gone. 😭 the washing machine was confusing and no one cared to help! There’re three other offices downstairs, staff are there 9am-9pm. But because they are a separate company, they refuse to answer a simple question. We ended up paid $30 for a load of laundry. The building security staff is changed every day and always busy. So you can never find anyone to help. The apartment is tiny that there’s not even a chair to sit down. We will stay at hotels next time.

We had stayed about one week at this place and enjoyed ourselves overall.
Some great aspects:
- The location is quite good! Close to a yoga studio I frequent in my home city, easy to get to the F line, lots of decent food/bars/coffee shops near by. We would like to note, however, that if you are planning on going to the theatre district or the UES/UWS often, it can be a bit of a trek and might be better to find a location that has more transportation options.
- We visited in early October which was quite rainy! We were grateful that the building manager had turned on the heat during the appropriate times and we were quite cozy!
- As with any NYC apartment, it is snug, but the host had arranged the space pretty well. We loved the windows and the minimal-style of decor. His couch was especially a favorite hang out space as it was so comfy.
Some cons -
- We aren’t sure if this place makes use of the $150 cleaning fee. Our host left early in the morning the day we arrived, and conveyed to us that they didn’t have all the time they usually have to prepare for our stay, but we were surprised that a lot of the surfaces didn’t seem clean. For example, the cupboards felt grimy where you open them that a cleaning person would usually know to wipe down.
- Also, not sure if it’s just that the bugs come in when the weather is cold, but we woke up to some hearty spider bites.
- To note - there is no microwave. This is accurate to the listing!! But calling it out here because we had missed it in the listing.
- We only had one dish towel, which was inconvenient as all dish-washing is done by hand. The host also forgot to put out bath towels for us, which they apologized for and had their friend buy us new towels. However, the towels were quite low quality and hadn’t been washed since they were new and they shed all over us when we showered. Perhaps this was a one time issue that we faced since the host said they forgot to put out towels as they left so early.
- Again, the place is a typical snug NYC apartment so there’s not a lot of space to store luggage. We noticed previous reviews that said this, but the host had responded saying they’d open up space in closets to hang clothes. However, there was very little space still, so we ended up laying them out on the floor and having to constantly step over them since there wasn’t another place to store our clothing/luggage/etc.
There were some cons we ran into that aren’t specifically around the host/inside the apartment, but might be worth mentioning -
- This unit is located on a very busy street with lots of noise (cars, sirens, people, etc). We didn’t get the best sleep due to all the noise (which again, is out of the host’s control) but thought it’s worth noting if you are a light sleeper!
- We also had an issue where the neighbor’s smoke alarm chirped every 60 seconds (I’m assuming low battery). This was constant during the entire week-long stay. We had assumed the neighbor was out of town (who can stand that noise for several days?) but at 4am they had a four-hour-long screaming match that quickly alerted us of their presence.
Overall, this wasn’t terrible value if you’re just looking for a place to stay in Manhattan. However, don’t expect many amenities with this. We knew going into it that the apartment was minimal, but we were still surprised by some of the sparseness. If we’d only been here for a few nights we might not have noticed it, but for any stay longer than that we’d probably find somewhere else to stay in the future.

Ik had dit appartement gekozen op basis van de vele positieve reviews. En ik moet zeggen dat deze absoluut correct zijn. Moest ik 6 sterren kunnen geven, zou ik het zeker doen. De host was zeer correct, en alle nodige info (zoals incheck procedure) werd op voorhand gecommuniceerd. In het appartement lag een handige map met daarin allerlei info. De incheckprocedure was ook bijzonder handig, geen gedoe met sleutels en dergelijke.
Het appartement was gewoonweg geweldig!!! Het was zeer ruim en perfect uitgerust. Wij waren er met 4 gasten, maar zelfs 6 gasten had perfect gelukt. De slaapkamers waren ruim genoeg, en matrassen waren zeer comfortabel. Opbergruimte was iets beperkter, maar stoorde zeker niet. Over de badkamer kan ik vrij kort zijn. Zeer goede douche, en zowel shampoo, douchegel en handzeep waren voldoende aanwezig. Idem voor handdoeken en wc papier. De voornaamste troef van het appartement was de living en eetkamer/keuken. Deze zijn zeer goed uitgerust en van alle comfort voorzien.
De locatie van het appartement was ook in orde. Het ligt op een paar minuten wandelen van de metrohalte Withrop St in Brooklyn. Afhankelijk van waar je exact wil zijn in Manhattan moet je wel even op de metro zitten, maar dat is normaal in een grote stad zoals New York. In de onmiddellijke omgeving van het appartement liggen een aantal supermarkten en restaurants, wat ook altijd handig is.
Op dit moment zijn er werken bezig net naast het gebouw waar het appartement ligt. Hierdoor heb je tijdens de week wel 's morgens lawaai (vanaf +/- 7u). Zelf hebben we hier totaal geen last van gehad omwille van de jetlag, maar kan voor andere mensen misschien wel meer hinder geven. Al ligt dit uiteraard volledig buiten de verantwoordelijkheid van de host.
Een enigste heel klein puntje van kritiek is enkel dat de gordijnen nogal veel licht doorlaten. Dit is uiteraard persoonlijk en cultureel gebonden, maar met iets meer verduisterende gordijnen in de slaapkamer had het appartement echt helemaal perfect geweest.
In conclusie: ik kan dit appartement 100% aanraden, en zou het zelf onmiddellijk opnieuw kiezen moest ik een appartement voor 4 of meer personen nodig hebben in New York City.

Andrea is seriously the best host! She’s warm, kind, and generous and just wonderful to chat and spend time with! I enjoyed her company, while still having privacy. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay in her beautiful apartment. The apartment was very clean, comfortable, and had a homey atmosphere. It’s conveniently located (close to the subway, buses, stores, restaurants, and parks) and in a friendly walkable neighborhood. Andrea exceeded all my expectations with this stay and made my trip to NYC better and more memorable than I could have asked for! I highly recommend staying with Andrea and I most definitely would take the opportunity to go back! Thank you Andrea!
very satisfied. thank you!

I will definitely stay again on our next New York trip.

I have now stayed here twice, about a year apart and in two different bedrooms. This is a perfect place if you or a couple need a night or two to just crash, get up, shower and start your day. My biggest concern with these “one bedroom in NY” type of Airbnb’s is always cleanliness cause I’ve seen some sketch places. That is not a concern at this place. Impressively and consistently clean. Check in is easy and time flexible. Place is safe - electronic locks on main door and each individual bedroom door. Wifi/Netflix/towels included. It’s a shared bathroom but it’s updated and clean and I never saw or heard any of the other tenants - if I did it wouldn’t be a big deal always. I wouldn’t stay here if you’re looking for a super long term place just due to size, or some place to party with friends again due to size, but as a single or couple looking for a easy clean and safe place to crash near JFK - perfect and affordable.

My stay at Ignacio's place was overall pleasant. Ignacio was great in communication and answered quickly to all my questions. I had my bathroom light go out and Ignacio quickly sent someone over to replace the bulb. Check in and check out was easy!
I recommend this place for its value in location and price, but there are a few things I'd like to share before anyone thinks of booking this place!
Stairs: There are 5 floors total and you won't know which unit you get until you book it. There's no elevator and the laundry is in the basement. I recommend downloading the app to pay for laundry rather than getting the card.
Noise: It was quiet for most of my stay until a family with a 2 year old moved in a floor below me. The walls are pretty thick and I never heard noises from my next door neighbors, but the whole building could hear the baby throw tantrums at all times of the day and night. I'm guessing they had their windows open.
Mail: I don't recommend getting your mail delivered here as I have lost multiple packages that said they were delivered. I reached out to Ignacio for video footage, but it seems the cameras have been down for 2 months. I had to contact NYPD, but with no security footage, they rejected the report. I hope it gets fixed soon! I recommend mailing your Amazon packages to the Amazon Hub Locker across the street at the froyo store, 16 Handles.
Bed: I shared the full bed with my boyfriend and it was not pleasant for me. The slightest movement would cause the whole bed to creak. What's worse is that the box spring was broken and the mattress dipped in the middle. I ended up filling the divot with cardboard and recycling bags to level out the mattress. I also bought a mattress topper as the mattress was not comfortable for me. I should've reached out to Ignacio regarding the issue, but it didn't cross my mind at the time to request for a new bed and mattress and if that was possible.
Parking: Location was great and parking across the street was not too hard to find/get. The great thing is that you can park your car across the street all day all week except for Friday's from 10:30am-11:30am due to street cleaning. The street signs will say Tuesdays and Fridays, but it's actually just Fridays that you'll need to move your car.
Amenities: I'd bring seasoning such as salt and pepper if you were planning on cooking. Also to note that the mini fridge did not have a frozen section. Bring dish soap, sponge, and trash bags. Wifi can be slow but it was sufficient.
Overall it was a pleasant stay for me. The location is real superb with Trader Joe's, cafés, restaurants, movie theaters, close to transit, and drug stores nearby, I'd love to stay here again for it's convenience. Bars also don't close till 2 or 4 AM.
PS. If you love thrifting for clothes, I highly recommend the thrift shop down the street called Thrift Shop!

Highly recommended, I will return.

Location is great! but Canal street busy all night long! we felt it very noisy —even for NYC standards. Ear plugs at bedside if you are sensitive.  Entrance to hotel busy and people selling goods out front. Lobby has water machine which is nice. Room was fine, clean, bed comfortable.
Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit, tolle Lage und gut ausgestattete Wohnung. Sehr gerne.
It was a very nice place and clean, and April was an perfect hostess!
Delia's place was nice and comfy, located in a great place to take the metro!
We had a wonderful stay!  Charles was very accommodating and welcoming.  The neighborhood was charming and quiet. Our room was clean and had everything we needed.  We would highly recommend!

Prima Appartement in Brooklyn.
Monica war die perfekte Gastgeberin, hat uns alles gezeigt, Tipps gegeben und den Waschsalon an der Ecke erklärt.
Es ist alles wie beschrieben, 1a sauber und für Gäste vorbereitet.
Die doch noch notwendigen Klimaanlagen waren noch nutzbar.
Lage ist sehr authentisch, unbedingt das MaoMao probieren!
Mit der Bahn nach Manhattan geht recht fix, am besten die J-Bahnen nehmen.
Danke Monica!
This is a great spot for groups who want the nyc experience but also to be poolside with a nice drink. Couldn’t recommend more and I’m sure I’ll be booking this mansion next summer!

This was a wonderful stay for me and my family.  The location was perfect for the activities we had planned in Yonkers, Mt.Vernon and City Island. The home is very nice, there were some tables and chairs in the front yard that was comfortable to sit in. Vie was very responsive.  The only advice I would have is to share that getting to the unit requires navigating some stairs that was really hard for my 84 year old mom.  Other than that it was GREAT and I would stay there again (just not with my mom)

Appartement d’une belle superficie avec terrasse privée très agréable. À proximité de tous commerces et du métro, dans un quartier dynamique. Nous avons particulièrement apprécié le miroir au dessus du lit :-)

The stay was unfortunately not as comfortable as expected. The TV did not work the entire time, and a repairman was sent at 1:00 AM, which was very disruptive. The space also felt smaller than shown in the photos. Cleanliness could have been better—there was noticeable dust, and some restroom fixtures were partially broken. Overall, the property did not meet the level of comfort or condition we were expecting. NOISE; you can hear everyone else entering and leaving their rooms. The rooms are too close to each other …..

Nader et Evie sont vraiment très gentils et conciliants. L'appartement est comme décrit sur l'annonce et tres propre. Il est proche du métro et des bus. Une très belle vue du balcon et du rooftop. Nous conseillons sans hésiter.
Hanna’s is welcoming and accommodating. She is a artist so expect painting all over the place. Not for everyone but great place for artist and creative people.

Excellent séjour chez Joséphina !!  Nous étions comme à la maison,Josephina en oublie presque qu’elle est chez elle,agréable,souriante,disponible,généreuse.Appartement très propre et conforme à la description Quartier sure.Nous recommandons sans hésiter de passer un séjour dans son agréable appartement.

Marianny war stets gut zu erreichen und hat immer zeitnah geantwortet. Der Check-In war flexibel an unsere Zeiten anpassbar und wir konnten das Gepäck bis zu unserer Abreise im Haus lassen. Kacey ist der Ansprechpartner vor Ort und stand ebenfalls mit Rat und Tat zur Seite.
Alles in allem eine Unterkunft, die der Beschreibung sehr gut entspricht. Die Subway ist in ca 5 min fußläufig erreichbar und man braucht ca. 40 min nach Manhattan.
Very generous and easy going. We would love to stay in future.

To start off, Sammy was VERY accommodating.I was  lucky to get a early check-in BUT what made me give him 5 stars was GREAT communication , clean and BEAUTIFUL home..Just as described. Looking forward to booking again. 10/10
Location close to the airport, easy to get to, everything very clean and excellent service.

The place was really great. The location is amazing and James and Erinn are wonderful guests. They were very helpful with everything, including things that needed repairing or which I needed (such as a small writing table). A wonderful experience!

This was the only place that was available for new years eve into the new year that was not only affordable (especially for the Brooklyn area) it was really nice and felt like home. It is conveniently located right next to the metro station and is walking distance from nearby breakfast spots and dinner spots too. The other guests that were staying there were all very friendly and mindful of the rules that the host put up which helped keep the bathroom clean and tidy which is a must since it is shared. Lou was extremely helpful and responsive. the building was easy to find and the directions to enter the building were straight forward and easy to understand. I will note that the first door to the right upon entering the main building requires guests to really press hard in the # key to get the door open but other than that i have absolutely no complaints other than wishing I could've stayed longer. im for sure looking to visit this place again in the future. Hopefully in the summer ☀️
Spotless and charming! Lots of very nice little touches and attention to detail make this a standout destination. Very highly recommended.
The location is great, and the host is very kind. However, the Wi-Fi isn’t very good, so if you want to watch a movie in the room, keep that in mind.

Andrew’s place was perfect for our stay. Just like the photos. The kitchen was a good size for cooking and the bedroom was very spacious (especially by NYC standards). Only 1 flight of stairs up. Close to shops, restaurants, and other cool neighborhoods if you enjoy exploring on foot.
There’s bus stops on the block, and a subway station a ~7min walk away, so getting to other parts of the city was convenient.

Sandra was so helpful and nice! The apartament is cosy and cute. There was no problem with late check out and with transport to the Manhattan.
We totally recommend this place!
Very hospitable, took steps to be welcoming
Great base close to Subway and bus to explore BK and Manhattan. Room was quaint, cozy and cute, as described.

Alfred is a great host and very communicative!
I will stress that this hostel has a gap in the ceiling of all the rooms so you WILL hear others sleeping / snoring / etc. the host does his best to enforce quiet hours and was very sweet - but just be aware of noises if you are a light sleeper. would recommend !
Great place to stay!
Great place, as always Freddy always make things so easy. I been staying a couple times already and hope I can stay more times.
Excelente lugar para pasar las vacaciones , cómodo , acogedor y excelentes anfitriones

My husband and I were just looking for a touchdown space to sleep and put our things. We were more than surprised by Mark’s professionalism, helpfulness, and quick responses! Mark was super kind especially when we had late nights, he never made us feel bad! Great host, wonderful conversationalist, delicious food/drink recommendations, super reliable, and just so kind. Grateful to be able to stay in his home - we love the area and appreciated Mark’s assistance finding safe (and free!) weekend street parking. Thank you, Mark! Definitely will consider your home when we’re back!

Marco, foi muito prestativo, nos recebeu muito bem.
O apartamento é muito bom.

- Danny was very communicative and cordial. Access instructions were on point and he allowed us to have early access.
- Danny was very responsive re a touch point regarding one of the coffee machines-came in late hours to assist.
- Danny had a very affable and pleasant personality.
- The place was accurately described and very tastefully appointed.
- The location is excellent, close to restaurants, stores and subway station.
Thanks a lot. Nice and clean place.

WOW we love this place !!!
10/10 recommend
My 11 year old daughter and I were there for a month. The accommodations were perfect.  The laundry facility and fitness room were super convenient. The staff were very friendly and always helpful.

El alojamiento está muy bien ubicado, cerca del metro y tiendas a pocos metros. La limpieza del mismo no fue lo que esperábamos. En las noches hay ruido de música y gente libando en las calles. Se encuentra policías a cada cuadra.
El momento de realizar el check in no tuvimos un buen trato. (fue decepcionante).
Great everything. Staycation or traveling to nyc best spot best price. Clean comfy easy access
Great place to stay on a budget. Commutative host.
Recomand

George and his father ( also George!) are very welcoming and charming hosts. Their apartment is absolutely spotless and they provide many helpful touches ( eg kitchen condiments, a range of basic toiletries, plenty of bath towels ). The space is very comfortable and a real home- from- home. My second stay here and it certainly won’t be my last.

Amazing location. Room is fine but a bit small. Internet went down for a day which was a bit annoying. Overall being in such a great location near a subway was amazing and the building itself is pretty cool

The door was extremely hard to open at first, I asked the host for a 30 min later check out
The cleaner lady came in screaming at the girl friend.. telling her to leave.

If you ever wanted to feel what it would be like to live in Bushwick this is the perfect place. Extremely walkable, excellent access to the subway, and plenty of great bars and restaurants in a few blocks. The place itself is cozy, exactly as described, and perfect for a landing pad for a New York vacation. Very responsive owners too!
The house was EXTREMELY neat and clean. The hosts communication is second to none! Worth the stay.
This place is cozy and highly recommend this place. Also the host is kind and nice.

Eric est d'une rigueur et d'un sérieux à toute épreuve. Cela se ressent à travers la propreté de l'appartement et la clarté de ses instructions. Le logement fut une incroyable surprise pour quatre raisons : 1) lit d'un confort hors norme 2) grande télévision avec différents services 3) intimité idéale 4) proximité de Manatthan. Nous recommandons chaudement!

Wir haben uns wohl gefühlt. Die Lage etwas abseits; durch Flughafen recht laut, aber mit dem Bus 25 min zur Subway (und dann  30 min nach Manhattan). In Queens sehr lebendiges südamerikanisches Flair, gute Cafés, einfache leckere Lokale.
Very nice stay, highly recommend.
What a host! Rodrigo is super chill and friendly, mostly out and about and doing his own thing so always felt like I had my own space. Apartment is clean and quiet.
Clean Room, great value
Great location and we’ll appointed. We would definitely stay here again. Janet was a super host.
Very good room - warm and homely, shared bathroom, clean. Hosts highly responsive and clear instructions. Good transport access.
Was very responsive and accommodating! We will be booking here again when we come back to NY. Truly, one of the best bnb’s I have ever stayed in. Thank you!

This Airbnb was awesome. Right in the heart of green point, and 5 min walk from the G. Lots of great coffee and food options nearby. Apt itself was imo better than the pictures, lots of natural light, a spacious bathroom (by nyc standards), and a comfortable bed.
We stayed for a month and the Ac worked great, despite there being some hot summer weeks. WiFi also worked well, and we were able to have two people working from home some days without a problem.
Ziggi was communicative and nice, and check in/check out was easy. Overall definitely recommend.

The apartment is very cosy and private, has all amenities and is easy to reach by public transportation.
Elen is a great host, super responsive and helpful, flexible with requests.
Definitely recommended, also good value for money.

Flat is acceptable, However, location is not optimal (safety and cleanliness of the streets may disturb) and the service level of the owner has really to be improved in order to full the minimum requirements (towels, bed sheets, electricity convertor US/EU….were a concern.

My friends and I are honored to have been her first Airbnb guests!
My friends and I visited NYC for a fun weekend. Chinelo's property was perfect for our group of 6. It's close to JFK air port and super close to the above ground trains to Manhattan. It's conveniently close to the highway and is near a big mall, target, walmart, Burlington, and a 24 Hour fitness. It's also near lots of restaurants and shops. She had all the necessary amenities and some extra details that made our stay even more special. It was easy to find street parking and the property is clean, spacious, and well-designed. I would definitely recommend this property!
Philip’s place is exactly as described and as shown in photos. Highly recommend this spot. Very clean and spacious

This is a really nice & modern place, subway accessible in a quiet neighborhood with a private, gated, off street parking space! It’s a large space with a private entrance. The mattresses were a soft memory foam and everything seemed clean. There was shampoo/soap in the shower and a good kitchen. Lustin is also a very accommodating host with excellent communication. There are people (inc. some of his family members and others) that live upstairs, just keep that in mind. This place is also a really good value. I wouldn’t hesitate to book here again.
Great host
Nicol es muy amable y siempre esta pendiente a lo que necesites. Nicol siempre responde los mensajes y el lugar es muy acogedor.
Really enjoyed the place.  As advertised and comfortable place to stay.

Ich war mit meiner besten Freundin in New York und wir sind so glücklich, eine so tolle Unterkunft gefunden zu haben. Unser Aufenthalt bei Sigi und ihren Töchtern war fantastisch. Wir haben uns von Anfang an sehr wohl gefühlt und wurden herzlich begrüßt. Das Zimmer ist groß, liebevoll eingerichtet und sauber. Sigi und ihre Töchter sind sehr hilfsbereit und haben immer einen guten Tipp für ein Restaurant oder eine Sehenswürdigkeit.
Die Subway ist nur 2 Minuten entfernt und das ganze Haus ein Traum. Uns hat nichts gefehlt und wir waren rundum glücklich.
Danke Sigi für die schöne Zeit bei dir und deinen Töchtern!
Not much to add.. Great little place, very central... all of NY is at your feet...
Wonderfully appointed space. Lots of nice amenities. Very comfortable for me and my kids.

This apartment is great! It is just a few blocks away of every tourist attraction in NYC. The apartment has everything you need. The Penn station is nearby the unit. Jake is an excellent host, reply messages quickly and  flexible. I highly recommend this unit.

pour nous c'était une première a New-York , logement parfait, veronica et matt sont des hôtes charmants, nous sommes ravis, je recommande , une vraie immersion.
metro ligne R tres pratique ainsi que le ferry, se rendre à manhattan en bateau , juste merveilleux.
nous repartons enchantés.

Wir hatten Zimmer drei für sechs Übernachtungen, wobei hier zu erwähnen wäre, dass es sich hierbei um eine Wohnung handelt, das heißt man hat sowohl ein separates Badezimmer, einen kleinen Flur, ein Schlafraum sowie eine Küche mit Kühlschrank sowie einer kleinen Elektroherdplatte.
Unsere Einschätzung zu Zimmer/Wohnung 3, das Bett hat vermutlich einer Liegefläche von 1,40 m x 2 m, das sollte man gegebenenfalls berücksichtigen
Die Kücheneinrichtung wirkt etwas behelfsmäßig.
Dafür hat man hier seinen absoluten privaten Bereich.
Wie von anderen bereits erwähnt hat das Haus mit der die Anzahl der Zimmer eine gewisse Charakteristik wie in einem Hostel.
Brady and Jeffrey wie von anderen auch schon, beurteilt waren herausragend, nett, hilfsbereit und kommunikativ
Insgesamt hat uns der Aufenthalt sehr gut gefallen

I loved staying at Lakisha’s place. Communication was great, she was always so quick to answer any questions. Very clear about everything, which I appreciate so much. And she was so sweet when I bumped into her in the hallway! The codes on the doors to check in and out on your own and without keys was excellent, gave a nice sense of privacy. The room was awesome, huge & pretty. It’s Brooklyn so a front facing room will be loud no matter what (but much prettier!), and with the ac on I had no problems. I’m really familiar with the area so the location was great for me. The price is really amazing for this location and room. I didn’t really use the kitchen, but it looked good. The shower was really nice with strong pressure. Lakisha provides a bar of soap and a toothbrush & toothpaste if you need. I didn’t love the pillows, but I can be picky about that and always have a backup pillow. The bed was totally comfortable. I would definitely stay again!
Natalie was very friendly and always responded very quickly! The apartment was really nice and cozy and everything was clean. We would definitely stay in her apartment again!
short comfortable stay and a clean place , the host was flexible, nice and communicative

Fantastic and beautiful bedroom and bathroom within a large brownstone just a few blocks north of Central Park. It really is as beautiful as in the photos if not more so. The hosts including Roca-Lisa and Razia (who owns the building and lives downstairs) are always responsive and friendly. Could not recommend more highly!

This is a great little hotel. They have pastries, snacks and coffee available for purchase 24/7, and an excellent restaurant with the hotel. The room was super cute and had everything I could ask for. Definitely recommend.
We had a great time with a group from out of town.
Alex’s stay was very comfortable. The location was great and everything was as described.
Un barrio tranquilo y cómodo con excelentes anfitriones
Comfortable room. Very nice hotel. Great location close to theatres, restaurants, subway, Central Park, Times Square. We really enjoyed our stay and will book again.
The place was very clean and exactly as described, check in process easy and hosts were also very friendly and communicative. We had a great 5 nights stay☺️ recommend

Omwattie's room it's a very nice one. It's well located between the JFK airport and the city center. The metro stop it's just 15 minutes away by foot. The room was tidy and clean, the only thing is that there could be noises coming from the ceiling and from outside the living room. It may be negligible in the end, but be aware of this. Owattie has been very helpful and friendly allowing us to leave our luggage inside until our departure to the airport.

A very nice room in Marcia’s home. Having our own private bathroom was appealing.
We didn’t read the Airbnb description carefully and thought we were booking the entire apartment. There is noise from the subway station that kept us awake only the first night.
Marcia is kind, accommodating, and even let us know we left an electric toothbrush behind and offered to drop it off at our son’s apt.
She’s a great host.

My friend and I loved Angelika’s place- it was really pretty, quiet and clean. The bedroom is really cozy and it has a comfortable sectional pull out couch. The location is just a short walk to various trains. Thank you, Angelika! Highly recommend

Couldn't ask for a more convenient location! In walking distance to multiple transit lines and many good restaurants and bars. Everything I wanted to do around the city was easier because of the location.
I came by myself, and the place felt spacious for me. The bed was comfortable and I liked that the shower had a separate detachable shower head. I didn't use any of the kitchen stuff since I ate out everyday, but I appreciated that there were some nice drink items.
Overall I had a nice stay, and I would come back if I'm in New York again!

Es war super!
Die Wohnung war sauber, die Betten sehr bequem und in der Küche ist alles was man braucht.
Als wir ein Problem mit dem WLAN hatten wurde es innerhalb 3 Minuten gelöst.
Wir haben uns bei euch sehr wohl gefühlt.
Super easy check in. Amer was very responsive. The place was immaculate! Easy stop over on our way to JFK. We will definitely stay here again.
Es ist eine Wohnung, wo alles drin ist, was nan braucht. Inklüsive supernetter Gastgeber
Tap in bathtub was kinda wonky and hard to work but besides that everything was great  👍🏻 water was just too hot 🔥🔥🔥

Comfy and peaceful place to stay for a week especially with having more amenities than a hotel! Essentially, it's a little studio apartment - we absolutely enjoyed the fully equipped kitchen and great natural light from the multiple windows. Everything was clean, and Justin and Tommi were helpful and responsive. The only issue we ran into was the amount of mosquitos hanging out in the front of the building probably due to puddles from the rain and the trees so we had to be quick to get inside to avoid getting bit. Regardless, would stay here again

Estuvimos en casa de Carlos una semana, la estancia fue genial, muy pendiente de nosotros en todo momento desde antes de la llegada. La casa tal como se ve en las fotos, muy cerca de muchas líneas de metro.
Repetiríamos sin duda

Raymond is a great host who made sure the check in went smoothly and that I had everything I needed. The apartment was very clean and very conveniently located. Because it is on a bigger street it may not be great for light sleepers but I would not hesitate to stay here again. Thanks Raymond.
He was very responsive, and helpful. I really enjoyed staying here and the listing is exactly as pictured. It’s perfect for a couple to stay and relax
Fantastic spot to stay, great style and very clean. Easy to follow instructions to get to and get in to the place. One of the rooms has a fantastic view of the city skyline.
Great location!!
un lugar muy agradable,  fácil de llegar.
Wir haben 9 Nächte bei Ana verbracht und haben uns wie Zuhause gefühlt. Ana ist sehr nett und freundlich. Die Wohnung ist gut geschnitten und schön eingerichtet.

My twin sister and I stayed at this loft for about a month and a half and it was such a great experience! The loft is in such a great location with a supermarket right around the block and plenty of coffee shops & restaurant options near by. Isabelle was super helpful with any of our questions or needs and it really made our moving to nyc process so much better. Would definitely recommend this place  :)

The central heating was a lot. I slept with the window open many nights because it gets so hot which isn’t terrible just something to note. Also, since I was a long stay I bought a humidifier because the heater made the air really dry and I’d wake up with a sore throat. Other than that everything went great. I lived here by myself for my last semester at NYU and it was lovely! The apartment is beautiful with nice high ceilings and all necessities. For a studio it is not small, the length of it makes it feel really spacious. I felt super safe and comfortable in the space. The location is great too like a 5 minute walk from the F train and like 10 minutes to the Brooklyn bridge station. If you are looking for a short or long stay I would definitely recommend staying here!

You really couldn’t ask for a better stay. It’s chic, charming, beautiful, relaxing, and the location is a dream- on a clean and quiet street in the heart of Brooklyn, with so much to do, only a minute’s walk in every direction.
Izaac and Cash were warm and welcoming, accommodating and friendly. Grab yourself a bottle of wine upon arrival and give yourself some time to sit on the patio and take in the surroundings. You won’t regret it!
todo genial. a 150 mts de time scuare. fácil check in y checa out. excelente
The stay was great. Very clean . The host is very helpful when needed. Great location next to subway station

The apartment is really cute, authentic, spacious and very well equipped. The two air conditioners were really appreciated in this heat wave. Note that you have to enter the main house to access the 3rd floor apartment, but that was not a problem for us. Communication was superb and quick. Thank you Mary & Joseph!
Nice place

This is the second time i’ve stayed at Aminah’s place. I felt right at home when I came back for my second visit to the city. The home is extremely clean and very spacious. The location of the air bnb is very convenient. There’s Melissa’s Meat market a few doors down that has everything you could need and the subway station is less than 4 minutes walking distance. I am impressed as usual!
Great host! Great place for airline employees to stay. Cheap Uber ride to JFK

Mark is an excellent host. He stays in touch with you so that everything runs smoothly. His apartment was perfect for my husband and me. Because of the layout, there is private space upstairs - chair or bed - if one of the travelers is ready for some rest, while the other person has the full use of the downstairs living area, kitchen and half bath. Although we called out for some delicious Thai nearby, one could easily cook a meal in the kitchen. The kitchen is small, but has top of the line appliances (subzero fridge and Viking stove.) There is also a small microwave and a toaster to complete your cooking needs.
The Upper East Side is my favorite part of NYC - the Museums, the restaurants, the Park are all within walking distance. So nice to stay away from midtown, or worse - Times Square area! Thanks Mark!
skyline view crazy 10/10

This basement is beautifully remodeled and decorated. The decor is beautiful and the bathroom is as well.
The bed was super comfortable. The mini kitchen was cut and clean which had glassware that could be used.
Cody was very helpful and had no problem welcoming me to the home and showing me how to get in. He made me feel very comfortable.
The neighborhood beautiful and street parking was available just about down the street but not bad.
raychelle did check to ensure the stay was going well, which was nice, and it was completely private space.
There is a outside area for you sit and enjoy the weather, talking and what not which was also nice to have access to.

Muy buena comunicación con Rafael y su esposa, son excelentes anfitriones, y fue muy interesante tambien conversar un poco con ellos.
la habitación se recibió limpia y la calefacción funcionaba muy bien lo que se aprecia en las noches de invierno.
La estación de metro de la línea c tambien está bastante cerca del departamento y funciona aún en la madrugada por lo que no fue nada difícil el traslado a manhattan.

Viki was an incredibly kind and thoughtful host. She was available when we needed her, but the apartment is completely private. As other reviews have said, the second bedroom can only be accessed through the bigger main bedroom, but this was not an issue at all for us. The apartment has a clean and updated kitchen and a great living space. This location in Cobble Hill is absolutely wonderful. There are all types of shops and restaurants within walking distance. I would highly recommend this place to anyone who is looking to feel like a local in the city. When I come back to NYC, I plan on booking this place again!

Elen's place is JUST as described.  Extremely well appointed, VERY clean and tidy.  We had an extremely comfortable stay.  A short walk to the L train, and a quick 25 min trip to Manhattan, easily navigated.   Elen is a great communicator, and our inquires were consistently answered  in a very timely manner.  Internet WiFi speed/connection was spotty at times,  but other than that everything was 5 stars!

We really enjoyed our stay here! The accommodations were great for our big family and what we needed for almost a whole week in NYC. Negra was also very quick in answering our messages! On our first night, the hot water heater went out and she had it fixed and replaced by the next morning. Internet was fast, beds were comfortable, and there were plenty of towels for us to use. We were very happy here.
Alles bestens. Wohnviertel für Europäer etwas gewohnungsbedürftig.

For someone only staying for 3 days (2 nights ) in NYC, Candlewood was the perfect place to come back to each evening. Close to the subway, close to the energy of Times Square without the intensity of Times Square, and just an overall solid choice for a NYC stay.

Notre séjour dans cet hôtel c’est très bien passé. Paul a su être réactif à toutes nos demandes.
L’hôtel correspond à ce qui est marqué dans l’annonce. Nous nous sommes senties en sécurité.
Le prix que nous avons payé est tout à fait correct par rapport aux services reçus. Un bon moyen de visiter la ville sans exploser son budget logement !

This was a test run for a potentially several stays in the future. My daughter lives down the street. Matt was a wonderful host. He was quick to respond to questions and the instructions he provides are clear and helpful. I loved the apartment and the design. The space is efficiently utilized without giving up the cute design. A happy option for future Brooklyn visits. Thank you Matt!

We had a fantastic stay! The host was incredibly welcoming, kind, flexible and always available to help with anything we needed. The accommodation exceeded our expectations – even better than what we saw in the pictures. Everything was spotless, well-maintained, and easy to use. The location was also perfect, just a short walk to the subway and only about 30 minutes from the heart of Manhattan, making it super convenient for exploring the city. We had an amazing time and would highly recommend this place for anyone visiting NYC!
This hotel was perfect for our 2 night stay in NYC!

Kayan was always very kind and attemptive. Her place is beautiful and cozy, close to all subway, groceries stores, pharmacy, cellphone store to say a few. I wish I could have stayed longer.
I definetelly recomend it.
Thank you, Kayan for everything!!

Was very impressed with the property  we stayed in.  Just a short uber ride to Times Square and a peaceful location with an amazing view of the city from the balcony.  I would absolutely recommend and stay there again.
Very very clean place, amazing communication, literally feels like we were at home & wemphy went beyond to make sure we were okay we enjoyed staying here will be back!!
great central spot to stay. lovely bartenders and staff.

Nous sommes arrivés chez Andrew pour les premiers jours de notre voyage aux USA. Tout était très bien pour ce court séjour à Brooklyn, facile à trouver, indications claires et réponse rapide, la chambre a un excellent rapport qualité/prix, le lit est super confortable, c'est climatisé, linge impeccable et salle de bain tout confort (à partager). Ne vous attendez pas à un confort d'hôtel côté insonorisation car c'est chez l'habitant et la maison date de la fin du XIX  siècle, mais la gentillesse d'Andrew et la liberté donnée aux hôtes font le confort de cette étape ! En plus le quartier Cortelyou juste à côté est super ! Et c'est facile d'aller à Manhattan en transport. Bref, merci beaucoup Andrew pour tout !

The outrageous $100/ day deposit is insane. At one point only 1 elevator was working in the building and the hotel was overbooked. The TVs lag and go black out of nowhere. Originally booked and paid in full for a 2 queen bed room but they were so overbooked we had to settle for a 1 bed room because the room was not ready. Multiple outlets in the room did not work. Our microwave did not work as well someone from maintenance came and swapped microwaves with another room next door.

Ana was a fantastic host! Very communicative and helpful. Space was nice and very clean, and the location of the house within Queens is perfect if you want options for quick travel to different parts of NYC. Also, the neighborhood is pretty quiet, which was a nice surprise.

Excelente estadía , Rubén fue muy amable siempre ! El depto estaba a 6 cuadras aprox de la estación de subte de la línea 5 y 6 , muy seguro el barrio , nunca tuve problema a pesar de volver  bastante tarde por la noche ! Gran anfitrión Rubén, muchas gracias por todo !
Very flexible, they allowed us to check in early and check out late! Also walking distance to Penn Station and right next to Ichiran ramen, best ramen in nyc.

Amazingly nice and helpful host (fast and effective communication, available). The location is very nice in BedStuy neighborhood and you can get around easily (by subway and busses). It was a pleasant stay!
Love this place the location is great and so is the host!

This place was a find — pet friendly airbnbs with a work from home zone in Queens are extremely rare — and Qi was helpful and friendly and easy to work with, from keeping me in coffee pods to troubleshooting the WiFi to introducing us to his adorable Scottish fold cat. He also accommodated our need to extend multiple times as our renovations dragged on. Definitely appreciate the flexibility and quick communication!
good place to stay

We stayed at Gabby's for 30 days while our place was being renovated.  Check-in was easy and the apartment is equipped with just about everything you'll need to make yourself comfortable during your stay.   Gaby was very responsive and I would recommend her place.
Great stay at Koffi’s place ! It was a uiet and squeaky clean. Would come again.

Worth the amount of money I paid ,
Good coffee shop in the surrounding area.
Emily was very responsive and understanding when I needed help.
Such as extending my stays.
Great stay! Perfect area for moving about to different Burroughs. Jumping club upstairs roof top

Victor is a great host! Instructions were clear and everything was clean. Communication was easy and Victor was available to answer our questions. Self check-in was simple. Private parking was nice to have and we used public transportation to get around and avoid trafic. Two subway stations are a 15-20 minutes walk away which was convenient. Only minor downside for us was the area surrounding the subway stations which was a bit dark and hectic at times, but overall the neighbourhood was great. Would rent again!
Ein sehr schöner Aufenthalt in einem tollen Appartement mit einem super Gastgeber. So soll Airbnb sein 👍🏻👍🏻

La estancia es perfecta para pasar una semana o más en la ciudad. La zona tiene encanto y no satura, como sí pueden llegar a saturar los rascacielos en Manhattan. Cómo aspectos negativos, el jabón de ducha y de manos era de muy mala calidad y echamos en falta escoba y fregona. Cómo aspectos positivos: El apartamento tiene todas las facilidades posibles:  Nevera y congelador americanos. Cocina a gas perfecta. Baño muy limpio y acogedor. Las camas son muy cómodas. Es un bajo que facilita entrada y salida. Lugar silencioso y proclive al descanso.
nothing but great things to say about my stay last month. if I needed a place to stay again I would definitely hit them up again.

We had a great experience here!  It was close to the subway, great restaurants and grocery stores.  With beautiful high ceilings,  shiny parquet flooring, a remodeled bathroom and a very comfy bed, we felt right at home.  It was a nice retreat at the end of a busy day exploring the city.  We had everything we needed and Adam also provided some great recommendations for dining. I will definitely stay here again. Loved this charming Brooklyn brownstone!  Thanks, Adam.

Very comfortable housing, absolutely perfect for a long layover! I had a super early flight out of JFK and this Airbnb was super comfortable and close to the airport. I will have to say that my room was incredibly hot and I did hear lots of yelling from next door or from the street. The house itself was quiet, but if you are a light sleeper like I am, consider packing noise canceling headphones. Otherwise, wonderful house, great location, and lovely amenities.

The apartment is in great location for visiting NY City. It is close to the subway and the express D line will get you directly  to Times Square in 45 min. The neighborhood is representative of Brooklyn and NY in general, but quiet and we felt safe walking from the subway after 10pm. The apartment is very cleanwith comfortable beds and great hot water pressure in the shower. The kitchen had all we needed. There was coffee, tea, and water bottles in the fridge. John was very helpful and responsive, and we truly enjoyed our 3 night stay. If we go back to NY, we will try to book this place again.
great place...great host very good location
Great hotel.
Great host, comfortable stay with close proximity to Metro and convenience stores.

It was a fantastic stay! The apartement was great with  a lot of space for our family. Only a 5 minutes walk to the subway. Sarah and Till are very friendly and creative people! We loved NYC! We loved Brooklyn! ( family from Germany)
El departamente hermoso, limpio y de facil acceso. Muy bien ubicado para el turista, hay muchas opciones de transporte muy cerca. Barrio seguro

Nice area and walkable to subway trains. Great affordable stay if you are doing activities in the city and need a place to sleep and get ready for the next day.
Would highly recommend!
In a great area! I’ll be going back to nyc again and again; hoping her place is available when I do :)

Petite chambre modeste près de toutes les attractions touristiques (environ 20 minutes à pied vers Time Square). L'hôte est réactif aux messages. Toilette et douche commune sur chaque étage du bâtiment. Lits confortables.

It was a great place to stay, lots of restaurants near by. Walkable distance to Murray Hill train station. Easier to move around as it is centrally located, very quiet neighbourhood.
Very responsive host, looking to book again when planning to visit New York.

Mike was a great host. Included parking at the back was a nice touch considering it’s NYC. The house was spacious and great for a family of 5. We found that the neighborhood was quite dirty and there was not much to do in the area, but the subway was only a short 8 minute walk. The home was clean but could use a fresh coat of paint.

We loved our stay at the LE Meridian! The hotel was so perfectly located within blocks of everything we came to see. Central Park, 5th ave shops, restaurants, Rockefeller Center, on and on. The Paris restaurant and rooftop bar were fabulous. The staff were kind and helpful, and made our stay even more enjoyable. We couldn’t have wanted for anything more. We will definitely be coming back and staying there again another time.

Jonathan was a wonderful host. He was responsive and easy to communicate with. He accommodated a late check out request, which was very much appreciated. Accurate descriptions in the listing on what to expect. Excellent location with close access to every train. I was in town for a long weekend with family and we were able to do everything we wanted in BK and Manhattan. Highly recommend!

We loved staying at Richard's place. Loved the location,
the proximity to everything we needed including groceries,
restaurants and coffee shops, and subway stations. The place
was comfortable and clean.
We would definitely choose to stay here again!
Had a great day Freddie was very helpful place is very clean and fully stocked of everything we needed would definitely recommend

Our stay as great! Location was central and close to the subway. This was in the back of a building on the first floor so it was great to not have to lug our bags up stairs. We were right off Restaurant Row so there was no shortage of places to eat nearby. The Hookah bar wasn't too loud for us either.  As the description says, this is MICRO studio so there wasn't a lot of space to put our large luggage bags without blocking something. However, we spent most of the time outside of the Airbnb so it didn't bother us too much. It had everything we needed for a trip and was a great place to stay.
Thank you! Definitely booking here again
Muy bien todo, todo muy limpio y el área muy tranquila lo amamos 😍😍

We had the perfect stay at Mark’s place. It was a quiet, lovely neighbourhood just what we needed after busy days in Manhattan and Brooklyn. Amazing restaurants and bars just minutes away and the subway at Carroll Street was easy walking distance. We loved it, and would come and stay here again - would definitely recommend!! Thanks Mark.
Fantastic place
Wonderful host and wonderful apartment. We had a great time! Thanks so much for everything, Bran!

Nicely located apartment in a lovely Bed-Stuy neighborhood, this  comfortable, historic space was good for my needs. Very comfortable bed, nice linens and towels. The bathroom hasn't yet undergone its renovation so is... 1960s (?) old. Nice motion-sensor hall lighting. You will hear whoever is renting the host's other listing, above, on the third floor. The brownstone's restoration is a work in progress, with some construction noise happening during the day (not mentioned until the check-in details are sent) so, currently, not great for remote working. Radiator heat on an unseasonably-warm winter day was a challenge. Amenities include only "street parking," not "parking on premises" (as is listed). Steps up to the brownstone's front door are not level, so were difficult for this old lady to maneuver (especially with luggage); steps on the inside staircase, up to the second floor, are high and narrow. Overall, a good value for pricey NYC, with the A Train about 8 minutes walk away.

Such a cozy Airbnb!
We loved staying here for our 1-week-visit in New York :)
Especially enjoyed the calm neighbourhood.
Thanks 🙏🏻
All good as usual except that my room was a cave, it was super dark

It’s a cute, small room and the bed is really comfortable.
Perfect for a short stay and to explore the city, the location is perfect.

I planned to stay in Brooklyn for only a night so I was doubtful I’d find a place that was available, affordable, and convenient to where I needed to be. Luckily, Kelly’s place matched all of these needs!! Kelly made the booking and check-in process super easy and efficient, the bed was comfy, and the view from the patio was spectacular. Even with all these perks, the biggest draw for me was Zion, Kelly’s cat. I have 2 senior kitties back home so Zion made my brief stay feel even more comfortable and welcoming. He is so friendly! Come for the view, stay for Zion.

A homely and comfortable place to stay in New York. The neighbourhood is wonderful, with no dearth of places to eat and drink within walking distance. We found ourselves quite happy staying in the area instead of venturing into the city. If you do decide to go into Manhattan, the apartment is close to the subway and is generally well connected. Meggie is super friendly, always responsive and an excellent host. I’d highly recommend this place!
located in a peaceful area of queens.  The airbnb was large and unique, large tv and plenty of pots foe cooking. highly recommended
Eran has been very easy to work with, very professional and often going above and beyond to help. Property is clean and tidy and as seen in the photos.

Great space to stay in New York even for long periods of time. Very well laid out, furnished with taste and very convenient. A lot of natural light and new furniture and appliances. Everything works great and the bed is very comfortable. I would definitely recommend it to anyone visiting New York. The location is outstanding, close to the Park and the East river and also very well connected to everywhere else in the City with both the 6 and Q subway lines being very close. I even enjoyed the 5th floor walkup that offered a great daily opportunity for a cardio workout.
Great place to stay!!
Great clean space in a great location.
It was a great stay! Perfect little place for 2 and it all looked newly renovated.
Excelente. Es un hotel super bien localizado

Missy was a great host in every aspect. He was very prompt, courteous, and communicative. The place was exactly as described. The apartment is a 2BR (plus additional room with treadmill) with all of the things that one must need to stay there long term. Great location, near the at least two supermarkets, close to many nice restaurants in Ditmars Blvd, lively neighborhood, accessible to N/W train within three minutes and Astoria park (within ten to twelve minutes). Checking in and checking out process were very smooth. Highly recommend the place.
Everything was fine, and if you want to find affordable accommodation in New York, close to the subway, Wanly is great choice!

L’emplacement était parfait pour une visite à New York en transport en commun. La gare est à deux minutes de marche.
Le logement est très bien équipé, tranquille et propre.
Lors de notre prochain séjour à New York, nous retournerons à cet endroit sans aucun doute.
La propriétaire répondait très rapidement et ses réponses étaient claires et pertinentes.

The place was perfect for a one night stay in the city,  it was very close to Penn Station and MSG. I really liked having a sink in the room, it was very convenient. Koichi was very responsive which made things go very smoothly.
Generous and sweet host, a quite neighborhood, perfect amenities
The room is clean and cozy. All the essentials for your stay is available.  Petra and Tony are so easy going.  I would definitely recommend, its a great stay.
Bed very soft & comfortable.. love that the train station was walking distance so it saved us money on ubers!! Build was easy to find & had great safety measures!!
Amazing accomodation! Laura was so quick to respond and the Airbnb itself was so spacious and homely. Loved our stay and would definitely come back again.
We loved staying here.  As advertised and a great location.  Excellent views, bright, and clean!  Will stay here again on our next visit to NYC.  Steve was a great host.  Proactive and responsive.

Claudine’s place was so nice! We traveled with our two toddlers and my wife’s parents and it was great having everything we needed in the kitchen to cook for our kids. The beds were so comfortable and the whole place was so cozy.

What a cozy place in the Bronx! The gardens are beautiful with a lot of attention to detail. The house was a perfect jumping off point for our time in NYC. The rooms were adequate for the five of us, including three teenage boys. The kitchen was very nice. Nelson contacted me before and during our stay to make sure everything was going well. We walked to Maravillas for dinner, our first Ecuadorian restaurant! The staff was very helpful (especially in working with one picky eater in our family) and the food was great!
Lovely stay
We had a great time with our complete family of 8! Perfect location close to the park and the subway station. Great house for a family to have a great week in NYC!
very satisfied with my stay and with what the area had to offer including quick access to the city. apartment was very cozy and clean in addition to andrea being an excellent host.

I loved that place and the building, all very clean. Great location. Communication was great post booking. Before making the booking i d say it s impossible to get an answer.
Issues were resolved in prompt manners. Facilities are good and clean.
Tito went above and beyond before during and after our stay. Place is very cozy and close to transportation. I liked the privacy and the quiet neighborhood. Definitely staying here again.

We had a great stay at Negra’s apartment and highly recommend it! She was quick to respond, provided us with clear check-in instructions, and was kind enough to allow us to check-in early. The space is exceptionally neat and has everything one needs for a short stay. The apartment is located within a two minute walk of a metro station and there is also a great coffee shop close by. We would certainly return whenever we’re back in New York City!

Great location! We walked everywhere!
Well equiped with everything we needed. The apartment was small but we expected that due to NYC real estate being at a premium.
Nothing was a problem for Henri.
I was concerned with the new NYC laws about airbnb, but Herni reassured me as his accommodation is located in an approved apartment block. So there were absolutely no issues or breaches of the new local laws. This made me feel much more comfortable. Don’t be deterred by these new laws. There’s nothing to worry about with Henri’s accommodation.
The building was warm (Jan).
There was a bit of occasional noise in the corridors overnight, but we kept the aircon overnight to muffle the sounds.
Thanks so much for a great stay!
Nice host
Was the perfect place for our one night stay! Would stay again
Fantastic stay, prime location, good maintained apartment and a responsive host and his team. Highly recommended
Lisa’s place was conveniently located with the C and L line a walkable distance. The place was spotless and she was flexible with our check out time.

In short: I simply loved everything. The room was freshly painted and was even better then 2 weeks before. It is so great to have both: your own room with bathroom and a community-feeling in the huge living/kitchen space. The hosts are absolutely great!!!!! The space has so many little thoughtfull details and lovely little words/notes to give orientation to the guests. You can go everywhere by subway, bus, bicycle (citibike) or even by switching to the ferry at Williamsburg bridge. You can buy everything you need just around the corner.
Check-in was super easy and the apartment was very nice and clean. The location is also great, there are great places to eat/explore in every direction

Nous sommes arrivés sans problème dans le logement mais nous avons eu de nombreuses surprises, très mauvaise surprises ! Nous étions 4 et nous sommes arrivés dans une chambre pour 2!
Il manquait des draps, couverture, serviettes et coussins ! Nous avons directement averti la propriétaire qui nous a apporté quelques solutions le lendemain. Nous avons du dormir à 4 dans un lit double la première nuit et avec nos manteaux car il manquait la couverture. Nous avons eu un lit de camp pour une personne donc nous avons dû partager un lit double à 3 le reste de la semaine.
La salle de bain était rempli de cheveux. Le chauffage d'appoint était nécessaire car la clim réversible fait énormément de bruit, de plus nous n'avons pas eu de couverture, malgré ma demande.
Nous avons donc passé une semaine à partager une chambre de 9 mètre carré à 4 donc très peu confortable et totalement inadmissible !
Je déconseille, s'il vous arrive une situation similaire surtout faites une réclamation en 72h !

Excelente servicio y muy bonito el lugar
Un ambiente muy tranquilo y hogareño

Great location. Only 5 min walk to the nearest subway station that lead straight to manhattan. Her place was very cozy and clean. Great access to backyard. Great nearby restaurants to enjoy. Jennifer was very quick to respond and was extremely helpful with any queries we had. Great host. definitely would recommend to any potential guests as we are planning to come back to the same location for our next trip as well.
Michael’s unit is very comfortable and has easy access to Williamsburg and Brooklyn . It is well serviced by subway . Local market is great . Would definitely recommend .
Christopher's place exceed our expectations; great space, reasonable price in a terrific neighborhood. We would 100% go back!
Nice place and Janet was always quick to respond when I had any questions.
The house was beautiful. Mr. Marc and Mrs. Eunice are great. The house is just as it is in the picture. I will definitely be staying here again and recommending this to my friends to who travel.
Very friendly and clean. Definitely be back!
Highly recommend this listing. One of the most stunning views that I still think about! Clean with great amenities, close to the subway station and plenty to explore within the area.

My stay at Lolita's was great! The communication beforehand was smooth, and Lolita provided me with clear instructions, which were very helpful to check in without any problems. The accommodation itself was also as described, and everything I needed was available. However, it was at times pretty warm in the room, and it was not possible to open the window as it seemed. There was an A/C, however, but I did not want to let it run all night long. Another big plus is the short walking distance to the subway station and the nice neighbourhood with plenty of restaurants and takeaways. It felt very safe.
Thanks a lot for your hospitality, Lolita! :-)

Logement parfait en tout point : propreté, equipement, confort, proximité de la station de métro et au calme après des journées dans l'agitation de Manhattan.
Le quartier est très sympa, supermarchés, laverie, boutiques, restaurants, cafés tout est à proximité.
Nous avons eu beaucoup de plaisir à le découvrir sur les indications de notre hôte.
Linda a été très attentive à notre bien être durant le séjour et souple par rapport à notre arrivée tardive.
C'est pas toujours évident de faire un choix de logement quand on part si loin et dans une ville qu'on ne connait pas, mais là, allez-y les yeux fermés, je recommande à 100%.
Very conveniently located! The apartment is simple but clean and has a extra bedroom/study in case you need it. Check in went smoothly as well!
Really enjoyed staying at Chao’s place while I was visiting Brooklyn for a quick trip. Great location, great host, and great communication - would definitely stay there again!
It’s really close to 1 & A Metro. We can get to Manhattam only in 15 minutes ✨🌞 i’ll definately come back if inhad a chance to visit NYC again soon!
Justin is great, very communicative and accommodating. A great host. The apartment is pretty basic but very comfortable and quiet. The neighborhood is lively with lots of restaurants and shops.

I reserved Sydney's place for family coming from abroad for my husband's Surprise Birthday Party. Sydney was very accommodating under the circumstances due to the need to keep the secret which limited communication opportunities.
My family provided me with the details of Sydney's listing with them saying it was a very wonderful place to stay - very clean, spacious for a large crowd of 10 people at once.
Fully stocked kitchen, and had all the necessary comforts of home, with additional treats.
The area is easily accessible by multiple bus lines going to the subway and into Long Island, as well the Long Island Railroad nearby, which will bring you to Manhattan in less than 30 mins.
Many different food options nearby, including a large supermarket, for families intending to cook and stock up on food items.
Really beautiful place. Thanks Sydney!

Vanessa is a great host as she is helpful and has timely communication. The airbnb is in a quiet location and close to many restaurants and cafes. The room is cozy, with AC, and a desk for working. I especially appreciated the common space cleaning service which happened 2 times a month. I would have appreciated a more equipped kitchen with a blender, spoons etc given the long stay. Overall, this was a good stay and Vanessa is an excellent host! I would stay here again.

We really enjoyed our stay. The apartment is very cozy and clean, we found everything we needed and felt having a home in New York. The apartment is in a nice neighborhood and we found lots of dining locations and groceries  near by. We also visited Sara's sight seeing recommendations and found them great, especially the ferry tour.  We will definitely try to stay in this apartment again when we plan our next stay in NY. Thank you, Sara.

Une expérience formidable de séjourner dans un quartier calme de Brooklyn. Linda ma a rencontré personnellement à l'arrivée pour nous expliquer toutes les particularités de l'hébergement. Je suis rester 45 jour chez Linda.
Le logement est entièrement équipé avec tout ce dont vous avez besoin .
La description de l’Airbnb de Linda, elle avait mentionné qu’elle était passionnée par l’art. J’avais compris que son travail était au-delà d’une passion, mais une vocation à accompagner des artistes dans leur chemin de construction artistique.
L’Airbnb de Linda Et très inspirant. L’aménagement de l’appartement pousse à la création. Dès que je rentre, j’ai envie de danser de dessiner décrire. Chaque lumière qui entre dans la pièce est une source renouvelable, pour la créativité. Je recommande à tout artiste rêveur poète écrivain, Photographe, danseur, créateur d’aller à la rencontre de Linda.
C’est une personne passionnée, attentionné qui donne beaucoup d’amour et nous guide sur le chemin de nos rêves new-yorkais. Elle ma accompagner pour visiter les monument de New York. Linda ma egalement aider a realiser ma premier exposition a Manathan. C'est une personne que je n"oublierais jamais. Je reviendrais bientot j'espere sejournée a ces coté.
Lugar pequeño y genial, cerca de todo.
Joanne was responsive and understanding, I highly recommend booking with her!
great private location
Amy was a great host with a wonderful home. It’s spacious, made me feel like I was back in my home. She is truly a sweetheart

Kat’s place was fantastic! Lovely neighborhood and so close to everything. We were out and about the majority of each day but her place had everything we needed.
Extremely easy check-in and great communication between Kat and I. Would definitely stay again!
Wonderful space in a great location! Good food and sights nearby. Sam is a wonderful host, was always very quick to communicate and check in to make sure I had everything I needed.

Lovely place, lots of things to do, short from subway etc.
Nice appartment. Host was very helpful.
The apartment is a little worn down, but clean and well equipped.  We had an issue with hot water the host couldn't or wouldn't solve.

El apartamento está cerca de la parada del metro que te lleva directamente a Manhattan con una línea más o menos rápida. Hay un supermercado cerca. Las habitaciones no dan a la calle principal, por lo que son tranquilas y permite descansar bien.
La casa está equipada con lo necesario para pasar unos días un NY.

This 2br apartment near Fort Greene Park was great for our 6 week stay in NYC. Great location, near different subway lines and with coffee and restaurants being walkable. It’s on the 1st floor, so 1 flight of stairs to climb. Kitchen is comprehensive (dish washer is a mini one), and having an in-unit washer dryer was good. The bedrooms face the back of the building, not the street, so it was relatively quiet as far as NYC goes.
I am very glad with your hospitality. You are amazing. Thank you so much for this service. You are so kind. Thanks a lot again.
Was a lovely time. Lina was welcoming and friendly
Ellen was a wonderful host with a wonderful property. Was perfect for my weekend stay.

Rafael and his wife are kind, cooperative and helpful hosts.  The apartment was clean.  It was easy to get in and out also.  We really enjoyed our stay.  We had all the amenities that we needed for a pleasant stay. Rafael checked on us when he saw us coming or leaving the apartment.  We really appreciated the friendliness of both of them. A great place to stay in Brooklyn.

Nous avons passé un séjour très agréable dans le logement d’Esmé. Le logement est grand, propre et bien équipé. La literie est nickel, avons très bien dormi et très calme .
Le logement est proche du métro (5 min) , il y a plusieurs magasins alimentaires à moins de 5 min aussi , bar et resto à côté ( personnel agréable et serviable).
Esmé a été une hôte très disponible et elle parle très bien français , je la recommande vivement
Et j’y retournerais très certainement

The house is nice, although the area (2 blocks from the house) where you take the bus is a kind of sketchy with lots of trash on the street. I think the instructions the host provided once I paid for reservation were a little bit overwhelming - it was one big long message, and some of the instructions were repeating themselves, so it felt like we should be very-very careful living there, which was a little stressful (for example, "Please be careful not to stain or scratch the walls, especially with your luggage.", "No hairs left on the floors and in the bathroom" - I agree with the bathroom part, but no hair on the floors sounds a little it too much I think). Other than that, everything was fine.
Clean little apart-hotel, great value for money in a bustling neighbourhood
ok

Kimberly was a responsive and helpful host. My flight arrived early in the morning - Kimberly was able to accommodate early bag drop-off and even early check-in since the previous guest left early. The room was clean and spacious for one person with all your amenities. The location was ideal for me since it was close to JFK airport, Manhattan, and UBS Arena (for a concert, which was the main reason for this NY trip). I especially appreciated that this listing does not require extra chores for the check-out process - very simple.
This place is great and close to LaGuardia
Great stay! Thanks!
Marcus really goes above and beyond. I enjoyed everything about my stay and hope to come back for my next work trip!
This was our second stay here. Great stay both times.

La ubicación del departamento es inmejorable. A pocas cuadras de las líneas 2 y 3 de subte. Barrio tranquilo y seguro.
Richard es un genio. Nos hizo sentir super cómodos y responde los mensajes al instante. Es un gran anfitrión. Hemos valorado mucho sus recomendaciones y consejos.
Una pequeña crítica tiene que ver con los ruidos de pasos o si corrían en el depto de arriba que se siente bastante, pero eran eventos poco frecuentes y que obedecen a la construcción edilicia.
Volvería a hospedarme en su lugar todas las veces que vaya a NY.
Gracias Richard por tu amabilidad y cercanía.

Terri was really responsive to all of our questions and her place looks exactly like the photos. A really unique place worked great for our girls weekend trip to NYC. There is street parking so if you find a spot grab it quickly! Overall good comfortable stay

Amal and Nicolas were both helpful accommodating and responsive. The apartment is 2.5 blocks to subway foing Uptown and Downtown, about 4-5 blocks to whole foods, some great restaurants within walking distance (Vinoteria, Caffe Latte, Barawine and some others we didn’t try), dry cleaning options, liquor stores and pharmacies. Apartment is comfortable and well stocked.
I enjoyed the stay it was nice
it was very beautiful.  Getting to Manhattan is very easy.  It would be very nice if the air conditioners work before the guests come home.
All very good!!

Luis was a great host. He met us on arrival and showed us everything we needed to know about the place. He always responded to messages. Perfect spot if you just need a place and plan to be out in the city for most of your time there.

Our stay was fine for the 5 of us, and the apartment had most things we needed. The only small complaints are that the pillows were very thin and there was only one per person, the towels were very thin and small, and the step up to the bathroom was not marked so people stubbed their toes. Otherwise it was a good location and a clean space.
10/10 would return!
Wonderful place. Both Duchess and Alan were so friendly, and I was able to stay with my cat which was so amazing and I was thankful they were so accommodating
Good space for NYC. Ulises was a great, communicative host. Only thing is, if your booking for the rooftop amenities make sure you check the weather before hand.
I wasn’t able to make it in before check in time and Jasmine was super responsive and accommodating!! She was understanding and let me in after I got there. Would recommend

Great spot! It was the best relocation, super safe and pretty quiet. The bathroom is super small and it’s very dark in this apartment, best for people who don’t have to spend the day in it. The bed is huge and the outdoor space is nice. Fast wifi and cold AC!
Great place, very convenient
Great basement, quiet, clean, close to metro and perfect for spend a weekend in NY.
Cool

Amazing stay in a very convenient location for grocery shopping, laundry, bars and parks. The train is just up the street, making getting anywhere easy and accessible.
Jamal was a great host and any issues I had were quickly addressed with kindness and understanding.
The room was everything it was out to be. Very comfortable for the hot summer with amazing A/C, WiFi, bed, couch, desk and closets. Most of the time you’d forget there were other guests down the hall.
Would recommend this place to anyone new to the city or visiting. Wish I could’ve stayed longer!
I had a great stay at Maggie's place.  The unit was as it appears in the listing.  The recommendations for food and coffee were great, and she was very responsive.

Simple, clean, dimly-lit room in a 3rd floor walk up a short walk to NWF7 trains. Host was accommodating, allowing me use of the kitchen & coordinated use of bathroom. Good spot for value. Best for quick trips.
Soft bed can be tough if you need a firm mattress. If you’re a light sleeper, thin walls subject you to the upstairs neighbors that have rowdy children that cry loudly & tumble around well into the night.
Plenty of cafes, grocery, laundry & restaurants nearby. I recommend Cafe Xochimilco, Joe coffee, LIC beer company all blocks away.

Jeremy's home was so beautiful and well kept.  The space is very clean and accommodates everything you could need.  The back yard is gorgeous and includes the hot tub which we thoroughly enjoyed having.  Jeremy was communicative, but let us have our space.  We even ended up staying an extra night to complete our weekend plans and stay a bit longer.  Jeremy was very nice the couple of times we saw him and even changed out the hot tub water before we got there.  Nothing but good things to say about this apartment space-hoping to be back soon!

This brownstone is extremely spacious, and you can really feel the history of the building. The location is good, close walk to the metro, and the street is nice. The apartment could use some renovation inside, such as the faucets being too short for the sink, making use uncomfortable. The bed really needs to be replaced, it’s so squeaky, and the linens should also be replaced. The sofas in the living room could be nicer. The fridge in the bedroom is a bit noisy. The wall behind the bed was not clean. And the overhead lighting was a bit cold, the place could use some nice lamps or other nicer lighting.
Great place to stay close to Times Square and go around the city

Anthony and Omar, the hosts, are roommates and were both very kind and attentive, always asking if I needed anything. They often have friends over, but I always felt my privacy respected.
The room is very simple (you sleep in a mattress on the floor), but has a good space, and a cabinet. It's carpeted and has heating, so I felt warm even though it was quite chilly outside. The shower's good, I just had one issue with it: there was no hot water one day, but all others were fine. The only improvement I'd suggest is the cleaning: the carpet in the bedroom was quite dusty and needed vacuuming, and there were some stains on the pillow and sheets. Nothing that can't be easily solved.
The best thing about it is the location: Astoria is a great neighborhood, very safe and full of coffee shops, restaurants and local stores. The apartment is about 10min from the subway station, and that line takes you to Manhattan in less than 30min.
All in all, it was a good stay, and worth the price - it had what I needed to sleep, rest and shower, after spending the day walking around NYC.
Beautiful house with a rich history. Best garden i have seen in new york city

Foi tudo perfeito !
localização, conforto,tamanho do apartamento otimo para 4 pessoas
