Really enjoyable stay with friendly hosts, I'd stay again :)

This was the perfect stay , everything we needed around the corner . Amazing room , staff was super accommodating to all our needs . It didn’t feel like I was staying in New York City since it was rarely noisy . Definitely recommend this to anyone who needs a place to stay in New York City

Peter’s Brooklyn listing was everything it was described and more from their homely hospitality and local recommendations, the time spent there really felt like a home away from home.
The ammenities and design inside and out were modern and considered giving us the space to cook, stretch our legs and work remotely in peace and comfort.
Overall this stay was flawless and was the perfect way to start our NYC trip, many thanks again to Peter and his family for their hospitality and a memorable time in Brooklyn.
La ubicación era perfecta, la habitación era hermosa y la limpieza impecable.

Rosiane and her son are fantastic hosts! they make sure you're comfortable and they are very congenial folks ! the room and house are very comfortable and quiet right near beautiful Jamaica bay wetlands. highly recommend this airbnb!!!
Your going to except a good stay!

Ce fut une excellente experience et j'envisage de continuer de visiter NY dans le futur proche je serais tres interesse de retourner dans le meme appart; la taille me convient ainsi que la qualite du service. merci encore d'avoir contribuer a la reussite de ma mission a NY.

Small bathroom
3 flights of stairs
친절한 호스트, 편안한 방, 단 엘리베이터가 없다는 단점

We enjoyed our stay in the heart of Manhattan. As it is the city that never sleeps don’t stay there if you want peace and quiet but if you want to be part of the action and within walking distance of all the major sights then it is perfect. The only downside we had was that there wasn’t someone in the office during office hours and you had to phone them to come and let you in. Minor inconvenience but everything else was great!

Charles’ place was lovely, peaceful and very comfortable. It’s very spacious for a NY one bedroom and has the added plus of a lovely spacious deck— even if you don’t use it it gives a spacious and garden like feel to the living area. There is a lot of natural light. The kitchen is very well stocked and the ambiance feels like home— not like a corporate apartment.  The bedroom is roomy and the bed is very comfortable. We will be back as much as we can! Charles and Maggie are excellent, responsive and friendly hosts.
Great stay!

It was pristine clean from arrival which I was very impressed with.. I felt very comfortable throughout the stay and so was my family.. communication was very easy too with Miguel.. the amendities were sufficient and in good working order.  One factor that needs to be looked at however , is visitors hours as most times people use an airbnb whilst on vacation to relax and unwind. Most times you want to be free of rigidness from a work life that could be filled with enough of those issues. I still rate this accommodation on a scale of 10 as a 8.5.
Great location in the upper west side! Comfortable beds :)

Pros:
•Looks exactly like the photos
•Close to public transportation (3min)
•Bed is fairly comfortable
•Check-in instructions were easy to follow
•Clean linen and clean unit
Cons:
•Towels are tiny & leave white residue on your skin.
•If you’re near an elevator door (like I was in 402) you will hear it slam every time. someone comes in or out, so it’s difficult to sleep.
•Hosts took over 24 hours & a lot of follow-ups to respond to my question about receiving an iron. (It does NOT come with the room, but the staff did find a way for me to get one, which I appreciate).
•No iron provided, which is strange because most people need to iron their clothes.
•Shower doesn’t drain well, so your feet get a bath while showering. 🫠
***Pro tip: When using the main door to get in the building pull the handle up to get through. I saw some people struggling with it.
Overall, I’d say for the price it’s decent & I would recommend if you’re looking for an affordable stay in BK.
Everything was perfect!
Yuhong is such a sweet host and very responsive! The room is cosy and clean and close to bus/train to manhattan. Thanks!!

Veronica was a very warm host. I loved the stay at her place.
Thank you Veronica 🙏💚
Felt like home. Everyone was very accommodating. Very nice stay.
Perfect location.  Great host.  Would recommend to anyone.

We had a great time in NY and a big part in that was our stay at Edgar & Digi (the cat). We felt immediately at home. As Edgar often works at night, the first few days we had the house more or less for ourselves. But we really liked it as well to meet him finally after that. We can highly recommend to stay here if you like to mingle with a local and to pet a very cute cat. Thank you Edgar & Digi. Till next time!
Great host house was clean and comfortable will definitely stay again

Loved this place so much that we extended our trip, smart lock at front door gave us access to this Cathedral entrance
big living room and stair case at entrance remind us plaza hotel of Rome
Billiard table next to dining was very well thought music can be played from Bluetooth devices hey while fire please in different colours of light, made this well thought, Master bedroom has amazing cathedral ceiling 2nd red room was big enough to have living room in it
Master bathroom and bedroom has unique granite blue Bahia since I know about stones a lot
Kitchen with everything we need
Sunroom look like we were sitting in the garden with artificial grass on the floor
End of the day gym time which is located in adjacent building used to be a garage I have L been travelling for a long time and I’ve never seen such an well thought place to stay its few minutes from both airports and 16 minute train ride to Manhattan
We definitely will you come back

I love Sharon, she was great!!!
She was kind, attentive and always attentive to my doubts
Very comfortable stay, exactly as advertised! Great location, very walkable throughout the city. Would stay again!
it was a good trip!
Great and comfortable place to stay

Wanda’s place was the perfect spot for my partner and I to call home for a weekend in the city. The area is super walkable with bodegas, cafes, and great food options within minutes. The place is very comfortable and looking forward to booking it again when we are back in Brooklyn.

The location was easy to find and walkable to many nearby spots. The room was clean and tidy. Because of the tightness of the quarters, you can hear your neighbors, but that is expected in older buildings. There isn't an elevator, which was fine with me. But some folks might dislike this place for that reason alone. I enjoyed my stay and would consider another visit to this location.
Muito bom o apartamento, tem serviço de quarto é arrumadeira além de estar a 3 quadras da times então ele é perfeito
Me and my family were happy to be Liesha’s host. She used to respond always to my message and be really clear. The apartment was clean

Great value. We loved the 2 bathrooms and living room. PRO TIP about the heat. During the winter months, if you select AC on the thermostat you actually get hot air which is centrally provided. The AC will work normally we we told, during the summer months. Our room got to 80 degrees after we selected “cool” on thermostat. Best way to cool down room is to select heat, turn down thermostat and then open window.
Also, hotel elevator can get very busy. We found it to be easier to go up first, then come down.
Rooms are a little older. We have a couple minor maintenance issues which were promptly addressed.
Uber app places the address of this hotel at 57th street. My advice is to let driver know before pickup and drop off. Lyft app works properly.
Perfect location, clean very nice place

Alain ist ein netter Gastgeber, immer gut zu erreichen, meldet sich stets schnell zurück.
Die Wohnung eignet sich hervorragend für Familien, da zwei separate Schlafzimmer. Die Heizung fiel manchmal aus, was Alain aber immer wieder regelte. Leider lässt sie sich nicht regulieren, so dass es für uns manchmal zu kalt oder viel zu warm wurde.
Die Gegend Park Slope ist ruhig und angenehm, viele Restaurants und Lebensmittelläden in der Nähe.
Wir würden die Wohnung auf jeden Fall erneut buchen.
Great host and lovely home, we had a great time and they helped us out with food and other activities to do in the area, would recommend anyone to stay with them!!!

I needed a place last minute and was glad to find this loft available. The space was nice, and all three hosts were kind and responsive throughout my stay. My only concern was that one of the duvets didn’t seem clean and felt a bit dusty. Other than that, the place was clean and comfortable!
Amy’s place was clean and check in instructions were well communicated.

Christian was such a great host. He checked in with us each day to make sure we were okay and we had everything we needed. I cannot recommend this Airbnb enough. It's in a GREAT location, private entrance, really easy to get to, and best of all, it was within walking distance to plenty of restaurants, laundry mats, small groceries, and more. Thank You Christian for allowing us to share your space!
Colin & Bryn are are really kind and helpful.
Yasemin’s place is such a gem! As a couple we comfortably enjoyed our four-day stay and the access to numerous restaurants/bars/attractions nearby. We would stay here again in a heartbeat!

Despite being late myself for the check in and the check out Camila has been extremely kind and accommodating.
She has a very cozy and comfortable apartment perfect to relax after the long hours in the city. Very quiet room and very comfortable bed. I’d definitely come back!

Good location. Few blocks from subway & central park. Convenient to basic needs. Safe, quiet area. Its a shared space with 5-6 other rooms. It has 2 shared bathrooms(it was never an issue). Everyone shares living space. Quiet time is 11pm-8am & everyone respected this. It was nice to meet other people. Bed was comfortable. There were extra pillows & a blanket in closet which was much appreciated. We were provided 1 giant bath towel & hand towel.
Tips/notes:
If tv remote doesnt work, your room might have wrong one. check livingroom for one or ask if anyone else has a non working one. they are specific to each tv.
The bathrooms have 2 fan switches. one is a regular fan and the other is a warm air fan which is nice to switch to after you get out of the shower. only run 1 at a time. Water gets hot. great water pressure too.
You have to walk up a couple flights of stairs.
The listing has a number wrong in address, I missed this part of message when host sent it.
We enjoyed our stay!

For the light sleepers, it is pretty noisy at night. Very loud people across the courtyard working a bar.
However, Great place to stay for a few nights. Alex was helpful and the place was perfect. No complaints. Would definitely stay again.
Had a wonderful stay. Great neighborhood and one block from the train.
It's such a beautiful space, everything is great! Taylor is an amazing host! Highly recommend!

Very comfortable home away from home. Beautiful decor, true high ceilings and corner unit let in nice sunlight. Wonderful bed, sheets and pillows. Location is close to public transportation, shops, and places to eat. Dakota is a great host, and the apartment has clear instructions for wifi and other amenities.

John was super helpful and the Appartement was perfect. We loved the neighborhood and the communication with John - he gave us tipps for all our needs :) Subway is super close, many restaurants and bars around the corner!
Awesome location and great hotel!
Great spacious apartment in the heart of park slope. Jinha was very communicative with any questions I had. Would definitely stay again.

Carmen's place is great.
Its like having your own private suite and nothing beats that in an Airbnb stay. Everything was clean and the listing accurately reflected what the place would be like. Above all she was extremely responsive and cooperative as a host and always there to help out and I really appreciated that... Thank you Carmen I couldn't have asked for more :)
Niko’s place was very clean and in a great location. He was very communicative and welcoming, and we had a great time staying at his place.
Great place, Great host!

Wayne is a great host and very friendly! The location is terrific! Close to the subway n bus to LGA! Be mindful though if u stay on the top floor because there are a lot of stairs but I got a good workout while I was there! Very clean apartment in a lively neighborhood! Best soul food restaurant right on the corner!!
Fantastic apartment with wonderful hosts - we loved staying here! A great base to explore New York from.
very comfortable apartment

Great friendly communication.
Wonderful place to stay.
Nice place, worth the price. Host is always very responsive.

Very nice place, clean and comfortable and very quiet area.
Highly recommended!

I have been at Manuel’s more than I can count. Let me put it this way, if i were to run a workshop on How to Airbnb??? Manuel would be one of my Top Facilitators. He is excellent at this. It’s no wonder he is always booked. Thanks for all you do Manuel!

Muchas gracias por la atención, la ubicación es perfecta es un punto donde uno se puedes desplazar para conocer las atracciones de la ciudad .
La habitación a pesar de estar tan cerca de un punto tan con concurrido de la ciudad no se escucha nada a la hora del
Descanso.
Gracias volveré sin dudarlo fue excelente mi experiencia con el hotel y todo lo que brinda.

We absolutely loved this place! The apartment feels comfy and is super clean. Marcelo & Elias are really nice and attentive, they gave tips and recommendations. Also their little cats Ray & Luna made our experience so joyful, they’re lovely and made us feel at home ♥️
Subway station is only 5 minutes walking which is pretty convenient to get to Manhattan. Don’t look for more, you won’t regret staying here, it’s a 1000/10.
Thank you guys & see u next time!
Amal's place was much bigger than we expected. Neighborhood was quiet.  There are a lot of stairs (as noted in the listing), but we managed.  We would stay again.

Casimar and his partner has been great host and we love their place very much! Clean, cozy and comfortable room for 2 pax. Bathroom is spacious and clean. All basic necessities is available and free to use. Easy to communicate and easy going host. Great location and easy to navigate and travel by the subway from their home. Strongly recommend their place for comfort and reasonable price 🙂

My son and I were very happy with our stay at Freddy's place. In the beginning we were huddled down, adjusting to the cold weather, and Freddy's place was a comfy, cozy, safe and relaxing space. When we finally decided to get out into the city, we found the train station just 2 minutes away, the bus stops also 2 minutes away- it's perfect for everything. On New Years Eve, there were poilice on the corner being vigilant, but totally unobstrusive and that gave me a lot of confidence in the area. the neighborhood does have a few characters, but they were harmless and added to the flavor! Groceries and plenty of fast food all around as well. Freddy was waiting for us when we arrived, even though our flight was late. He made himself available when we needed him, but otherwise, we felt like independent tenants of the building. Although we enjoyed seeing and experiencing the fantastic sights New York, we were equally glad to get back to our cozy Brooklyn 2-bedroom every day! Thank you, Freddy

This place is excellent for its location and price which is what appealed to us. It’s a no frills accommodation but fine for a week’s stay in New York. The shared bathroom facilities seemed to be rarely used….I only had to wait once for a shower. The shower temperature varied, one needed to run the tap for a while before hot water came through.
Beautiful and cozy home. Very warm and quiet. Loved my stay, thank you so much.
Great modern loft , quiet neighborhood, washer/dryer was a huge plus, Angelica always responded fast to all the inquiries
Sharon is a nice and very friendly host. the Room was as expected we are fully satisfied.

We had an amazing stay at Luke's place!
The apartment is a true artist's studio, filled with his beautiful paintings, which made it feel like a mini gallery. It was a pleasure talking to him about his art.
The location is perfect, tucked in one of the older buildings of the financial district, offering easy access to everything. The area is calm at night, and we slept great.
Luke made the stay so smooth with clear instructions, great communication, and helpful recommendations for exploring the city.
This was a unique NYC experience, and we would definitely recommend staying here!
I stayed at this location after booking almost last minute. Host was very responsive and welcoming. The space is well kept and maintained and the neighborhood was peaceful to walk around in.

Superb location at a great price. We had a fantastic stay at Mona’s place, which is in a really central but picturesque part of Chelsea. It was perfect for our extended family of 2 kids, 2 parents and 2 grandparents. Highly recommend!
Renee’s place is perfect for a solo traveler. It was so easily accessible via public transportation and I loved the neighborhood.
Great place

The hotel room was significantly smaller than the photos. For how expensive the room was,  it would have been nice to get accurate photos. There was no heat in the room and I wasn’t told on check-in, so spent some time trying to fix the thermostat before calling the front desk. They brought up a space heater. Staff were very pleasant but again the room was very small. There was very little counter space in the bathroom. Had to use the ironing board as a table for more room to lay things out. Probably wouldn’t stay here again due to the cramped room.
Exactly as described, perfect for a layover between flights at JFK. Everything was provided and the place was spotlessly clean.
I really have no complaints for the price. Fantastic value. Extremely clean, friendly hosts, authentic area, close enough to the subway. The mini fridge in the room is a nice touch.

Great location, clean and well equipped, had a family of 7, for nicely!!!
Key was a little tricky but once you figure it out, it works
Could use a microwave and a Keurig coffee maker
But for the price and location, you can’t beat it
Micheal was great host!
I will be back!!!!
Great apartment, really worth the price, and have a lot of space.

Perfect accommodation for our two week stay. Lots of stuff nearby and easy to navigate. Must try the coffee and bagels at Brooklyn barista around the corner, quality Vietnamese and pizza also nearby. Hosts were great, 10/10

Uchenna's place was exactly what we needed.  Easy walk to the metro to take you where you need to go. Uchenna was fast in responding & addressing issues (wi-fi was out during our stay) but was very helpful. Would def stay again!
Booked last minute and worked out perfectly. definitely would return

The house appears brand new, lovely, kitchen appliances, however lacking many amenities such as drinking glasses, wine, glasses, ample silverware or cookware. I did appreciate the coffee cups that were in the cabinet (The only things to drink from) and plenty of coffee pods for the Keurig!
Living room sofa was not comfortable at all. Bedroom mattress quite firm, but we felt was comfortable, but bedding was definitely lacking. Bed only had a bottom sheet and comforter, no top sheet.
Very clean, close to attractions and subway stops, and receptionists were very nice and helpful

What a fabulous Airbnb and Jeff is such a brilliant host! The apartment is beautiful, very spacious and equipped with everything you need. The beds are SO comfortable and the bathroom is super nice. Jeff was so helpful with advice and local recommendations, going out of his way to help us out. It’s in a quiet area of Bushwick but easy to walk to the subway to get wherever you want to go. We had a great stay.
Good for group travel.
The place was extremely spacious and clean. Diana provided quick responses and such a welcoming energy. 10/10 would recommend this place to anyway!

I enjoyed my stay at Elizabeth's! She was great company and made me feel right at home. The apartment was clean and as described, and I appreciated how thorough she was in explaining how to access everything and the house rules, I felt very safe. The location was good - 5 minutes from the 2,4 and 5. There's a great bodega right across the street. She also was very accommodating when I needed to make a last minute change to my reservation. It was a pleasure!

It's an excellent place to stay if you like  accessibility and a beautiful interior space. This is Kevin's home, and he knows what works and what doesn't for him. I was in communication with him a lot more than I'm used to with airbnb hosts, but we were always friendly and we both helped each other out with a couple things. Thanks again Kevin!

I had a really good time during my stay and it’s about a min walk to the station which makes life easy. The outdoor space is nice. And my hosts were friendly and flexible to provide a solution to any issue I had

Great value! The location is right next to Central Park and very close to the subway. Robert wasn’t there during our trip but communicated very quickly via text when we had questions. His co-host Celeste was very sweet and friendly to me and my family! Thank you!
Perfect

Very nice. The place was as advertised, very nice communal rooftop to hang out in at the end of the day.  But my biggest complaint is the noise created by slamming doors in the hallways. we were second floor, street facing and we could sleep through street noise, horns and sirens fine but every night were woken by doors slamming in the halls. Not due to loud guests the doors just have no dampeners. It’s metal on metal and very jarring.  If they can remedy that I’d certainly book a stay here again.

Make sure to call them before staying
It’s an extra $100 a night for incidental fees
Overall it was a good place to stay
In the heart of Times Square and is walking distance for most things you want to see
Great place to stay if you plan to visit NYC. Very responsive host.

Wonderfully charming place, but AC is loud and old.. I didn’t mind, but some might. They were very accommodating bringing me a fan, and a tea kettle etc. Very pleasant staff. Food at restaurant was awesome too!
Room was just as it was described. Great location.
Great place to stay at!

Loved Ms Wildas house. Close to our family in Brooklyn and close to numerous shopping centers. Great central location. Apartment was neat, clean and had all the amenities you could need as if you were at home.
Will stay again.
Great location! small room, but all you need it for is just sleeping anyways!
Place is as described. The space is beautifully laid out , clean and organized. Check in was easy and communication was timely.

Clean, AC, good value and location. Located on a quiet block of brownstones, less than 10 min walk to nostrand ave subway stop, at least three different grocery stores and many more coffee shops and restaurants within walking distance. The private bathroom was such a good feature. Also felt very safe, entryway was behind a locked metal gate.
Cons: Obviously no kitchen but the fridge, toaster oven and microwave worked pretty well.
Very close to Times Square and let us check in early so we didn't have to carry around our luggage

Great stay with fantastic host. Unit is very accurately represented in photos, and I had complete privacy/private entrance. Peaches is a great communicator and was a very reasonable & understanding host. I enjoyed my stay here and it had everything I needed!
A great hotel, fantastic value for money and in a really good location in South Manhattan.
Great stay! Everything was as described and we really enjoyed ourselves. Definitely recommend.
Michelle was an outstanding host, she is lovely and we had some great chats. Her home is welcoming and always clean and in a great location for discovering the city on subway.

Great place for one person - great location . I was out a lot but did work there comfortably as well.
Outdoor space wasn’t really useable
Artem's place was GREAT. Simple but well located - close to everything! The beds were super comfy! Would definitely come back!
Great, clean and affordable place in the heart of Brooklyn. Don't be put off by the area, it felt safe and no one bothered us and the subway was easily accessible. Thanks again for a great stay!

A 2-bed in Williamsburg on a safe street with groceries, restaurants, bars, gyms, and public transport all within a 15 mins walk? Yes please!
Alli hosted my dog and I for 3 months when I first moved to NYC. She gave instructions to cover furniture before letting the dog up and to be respectful of the next guests regarding dog hair—so if you’re not a dog owner, this apartment is still perfect! Living a couple blocks from the dog-friendly ferry and next to the central section of Williamsburg (the most dog-friendly neighbourhood I’ve ever been to) was a dream.
The apartment itself, has a large primary bedroom, well equipped kitchen, nice shower, and a perfect little guest room (that I converted into an office when I didn’t have visitors). Having just moved, I found the storage space, cabinets and closets sufficient.
Alli is an excellent communicator prior to check in and during the stay. She provided clear instructions on the apartment, which helped me feel right at home.
Great little apartment. Easy walking distance to grocery and dollar store and subway. Highly recommend!
This place was a good stay for me and one other person, host was responsive quick and made our accommodations work out

Lejos del centro pero bien comunicado con metro y bus. Solo teníamos una toalla y un rollo de papel higiénico para 11 días. Almohadas sin relleno, muy incomodas.
Anfitriona muy amable.
Ashley was helpful and communicative, and the place itself was lovely, clean, spacious, and just what we were looking for. Would absolutely recommend it!
Nothing to say
Its very nice and cozy place just next to the union park with lots of food and stuff to do around, hard to go wrong there

We had a great week staying at Helen and Richard’s apartment. They were responsive and gave clear information from the first contact. The apartment was quiet and peaceful. It was located in a great position in Manhattan with the park and 5th avenue very close by. We wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again.

Great apartment and great host!
Very convenient location a block and half from Central Park and the B/C subway and half a block to the 1/2/3 subway stop. The loft bed was convenient when we had guests during our stay. In unit washer/dryer was also a lifesaver and worked well. The bed was very comfortable which is important for a month long stay.
We had an issue with the A/C in the bedroom and Jon swooped into action and replaced both A/C units the very next day and left a treat in the fridge for our two year old. So awesome! Would definitely stay in Jon's unit again.
Internet was rock solid and fast which was great for working remotely.
The apartment is a fifth floor walk up (really seems more like fourth floor because the first set of stairs is long and takes you to the third floor), but the cardio was good for us!
Sylvester was extremely responsive and a great host. The AirBnB is beautiful and pretty close to the subway station.

I loved it!!! the bathroom and bedroom were extremely clean and the host was very responsive. I loved the location and it was easy to find. very quiet and comfortable I will definitely stay here again when I come back to NYC!!!!

Die Lage ist optimal!!! U2 und U3 nur ein paar Schritte von der Wohnung entfernt. Hab die Couch gemietet aber es gibt auch ein extra Zimmer was ich bei nächsten mal mieten wird! Super für Leute die ein Platz brauchen einfach zum schlafen bzw. lange ausschlafen wollen. Bin zufrieden. Und habe auch sehr viel Geld gespart. Danke J. 👍🏾
they were very responsible and kind as a family and perfect host, we felt very comfortable and safe while we stayed there with my wife hope to will stay there again thankyou

We had a wonderful stay at Hally's. The apartment had every amenity we needed. It was very bright, clean and comfortable.  We didn't spend much time in the immediate neighborhood, but getting to the city was so convenient, the  "L" subway line is a quick three block walk.  We had a terrific vacation and I would recommend it!
Wonderful

Milton est un hôte très accueillant, très gentil et très arrangeant.
La communication fut très bonne.
Le logement était conforme à la description, propre, fonctionnel et très bien placé, à quelques minutes à pied du métro. Je recommande.
Hele fijne plek om NY te bezoeken. Super leuke buurt met allemaal leuke restaurantjes en barretjes. Aardige mensen die erg behulpzaam zijn. Echt een aanrader!

Charly was great! Fantastic views of Manhattan! This loft is very spacious and the projector was easy to use. York st train station (F-Train) is up the street, which made it easy for us to get to the city. Will be booking again in the future! 10/10! 😊
Great, clean place, nice stay.

My dad came to town last minute and we wanted him to stay close by our apartment. Mandana’s place was perfect! It was clean, a good size, and even had a backyard for my daughter to play in while we visited. Mandana was so kind and communication was excellent!

Elena’s apartment was the perfect place to feel like a true New Yorker! There’s a bodega and a pizza place right outside the building’s front door. The only “note” we have is that if you’re warm-bodied, make sure to pack some summer kind of PJs. It’s quiet want in the apartment, even with the AC on, but luckily Elena has a fan available! Between that and opening some windows, we were all good! Extremely walkable to Times Square and the subway. It’s astounding how much we were able to do and see in a short weekend! Elena is so communicative and kind. We would definitely stay here again!

Love the place was described and designed to my liking there were a few problems such as the bathroom and showe design just wish they were a little bit more open space as it is crowded in there with so many people as well as just the wood creeks when people are passing by or coming through otherwise wise eveything was great and loved eveything

This was a great place to base yourself for a trip to NYC. Close to the subway & a lot of the big ticket tourist spots. Neighbourhood felt safe to walk to and from each day. The bed was comfortable & it really wasn’t very loud given the location.
good quality for the price. just what I needed and great flexibility
Great location and charming.
I found the room clean and comfortable. The space heater kept me good and warm and there was never congestion at the shared bathroom. The host was very responsive.

If you want to explore Manhattan this is the place to be! Nice place, great location, affordable, Elizabeth was great, everything was easy to access and use, it was very easy to communicate with Elizabeth as well. Their private roof top garden cabana really makes the trip too! Also the bed was very comfortable! They really have thought of everything here. We enjoyed using the Public House toiletries they supply for their guests as well! They made it so easy for us, which was so important for us, as it was our first time in the city, we would highly recommend :)

Quiet. Sweet place. Close to lots of fun spots. Clean and homey. Lovely garden in back yard.
Great host!! Next time we will stay longer.
Excelente espacio. Muy bien ubicado. Volvería con seguridad. Carlos siempre en contacto.

Quality apartment with all that is needed for a short or longer stay. It was as expected from the information in the listing and the communication from Augustin and Michelle prior to arrival.
Augustin and Michelle are friendly and approachable.
You will not be disappointed if you choose to stay.
Caroline was a great host! 10/10 recommend
We do not have words to describe how much we loved the place. Highly recommended!!! Thank you Marianella !!!

Clean, nicely equipped little studio apartment. We liked the charm of this historic property, the location was in the center of it all with easy access to public transport. And we were surprised how quiet the room was!
Great location. Terrace area is amazing
Bonne adresse dans Manhattan.
Awesome staff, clean rooms, great neighborhood.

Room was smaller than the photos,  barely enough room for 2 people to walk around inside. The location and price are unbeatable though, and it's the perfect overnight stay for Megabus/airport trips. Everything else is like a normal hotel. Would recommend for solo travellers on short stays!

Ubytovanie bolo čisté, vhodné pre väčšiu skupinu ľudí. Metro do 5 min. chôdze.
Ďakujeme hostiteľovi a odporúčame :)

Aicha is a wonderful host! Thorough, thoughtful, and truly kind and accommodating. She went out of her way to make sure we had everything we needed and knew where to find it all! The place was great as well—beautifully decorated, located in a great neighborhood, and close to everything you need. On top of all that, the shared resident was incredibly friendly, neat, and really just an absolute joy to be around!
HIGHLY recommend this stay.

I tend not to write reviews but this place exceeded my expectations. What made me book this place was the reasonable price for what we needed and the reviews so I had to pay it forward. The host had very clear instructions that was easy to follow. I felt safe in the area. When we did need parking , it was an easy area to navigate for parking.
Water pressure in the shower was amazing. The decor, sheets , energy. I have nothing bad to say about this place. This has been a soft return to airbnb after 9 years and I will definitely recommend this place or stay here again if family/friends is ever in town. Whoever decorated this place, did a great job and it had everything we needed, even things we didn't think we needed they had. Thanks you all for having us!
Great place to stay.Clean and easy access. Very professionally run.

Nous avons été très satisfaits de l'appartement, il est très propre et sûr, nous avons été très heureux de trouver tout très propre et bien organisé avec tout ce dont nous avions besoin pour un séjour agréable.
Nous n'avons pas rencontré ni parlé à Fernando ou à la dame, mais ce n'était pas nécessaire .
J'ai hâte de réserver à nouveau l'année prochaine. :)

Die Unterkunft entsprach genau unseren Erwartungen, wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Das Haus von Duane befindet sich in einer ruhigen Lage mit einem schönen Garten und einem sehr schönen Pool. Die Kommunikation mit Duane war sehr nett und er hat uns immer sofort auf unsere Fragen geantwortet. Wir waren gekommen um NYC anzusehen. Die Lage war ideal. Wir konnten mit dem Bus in 15min die Staten Island Ferry erreichen und dann nach Manhattan übersetzen. Die Fahrt mit der Fähre war jeden Tag ein Erlebnis. Die Ferry geht rund um die Uhr, somit mussten wir auch nie  auf die Zeit schauen um wieder ins Quartier zurück zu kommen. Wir waren froh über unsere ruhige Unterbringung, wo wir uns von einem lauten und hektischen NYC erholen konnten. Duane und seine Mitbewohner waren immer freundlich und gaben uns Tipps für Restaurants, und Sehenswürdigkeiten die uns interessieren konnten. On top: Glühwürmchen, div. Vögel und sehr zutrauliche Eichhörnchen. All in all, ein super Quartier. Danke!

A decent reasonable cost place to explore NYC. Classic brownstone with Victorian details, a bit spare on furnishings but completely workable. Large kitchen and dining. High ceilings.
5-6 blocks to 2 subways lines.
Quiet neighborhood location.

Lourdes’s place was perfect for our weekend in Brooklyn! She was very responsive and the unit was exactly as described! Easy access to the metro which was great since we were mostly out the whole day. She was great in accommodating a late check-in when our train was delayed and let us store our bags after we checked out since we left later in the afternoon.
Great value compared to others in the area as well. Would definitely recommend if staying in the area!

Great place, great location. Despite it being off of a busy street the apartment is peaceful and with very little noise. There is beautiful view to the backyard. I recommend this place and would stay again!
So kind and beautiful space! Hope to stay there again soon!
Kristen, was a tremendous host. Everything was as advertised. Would stay there again and again.

I had a long stay here and found the place welcoming and charming. The place is well thought of, with a fully equipped kitchen, beautiful furniture and design. the back yard was a great place for a quick outdoor feeling and serenity.
Location wise - if you get to know the neighborhood there are a lot of nice places around. There is a subway near by. If you are planning to visit Manhatten it can take a while with requires transfers.
Privacy wise - as this is a rental unit and the main house is the floor above, it might not feel so private as sounds do go through.
Jana and her husband were caring and responsive, and I got a quickand full heartedy response to every need I had.

Wonderful location! Everything you need is close-by, including subway access. There were snacks and bottled water when we arrived. Very thoughtful touches.
The only drawback are the stairs. The unit is on the 3rd floor, but you have to climb 4 steep flights of stairs to reach it.
Dope spot. As advertised

Had a great time during my stay! Messed up a bit on checking in haha but I was helped swiftly and kindly. It’s in a beautiful part of Bk. The room was perfect for me and what I was looking for for my stay. The AC was AMAZING, the bathroom and kitchen were pristine. I appreciated my stay!
Great spot with amazing deck. Great for walking around the city.
Great host. Very accommodating!
everything was fine

Stayed with Wide and Two Teenagers. Perfect for us. Great location in City. Felt real safe here walking around late at night. A lot of local restaurants and easy access to multiple public transportation. Would stay here again
They take good care of their guests and everything in the hotel was as expected/explained on their profile.

The experience as all that was hoped for. The unit met expectations and matched how described. The hostess were responsive and very pleasant. It was a very positive stay and one I would recommend to anyone.
Nice and strategic location very close to a subway, bathrooms always clean even they were shared. Receptionists always smiling! Thanks for your hospitality!
This is a hotel, but I’d 100% come back again. Clean and comfortable space with a trendy atmosphere. Rooftop bar, and breakfast pastries + coffee included.
Satisfied

Philip and Juans place is perfect for a short stay in NY. It’s perfectly located in Brooklyn with easy train-access to get to the city. It’s also very close to the ferry that goes in to the city, which is also a great option. The apartment is clean and cozy, and it’s nice to have your own bathroom. Philip and Juan are both very respectful of your privacy if wanted, but at the same time really attentive, nice and easy to talk to. Would highly recommend!
It's a very good place clean save I like it next time I visit New York I will stay there again.

Florrie’s listing was so cozy and inviting. We felt right at home. Very close to any public transportation needs you may have, the location is perfect. The small details in the room are so appreciated. Would definitely book again !

Excellent choice to explore New York's key points. Close to the Subway station and Central Park. The apartment is very comfortable to stay and also the communication with Hosts was super smooth. We received a clear instruction of how to get into and also the Hosts were reachable and willingly answered all the questions we had. Highly reccomend :)

Super kind host and very communicative! My friend and I checked in separately, I didn’t get a chance to check-in in person so J just texted all the details.
The house is old but very clean and quiet, and location is definitely excellent, only 10 mins walk to Times Square and Broadway.

We got stranded at JFK late at night and literally every hotel nearby was full. Thankfully this host was checking his messages late and responded quickly so we didn't have to join the masses on the floors of the airport. It was a 15 minute ride share to the place. Instructions were easy to follow. The room was spacious, clean, and comfortable. It had outlets available and control of the a/c. The bathroom was small but clean. Towels and linens were provided. My only complaints are minor: two of our pillows didn't have pillowcases, the curtains let a lot of light in, the yard service came by early and loudly, and the people across the hall were loud late into the night. But of course much of that is not the host's fault; just things to be aware of. I would absolutely stay here again. Also the neighborhood is very nice and we walked to a park and a café and had a lovely morning after checkout.
My family and I had a great time, it was nice to be able to stay together. It was loud at night, but not uncommon for the city. Great neighborhood.
Perfect stay

Excellent location, really close to top attractions and the transport is easily accessible. Apartment was bigger than expected and had a beautiful rooftop terrace, all clean to a high standard. Hosts fantastic, very quick responding to messages and, importantly, very friendly. Would highly recommend!

Das Apartment war großartig - sauber und größer als wir nach den Fotos erwartet haben. Die Lobby war immer besetzt und die Mitarbeiter freundlich. Downtown ist deutlich ruhiger als uptown und entspannter. Eine tolle Unterkunft, die wir absolut weiterempfehlen.
Every time I visit new York I try to stay here. Great area,  nice and clean rooms and showers. And excellent hosts. I look forward to coming back
Dave was a great host. Attentive, understanding, responsive & straight forward. The room & home were clean & well stocked. I’d recommend & would stay again
We really enjoyed our stay at Monica's it was close to everything we wanted and Monica was very helpful. We would recommend it to anyone
Great place. Would stay there again

Lakshmee is super kind and friendly! If you’re traveling through JFK the location can’t get any better and highly recommend. The room was a little smaller than I anticipated but for a quick overnight layover it is all you need.
Nice place, as described. Easy stay. Thank you!

Perfect location for exploring Williamsburg but also for the subway to hop into Manhattan.
Michael & Carrie are super friendly were on hand to help if we needed anything or recommendations.
The apartment is perfectly kitted out, quiet & comfortable.
This is the first time we had stayed in Brooklyn, rather than Manhattan but it was a perfect trip - staying in a buzzing neighbourhood.

I spent November and December in Shai‘s apartment. It was perfect for a long-term visit. Spacious, well equipped, comfortable, and mostly quiet for a good night’s sleeps. Shai was incredibly responsive throughout my visit, always helpful, a great host. I had never spent much time in Hell‘s Kitchen, but quickly came to really like the location. Easy subway access, within pleasant walking distance of Chelsea, Central Park, the parks along the Hudson, MoMA, and Carnegie Hall. Near to good restaurants, a great bakery, a legendary cookie shop, an excellent gym, and a decent grocery store. Thumbs up all around. Sad to leave. I would definitely stay there again.
Great stay at Michael’s- place was immaculate and clean, in a great location being so close to the theatre district and the restaurants in Hell’s Kitchen, but also super quiet as well, so perfect.

My family and I had an awesome trip in Brooklyn thanks to John’s place.
Very well located and perfectly clean !
Knowing the neighborhood already, it was just what we needed :)

What an amazing find! Unique, cool, and in a great location! Close to the subway and also has many places to eat nearby. The bed was super comfortable and we really appreciated how quiet our room was, we heard no traffic whatsoever! Will definitely book again when we are in the city. The host was responsive as well, immediately sending someone to fix our broken thermostat.

The place is very convenient, you have everything you need in it, the private bathroom is a major plus and very rare for the price ! The apartment is near the metro line 6 which will allow you to go anywhere in few minutes. It was my first time in the city and I felt safe even at night.
Irene and her husband are very welcoming and helpful. I recommend ! :)
Thanks~~
Great except for room assignments was supposed to be a king and hotel said they were sold out, so why book a reservation for a room and not get what you booked???!!!
My friend and I were very happy with our stay here.  Absolutely no complaints and we would 100% stay here again.  Highly recommended.

I felt so welcomed here, the home is absolutely beautiful, very clean, and Ines and Chris were so kind and hospitable. It felt like I was staying with family. And the breakfast and coffee was always so yummy, definitely recommend staying here especially for a solo traveler wanting to feel right at home.
En plein coeur de l'action !! Prêt pour de tout... Little Italie, China Town... Subway ( le metro)... Mc do a 1 min

Really enjoyed our stay. Easy access by subway into the City. The apartment was very clean and well kept and private. Nice to know there was 24hr help if needed. Could not fault it. Would most certainly stay again.

I recommand this place.
Everything is clean and it’s a quiet place.
Subway lines 2 and 5 to visit many places in Manhattan.
Bodrul is a great host. Everything is as advertised and the location is great.
Shelley was kind and accommodating. The place was charming and bed was very comfortable. Very happy we stayed there,
The apartment itself was quite nice, but the outside and hallways leading to the actual apartment was disappointing. Dirty and with random things in the hallways. Not sure I’d stay here again.
Very comfortable. The only thing I could say that could be improved is to have the AC running to cool it down prior to check in. Great apartment and would definitely stay again.
thank you a lot, casimar! you made our time in nyc very special.
房子整潔，床很好睡，廚房提供的用品也非常完善，Andreas 很細心提供了所有可能會用到的東西，例如雨傘、各種杯盤、調味料….等，讓人有家的感覺，若再來到紐約會再回住，謝謝Andreas 提供如此美好的地方
Had a great stay, was exactly what we were looking for.

Had an amazing stay at Ernest his place. Location is good, close to A-train and just down the road multiple restaurants and 2 supermarkets. Ernest is very helpful and provided me with plenty of information. His hospitality was amazing and i would  recommend booking his airbnb.
Very clean place a good host.
Excellent Airbnb! Great location, comfortable & clean apartment. We would definitely stay again.
Great stay

Patrick est un hôte très attentionné.
L' appartement ne manquait de rien , énormément de produits de toilette et d 'hygiene , de l'eau , des fruits et du café à notre arrivée.
Patrick a pris le temps de nous montrer les arrêts de bus et métro.
Nous nous sentons vraiment comme chez nous. Nous y reviendrons très certainement.
The room was clean and nicely designed. The location was great. Options for breakfast (pastries and coffee) could be diversified.
Great view & Safe area
We loved it.  Very cozy and clean.  Ample towels and supplies.  good location.

My partner and I stayed in this lovely studio for a week to tour New York City and had an absolutely marvelous stay! It matched the pictures perfectly and it was exceptionally pristine and well above comfortable. Phelps was super friendly, kind, hospitable, and communicative throughout our stay, providing us with umbrellas when it rained and making sure we were supplied with everything we needed. It was very private and the neighborhood was quiet and peaceful. Very cozy and warm and we loved the complimentary snacks and coffee pods!! Definitely don't hesitate if you're looking for a pleasant getaway. 10/10, would love to stay again in the near future. 💕

Was such an easy booking at the last minute in an area that was great to be in. The place was clean and communication went well. I was able to get good rest and a hot shower. Kind host! I’d definitely stay here again if I need a place in a pinch or to even book way ahead of schedule. Thank you for being a positive and hassle-free part of my time in NYC!
Nice apartment for a couple

The home is wonderful and exactly as pictured, the details throughout the rooms and finishes were beautiful and overall it was a great place to stay that had maintained that historic charm of a brownstone. The host was lovely and very accommodating, and I'd recommend the place to anyone looking!
Muy cálido y en una buena zona para ir adonde quieras el tren está súper cerca de los recomiendo

This spot is perfect if youre looking to be right in the middle of Brooklyn.  The price was amazing for this small spot and had everything you needed. I live in Bk but couldnt host so this was a great choice and worked out perfect. Edna was very quick and easy to get in touch with.  Id def recommend this place if youre visiting!
The apartment was really cozy and nice. We especially appreciated that Sandra and Cynthia left us lots of bottled water, teas and other necessities and loads of towels.

I stayed at Tom and Jon’s for two months while visiting family in the city. This was a perfect place to stay as a home away from home. This is a vibrant neighborhood close to great transit and lots to do, but this particular street is very quiet, and the backyard truly is an urban oasis. I especially appreciated the AC and shady backyard during the hot August days/nights! These are wonderful hosts - welcoming, responsive, and very helpful. They made my stay easy and comfortable, and helped me make the most out of my time in the neighborhood.
Thanks so much for having me guys! Lovely stay!
Staff was A1 will return in the future

Diana’s place was clean, tidy, warm, and safe. I loved the big windows. AND: in a GREAT location. We only took public transport once the whole weekend because so many things were walkable from her place. Diana was a great host, even giving us toothpaste when we realized we forgot ours. Hopefully she will be willing to have us again in the future!
Responsive and friendly. Very clean space, felt comfortable.
Really cute place, well laid out, great neighborhood.
Logement parfait, propre, je recommande !!
Very lovely apartment in quiet and nice neighborhood. Very great for long stay. Courtney is an amazing host, made everything to make sure our stay was comfortable!

The stay itself was awesome! No complaints. I’ve stayed in this building twice now. It’s a great location and was clean. The neighbors were quite noisy late at night but that’s just part of the risk of being in a rental. Would 100% recommend!
Charmingly appointed, wonderful stay. Ryan is an extremely welcoming and conscientious host for this exceptional apartment.
We had some good days there.

La casa de Amy es la casa perfecta. Con todo lo  que tiene que tener, no le falta ningun detalle. Y todo muy limpio. Y si necesitas algo ahi está Amy o su marido para ayudarte. Una familia encantadora.
The room was everything I needed for my weeklong stay in the city. Great access to everything and a clean space with solid amenities. Bookmarking for future trips to NYC!
Sehr schönes Airbnb in einer zentralen Lage von NYC. Modern ausgestattet, sehr zu empfehlen
Would not hesitate to recommend Nicoletta’s place. Fantastic location, very high spec apartment. It made our stay in Williamsburg relaxed and easy.
Lina was an excellent host and the place is super charming!!!
Very good location.

Absolutely perfect! Loved the location. The apartment was modern with stylish design,  and could not have been cleaner. I’m not much of a cook but the kitchen has everything you need of you do want to cook. Lots of natural light, with serene views from the living room. Joseph was a great host with excellent communication throughout my stay. I will look forward to staying here again when I’m back in Brooklyn.

To be honest the communication with Rohul was really good. The place was clean and we were able to take the air train close by but we didn’t like the noise we heard from upstairs . It was difficult sometimes to fall sleep and we would woke up hearing the noises. Also, if you are tall and big , you will have difficulties being inside the apartment/basement.
Thank-you again Inez for letting me stay at your home. You make me feel welcome.
Great location and really comfortable, enjoyable stay.
Such a perfect location! My group and I thought it was a perfect spot for a weekend trip, especially for first-timers looking to explore all around the city. Would definitely stay again!

La localisation est excellente, à 2 minutes à pied des métros J et Z, et d’autres lignes accessibles facilement. Quartier très pratique au quotidien. L’appartement est très grand, spacieux, bien équipé, avec machine à laver et sèche-linge disponibles tous les jours. L’appartement dispose de tous les équipements de nettoyage nécessaires. Les hôtes sont extrêmement chaleureux, bienveillants et réactifs.
Nous avons tout de même rencontré quelques soucis : présence d’insectes au début (résolu rapidement avec l’intervention d’un exterminateur), problèmes de wifi assez récurrents malgré les efforts des hôtes, propreté loin d’être parfaite à l’arrivée (à savoir pour les plus exigeants), et chauffage instable (ne fonctionnait pas en bas, baissait seul en haut).
Malgré cela, le séjour s’est très bien déroulé grâce au sérieux et à l’implication des hôtes, que nous remercions sincèrement.
Sharon is a wonderful host. Her accommodations are good for a very affordable price! I was in town for one night stay. I slept well! I loved her beautiful paintings that she created.
Nice location, one minute from Subway station. Cozy and very beautiful house. Has everything you need.
Great location. Impeccable host. You can't go wrong here !

Paul was thoughtful, kind and communicative, especially during an extreme heat wave when he brought over an extra portable air conditioning unit. The location is great. We would definitely stay here again.
Nice apartment
Great place for a night or two in NYC! Easy to find and centrally-located to many of the subway lines and Times Square, though still quiet at night so you can get a good night’s sleep.
Would stay here again.

The Studio was perfect for two, Everything is as it appears. Self-Check In was quick and easygoing. My partner had trouble opening the top lock and the response time of our host was quick which was appreciated. The Subway was really close for us as well so that was amazing. Hot and cold shower + sink water worked perfectly fine also. Thank you again for everything !
great location for tourists visiting the city

This a beautiful apartment which is clean, neat, comfortable and is very well designed so that it really lacks nothing. The instructions were outstanding. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and the convenience of being close to lots of eating places and walking or taking the subway to all the attractions. Thank you for having us Adel and Kate!
Christina was incredibly accommodating, and I loved the studio!

Reginald responded promptly every time. I asked most of my questions before checking in and there was really no need to correspond during my stay. He provided a basket of snacks and chilled bottle water - which was greatly appreciated. I liked that the house manual had clear  instructions and limited the need to contact the hosts. Walking distance to buses which take you to different train stations. Overall, it was a good experience.
Great Location and price

This apartment was absolutely lovely. Great space for an apartment in queens. Definitely a good place for a quick stay for the weekend. Very easy check-in and check-out process, overall I had a very enjoyable stay.

Casa carina, più piccola di quanto si possa immaginare dalle foto, ingresso comodo scale di accesso meno, ingresso poco curato e non pulitissimo si può migliorare,prezzo un po’ alto x l’immobile ma stando a Brooklyn ci può stare, metro a Myrtle av. Un quarto d’ora a piedi ma una piacevole passeggiata. Poi arrivi a Manhattan e dici… comunque ne è valsa la pena! Città che adoriamo. A proposito, un bagno (piccolo) per 6/8 persone è un po’ complicato. Bisogna adattarsi. No bidet. Per noi italiani è importante.

Place looked just like in the pictures. Great location! Premises seemed safe and clean. Stayed for 8 days- it had pretty much everything we needed for our stay. Mia and other staff had been responsive and helpful! Very minor hiccups - balcony door was not in working condition and the maintenance personnel had to come and fix a little issue with the AC control. Otherwise, had a very comfortable stay!
Lots of great food options nearby.  Nearest subway station is only a block or so away which was convenient. Had a great time at the Hilton Garden Inn!

Me encanto quedarme en este departamento! Por el precio, me pareció excelente por tener baño privado! El cuarto es muy lindo! El primer piso por escalera es cortito, súper ameno!
Todo me pareció muy limpio!
Además podes hacer uso de la cocina y comedor, además de servirte café gratis entre otras cosas.
La ubicación me pareció excelente! El barrio es tranquilo, hay locales para comprar todo lo que necesitas y restaurantes también.
A una cuadra y media está el subte que podes recorrer todo NY.
También me encanto su cercanía al central park para salir a correr por las mañanas.
Lo recomiendo al 100%%%%.

the area is based around west Indian/carribean so it was pretty much almost like home lol. the noise isn't so bad because im use to it so if you want like silence it won't be your best bet but very roomy very cozy the host were amazing the house was also amazing to never had any issue and definitely now that I know the area we'll will be coming back again :)

Pour notre premier séjour à NYC en famille, c'était le logement idéal : spacieux, propre, calme et proche du métro.
Nous nous sommes tout de suite sentis comme chez nous.
Le personnel a été disponible et accueillant.
Nous recommandons vivement cet hébergement !
A fantasic location and lovely space.  well equpped and spotless

This location is a good spot to walk to broadway shows, Times Square, and nearby restaurants. Also there is no elevator, so make sure you’re willing to carry your luggage up 5 flights of stairs. Pat was responsive and very helpful throughout our stay.
Nice and cozy place
Ok deal. And very warm room. Thank you.
Der subway ist so nahe, und für unsere Interessen war es eine sehr guter Transportpoint.

Stan is the sweetest host. He is very accommodating. His room was clean, neat, accurate to photos. His place is one block away from the nearest subway station AND central park. His dog is very friendly and quiet. Stan is very responsive and helpful. if you need any local recommendations or tips around town, just ask him. We would love to stay here again.
Hotel is very nice
Thanks a lot...a hidden germ
Nice, clean apartment. Remarkably quiet and peaceful for New York. Had everything I needed for a short stay.

Joanna and Kevin were very nice and accommodating, excellent communication! The apartment is exactly as listed and worth the price. Location is far from Manhattan (1 hour away) but it’s pretty straightforward to get there via public transport so it wasn’t a problem for me at all.

Place was very easy to find, great location as imaginable, I was greeted by Ravi who was friendly and hospitable. It was a spiritual experience and peaceful to unwind and reflect. If you are looking for an affordable price in the heart of Manhattan and greatly recommend it, will return for sure hopefully when the weather is warmer and nicer.
Thank you ❤️

Smooth self check-in, Gerry was responsive and clear with instructions. The room is just as it looks in the pictures and it’s right next to the bathroom! Everything was clean and even left a welcome package in the room. Walking distance to the train and easy drive to the airport too!

Nos sentimos muy cómodos en la casa de Simone! Teníamos todo lo que necesitábamos
Gracias por todo!! Hasta la proxima

Beautiful place, an oasis in a busy city. A little noise from the train/subway but expected in a big city and didn’t keep us from sleeping. Very clean. Everything brand new and modern. Jacqueline was always quick to answer any questions.
Clean, updated, spacious, and very comfortable. Would happily stay here again!
Gus was super responsive and it was a very smooth process checking in and out. Great value and location! Nice cafés and shops nearby.
Great host, convenient location. Highly recommended
It was a wonderful experience, the place was quite definitely recommended 👍

It was a pleasant experience, and Pettrina and Mike were helpful. They helped me to park my car and allowed me to park in their yard.
I will definitely stay there again.

This was our first time staying at an AirBnb and Nina + Jamie definitely set the standard for us. The location was great, we were at walking distance from the subway (less than 8 mins walking) and a market grocery (less than 5 mins walking). Nina + Jamie were great hosts they made us feel super comfortable and gave us a variety of suggestions and tips for our trip. The cat was also so cute and friendly, she came out to visit us a few times and we loved it! Definitely recommend to anyone!

L'appartement est idéalement situé au coeur de Williamsburg. Il est facile De se rendre à Manhattan en métro ou a pied par le pont de Williamsburg. J'ai particulièrement apprécié l'arrivée autonome et les instructions très claires, et enfin la disponibilité d'Amy.
Very convenient place with accessible  bus stops and subway stations. Also close to convenience stores where you can buy necessities. Space was very clean.
Had a great time staying here. The apartment was as described and was absolutely beautiful. Transport in and around the neighbourhood was easy and I felt safe! Thanks for a great stay!

Great
clean
Great breakfast
Great stay!!!

We were in Brooklyn for an extended weekend & our son's wedding. James's apt was exactly what we needed to get into Manhattan each day & back easily and return for peace and comfort and wonderful sleep. Everything was exactly what we needed.
The bed was so comfortable we were eager to collapse and sleep late next morning.
Kitchen supply of the most important coffee (milk & sugar), as well as samplings of water, beer & sparkling water, was a treat! And the bath was worthy of any costly hotel room!
For Brooklyn & NYC, this apt was surprisingly quiet! Don't count on the sun or garbage truck to wake you in the morning. At a little below street level, it stayed nicely dark in the early hours (which we welcomed!). So set an alarm if you need to rise early.
We will return!
Robert was a very responsive and accommodating host. His place was very clean and I would love to come back!
Great location for everything Queens.  Quiet and comfortable. Must try the Caribbean food joint right next door!

Location, location, location.  Harry's place is located on the Upper West Side in a quiet neighborhood with every thing you need just steps away.  I enjoyed mornings in Central Park and at the Peaky Barista coffee shop.  Trader Joe's was a short walk away.  I was also able to walk to a liquor store, a pharmacy, T. J. Maxx, a gelato shop, and several restaurants.  The subway station was a 5 minutes walk which made travel to anywhere in Manhattan and beyond very easy.
Beautiful, classical brownstone apartment in a lovely Brooklyn neighborhood. Very comfortable!

Nova is super responsive and provided clear instructions. Checking in was very easy. The apt is close to the metro and to many coffee shops. Room was OK - simple, plenty of space, a dresser/desk and small closet, average bed, perfectly adequate for a couple of nights. Clean bathroom and kitchen area, less clean couch/living area, but personally not an issue since I didn’t use it. Cosmos the cat is the cutest.

Billy was so welcoming, kind, and genuinely cared about what I was doing in my trip! I felt so safe at Billy’s place. Billy is such a kind person willing to share his lovely home with travelers. I will be coming back to Billy’s in the future!! Thank you Billy!

My daughter and I had a great time staying at Kevin’s place. The neighborhood was very cute with many walkable restaurants and stores close by. His place was exactly as described. We would love to stay here again for future visits.
Enese was extremely friendly and kind, the house was clean, without bugs or dust. The place looks exactly as the pictures. Beds were comfortable and quite neighborhood.

Jency's place was a good choice for my stay in NYC. The room and amenities were as described and everything was clean and tidy. It's in a very handy location for the subway and bus stops. Takes between 30 minutes and an hour to get to the sights of Manhattan depending on your destination. The neighbourhood felt safe and was quiet of an evening for a peaceful sleep, as was the household. A very good grocery store is a few minutes walk away and I appreciated the complimentary snacks Jency provided. The TV had plenty of free options to keep me entertained and the wi-fi is fast and reliable. Thanks for a pleasant stay :-)

Lexia’s place is a beautiful peaceful retreat. I spent six weeks here and I really felt like I was at home. From check-in to check-out it was a seamless process. The area is great and accessible to everything. There are great authentic restaurants in the area which I loved.
Everything was exactly how Lexia described it.
Additionally, Lexia was very responsive and accommodating. I will definitely recommend her Airbnb to everyone!
Great place for the cost! Very clean, right in the middle of everything!
it was a good stay.

Vanessa & Martin's place was great!  Very nicely set up - lots of little touches that make it nice.  Wonderful to sit in the back room with sun warming the desk in the winter.  And the neighborhood is lively and fun.  Enjoy!
good place to stay. Close to train so you can get anywhere easily
Great flat, great host
Great place

Квартира очень просторная. Очень хорошая кухня. Много кухонной посуды, есть тостер. очень удобно готовить. Отличный интернет. Расположение удобное, очень близко к метро и автобусной остановке, недалеко магазин продуктов Whole Food. Мне и жене очень понравилось. Инструкции четкие и понятные. Легкое заселение. Рекомендую!
Thank you Harvin! Great place to stay and close proximity to the subway into manhattan. Plent of space for the three of us, the rooftop was a huge plus.

Angelica was an amazing, super-responsive host! Her beautifully-appointed loft was very welcoming, just as described, and it was a pleasure staying in her accommodations! I'd recommend her space to anyone and would definitely rebook with her in the future! An amazing stay!

Great midtown location! The subway is close to the apartment. As a solo woman traveler I felt safe getting around. The room and bathroom were very clean and I appreciated that the room’s AC was easy to use and efficient. Love this spot and hope to stay there again!
We had a great stay. Our host was so accommodating and very helpful with our stay. I definitely recommend staying here. Close by the subway so travel was very easy.
good place to stay but cannot use the kitchenware. sometimes noisy outside. home is very clean, and have private room with lock

The house is super, and the dogs are sooo cute!
Clean, perfect location, and Ryan gave us good tips about restaurants and transportation.
Next time in NYC, Ill stay with them again.
Great place great host :)

If you’re looking for a fabulous & spacious 3 bedroom apartment within walking distance to literally everything; a subway, grocery markets/deli’s, restaurants, pizza, coffee, times square, shows, and shopping this is it! Easy to find and felt very safe in this neighborhood. I loved that it was on the first floor too! The apartment was very clean, kitchen stocked with all the essentials, all beds were comfortable and I appreciated nice comforters and the extra  blankets. Micheal was a great host and responded quickly to any questions and was accommodating to a little earlier check in for our luggage. I would definitely stay here again! What a wonderful Christmas & New Years experience in the heart of it all.

le quartier est tranquille même si une arrivée par le métro pourrait vous inciter a.penser le contraire...nous sommes restés 5 jours et zéro problèmes...le logement est grand soigné et la cuisine est impeccable !
This place was so nice & carefully thought out. Very clean & comfy stay. Would definitely book again

It was a pleasure staying in Greg's and Mateo's house. It felt like home from the first minute and their hospitality is amazing!
They were available at any time and supported us with recommendations whenever we asked for.
The room is very clean, well equipped and just lovely!
Check-in and check-out were very smooth.
The area is so beautiful and it felt like being in a series. There are so many nice restaurants around and it's very well located to take the metro.
We enjoyed our stay so much and it could not have been better!
Thank you so much, Greg and Mateo!

IDEAL location! We love Fort Greene and loved our stay here! Only a few minutes walk to all FG has to offer and a cozy, comfortable spot to come home to afterwards. Washer and dryer, full kitchen and air conditioning were key! Footsteps mentioned in host description were not an issue at all!
Great stay! Thanks!
My sister and I had a great time at Sharon’s house. It’s located right next to the subway and near supermarkets, delis and restaurants. Sharon was very convenient and helpful. I recommend.
The place was beautiful and easy to find. Everything was perfectly clean and gave us the calm experience we wanted as we were very tired. A modern home with just the right amount of space one needs!
Great place to stay if you are looking for clean, safe, and affordable.

No response to messages sent prior to checking in. A little trouble with the first room provided but they were quick to remedy. Location is not far from Columbus Circle and on the cusp of Time Square. Comfortable beds, coffee and tea every morning in the lobby, a definite plus!

L'allotjament es troba en una ubicació espectacular. El barri és agradable i tranquil, està súper ben comunicat amb Manhattan.
La Marie-Line ens va tractar molt bé tant en la rebuda com en el comiat, els moments en els que vam coincidir. Vam trobar un embús el dia que arribàvem i vam arribar més tard del que havíem parlat, la Marie-Line es va mostrar absolutament comprensiva i no ens va posar cap problema.
L'habitació és acollidora i de bones dimensions, està perfectament equipada. El llit era còmode. Això sí, pel nostre gust vam passar molta calor, havent de fer servir l'aparell d'aire acondicionat tota l'estona que estàvem a l'habitació, tot i ser les festes de nadal. A part d'això, tot perfecte. Repetiríem sense dubte.
Moltes gràcies, Marie-Line!
Friendly and very helpful.
Thank you for accommodating our needs and booking us on short notice.

Travelled alone and found this place in the middle of Williamsburg. A very cool place in a cool area. The place was perfect to stop by NY for a couple of days. It’s close to everything,  communication was good and Sofi was very helpful! Can recommend!

I must admit I was surprised by Gloria’s care and attention to detail. I stayed in Room #2 — comfortable bed, high-quality sheets, towels available, and a spotless bathroom with shampoo and soap. Easy check-in and a safe location. I ended up arriving later than planned, but check-in was still possible. I left for the airport early in the morning, and it’s definitely easy to get there by Uber or bus. I highly recommend it, especially for anyone looking for a place to sleep before heading to the airport.

An absolute gem of a place. Cozy, great design, spacious, amazing location. Truly giving that movie-esque "staying in Manhattan" fantasy. And huge props to Darin for being super receptive and welcoming! Loved my time here!

The apartment is spacious and aesthetically pleasing. The area where it is located in is very lively, mainly because it has all types of stores ranging from Footlocker right next to high end stores just a couple of minutes away. However, the Airbnb description pointed out that the apartment has two bedrooms when in fact it does not. What is described as a second bedroom is an attic containing a mattress. It is also important to point out that the apartment is located on the third floor of the building and has no elevator, this made it much harder to move in giving the fact that we had to physically carry our luggage up these three floors. In addition to this, the place was already full of the owner’s stuff. The fridge for instance was full in terms of space and most of the products inside were opened and used. The Pantry cabinets were filled with half used content and as a result we barely had space to put our own groceries and food. The living room also contained a clothing rack in the corner that was full of the owners clothing so we couldn’t fully unpack our luggage because there was no place to put our clothing and belongings. Last but not least, the air conditioning system in the unit was very frustrating because it would turn off on its own and it would change temperatures randomly during the night. We stayed in the unit during December when temperatures were very cold so the problem with the heater caused some of us to get sick and because of this we were forced to wake up in the middle of the night to readjust the air conditioning repeatedly.
The owner must advertise his apartment by giving a clear description of the bedrooms and the lack of elevator access, he must leave enough space for the belongings of his guests, and he must get the air conditioner system updated so that there’s no need to adjust it repeatedly throughout the day and night.

Very disappointing for a 17-night stay costing $15,807. Housekeeping was inconsistent despite repeated requests, and when done, often felt rushed — floors were frequently dusty and not properly cleaned. Several amenities were out of order — Bluetooth speakers didn’t work, Wi-Fi was down for three days, and the apartment kitchen lacked basics like a coffee machine and toaster. On arrival, we were told we could request cleaning anytime, but in practice requests were met with reluctance. Only after speaking to management did we learn city rules required full cleaning every other day with lighter cleaning in between — something never explained. We’d have been fine with that had we known, but instead it felt inconsistent and reluctant. At nearly $1,000 a night, we expected clear communication, consistent service, and working amenities. This stay didn’t deliver.
Yakima was super nice and helpful during our whole stay. The accomodation is ideal for two people and near metro. Recommended 👍🏻
Wir waren komplett begeistert, eine super Unterkunft zu sensationellem Preis in einer tollen Lage! Gerne wieder!!! Die Nähe zum Pier war der Hammer!

Herman et son chat sont adorables ! J’ai passé un super séjour, tout est propre, Herman donne de bons conseils, et très arrangeant! Le quartier est mignon! Merci pour tout! Je reviendrais sans hésiter :)

Donald and Peter are extremely kind people.  They made my stay very easy and they have a very good vibe.  They were always very helpful and cheerful. The apartment is very well located in the Bronx area.  The bedroom is well lit and the bed is super comfortable.  I highly recommend staying at Donald’s place!

A wonderful stay!
What a lovely home, everything was as pictured and Alex and Yoly were responsive and very helpful.
Would stay here again!
Ubicado en una buena zona de la ciudad, ideal si viajas solo y necesitas un lugar céntrico en donde quedarte.
Good location.  Close to Times Square and Rockefeller Center.  Walls are thin so can hear neighbors.  Clean hotel, nice sitting area on 1st floor, enjoyed our stay.

I had a very smooth one-night stay at Silvester's place. He's a really cool guy! Communication was easy and the place was very easy to find. I wouldn't say it's ideal for a long stay, but it's perfect for a couple of nights!

Communication with Aracelis was very easy. Her apartment is spacious and very well decorated. we would highly recommend this place to anyone who looks for a cosy and lovely place to stay in Williamsburg and to explore NYC.

Rory was very helpful.
The area is definitely safe to walk in evenings etc.
Very friendly people, quiet neighborhood.
10min walk to the train station.
Great location, friendly staff, easy process start to finish 🙌
Great location, the room is simple but it has everything you need for your stay.

It's a very New York City stay. You're going to have uneven stairs, they shower that goes off every 15 seconds, the noise of the streets. But it is a very doable location Central to going uptown or downtown.  You're two doors down from the Hyatt.
Good location to stay
Ofir is very responsive and a caring host

A nice apartment at a good price. Jose was kind enough to allow us an early check in. The room was clean, and just as advertised. Nice to have a full kitchen, and a remote to control the in-unit mini split.

Appartement idéalement situé à 3mn à pied d'une station de la ligne 1. C'était hyper confortable pour balayer tout manhatan. Beaucoup de commodités au pied de l'appartement, restaurant à table ou à emporter, supermarché de proximité. top emplacement.
quartier calme.
Silva est très réactive et arrangeante. Elle est même pro active et nous a demandé si on avait besoin de quelque-chose (serviette, papier toilette) durant le séjour. Elle nous a même laissé la possibilité de laisser nos bagages dans le logement pendant toute la journée le jour de notre départ parce qu'elle avait personne le soir.
Seul bémol le bruit qu'on entend chez les voisins. Ils sont pas spécialement bruyant mais l'isolation phonique entre les appartements est faible. Avec les boules kies que nous avions prévus cela n'a pas était dérangeant.
A faire sans hésitation!!?
Nice size space, definitely enjoyed staying here!

I stayed at Yeun-Ah over 10 days as I was coming to NYC for a business trip, but also wanted to enjoy the city a little bit as a tourist. The place is very accessible, next to the subway (literally) and you can go everywhere from there.
Yeun-Ah was always responsive and very helpful!
Thanks so much.
love NYC.   find a different place to stay for the money.   not great value at hotel 57 .   was disappoinntted but we didn't spend much time in the room.

Raheem is a very welcoming and accommodating host you can wish!
A very private person who never invaded my space. You will hardly meet him or the co-host but if you should, you will have a very pleasant chat with them.
Lugar pequeño pero limpio y céntrico. Me volvería a hospedar sin dudas!
