We had a wonderful time in this stylish, comfortable and perfectly situated apartment. It was safe, clean, air conditioned and spacious. The beds were luxuriously comfortable. A good stock of additional information about the area (great area; lively, diverse and friendly) and how to get uptown in an Information File that was clear and easy to read. The bathroom was well stocked with the basics and there were plenty of extra towels. Tons of interesting reading material on the bookshelves plus games and light reading on the coffee table. A great TV with all the streaming you could want with surround sound. It is obviously a private home but the environment is kept user friendly and accessible so you don't feel you are encroaching on someone else's space. We will definitely visit again.
Host is nice; place just as described.

There were communication gaps/issues leading up to my stay and also during check in. However, the space itself is comfortable and quiet. It's a ~15 mins walk to the nearest trains (C, 3, 4) and they are great lines to take you wherever you need to go!
Perfect! Spacious! Excellent location! Would 100% stay again!
Great location!

Such a cute and cozy apartment in Chelsea! The location is super safe and convenient, walkable to all sorts of restaurants and the subway station.
The apartment is very new, very well designed and equipped with all necessities, the window is facing the backyard so it’s quite and you won’t hear the busy street of the city.
Highly recommended!
Peaceful stay enjoyed every moment.
Buena con algunas falencias.
Eine schöne Unterkunft in Brooklyn um die Stadt zu erkunden. Die Wohnung hat alles was man braucht und wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden jederzeit wiederkommen. Paul ist ein super Gastgeber.
Share a bedroom of four , was with more space that I was expected. There is a full kitchen , with the fridge. Very useful, good position

Overall, we are pleased with our stay here. The location is perfect, close to Chinatown and Little Italy with a lot of nice bars and restaurants within walking distance of the hotel. The subway station is right at the door making it very convenient to commute to upper Manhattan.
The place can be maintained and cleaned better though. The drapes and carpets have a lot of stains. There were not enough towels in our room.
They’re also understaffed which makes sense because they’re a small business so they take longer to respond to messages and requests.
Also, I want to make a suggestion to the manager to put a fridge in the rooms. As much as we hate to waste food, we had no way but to throw away our leftover food due to the absence of a fridge in the room.
The appliances are also a bit cheap, they can provide higher quality appliances like TV and coffee maker.
Una estancia 100% recomendable, además Peter estaba siempre dispuesto a ayudar
This place feels just like home. I got some real good sleep in the bed. Apartment is clean and parking on the street was always available when I was there. Will def stay again.
Manchmal kommt wenig Wasser aus dem Wasserhahn und die wände sind dreckig, jedoch ansonsten wurde es jeden 2 tag geputzt und war allgemein sauber

Michael has a great space and location, I always feel safe there.  The place is very clean and has everything you would need.  The host is very nice and responsive.  I would definitely recommend this place and would stay again.
We have stayed here twice now and absolutely love the space and location!
Paula’s place was centrally located and easy to access!
Olga was nice letting us put our bags in advance of our stay. Great place with a warm welcome from the family. Great location: it is just one block away from the subway. Highly recommend!
Really

The apartment is really comfortable. The building is super secure! Security cameras everywhere! Great wifi!!
The location is awesome, you have B/D subway stations 1 block away and F/J too! We bought the 7 day pass for the subway and we reached everywhere we wanted.
Even at night the surrounding areas felt safe, except the Broome and Chrysti St corner (where the park is). There's a bunch of homeless people at night and the two times we went to buy groceries we felt kinda unsafe around there (but nothing really happened anyway)
There's a Target at Broadway/Lafayette station, which is walkable or a single subway stop (if you buy too much stuff to carry just take the subway)
Little Italy and Chinatown are really close, plenty of restaurants and fast food available.
Bring kitchen supplies! (Salt, oil, pepper, etc)
The laundry needs a card that costs 5usd and then you need 5usd per load (2.5
washing mch and 2.5 dryer).
Teresa provides a great experience at a relatively low cost. Location was clean and easy to find. Will visit again in the future if I have a chance.

We had a great stay at the Shelburne Sonesta, staff was really attentive and helped us every time we needed something. The location was perfect, walkable and near everything, while also being peaceful to sleep in. We would definitely return.

Great place, modern, clean, and comfy vibes. Although the space is quite compact, it has two bedrooms, two bathrooms, a kitchen, and a lovely large backyard as described, so it's suitable for family. Nice neighborhood with shops, restaurants, groceries and supermarkets within walking distance. Maurice and Teejay were great hosts, very responsive and attentive. Overall, me and my family had enjoyable stay in NYC.
Great stay and right near everything
Mike was great! Extremely helpful with things to do in the area etc! Made me feel right at home, highly recommend!

From the moment Carlos greeted me at check-in, I felt right at home. He and his wife Ivete were friendly, helpful and responsive. The room is comfortable and the house has great connections to the rest if NY. Will definitely return!

For 50$ per night you can’t expect more. It was my first time using Airbnb and I wasn’t disappointed. The place is clean and with the metro you’ll be in the city center within 15 Minutes. Overall great experience.
Nous avons passés un excellent séjour dans ce quartier de Bay Ridge, Brooklyn. Je recommande vivement ;)
Just as advertised.  Well located.  Clean and comfortable.

Great spot with an incredible view! Room is just as pictured, with lots of stores and restaurants near by. The subway to get into Manhattan (the Q) is about a 5-10 min walk.  hosts are very nice and super accommodating. Safe, comfortable, and affordable!
Great location.

This space is at a great location, close to public transit and eating areas. The room was extremely comfortable and well-laid out with linens, blankets, pillows, a desk, plants. Kitchen is well-stocked and the common area is cozy with fun books to look through. Tim is communicative, friendly, flexible, and great to talk to about travel. His recommendations for coffee and brunch were spot-on.

Gil is a very gentle and friendly person who shared his house with us. Despite the noise on Foster it is very silent and calm at Gil's place. It's a roomy place full of character. The bedlinnen and towels are soft and clean and  the (bath)rooms are clean as well. It's a place where we would like to come back to. There's just one thing which makes us doubt a little: the place is in need of maintenance, it doesn't look like the pictures anymore.
Great place, and very clean
Lovely unit totally updated. Spacious and comfortable. Great location for my need

La verdad que la atención de Doug fue increíble, desde primer momento nos hizo sentir muy bien, muy cómodos. Fue muy atento para recomendarnos lugares y todo a nuestro alrededor. Será un verdadero placer volver a su hospedaje, espero que sea pronto. Lo super recomiendo!

The location is excellent, with several restaurants and a 24/7 market conveniently nearby. It's within walking distance to the metro, making it easy to reach downtown. The host was welcoming and friendly, and the Airbnb was clean, comfortable, and cozy. I had no issues during my stay and would definitely return in the future!

très bon séjour chez Rory,
tout à fait conforme à l'annonce.
métro à 10mn à pieds pour Manhattan.
Environnement secure.
Lisa was a great host, very responsive, welcoming and understanding, would highly recommend her for your next visit choice!
Great location to see broadway shows and to enjoy fabulous meals in Hells Kitchen. Lovely hotel with amazing staff that were welcoming and easy to deal with. Will stay again!!

This place is great! It is exactly as pictured and described. It was spotless when we arrived. It is extremely nice and well appointed. We did some cooking in the kitchen, which was great. Bernadette provides all you need in terms of dishes, pots and pans, etc., plus some basics like oil, seasonings and the like. There were several nice touches like snacks left for us, coffee, tea and even couple of beers!
The place has a beautiful backyard/patio, great natural light and is so well decorated. It was really comfortable. The neighborhood is walkable with lots of restaurants, pubs, shops, coffee spots and even a grocery store very nearby.
Getting to NYC and elsewhere in Brooklyn was easy. There is a subway station one half block away.
Bernadette was very proactive in her communications and very friendly.
In case you have not noticed, this is a rave review. This place and Bernadette are just the best. I would live here if I could!

Convenient area and close to Penn train station. Beds are very comfortable. Basic accommodation in a run down building but we felt safe there and the hallways were quiet. It is a very small room with a bathroom attached.  I found the ventilation in the place poor. One window that opens to the centre of the building, not outside. Fans are provided and a loud air conditioner for which  I was offered ear plugs. Anna was helpful and quick to respond with any questions.
Stanza ottima per passare due notti, bagno piccolo ma pulito, buona posizione per esplorare i dintorni.

La casa è molto comoda, dotata di tutti gli accessori, arredata con cura, in una zona tranquilla con la stazione della metro raggiungibile in pochi minuti.
Earl è un anfitrione eccezionale: disponibile, discreto e sempre di grande aiuto.

Home was bigger than i expected, such a clean townhome.
Bus station to get to most subway connections.
I love the that there was dishes and a steamer that i could iron my family’s clothes with.
There was plenty of space for my family of 7,Enough towels and shampoo,conditioner and body wash to accommodate everyone.
Satisfactory stay with helpful staff

Great five day stay.
Felt right at home! Very quick to respond when I had a issue with the front Door.
I will be back!!! The place is spacious and much bigger then the pictures. Super
Clean and cozy!!!!
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Very clean and well equipped apartment, located about 30 min from Times Square. Communication was great. Would recommend to everyone
Our stay at Paris's apartment was great. The location is perfect as you can walk to various neighborhoods, bars and restaurants. I recommend staying here.

There was no microwave or refrigerator. You had to go downstairs to warm up you food but would you even want to if you can refrigerate it. They did have a communal refrigerator if you trust it. The lobby where they had the microwave and communal refrigerator was nice, clean, welcoming however if you don’t wan to have to get dressed up and/or socialize too early in the morning you would want a microwave or refrigerator in your room.

Great location and space. Convenient to public transportation and great restaurants. Great Front desk staff.
Host responsive to questions and request. Very quiet building.
Good place to stay the only i had a problem with parking. It was a big issue there. Otherwise it was good.
Such a wonderful stay! Convenient location, and absolutely gorgeous place. Will definitely be returning here next time we are in town!
good place
Russell’s place was in a great location, very clean and comfortable, and he was very communicative throughout our stay. Thank you!

The place and the neighborhood were great. The apartment was clean, private, and cozy and had everything you could ever need to cook a homemade dinner every night. Everything was clean, and it looked just like the pictures. The place is close to everything; supermarkets,  restaurants, laundromat,  all sorts of stores, it's about 15 to 20 minutes to 3 subway stations, it has clean linens and basic toiletries, and Kostas was very responsive and helpful with leaving our luggage earlier the day we arrived while the cleaning lady was there and with  everything else. Mind that the apartment has a flight of stairs in case you have knee or any sort of mobility problem, it is something to take on account. Thank you Kostas. We loved the place.
Great location and amenities
Great place. Would definitely recommend.

stayed here for 5days, 6 nights as a group of 8. location is great with easy access to the subway & plenty of places nearby to eat & get coffee. was great for what we needed it to be. would stay again

Dominic is an amazing host, and his place is beautiful. It appears there are on-going renovations on the ground level, which was confusing. The kitchen stove was still in wrapping, & the kitchen itself looked nothing like the pictures. It wasn't until later that we realized the kitchen in the picture is in the basement, and it is fabulous! The basement is also where the gameroom and access to the backyard is (which sports a fun "Greetings From New York" backdrop). There are bathrooms and showers galore, and the bedrooms are exquisite. There are fast food spots & sit down restaurants in walking distance, including a wonderful bodega on 149th & Broadway where you can literally get anything your heart desires 24 hours a day (including cheesecake & chocalate chip scones!) My only regret is we really didn't get to spend a lot of time in the unit due to the nature of our visit. If you are travelling with a large group, this is the place to stay. Kudos, Dominic. Thank you!

Just got home from our stay and Hotel Theta was absolutely perfect for our family of 4 (kids ages 4/9) conveniently located super close to Times Square in a good area with Starbucks close, the best dumplings every right across the street! We even extended our stay by a night, airbnb was more affordable than going through the hotel and the host responded within 30 mins of the request. We will definitely be back!

Great stay!  Easy check in and communication.  The indoor plants are exceptional, and along with the numerous books, I thoroughly enjoyed the place.  I was there in mid-August and low temps were in the 70's.  The fans were suitable, but I'd imagine the third floor apartment might get very warm in more extreme weather.  I'd love to come back in the Fall!

Matt and Ashlee were great hosts, the space was clean and comfortable, and the location is amazing.  The workstation setup was great for working remotely for a month.  The location provided easy access to Manhattan and was very central in Williamsburg.  Would definitely recommend staying here!
Great stay, looked exactly like the pictures. It is a busy area but it’s nothing too crazy! Felt comfortable and safe!
Had a great stay, felt safe the whole time and getting in was easy. The apartment was super close to public transit so we were able to get around pretty easily.
Great value for money, the elevators are stinky, not a full service hotel
Great deal in the city.

A quelques minutes à pied de time square.
Petit appartement ayant un cote vintage dans un vieil immeuble typique, dans une rue très vivante.
Great stay as always. Quiet, clean, and peaceful. You'll rest up well, and the location is ideal.

This spot is amazing! It’s an Airbnb that actually feels like it has been lived in so it’s very well stocked and cozy. Great location. Easy check in. Comfy beds. Dog friendly. WiFi was good and reliable for remote work. Very walkable. 10 min walk to Marcy / 8 min walk to Bedford stops. Natalia is very responsive. I hope to stay again in the future!

Victors place provided good value for a long weekend in New York. Furnishings are basic but functional. We stayed with our two young children and enjoyed having a second bedroom for that purpose.
The private parking was a fantastic perk!
We didn’t have the opportunity to explore the neighborhood, but we had no issues. We drove and exclusively used our car for getting around, it was a bit far from things with traffic but if your using public transportation my understanding is it’s pretty well connected.
Victor is a kind and attentive host and communicated well throughout our stay.
Overall it met our expectations!

Khadija’s place was wonderful, very well stocked with supplies, Very clean, and comfortable. She was very responsive and answered any questions I may have had for her in a very timely matter. I felt safe and the neighborhood was very quiet.

Donna was a warm and receptive hostess.
The neighbourhood was great for us because we love Caribbean culture and food and our friends live nearby.
Our stay at Chris‘ place was impeccable! We felt welcomed the moment we arrived, as Chris was incredibly friendly, helpful and accommodating. 10/10!

Andrew was a wonderful host! Listing was perfect for what we needed. Communication and recommendations were great, and the bed was very comfortable; which was much needed after walking all day. Would definitely stay here again.

Great location, walking distance to many amenities.
Air vents were very dusty and AC units had mold in them.
Great and convenient location. The listing was exactly as described. Ofir is a really responsive host. Thank you!
Really comfy place with a good location
Okolica nieciekawa, spory kawałek do przejechania metrem , mieszkanie zgodne z oferta, polecam. Wybrałam świadomie.

This apartment was ideal for a month-long visit during the winter. The location is astonishingly convenient, with numerous public transport links and useful stores nearby. The apartment itself would be quiet by any standards; by Manhattan standards it is close to miraculous. The owner is close at hand, and very willing to help, but does not intrude in any way. Within hours I was comfortably at home, and I was sorry to leave after 30 days. Highly recommended.
Très bon séjour chez Chris, logement propre et conforme à la description, métro à proximité pour se rendre à Manhattan. Chris est un hôte très serviable. Je recommande ce logement.

This was an excellent place to stay in NYC. The location is perfect, safe and close to everything.  It was important for us that it had a kitchen with pots, cups, cutlery,  etc. , all provided. There is a supermarket two blocks away; don't forget to bring your own salt and cooking oil. Even though you can hear the outside noise during the day/evening, it was surprisingly quiet during the night. We highly recommend the place to budget travelllers!

Stayed here while I was in town for a music festival and it was perfect. Close to public transit, had a few late night food options in the area, and the room was clean and as described in the listing. Kumar and his wife always responded quickly to any messages and were flexible with the check-in time when my flight got in early.

We had a fabulous time at the loft apartment. It was a great size for NYC and a good location. Less than 10 minute walk to Grand Central Terminal. As mentioned in other reviews you have to use the stairs, but isn’t too much of an inconvenience. Hosts were great to communicate with and we were able to leave our luggage in the building once we had checked out on the last day.

Finding the hotel was easy and it’s conveniently next to the Times Square-42nd St subway entrance. The room was a bit smaller than it looks in the picture but the place was clean and comfortable. Location wise it is close to a lot of restaurants and stores. Bryant Park is a five minute walk away and a great place to enjoy a cup of coffee or a bagel. Overall, I had a great time!

My stay at this apartment was perfect for what I was looking for. It’s a small studio, but has everything you need and a great city view that includes The Empire State building. The location is convenient and the host was very responsive when needed. I would definitely recommend this apartment and host.
very clean! The bed was a little rough but didn’t expect much from a couch bed. Not too far from subway or bus routes so that was nice!
Great place, Jack is very friendly and responsive. Apartment is close to subway making it easy to access any destination in Manhattan.

Was told I need to be nice over the phone, but I guess he didn't think calling him 4 times just to get let in was not irritating. The rooms had no AC had to complain just to get something put in but had to wait till the following day.

The place was very homely and clean especially warm I would definitely recommend it and they checked on me too which was nice. The bathroom was clean it was like being in a family home very nice thank you for accommodating us will definitely book again.

Great location and great apartment.
HOWEVER…
This listing is associated with a property rental company. A few days out they cancelled my Airbnb then didn’t offer me a solution until I made it an issue. Once they came up with a solution, they could only rent to me until ten days after my arrival.
There was also brown water occasionally but hey this is NYC. Unfortunately there was also an issue with the bathroom ceiling and when their maintenance guy came into my place unannounced, without a heads up that he was coming (no time window given), I found myself in my underwear staring at a stranger in my apartment. Not a great customer experience.

Nice little studio in Brooklyn, easy access from JFK, I liked the minimalist decoration, everything was functional. The only thing is that the hallways and outside can be a bit noisy at night, you might want to take that into consideration before booking if you like quieter places or if you are a light sleeper. Some parts of the neighborhood might feel a little unfriendly at night but overall it is a lovely area. James and Laureta are great hosts and they answered all of my questions very quickly. Would recommend if you are looking for a cute place to sleep near New York.
It was a great half of the year, what we spent with my wife in that apartment! Everything was so nice, especially interior design.
Great place. Chris was friendly. Was a great place to stay for a night, in a good location.
Amamos a nossa escolha ! Excelente localização. A limpeza e disposição dos quartos tbm é ótima e o staff é super atencioso

We had an amazing stay at Adam’s apartment. The location is perfect: quiet yet not scary; good restaurants especially for breakfast; veeery close to the subway station!
The house was clean and had everything we needed and even more than that. Adam always answered very quickly and we really felt like at home. :)
It was really nice! Condition, location was really great. 항궁잉등잉 잉용항싱당명 동넹강 종긍 뭉성웅숭동 잉성용😀

I had good time at this place. Upon arrival, the apartment smelled really good and clean, it matched the description. It was nice and cozy, very homely. Me and my wife had a relaxed stayed here, peaceful and comfortable.
Edgar has been great all throughout, very accommodating & quick to respond. Place is accurate and perfect for it's price!
I honestly would like to stay there every time I come to New York! Very nice!
Jahasfa’s place was amazing ! Walking distance to bus stops and train stations. Stores and food close by walking distance. And he responded quickly and checked in
Great stay 🗣️
It really nice quiet I will definitely comeback

Overall we had a great stay. There was a bit of a mishap with the cleaning of the unit but the host made it right with minimum inconvenience. The unit itself was great and suited our needs. The A/C units were a bit finicky (had to reset the remotes a few times).
Will definitely stay again.
It is clean and near time square.

This was an amazing place to stay, and Joanna is an amazing host. I ended up having a small personal emergency as I was checking out, and Joanna was flexible, let me stay a little later, was incredibly helpful and responsive. Just a truly kind host.

Great BnB! having the privacy and your own bathroom along with a kitchenette was a game changer for being in New York. The place was as described and location was near a lot of good restaurants/public transit.
Highly recommend if you need to be in NYC for awhile and want to stay in a neighborhood with the locals!
Calm stay

This was hands down the BEST Airbnb experience of my life!! I travel often and have stayed in countless places across the country. I came to New York for my graduation with family and wanted everything to be perfect, and thanks to Chad, Adam and their incredible team, it truly was.
From the moment we arrived, they went above and beyond in every possible way. They helped us with our luggage (which is such a rare luxury in NYC), and the first unit we stayed in was immaculate😍 so clean, stylish, and thoughtfully designed it felt like we were staying in a boutique hotel. It was trendy, cozy, and the perfect home base for such a special occasion.
We loved the space so much we extended our trip and moved into another one of their brand-new units. Even though it didn’t have any reviews yet, they took the time to personally send us walkthrough videos and answer every single question we had just to put us at ease. Who does that?! These guys CARE. Genuinely.
They made everything so special
tres déçu j'y retournerai jamais notre hôte ne répond jamais à nos questions

I wish I didn’t have to write my first negative review. There was trash piled in the hallway the entire trip and when we arrived. The listing said air conditioning, but there wasn’t any when we showed up the week of a heat wave. Penny remedied that with two window box air conditioners the next day (after telling us to “crack a window” when all the windows were open), but only in the bedrooms. The rest of the place was sweltering. I also had to wipe a significant amount of dust and dirt off them. Whoever installed them left two of the TVs blaring and track lighting on, which scared the hell out of us when we got back. Something black and moldy fell from one of the ceiling fans in the living area. Maybe an old balloon? Looked like moldy fruit. The guy downstairs blared music/TV all hours day and night. Weed smell was so strong wafting up the stairs that it filled the apartment. And I’m not kidding you…. A few nights in, the bed broke underneath me. I don’t weigh that much. We also coughed a lot whenever we were in the apartment. I assume it was the dirt caked on the windowsills, but maybe there’s mold? Truly the worst Airbnb experience.

Malgrés quelques inconvénients durant notre séjour, velma à su répondre rapidement à nos demandes.
C'est un appartement assez ancien avec quelques réamenagement moderne, l'appartement se situe à 15min à pied d'un métro. quartier plutôt calme, prévoyez tout de même vos boules quies si vous êtes sensible au bruit.

Seamless checkin, great host! Had a wonderful stay and he made our experience memorable. Place was exactly what we were looking for and looked exactly like the photos. It was clean and had great amenities. Would definitely book again. Thank you, Jas!
Another wonderful stay at Leo's place! Great host, always responsive and helpful, and the place is super clean, very quiet for a NYC location, and awesome neighborhood!

I had a really nice stay in Nuoyas place. Felt very safe and residential, ideal for me as solo traveler. Had everything I needed. Also conveniently close to subway stations and walking distance to Central Park, and the Met.
The studio is located in a very calm street of Brooklyn, close to a metro station. It was very clean, easy to access and the hosts were very reactive by messages. Highly recommend! :)

Een geweldig leuk en sfeervol appartement met drie slaapkamers. Gelegen op een steenworp afstand van Central Park en met een metro station schuin tegenover de ingang. Ook winkels op loopafstand.  Van daaruit hebben we bijna een week lang in New York allerlei activiteiten gedaan. We komen graag nog een keer terug.

Jonathan’s place was amazing, clean, safe and had fantastic amenities.  Communication was always fast and on point, checkin was easy and fast.  We spend Thanksgiving week, my two boys, my husband and mother in law and felt right at home.  We had all we need with everything close by.  Thank you, Jonathan.  Highly recommended.

Friendly and welcoming hosts in a well kept and well decorated location. Walking distance to several highly rated food and drink options. Very walkable to subway. Easy to coordinate check in and check out. Offered great local recommendations on request. Great value. Would recommend to others.

Enjoyed my stay. Tara has been cleaning the common places everyday! The room is small, perfect for short stay. The neighborhood is quiet and peaceful. Close to metro, laundry, deli. The communication was excellent, Tara response literally in minutes. Would stay there again!
This apartment is at a perfect location. It has a nice bathroom and the room is also pretty big for a single person to stay in. Giac was a cool host and help me out when I needed certain things.
Very spacious charming  place with a beautiful backyard. Eleonora has been so nice and extremely caring. Check in could not be easier. Highly recommended!!

Tyrone's home is beautiful and modern. The amenities are top notch and thoughtful. All of our needs were met, including the ones we didn't anticipate. He communicated well and was available for any questions/comments/concerns. I would highly recommend staying here, you won't be disappointed!
This place is awesome!!!

Yves' lovely apartment was in the perfect position for our family, being around the corner from my daughter and her family. Our visit to New York was to celebrate a significant birthday and a wonderful wedding. Ten of us, including 2 children, stayed comfortably in the apartment, which has generous and well-appointed facilities. The communal area, kitchen, dining, lounge and adjacent outdoor space were fantastic. Impeccably clean, Yves' apartment is a most accommodating family home. The location is perfect for shopping and transport. OUr host responded quickly to our inquiries and our requirements during the stay. We strongly recommended this rental for families.
Great value stay! I would book again.
Great stay excellent location walking distance to a lot of activities, parks, shopping, food, you name it!
Thank YOU for allowing us to enjoy such a wonderful home in Maspeth.  We appreciate your hospitality and generosity in assisting us on our vacation in NY.
Caseys place was great! Overall really fantastic experience, the bathroom was smaller than I expected, but bedroom/living space was great!
One of the best places we have stayed at!  The hosts are incredibly kind and welcoming.  The apartment is in a very lively and vibrant part of Brooklyn.  Highly recommend staying here.
Great location I would stay again

Would definitely stay here again! It was in an excellent location, very close to Grand Central Station, very walkable. Close to great food and markets. It was clean and comfortable, a perfect place to stay!
Loved it was right in the middle of Manhattan a lot of places were walkable would go there again

Cam was amazing to work with. His home is beautiful, immaculately curated and so comfortable to stay in. I had zero problems with access and Cam was super flexible and kind when I needed to extend. Will definitely be booking again. The location itself was perfect for me, but for others not working in Fidi, it's super close to the Fulton street station which gives you all the access to New York quickly.
fiquei muito feliz com a estadia, lugar bom, confortável, fácil acesso para o metrô, Sandra e Cary são muito atenciosos, me senti em casa.

What an AMAZING Chinatown gem!! My daughter and I had a wonderful stay in Manhattan, and Alisa’s place was comfortable, clean, and peaceful “home base” after our daily adventures. Alisa was super flexible with allowing us to bring our bags in a little early, and was immediately response with any questions I had. What a perfect, cozy spot to enjoy a trip to NYC!
The host and the cleaning lady were very friendly and even let us drop our bags earlier than 3’o clock.
We really enjoyed our stay. The staff was amazing. It was our anniversary, and guest services provided suggestions of great places to dine. We would most definitely look to stay again.

The apartment is the top floor above where Kelly lives; she was very friendly and made sure we had everything we needed. I loved the decor, comfortable furnishings and old Brooklyn charm. The three bedrooms and two sitting rooms was a perfect layout for our family both for sleeping and for privacy while working. Not a full kitchen but it works great if you’re mostly eating out.
Perfectly ok
It felt like home :)

The stay was exactly as expected. I am very thankful that I booked this place. The location was phenomenal and a walkers paradise. The room was as pictured. The communication with the hosts was great, and I’d definitely stay at this location again given the opportunity. What a great stay!

Very nice apartment. Clean and cozy. Everything that you would need you can find inside. Always nice to have parking spot on a back. Nice hostess. Response time of any of your concerns is fast. Highly recommended.
A wonderful studio in a excellent neighborhood.  We stayed for a month and hated to leave. Lena was the perfect host.

Très bon séjour d'une semaine chez Brady. J'ai particulièrement apprécié la facilité de l'accueil, avant notre arrivée nous avons eu toutes les consignes nécessaires. Nous n'avons pas eu la chance de rencontrer nos hôtes mais Brady à toujours été très réactif et agréable lors de nos échanges par messages. Le logement est très bien situé que ce soit à proximité de certaines lignes de bus ou du métro. Le quartier est calme,  nous n'avons pas été importuné par du bruit. Le coin cuisine est très appréciable également et nous a permis de prendre les petits déjeuners sur place. C'est une affaire de goût, mais la déco est top ! :) Notre chambre (n°4) était très belle, et la literie très confortable. Bon séjour à ceux qui suivront !

It was my first time out in Rockaway, and we had a wonderful time, and Tara's cottage is superb -- very comfortably and well furnished, great outdoor space to also enjoy, and an easy 5 to 10 minute walk to some restaurants and the beach, but Tara was also amazingly friendly and helpful and happy to offer to drive us somewhere if we needed, which we did not -- but that is a perfect example of how thoughtful and helpful she is. Definitely would stay here again on future visits!

We loved staying at Dylan's house - it's even better than the photos! Perfect location and host - I was nervous about the stairs for my two year old and Dylan offered to buy a baby gate. Hope to stay here again!

We loved our stay! The place was suuuper cute and clean! The neighborhood isn’t too bad. It was for an short getaway, so it was perfect. Shafeqa was extremely responsive and gave great advice on where to get a good pedicure! Definitely would stay again

you are in new york, so everything is loud,  we were lucky, we had cool neighbors on the floor, but u hear everything... if you are tall , the shower feels small and it is hard to enter.

It is located in a very exciting area, Greenwich village, close to Washington square park. Very good access and convenient to go to upper, lower Manhattan, and Brooklyn, 24/7. The apartment is relatively spacious enough for one or two people to stay comfortably. They offer some kitchen ware, dishes, and cups, and it was very helpful for me.
I chose this room because I wanted to feel as if I lived in the popular area in NYC but not stay in hotels as a traveler, and that was exactly how I could feel during the stay.
Very accommodating.

such an amazing place ! Decent distance away from manhattan but such an easy commute! Pia was so kind and so were all her neighbors!! Hopefully you get to see the cute orange cat that hangs around the neighborhood!!

Honestly, the place was really nice. I enjoyed my two night stay here and I’d recommend it to anyone looking for an affordable place. The hall did smell like weed (not the hosts fault) but the rooms smelled fine. The bed sheets weren’t the cleanest so I did mark it down for that but it really isn’t a bad stay. The hosts were great to speak with and very helpful. The previous bad reviews on here must have been before some serious changes. I would stay again.
Great place for kids. Super comfortable. Back yard is great . Neighborhood is quiet.  Was a perfect place for us. For any families visiting New York I recommend this place .

A great place to stay on a budget! Thanks Tash for being so helpful.

Second time staying at Faysal’s. The place was just as perfect as it was last time I stayed here.

If you need a room with more than two beds this place works great. Very convenient and cozy.  Close to the subway and an easy walk to everything we wanted to do. Fernando responded very quickly to my messages and resolved the only issue we had promptly. Would stay again.
A comfortable studio apartment in the heart of Astoria. You’ll have everything you need for a comfortable stay.

This is a great place to stay. The place is comfortable. The neighborhood is peaceful. Hosts and neighbors helpful. Subway, laundry services, grocery store, bar and restaurants all in close proximity. It all added to a great first time New York experience.
Elizabeth is a very kind host who really tries to make you feel at home
Great place! The place was very clean and felt new/fresh. Loved the aesthetic, definitely felt like home away from home.
Great stay, super cute house!

Anthony é muito simpático e prestável. O apartamento está situado a 10 minutos a pé de uma estação de metro. A viagem até Times Square dura cerca de 15 minutos.

O quarto fica numa mezanine e em dias de calor é verdadeiramente muito quente, até porque não tem ar condicionado. As janelas são de vidro simples e por isso ouve-se muito o barulho da rua. ( o que em Nova Iorque, é constante e habitual).
O apartamento estava limpo e tem tudo o que se necessita, tanto para o banho como para cozinhar). A um minuto a pé, tem supermercados e restaurantes.
A relação qualidade preço, para Nova Iorque, é bastante aceitável.

Amazing location and exceptionally clean. We loved our stay here! You have everything you need and the communication is stellar. There are amazing eateries all around and everything we needed and the areas we needed to get to (Brooklyn Bridge and NYC City Clerk) felt very close by. They even left us a special surprise since we were having and celebrating a life event. Would definitely recommend this happy little abode in Brooklyn Heights.

The kitchen was incredibly dirty and housed an infestation of bugs. I reported this to AirBnB and the host tried to DENY the condition of their space but luckily I did not leave before getting photos and videos. It’s one thing to have an infestation and another to lie.

Great Place, Clean, Love the location. A great restaurant to try is “Las Margaritas” Great food. The building is quiet and peaceful. 10/10 recommend anytime to go and stay at there place . If u want to stay at a later check out there’s a fee. Aswell as an early check in.
Everything as described would book the accommodation again.
Convenient location and everything is as presented! Thank you, Alberto!

Genial apartamento, tiene todo lo que necesitas para una buena estancia en la ciudad de Nueva York, todo estaba limpio e impecable cuenta con todos los servicios y lo mejor de todo es que a dos cuadras tienes una terminal de metro para poder ir a donde quieras de manera muy rápida y cómoda, el anfitrión muy amable y siempreatento a cualquier situación
Good location 5 min walk to G line and a small supermarket at the end of the road.

We had a great trip. Catia’s place is close to trains and entertainment. Yet it’s not loud at her place at all. Good space for NYC with lots of extras and local flavor. Our host Catia was on it the whole time with replies and reminders. Catia even had a Met Museum pass available.
We like exploring on foot. 5 min to Hudson Riverwalk or Highline, Whole Foods. 20-30 min walk to Theaters and clubs. 5 min to trains. 20-30 min ride on subway to CPark , Met, Brooklyn bridge, and more. Enjoy!
beautiful, modern, spotless apartment with great location in Brooklyn

clean, with microwave, small but not uncomfortable.

"Staying with Jodi was an absolute pleasure! As a frequent traveler who appreciates excellent hospitality, I was blown away by the attention to detail and care they provided. The property was spotless, well-equipped, and exceeded expectations in every way. Jodi was incredibly responsive and made sure everything about our stay was perfect. It’s clear why they’re a Superhost, and I’ll definitely be back on my next trip!"

The place was wonderful, we have full access to all the subway route and near Central Park was such a wonderful experience. We wouldn’t recommend walking around at late hours, however it’s decent and the room were great for us.
I enjoyed my stay at Charles’s place. The place was clean and had all the necessary amenities. Lots of good restaurants within a few blocks and  the subway station is just a 15 min walk.
It was a nice trip. Very accommodating & kind.
Muy buena estadía
Great spot with thoughtfulness in all the little areas. Everything worked great and it was easy and accessible. Would stay again.
Loved it
We loved the apartment for our short trip. It's easy to get to Manhattan with the Metro in about 15 minutes. We would definitely reccomend staying here!
El lloc és fantàstic, està super ben situat.

We stayed here for almost about a week and loved every moment of the stay. Skip is very friendly, great host. It is a very quiet place. I am definitely coming back to Skip place again and again. Highly recommend for anyone looking to stay in and out of NY, this is the place.
And above all, my two new friends Caesar and Apollo very friendly cats, no noise nothing at all. They are super adorable, easy to fall in love with.
Please do check out Skip place, it is worth.

We had a wonderful 3-night stay at this Upper West Side apartment! The location is unbeatable—just a short walk to Central Park and surrounded by amazing restaurants and cafes. The apartment itself was spotless, with a well-equipped kitchen that made it easy to cook when we felt like staying in. The beds were super comfortable, and everything was just as described. Perfect for a relaxing and convenient NYC getaway. Highly recommend!
Great place to stay. Stayed there with my two boys and we had such a fun time. Easy access to museums and subway.
Beautiful Stay, great neighborhood super close to the beach! Private parking, which is awesome.
Anastasiya's listing was beautiful.  she was a gracious host, had an awesome dog, and was friendly in spite of my haste in booking and late night return from an evening on the town.

Alojamiento grande y espacioso, nos alojamos 6 personas, no había suficiente menaje para todos y había algún desperfecto que no dudaron en arreglar cuando nos pusimos en contacto con Morais.
Para de metro a 10 min para ir al centro de Manhattan (30min).
Recomendable para ir en familia.

El apartamento es independiente y es muy cómodo y amplio. La cocina completamente equipada, todo bien organizado y limpio. El barrio es tranquilo y seguro. Varios comercios a pocos minutos. Hay una estación de metro a tan solo 12 minutos a pie, también hay opciones de bus a 5 minutos. El viaje al centro de Manhattan toma unos 40 minutos.
Amelia es una excelente anfitriona, siempre estuvo preocupada para que tengamos una muy buena estadía, respondía oportunamente nuestras preguntas. Si alguna vez volvemos a NY sin duda nos hospedaremos en el apartamento de Amelia.
Couple of issues came up but was very responsive in fixing. Could be a tad bit cleaner but overall great experience, location, etc.

Die Unterkunft bei Penpa hat uns grundsätzlich gefallen. Wir waren eine Woche dort. Mit dem Bus kam gut in die Stadt. Das Zimmer war groß und sauber.
Das einzige was uns nicht so sehr gefallen hat war die Dusche, ich denke sie ist ein wenig renovierungsbedürftig oder müsste grünich gereinigt werden.
Luxury house

Everything was perfect, but one day we put the keys back
Inside the key lock box and when we returned it was very difficult to reopen the key lock box. We got in touch with Ariana right away, but we were panicking because we were going to be late to somewhere. Then I used my phone charger to push the black lever down and it finally opened. It might need some WD-40 or other spray to loosen it up. Anyways, we didn’t put the key back in there after that.

Location was great, but that was the extent of it.
I mostly didn’t stay in the place but on my last night I noticed several roaches in the apartment. At one point three of them scurried across the kitchen counter when I turned the light on and I couldn’t sleep through the night. I had issues w the WiFi service as well. The lights were not intuitive to turn on. The host asked me not to leave a bad review, but I doubt this place could be salvaged.
Great location and great host. Will come back!!
Good price for bigger groups!! Super close to the subway and good options for food close by. Would 100% stay there again!
Super hôte à l'écoute appartement à 10 mn de jfk proximité du métro et du bus nikel

Had a great stay for 6 nights, perfect location and best way to see New York, local area surrounded by bars , restaurants, pool hall, dinners, coffee shops, bakery's, takeaways etc. Subway only 5 minute walk, and you can be in downtown Manhattan, 5th Avenue / Times Square within circa 20 minutes of walking out the door, located best for JFK ( Rather than Newark  ) , subway cheap, MAX charge within 7 day period is 12 trips charged / $34.80. ( or $2.90 / trip up to 12 charges ) using contactless (must use same card)  Accommodation all as per photos, set off the main street,  Host was very responsive & all amenities provided, fast wi-fi, also tea / coffee / snacks / water etc. provided. Access to the property is via front door then a flight of stairs, to access apartment on first floor. (So you will have to carry case up a short flight of stairs ) if travelling to NYC again, and only require two rooms, this will be our go to. Thanks again to the hosts for a perfect stay.

Amazing place to stay if you want to be right in time square!
The staff were incredible - very welcoming & outgoing. I was at a different hotel the night before and my room was very small with a window view of a brick wall, and since it was my first time in NYC I thought that was standard, but when I arrived at the Crowne Plaza and saw a spacious room with a great city view (for the same price!) I was very happily surprised. The bed was also super comfy!
There is a café and a restaurant / bar on the lobby floor which is very convenient for when you want to get something quick on your way in or out and don’t want to deal with the craziness of time square.
I would definitely stay here again if I was planning to be in the area :)

Our stay at Rebecca's was great. The location is close to amazing restaurants and bars in Brooklyn, and it is super easy to get to Manhattan. The room was clean and cozy, and the hosts were very friendly. The apartment is the most gorgeous thing ever! I highly recommend staying here.

This is a very cute typical New York City studio in one of the most vibrant area of the city. Easy access, great communication, and a place with very nice personal details. I would definitely come again!
Great apartment in a great location. Surprisingly clean and quiet and Paola is quick to answer questions. Would recommend!

Wir haben uns wirklich wohl gefühlt - die Wohnung ist mit der U-Bahn sehr gut von Manhattan aus erreichbar. Die Ausstattung ist genau so wie angegeben und die Wohnung sehr sauber. Jonathan reagierte immer schnell auf Nachrichten und ließ uns genaue Anweisungen insbesondere zum Check-In zukommen. Gerne wieder!
A true gem a stone's toss away from Prospect Park. Spacious, clean, and accessible with plenty of great neighborhood spots up and down Vanderbilt St. I couldn't recommend more highly!
Great value for a great location.
Very kindle and available host. The room it’s exactly the pictures

I cannot say enough about Mario and this space. This was our first experience with an airbnb. It was by far the best thing we have ever experienced in any hotel. Mario was awesome to talk to and helped with any questions we had. The space was immaculate and just like pictured. There were tons of small touches that were there that he didn't even have mentioned in the amenities. It truly was a great experience for me and my family all the way around. We couldn't have asked for a better place to stay in the Bronx. We will be booking again with Mario very soon as we travel there often.

The apartment was accurate to the pictures and truly is a large space for a one bedroom. It accommodated us perfectly. The beds were comfortable and the place was clean.
There are plenty of restaurants close by to try plus pharmacies, delis, and grocery stores to pick up necessities.
It is walking distance to broadway theaters as well.
Getting to JFK airport was easy using the subway and Airtrain.
We would stay here again if we were to visit the area again.
Thank you!!!
Great place close to JFK . Would highly recommend !

Loved the place. It’s so cute and calm, I live literally 10 mins from there so it felt good to get away from my own house . Maria was extremely understanding and really sweet. I recommend you book on a weekend if you want to play music and have a few guest over. During the week, don’t, unless you want peace and quiet the whole time.
The most important for me that this place was very clean and very good location
Easy street parking, communicative and accommodating hosts, and a very clean environment; would definitely recommend! Thank you for an amazing stay!

L'alloggio di Lucy è perfetto: pulito, confortevole, dispone di tutto il necessario per la casa, silenzioso e vicino alle fermate della metropolitana. corrisponde esattamente alle foto dell'annuncio. Lucy è stata un host molto disponibile, flessibile e reattiva. Di sicuro soggiorneremo di nuovo in questa casa quando ritorneremo a NY. Consiglio a tutti questo alloggio!

Hello .  You don’t go there . He is super Cruel he didn’t  like  me . He didn’t accept me out of the blue. He is creepy. He told me come to 2 pm to dos Check in then he says   no then yes . He is bipolar . I call Airbnb and then they gave me my money back after many calls . DONT STAY HERE ever . 🙏🙏🙏

I can’t say enough about Joy’s place. It was exactly what we needed during a stressful week. It was our heaven and place of rest. Joy is a great communicator and her photos are on point. Her house is very charming and looks exactly like the photos. I’m “Mr. Security”, as my wife calls me, and I felt very safe any hour we may have come back to the house. It’s perfectly located and very close to Midwood HS, PS 152 and Brooklyn College. It’s also close to the transportation hub of the area the Brooklyn Junction (Flatbush Ave and Nostrand Ave) where you can catch a train to NYC or a bus to other areas in the borough. Anyway, I would highly recommend this place. You will not be disappointed.

Very pleasant and peaceful place. Loved that we got a private bathroom. The room was spacious. Missed a queen size bed though, but still very comfortable bedding. Had to request the heat be turned on each day, had that been under the guests control, it would have been even better. But Rene was always responsive and timely.

We loved our stay here! We knew we'd be out and about most of the time, so we wanted a quiet, clean, peaceful home base that was still conveniently close to everything, and this fit the bill. The bed was comfortable, the apartment was clean, the hosts were responsive and the check in and check out process was smooth. It was easy to get to the subway station from there, and the neighborhood was quiet and calm. (I saw a few reviews saying the neighborhood was sketchy and that made me lol -- maybe if you're from the suburbs or a rural area, but I live in a city too, and there is nothing sketchy about the neighborhood by city standards haha).I would definitely stay here again.
Nice stay. Louann was nice and did her best for her guests.
We stayed on the eleventh floor and had a magnificent view! The Oculus was located right across the street. Where there were a number of places to shop and access to the subway.

Good place to stay. Host was very helpful as far as directions and very responsive. Said it was hotel like amenities and didn’t have extra towels or toiletries. AC/heat wasn’t accessible to be changed, host was helpful to change it whenever needed..

Jacqueline’s space was everything! Very clean, spacious and in a great location. She was very accommodating with our different requests and responsive. Definitely consider staying here if you’re in Brooklyn!

I would highly recommend this spot for a group 4-5 people! Plenty of space, sparkling clean, very comfortable beds, fully stocked kitchen, and very safe location. Natalie was very responsive and accommodating!! 5 stars!! :)

Our stay was awesome! Herman was extremely attentive & accommodating. The apartment was beautifully decorated & has a cozy “home” like aura. Great over all experience. We would absolutely stay here again.
Great accommodation - well stocked with plenty of amenities

This was a great stay. Much bigger than expected and they graciously provide a cleaning service during your stay. The folks at the front desk were wonderful and make a special effort to remember your name.
Sehr netter Host, antwortet schnell und ist sehr hilfsbereit, seinen Guide kann ich empfehlen und die Unterkunft war soweit auch super, gute Anbindung zur Subway
I love it and I will stay again

This host and her place is amazing! Especially for how caring and her hospitality with me in this trip, I would definitely recommend this place no just because her place feel like home but also because of the great host she is !!
Все было хорошо, очень уютная комната, в которой все было. Вернусь еще
Had a great stay for almost 2 months and liked it a lot there :)
Nice clean apartment that did what I was looking for. Good location and comms from Hamza
Great place to stay, host was great, clean and friendly. Place was worth the price.
The house was as pictured. The landlord was attentive and apologetic when issues arouse and tried to resolve things in a timely manner.   The balcony and parking in driveway were a plus!

Marianny's apartment was picturesque, fragrant, and extremely comfortable.  The beds were so soft and were welcome respites after full days of travel and walking around Manhattan.  The kitchenette has everything one could need for eating on the go (except for your food, of course!)... including a variety of local delivery menus fitting a variety of tastes.  The distance to the Metro line is ideal, and the neighborhood was quiet, even at night - so much so that my daughter and I felt relatively safe walking home from the Metro at midnight after a Broadway show (keep your city senses/wits about you).  Marianny responds to messages extremely quickly whenever I had a question and checked in with us appropriately, which as a host, I appreciated.  Kacey, the manager, greeted us and was always available to us for questions or help.  I would most definitely look to stay here again should we return to the City.
Responsive host and great area!
great location,  clean, easy check in and bag storage. would recommend,  especially for a group of 6
Everything was great.
Amazing.  So gorgeous. So peaceful. Beautiful sunlight through the windows, comfiest bed, right by the L train. Perfect!
Great location, room as in the pictures. I highly recommend it

Great location. Host is very quick to answer questions. Be prepared for the bathroom and shower, they are not attached but that is advertised. Room is next to the street, which can get a bit noisy at night. Room itself is very nice. Overall, great stay.
Great stay will do again

Le logement est situé à environ 50 minutes en ligne directe de métro pour manhattan, et à 5 minutes à pied du métro.
Bien que le quartier ne paraisse pas très sûr au premier abord, nous n’avons eu aucun soucis que ce soit le matin ou le soir même tard (jusqu’à 23h) pour revenir en métro (famille avec enfants).
Le logement est beaucoup plus grand que sur les photos, il est très propre et les lits sont confortables. Toutefois le canapé lit peut être juste pour 2 adultes.
Le logement est plutôt calme malgré des voisins du dessus bruyants lors de notre séjour (plus calme après leur avoir signalé le bruit). Hôte réactive quand nous lui avons signalé le souci.
The place was very good and set up very nicely. Candia was a very helpful and responsive host.
Logement absolument parfait au cœur de Manhattan ! Yumi est une hôte incroyable, discrète et aussi avec qui vous pourrez échanger avec plaisir !! Notre séjour fut très agréable !
Lorrie was incredible throughout the process!

Welcoming host! The place is cute, room was perfect and the bed was a welcome relief after days spent walking uptown. Bathroom was stylish with all the necessary amenities. Quiet neighborhood and walking distance to buses and subway. Felt perfectly safe walking at night to go grab food.
Walleed lives above the unit in a home at the end of a dead end street, making this basement unit quiet, but accessible to all of Staten  Island.  The unit is well appointed and comfortable.
Perfekt. Sehr empfehlenswert..

Great location, rather quiet despite UPS across the road, clean, lovely staff, cool roof terrace (geared toward party folk, but we did spend a couple of hours early in the evening with our teenage kids), small room with small beds, but it‘s NYC…
William was very accommodating and a great host. Would recommend!
No issues, good location, let us check in a little earlier than expected. Thanks for the great stay!

Notre séjour, à été super agréable, la maison et les chambres sont exactement comme décris.
Danielle a été à notre écoute pendant notre séjour et très réactive.
Le quartier est safe, avec le vrai esprit Brooklyn, les gens sont souriant et aimables.
Le métro est proche même pas 5 mn à pieds et le métro express est à 15 mn environ.
Il y a des ptis restaurants typiques de Brooklyn aux alentours,
Je recommande réellement le logement de Danielle, merci Brooklyn and especially Bedstuy

Appartement lumineux, confortable et parfaitement situé entre des stations de métro et de bus. Pas vu la fameuse Mimi Elisabeth mais contact facile. Merci à elle. Pourtant, je dois dire que le prix de depart est très mal libellé, à la limite de la pub mensongère. On croit louer un appartement pour 4 personnes avec deux grands couchages puisque c’est ce qu’indique la première page de l’offre avec un prix tres clair et quand on ajoute par la suite une personne, il faut allonger 40$ de plus par jour. Un peu raide!!! Et aucun moyen de discuter, Mme Elisabeth étant invisible. Elle répond par email que… le ménage en plus et les draps, blablabla. A ce point là de frais par personne supplémentaire, je n’ai jamais vu ça nulle part dans mon longue carrière de cliente airbnb. Regrettable car le bon deal du départ ne l’était plus une fois ma nièce invitée.

There are not enough words to describe just how exceptional this place really is. Firstly, Pamela is an amazing host, perfect communication, attentive, very well organised which just made our stay completely issue free from the point of booking to writing this review!
To the apartment, well it really has to be seen to be believed. It’s a perfect size for a small group of adults or family. It has absolutely everything you need, right down to a charger cable for the Bluetooth speaker! The terrace is fantastic for a pre day out breakfast and the view particularly as the sun goes down of NYC cannot be described in words, it is simply spectacular. In terms of travel, the metro station directly to Grand Central or Times Sq is literally at the end of the street, as is the Q32 bus that takes you into the heart of the City. Take the bus you see so much more for less than 3 dollars! The area where the apartment is has multiple take aways, a couple of bars (try McGuinnesses for a very warm welcome from Kieron & Cat) we felt completely safe, even late at night as we returned. There is a little breakfast take away - sausage & bacon bagel is a must! Overall an amazing place to see an amazing City. We did the lot and what an experience July 4th in New York is. Thank you Pamela we will most definitely be back.

We enjoyed our stay with Andrew. He was very friendly and responsive. He checked on us. Neighborhood was vibrant. Walkable to the subway, coffee shops, restaurants and a grocery store. His home was beautiful and we had everything we needed. Thank you Andrew for hosting us.

Julio’s communication was excellent, our flight was a bit delayed and we arrived very late, but he kindly explained everything in detail, which I really appreciated. The location is convenient, close to the metro. Just the bedding had some visible stains and there was dust on the fan, so a bit more attention to cleanliness would make the stay even better.
Great place to stay with lots of thoughtful details such as snacks, fresh brownies, and kids crib/toys. Carrie was very responsive and provided great recommendations for the area.
Mark is really nice and a great communicator. It was our first private room stay and couldn’t have felt better about the set up.
Great location. You get the real NYC studio living experience. Straight forward and simple.

What a fabulous apartment! The outstanding experience begins with easy, quick and friendly communication with the hosts Sara and Matt. The apartment offered everything we needed as a family of 4 to explore the city: Enough space for adults and teenagers, very well-equipped kitchen for breakfasts and drinks (we did not cook, but everything would be there to do so), comfortable beds to recover from long walks, very limited noise considering a location in the heart the apple. A lot of attractions are within walking distance of few minutes, including many good restaurants, food markets and shops, as well as most Broadway theaters and access to the subway station. To use up your final energy there is a large, clean, supervised gym, a nice swimming pool and jacuzzi with view of the Empire State building. But without a doubt, the most spectacular aspect of the apartment are the breathtaking views from all rooms, all the way from the Hudson River, small parts of the Central Park, midtown high rises such as the Empire State building down to One World Trad tower and even the sea! We could not stop enjoying the ever-changing shades of light, highlighting different details of the town as the day (and night) went by. So in short, the apartment is worth every penny, and we could not think of a more easy and at the same time spectacular way of experiencing NYC. A big thank you to Sara and Matt for being such wonderful hosts.
Great stay overall! Jeff was very responsive, and a great host. If you are looking to stay in the Bronx, this is the place!

very nice apartment and had a bathroom all to myself. Clean and in an interesting part of town. The bedrooms were next to each other so I had to make sure to not talk on phone in the evening as you could hear through walls. Otherwise, everything was great and would stay there again.
Great environment at an easily accessible location.

We really enjoyed our stay at Alicia’s place. The place was clean and welcoming when we arrived with comfortable and soft beds. The backyard was a nice area to sit, relax, and eat. The neighborhood was filled with amazing food; one, Yeh’s Bakery, just a short block away had the best sponge cake and fresh aromatic pastries. Most of all, the host was quick to respond and easy to communicate with. We loved our stay and will miss this beautiful apartment!
Communication was prompt and timely.  The place was exactly as represented.   Proximity of transportation really puts all of NY on your doorstep.  we will certainly be back!

Marco é nota 1000. Muito legal, educado, atencioso. Uma pessoa excepcional.
A casa é impecável como nas fotos. Cozinha bem equipada, Wi-Fi funciona bem, banheiro com bom chuveiro. Ótimo

it was fantastic. I am very grateful to Dadrine. she helped us a lot. she provided us with free food almost every day although it was not included in the agreement. she is very responsive. if you need help, she answers your calls at midnight. the place is peaceful. moreover, metro stations are very close to the house. The most important point is that it is very cheap. i strongly recommend the house.

We stayed at the apartment with two people for a month. The apartment is located perfectly in Williamsburg within a ten minutes walk to the L train which will get you to Manhattan directly.
The neighbourhood was safe and there were multiple grocery stores nearby.
The apartment was super clean and had everything you need for a longer stay.
The communication with the host was very easy and he replied timely.
We had a great stay and can only recommend it if you want to visit New York.
The only things we noticed during our stay was that the heating (which turned itself on or off randomly) was a bit challenging. It was either off or too hot but nothing in between which is not unusual for an old building in NYC but still a bit annoying. Also, the apartment looks brighter on the pictures than in real life.

Great location, basically in Chinatown where there’s plenty of food options. Note there are quite a few people outside who will try to sell you counterfeit things, but they didn’t trail us which was good.
Our twin beds room was pretty cramped, only had space to have 2 small suitcases open at a time.
Clean room though!
Was worried the noise outside would be a problem after seeing other reviews, but we didn’t have issues with noise and slept soundly
Le plus beau et le meilleur airbnb que j'ai été! Avec toutes les dernières technologies, je me sentais comme un reine. Meilleur service aussi! Je recommande
I will definitely be back! It’s a great affordable place in NYC that is safe and conveniently located in union square. Thank you so much for an amazing stay!

Awesome stay! Jason was a fantastic host, always responsive and friendly, the instructions were clear and the apartment is very nice. Cool neighborhood at an easily accessible location. I guess the only thing I'd mention is that there is some noise from the street, which may be worth knowing if you're super-sensitive to that. But it is New York City, so it's to be expected. Highly recommended!
Best part of our stay was the location and convenience to the subway!
Great stay with great host and great roommates!
Great experience and very nice hotel. Would stay here again.

The appartment is located in the best area of brooklyn, we loved it! There are a lot restaurant, bars, street art abd you are fast in Manhattan.
The appartment ist big but cute, there is everything you need and, very important, an aircondition! Eve is a sweet person, always answered fast and nice and the appartment is super cozy after a long day in NYC!
Thanks for having us, highly recommended!
Amazing stay. Highly recommended! Especially if you love cats! Hope to return someday :)
Even bigger and better than the pictures show. Nice windows/views, comfy bed, great location and super helpful host!
Great place to stay in the upper east side. Nice and spacious and two bathrooms was a big plus. Would highly recommend.
Koichi apartment has an incredible location at Union Square in Manhattan. The down bed to sleep was kinda unconfortable but the quality/price of the place make up for it.

Michelle’s place was a real delight. Exactly as described, comfortable, and clean. Michelle was exactly what an excellent host should be, very proactive and responsive. Will not hesitate to stay at her place again.

We absolutely loved staying at Malik’s place.
Everything we needed was there: very comfortable, clean, great shower, lovely space, and it was an excellent location whether you wanted to walk about locally or go into Manhattan. Bishop is a super lovable cat also.
Although we never met Malik, he was very responsive, super friendly and accommodating.
Highly recommend!
Tony is a wonderful host. The room in this old house is delightful, spacious and beautifully decorated. The neighbourhood is quiet and safe with easy connections to the subway. I loved it.

Good location, between Chinatown, litlle Italy and Soho.  Noisy to rest at night but they already warn it on the page and offer earplugs.  Courtesy coffee machine in the lobby.  It was expensive but like everything in NY I guess.
Great host, felt like I was home. The space was extremely clean too, 10/10 would stay again.

Very comfortable. I came to the city for surgery so spent all my time at Sonia's apartment and found it very relaxing.
Thank you,
Dawn & Pat

Le logement est idéalement situé, à peine 10/15 mn de marche pour arriver à la station de métro la plus proche. Le logement était très propre. Chrys a été très réactive lorsque nous avions besoin de quelque chose et elle nous a arrangé concernant les heures d'arrivée et de départ, ce qui est appréciable. Je recommande vivement ce logement qui est un bon rapport qualité prix. N'hésitez pas !

Thaya's place was as described. It was clean and accessbile to trains and necessities. The room is functional with lots of storage and comfortable bed.
Thaya would help to clean and change your bed sheet on a weekly basis, bathroom is also always clean. The kitchen is small and allow for minor cooking.
Very friendly and protractive
Great place
Tonya had good communications and the flat was up to expectations. Easy check-in with very good instructions. Very please with our stay and with Tonya as a host.
Excelente anfitrión y muy buen sitio para descansar
Si bien esta alejado de ny es súper recomendable. El lugar es hermoso, súper limpio y en 30 minutos estas en el corazón de Manhattan. Súper recomendable

We loved our stay but getting downtown is a bit of a hike. But it was very close to a subway station, for perspective it  took us about an hour and a half to get to Central Park. Very safe neighborhood too. Definitely worth the price!

Schoon, ruimtelijk appartement in een woonbuurt. Op 5 tot 10 minuten lopen heb je allerlei leuke winkels en een supermarkt. Via de metro kwamen we heel snel in Manhattan en verder. Maar Williamsburg zelf is ook erg leuk om te verkennen.
Je kunt prima koken op het fornuis en ook met de oven en magnetron.
Er is geen tafeltje om aan te eten. Wel is er in de keuken een lange smalle plank aan de muur waar je met een barkruk aan kunt zitten. Fijn dat er een goedwerkende airco is. Wel is het tamelijk donker.
Goede en prettige uitvalbasis om de stad te verkennen.

James's was an excellent host. He was polite and very responsive. The place is well lit and quiet. The apartment felt very comfortable and safe. The location was great and the L train is only a 5 minute bus ride. The food selection in the area was really good. A nice diverse mix of Caribbean restaurants and cool healthy juice bars. I will definitely be booking here again the next time that I'm in Brooklyn.
Jerome is a good and responsive guy.  The place was clean and quite. I love it.

The place was amazing, once again I said that it was amazing
In a nice place close to subway, Deli, Pharmacy, the people in front desk was really2 nice and the important part, that we can store our luggage over there before check in and after check in, you dont have to worry about what time do you come or leave the city, you dont have to pull your luggage across the city, trust me this worth it

Erica was amazing. Their suggestions for the restaurant, groceries, and  cafe were within walking distance.  My daughter got ill and Erica was there to rescue us. Their place is wonderful and it’s in a perfect location.

Great mid-town location within close walking distance of subway lines, eateries, food shopping, museums, Central Park. Spacious suite to relax and unwind in. Kitchenette with dishwasher a definite plus. Have already recommended to several friends. Would definitely stay there again.

This was our second wonderful visit to this spacious apartment.  Staying in this beautiful brownstone with high ceilings, brick details, and big windows with lots of light is part of an authentic Harlem experience.  This visit we mostly stayed local, shopping at Fine Fare and Trader Joe's, cooking in the apartment, and sampling delicious local take out Thai, pizza, tacos and bowls. We took an informative Harlem walking tour, strolled in Central Park and nearby Marcus Garvey Park (check out the fire tower), shopped the African outdoor market, and listened to jazz at the Red Rooster and Minton's.  Easy access to the 2/3 subway too.

Great host, without any doubts!
Was pretty proactive and helps us to pick up our luggage (keep it in his place while we waiting for accommodation)
Everything was clean. Easy to get. Every time I asked smth he was online and gave answers fast. Definitely can recommend this man!
Very pleasant stay and was true to the advertisement.

This place was exactly what I needed for my trip to Bayside to visit family. It was very clean and is accurately represented in the pictures. Zhijan was very responsive to my questions before and during my stay. Easy walk to Bell Blvd and restaurants there. I would definitely stay here again.
Right for the money. Clean, easy, quick to respond, and solid location
Easy to get ahold of and the space was very clean. Would recommend to others.
Convenience location, There are plenty of Asian restaurants,  Grocery and fast food  near by. Host response quickly and tray to keep the place as pleasant as possible. Great place for family living.
Eric is a hospitable host. The room overall is small, but is habitable for short term stays.
Absolutely loved my stay! It was definitely perfect for a crash and dash. I was only in NYC  for 2 complete days and the trains were easily accessible from the Airbnb!!
Nice place for an extended stay, close to the subway and includes all the essentials needed to be comfortable.

We enjoyed our stay at Allison and Loren’s brownstone and it quickly became our home away from home.  The apartment was kindly stocked with pantry staples, coffee, eggs, laundry supplies and really great shampoo/conditioner.   We loved the neighborhood feel,  lots of great restaurants and shops nearby.  We would be more than happy to stay here again when we return to New York.

This place is amazing ! I loved everything about it!!!
Thank you so much for making me and my family feel comfortable!!
Definitely my go to spot from now on !!!
todo Excelente. altamente recomndado. volveré!!!
exactly as described, very good! Would definitely consider this place again.
A casa de Ron é muito bem localizada , ele é muito prestativo e atencioso e o lugar é bem gostoso!

Le séjour a été parfait, les lieux sont très propres et correspondent aux photos. Très bonne communication Emily et Paul sont très aimable et répondent très rapidement. Superbe emplacement facile d’accès, il y a des commerces et une station de métro juste à côté. Tout est parfait
Sara's place was very clean and very comfortable. She is very responsive and helpful. We enjoyed staying at her place.

I really enjoyed my stay. The space was clean and matched the photos exactly. The location was perfect and easily accessible. (The neighborhood itself is 10/10.) Check-in was a breeze and all my needs were taken care of. I would absolutely stay here again!
Nice place, clean with thoughtful inclusions. Easy to find

Mahogany is an absolute JOY! She’s one of the most genuine, kind and caring people I ever met. She was so easy to communicate with, responsive and helpful. Her place was SQUEKY clean. It seemed like she must have been cleaning a couple times a day. She and her son were SO quiet. I felt like I had the place to myself most of the time. The beds was very comfortable and I had everything I needed in the room, the common areas and the kitchen. I also loved having Honey the orange cat there. It just felt like home. The backyard was lovely and I wish I had spent more time there. Overall, it was a great stay! Exactly what I needed.
Lovely stay in Williamsburg surrounded by great restaurants. Giancarlo was responsive and friendly.
Very nice location, the place was really clean, and Uri's communication and generosity is superb!

We loved celebrating Thanksgiving at your beautiful, well appointed and very comfortable home. We so appreciated all of your local recommendations. The walkability was so wonderful.
Thank you so much for sharing it with us.
Jennifer
Great host, great comms, great room and especially great dog🤩
Great apartment!!! Very Clean!!! Close to subway!!! Will stay there again when visiting the area!!  Thanks Jerry...

Michael est très réactif et d'une gentillesse incroyable. Toujours à la recherche de ce qui ne va pas pour améliorer notre séjour.
Pour un bon rapport qualité prix je conseille, trouver moins chère à New York est mission impossible.

Great location! Great Host
Close to public transportation
great stay in new york and a great host
Very clean and easy to get in to. Thanks!

This is one of the best air, B&Bs that I have ever stayed at. Gayle was so lovely and attentive. The actual space itself is massive! I was not expecting it to be that big, it is the entire basement floor of the complex with loads of space to unpack and relax.
As a solo female traveler, I never felt unsafe in the neighborhood, I had a very easy time getting around, especially since the location was located next to multiple subway stations. This made my trip for my friend’s wedding, and my birthday easy as pie.
Gayle even went down one day to check on my things when it was pouring rain to ensure that my personal items were safe from possible flooding. The next time I’m in New York, I will definitely rebook at this beautiful, and unique space.

Everything was better then expected and worked as promised. The arrival and checkin information are super-clear. The building is modern and felt very safe. The apartment is simple, clean and spacious which makes a NYC visit perfect.
Given the location and busy neighborhood I was surprised how well the windows dimmed the outside noise.

I had a great time staying with Patricia and Cherisse in Sunset Park. Their home is welcoming, beautifully decorated and they were kind, helpful people to be with during my stay. I felt truly hosted, like a guest in their home versus somebody just renting a room.

Hemos pasado una semana en New York en familia. Al contratar la habitación del hotel tuvimos dudas sobre si era un hotel, un apartahotel o alguna otra cosa. Al hacerlo a traves de Airbnb no nos quedo muy claro. Una vez llegamos al hotel todo fue de maravilla. La habitacion en la planta 24 era una pasada, con vistas sobre el oculus y el one world y hasta el rio Hudson.
