La comunicación de transporte es perfecta, tenemos varias lineas justo debajo que nos llevan a toda la ciudad. Hay varios restaurantes cerca y tiendas por si necesitas comprar alguna cosa. Solo puedo recomendar este hotel, no es un gran hotel y se nota que está todavia en reformas, pero si quieres un alojamiento funcional, bien ubicado y con una buena habitación no lo dudes. Como cosas a mejorar, decir que no hay comedor y solo sirven un pequeño desayuno en la recepción.
My brother and I are buoyed our stay with Dwain! Hopefully we treated his place with much care when we left. Thank you so much for having us❤️

Meine Familie und ich hatten eine tolle Zeit in dieser schönen Unterkunft. Die Wohnung ist super angebunden und man ist schnell bei allen Sehenswürdigkeiten. Negra ist eine tolle Gastgeberin - schnell erreichbar, sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Wir kommen gerne wieder & können diese Unterkunft nur empfehlen :)

I am a first-timer and was very impressed with my experience!!!
Thank you, Freddy; keep up the excellent work!

Brady’s place was exactly what I needed while I stayed in Brooklyn during a crazy work week. Room was quaint and simple with a working desk and great accessibility to light and an easy access restroom/kitchen. It hit the spot for a clean and homie sleeping space which is all i needed to get through the week. Definitely recommended!!

No frills type of place. We got exactly what was described in the listing, no more no less. Don't worry about the shared bathroom, its literally right outside the door and both were always open. No outside or upstairs noise either. I'm a light sleeper so I'm happy the windows/walls were insulated well. Considering the location, price, and size this AirBnB is a great value. I'd definitely book again.
Things to note:
- can't really open windows. There is an ac/heater unit but it is pretty loud. Something to consider if you like fresh air.
- there is a metal pipe running around the corner near the window that's really hot. Make sure you don't burn yourself.
- the sofa bed isn't the most comfy to sleep on. If you're taller than 5'2 your feet will go off the bed.

Reine's flat is just wonderful! Great location -- stayed for the marathon weekend and it was perfect for viewing on Lafayette. Apartment is equipped for everything you might need and is spacious. Highly recommend.
Diana’s loft in queens is a super stylish, well-equipped & cosy spot for your NY trip. The subway within walking distances makes commuting very easy. Great stay!
Julio F. Is a great host. He is very co-operative and responsive. Highly recommend.

It was a pleasure to stay at Ivan's place. Very clean room with comfortable bed and everything you need. It was very nice to have a welcoming glass of water on the table during check-in. Shower and kitchen are clean and easy to use.
Ivan is a great host - he let me check-in earlier and answered all my questions immediately. Moreover, he came up with recommendations when I wondered where to store luggage after check-out.
I would definitely recommend Ivan's place to everyone who would like to stay in Manhattan. It is a great option in terms of cost-value-location!

We had an amazing stay at John's unit during our New York holiday. It was the perfect home away from home for our group of three friends. The spacious and comfortable layout offered a welcome retreat after our daily explorations of Manhattan and Brooklyn. We especially appreciated the convenience of the washer and dryer. The subway was just a short walk away, and if we were feeling tired, it was easy to grab an Uber as well. With three bedrooms and two bathrooms, the unit provided excellent value. Highly recommended!
Great communication and great place to stay for a couple of months. Bear in mind it is a students residence.

Everything was exactly as offered. The apartment and the room were in excellent condition, very clean, with great kindness and very fast, prompt responses. The place is very close to a nearby train station, so access is very easy, and the area is safe.

I had an amazing stay at Juel’s place! He is a very helpful, responsive, and kind host. The bedroom and bathroom were spotless, and I felt so comfortable and safe staying there. The bed was super  comfortable and the wifi and desk were perfect for remote work. It’s an amazing location in Astoria - super close to the subway, stores, and restaurants and yet on a quiet residential street. I wouldn’t hesitate to stay again.
It was a great central location with beautiful view of Central Park. Very comfortable space for our family.
Great location to MSG., clean rooms and friendly staff
A super host. Very responsive and personable. The outside terrace is so beautiful I just wanted to stay there.

Muy buena experiencia. La ubicación es uno de los grandes puntos fuertes del hotel: está a metros de la estación Fulton, que es enorme y muy práctica. Desde ahí se accede a varias líneas de metro, lo que hace que moverse por la ciudad sea realmente fácil. Además, la zona se siente muy segura, incluso de noche, algo que para nosotros fue clave.
Como detalle a favor, te dan de gentileza dos botellas de agua por día, que se retiraban en recepción.Los anfitriones fueron siempre amables y atentos.
La habitación es chiquita, como suele pasar en grandes ciudades, pero muy reconfortante. La cama, en particular, resultó muy cómoda y permitió descansar bien todos los días.
Algunos días también nos regalaron galletas en la recepción, un gesto simple pero que sumó un montón.
En resumen, un hotel bien ubicado, en una zona segura, con buena atención y detalles que hacen la estadía más agradable. Sin exageraciones, cumple muy bien, y sin dudas lo recomendamos y volveríamos a elegirlo.

Ming’s place was great, everything was clean and beautiful and he was so helpful during our stay.
He was prompt in response to questions we had during our stay. Was accommodating to our request for a brief extension for check out due to flights, etc.
The home was brand new and very clean. Beds were comfortable. Each room had its own AC/heating unit. And having two bathrooms saved us 5 girls getting ready for a wedding on Saturday!
The only thing we would improve would be to provide small hand towels in kitchen and bath. And ice cube trays in freezer.
I highly recommend this home and will stay again when in Brooklyn.
Lovely host and apartment! We will come back!
Herzlichen dank für die tolle unterkunft .sehr schöne wohnung und freuntliche und hilfsbereite gastgeberin

Emplacement parfait à 2 pas de Time Square, proche métro et de nombreux sites touristiques du Midtown.
Appartement petit mais pratique avec possibilité de petit déjeuner ou repas sur place si envie d’être un peu au calme avec des enfants par exemple.
Spacious home close to the subway. Perfect home-base for our days out in New York. Imrul checked in with us during our stay and was very prompt in responding to questions.

Die Unterkunft war an sich sehr schön und größer als gedacht. Auch der Balkon war sehr nett.
Positives:
Justina hat immer sehr schnell geantwortet und war sehr entgegenkommend. Wir konnten sehr spontan noch eine dritte Person mitnehmen und zwei Stunden später auschecken. Außerdem hatte sie uns einiges an Getränken im Kühlschrank da gelassen. Es gab auch einen großen Vorrat an Handtüchern und Bettzeug.
Negatives:
Leider war die Unterkunft nicht die sauberste. Auf dem Balkon war auf dem Tisch was klebriges und auch in der Wohnung gab es an alles Ecken etwas Schmutz, der über Staub hinausging. Im Bad gab's ein paar Haare, die nicht von uns waren.
Das Bett war zwar gemütlich, aber quietschte bei jeder Bewegung enorm, sodass wir uns ständig gegenseitig aufweckten.
Had a great stay at one of our favorite places we have stayed in the NYC area! We would absolutely stay here again and Dawn was very clear and helpful. Everything was clean and the area was gorgeous.
Dit is een aanrader. Zo een mooi appartement gelegen bij 2 metrostations. Ideaal voor een bezoek aan New York.

Chaque soir en rentrant chez Guirlaine, nous avions l'impression de rentrer chez nous à la maison tellement nous y étions très bien.
Sans hésitation pour un prochain séjour nous y retournerons. Le studio est très confortable et très cosy. La rue est accueillante et le métro à deux pas.
Merci à Guirlaine pour sa disponibilité.
Had an amazing stay at Moreen's! Very clean, cozy and very comfortable. Everything is well stocked and great communication from Moreen.

Milton sempre muito atencioso, prestativo. Permitiu que deixasse as malas até o horário do check-in e tbm depois do horário do checkout. Sempre respondia nossas mensagens e nos ajudou com o metrô. Na minha próxima ida para NY quero me hospedar na casa do seu Milton novamente.

Thank you so much for making my wife's weekend very special.
Great location!
Highly recommended!
It was a nice stay! I can recommend the place!

We had an incredible stay at Tanya’s place. Everything was as described priorly. The place was very accessible and a stone’s throw away from the airport. The host was very friendly and accommodating. Our needs were met as the host was very proactive in managing our accommodation. Definitely recommend this place as it is also a great value.
Great stay!
Beautiful new home in quiet neighborhood that was close to public transport. Sophia is very nice and helpful.

Ritha's place was so lovely. It can be easily reached by metro from the airport and it's a 20min trainride away from the center. Ritha herself is a very kind and heartwarming person. I highly recommend this Airbnb and I hope I could stay with her the next time I'm in New York.

I appreciated the location we were able to hop on different trains to visit other areas in NY. This location had a great selection of markets, bakeries and more! I enjoyed my stay and will definitely be back.
This place is a great find! Felt like a good deal for the price! Would definitely recommend and Maranatha was even flexible with checkout time which was very helpful!
Awesome location, clear and friendly communication. I highly recommend it!
Very nice place quiet, calm, and the people were so nice, respectful

We stayed for two months at Katie’s place and it couldn’t have been nicer. Very clean, comfortable and well appointed with a gorgeous view. The soaking tub was a wonderful bonus. And its location made getting into Manhattan very quick and easy.
Katie was a communicative host. I highly recommend this location.

The best place for an affordable stay, super close to the train station(5-7 minutes walking) I liked that the area felt safe.
It was clean, and had everything we needed. I will definitely go again me, my bf and my brother were very happy with how quickly she responded and how she accommodated us so we can all fit ! :)

A hidden gem. The unit is not only comfortable and spacious but exceptionally clean and well-maintained. Fergus' attention to detail is remarkable—he thoughtfully left everything could possibly need, from spare cables to cleaning supplies, an iron, toiletries, Dyson air purifier and even board games & an XBOX! Skylights bathed the space in light, while the bedroom’s blackouts blinds ensured peaceful, uninterrupted sleep with high-quality linens. The kitchen and bathroom, both brand new and fully equipped, provided ample space for own items—perfect for longer stays. The Sonos was an added bonus, filling the apartment with rich, high-quality sound, making the time indoors even more enjoyable.The location couldn’t be better. Nestled on a peaceful street in the heart of the West Village, it’s surrounded by some of the most charming restaurants, coffee shops, and bars, all within walking distance. Also a few blocks from the most beautiful waterfront of NYC. Truly a dream of an apartment.

Amazing 5 day stay in a wonderful location. 5-10 mins walk to the subway station and into manhattan within 15.
Ditmars is an awesome place, everyone very friendly and never felt unsafe even late at night.
A great apartment and a great host!
Would return in a heartbeat!
The Airbnb looked just like the pictures and was in a good location by JFK. The place worked well for our size group
Excellent communication from host. I enjoyed my stay - absolutely what I expected based on the photos. If you are considering this spot - book it!
Excellent place for a few night stay, close to subway and many restaurants. Perfect place for the city!

Een ruim appartement met alles wat je nodig hebt voor een fijn verblijf. Het appartement ligt op 5 min loopafstand van de metro. Makkelijke verbinding naar Manhattan waar je ongeveer 40/45 min over doet. Bij aankomst stond er een welkom bordje en lag er een map met informatie klaar. Ook lag er een mandje met diverse koekjes en popcorn. Erg attent. Bran reageerde erg snel op vragen en was vriendelijk in de communicatie. Dit is zeker een aanrader!
I’ve been going to Michael and Sharon for almost 4 years if they booked I rather go to an hotel than going somewhere else. I always felt like I’m home.
It was great experience to stay in Colleen's apartment. She is very responsive and helpful person. Apartment was very clean and tidy. We will definitely consider this place for future.

Esther and her place were great. Two bonuses that I often don’t find elsewhere were that there were plenty of accessible electric outlets and the light by the bed lets you read and turn lights out without getting up.

Michelle and Jackson were flexible with my check in time and were super welcoming. They gave me a lot of privacy but made sure to check in and make sure I had everything I needed. The room is very clean, bed was comfortable, and it was surprisingly quiet at night for NYC. Close to the subway and a number of good places to eat. A perfect place to stay while visiting NYC.

Thank you so much for the experience. Very responsive and communicative about any questions we might had, had. The place was nice, clean, and comfy. Owner is very very kind. Thank you! God bless, Glory to Jesus!!

Clean and quiet place to stay. Bed was comfortable and bathroom was clean and tidy. If you don’t have a car, there are plenty of buses that connect to the subway to NYC and back. Hosts are also very responsive.
Thank you for another wonderful stay. Our suite was so welcoming and comfortable. The location is ideal. We look forward to staying here again in the future. Our “home” in Brooklyn!

Hamid was an amazing host. He waited for me and showed me around inside. We had conversations and laughs and talked about Mma and wrestling. He made the stay very cozy and comfortable and was a great and convenient place for new years.

Francis is the best !!!!!!!! I booked this air bnb for my birthday and brought my best friend from Chicago to see NY . The location is amazing the decor and art in the apartment is amazing ! The communication was outstanding . The place Is clean and nice the location is awesome . Enough space and overall just a wonderful experience. Francis if you read this … Thank you !
Yakov is an amazing host, we loved every minute! We’re already planning to return. It’s beautiful, unique, interesting, and close to a lot of cool things!!!

We enjoyed our stay at Conrad’s place. It was exactly as described - spacious, clean and in a good location. Conrad greeted us at check-in and was available if we had any questions or issues. The neighborhood is very lively - we went to Red Rooster a couple of times - but the block was relatively quiet at night during the week. We would definitely consider staying here again.
Awesome stay, felt home!
Wonderful spot. Walking distance to just about anything you need.
Alles war gut nur sehr sehr komisch war das es einen Top Herd gab wo die Kochflächen abgeglebt waren so das man ihn nicht nutzen konnte

Muy buena ubicación , baño compartido , y las paredes se escuchaba literalmente todo lo de afuera , la zona era relativamente tranquila ya que está cuadra adentro del bullicio. Me volvería a alojar ya que estar bien ubicado en Manhattan es el verdadero precio .

This was a very nice clean stay in a safe neighborhood! Looks just as advertised.
Good value for the price.
E and M were extremely responsive and helpful. I went to wrong door late at night (oops!) but E and M were available and made it easy to get back in! Coffee in the morning and the space was nice.

We asked  to drop off our luggage the morning of our check in which wasn’t a problem but the communication on how to get in were not clear. We got into the building but there is a lock on the door for which we didn’t get the combination. Tried reaching the host but didn’t respond. Only after calling through FaceTime audio did she respond telling us the combination. She didn’t check if we got in or not. We didn’t know which unit we were in and sent her a message when we checked in that we took a unit. It took her over 24 hours to respond to our message telling us our unit was a different one and the checkin details didn’t get through. It’s abnormal to only check on your guests +24 hours later, certainly if you received a call from them. The host is not present in the appartement. The kitchen is not clean, full of dust, insufficient utensils for the number of people. Bathroom should be cleaned every day as not private and there is mold on windows in the room and the bathroom.
Everything was great at the apartment but definitely check out the neighborhood. Also, the tv had no apps (netflix,hulu, ect) just basic cable.

Great spacey place for a group of 6-7 people. Well equipped and furnished appartament. Quite noisy street near windows of two bedrooms with loud car traffic/car music. Industrial area with connection (~55 min, J tube) from Manhattan. Clear instructions, helpful advices, friendly host, warm hospitality with coffee and wine served for welcome.

Hakim is an outstanding host and his place is one of the best I’ve stayed in. It is in a cool corner of Hamilton Heights. While restaurants and bars are a bit more of a walk, the A&C trains are less than 5 minutes away and they will get you almost anywhere you need to go.
The house is spotless and comfortable. Hakim is a live-in host and pride of place shows through. The mini fridge and AC are cold and helped during the NYC heat wave. I would not hesitate to stay with Hakim again… and I expect I will.
The place is really clean and nice. We really enjoyed our stay. The host is really cool, friendly and helpful.
Great stay, highly recommend, fantastic location and quiet sleep on a comfy bed
Diana's place is great and peaceful, super fast internet and a pristine bathroom. Most importantly a great location that is close to the subway and restaurants.  will definitely book again

I stayed with Sadie for more than a month, and I can say with absolute honesty that was a great experience for me! The space was great, clean, cozy and made me feel safe and comfortable, Sadie and Apollo were super supportive and very friendly with us! Gato, was definitely the best part of the entire experience! August was a very good girl as well! We are very thankful for the time we been there!

Stayed at Allison's place for my first visit to NYC and it was great. The location is awesome, being close to central park and several subway stations. Allison also made me feel super comfortable and was a star when it came to check-in and check-out. If you want a great place for a quick trip to NYC then this is it.

Ashley est une super hôte.
très communicante, toujours disponible et rapide dans ses réponses.
l'appartement est très bien, à 2 pas de 3 lignes de métro pour desservir tous les quartiers de Manhattan.
La vie locale autour de l'appartement est représentative de NYC et de Brooklyn. La rue est calme, mais les rues perpendiculaires sont bien animées.
Concernant l'appartement, celui-ci est très bien équipé, de qualité.
le style NYC est parfait pour un voyage immersif.
nous recommandons absolument l'appartement et son hôte.
Emmanuel

Awesome location!  On the edge of little italy and Chinatown, there are great little shops, cafes with a ton of energy.  The space definitely has a fun vibe with the pink paint in the bedroom. The shower stall is unique that it stands near the middle of the kitchenette area.  Water pressure is good and thank goodness the shower walls are appropriately wide enough to move around in! There was a good amount of natural lighting in bedroom which I really appreciated.  The host, Moying is very personable and warm, making me feel welcome the moment I met her.

Alex was very friendly, responsive, and provided clear instructions! He even provided a scale! Struggled a bit taking luggage up the stairs to our room and was bitten by mosquitos but that’s New York for you! Overall good considering it’s NY, a great price and person :D

To me, the best Airbnb experience is to feel like staying at friend’s house, and Stephen made me feel that way! No wonder he’s the top 1% super host👍! He is the Best! He was there when I check-in & check-out, he helped with my suitcases! I enjoyed my stay and I was very comfortable felt at home! I really appreciate the place was very clean, and I had everything I need! I loved our conversations! I enjoyed walking around the neighborhood, lots of shops, restaurants, parks, even nice people! I would love to stay with Stephen again when I come to New York next time. And I would like to call Stephen as my best friend in Brooklyn:-)
Fairly spacious property in a charming town house. Subway few minutes walk and very convenient. All the services such as restaurants, cafes, laundrette and a park within short walk.
Travis was an great host, the apartment was clean and at a great location. Will definitely recommend this place and will be back!

Great location. Great host. Not my first time in New York but my first time staying in Queens. There’s a lot nearby and I felt super safe during my stay. It’s super convenient and during my visit I was in Manhattan daily. The place is very clean (and I have high standards for cleanliness) and John is such an accommodating & understanding host. He placed hair dryer, body lotion, alcohol wipes, sanitizing spray, and an Anker power bank in the bedroom. Literally the first host to have provided a power bank during my extensive history of using Airbnb. Highly recommend it when you are visiting New York!!!

The St. Regis Residences are synonymous with luxury & all you’d expect from the St. Regis brand. While we booked with Joshua through Airbnb, all other communications & services were handled by the St. Regis concierge. We had access to all hotel amenities & enjoyed our stay at the very first & iconic St. Regis hotel. It’s location at 55th & 5th was perfect & our stay was unmatched.
Doug was great! Super friendly and informative! Staying here was such a pleasure. Great location and the zen garden in the back is a great escape from the city. 10/10

We had a pleasant stay. Communication with the host was fast and easy. The location is beautiful and peaceful. Access to the Airbnb was simple and clearly explained, and having an elevator was convenient. A good option for a budget-friendly stay.
Really economic option. The couch bed folds down completely flat and is quite comfortable- two people can lodge in this room very comfortably.
Great experience with awesome communication! My boyfriend and I actually stayed in the same housing in September which was just as great of an experience! Thank you for the stay!
Very helpful and attentive host was always responding and making sure we were well accommodated location was also great

We loved our stay here! There was more than enough space for our group of 10, having a bathroom in every room was a huge plus! hard to find stays in NYC with this much space. The home was very clean and super close to some popular food spots we came to try! There are stairs getting too and from the rooms, but if you don’t mind that then I definitely recommend staying here!

Dwain fue un muy buen host, siempre respondia rapidamente cualquier duda e incluso lo pudimos conocer en persona y fue una persona bastante amigable.
La casa es tal y como se ve en las fotos, dentro de la casa creo que se podria mejorar la cobertura del wifi ya que la conexión solo era buena estando en la sala pero al momento de ir a los cuartos se perdía. Tambien hubiera sido genial si incluyeran shampoo y otras cosas basicas de limpienza en los baños.
Respecto a la ubicación podria decir que es buena y mala a la vez, buena ya que queda solo a dos cuadras de una estación de metro que lleva a Manhattan. Y mala ya que una vez es de noche tanto el metro, el barrio, y en general toda la zona se vuelve un poco peligrosa, durante nuestra nuesta estadía nunca nos pasó nada pero si es un punto a tener en cuenta.
En general puedo decir que fue una buena experiencia quedarnos en el Spot de Dwain

Nous avons passé un agréable séjour dans cet appartement de Harlem à 5 adultes.
Il est situé à proximité du métro qui permet d'accéder rapidement aux différents quartiers.
L'arrivée est simple en complète autonomie.

Grat location 5 minutes from metro Station. Walking distance to Brushwick & Williamsburg.
Clean, nice & quiet room with comfortable bad & backyard view.
Great place in a quiet area to stay after busy day visiting NYC.

Great place to stay in NY.  Madison square garden area. Felt safe as there was always a doorman at the desk. 14th floor view was a sight to see at night. Everything needed to accommodate my stay and more.
Another great stay here.

This was a lovely brownstone in a spot close to great restaurants (highly recommend Therapy Wine Bar 2.0 & Brooklyn Waffle House) and a quick walk to the train.  It's listed as a self check-in with a smart code lock. However, it's a regular lock & you have to let Desmond know when you will arrive so he can physically give you the keys. I wouldn't have booked it had I known it wasn't self check-in. However, it worked out as I arrived at a time he was there & I had some difficulty finding the unit as there isn't a house number posted that I could see. Desmond was of course very kind and his place was pretty, tidy & comfortable. I had a great stay!

This apartment is what I was looking for my stay in New York. It was small but it had all necessary for us. I loved the design and the bedroom, but it was a shame having meals in it… apart from that, Ramia has been an excellent host, she let us keep the baggage in the apartment after the check out, to let us pick them up later. Also, it is located in a very quiet and safe quarter: the subway is 5 minutes away and you can reach the center of Manhattan in 30 minutes. Recommended ! ⭐️
Great host. Super responsive. And the place was in a great location close to everything we wanted

Absolutely amazing! Exceptionally clean and extremely comfortable. Beautiful neighborhood, plenty of restaurants near by if you do not want to cook. Rodney provided clear concise instructions for check in and out. Oh and there is plenty of street parking which is a plus (in NYC) if you are going to be utilizing a vehicle.
we had a great time, the view, the location and williamsburg were perfect...
階段しかなかったのが少し大変でしたが、駅にもアクセスしやすく静かな環境で、とても居心地が良かったです！

Had a great time during my stay here. Baydaa was a wonderful host and even provided two complimentary home made meals. The room was very spacious, and I had access to a very clean bathroom and well equipped kitchen. I highly recommend to anyone looking for a place to stay in Brooklyn.
This is our new fav place to stay in NYC: perfect location, remarkably quiet, and awesome host. We will be back.
6 stars. Accommodating host, excellent location, so clean and new. Thank you Tyrone

I really like the design of the hotel. The stickers and doodles on the wall outside and in the common areas are aesthetic. The room is very cozy and has everything you need. The location is close to Soho and the subway.
The space was very clean and in a good area. Overall very clean. It had an easy check-in/out and had everything we needed!
Great Stay!!

Subway entrance is super close! Loved the option to check bags in early & we were lucky and able to check in early too!
Everything was exactly as advertised. Great views! Will most definitely be back!

Comfy apartment. My friend and I were in town for a quick visit and the accommodations were just right. Street parking was available. Neighborhood was quiet. Nen was very accommodating and checked in often to see if we needed anything.

La ubicación del hotel es excelente, ideal para recorrer la ciudad. La habitación nos resultó cómoda y la limpieza impecable. Llegamos antes del horario de check in y amablemente nos guardaron las valijas para que pudiéramos aprovechar la mañana.
Sólo sugeriría agregar doble cortinado para poder aprovechar la luz natural manteniendo la privacidad.
Muy recomendable!

Great stay. Definitely recommended for couples. So beautiful and clean. Comfortable bed. Jacuzzi was nice and they left us wine with wine glasses. Roma was so kind and walked us around the 1st day and everything was perfect. Will definitely be back!

The stay at Silva‘s apartment was very nice. Small but very comfortable room - includes everything that is needed. I really liked that she offered a water filter. Also storing our bags at the departure day was no problem.
Well located place, quiet neighborhood. If you follow the rules you will enjoy your stay, just to bathe, sleep and maybe cook something
Great stay! Would come again!

The stay was nice. Definitely would want to go again. Everything went smoothly aside from a small heating issue but the staff did their best to make sure we enjoyed our stay. The room looked exactly how it did in the photos and is near a few stores so you can get what you need.

I loved staying at this apartment. Such a fun neighborhood. The apartment is as as-advertised: nice, private, and quiet. David is personable, honest, and communicative! Great spot for exploring the city. I’d definitely stay here again :)

The apartment was very modern with all the comforts of home. The access to a personal driveway was very convenient and the ability to control the air conditioning in separate rooms was a luxury. Sida thought of details such as extra towels, blankets and toiletries. I would highly recommend this place to anyone taking a trip to New York who wants a close proximity to the city.
Very good place and good people.
Very clean n nice apartment

Ana and George’s apt was the perfect place for our short stay (one parent with two teens). Location is central/ walkable to plenty of restaurants nearby and easy to get around. Great views, very clean, and had everything we needed. Ana was very responsive when we had any questions and ensured we had a smooth check-in/ check-out process. Would definitely stay here again in the future or recommend to a friend!
Last minute stay, but was perfect. They communicated well, and were very accommodating with a later check out. Overall a great stay!
Great location and walkable to many restaurants including the subway or bus transportation.
10/10 would do again!

Our stay at Mei’s place was perfect! We visited nyc for a few days before Christmas, and her whole family was so welcoming and friendly. Gave us lots of great recommendations for food nearby, and things to do in between our plans. Metro was super close by and only a couple stops to get into manhattan for sightseeing. Highly recommend staying with Mei and exploring Brooklyn :) We will be back!

This was our second time staying at Arthouse. We love staying there because everything is close by. From bagels and coffee to the subway on 79th. The Museum of Natural History is a couple of blocks away and so is Central Park. If you’re there on a Sunday, you need to go check out The Grand Bazaar on Columbus Ave. Lots of cool finds there.

I had a very lovely stay at Charlie and Sam’s. The room looked and felt very cozy, made me feel like I’m at home, and it’s on the morning sun side too!
The bed is very comfortable to get a good night’s sleep after a long day of exploring the city.
The hosts were very kind to suggest a couple of places to eat and how to get about, which came in handy, and quick to response if I had any questions.
Overall a great experience, close to everything that might come to mind, and really good location to get the local feel of the neighbourhood.
10/10 recommend! x
El lugar es exactamente igual al de las fotos. Muy cerca de los. Lugares más turísticos de NewYork City. Definitivamente me volveria a hospedar ahí

This AirBNB is fantastic! Filled with details that stretch the body and catch the eye, it really is worth the price.  I cannot emphasize it enough: the location is fantastic, the amenities are top-notch, the space is unique and inviting, and the experience offered by this listing is just what one wants when they choose AirBNB over a traditional hotel.

Excellent location and close to the subway station. You can take one line and be right in midtown Manhattan. A safe area at night and lots of shops nearby. The room was great and a comfy bed! Go to the Milk and Honey cafe for breakfast, it was delicious. Highly recommended and we will stay there again next time we are in NYC.
Just check out is a little bit early 0900

The home was very spacious and had everything you might need for your stay. Kitchen was large and well equipped with kitchen supplies. The host was accommodating and very easy to communicate with. Thank you to the hosts for making our stay here great. We really enjoyed our stay at this home and would very much recommend to others!
Magnifique airbnb au calme, à 5 min d'une ligne principale de métro qui vous emmène en 15 min au centre de Manhattan. Literie au top et en bonus la terrasse pour prendre un petit déj au soleil.
Amy’s place was perfect. Easy to get to in a lovely neighborhood. Definitely recommend it 😊

В спальне и ванной было очень чисто. Я получила белые , свежие полотенца и простыни. Матрац был удобный. Спасибо за бутылку воды, это было очень к стати.
Единственный минус это, что Августина очень громко разговаривала по телефону, примерно с 6пм до 10пм, на первом этаже, мне в спальне было слышно очень хорошо.
В остальном прекрасная спальня.

Nous avons été bien accueillis chez Léo qui a été très arrangeant et réactif quant à notre arrivées et à l'heure du départ. Il y a tout ce qu'il faut au domicile pour éviter quelques dépenses. Cuisine fonctionnelle four micro-ondes, frigo.
Placé à côté d'un parc et de nombreux commerces.
Les transports sont également à proximité avec plusieurs lignes à quelques minutes à pied.
Merci Léo pour votre accueil. C'est une adresse à retenir.
Will be back again & again
Great stay at the The Ridge, great location and very comfortable. Would highly recommend.
I’d stay again.  It’s a lot of space for a good price.  Clean and very well managed
Very good location

Super Lage, zentral aber doch ruhig. Sehr rücksichtsvolle Gastgeber, freundlich, hilfsbereit. Der Kontakt zu ihnen war sehr angenehm. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden sofort wieder da buchen.

Gran locación, a unos 7 min caminando sé encuentra el metro que conecta con 4 líneas diferentes, en todo momento me sentí cómodo en la habitación, el Sr Jiang fue muy amable y respetuoso, estuvo al pendiente de  todo

This property was amazing! I’m not a city dweller, but this experience made me want to pack up and move! The hostess was the absolute best! She was responsive and went the extra mile to ensure we were welcome in her home!
Nice place confortable and host was very responsive
Great location. Amazing host!

It was such a special trip for us, and we could not have hoped for a better host and place. What a beautiful, warm, welcoming, quiet, pristine place. We felt right at home with Juanita and will definitely stay with her again if her room is free next time. Her home is right in the heart of Park Slope, a perfect location for exploring the city, with fantastic restaurants and coffee shops all around.
This was better than what any hotel could have offered us.
Thank you so much!
Mona’s place is in a very convenient location- near lots of restaurants/bars and subway stops. Her place was quite spacious and had everything I needed for my stay. Would highly recommend!
Was such a nice stay!

Minha estadia foi ótima, fui muito bem acolhido pela Yeun-Ah, desde antes da minha chegada até depois da minha saída, com muita atenção, disponibilidade e empatia; ela é, certamente, uma pessoa ímpar e digna de nota; o quarto é muito bom, amplo, arejado com 3 janelas, cama com colchão de molas, o ambiente é muito bom, tudo limpo e agradável. O único porém observado foi a existência de 3 lances de escada para ter acesso ao quarto, mas isso é da característica dos imóveis da região e, no meu caso, não comprometeu minha satisfação com o local. O local fica a 1.100 metros do Central Park e a um quarteirão da estação de metrô W-125 St que permite acesso fácil e rápido a diversas partes de Manhathan usando as linhas vermelhas 2 e 3 do metrô, que param na Estação Pennsylvania (W-34 St x 7 Ave), Penn Station, que, por sua vez, tem a linha E que liga esta à Estação Jamaica, ao lado da qual está a estação do AirTrain, com acesso direto ao aeroporto JFK, meu local de chegada no país.

Great experience! Location and listing exactly how described. Everything we needed for our trip was provided, space was very clean. Host Daniel available for questions through app, he helped 100% with our request to make our trip that much more enjoyable!
Great host! Very accommodating with our checking in and luggages. Would come back here 100x again:)

El espacio de las habitaciones es un poco reducido, sin embargo, es ideal para llegar a descansar y continuar conociendo los alrededores, no hubo cambio de toallas, el personal solo organizó la cama y recogió la basura.
Had a great stay! Everything was as described! Will come back definitely!
I had a wonderful stay! Mei is an amazingly welcoming and joyful individual I felt right at home! Thank you for the wonderful discussion.
Without a doubt I’d stay here next time I’m in NYC. It was just a few minutes walk to the A&C trains, had plenty of food options nearby, was private and cozy, and overall a solid value!
小卧室临轨道交通近每次过火车声音大，我朋友几天都没有睡好休息好
Very clean, nice hosts, responsive and helpful

Great place to stay! Super clean which I appreciated. Accurate description. Spacious and lovely. Easy to walk to many places! I could walk to my kids’ apartment in less than 20 minutes. Carla responded quickly with regard to anything I asked about. I’d stay here again.
Thank you, Carla!
very nice area can find street parking within a few blocks

Dane’s place is good if your looking for something in group.
Easy to check in!
Thank you!!
Great location for my parents to stay while coming to visit us in Park Slope. They will be recommending it to their friends!
Отлично всё
Would stay here again. lovely place to stay in.
We were very comfortable and the beds was the BEST slept like a baby. Definitely will book again!

Had an amazing few days staying here. Was not sure what to expect for our first time in Brooklyn, but after reading the reviews we decided to book Andrada's place. It felt very secure in the building and our room was perfect. Andrada made sure we had everything and was very quick to respond to our questions. I highly recommend this spot, especially for people wanting a good first experience in the city!!

Si estan buscando un buen lugar para quedarse en Brooklyn, dejen de buscar y reserven ahora! El departamento de Christophe es perfecto.
Bien ubicado, barrio tranquilo, muy cerca de dos estaciones de subte.
Muy bien equipado para cocinar, la cama del cuarto es súper cómoda, y Tana y Asimi te van a alegrar la estadía😂
Christophe estuvo en el departamento solo los primeros días, pero la comunicación con él fue perfecta, y también deja todo muy claro en un libro con todo lo que se pueda llegar a necesitar.
Volvería sin dudarlo, gracias por todo Christophe!
Absolutely amazing stay location is PERFECT for a couple nights in the city. Everything is walking distance away and if you need to take a train station is right under your feet.

Le logement était très propre et confortable. Un peu éloigné du centre de Manhattan cependant mais nous en étions conscients au moment de la réservation.
L'hôte est très réactive et sympathique.
Nous sommes satisfaits de notre expérience !
Great location,

I had a great time at the apartment. It was nice , clean and exactly how it was advertised.
Communication with the host was below average. It was very slow at times and in some cases I would not get a reply unless I asked multiple times. I never got a reply with less than one day in between.
One particular example of bad communication was with the electricity charge. The apartment clearly stated a usage based pricing, but I got charged with a flat rate fee of 70USD for the number of days I stayed in the apartment. I only found out that it’s a flat rate after asking the host multiple times, the invoice did not contain a breakdown. I also asked why this is not just written in the description but this got ignored as well.
In general I don’t think 70USD is a big deal but the way how this was handled bothered me.
Overall a nice apartment but I would encourage the host to work on their communication and service.

This was a great experience! Not only were all my inquiries answered in a timely fashion, the space was everything I expected and more. I would definitely use this host again and it was close to all the things I needed for my trip.
There was easy check in and a lot of common space if I desired to use it. Parking was also very easy which was helpful, especially in New York!

Fantastic 5 nights at Yochi & Yochi’s. Location is great, walkable to most of manhattan and plenty of subway stations close by.
Yochi’s hosting was fantastic, incredibly friendly and some lovely conversations plus much more space than a box room in a hotel. 10/10 would recommend
We had a wonderful stay there. great bedroom with own bathroom and privacy.

We absolutely loved the apartment and the area. Plenty of cafes and grocery stores, lively neighbourhood. Subway stations only a few minutes away.
Deirdre was a very accommodating and helpful host. Hopefully, we‘ll be able to come back one day!
Giovanni was super helpful during my stay, and I had an amazing time there - really relaxed and rejuvenated.

The entrance door was locked when I arrived. I had to stay at a hotel the first night.
The bed mattress was horrifically stiff and uncomfortable. I bought a mattress topper with my own money. I was never reimbursed.
The person upstairs walked around a lot, from 7am to midnight. Every step caused creaking in the floorboards. I could loudly hear it in the unit. I couldn't sleep or concentrate well.
The laundry machine didn't have any detergent, so I had to purchase tide pods with my own money. I was never reimbursed.
I have a medical condition that requires full sleep. I wasn't able to get enough sleep because of the person upstairs. I had to leave 7 days before my checkout date, leaving one full week without my usage. I contacted Jixxy immediately. A week's usage cost $1800. After multiple messages I was refunded $1500.
My trip to NYC was ruined. Very sad.
Todo muy limpio y ordenado, de fácil acceso y cercano a Manhattan. Todo impecable.
Ubicación ideal para conocer NY en poco tiempo

The location is amazing for the price. You can access a lot of must see attractions within walking distance. The breakfast offering is a plus. The host is very helpful and friendly. Their policies assure that even if it's a shared space, everyone can enjoy a quite evening. Highly recommended!

The apartment is located at the intersection of China town & Little Italy, with the heart of Soho being a short walk.
Once inside the building and apartment, the apartment looked exactly as pictured. There was plenty of space for the 3 of us. It was easy for us to get to and from the US Open from the location. Check out was easy!

Our family stayed at Adena's over the Christmas holidays (party of 5 for 8 days) and loved every second. This place is really beautiful, very spacious and incredibly comfortable - perfect for lazing around and relaxing after long walks around Brooklyn and the city. It is bright, warm and everything you could need is there (the projector tv is a treat!). The Brooklyn area is great - fab restaurants and bars (thanks Adena for the excellent tips). There is nothing we can fault - possibly only the weather as we would have loved to hang on the roof a bit more as the views were sensational.  Definitely would recommend and thank you Adena for being a wonderful host.
10/10 Recommend
Perfect place. Great host
Great place to stay. I extended my stay and stayed a total of a month. Great location, very clean. Fran is a great host and great cook! I really enjoyed her food :)
Very good value, had a good stay
Had an amazing stay and Nzinga was quick to help us with anything that we needed!
Great host, apartment, and location. everything matched the description perfectly and i had a very comfortable stay.

The descriptions and pictures are very accurate. The instructions were extremely clear, and we had zero problems. I didn’t need to contact the host for anything. The place is very accessible to subway and is walking distance from many things. The area is fairly safe and has a nice park a block away. The only thing that I was not fond of was the unit is below street level. This means that you can hear people walking by and some people stopped to talk. One group was having an argument on the phone we had to listen to for a good 10 minutes. It all happens during the day though, so it was fairly quiet at night. Overall this was a very convenient, clean, and nice place to stay. I appreciate the accuracy in the descriptions and clear instructions.
Easy check in and out, very convenient location

Estuve ahí tres moches y ya se lo recomendé a todos mis amigos y familiares, es un excelente lugar, decorado divinamente, súper limpio y acogedor, cerca a estaciones de metro y bus y los dueños muy amables.
Te sientes como en casa!

It was a nice inn.
It is rather hard to find a key for the entrance and the place for depositing key is hard to find and use for the new-comer.
However, besides that, almost everything is perfect for the short visit in New York.
I would recommend this inn for my friends.
Great stay, Thanks Ronnie
Comfort
Great place , super clean . Easy to find. Eremita was awesome . Easy to contact.

John’s place was perfect and we will definitely be back.  We were in NY for a college visit to the Aveda Institute so it was fitting to stay in Brooklyn. The brownstone was within walking distance to so much!  All the restaurants, bars, shops, Prospect Park, Sunday farmers market, Trinity Grace church.  It was also a couple blocks from the subway so it was super easy to go to DUMBO where the school is located and to Manhattan, Timesquare etc.  The brownstone was super comfortable, very quiet,  with a cute back patio to make you feel like living like a local.  The neighborhood of Park Slope was filled with locals, lots of dogs and little kids. Can’t wait to visit again!

If I could stay here every time I come to New York I ABSOLUTELY would. Karen’s home is incredibly spacious, beautiful living spaces and easy to access. I felt like I was an upper Eastside Princess and we didn’t even take the best rooms - next time though.
You can tell that Karen cares about the quality of your stay. She has details for every question you may have. Take some time to read the book, you’ll feel like you’re getting a private tour.
She was kind enough to accommodate holding our luggage and I had an opportunity to meet her son. Darling young man.
We slept 8 in 5 rooms, 3 full baths and 3 half baths. If you want to make this a family trip, business trip, or simply a personal getaway - this is the space for you! Easy access to multiple trains and my ride shares were reasonable for every place we went.
Amazing Host!

Easily the best and most beautiful Airbnb we’ve had the pleasure of staying in. Thank you so much for making our trip so amazing, Cindy and Lory! We wish we could stay here every time we come to New York ^_^

Wow! I found a hidden gem in Queens! I loved staying here and would definitely book again. Great location. The way Nicole paid attention to details was great. The amenities that were provided was definitely thoughtful. She’s a wonderful guest!

Would have been a fine stay except that the room, bathroom and shared spaces were so disgusting and dirty. The bedroom floors were so sticky, the bathroom was tiny and looked like it hadn't been cleaned in years. The room advertised was misleading and ridiculous for the price.

I stayed at Marianella and Jose’s gorgeous apartment for almost 3 months and they made me feel at home from beginning to end! The apartment is in an ideal location to get a quick train into Manhattan and the surrounding area is ideal for supermarkets and travel. The apartment itself is incredibly well maintained and very homely.
Marianella and Jose were fantastic hosts and very communicative and friendly during my stay and I would definitely return to this beautiful apartment!
Loved my stay at the Boro Hotel. Clean accommodations, friendly staff, wonderful all around

Die kleine Wohnung war unser Zuhause in NYC. Die Ausstattung ließ nichts zu wünschen übrig. Gewürze, Sieb, Gefrierfach... Milton begrüßte uns herzlich, erklärte uns den Weg zum Supermarkt und zeigte sich offen für Fragen. Das gab uns insgesamt ein gutes Gefühl.
Great location and great space to accomodate 3 people. Nick was easy to communicate with and check in/check out were extremely easy.

Excellent place, quiet if you prefer and hustle and bustle of NYC is just a quick walk away. The study was my favorite where I could work, and than step out in the terrace in the back.
Yes, the terrace is fantastic, initially had a lot of plans to take advantage of it, but we had no time to enjoy it.
Very friendly neighborhood, had children selling lemonades and parents spending some quality time with their kids and puppies!
Prospect park is walkable, citi bike station right across from Raymond’s place.
Net net - highly recommend!
Amazing
Location is perfect.

Overall the place was perfect for our long weekend stay. Pictures are pretty accurate and the description matches what you get. It was very nice to have the option to leave our luggage in the hallway prior to our check in time so we could walk around without bags.
The only thing I would say you should be aware of is that the window AC units in the bedrooms are very loud and right by your head when you sleep. Coupled with the street noise, it was hard to get a good night’s sleep. They do provide noise machines, which helped, but as a light sleeper I still woke up throughout the night.
Others were checking out the day we arrived and they were still cleaning the apartment at the time of our check in, but I felt that the bathroom could have been cleaned a bit deeper. The non slip bath mat should be replaced as it is not clean.
Great location and nice staff

Great place to stay. Very comfortable and safe. Clean with all the necessary equipment. The unit is spacious and as pictured in the listing. It was the perfect place to come back to after a busy day with family. We look forward to staying here again!
Ubicación inmejorable, cerca de todo y al mismo tiempo en un sector tan tranquilo. Definitivamente nos alojaríamos de nuevo
Great value at an amazing location. Very comfortable stay and a nice host.

I flew in from Texas with a group of 5, it was exactly what we were looking for. Super clean and had everything we needed.
Host was very responsive and informative, great hospitality!
Great apartment and amazing host!
Perfect location, just overall great experience. Me & my girlfriends had the best time thanks!

Love this hotel! The double room was extremely spacious and the location was fantastic. Right off of 5th ave and 40th next to Bryant park. It was close to grand central station which meant all subway lines were very accessible. Saving this to stay there again during my next visit.

I lived in NYC for years, and am having long-term visits each year. Unfortunately, this apartment stands out as one of the worst housing experiences I had in the city: for the first time, I had to handle the apartment's maintenance by myself. When I arrived, I discovered that the shower had low water pressure. I contacted the host, and they promised to check. After no improvement, I reached out again. The host claimed that maintenance had checked the pressure and  it was “consistent,” advising me to try it at different times since “it fluctuates”. I replied that it’s still consistently low, and the host promised to check it again and let me know. I NEVER HEARD BACK from them. While I waited for a response, I showered at friends' places, which was a huge burden. It took me a good while to understand that no one would take care of it. Eventually, I called a handyman. He changed the showerhead, and—voilà!—the water pressure was amazing! I am still super annoyed about this experience.

Great Host! Super kind, supportive and flexible!
Had a great stay 👍🏼
The perfect place to stay if you’re going to NYC! Quiet area and subways and buses are so easy to navigate! Super nice host! Definitely would stay here again!
Aung was a great host! Would definitely come back!
What an old school delightful place right in the heart of wonderful, walkable lower east side NYC. 🤌

It is my first time staying in airbnb and I had a wonderful experience, really grateful to have Allison as my host! She is so kind, friendly, flexible, helpful, bless her soul! She was very flexible and accommodating for our living arrangement. She helped us 3 struggling girls carry our luggage/bags up the stairs, and made us feel right at home. She gave us great recommendations of local food/places to visit, and even kindly brought us to visit Grand Central Terminal. The airbnb location is great, within walking distance from Central Park and other iconic landmarks are accessible via the subway. I had a lovely time getting to know and staying with Allison, she is awesome!
very nice experience and most comfortable bed!

Wonderful experience at the beautiful home with all possible facilities. Besides being super helpful, welcoming and understanding, the host has exquisite taste and paid great attention to details. Beautifully equipped kitchen and bathroom. The home was like a paradise, very close to SIR station, well connected to NYC and easily reachable by public transport. Location was serene. Highly recommended. The stay was made even more pleasant by the nature of the host and his family. I am definitely going there again.

Great location close to restaurants and shops, bus and citibike. Surprisingly quiet at night, which was appreciated. Reka was very responsive and helpful with recommendations etc. Would definitely stay again.

I was thrilled to have been able to stay at Jewell’s place, despite knowing almost nothing of the layout and vast areas of Brooklyn, other than the ever so hipster Williamsburg, which I guess is even more hip, or perhaps pricier, than when I took a stroll there a few years ago.  Jewell’s apartment is in a great location, close to Prospect Park and environs, not to mention a great mix of Brooklynites from all walks of life (if I can truly speak from the somewhat hip).  Jewell was very helpful both leading up to and during my visit, and I much enjoyed the few recommendations, particularly food-wise, which she suggested.  The room was comfortable and cute, though I did occasionally worry about the neighbors below when the wooden floors occasionally crackled underfoot.  Most importantly, the bed was very comfortable and all other necessities, well covered.  Great access to the Subway and central location for the best of Brooklyn wanderings.
Great room in great location!
Awesome spot my go to place wen i run to nyc for quick business
Clean, spacious, well positioned.
Good value for the location - room is small with little light but perfect for a short stay
Great location in midtown east - comfortable, clean, and responsive host.  Great option for two couples.

O local é exatamente como nas fotos. Existem 2 lojas como de conveniência na esquina. O metrô é muito próxima cerca de 1 quarteirão e meio o que facilita bastante e tem um ponto de ônibus em frente ao prédio. O anfitrião nos deixou a vontade e nos sentimos em casa.
The place is great and well-located, hosts were super friendly and always available

I loved my several weeks’ stay at Simona‘s place! It was a very clean and peaceful and creative place. It was lovely to have two big windows in the room, a dedicated closet rack and dresser, and a desk to work from. The common areas were kept very clean, and Simona was great at communicating. It was  a 10ish minute walk to Subway stations, and there’s also a bus stop much closer than that.  It was also nice to have my own fridge in the room so I could keep enough groceries to get by without needing to go out to eat much, though Simona had many great recommendations through her Airbnb guide of places in the neighborhood to eat. Definitely recommend!

Really great, comfortable place. 20 minute walk from Forest Hills Stadium and plenty of local places. Easy to get to and park and had a great stay. Will be on the lookout for this one next time I need to stay nearby.
Fijn appartement om samen als familie te verblijven. Leuke wijk met goede restaurants en metro om de hoek. Breng je oordopjes mee om lekker te slapen. Je hoort de trein over de brug rijden.
Amazing Stay. No complaints.
Cozy bedroom. Great location. Close to the subway.   Only takes 20 minutes to Manhattan.
Amazing! Thanks for everything

Tina’s home was sadly not as described. Although it’s in a great location and a great size, it needs major improvements. There were holes in the ceiling, drainage issues in both bathrooms, a hanging smoke detector, clutter and poor cleaning. Additionally, the heat did not make it to the third level, where the majority of bedrooms are located, so I would not advise booking during winter. Hopefully, investments will be made in plumbing, new linens & towels, the heating system, maintenance and cleaning. Overall, we had major safety and health concerns, but could not move since virtually all comparable properties were booked over Christmas for groups our size. Tina was responsive, but could not get the major maintenance issues addressed. A discount was applied to attempt to compensate for all the critical issues and inconveniences.

Such a wonderful apartment.  It was perfect for our purposes.  Great restaurants within walking distance and the subway was not too far to get to.  The apartment was spotless and is perfect accommodations for 2 people.  I look forward to staying again when we visit NYC.

The best thing about the apartment is the location. Furnishings are okay and the building is fine, with ceiling/sheetrock stains from previous water damage. Unfortunately, management & the super were dismissive when we experienced an a/c leak from the apartment above into the bedroom. We had to purchase an air mattress & sleep in the living room for 10 nights of our stay. I realize things happen & old buildings occasionally have issues; it would not have been a big deal to work with them on a ceiling repair. Ultimately, after getting Airbnb involved, they did move us to a similar apartment in the same building for the rest of our 41 night booking.
Collectively, Noomi and Airbnb reimbursed us for about 3 nights.
Highly recommend - big room and a massive bed. Really friendly staff as well.
Great apartment, smooth check in , good neighbourhood. Exactly as advertised.
incredible and impeccable hospitality. I’d book again just because. Thank you.
Clean and easy to navigate to the subway.
The apt was perfect for our needs . My son and I were happy to be able to prepare morning breakfast for the day . Bed was comfortable and the apt was clean .

This was misrepresented as a private apt on Airbnb & it’s a filthy old dive hotel w/ 75 rms & over 100 people. The dr hosts never got back with an answer about anything and one day I came back to my door wide open and they were going to “look into it” & never did. They are full of crap and the room was not fit for a dog - you wouldn’t put your bare feet on the disgusting run with food and cat food in it. Dust, crumpled tissue all over, toothpaste tops. So gross we left after 4 days even though we paid for 10. Trying for a refund, may have to go further. Do NOT stay here.
Decor was nice!
Great place to stay! Will definitely stay again! Awesome hosts and very friendly.

It doesn’t get more unique than this place! The property provided a great home base for ten of us to explore the city. Gordon gets an A+ for his responsiveness and accommodation. The size of this space is unparalleled - both the common living areas and rooftop. 4 1/2 stars! The home made our trip even more memorable. Thank you.
Good
All I could say is perfect
Had a wonderful stay. Very clean place and responsive host

Appartement très bien placé, proche des transports. Propre
Quelques petits inconforts.
Le petit déjeuné est noté comme inclus, ce qui n’est pas le cas.

Excellent! It was clean and the location was great. I was actually shocked with how comfy the bed was in my room! But just for anyone to be aware of - there is no elevator. I had a little suitcase so it was fine but if you have a big one or more than 2 and are not on the first floor - might not be the best time. Thanks for a great stay!

Super central location. Our room was great, beautiful view, bed was confortable. The staff is welcoming too. Only criticism : the breakfast is really bad, it’s not fresh, there is no choice, not worth the price
Great location and super clean space. Jude was very communicative and helpful through the whole process!
The apartment was very clean, in a great location, and met all of our expectations. We had a pleasant stay and would recommend it.
Top!
Wow.  What a great spot.  Location is perfect. Bed is super comfortable. Very clean.  Araz was a tremendous host. I will definitely be back.

We stayed at David’s place for a week and t was very enjoyable.
The place is clean and walkable to subway station, and there were even snacks available.
David was very proactive about our experience and made sure we had a good time and fixed any issues that came up.
Great place overall, would visit again!
It was an amazing stay, very clean, close to the subway and in a great neighborhood.

Rocelly is a welcoming and friendly person. She always keeps her place super fresh, communicates quickly and responds when you need something. The room has a comfy bed and lots of room for storage. The location is close by to a couple of deli/grocery's, restaurants and Trains B and D. You have everything you need in the neighborhood, which makes it a great value for a short or long stay in NYC. Thanks again!

Place was clean, looked exactly as pictured, and very comfortable beds. But we paid $638 for one room, which is already crazy, and when we arrived we unexpectedly had to pay the hotel taxes and fees, so it came out to nearly $800!!!

The apartment was great. It was very clean and had everything you could need. Jamal was very friendly and available for assistance. The location was great, on a quiet street but still close to the subway and restaurants. I will definitely stay here again in the future!

Great Airbnb in a perfect location. Five minute walk to the subway. Sam and Emily were so helpful, really quick responses and gave us loads of recommendations and advice both before our stay and during when we asked for it! Can’t recommend this Airbnb enough; such good value for money!
Negra was a wonderful host and the place was very nice!

We truly enjoyed our stay at Tony’s! The place was exactly as described in the listing with great access to transportation and many great restaurants.
He was very responsive and accommodating to baggage drop off and storage as we wanted to explore the city prior to our allowed check in and return flights.
We will definitely be back!
What a great stay! Amazing location and a nice and clean tiny house. Everything you could need!
nice place to rest your head,

Alexandra was a great host! The place was cute and cozy and location was right next to a metro station that was only a 8 min walk but is pretty north in Manhattan. Be prepared for an hour  long subway ride to get to downtown. The place did have cockroaches as well. Everyday we saw more and more and on the last night there were a few big ones by the bed. Other than that it was great! If NYC roaches don’t bother you, this is a great place!

Sabrina est une super hôte ! Très agréable et réactive, le logement était comme décrit. Je recommande vivement !
Nous avons passé un agréable séjour dans cet appartement.
Krasimir and Ploy are great communicators and checked in with us often to see how we were doing!

Highly recommend staying here. Was traveling with a group of three and the room layout was perfect and made great use of the space it had. Great location as well, easy to get to anywhere with two subway stations a block away
Room was great, no complaints. Very nice staff. Would definitely stay here again.

Great stay at Oyo as a family of 4. The room is small but we expected this and still chose Oyo because of the location which is just perfect. The room was clean and well set out, nice deco. Overall met all our expectations and will definitely stay again if we visit NYC again
I really enjoyed staying at Jiyoun’s place. It’s blissful oasis of care and friendliness. Thankful that I found it^^
very accessible to everything. number 2 train, restaurants, 24hr deli's. very warm and cozy just as described. everyone was neighbourly and polite. will book again when I'm back.
Spacious and extremely clean room in great location near to JFK. I totally recommend!
Easy check-in, Russel was flexible on letting us keep bags there for a bit on our last day, but a bit messy and not great shared spaces

Claribel’s place was perfect; just as described and in a great location. She was very responsive to me and my needs. I felt safe and at home here. It’s a beautiful place and had everything you could want. I’m very happy I found this place. I would definitely love to return back for a visit!
Great Hosts!

The 3 bedroom home was immaculately clean. It met my family's needs for our college graduation. The location was fantastic for our needs. There is a local grocery market within walking distance which is huge, especially for a longer than 3 day stay. The washer and dryer inside the bathroom was clutch - really loved it!
Drawbacks (minor): 1 bathroom only; it's a tight 3 bedroom for the advertised 6 person place, but the place is fantastic; on-street parking is bit sparse if you have a car (and you have to move your car to either side of the street based on street cleaning restrictions.

The stay at Andrada’s apartment was just great. The apartment was clean and exactly as expected from the pictures. Andrada checked in on us often to see if we needed anything, which we considered every attentive and kind. She also left us snacks and cool drinks and even provided things like shampoo, lotion, face masks, etc.
The location can be a little bit challenging at times but once we figured out how to get to Manhattan and Williamsburg, the subway rides were manageable, especially because the next station was just a couple of minutes away. We would recommend this place very much!

This was perfect apartment and lication for my family, great location for our New York 2nd visit...Apartment was great and all was amazing. Aneerban was great host and this was one of the best Airbnb ever!

今回は宿泊させていただきありがとうございました。
チェックインの時間を柔軟に変更してくださったり、荷物をチェックアウト後も置いてくださったりと、大変ありがたかったです。また、部屋はきれいで、短期間の宿泊には十分な設備が揃っています。
はじめ、土足で入室してしまったことに対しては大変申し訳なかったです。また機会があったら泊まりたいと思いました。

Ming is an outstanding host. My parents stayed with her for a week and by the end we enjoyed dinners together and had great conversations. My parents always had fresh bagels and coffee and everything their hearts desired. The apartment is clean, the bed is very comfortable and the room is sunny and everything you need for a week long stay. The area - Park slope - is beautiful and transportation is close. Would always come back to Ming and her beautiful space. Highly recommended.

Mary’s place has everything you need for a few days’ stay. You will find plenty of dishware, food basics such as salt, pepper, tea, coffee, sweetener, etc. and a choice of bodywash, shampoo, etc. Mary also provided toothbrushes and paste, extra face masks and sanitizer, in case we needed them.
The location is perfect, being in one of Brooklyn’s best neighborhoods and a few blocks from the subway. The building is charming but the structure is a bit old. However, the apartment has modern and practical furniture. If you are scared of dogs, bear in mind that as you climb the stairs there will be two dogs barking on the first and second floor. We had no problem with it since we have two dogs back home :)
We had an issue with the cleaning but Mary promptly and effectively sorted it out and we really appreciated it.
Overall, we had a pleasant experience.
It was nice just didn’t like the neighborhood
There were a few issues, but the staff was so kind and cooperative. Really good area for tourists!
Im definitely staying again I recommend this place 10/10 it was clean and in a good area and the host is very responsive .
Such a cute and cozy space! Ari was so kind, everything was perfect…also has a great shower!

Yonathan's place was very comfortable for our month long stay. Nice bedrooms, a large common space (connected kitchen & living room), and a central location to most of Williamsburg. He was very responsive and helpful throughout our time here. Would happily stay here again for an extended trip!
Great host, perfect for commuting to/from the airport and good value for money

Our room was situated next to the elevator bank and it was SO NOISY. I’m not usually one to complain but we booked it as a night away to get a good night sleep and we walked away more tired.  It sounds like metal being hit every few minutes as the elevators go up and down the elevator shaft. I understand it’s an old hotel but it was unbearable even with the use of white noise to try and help us sleep. I loved the location of the hotel but it was definitely a disappointment and left us more tired than when we got there.

Thank you so much for our stay! The apartment was an amazing size which allows you to relax and have a break from the busy city! All rooms were clean with all the amenities you need! We are so glad we choose to stay here over a hotel!
Thank you!
this was a great stay- totally reccomend

It was a great location even though it was noisy. Easy access to the train and blocks away from all the shopping of SoHo. The room was clean, no frills. Not a place I would want to stay for multiple days but a good spot if you just need somewhere to sleep and won’t spend much time in the room.
The Place was very nice and spacious.
We had a great stay. Cute use of space and comfy bed. Just was very responsive.

Great place to stay! My family and I felt extremely comfortable here. The apartment is very clean and I love the easy access. I’m originally from Brooklyn so this location was perfect for the area. Great local spots!
I think my only complaint is the strict no additional guests rule, which is understandable. We were there for the holidays and I was hoping family could pop in to see us but that wasn’t allowed so I’ll be mindful next time.

Thank you for hosting us! Five stars for the home and the stay itself in the end. However, there was a situation a couple weeks before our check-in date, where the host changed our booking to a different nearby house due to some issue with the original Airbnb listing. He did let us know, but I wish this had been communicated earlier and the details more clearly so that we would have had more understanding and time to consider alternate housing—this def could’ve been frustrating for someone that really prioritized their original location. We were hesitant going into it, but luckily the new location wasn’t too far off and Airbnb support was helpful, so we made it work and all ended well. The new house was nice and safe. The host also seemed more communicative after the booking mix-up and through check-in, so I appreciated that.
Very friendly staff members! Clean room and bathroom. Loved my time there and plan on coming again!

This became our Home away from Home.  Vitaliy made it so cozy for us that we did not want to leave.  The area where the building is is highly safe.  There is an ideal market right opposite the building, where you can find anything you want, including sandwiches and healthy food.  There is a Dunkin' right opposite the apartment building, and the subway is also nearby.  Central Park is a 5-10-minute walk.   Vitaliy is very responsive and readily available to answer any questions you may have.  He has been the BEST host we have had thus far.  I would infinitely recommend his apartment.  If I ever have to return to NYC, I would want to stay here.   Thank you so much for making your HOME so cozy for us.  This has genuinely been a HOME  away from HOME for us.
十分完美的住宿体验，距离机场的位置可以说是很近了，公交线路很轻松就可以到达，房间位置也很好找，房间非常的整洁，干净可以从窗口眺望到远处的曼哈顿天际线，非常的不错！

Tuan's place was great! Super close walk to the subway which was very convenient. Loved the fact that we had our own attached bathroom. Bed was comfortable. Overall a great stay in New York & not too far from Citi Field.
Bruce was very responsive — thank you!
Awesome

Really lovely, clean, spacious top home in an adorable neighborhood. Love the giant pine tree 🌲 view from the light-filled kitchen! Comfy bed, cozy couch. The park is soooo gorgeous! Really kind hosts with very sweet doggies. Thank you so much hope to be back again.
Lovely stay, such a comfy bed! Felt very safe too.
Hermoso lugar
beautiful place clean and comfortable everything nearby train and bus restaurant Alice very helpful and was very easy to check in please give a try I will be back

Staying at Hope’s apartment was great. For NY the space is super spacious and the apartment had everything needed for a longer term stay. Hope was also super communicate and flexible. She provided fantastic instructions for everything and great recommendations.  I will definitely be staying at Hope’a next time I’m in NY for a long trip.
Très bon logement, calme et très propre. Cependant présence reguliere de chats devant la porte de l appartement.
Great host, great place. Would love staying there again

This host discriminates against disabled people and would not allow me to check in, in clear violation of the law of New York City and New York State. I contacted Airbnb and when told that the discrimination was illegal, the host cancelled the reservation. We were kicked out into the street with no place to stay.

Personne très disponible pour répondre à mes questions pour mon arrivée. Et dans l'échange par la suite. Même tardive l'arrivée est très facile d'accès. Le quartier est très populaire et nous avons adorée. Transports et de suoermarket sont accessible très facilement.

Christopher’s place was perfect for my stay in Brooklyn! The home was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. Check-in and check-out were smooth, and Christopher was responsive and helpful whenever I had questions. The neighborhood felt safe and had easy access to shops, food, and transit. I’d definitely recommend staying here and would book again in the future
Great stay just wish it was more food options around
The host was excellent. I highly recommend tthis host for anyone interested.  The location was perfect. One of the best places I have been in my experience with this service.
Great stay here

Our stay as a family with 2 teenager kids was fantastic. The apartment  is located perfectly, it is quiet and the subway is directly in the neighbourhood. Chris is super smart and helpful. 10 out of 10 points.

The hosts were friendly and helping out fastly. All good but the location just wasnt right for us (travelling with kids with lot of luggage multiple times this stay to Manhattan), so we had a shortened stay. cheers! gr hans.

Enjoyed my stay at Kaz's accommodation. The room matched the pictures, very roomy with a desk, chair, lamp, large closet and air conditioning that always kept the room cool. The kitchen and bathroom were always spotless.
The local area is nice in the day but can feel a bit sketchy late at night. The area is also very predominantly Spanish speaking which is something to keep in mind. The subway station only being a 7 minute walk away was very handy.
Kaz and the team were always very responsive and helpful, such as when an appliance started acting faulty for us a new one was ordered straight away. He always checked in and replied very quickly to any messages that were sent.
Overall this accommodation served me very well and I'd recommend it!

Asif es un excelente anfitrión, amigable, amable, servicial, accesible, contesta muy rápido y ayuda en muchas cosas, la ubicación es muy buena, a 8-10 minutos del metro, barrio con muchos chinos, supermercados y restaurantes, a 150 m encontré un restaurante de Guatemaltecos con una comida excelente para que somos de centroamérica, se llama el Quetzalito, también hay cerca algunos restaurantes de comida mexicana, otros de comida colombiana, en fin la pasamos genial en nuestra estadía, la cama es muy comoda, el agua caliente en la ducha siempre funcionó bien, y en la cocina se puede cocinar de todo.
Very cozy, quiet, and safe neighborhood. I will definitely stay here again. Thank you.
This was a cool little room/stay! Just what I needed for my work trip. The hosts were very responsive and helpful. They made me feel comfortable. I’ll definitely be back. Thanks guys!

Wir haben uns während des Aufenthalts sehr wohl gefühlt. Besonders geräumige, gemütliche und saubere Unterkunft. Sympathische  Gastgeberin, Kommunikation perfekt. Sehenswürdigkeiten von NYC waren mit der Subway gut erreichbar.  Restaurants und Supermärkte fußläufig  in unmittelbarer Nähe. Alles in allem sehr empfehlenswert. Wir hatten eine beeindruckende Zeit in NY. Viele Dank!.
Cute place! The apartment was super clean. Nice neighborhood. Tash was a great host and very accommodating.

Booked this place for my first time in NY. One of the best airbnbs I’ve stayed in. Room looks just as pictured and felt very clean. Located within a couple walking minutes from the subway. Provided a safe escape from the chaos of the big city. Host provided great communication, and the building greater was very kind and helpful giving us a tour and helping us get our luggage inside. Will definitely rebook again in the future!

Jennifer’s place is amazing. Shes very attentive and handles everything in a timely manner. When I told her that we weren’t able to wash clothes due to the washer going out , she immediately sent a technician she made provision for us to use another washer and dryer downstairs. She is amazing. Having private parking was a lifesaver. Thanks Jennifer cant wait to come back

The room and amenities were as described. The bathroom was very clean and so is the room. I saw a post that said the place was dirty, but my wife and I disagree. Next time I stay near Time Square will be staying here again.
