I had a wonderful stay here.
The room was beautiful, modern, and comfortable.
The huge TV and the speaker above the bed were great touches, although I didn’t use them much because I was always out exploring the city.
The whole place is clearly maintained to high standards, with great attention to detail.
The neighborhood is quiet and peaceful, and the location is excellent: the subway takes you to Manhattan quickly and easily.
Antonio was very welcoming and took the time to show me the house and how everything worked.
It was also really nice to chat with him from time to time.
I didn’t get to meet Anna in person, but she was very kind and responsive to any question or need I had.
I felt completely at ease here, and after long days out in New York, it was so nice to come back to a place where I could relax. I’d definitely stay here again.
Clean, safe, and budget friendly place to stay! Spacious room and comfortable setting :)
Simple, clean, well appointed. I’d stay here again.

Price wise, I think it was a good value for New York. The location was near lots of restaurants in a safe area. The s I feel very swollen taff were very friendly and even joked a little bit. Overall, we were satisfied with every aspect of the stay.

Me encantó hospedarme en casa de Yaneth. Era tal cual las fotos, esta bien ubicado, a pasos de estación de bus y de subway. El sector cuenta con varios restaurantes y supermercados. Hay mucho latino también.
Me volvería a hospedar ahí
Can't beat the location. Apartment as advertised. We had 4 people in our party and I can't imagine much more than that for the size.
Satisfatória

The apartment was beautifully furnished and equipped with lots of love. We had everything we needed and more for our time in NYC.
The subway is really close to the building so it was easy to reach the city.
Suzanne described everything to us perfectly and has been an amazing host. We felt right at home during the 10 days of our stay and can only recommend it!
Great stay. needs microwave, shower was a slip an slde. no iron, no potholder otherwise well equipped. Great old building.  one flight of stairs.
Beautiful space, great location. Super comfortable furniture/Bedding

O quarto é excelente, o fato de ter banheiros privados fazem total diferença!
A pessoa que nos recebeu foi quem cuida da limpeza dos ambientes, não me lembro o nome dela, porém muito simpática, atenciosa e educada, nos ajudou com as dicas e localização do metro e como usar!
Ela merece os parabéns por ser muito simpática!

Great clean home. Within a 15 minute walk there are tons of eating and shopping areas. Easy access to the city over the queens bridge. Parking is only street or offsite at a parking garage, there are 2 within a few blocks to walk. Overall great place for a few week stay.

Staying at Amy’s place was great. We had someone there to check us in and it was very quiet while we were there. The location is amazing being right on Central Park with lots to do in the surrounding areas and very close to a subway stop. One thing is we worked remotely from here and there were a couple less desk options than what we saw in the photos but it all worked out. For the most part it had everything we needed for the stay and such a great location.

Every 3rd weekend in June I come home to Brooklyn for the Coney Island Mermaid Parade. Usually I stay in Sheepshead Bay but this time I decided to change it up. I found Suliman's listing on Airbnb and decided to book it.
Suliman was there when I checked in and made sure to walk me through the lock (always helpful!), got me situated and let me know he was available if I needed anything. He checked in daily to make sure my stay was going well. He also allowed for me to check in early because other guests had left early. This is always a nice bonus (but not something I expect).
Neptune pizza is right around the corner and there is also a bodega nearby with the best breakfast sandwiches and a chonky bodega cat. Not too far from the subway.
Would definitely recommend to anyone doing a beach weekend or in the area for another reason.

Nice apartment in a good location (although on a very busy road), close to subway with easy connection to Manhattan and within Brooklyn. Friendly and attentive owners. Everything what we needed for a great stay in NYC.

The townhouse was amazing. Location was amazing. I would stay there again in a heartbeat. Very spacious and beautiful. Just really really nice. It had a hardwood floors throughout most of the apartment. Very clean and neat. The beds were comfortable too.
We booked Richards place for a traveling physician, we had no issues. We would book here again.
It was really good

Anthony’s place is divine — impeccably designed and nestled in the treetops. The house has lots of character and is in great part of Bed Stuy with so many great restaurants, bars, and shops within walking distance. Anthony is a great host and hooked us up with a list of his favorite spots for us to explore. Highly recommend!
I loved the extra perks. Most places don't give you water, snacks AND cookies! Plus, the room had alot of space and gave what it needed for a hotel in the theater district. Definitely a good deal!

We had a pleasant & comfortable stay! You will have plenty of room to escape the busy parts of the city while relaxing, cooking, & enjoying this quiet & safe Brooklyn neighborhood. The nearest train (B/Q) is 1/2 mile walk, but also multiple bus lines very close. It's the top floor of a home & it is well-organized & supplied with a fully functional kitchen, bathroom & 2 bedrooms with desks & lots of dresser & closet space. Steve & Virginia are kind hosts who will respond when needed, but allow you all the privacy you choose. We'd definitely return if the need or opportunity arises!

The only good thing about the apartment is the location. The apartment was seedy and very dirty. You could tell straight away that it wasn't cleaned before we did the check-in. The WC was super dirty and disgusting, there was stuff under the beds (boots under one bed, deodorant, socks and something else under another). You could tell quickly that the apartment wasn't even mopped since those stuff under the beds are quite big and easy to find if you are cleaning, The kitchenware was also dirty..... I took some pictures. We stayed there cause we didn't have anything else but it was disappointing and disgusting after flying over for more than 16 hours to find the apartment that dirty.

Nolan was the perfect Airbnb host. Had plenty of local suggestions, very friendly but also gave me my space too. Very quick to respond if I had any questions. The location was perfect, 60 seconds from the front door to the L train, very walkable area as well. The check in instructions were perfectly clear, no confusion at all. My first time booking a room rather than an entire place, and it was a very easy and pleasant experience. Highly recommended!

Julio is a really kind, responsive and helpful host. The airbnb was clean, especially the bathroom and kitchen. The room was just as described and showed, except the shelves were not there. We didn’t have “real” blankets for sleeping, there were more of thin day blankets but with the heater it was alright at night.
The airbnb is 10 minutes away from the station (by walking) and you are in the city within 20 minutes.
You have tons of fast food places and groceries stores in the area.
We had no trouble with the area as well.
We would recommend to anybody looking for an affordable and sweet place, not far from the Center!
Ottima posizione per spostarsi e scoprire New York. Personale cortese.
It what it’s, fair with the price. Clean enough for sleep but don’t expect too much.
It was exactly as described, a small place located in a good area of New York. Would recommend for smaller groups who just need a place to sleep.

Me he quedado muy encantada con el alojamiento de Davi, primero que él ha sido muy atento desde el primer día! Te da todo lo necesario para tener una excelente estancia, fue nuestra primera vez en NY y definitivamente si volveríamos no dudo en volver a este Airbnb, se encuentra conectado a pocos minutos a pie de una línea excelente de metro (7) conexión directa al centro, estuve 4 días y esa rapidez con la que llegaba a lugares turísticos me encantó y me ayudó a aprovechar mucho mi corta estancia! Aparte que la habitación es muchísimo más de lo que creí, tiene las mejores comodidades, muy limpio y la verdad no tuvimos ningún problema con otros roomies que viven ahí por que inclusive si necesitábamos han sido amables con nosotros de prestarnos un poco de aceite que se los olvidó para cocinar…. De verdad, agradezco por la amabilidad de David para hacer nuestra estancia muy acogedora.

The place was very great and in a perfect location. The place looks exactly like the pictures and it was a good place to stay at to get the NY experience. The complaints about the place are that the bathroom door kept getting stuck and wouldn’t close. We almost got stuck inside the bathroom since it was very hard to open the door once closed. The tv didn’t work and the bed was very wobbly.

A really nice place that I will return to for future nyc trips! Jerrod was extremely helpful and had clear instructions. No big issues with the place. It was nicely cleaned, had a lot of space, and was pretty close to the subway!
The pictures of the room are accurate.  Mahmood was friendly and polite.  He lives at the home and offered information about the local area.  The room and bathroom were clean and in good condition.

I am in no way exaggerating when I say this has been the smoothest and most seamless experience I could’ve possibly had or asked for. Tara was such a friendly, clear and accommodating host and I can’t see myself having a better experience anywhere else in the Bay Ridge/Brooklyn area. Thank you for making this aspect of my holiday memorable. 10/10
Nice experience

The house was good, quiet and calming, clean and everything was already in place waiting for us. It met our expectations. Thanks to Annissa for allowing us to stay with her. We hope to repeat the experience for other circumstances.
Thank you David, great stay - 5 Stars !

Mi marido, mi hijo bebé y yo pasamos 2 noches en la brownstone de Brooklyn de Jamal. Nos gustó este lugar histórico y tradicional. La decoración muy bonita con la chimenea antigua. La cocina algo pequeña, al igual que es baño. Todo estaba limpio, menos varios utensilios de cocina que tenían bastante grasa de los inquilinos anteriores y tuvimos que fregarlos todos. La calle es algo ruidosa en la época de verano que nosotros estuvimos, pero se puede dormir bien. Personalmente, no nos gusta demasiado el barrio de Brooklyn, pero estuvo bien tener la experiencia allí. Al ser una casa tradicional antigua, tienes que subir muchas escaleras, nosotros llevábamos muchas maletas porque viajamos por EEUU durante un mes y fue complicado poder subir todo al apartamento. El aparcamiento fue muy bueno, pudimos aparcar en la calle justo en la puerta de casa, suele haber sitios y normalmente es gratuito.

Willie lives in  very safe neighborhood and his place is perfect. this was my end time staying here. Willie has spacious basement apartment with everything you need to make your stay very comfortable. Nice soft bed and very clean place. No TV in the bedroom but not no major issue because TV is in the living room area with alot of pillows and couch to  sit on. Willie has 2 good stores right around the corner from home. You may hear planes flying incase you but wasn't any issues don't like noise but for my spouse and I not a issue. I would definitely recommend  Willie place
Such a great experience!!!
Everything was great! Location, view , airbnb & host. Definitely coming back.
Great place if I’m in town again I’d definitely go there
Great location and the rooftop restaurant has a small but amazing menu!! What a view of the wtc!
Super gelegene Unterkunft, geräumig, etwas dunkel. Einfache Schlüsselübergabe in der im Erdgeschoss gelegenen Landmark Taverne.

This space was charming.
The staff and fellow guests were exceedingly kind, the location is awesome (just a few blocks from Penn Station), and there were some lovely touches (earplugs, a small fan in every room, luggage drop-off, a branded tshirt on your way out, etc).
At the price of ~$150/night though, it lacked many creature comforts one would expect from even a low quality hotel. Sleeping quarters are tiny (fewer than 6 feet wide); mattresses are uncomfortable; there’s a locker room smell of competing bleach and dirty laundry across the space; bathrooms/showers are cramped and crowded (and your bathroom may not be on your floor); and breakfast was a little sparse (bread, fruit, cereal, pb & j, and fruit/pastries that weren’t all fresh). During my four night stay, one of only two men’s showers was out of commission for part of the time; and breakfast was stopped short once due to a blown fuse that rendered coffee, toaster and microwave useless.
Great location. Easy walk to restaurants, stores, Prospect Park, and subway. Very responsive host. Definitely recommend to anyone staying in Brooklyn.

terrific location and property. within a 20 minute walk of a major portion of attractions and places of interest & just a few minutes walk to the subway line. the area was surprisingly quiet and the perfect space for little rest and relaxation (& would be equally perfect for tourists
wanting to see the sights). The only thing I would say to be prepared for is that the unit (or at least the unit I stayed in) did not have a mini fridge; definitely not a deal breaker, especially for the price, but good to know if you're someone that likes cold drinks 😁. This is Definitely the place to stay in New York City if you're trying to spend some time in Central Park. A+++
Ed’s unit was clean, in a great location and was decorated adorably

Tout ce fait à pied depuis le logement, l’hôte était réactif, le logement est propre.
Nous avons passé un très bon séjour, sachant que nous sommes 4 étudiants, l’emplacement était parfait.
Je recommande fortement StudioPlus qui a été excellent tout le long de notre voyage.

Thank you for being very responsive and being flexible in letting us stay longer due to our flight being late! I really enjoyed your home. It was warm and cozy! My family and I had a great time! Thank you!!!

House quiet, clean well equipped and cosy. The decoration and layout of the apartment are perfect. We arrived a bit sooner than expecting and Alex was here to let us enter in the house.
Friendly host with a lot of good spots to recommend in Brooklyn.
There are 4 different subway lines accesible in less than 10min by feet that go in every places in Brooklyn and Manhattan.
Would 100% rent it again if we go to NYC in the future.

Spring bed was unsurprisingly uncomfortable. What's less forgivable was the two pillows in the room. One was so soft that it couldn't support your head, and the other was a hard memory foam pillow. A value a good night's rest the most during an AirBNB stay, and found myself tossing and turning in this setup. Bathroom and kitchen were perfectly fine, but there weren't any K-cups to use for the Keurig, and the shower's ceiling would be tough for anyone taller than 6 feet to stand in. Host was quick to reply whenever I reached out!

Ivan’s place was great. Really comfortable and clean. He was available same day when there was an issue with WiFi. Good sized and well equipped shareable kitchen. Near subway. Highly recommend when you’re in the area!
Ruben was an amazing host. He helped in anyway possible. Truly an amazing experience. One of the better Airbnb’s I’ve stay at :)
Great room, fantastic location, and amazing view. Just as described. The staff was also very friendly and helpful.  Highly recommended!

What a lovely place! Clean, bright, and in a great location plus Heather was the perfect host. She was super responsive and kind, but also gave a ton of privacy. Everything was super clean. The room was bright and beautiful with great air conditioning. I enjoyed my stay!
Comfy space!!

Gregory a été d’une gentillesse remarquable, l’appartement est parfaitement situé et très propre dans un immeuble sécurisé.
Je recommande fortement !!
Great location

Foi a melhor escolha em New York, perto de tudo, porém o bairro é calmo e agradável. O quarto sempre impecável, funcionários educados e prestativos. Nota mil para o hotel, quando voltarmos para New York ficaremos novamente no NH.

This place is in a fantastic location! Subway stop right around the corner lots of restaurants and shops.
The place was great with two bedrooms. It had a small NY kitchen, but all that we needed while we were there.
Yue was very responsive to any questions or needs.
Would definitely stay here again.

We needed a clean, quiet, safe, reasonably priced place to stay overnight for 4, and Emily and Saul's place fit the bill! It was helpful to have the fridge for our leftovers, and although there was a Keurig in the room with coffee and fixings, we found a very nice cafe (Milk and Honey) only a block away. Also, the sheets were very soft and we had a good night's sleep.

This was a terrible experience from the start. I had to wait for hours just to get inside, and once I did, it only got worse. The place felt completely unsafe — there were people clearly living there long-term, and many of them were openly smoking weed. The whole environment was sketchy, uncomfortable, and honestly felt like a trap house. It’s also located far away from anything useful or interesting, so you’re stuck in a bad area with no convenience. Definitely not what was advertised, and I would never stay here again.
Great place to stay, would book again!!
Quite noisy neighborhood.

This is our 2nd stay with Hannah & we will be back for a 3rd, you can’t get a better host, nothing is ever a problem & she is extremely helpful. You feel right at home. The location, apartment and rooftop area make an incredible experience.
I can’t thank Hannah enough for once again making our trip everything we had hoped for and more!! You will never be disappointed when you choose to be hosted by Hannah ❤️
Welcoming staff and lovely hotel.
We enjoyed our stay. Everything was exactly as pictured and so clean with nice little touches like games and fun art everywhere. The street was quiet and the area was very nice. Thanks again :)

Absolutely exceptional Airbnb! Douglas and his wife Monica were exemplary hosts, communicating very quickly ahead of and during our stay. They live upstairs so were able to pop down and help us out very quickly when we had a little difficulty getting into the apartment.
The apartment itself is wonderful! They have thought of everything from cooking supplies to slippers and the decor is so beautiful. Including authentic Moroccan zelige tiles- gorgeous! It was impeccably clean.
The location is very convenient for a number of transport stops and restaurants, Whole Foods etc (and Douglas provided a very helpful local guide including some great recos). It's quiet during the day and evening despite being so central.
Could not recommend this Airbnb more! Thank you Douglas and Monica for a wonderful stay!

Una estancia perfecta! El lugar es muy bonito, incluso mejor de lo que se anuncia. Tiene una vista increíble desde el balcón. Las camas son cómodas, todo estaba limpio y ordenado. El metro está a unos 15 minutos caminando, es fácil de llegar. El acceso fue fácil, sin contratiempos, y el último día nos permitieron resguardar las maletas sin costo.
Es un alojamiento increíble, no duden en quedarse aquí.
Lovely place, close enough to subways, we felt safe. Hosts were responsive and friendly. Everything was clean and comfortable. Definitely recommend!
Amazing !
Had a nice stay

We loved our stay at Jeremiah's place. We felt right at home. Perfect combo of character/historic architecture/modern updates. Full house AC and fans were much appreciated during an intense heat wave. The first floor half bath and the fact that the nearest subway stop is an accessible one were useful for my mom.

this is one of my favourite Air BnB stays. the apartment is perfect- comfy bed, spacious lounge, good kitchen: it felt like a home from home, not a holiday let. Great place to lounge, as well as a good base for exploring. We loved the neighbourhood (lively; not too gentrified; lots of families; lots of good places to get south and middle american food; some good bars). It's an easy trip to manhattan and brooklyn on the L or M lines. Natalie was really helpful - let us leave our luggage for our late flight. Basically- loved it, and would definitely return.
Cheap place in a convenient area

A lot has already been said about this place. I can only repeat. Great location with Subway station just across the road, great places to eat nearby, easy access to Manhattan. The apartment was clean, very spacious for New York and had everything our family needed. This is the first time we have stayed away from Manhattan and would definitely do the same next time. We felt much more connected with New York.
Lourdes as a host was amazing, great communication at all times. Also a big shout out for the positive and warm welcome on arrival by the house manager.
Recommendations, Deli opposite for breakfast sandwiches and quick coffee, Macosa Trattoria for exceptional Italian food and pretty much any of the local Caribbean places..
A great stay made by Lourdes place! Thanks Lourdes
Great place to stay. Great staff and the location is perfect
The place was great with easy access to the subway. It was just what we needed for our long weekend.
near transportation very convinient

Tami is the new Alexa
Invisible yet full of information
Recommend the best restaurants
Easy check-in
Clean
Place is Close to metro
Helped us find a place to live

idéalement situé près de central Park et à 2 pas d’une station de métro.
L’appartement est propre, agréable avec le charme de l’ancien, bien équipé avec tout le nécessaire pour passer un bon séjour.
Il faut compter 4 occupants maximum car il est difficile de trouver une place pour le lit d’appoint pour un 5eme couchage et il n’y a pas assez de vaisselle pour 5.
Notre hôte a été très sympathique et réactif.
Merci pour ce séjour.

I stayed here during new years with my fiancé - it was well worth it! Wonderful location; felt safe with great restaurants all around us. The train station is so close, it was easy to hop on the train to go wherever else we wanted.
Nina even surprised us with a bottle of wine on New Year’s eve. Very wonderful surprise from a lovely host! She was communicative and made sure we had everything we needed. Even accommodated a late checkout for us.
The space was very, very cozy. The decor is just beautiful. I often found myself admiring the art around the room. TV has about every streaming service available so we caught up on some shows and movies while resting easy on the couch. The kitchen is small but in no way inconvenient to use. The bathroom was spotless as well. Bedroom has two nightstands with outlets (great to plug in your phone to charge while in bed) and the bed is very comfortable and roomy.
10/10 would stay again and recommend Nina to anyone wondering if they should stay here.
Lovely immaculately clean apartment very spacious had a great stay.
Nous remercions Kandi pour sa gentillesse ! La chambre est très grande, nous avons eu notre intimité, nous sommes très content ! Merci beaucoup Kandi !!! :)
Very nice place

Located in a beautiful and safe neighborhood in Middle Village, I have nothing but great things to say about this accommodation.  It was clean and exactly as pictured.   Cute little studio with AC, kitchenette and a comfortable bed.  Hind is so sweet and incredibly responsive.  Frequently checking in to see if we had any needs.  A very pleasant stay and trip to NYC.  Would definitely stay again if available.

This was a great location for my first NYC - visit as a solo traveler. The rooms are definitely only comfortable for one guest and were very clean. The only downside is it’s an old building with lots of noises and you can hear every noise outside and inside of surrounding guests. Elaine was  so kind and a wonderful help. She was able to extend my stay when I was in a pinch and my flight was canceled. She responded immediately during a very stressful moment and it was so helpful to know I had a safe place to return to as a solo traveler. Overall good stay in a great location!!
This was a terrific, comfortable place that was very accessible to everywhere in Brooklyn and Manhattan. It was so nice to have a safe place to come back to.

We had an incredible stay. A perfect, cozy home to come back to after a long day out exploring the city. Perfect location; James was welcoming, kind, responsive, and gave great, clear instructions. We will absolutely book again :)

Staying at Michael and Ade’s in Brooklyn was so convenient to get around. Walked to the corner stores without any issues, neighbors were very friendly. We felt very safe at all hours.
Host were at our fingertips from the moment we arrived till departure. Space was very accommodating for the two of us, easily could have just as comfortable up to 4 people. Everything was neat, and clean.
Had a great time in NY, will be back and will definitely stay here again!!
Great location! Safe area. Private, friendly staff, and host! Made my stay painless and we were able to enjoy our time. Thank you!
Great place to stay in Brooklyn. MTA just a couple minutes away. Clean and cozy home. Would stay again!
Maggie was such a great host! She was responsive, helpful, and welcoming. I would definitely stay here again. Thank you so much!
Excellent stay. Super clean and very helpful front desk. We loved our day— ended up extending a full day and would have stayed longer if we could. This room is huge.

This was our first time staying in a shared home rather than an entire place. Ame made the experience warm and welcoming! We didn't spend much time at the home, but every time we bumped into Ame she was wonderful to talk to, like coming home to a family member. She had great recommendations, a clean and unique home, and a wonderful aura and energy. The home itself is located in a great area, a quick walk to the subway and tons of tasty restaurants and chic wine bars. Will definitely be saving this airbnb for any future NYC trips we take! :)
It was a great stay. Just needed a place to sleep while exploring the city!
Served my needs perfectly. The neighborhood is remarkably quiet! The space was exactly as described, a nice retreat after a long day of NYC activities.

Ons verblijf in het appartement van Rachel en Bart was geweldig. We waren samen met onze kinderen, die net in de twintig zijn. Onze dochter heeft de slaapbank gebruikt met de twee topmatrassen erop en vond dit prima slapen. Het appartement is schoon, gezellig en goed geoutilleerd. De locatie is top, rustig en toch dichtbij restaurants. De metro is echt om de hoek, dus je bent zo in Manhattan. Rachel reageerde snel en gaf ook leuke tips. Kortom we komen graag nog een keer terug.

Eliana's place was the perfect solution for my overnight layover from JFK. The price is extremely reasonable and the location is quickly accessible from the airport. You can tell how much effort and care Eliana has put into the cozy room (more like a studio space). She's a great balance of friendly and helpful, while giving privacy to do my own thing. After greeting me at the door, she gave a quick tour of the space and offered food & transport recommendations. Her two little dogs were gentle, friendly, and great company on my occasional trips out of the room. The room is very spacious, comfortably lit, and with all its amenities, still had plenty of room for my 3 pieces of luggage and a quick yoga session. The bed was very comfortable, the work desk great, coffee/tea area easy to use, and the private bathroom spotless and thoughtfully stocked. I only wish I could have spent a little more time there. I highly recommend this spot and will definitely return if given the opportunity!

Sharda’s place was beautiful and looked just like the listing!  The beds were comfortable and the showers were hot!  The neighborhood is very walkable with 2 subway stops within blocks of the apartment.  The building felt safe and secure.  We had a small hiccup with communication on the first day with dropping off our luggage but Sharda was apologetic and quickly resolved the issue!  Would definitely stay there again
Super moment passé dans ce logement à Brooklyn. Merci à Rohit !

Excellent place!
Would book again for my next trip due to location, service, and friendly staff!!!

We had a fantastic stay at Jeanne and Dan's home! The space was cozy and inviting, and we especially loved the jacuzzi and grill, which made our evenings truly enjoyable. The neighborhood is quaint and would've added more to the experience had we been able to stay longer. Jeanne and Dan were helpful and ensured we had everything we needed.  If I find myself in Staten Island again, this will definitely be my first choice for a stay. Highly recommend!
Great space, very clean, quiet, and close to transit. Tony was an excellent host and had great communication. We loved the space and would gladly stay again!
great place for stay

She is a really nice person. She is very accommodating. I have stayed at her place for 2 months. I had a great time. I have made a good friend! I will surely come to live at her place next time I am in the city. The location is really good. Not too far from everything. The neighborhood is quiet, safe and clean.

The airbnb was clean and spacious. It's located in a convenient location with access to the metro. it's a good place if you would like to stay away from all the hustle of Manhattan but still be able to easily get to it for some sightseeing.
Solid location, easy access to public transport, kind and communicative staff.

I would stay here again when I come back to New York . No problems at all . The host was very responsive . The parking was kind of bad BUT you gotta remember it’s New York !! We found a spot right out front and was very content with it . The unit was very clean . Stocked with stuff you may need (towels, body lotion and soap, pots and pan , etc . Overall it was a great. Honestly beyond great I was so comfortable . Thank you
Thank you to Javier and team for the wonderful visit. Perfect place for our long term stay.

Deirdre was very helpful, very quick and responsive this was my first air bnb experience and she made it so easy! On one occasion it got a-bit chilly in the nights   I messaged Deirdre and let’s say that didn’t happen again she ensured that the heat was on and rooms were kept warm. The building was old but didn’t bother me nor the other members of my party.  I Would return.

Internet manquant dès mon arrivée suite à un problème de panne. Je me suis donc retrouvée 4 jours sans aucune connexion à devoir utiliser mes données cellulaires à étranger. Bien que j'ai signalé ce frais supplémentaire à Eve, je n'ai reçu aucun dédommagement de sa part ... Au départ les échanges étaient assez cordiaux en revanche j'ai très peu apprécié notre appel téléphonique. En effet, au bout de 3 jours sans internet, un technicien doit intervenir, or ne pouvant être sur place le jour de sa venue elle m'annonce qu'une amie à elle viendra l'accueillir. Bien que n'ayant très peu le choix d'accepter,  j'exprime tout de même mon inconfort à laisser toutes mes affaires avec deux inconnus en mon absence. Aucune excuse de sa part pour la gêne occasionnée et un ton assez autoritaire pour me dire que c'est la seule solution. Nous avions convenu que son amie me tiendrait au courant par message  pour me rassurer que tout étant ok en mon absence jusqu'à mon retour ... or aucune nouvelle !
Great place, garden area is wonderful. Everything about the place is as good as the description…or better!
Great place! Awesome host!

I had a conference to attend nearby, and the location couldn't be better! I had no major issues, and the treatment received from the staff was really good. The place is packed, but they manage to make it work in a very good way. I would definitely recommend it for a person with a tight budget that needs to stay in Manhattan.
Very simple small room. A great place to crash for the night.  Easy access to plenty of food and drink options.

Staying at this beautifully restored home was a privileged experience that added so much to our NY holiday. The room was so tastefully decorated, from authentic light switches to the wooden floorboards. A very clean bathroom stocked with all requirements and a comfortable bed.
A tour of the full house will show the amazing work Alaric and Anne have done in restoring and decorating this period home.
They are wonderful hosts, knowledgeable and helpful, and make a magnificent morning coffee! They and their home will be a memory we will never forget.
Great host + communication! Camila’s listing was accurate and provided everything needed for a welcoming space.
Place was nice & neighborhood quiet we enjoyed our stay

for my first airbnb stay it couldn’t have went smoother. May was extremely helpful and clear through everything and really helped make our trip alot smoother. the ONLY ONLY thing is the door is just a tad confusing to find at first but once you see it and know where it is so you’re all good. The room was extremely clean with an air humidifier, karaoke, nice views. Definitely recommend !!! there is also a parking garage on the same street
Would stay again

You really can’t beat a place like this— the location is perfect! Washer and dryer in unit, dish washer, and the world’s largest television. My only real complaint is that you cannot control the heat in the building, so it got REALLY cold sometimes with not much to do about it. Overall, loved my stay and would stay here again!!
Overall the hotel was in the perfect location, however the toilets had a hard time flushing and the gym didn’t look like the pictures.

Alexandra communicate very easily and answer quickly if you have any question.
Her place is located closed to 2 metro stations and that s a very good point. We had no problem to spend time in city center and come back at night.
It s a good value for money.
Thanks again

We arrived early morning and Chris let us in early at around 10 am. We stayed for a week with my whole family. The place is nice and clean. Close to everything like rest, shopping center, and most of all walking distance to the subway station.
I will definitely come back and use this apartment again.
Thank you Chris.

Highly recommend this place, nice neighborhood, very quit. Elodie was really responsive. Here place felt just like home, really cozy with a European touch. Really just a 15 minutes away from Manhattan. Walkable distance from many ventures. Will definitely come back on our next NYC trip.
Great stay very clean and comfortable!!

La zona in cui si trova l’appartamento è molto buona ma il prezzo dell’appartamento, considerate soprattutto le dimensioni, è davvero alto. Qualche problema all’inizio con la doccia e con la pulizia delle stoviglie che però ci è stato subito risolto.

Great apartment and location. The apartment was very clean and exactly as described. Location is amazing as it is located on a quiet street but at walking distance from many great restaurants and bars. Subway is also just a few blocks away so you can be in the center of Manhattan in about 30 min.
Communication with Augustin was good, he's very responsive and check-in was easy.

The best thing about this hotel, besides it’s unique history and originality, is the wonderful location in the heart of the LES. So rich with tenement history and so close to literally dozens of wonderful coffee and food. Nice staff. Easy subways uptown. Would be happy to return.

I had a super nice stay in this beautiful house. Andrew is a great host, always making sure we had everything we needed. I loved the room, it was really clean, the bed really comfortable and the extra space was really convenient. We had a cleaned bathroom everyday after we came back from being in the city. The building and the area really feels like New York, and the subway station 125th is super close and takes you to the main points in the city really fast. We felt really good all the time. I recommend staying at Andrew's place :)
Clean and great location

We had a family of 12 staying in this house and it fit us very nicely. A true Brooklyn Brownstone with access to the subway close by.
We had everything we needed in the house and cooked in the well stocked kitchen multiple times. We would recommend and stay at Gordy’s anytime we are in Brooklyn.
Amazing how fast the subway takes you into Manhattan for $2.90!!
Thank you Gordy for a vacation myself and family will remember forever.

We were worried about staying in Manhattan with two young girls but this place was amazing. From the entry to the Nomo we were in love. Location can't be beat - on a weirdly quiet street in the middle of Manhattan (Crosby). Bonus - they clean your room every day (key when you're in tight quarters with two rambunctious kids). Would 100% stay here again.
Buen lugar, muy tranquilo todo
I love the Pods!!! Incredible location and value. Will definitely stay here again.
Regina was a super host! Very responsive and helpful.  Would definitely day again!

We really enjoyed our stay at Kathleen's place. Kathleen was very responsive and the apartment was so beautifully decorated and had a lot of nice touches (coffee, cooking equipment, plenty of towels, etc).
If you're planning to spend a lot of time in the big city (proper) but don't mind a little commute in exchange for a peaceful, quiet neighborhood to rest your head, this is the perfect spot. I purchased ear plugs before my trip and didn't even open the box!

I’d definitely recommend this place. Beautiful views, walking distance to a lot of things and right near a subway station for anything else. The only issue we had was the lady helping us at check in could not locate our reservation for probably ten minutes, despite searching by our confirmation number. Eventually it was discovered that it was under my maiden name, but still not sure why the confirmation number showed nothing. I don’t feel like the lady helping us handled the situation very well (once she found our reservation she said it was “just added” but I had booked over a month ago), but once we got past that I had no complaints with the experience at all.
This was such a comforting stay.

Everything went well, place was very clean and cozy, loved that such a tiny room had a TV. Room and bathroom were great, and small kitchenette also carried coffeemaker and mircowave which were handy for our last morning before checkout. Only there was miscommunication with early bag drop-off, as we arrived early but couldn’t get it, texted Michelle and there was no response and neither further communications she mentioned and apologized for not responding as we were standing outside waiting for 20mins in cold. Ended up dropping our bags at hotel nearby.
Overall great location, walkable to most tourist places, good value for money for NYC at Christmas season.

James es un gran anfitrión. El departamento es tal cual a las fotos, está excelentemente equipado, amplio, tiene privacidad, y lo más hermoso es el espacio del café ya sea para desayunar o cenar.
La ubicación es muy buen, cerca del subte y un barrio muy bonito y tranquilo pero con muchos markets, bares y restaurantes cerca que no alteran la tranquilidad.
James siempre fue muy comunicativo con nosotros y se forzaba por hacerse entender y entender nuestro idioma. Es muy agradable, educado y respetuoso. Ojalá podamos volver pronto. Gracias por todo!
Beautiful space! Great location. Plenty of restaurants within walking distance. Easy walk to subway. The host was very responsive and accommodating. I highly recommend staying in this beautiful home.

L’appartement correspond parfaitement à la description. Très bon rapport qualité-prix. Une station de métro est juste à côté, ce qui est très pratique et l’arrivée autonome est pratique et rapide. Stella est très réactive et arrangeante. L’appartement est propre et simple. Le quartier est très sympa. Je recommande.

Alojamiento idéntico a las fotos, muy buena amabilidad de Fakhar, fácil la llegada.
Muy buena cocina y sala con todos los utensilios ofrecidos
Aspectos a mejorar en la limpieza del sofá en la habitación, y en el baño principal con mal olor. Entrada del edificio muy sucio y mal olor; y baja señal de WiFi en algunas zonas de la habitación.
Lawrence's spot is great. Super central location (~10 min walk to the L). Private entrance, well ventilated, & clean! Lawrence was very communicative.
The room was as described in the listing and Eibhlin provided clear and friendly instructions.

This Airbnb in Queens offered a peaceful and pleasant stay. The neighborhood is serene, but be aware that dogs roam freely. Parking is free, but you might occasionally need to park around the corner. Check-in was smooth, and Nancy, the friendly and attentive host, made sure I had everything I needed.
If you rely on public transportation, note that the area is primarily served by buses. The light rail doesn’t always stop nearby in the afternoon, so plan your commute accordingly. There are plenty of great food options nearby, and it’s a short drive to shopping centers. While there’s some slight noise from above, it’s manageable and didn’t disrupt my stay. I also recommend bringing extra blankets, as the heat may not always warm the Airbnb thoroughly.
This Airbnb is perfect for short-term stays!

We stayed at Esther's place for the full 15 nights. It was very easy to get to the apartment and check in. Esther was really responsive before and during the booking in case we had any issues.
The apartment is as advertised. The location is great with many attractions within walking distance and also really close to the subway if venturing further out. We were working remotely during our stay as well and the apartment had ample space for us to work in the separate rooms.
The kitchen is fully function so you can cook at home if you do not fancy heading out every evening and the bedroom and bathroom were of good size.
On site laundry is quick and easy to use for a longer stay.
We would definitely stay again!
The view and balcony were my favorite, I would definitely recommend staying here it was beautiful!!
We enjoyed our stay here! Good for the price and convenient for taking the subway
Cozy and quiet apartment very convenient to Smith St / Cobble Hill / Brooklyn Heights.

ambiente da set fotografico, mood elegante ed urban, posizione strategica vicino la metro e nel centro di Soho, quartiere rilassato, passeggiare per le sue strade tra i migliori negozi di NY è stato davvero rilassante. consigliatissimo
Very nice air bnb would stay here again.

We loved our stay at Bran’s! It was a quick and easy walk to the subway to Manhattan and the place was incredibly clean. It was really nice to have so much space compared to being in a tiny hotel in Manhattan - it also has a ton of character!
Beautifully curated space, conveniently located building and wonderful building amenities.
Clean, comfortable, easy, accepted my dog, one parking spot in driveway, near Claremont Park which is great for walks! Host was very good at communicating.
Great stay. Had a wonderful time. Apartment is a great size and clean!  Nice area a lot to do and places to eat. Had everything we needed. Thanks

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
An exceptional stay from start to finish. This Airbnb exceeded every expectation. The home was immaculate, thoughtfully designed, and stocked with everything a guest could possibly need. The host went above and beyond communicative, welcoming, and truly committed to ensuring a flawless experience. The location was ideal, offering both convenience and a peaceful atmosphere. Every detail, from the comfort of the bed to the cleanliness of the space, made this stay unforgettable. I genuinely wish I could give more than 10 stars. Highly, highly recommend and would return in a heartbeat.

Our stay at Anthony’s home was amazing , every inch of the home was spotless . There was plenty of washcloths , hand towels and towels . The house was easy to access and had so much cute decor . There were nothing bad at all about our experience . We loved the easy to access thermostat for our comfort . Every bedroom and the living room had a beautiful flat screen tv . The sheets were spotless and everyone got great rest in the beds . The closets were such a nice touch for our guests . We loved being able to hang our clothes . The appliances were beautiful and updated , not to mention, SPOTLESSSSSSS . We had an amazing stay and I’ll definitely be back again ,
Thank YOU
A
Wir haben uns bei Tiffany zu Hause sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Nähe zur U-Bahn sowie die Einkaufsmöglichkeiten sind optimals um New York zu erkunden.
Sono stata benissimo nella stanza di patricia. La casa è molto pulita e Patricia è stata gentilissima con noi. Super consigliato! Posizione perfetta per raggiungere tutte le attrazioni della città
Very clean
Great place, clean, very calm and quiet for NY. Nice host! Would recommend and come back here! Thanks to Laura for hosting us!
Great Place to stay in hearts of Manhattan but it’s not a place to find similarly to a hotel but it’s a home

The apartment is well furnished and is a great space.  It is one of the quietest places that we have stayed at in NYC.  We enjoyed several restaurants in the Flatbush area.  We were grateful to be  in walking distance from our daughter
Perfect for our first visit to New York! Exactly as described!
Great location - right next to the Beacon Theatre. Nice neighborhood. Very comfortable beds.
EXCELLENT location. All amenities as promised. * * * * * ;]
Location superb. Apartment nicely furnished. Kind assistance. True to NY
Great host, great area. Would stay again

It was the perfect spot for our overnight in NYC!  Great location and the private rooftop patio was wonderful to relax after a day of sightseeing.  Henry kept in communication and answered all our questions.  It was such a gem!
Good location with easy access to MTA. Quiet at night. Clean rooms, quick elevators. Front desk is accommodating and friendly at all times.

Jazmin’s place was alright .  We walked in and there was a noticeable smell as if the previous people were smoking inside without airing it out. 旅居干净整洁，我们就是住两晚，大部分时间都是在外面，附近有免费车位，方便。美中不足就是近路有点吵。。屋主很热情，回复很快，谢谢🙏
Nice place to stay in Brooklyn! It was clean, cozy, and properly heated. There is a bus stop near the building. The communication with host was great.
房间设施齐全，干净整洁，交通方便，周围餐厅超市都有，Harlem区曾是爵士乐和布鲁斯音乐文化的重要区域，值得很好的探索。

Had a wonderful stay in Brooklyn.
Apartment was perfect for us; spacious, clean and had all amenities needed for our stay.

The apartment was comfortable including comfy beds, our only note would be the blinds are rather thin but with an eye mask this was not a problem. Also the road is generally very quiet at night which is brilliant especially being in NYC.

A brilliant stay, would highly recommend.

We highly recommend Peaches Hothouse for dinner and Warude had the most incredible breakfast tacos. The hosts were very helpful and responsive while giving us all the privacy we needed.
Brooklyn, baby. This is a room in someone’s home, but if you can get past that, you really can’t go wrong with the location and the vibe of Clinton Hill.
Edgar, Tom, and their cat Digi were wonderful hosts! We loved the location, not to mention it was only a 10-minute walk from the G train and many bus stations. Would stay here again.
The place was great! Great place for a couple visiting NYC.
Great place, it was perfect for a longer stay
Bon emplacement excellent accueil de l’hôte
Very clean and as described! Reut communicated clearly and proactively! Had everything we needed - thanks for a great stay!

Perfect location to spend time in Soho and walking distance to other amazing neighborhoods.
Great location right by the subway station apartment had everything we needed and qas extremely clean

Great small place. No bedroom, which could have been clearer about. The sleeping space is in the living room, and the pull out was really small - just big enough for me (im small)- but was very comfortable.

The apartment is excellent! We stayed a month and found the place to be an oasis away from home.

Rebecca and Nick were very responsive to our questions. We would highly recommend this listing and hope to stay again.

Lloyd is a friendly, helpful host. He was able to adjust to some changes in our travel plans and was responsive throughout the trip.

Convenient to go around in New York city, close to Central Park.

Perfecta ubicación en Soho, el metro está a unos metros de la puerta del hotel. Es cierto que se encuentra en una avenida muy transitada y el ruido se escucha las 24h, hay que tenerlo en cuenta. Aún así ha sido una agradable experiencia y para el precio que tiene supera las expectativas. La gente que trabaja en el hotel muy amable.
my family and I was extremely happy with our stay.. I was very thankful for being there. I would definitely stay there again
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour.  À distance de marche du Ferry Staten Island gratuit pour aller à Manhattan, c’est génial! Merci Stephanie!!

We love this place. Very nice and close to everything we wanted to do.
Except TIMES SQUARE> Nice break from that madness
Perfect accommodation for a short stay in the city. The room is very clean and quiet and a short walk from the subway station.

Beebe’s spot was perfect if your looking for somewhere to sleep after being in the city all day. The neighborhood is perfect if you’re wanting to hang around Brooklyn/Bushwick area with lots of bus, train and walking options.

Jane's place is in a great Brooklyn neighborhood within easy walking distance to restaurants, coffee shops, parks and subways. She's a super reliable host - always responds promptly, plus her place is so spacious and comfortable in a lovely neighborhood.
In an expensive city like NY, James's  place is ideal for the budget-conscious. Public transit is walking distance. Everything was as described. James was responsive, friendly and a respectful host.

Henri’s place was great for our quick trip to NY. Convenient location, easy check in. Henri was also so accommodating with letting us keep our luggage at the building, free of charge, locked away safely, after check out!

My stay at Junior and Stephanie's place has been my best experience with AirBNB so far. They were both consistently sweet, accommodating, and proactive in making sure my needs were met. I always felt comfortable and right at home during my stay. I absolutely loved hanging out with all of their cats and dogs during my stay as well! Something that stood out to me during this trip was seeing Junior and Stephanie outside hanging out with their neighbors. It was really endearing to see them enjoying the company of others in their community. With any luck, their place will be my go to for my future solo trips to NY!
Had a wonderful stay! Highly recommend it
Third time stay, awesome as always.
Quick responses and super helpful and friendly! Gorgeous place. Would stay again!

Mei ha sido todo el tiempo muy amable, pero el apartamento debería estar un poco mejor cuidado para el precio. Hay un fuerte y desagradable olor en el edificio. La zona está bien comunicada pero no parece muy segura.

Great location and stylish  place !

I enjoyed my stay and will stay here again. The neighborhood is a whole vibe. Close to public transportation getting to and from LaGuardia. Future guests will not be disappointed.
This was such an amazing place to stay!! location was amazing and the place was so clean and inviting!! i would 100% stay here again whenever i come back to town! love it!
He was really nice and the location is close to subway the apartment was nice and clean everything was perfect.

We had a wonderful stay in Samantha’s place! Everything is beautifully decorated and spacious and we were able to enjoy a nice evening on the back patio under the string lights with a nice glass of wine. Samantha and Reg were timely with responses and gave clear instructions. We loved our stay!
great location, good place, everything worked out smooth but read through the rules since there are things that are important for the host

Der Aufenthalt bei Reka war super.
Alles wer von dort aus super erreichbar und die Preis-Leistung war Spitze.

Amazing place and amazing location. The room was super comfortable and had all the items needed for a pleasant stay. The apartment location was spectacular, around 15 min by subway to all the main attractions (Financial District, Hudson Yards, Time Square, etc...). Went there to celebrate NYE at Time Square and we didn't have any problem coming back to the place by subway late night. The streets were calm and safe. Restaurants and bars close by. Darin was an amazing host, always so attentive, flexible and willing to help and provide guidance when needed.

We spent one night at this location. The location is great since it’s close by to so many other places. The area is walkable and easy to get around where we wanted to go to. I will definitely be staying at this location again in the near future when I want to travel back to NYC!
Our stay at Olivia’s was perfect in every way. Serene apartment, great location. Olivia and her family were extremely helpful, responsive, and friendly.

Sarah is a great host and gave me very nice tips about the city! The room is exactly as it looks in the pictures. The apatment is close to the subway station and you can find grocery shops, drugstores, restaurants and other services near by.

I had an amazing stay at Allison’s place. She was such a great host. I had so much luggage and she helped me so much. She was accommodating with the checkin and out. Her dog is also the sweetest. I would highly recommend. She’s such a sweet person!!
El lugar tiene una buena distribución y muy cómodo para la estadía, ame la cama pude descansar muy bien. La ubicación también Excelente

Centrally located to subway and good restaurants. Place is very nice and larger than pics. Great internet. Amal was very communicative and we especially appreciated the early checkin after a red eye from the west coast. Also just a 10 minute walk from the top of Central Park ( we walked top to bottom twice) and a 2-minute walk from Marcus Garvey park. The place is well equipped and a comfortable stay.
We were pleasantly surprised with the room they communicated with me prior to check in and things went smoothly.  We would stay again

James is like a member of a family that you always had .
He is a patient & calm gentleman with a lots of love & understanding for people, life & art. Always ready to give you a hand, but not intruding your privacy in any way.
He gives you his trust & you just want to give him the same, if not even more ..
I am just happy that I got to meet James & spent some time in his beautiful apartment.
I hope I will visit again. ❤️
It’s a great place to stay. We were able to get to Manhattan by express bus all week. The neighbourhood is quiet and quite pleasant.
Great place to stay & the host was very nice.

Lakisha's place was in a great location and, like other reviewers mentioned, incredibly clean. Some things that are less obvious but might be important for certain travelers: 1) the single bathroom is shared between 4 different rooms (other bookings) so do not expect a private bathroom/shower space, although the bathroom is shockingly very clean, 2) the entrance has a 1-floor walk-up with no handrail so might not be the most accessible for those who have trouble with stairs, 3) while there is no central AC, the window unit in the bedroom is very powerful which is great, although there is no cooling unit in the bathroom so it gets quite warm in there, 4) as another reviewer mentioned, you cannot lock your bedroom door when you leave (you can lock it from the inside but not the outside), which feels a little weird... I know there is not much that can be done about this due to state regulations but if you are someone who travels with a lot of valuables, might be something to consider. Overall, this space was great for us as were just using it as a place to sleep during a busy weekend trip. The location is fantastic: super convenient for subway/bussing and there are a lot of convenience stores and restaurants nearby with a pleasantly surprising number of vegan options! We all felt safe walking around during the day and at night. We very comfortably fit 3 people in 1 unit that had 2 beds, a dresser, and plenty of wall outlets for charging. The extra sink in the kitchen was also really helpful for washing hands when the bathroom was occupied. The kitchen was stocked with plates, mugs, a kettle, etc. if you needed to use it. There were no issues with noise or anything else from any of the other units and we actually didn't even bump into any of the other guests. Lastly, Lakisha was really on top of it with communication and gave us all the information we needed to have a great stay. She provided towels and even extra toothbrushes and soap which was a nice touch.
Great place for a long weekend. Easy walk to Carnegie Hall, Broadway theaters, and Metropolitan Museum.  Staff was very helpful.
Rene’s place was a great place to stay. Easy to get to manhattan and around Brooklyn which is what we were looking for. Rene was responsive and helpful when we needed it!
quiet clean place friendly host I enjoyed my stay.
Perfect place if you want the best for the lowest price. The stay was really good and the communication was quick. Thanks for the stay.

Close to public transportation.
Easy check in.
Lovely stay. Great communication and friendly hosts :)

Overall I had a great stay. The apartment is cute, comfortable, well stocked, and very peaceful. The floor and utensils were a bit dirty. One thing that really annoyed me was the constant packages being delivered to the apartment. From morning till the afternoon, the doorbell kept on ringing when all I wanted to do was just relax!
Great!

Great place ! Very clean and the location was walkable to stores and restaurants. Really enjoyed my stay and would recommend this place to anyone.

Staying at this luxury suite was an absolute delight! The apartment is impeccably clean, stylishly decorated, and equipped with all modern amenities. We enjoyed our month stay at this Airbnb! It’s very spacious and clean. The bed is super comfortable as well as the couch. The ac units work really well. The neighborhood is safe although a little rough around the edges. It’s located conveniently with groceries around, and a block and a half away from the train station which can take you straight into manhattan. Jeremy and Caitlin were super communicative and friendly and always responded quickly to any questions we had!

지하철역과의 접근성, 근처 편의점 등 접근성이 좋았습니다:)

The place was as desceibed, I liked that it was super clean, specially the toilet and shower even when they were both shared
Very nice very friendly family

Autumn also checked in with us after we arrived and communication with her was super quick. Highly recommend if you’re visiting the area and want to stay somewhere away from the hustle and bustle of Times Square!

This is a secure building that is VERY close to the subway's AC blue line (not even a block away) and a reasonable walk to the 1 red line (four or five city blocks). Eric is responsive and helpful with requests. It's a small room but very affordable for when you basically just need a place to sleep and get ready.
Really nice apartment, well located. Aaron is a nice host too! Would recommend.

Chris was an amazing host, especially for our first time visiting NYC! The location and neighborhood are absolutely lovely and conveniently close to the subway as well as plenty of nearby dining option. Chris is incredibly kind, helpful, and went out if his way to welcome us to the city and his home, and Jitsu is the best little co-host anyone could want! Highly recommend and definitely a re-book for our next trip to the city.
This place is great!

The location is perfect if you will be commuting into the city as the Rosedale station is a 12 minute walk and the long island rail road takes you directly into the city in less than 40 mins.
I would highly recommend this place if you are looking for just a room to stay in and not spending loads of money.

Nikolai’s place is even better than advertised. It is spacious and the natural lighting the loft gets is incredible and helps with work/creativity. Lots of cute nooks to relax. The bed was extremely comfortable. Nikolai is an amazing host and incredibly communicative and helpful. So happy to have made this loft my home away from home - and looking forward to staying again next time I’m in town!
Great stay.

This place was an exceptional homebase for looking at apartments throughout Brooklyn. Would recommend to anyone needing a place to stay while looking for a place in Crown Heights, Bed-Stuy, or Bushwick.

We loved staying at the Moxy.  We found it to be clean, quiet and well located for our weekend getaway to Manhattan.  I definitely would reccomend to anyone who wants to stay in the area.

Logement très agréable et bien placé. On trouve le métro vraiment pas loin, et il y a de nombreux endroits où manger, boire un verre ou faire quelques courses.

Super save area, will be back for sure!!!!!!!
Un superbe séjour , l’appartement était encore mieux que prévue et un emplacement de choix à 5 minute à pied de Times Square

The neighborhood of attractive brownstones felt safe and is walkable to subway, grocery, restaurants and park.  The 3rd party hosting service was responsive, but their ability to resolve issues is limited because they rent the unit from a landlord who is responsible for actually resolving issues.  When the smoke alarm in the hallway started chirping every minute, and could be easily heard within the apartment, they could only request that the landlord address the issue. They never did.  I ended up buying a $7 battery and replacing it myself.  Also, without notifying us, the local maintenance guys came into our space while we were out, moved our stuff to get to the heaters, and didn't bother to move it back. The space itself looks nice, with a nicely renovated bathroom.  However, the floors/ceilings are very thin and creak loudly . If a light sleeper, it is disruptive. The kitchen is extremely small with almost no counter space. If returning to the area, we will stay elsewhere.
Mathew fue encantador. Super atento desde el principio. La casa estaba bien. Electrodomésticos nuevos y cocina preparada. A la casa solo le faltaba luz natural.

Very spacious apartment and Carlton and his father were very friendly and made check-in easy. The immediate neighborhood was nice (and actually very quiet) and SUPER-convenient to Beverly St Station on the 2 line.
Shannoya is a great host!
Exactly as described. A great value! Comfortable. Thank you !!!

We had a wonderful time at Miao’s studio. Great experience, good position, the studio was exactly as showed in the pictures. Miao was really easy to communicate with and friendly. Definitely recommend!

jessica's place was sooo cute and like literally so spacious tbh wow prime NY real estate!! the backyard is SO cute and the cats are little loaves of bread to DIE FOR i love them. jessica was also super communicative! overall we really enjoyed our stay :)

This is probably the best host I’ve dealt with through Airbnb. He was flexible with our bags being dropped off early, made it easy to check in and check out, showed the place, and made great recommendations. The place was immaculately clean and everything worked well!

A beautiful apartment, much better than the photos! Very spacious and the tall ceilings make it feel even bigger. Jennifer was gracious and her home was spotless. I enjoyed staying there.
Great spot to stay for a summer in New York. Steps away from everything you’d need, and Axel was a great host. Thanks for a great stay!

What a remarkable and meaningful time with my daughters!  We would love to stay again.  Thank you for everything, Jamal!

Nous avons séjourné en famille chez Ally. les échanges ont toujours été hyper fluides, Ally est très arrangeante pour que tout se passe au mieux lors du séjour.

amazing location
pretty small space but as expected for price and location.
not luxurious but great for just having somewhere central to enjoy NY

Melissa and Cary’s place was so awesome - they’re great hosts who were so attentive during our month long stay.

I’m so glad that I chose to book Adman’s place I felt at home right away, the Location is absolutely a must ( love it ) you can literally find everything that you need it nearby, like supermarkets, bars, restaurants, theaters… ) Another amazing point about this place is because the apartment looks brand new, they really did it a great job .👏🏻💯✅
I highly recommend it for anyone that is coming to NYC and need a great place to stay.
Beautiful place! The home was comfortable and clean. I would definitely stay here again!
Great place and location! Five minutes from the subway; two blocks from groceries; safe and relatively quiet and everything worked. I would absolutely stay there again.

Great apartment in the middle of NYC, near everything, 10 minutes walk from Times Square, in a quiet street and building, I didn't expect so much peace in the heart of the city.

Could not have been happier with our stay. Beautiful apartment. Great location.
Prompt communication

My partner and I had a nice stay. The kitchen didn’t have silverware, so that made eating meals tricky. In addition, it wasn’t clear in any directions that the fridge was not turned on. I put leftovers and groceries in the fridge and left it overnight, to discover that my food had spoiled the next day. I wish it was written in the guest handbook, but this detail was left out. Overall pretty good stay.
Great location! Very cute apartment with everything accurately described.

A very good location, close to Subway stations, felt safe in the area, a lot of places to eat, drink, market not so far.
The place is rather minimalistic, but it had what's really necessary.
A floor in the apartment could be cleaned though, seems like only vacuumed.
A safe in the apt. was not working properly, maybe needs a change of batteries or some maintenance.
Water in the washbasin in bathroom was flowing down the drain quite slowly.
So in general a place is recommendable, but certain things could be improved.
The host is great, gave clear instructions, much more affordable than anything else I could find!

A cozy place indeed at a wonderful location, near Central Park and with two separate metro lines just a block away.
The room is not very big but clean and very suitable for a couple like us, who went out early and back in late.
Marie is a pleasant host and will help you find your way whenever necessary.

This was a great place to stay for our five day trip. The hosts were friendly and accommodating and their home was quiet and clean with lots of authentic family character.
We enjoyed Harlem having never stayed there before. Getting downtown is super simple on the metro and the restaurants around the Airbnb are fun and tasty. The best part is almost zero tourists. We felt safe walking to and from the metro and around after dark close to the Airbnb. Would stay again for sure!
Best bang for your buck!
Beautiful place

Lourdes’s place was amazing. It was very spacious, clean, and cute. The beds were also extremely comfortable. We were only there for 3 nights and wish we could have stayed longer! The building itself is pretty old and therefore noise travels easily, so we ran into a few instances where the neighbors complained; I’d be cautious of making any loud noises. Nonetheless, I highly recommend!
Our stay was very comfortable. The apartment was spotless and organized. This was a perfect spot for our girl's weekend in Brooklyn.

They were such nice people. He met me as I got there. And came inside to show me the place. He had a book with restaurants, how to take the bus, train etc. I am a former New Yorker but he still made a point to tell me all that has changed. He stayed and talked with us about the local area and how to get around and where to go. He didn’t just cut and leave. I appreciated that. I took his suggestions and went with it.
It really is a quiet and nice neighborhood and being in New York that says a lot. I felt safe at night and there were nights that we came home late from the city and we felt safe.
The subway is within walking distance I don’t feel the need to take the bus to the train station but it is right at the corner.
The apartment is cozy. It has no stove but has a fridge, microwave and coffee machine. The bathroom is really nice and well kept.
I will say the mattress is FIRM. It wasn’t the most comfortable but sight seeing makes you tired so you go right to sleep. It was amazing!

It was my second time staying at Seymurs place and it was again a really great experience. Seymur is warm hearted, very reactive and helpful with whatever you need.
The apartment is very bright and spacious. You’ll find everything you need.
The location is in the heart of Williamsburg, my favourite area. You will be finding a lot of cute places to eat, drink, shop and discover.
Highly recommended!
A charming , warm , kind , quiet lovely little bedroom in a shared apartment. This was a great place to spend the night and day. Wish we had more time to enjoy NYC from this Airbnb.
Great location, friendly staff, very comfortable beds. Our group of 7 was quite comfortable.

We loved Jose's place. It was extremely comfortable. Loved the beds. Even the sofa bed was comfy. We had plenty of supplies, towels, soap, etc. The kitchen was well-equipped and stocked with coffee! I hope to return one day and I'll definitely recommend to others.

Brittany’s apartment was amazing and made our New York trip the best! The apartment itself was amazing and was so homely. Everything was clean and left perfect for us, the building itself was also amazing with an amazing rooftop with great views! I would recommend Brittany’s apartment to anyone looking to stay in New York. The location was also great in a lovely neighbourhood with east transports links across the city!

Toda a minha estadia foi 5 ⭐️. Jibari foi um anfitrião super atencioso e respondeu a todas as minhas perguntas e ajudou em tudo. Ficamos lá uma semana e não o encontramos pessoalmente, dando-nos total liberdade na casa e deixando-nos super confortáveis. O apartamento aconchegante com todas as comodidades necessárias para ter uma estadia perfeita. Super recomendo!

It was a wonderful and relaxing stay! The place was cozy. The bathroom was a little small but overall the experience was great! I’ll definitely will come back and I highly recommend for anyone to stay here. Winston was always available and fast on responding.. great host & great spot!

Percival and Candace’s place was very nice. It was clean & very self explanatory. They offered to help with anything we might need help with and were very responsive with any questions we had. It was a great place to stay at. There were a lot of great places within walking distance and it’s close to bus and train stations. Overall a really great place to stay in Brooklyn. I would recommend it to anyone!

Win is very friendly, helpful, and hospitable. Super attentive to us like when I needed a first-aid kit and also provided bags to carry our leftover food with us. If you don't mind walking to the metro station several blocks away or taking some extra time on the bus, I highly recommend Win's place as a comfortable and quiet stay. We thoroughly enjoyed our time!

Amy’s place is the best place to stay in Staten Island!
I really enjoyed how helpful and communicative the host was. She gave an abundance of privacy and provided everything you could think to need for a trip away from home.
I will definitely be back my next trip!
Truly clean and comforting!
Front desk was alone several times, cigarette smell too strong, and dirty and unkept
Easy, and successful!

I can only say so much because I was at this location for one night. But everything that could happen within a nights stay met positive expectations. Renato was very friendly as well with great restaurant recommendations. Win son bakery for breakfast and Ichiran for dinner were excellent choices.
Best place to rent !! I enjoyed it & I’m definitely going back !!

Ines and Chris were such friendly, helpful  hosts! They made me feel very welcome in their beautiful home with Ines’ art everywhere and many lovely small touches. Ramen is very cute friendly and quiet dog. Having own bathroom was great and lovely breakfast and access to some communal spaces in the home and garden was so nice. They let me leave my bags before check-in. The stay was exactly what I needed and much more. I hope to see them all again! Comfy bed and peaceful home. The only one thing for light sleepers is the road noise - it is close to Atlantic Ave, which is made very clear in the listing. Maybe bring earplugs if you’re not used to it :)
Ótimo custo benefício, café da manhã muito bom e funcionares super agradáveis, pude fazer o checkin 12h, muito mais cedo e o check out mais tarde… foi super agradável, com certeza ficarei novamente

Had a very pleasant stay as I was exploring NYC. The staff is kind and helpful. The rooms are tiny but clean. It's overall a nice accommodation if you're looking for a place to spend the night while you travel around the city during the day.

El alojamiento vale mucho la pena en cuanto a precio y calidad, es un alojamiento para gente joven que no tiene inconveniente en caminar 10-14 minutos a la estación de tren.
Nosotros nos encontramos muy cómodos en todos los aspectos.
Shemi was very friendly and nice. Super easy and pleasant communication!

Very responsive host. Comfortable beds.  Air conditioner in each bedroom and dining room. 3 TVs. Good WiFi. Lots of fresh Keurig coffee pods. Fresh bagels, bread and challah on arrival. These were generous touches.
Great home and I will definitely stay here again in the future 💓

I had a great stay at this Airbnb ! The space was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. The neighborhood was vibrant but quiet at night, with plenty of great cafes, restaurants, and shops within walking distance. Communication with the host was easy and responsive, and check-in was seamless. I’d definitely stay here again next time I’m in the area.
It was lovely and very clean. Beautiful apartment

Stayed two nights at James and Laureta’s unit which was ideally located a few blocks from our son’s apartment. It was nice, cozy, clean and comfortable with complete amenities. Would definitely stay again!

I had a lovely stay at Alexis and George’s home and am very appreciative of their hospitality. They were both very kind and understanding regarding some travel delays and they make sure to go the extra mile to make your stay as comfortable as possible. I would highly recommend them as hosts!
very clean,

Brooklyn made last minute accommodations for me to book her place and did so with ease! Response time was quick and the place was clean and in a cute neighborhood close to the subway!! Easy to find and very walkable!!
Great walking distance location to all the things. Bed was uncomfy.

Jessica’s place was close to 301 residence hall and we wanted something very close to our daughter’s dorm. The place was spic and span and the bed was very comfortable. Just the right kind of home u want to come back to in the evening n crash into. It is very close to good eating joints and walkable from all major attractions. The toiletries provided were of best quality. You know she is a super host on airbnb after visiting her place, and for the right reason 👍🏻.
This was such a pleasant and lovely stay, thank you Jordan!
Chris is very nice! Attentive, respectful and friendly, I feel satisfied in my stay there; I definitely recommend it also that the subway station is very close to the apartment.
Parking is right next to the house,super convenience!

Absolutely loved staying here the space is clean, quiet, and near everything. Nina is a very communicative host and gets back to any questions you may have within minutes. I definitely will be booking with her again when I come back to NYC.
it was nice and clean for the price. The host was very helpful, helping me fix the TV.
Es war eine wundervolle Zeit in New York. Die Wohnung war unsere kleine Oase. Der Ausblick ist einfach grandios und jeden Dollar wert.
Christopher was very responsive and we really enjoyed Brooklyn!

“We had a wonderful holiday. The house was exceptionally clean, and the hosts responded to all our questions very quickly and kindly, always being helpful. It’s a place where you can stay with complete peace of mind. The location was also very convenient, with the metro station just an 8-minute walk away. Many thanks to our hosts for this lovely stay.”

The small room I stayed in is perfect for a single guest just needing a place to rest. The living space is large and inviting with a great ac unit. During a heat wave the room itself can be uncomfortable even with the fans and the streets of Brooklyn are very loud so I’d say prepare ear plugs or get the bigger room. The cheaper price makes up for it though. Zaca cafe is 3 minutes away and is probably the best restaurant for food quality and value (they have the greatest burger I’ve ever tasted and I’m sad I won’t get to eat it again). Many other options and the subway being 8 minutes walk away is perfect to get around the whole city. I had a great time and always felt safe!
Great people, exactly as described!

Der Aufenthalt war leider sehr enttäuschend. Die Unterkunft war bei der Ankunft in einem unhygienischen und schlechten Zustand – mit Flecken auf den Wänden, Bettwäsche und Möbeln, sowie Verunreinigungen im Bad und in der Küche. Es war so unangenehm, dass wir die Unterkunft noch in der Nacht verlassen mussten.
Der Gastgeber hat sich leider sehr unkooperativ gezeigt und die Mängel trotz eindeutiger Beweisfotos abgestritten, anstatt eine Lösung zu finden.
Ich kann diese Unterkunft daher leider nicht weiterempfehlen.

This  place was awesome!  Clean and well stocked.  Plenty of nice big towels (which is rare) water bottles, coffee, etc.  The location had two subway stations nearby which worked out great due to some subway maintenance.  We were able to walk to and from both stations and felt safe day and night.    The host was very responsive and made himself available at all time.    Highly recommend this location!  It is small but very comfortable for 2 people!
Pictures are way deceiving.

We had a wonderful one-week stay at Lu’s - clear recommendation! :-) Perfectly clean, great location, nice and safe neighbourhood and loads of space. Besides, Lu ist just the sweetest host ever being warm and welcoming, chatty and running the extra mile in order to make you feel at home. Thanks so much for having us!! :)
Brady’s space was perfect for my stay - clean, comfortable, well located. And Brady was helpful and flexible. Highly recommend!
