Desiree je velmi milá hostitelka. Proces ubytování byl po domluvě snadný, Desiree nás očekávala v domluvený čas. Ubytování je blízko stanice metra v klidné ulici, poblíž několika obchodů a restaurací rychlého občerstvení. Milým překvapením pro nás byla i roztomilá přátelská kočička.
Nice area, beautiful place!

All was really fine, the room was smaller than expected, but not by a lot.
It really wasn't a prob as we weren't in the room very much, out all day and most of the eves...
Got a very good rate through AIRBnB
I called the hotel to check and they were quite a bit higher going direct to them
J
This place is so cool. It was very close to the nearby subway stations and peaceful.

The location was very quaint and quiet. It was very close to the subway and other local places to eat and drink. I would definitely stay here again and recommend. Hussam was a wonderful host and checked on us multiple times to make sure our stay was comfortable.

Very clean, well equipped and quiet accommodation in a nice area of Brooklyn. Commute to Manhattan took about an hour, public transportation available close by. Addie was a helpful, friendly, very communicative and in total great host; minor issues with the WiFi and the house key were solved instantly upon request. Would definitively book again and recommend! :)

Yonette was a very responsive host. The apartment was immaculate and exactly what was represented. The location  was close to where we needed to be, with easy parking and access to the apartment. We had a lovely stay!
Cute cozy studio, very nice decor. Host was very polite, and attentive. Would definitely stay here again, and would recommend others to stay here. Thank you again Yahira.

Super dicht dran am Flughafen, mit Auto oder Uber in weniger als zehn Minuten vom JFK zu erreichen. Trotzdem ruhig, kein Fluglärm, ich habe mich wunderbar erholen können nach einem anstrengenden Nachtflug aus Europa, warme Unterkunft zum Wohlfühlen, liebevoll eingerichtet, super nette Verpflegung noch mit Kaffee, Tee und Wasserspender. Tip Top!
Nice location everything is located in close proximity.

Daryl’s place was nice, quiet and cozy.
Highly recommend for anyone staying in the Bronx.
Ottima esperienza, super consigliata! E' facile spostarsi a dietro, l'appartamento è piccolo, ma pulito.
Muy amable
everything its good thaks so much.

Excellent location due to closeness to public transportations,  market, stores and restaurants.  Sasha is very responsive and her mom is such a great host. She’s friendly, approachable and warmhearted. I would definitely stay here again.
Amazing stay - couldn't have asked for a better place for the week - Zahavas were lovely and super helpful throughout the stay! We’ll be back again for sure!!
I loved my stay at this residence! The hosts were accommodating to all of my needs. I would recommend it to friends and family visiting Brooklyn ❤️

We had a wonderful stay in Georgia’s studio apartment.
It’s very spacious and in a fantastic neighborhood. If you’re looking for new, bright and modern this may not be for you. If you’re looking for spacious, terrific value, great neighborhood and responsive host this is a wonderful option.
We really enjoyed walking around the neighborhood, checking out local cafes and exploring Prospect Park. Manhattan by subway is about 40 minutes door to door. A bit longer on the weekends.
This was our first time staying outside of Manhattan and would definitely do it again.

Lance's place was just what we needed for our weekend exploring around NYC, the location is great and just a quick train ride to Manhattan, Brooklyn, and Williamsburg (typically 30 minutes or less). There is a new coffee shop right across the street and another one around the corner. Lance was quick to respond when we had an issue opening the door upon arrival and got it fixed right away. The suite is very spacious and tidy with a comfortable bed, which was just what we needed after a long day of walking around the city. Would recommend 100% and have no reservations for staying here again in the future!
Great place to live in Brooklyn.

We loved the neighborhood of Astoria. The subway to Manhattan was a  quick 10 minute walk. The neighborhood had many good restaurants to chose from and there was a supermarket directly across the street from the apartment.
Great area to stay in, had lots of stores and restaurants that were nearby. The place was clean and secured.

Me and my friend landed around 11 am and Mohammed was kind enough to let us check in earlier than 3 pm (as per listing) so we wouldn't need to stay outside with our luggages.
The floor was quite dirty and we found some hair around the house but as we only needed a place to sleep, we didn't care too much.
Check-in was easy and all rules are well explained.
There were a couple of amenities missing from the ones listed on here and the power outlets in the bedroom and some of the ones in the living room were not working, I'm not sure about the ones in the kitchen and the bathroom as we didn't use them.
UBS arena is 1 hour away by foot and 5/10 minutes away by car, I wish the difference was stated in the listing but that's on me for not asking prior to booking.
Lots of different food can be delivered to this location and the bus stop is just a 5 minutes walk away from the house, which helped me and my friend get to the city center easily.
Overall a great stay, would book again :)
Beatuiful Airbnb. Totally recommend

We had a lovely time staying at Brady's. It's in a great spot in Bed-Stuy, easy to walk to the subway, restaurants and bars. House and room were comfortable, clean and exactly as described. Love the artwork too! I would definitely stay here again.

it was great experience. i stayed there 3 nights. easy to reach everywhere. house is so clean. Andrea and Natalia so friendly and helpfull.
Thank you so much again guys.

Booking for NYC visit.
Should of stayed with my initial AirbnB booking. A 5 person stay.
Pros: Walking distance (about 5-8 minutes, depending on your walk speed) to get on MTA Train to head to Manhattan, LaGuardia Airport, Brooklyn.
Walking distance to Pizza Parlor & grocery stores. Take Reusable Bags if you have them, one store charges for their grocery bags.
Cons:
• Obvious old dated building smell when you walk in.
• The bathroom was very dated and dark, rusted shower rod, dirty shower curtain, & Tiny tub.
• Beds & Sofa were Hard as rock, I can manage to sleep on a hard bed but these were intolerable.
• Very loud upstairs Tenants or Hosts!
The upstairs and downstairs (AirbnB doors) are in the same foyer, so you can hear everything out in the hall.
Early morning, they had guests ringing the doorbell to the AirBnB floor, kept waking us up.
• Pretty sure they entered our AirBnB when we weren’t there. The locks were different when we would return.
Only recommend if last resort.
Great place to stay, excellent location

As a first time user of AirBnB I didn’t know what to expect. Abbe exceeded any expectations I had through clear and concise communications and care! I asked a ton of questions and Abbe answered them quickly and graciously! The space was so cute and chic that we felt at home many miles away from our home.
Thank you for such a great experience!

Très bon séjour passé chez John également Joseph
ils sont très réactif sur la messagerie
Nous nous sommes à peine croiser durant les 4 jours
Le logement est très propre et la literie confortable
et l'emplacement pour accéder au métro Astoria vraiment très pratique
Je recommande !

I loved staying at Jeniffer's. Super location - in walking  distance to great downtown neighborhoods, subway in the area, very convenient to have a little kitchen area, comfortable bed - a perfect home away from home for a longer stay.

Die Unterkunft war unsere Ruheoase. Genau das, was wir nach unseren Tagen in NYC gebraucht haben!
Ich war hier mit meinem Sohn, 20 Jahre alt, der diesen Rückzugsort genauso genossen hat, wie ich.
Hier konnten wir jedes Mal aufs Neue Kraft, für den nächsten Tag tanken! Man muss sich aber im klaren sein, dass es doch eine gewisse Zeit dauert, bis man in Manhatten ect. ist.
Wir hatten neun Tage, daher war es für uns in Ordnung!
Auch die Fahrt mit der Ferry hatte etwas total beruhigendes!
Ich kann mir keinen besseren Host vorstellen. Duane war immer zur Stelle, wenn wir etwas benötigten oder Fragen hatten! Ein sehr sympathischer Typ!!

We have stayed at the appartment for one week and it was absolutely brilliant: very, very nice hosts, spotless clean house, spacious and very quite. You simply do not notice you are in Manhatten! The Metro train number 3 takes you to Times Square in about 15 minutes , walking distance to the Metro station is not more than 7 minutes.
We can highly recommend this appartement and hope we can come back one day.
It was a good place to stay last minute

The place is clean and comfortable, very near to public transportation. Carlos is also super friendly and we felt at ease having him around. The room is little small but worth it for the price you pay. I do have to mention that there are 6 rooms in the apartment so you will be sharing the 2 bathrooms with potentially more than 6 people (we had couples/singles in the other rooms) and sometimes we had to wait for the bathroom to be free. However, we only stayed for one night and came back to sleep, so this was not an issue. Would still recommend Carlos’ place for anyone on a budget!

Vida’s apartment location in SoHo is just perfect if you want to explore the city on foot. Great restaurants just steps away. Tribeca, WTC, financial district, Village- all easily reached. The rest is just a few subway stops away.
Add to this a nice cozy place, responsive host and you have a perfect stay in Big Apple.
Amazing location and space! Spotless and perfect for a weekend in Astoria. Very close to the subway

Excelente alojamiento, 100% recomendable. Era pequeño pero perfecto para dos personas. La cama era un poco chica para nosotros pero nos acomodamos bien. El frigobar era muy pequeño, así que no recomiendo comprar cosas para poner ahí más que alguna botella chica o algo dulce. La presión del agua excelente, fue la mejor ducha. El staff del lugar muy amable, y hay un mueble compartido en cada piso donde podés tomar más toallas si necesitas, jarra de agua caliente, microondas, etc.
Lo único malo es que no tenía opciones veganas de desayuno, más que algún café con leche vegetal. Solo había masas, tendrían que tener por lo menos fruta o alguna opción siendo que es una zona tan frecuentada, especialmente en agosto que es cuando fuimos.
Fuimos dos personas y estuvimos muy cómodos. Un poco complicado conseguir estacionamiento alrededor.
Good house in a quiet neighborhood. Family friendly with enough space for upto six persons.
Nice room in a nice house in a nice neiborhood. The shared kitchen well equiped and with some snacks, water and sodas to buy if you wish.
Neel and his accommodations were great! Friendly, helpful, clean! Neel was always quick to respond to our inquiries and offered recommendations on where to go and how to get there. Hope to return!

Deirdre’s place was clean & spacious, more so than it looks in the pictures. The sheets & blankets smelled fresh. That was important to me knowing I was sleeping on a clean & comfortable bed. There is a really good coffee shop called brown butter just a 2 min walk for delicious coffee. My daughter & I enjoyed staying there & would definitely go back. Thank you Deirdre!

We had a very pleasant stay in Camille’s house. We arrived a bit early than the check-in time but this was no problem at all. The house was very clean, modern and well maintained. Spacious enough for a big family. There was amazing coffee and tea provided. Kitchen was fully equipped.
Camille responded always very quickly.
Ideal place to stay for visiting NYC.
If we come back to NYC in the future, we would choose Camille’s house again!

This is a rare find with great location for those who prefer to steer clear of the NYC traffic and difficulties in finding parking. Loved having our own exclusive parking spot literally within steps of Weifeng’s condo! In addition it is a waterfront view with a boardwalk directly across the street.  The place was immaculate and he even provided bottles of water and coffee. So if you want to visit NYC without the hassles this is the place! Just take the Staten Ferry which is about 5 miles away. It provides an incredible breath taking view of NYC! In addition, there are many great little places to eat that are reasonably priced like Lee’s for pizza and beer, and Jerry’s diner for breakfast on the way to Staten Island Ferry. This is one of the best valued Airbnb we have stayed at! Thank you Weifeng!
Great location. Nice place. My roomate was awesome! Super respectful and we had great conversations.
Excelente trato y hospedaje. Todo muy limpio, ordenado y agradable. Le agradezco a Sofiya todas sus atenciones. Definitivamente la recomiendo. Todo excelente.

Nice studio in a great location with easy access to Grand Central and plenty of nearby restaurants. I stayed here for over three months and had a good experience. I also appreciated the host’s responsiveness to any issues that arose during the stay.

Als geboren Litouwse kent ze als geen andere de kleine verschillen tussen Amerikaanse en de Europese gewoontes. Ze heeft met al haar ervaringen ons goed wegwijs gemaakt. Ze is er wanneer je haar nodig hebt en ze weet je een gevoel van privacy te geven zodat het altijd als thuis komen voelt. Nog eens bedankt en graag tot een volgende keer!
We chose this hotel for the rooftop bar, and it didn’t disappoint! Our stay was great, and we had a fantastic time.

Vanessa’s place is tastefully decorated. You can tell that she’s put a lot of heart and soul into making your stay.
We were there around Christmas and the place was decorated for it. We hosted dinner for our family who was visiting, I was worried about the space but Vanessa has prepared the space to accommodate 6 people. There were even 6 sticks of hot chocolate (the kids visiting were delighted), it’s tiny things like that that shows how much care was put into it.
There’s no shampoo and soap , we’re ok with it since we read the reviews and prepared but it’s something to take note for others.
Thank you again Vanessa

Great for the price and location. The apartment was very tidy, but it wasn’t exactly clean. My biggest issue was that I don’t think the sheets were changed when we got there (wrinkled like they were slept in, had some crumbs and hairs). Overall a decent place for one night.

Très beau logement, dans un très joli quartier de Brooklyn.
Bien situé à 5 Minutes du métro, ligne direct vers Manhattan. Quelques restaurants, bars et commerces à proximité.
Très propre et soigné, le logement est plus grand que ce qu'il parait sur les photos.
Everything was awesome

Good location for moving between Manhattan, Brooklyn, and Queens. I stayed here for a week and had good and clear communication with Rosa. I had breakfast every day at the apartment, there are many good restaurants around the area. The house is charming and full of plants. I just wish my room had more privacy  (the sliding pocket door does not fully close)

Everything was lovely at Rodney’s place. The place was stocked with last minute items that you might need (e.g., toothbrush, pasta). Check in was also extremely easy. The only thing was that despite following the instructions for the dryer, it was not working. When we asked Rodney about it, he shared that the dryer was not currently working and immediately changed this information in the house manual. Rodney was very responsive. Parking was easy and there was plenty of it on the street. It was a peaceful neighborhood. I recommend this Airbnb!
Great stay! Very nice hotel!

Wi-Fi无法使用，且连接房间内Wi-Fi后每天需要支付15美元，需要支付费用的条款隐藏在连接页面的最下方，完全没有看到。第一次遇到房间内Wi-Fi需要收费的酒店，且并没有在描述详情内包括。
除此以外，房间很干净，距离时代广场和百老汇都非常近，周围有地铁口，适合步行。
Our stay was a wonderful experience. Far surpassing our expectations. We will definitely visit again.

Nice small apartment in the center of New York City. The apartment is exactly as described in the advertisement - so make sure to read it.
There were 2 shared restrooms and 1 shower available on our floor.

Buena ubicación , a 4 calles del central Park y la 5ta avenida, metro cercano ; el apartamento limpio y tal cual se ve en las fotos , volveríamos sin duda. Buen anfitrión . Ten en cuenta que debes subir 2 escaleras angostas e inclinadas , no nos afectó a nosotros pero está bueno saberlo .
The place was just as advertised.  The host was very accommodating.  I would recommend it to others looking to stay in that area of the city!

Комната была очень хорошая и чистая. Квартира была светлая, просторная. Все кухонные принадлежности имеются. Ванную комнату моют каждый день. Рядом метро, а так же супермаректы, Starbucks.  все понравилось

Are you willing to be CHARGED for things that you DID NOT ASK FOR/USE and CANNOT USE when you are FORCED to pay for already? If not, please read this!!
This is not about the room or the staffs, this is about the hotel policies/business and how you protect your money. They only tell you at your check-in that you will be charged $20/day for "facilities", Airbnb says it is "complimentary" when we booked it there, for wifi, access to the gym and patio, a voucher of 2 drinks/person/day (this voucher thing was not mentioned on Airbnb).
In our experience, firstly, the wifi was an UNSECURE wifi, this is the first hotel I have ever been to and charge extra for wifi while we already paid for the stay. Secondly, a very small gym and a nothing-special patio to be charged to access it, no use at all! I bet you get enough exercise exploring NYC all ready so why need these at the hotel. Most importantly, the drinks vouchers were completely useless since they closed their bar 2 out of 4 days of our

Great hotel with a dorm style layout compared to a traditional hotel. Laundry room had snack machines and games to play such as pool, fusball and arcade machines to kill time. Staff was proactive in making sure everything was perfect for each guest. Location is close by to many attractions in Lower Manhattan with transit access not too far away. Definitely will consider staying here again in the future!

とても居心地が良かった。
家族も大変喜んでいた。
朝食をもう少し充実させてほしい。
サウナがなかった。
We had a lovely stay. Apartment was as in the description. Communication with Shelly went great. Thanks!
Great stay!
Loved it

The Airbnb was just like it was mentioned (had all equipments; low ceiling). It had enough space and has a good price-quality ratio. The Commune was good. The Communication was easy because the Host was really kind and replied fast. Highly recommended! I would love to come back.

This place was very special. Firstly, the vintage decor was extremely unique and made the place into a true time capsule. Plus, everything was very clean; the bathrooms were pristine and the rooms were well-kept. Also, René communicated very well - instructions were clear, he answered questions quickly, and was very polite. We also got to chat for a bit about New York life and music, which was very pleasant! I was thrilled when a small local jazz band came to play in the parlor in the evening. I would definitely come back to this place, and I highly recommend it if you’re looking for a unique stay with friendly owners.
Excellent place! Extremely clean and new. Much larger than we had expected for that location
This was our second stay on the property. Great location, and easy check in. The property is exactly as described and the host is an amazing communicator!!!

R.J was an excellent host!!
The purpose of this trip was for my bestfriend birthday and her first time in NYC (my 4th).
R.J was very accommodating when it came to check in, my bestfriend arrive a day before me in the early morning. She was able to check in early due to weather conditions and didn’t want to stand in the rain so I give R.J major points for that!
The area is very beautiful (day and night). Place is right by across from a park and also a police station, so there is a lot of traffic and noise. I must say that if you are driving just be mindful of the no parking signs. Also be prepared to drive around for about 20 mins at night if there are no parking.
The unit was perfect for two ppl, originally it was going to be 4 of use but two people cancelled. There were a couple minor concerns:
1. The shower door needs to be fix, it looks like it can break at anytime if it is not opened slowing.
2. The space between the shower and sink had hair, probably from another stay.
3. The stairs leading up to the unit do need to be fix because it makes a lot of noise going up and down. ( please be prepared to carry your luggage up two stories or stairs)
4. Probably want to wipe down the wall through out the house, did see a lot of finger prints and some make up smear.
Other than that the unit was beyond amazing and location was perfect. 8.5/10
Perfect for two people and a very lovely stay 😊

Her place must be one of the best Airbnb places I’ve ever stayed at. It’s beautiful and Maia couldn’t have been more reassuring and helpful. She bailed me out of a tough situation and responded to let me know her place was available asap. I can’t appreciate her hospitality and kindness enough.
Great location
Good house for the price in all aspects!
Cassia is very friendly. I definitely would recommend staying at her place.

This is a wonderful property. Beautifully, tastefully decorated. Lots of natural light and super clean. High end towels and linens. Really cozy comfortable bed. It didn't take long to feel right at home.
Taylor and her team were very responsive and very solution oriented.
The apartment is located in a great location. Very pedestrian friendly with grocery stores, the subway, and restaurants all within easy walking. Definitely recommend and Yes! we would stay there again.
Quiet,clean and restful
I had a great stay quiet and peaceful neighborhood will definitely come again

Best place to stay at NY! Very friendly and peaceful host. I felt like I was at home. I recommend this place to everyone. Everything he said in his description is very true. Thank you again. We will be back soon. It was nice meeting you.
Very nice place and host!
Amazing location, great hosts, and spacious area!
Great location and stay! Loved the place’s walkability and access to everything for out-of-town visitors. Nelson was responsive and helpful as the host.
I stayed one night at Alfred's place. It was convenient and safe as a solo traveler. The room was clean and breakfast was really nice. I would totally recommend going.

Chambre propre, fonctionnelle, confortable, assez grande pour 2 personnes. Idem pour la salle de bain, partagée mais en fait, toujours disponible pour nous.
Les hôtes sont ouverts et sympa.
À 10 minutes à pied du métro, pratique pour visiter toute la ville, mais en étant dans ce quartier calme de Brooklyn (calme, mais vie locale avec supermarchés, resto, cafés…).
Pour nous, ça n’aurait pas pu être mieux, surtout pour le prix.
Keep it up :)
Angelika's place was the perfect launching pad for our trip to NYC. She was very easy to communicate with and helpful. We hope she'll have us back!
Wir haben uns bei Brigitte sehr wohl gefühlt. Eine gemütliche blitzsaubere Wohnung mit einer sehr freundlichen Gastgeberin.

Laura’s apartment is truly one of the best Airbnb experiences I’ve ever had, certainly the best in New York City. Laura is extremely communicative and kind and the space reflects her thoughtfulness.
The mattresses are very comfortable, better than my own bed at home. The bathroom is generously sized by NYC standards with great water pressure and nice hot water in the shower.
We stayed for a long weekend but weren’t really cooking but found the kitchen to be well stocked with whatever we needed, including plastic containers for food storage.
There is a half flight is stairs to get into the building and the apartment is on the second floor. The interior stairs are narrow so might be a slight challenge for someone with mobility issues or large luggage.
Astoria is THE BEST neighborhood and this apartment is easily accessible via a 10 minute walk to the subway. You can get into Manhattan on the subway in 20 minutes (if the trains are running as scheduled!) but you’ll find everything you need within walking distance from groceries to great bars and restaurants. But Laura’s apartment is on a quiet street (barring the odd drunk person walking home and shouting), enough so that we slept with the windows open without issue.
Great, great place to stay and experience NYC!
Hôte très discret et à disposition pour toutes questions. Je recommande fortement.
Great location! Right next to a wonderful park and super close to lots of food and shops. Place itself is super clean with lots of character and more than  enough space for two people.
Very nice room. Clean and comfortable.

This is a place, where I love staying when I am in Brooklyn (Midwood).
Friendly and attentive host. Clean, cozy and pleasant atmosphere.
Thank you!
great host

A great quick stay for a morning flight at JFK on the following day. Our room was clean, warm and cozy, and spacious for the price. The closet was large with enough hangers. Each bedroom is private because the door can be locked. Depending on your strength, carrying your suitcase up the staircase can be difficult if you have overweight luggage for your flights (>23 kg or 50 lbs). The bathroom floor is a bit cold but the water gets hot fast. Jhon is proactive and responsive in the chat and on call. The wifi is fast (WiFi6). There's a very good Jamaican restaurant (The Door), Walgreens (open 24 hours) and a supermarket within a 10-min walk.
Great location and interesting spot…
Clean - very detailed instructions and comfortable…
El lugar es increíble, por el precio que pagas obtienes una verdadera experiencia en NY. El lugar lo tiene todo
Great place, great hosts!!!

Everything was wonderful. Thank you so much for hosting us, definitely recommending this place and hoping to come back and visit again. The area was perfect, very clean. Easy to check in. Thank you so much.
Muchas gracias por todo! Un abrazo grande para ambos
Excelente ubicación, super cerca de todo.
Great place! Would definitely recommend to a friend!
Eine sehr nette Unterkunft mit sehr guter Lage, in der man sich gleich wie ein echter New Yorker fühlt. Anna war immer hilfsbereit und ich würde jederzeit wieder bei ihr wohnen.

Li praticamente todos os comentários antes do dia em que me hospedei e me surpreendi positivamente. A hospedagem entregou o que prometeu. O quarto de fato é pequeno mas não tive problemas com a limpeza do local. A localização é excelente pra quem vai usar o metrô como principal meio de locomoção. A estação que fica em frente ao hotel é muito completa!
Vi comentários relacionados a segurança do local e não me senti em perigo. Claro que é preciso tomar cuidado mas nada exacerbado. Chegamos bem tarde alguns dias (entre 02 e 03 am) e mesmo assim não tivemos problemas.
Não daria nota 05 (pela estrutura do quarto e conforto da cama por exemplo) mas não achei a acomodação ruim de se hospedar.

Elma and Mike were the best hosts!, they were very heedful to our arrival to JFK and gave us good indications to get there; it was fairly easy.
The apartment is comfortable, organized and clean, they have separated dishware for our use, but they offered also their own stuff in case we needed something. Clean sheets, big closet, a room warmer for cold nights and everything we needed for a relaxing and comfortable stay, Elma even offered us her coat for my girlfriend because the temperature in the city was quite low.
They are great kind and warm people that we would love to see again, this was a great choice for our staying in NYC, thank you very much again!

This was a good spot for a quick trip to NYC. It was clean, with a comfortable bed, and the amenities needed to facilitate an easy stay, like a minifridge and extra blankets. The neighborhood is pretty quiet, which made it easy to work from "home" while I was there. Getting into Manhattan was also a breeze, since there was a train station just a few blocks away. It wasn't even terrible to get to Brooklyn! Overall, I'd say it's best for a solo traveler since the bathroom is tiny and there isn't much storage space, but I would 100% return to this spot. Fahim was responsive and helpful, so no worries there either.
Good stay

We booked Larry’s beautiful home to put up visiting family, and it’s as gorgeous as the photos. Beautifully curated. Incredible backyard. Great open living space for a small group. Amazing location as well, on a beautiful street, short walk to restaurants and bars. Would book again!

Juan’s place was great for the price point it is at. The apartment is in prime location to get to a train that will get you anywhere in the city. I saw a couple reviews about the neighborhood not being safe because “there were people out on the stoop”, which is just ridiculous. The heights has a real neighborhood culture to it, so people like to hang out outside their homes. Plus, it’s New York City - there are always people around.
The apartment and room were both clean and very cozy. Check in is flexible, which is really awesome, but it would’ve been nice to have clearer instructions on where the bedroom & bathroom are located in the apartment. I had to open all of the doors to search for them both, and the room I ended up in wasn’t the same as the photos. No biggie, just would’ve made for a smoother check in had I known.
The room has a window AC unit, and I kept it on for the duration of my stay, as it was in the upper 90s and I wanted a cozy room to walk back into. I’m not used to that kind of heat. The last night I returned home and the unit had been turned off. I’m unsure of how that happened, but I sincerely hope that nobody went into the locked room that I had paid for to turn off the unit. That would be a massive violation of privacy.
I got back from a night out and friends of Juan’s were sleeping in the living room. I’m used to a shared living space and don’t mind this at all, but it would’ve been nice to have been informed of this before arriving.
Overall, the place was very cute and cozy, and I would definitely recommend it - but a reminder that you are getting what you pay for. Thanks Juan!

Monica is an absolutely amazing host and her place is one of the most welcoming, cozy and home-like places I have ever been. Her apartment is located close to Times Square but it is relatively far enough not to be exhausted by noise. The room and the whole apartment is extremely clean, fresh, smelling wonderful. The bathroom is shinning and smelling like a comforting soups. Monica has been a fantastic person to communicate. He responded on time in a kind and pro-active manner: Always diligent, caring. She even made me a tea and offered a coffee when I had to wake up early in the morning for the conference. She provided earplugs for comfortable sleep, umbrella and extra blankets. Absolutely amazing stay!

My family and I had an excellent stay at Peter's place. The apartment was very clean and homey. The neighborhood was convenient- close to the subway, stores, restaurants, parks, and to the start/finish line of the half marathon we were in town for. The hosts were helpful and responsive. I would definitely stay at his place in the future!

I had a great stay. Nothing much else to say. The living room was spacious. The fridge was stacked with water bottles which was very nice. The bed was neatly made. The wifi connection was great. The kitchen appliances worked good. The AC worked just fine. The hot water worked just fine. I felt very safe in the neighborhood. I would definitely book here again, if I get the chance.

We were a group of six friends and really enjoyed our stay! Menachem kindly let us drop off our bags before check-in since we arrived early. The check-in process was smooth with clear instructions. The entire place was clean, the kitchen had everything we needed, and the beds were comfortable. The neighborhood felt safe, and Menachem was very responsive throughout our stay.

Nestled in the heart of Manhattan, this hostel offers cozy accommodations in small boxes that provide a sense of safety and comfort. Really!
The staff are exceptionally helpful and friendly, creating a welcoming atmosphere for all guests. The breakfast selection is varied and satisfying, ensuring you start your day right. Its prime location in Manhattan makes it an ideal choice for travelers looking to explore the city's attractions.
Shared showers and toilets are a bit narrow so bigger person can have some issues to fit in BUT I used only "woman" one so I don't know how the others looks like.
Overall, this hostel comes highly recommended for those seeking convenient accommodation in New York City.

The place is very nice.
Everything was aligned with my expectations. Furthermore, Brady is very friendly and he always answer to your question quickly and also give u a lot of advice. I will be back here for sure for my next holiday in NY.
Highly recommended !

We never did communicate with "Ken," but with several people who work for the organization that manages the apartment. The best thing about this place isn't really advertised. The apartment is on the top floor, and there is a fabulous almost-roof deck outside the living room that seems to be available only to the residents of this apartment. We ate dinner on this deck almost every night and enjoyed the sunsets and views of nearby architecture.
It's not clear from the description that the bathroom and bedrooms are all upstairs. It was nice to have the bedrooms separate from the living area.
That being said, some might miss the homey feeling of AirBnb places that are maintained by their owners. The apartment itself is spacious and accommodating, but rather sterile, with less than cozy furniture. The kitchen looks much nicer in the photo. Although it is dated, the kitchen is a good size, especially by NYC standards and functions well, even tho there was nothing--not even salt and pepper--to get us started.
Cleaning and maintenance issues were addressed quickly and effectively.

My family and I stay over for the weekend, and we had an amazing time. We arrived pretty but Jacqueline was very welcoming and still made sure we were able to settle in peacefully. Her home is beautiful, spacious, clean and excellent location.
We will definitely be back!

The apartment is located just a short walk from the subway (literally, it takes 3 minutes to walk to the station). The room is small (as described), but quiet and the sofa bed is very comfortable (and I am very picky on this subject). The apartment is very nice. Julie is a wonderful and warm-
hearted person, always helpful when needed. I highly recommend the place!

Staying in Rob’s place made me feel like I was back living on the East Side of Manhattan again. The unit is absolutely perfect for 1 and would comfortably fit 2. The W/D and two A/C units made the visit so much better. And the design of the apartment has nice touches of luxury. Highly recommend!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Kimpton Theta! The area was in the perfect location for us to get off and on the highway. It was in perfect proximity to everything we wanted to do and was clean and maintained. Staff were very helpful and responsive never had to want for anything! Would love to book another stay in the future!
propre et tranquille, près du métro... Jasmine facile à rejoindre.... bon séjour
Thank you for providing a great & reliable place!

House is good, clean and host if responsive. Except location, everything is amazing.
The nearest subway is not walkable or doesn’t look safe to walk at night. Buses are random, that means there is an extra uber ride to near subway everytime you go out. Nearby food places are not that good.
But if you have a car, or ok with walking a little extra, amazing house. Quiet, friendly, clean.
Very clean apartment! Vincent is very communicative if you ever need anything! Subway is close by and so is Dunkin Donuts.
there were no cereal bowls but we enjoyed staying 2 blocks from the empire state building.

I can’t say enough about this place. Quiet, comfortable and clean. 10 seconds away from Starbucks, a short walk to Clementine Bakery, etc.
Its SO quiet. Not a honk was heard. We slept great! The kitchen is beautifully appointed and the entire home is warm, friendly and beautiful. We would absolutely repeat.

An amazing host, very responsive and helpful, great space. You’d love it if you want Something private and if you have car but everything was minutes walk from the place and not convenient if you don’t have car like us.
Enjoyed my weekend at Tochi’s place . Lex was amazing. Felt like my home away from home . I would definitely go back
Recomendable 100%
Ame’s place was even better than expected or was what shown in the photos! It is a beautiful home, and convenient for us to go all over the city. Thanks again Ame!
Private and clean room, comfortable bed, and responsive host! Transit also close by. Definitely recommend!
Rafael fue muy amable con nosotros, muy buen trato, cordial y familiar. 100% recomendable!

Great place for a stay in New York, loved having a full kitchen. Suncerae was super easy to communicate with & really responsive. Bed was comfy, place spotlessly clean & great beauty touches like shampoo & hair ties provided. Fast internet meant I could do some online work easily.
It was incredibly quiet for New York too & close to two subway lines which makes it easy to get around, even though it is at the top of Manhattan. Would recommend to anyone who wants a more chilled stay.

Jon's place was fantastic!  We stayed for an extended period, and the apartment was just as described - spacious, clean and comfortable, one floor above street level, with a great little balcony to sit on and watch the world go by.  The extra room worked perfectly as an office, the high ceilings made the apartment feel even bigger, and the outdoor space of the balcony, tucked under a tree, added so much value.  The interior stairs up to the apartment are a bit steep so could be a challenge for those with mobility issues (was a little much for our old dog), but there's a handrail and it was otherwise not an issue for us.  Location is easily walkable to the West Village, East Village, Soho, Little Italy, and Lower East Side, and there are numerous train stations nearby.  Bars, restaurants, coffee shops, Whole Foods and CVS  are all super close (and just a short walk to the historic Russ and Daughters, Katz's Deli and Yonah Shimmel's Knishery!).  The bar downstairs is a particularly great, friendly spot.  And although you can feel the music from the bar a bit on Friday and Saturday nights, the sound proof windows plus white noise machine worked great and were all we needed to sleep.  Also, Jon was a great host, friendly, communicative and available, as necessary.  I hope we can stay here again.  Highly recommend!

Great location. Easy access to the subway and lots of great restaurants within walking distance.
The stairs are a bit steep and narrow but manageable. The beds are very firm and might benefit from a cushioned mattress cover.
All in all a very nice stay. The space was very clean and comfortable. Would definitely recommend to others.
Amazing places to stay in NY I have few works more in New York  I will definitely stay here again!!

Quarto limpo e como no anúncio, anfitrião respondia msg rapidamente, e está bem próximo da estação de metrô, farmácia, mercado e restaurantes.
Às vezes ouvia alguns barulhos do apartamento de cima, mais nada que atrapalhe.
No geral tudo muito tranquilo.
Pobyt minął bardzo przyjemnie. Apartament był czysty i miał wszystkie potrzebne rzeczy. Za dnia okolica jest bezpieczna. Szkoda tylko, że zostawienie walizek po wymeldowaniu jest bardzo drogie.
Excelente lugar. Muy cerca del aeropuerto JFK me pareció ideal si llegas de madrugada o si necesitas quedarte una noche. Todo se encontró limpio y ordenado. Definitivamente me volvería a quedar
Great place and lovely hosts in a great neighborhood

Buen día , el hospedaje en casa de Esther es excelente, maravilloso el lugar, su comodidad y su limpieza, sin duda es un lugar genial que recomiendo y al cual volvería. Muchas gracias Esther por todo!
A great place for a quick stay before heading to jfk.
Wow, could not have asked for a better location, especially for the price.
Sehr zentral und gut bezahlbare Unterkunft, gerne wieder! Nur zu empfehlen :)

Leo is an excellent host who has thought of every detail. His arrangements saved us a lot of time. The apartment had everything we needed during our stay. The location is fantastic — with public transportation and buses nearby, we were able to reach every part of the city easily. Bars and restaurants are all within walking distance. If I visit New York again, Leo’s place will be the first option I check.
Great location, super clean and on top you get free coffee and pastries every morning!
This hotel does not even have a hair dryer!
The place was awesome and Tracy was very kind and respectful!
Nice place, good location and service.
지하철역 바로 앞, 옆에 달러 트리가 있어서 편했음. 열차 지나다니는 소리는 익숙해지면 괜찮아요. 전반적으로 깨끗했고 불편함 없이 잘 지냈습니다

I had a great time at Miki’s place. I stayed there for 3 nights.
Miki’s place was neat, clean and tidy.
Her place was close to coffeeshops , restaurants and Subway station.
Overall , it’s located in a prime location of Brooklyn.
I was in the 3rd floor front room.  It was clean, & the window air conditioner worked well in the heat wave.  The toilet and shower down the hall were clean & worked well.

We enjoyed our month stay at Maggie's place! The garden level 1-bedroom was spacious for my partner, small dog and me. Kitchen and bathroom are updated and overall the place is very comfortable. Maggie is a responsive host and truly cares about guests having a good experience. Carroll Gardens is an amazing escape from the busy city and the neighborhood feels clean and safe. Public transportation is near by, which made getting around the city easy.
As listed in their description, they have a young family and two dogs that live above the unit. We are not morning people so had to adjust to early/noisy mornings but to be expected from the listed description. I slept with earplugs, which helped.
Thanks again Maggie for being so hospitable!

My stay at NH Collection was excellent! The room was spacious, clean, and very comfortable. The location was really convenient — close to many attractions, restaurants, and things to do in Manhattan. The staff were professional, and friendly. I would definitely stay here again!
Beautiful place. Like a hotel. Clean and quiet. Would definitely stay again when I am back for work

we really enjoyed our time at Eva's place. it was exactly what we were looking for and a unique find in New York.  The location was great! the only minor issue is there was no place for all three of us to eat together in the apartment, but that's New York!  Eva did bring us a tray table for eating to help, which was so nice. She was a great host!

Le logement est très agréable, à 3o minutes de Manhattan c est un excellent compromis.
Logement très propre, bien équipé, Maura est très sympathique très réactive il n’y a rien à dire.

Carey’s apartment is really cute and quirky. The bed is big and very comfortable. Very little noises can be heard as it looks out onto a courtyard. The kitchen and bathroom are both small but perfect for two people who are on the go and out exploring NYC. Hell’s Kitchen is a great area to visit. Lots of restaurants, bars and corner shops on its doorstop. It’s only a few blocks away from Broadway and Times Square but far enough that it feels like you are visiting a NY neighbourhood. The area felt quite safe at night.
Check in and check out was really simple and easy and Carey is a great host
I really enjoyed my stay here - thank you Carey
Great place with amazing hosts.
everything perfect

We had a great stay at this lovely apartment in NYC. It felt like home, and we had everything we needed for our stay with our two children (3 yo and a baby). The host was very friendly and responsive and made us feel very welcome! The UWS is a perfect location for visiting NYC with kids, not as busy as some areas in the city but with plenty to do right around you, including Central Park (tons of playgrounds, the zoo, the carousel), and great museums for kids.
We had a great stay and will definitely return when we visit NY again!

Overall, my stay was seamless, comfortable, and exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone looking for a relaxing and enjoyable getaway. I would definitely book again in the future!
A comfortable spot to stay in the city that is a great value.

8min walk to the A and C train … If you can, eat at Oaxaca Taqueria. it’s a couple streets over but the people are so freaking cool!
This place is exactly what it says it is, it’s very quiet at night :-)

Overall, great stay! The apartment is so cute, spacious for 1 person and at great value. The location is a bit further from train than I’d prefer (20 min walk to the train) but for what I was in town for, this met my needs! I will definitely be back.
Be careful this hotel charged my card 900 dollars extra after we checked out.

My stay here was wonderful! Communication with the host was smooth from start to finish. He was very courteous and attentive. The space itself was amazing! Clean, spacious, and exactly as pictured. The bed was extra comfy, and I loved having a fully functional kitchen, plus cleaning supplies and toiletries readily available. The location was very convenient, with supermarkets and stores nearby, and the quiet neighborhood made it easy to relax. Overall, a really great stay that I’d happily recommend!
El lugar muy limpio, seguro, con una excelente ubicación. El anfitrión muy responsable. Cuando vuelva espero poder hospedarme de nuevo acá
Excellent and responsive host

This location is great. Cozy and everything you need.
I felt very safe, however, a deadbolt lock would be a nice addition. As is, it’s just a doorknob lock from the rest of the building. As a solo traveler, that would be my only suggestion for improvement.
Thanks for a great stay.

One of the best Airbnb´s ever. A very beautiful apartment, as shown in the photos. Very clean apartment with comfortable beds, well equipped kitchen and with adjustable heat in every room.
Nice restaurants in walking distance, close to several Metro-lines.
Shannon was very welcoming and quick to respond in our communication. Highly recommended!
Robert et sa cousine Céleste sont très accueillants et feront tous pour faciliter votre séjour à New York. Très bon contact avant et pendant le séjour, l'appartement est calme et très bien situé.

The apartment is clean and well-maintained. The location is very convenient, and very quiet at night. The host is very friendly and responsive, and we appreciate their flexibility. I would highly recommend staying here if you are visiting NYC.

Stephen’s place was great! Very spacious and great spot for groups. Everything you need.
The only criticism would be it’s definitely not 15 minutes into the city. I’d say more like 30-40 weather your ubering or subway!
Other then that- great stay!
Very nice location. Clean place and very safe. Will stay again and again.
I had a great time staying here; I really appreciated all of the amenities and Rose’s communication and helpfulness.
Buenas instalaciones y servicio
Love the place and Mehmet was really helpful

I had an amazing stay! The room was exceptionally clean and comfortable, making it a perfect place to relax after a day of exploring. The host was incredibly kind and responsive—he went above and beyond to make our stay smooth and memorable. He even gave us a ride to the supermarket, helped us with breakfast in the morning with such warmth, and shared valuable local tips including nearby options and train routes.
The location couldn’t have been better—just a short walk from the train station, which made traveling super convenient. Overall, this stay exceeded expectations, and I would absolutely choose to stay here again without hesitation. Highly recommended! Thanks Amer for the lovely stay.
Everything was fine, the apartment actually looks better than those pictures:)

An excelent apartment near the subway and a shopping mall, should you need anything.
Eric provides a very detailed tour of the home and details as soon as you arrive, it should cover any questions you may have of the home.
Sam was an exceptional host and made sure to respond to all our requests over the course of our two-month stay. I can't recommend anyone more!

The house is a gem and the location couldn’t have been better. Restaurants and cafes are literally a two minute walk away from the house. The block and neighborhood felt extremely safe. There were little things that were extraaaaa nice, like heated bathroom floors and the skylights. The house could definitely benefit from a deeper clean. My family noticed some minor things that could’ve been cleaner. However, it is an older home and it is the home the actually live in. Beds were comfortable and communicating with the host was easy peasy. Overall a great stay and would definitely stay again.

I lived in Astoria for years and I came back to visit with my family. I loved this location. Quiet and walkable to the park. Local favorite restaurants are around the corner and Matthew was extremely kind and helpful through the stay. The place is lovely and has everything you can think of and more. The bed is super comfortable and the decore is so beautiful and tasteful.

Our stay at Marsha’s was way too short to really enjoy the space, only 3 days for a Christmas holiday break!
However what stood out for us was how welcoming the apartment was! What blew my mind away was the hamper with the welcome snacks and goodies! I have never been anywhere that was so welcoming with such a VIP experience.
We liked that she had everything you could need! The kitchen was well stocked, we had breakfast items which was a plus since we had arrived late.
In terms of cleanliness I give it 5/5 it was spotless and immaculate. I like that we had cleaning supplies and extra amenities. The apartment gave such a warm & cozy feeling!
The location was good too. We were walking distance from restaurants and transportation. We walked five minutes over to Church and Linden to catch the dollar cab to Utica.
We met Marsha the night we came and she was super friendly and helpful!
Thank you Marsha for having us and being such an incredible host. We appreciated your hospitality!
I had really good time at his place, will try again ☺️
Bran was as excellent host - friendly, respectful, and communicative. The space is lovely, well appointed, and indeed sun-drenched. My husband and I would love to stay there again in the future.
Great location! Plenty of beds to fit my crew and we had our own bathroom.

Decent place to stay at. Definitely could use some improvements like the shower not being properly sealed to prevent water getting out. Very close to King's Theater too so if you're planning on attending a concert there, it's nice.
Love this hotel. So clean and spacious.

Justin met us outside and helped us go into the apartment. He then showed us where everything was and gave us tips as to where to eat etc.  He was always available via What’s App. We were very comfortable.

This location is definitely a rare gem in Brooklyn, NY. The loft is super unique with awesome amenities. It was a real treat to have access to a private sauna, massage chair and massage table!  You can really relax in a peaceful atmosphere. The apartment was very spacious for the two of us and extremely clean. We love to cook together and the kitchen had just what we needed. Although we were right in Brooklyn it felt as if we escaped into our own private escape where we enjoy each other’s company. There is also a roof top area in which you can see many good views of the area, bridges and city. Chan was super responsive, gave us information and answered any questions clearly.  We truly appreciate our time there and we look forward in booking again in the future. Thank you again!

I had a great stay in this one-bedroom apartment in Bushwick.
The place itself was comfortable, well-kept, and perfect for settling into the neighborhood.
What really stood out was how helpful Mia was throughout my stay—he even checked in with me when New York was snowed in, which was incredibly thoughtful. Mia also shared fantastic recommendations for local jazz clubs, which ended up being some of the highlights of my trip.
Overall, a wonderful experience and a host who truly goes above and beyond.

We had a great stay and experience. The location is perfect for having a real NY experience. Columbia University, the Park, and the subway are close. There's a lot of great food and markets nearby. Cleaning could use some improvements. We definitely had clean bedding and towels so all was well for us. We felt safe and happy with our stay. We hope to come again.
Nice place for the price
Great location and spotless presentation ... the apartment is very well decorated and provisioned.  Having a washer and dryer is a big bonus when travelling for a few weeks.
Buenas camas, bastante seguridad, el barrio un poco oscuro y alejado.
Great stay, Kevin was responsive and helpful
All good! Location was great and everything was easy

Maria was an excellent host, very responsive and proactive! It’s easy to get inside, the room is comfortable and has everything for a living, the pillows are just the best. It is clean and cozy, has its own Brooklyn vibe, great coffee just minutes away, pretty close to great locations.

Beautiful property. Marc was responsive and most helpful. My family enjoyed our thanksgiving gathering at this beautiful, spacious, home-like property. We rented both units. We had enough room for the guests from out of town to lodge, as well as, space to gather and host our entire thanksgiving family dinner. Marc was so helpful in offering his assistance to ensure that we were comfortable and our gathering was a success. I live locally, however, I will definitely keep his place in mind for future family gatherings.
Great spot to stay if you’re going to be out and about all day! The patio is a plus!

Had a great stay! Loft is a 5 minute walk from one subway stop and about a 12 minute walk from another so we were able to get to and from everywhere we wanted to go. Loft is spacious and had everything we needed. Eric gave us a thorough walk through of the space which was helpful.
Very clean and comfortable. Quick responses and I just had a wonderful time there. Thank you Laura for everything.

Everything was great staying at Anadis’s for the time we was there! We were gone most of the time into the city but Anadis was very helpful if I had any questions, she was willing to work w/ me on changing/adding to my reservation and just all around friendly and inviting! We already are working on going back and staying again!!
Andre’s place is an absolute gem, and I will be looking to book it for future trips to the city!
Had a great time! Thanks!
I so enjoyed my stay that I booked another month. Yvonne and her host were always available. I felt right at home and don’t have any complaints.

Larger than we thought. Very comfortable private home in a great area of Brooklyn. Several subway and bus options made tips to Manhattan easy. Lots of stairs and private baths only on levels 2 and 3. We loved our stay and would stay again.

Great host: I had an unusual situation with a large bike case that was difficult to roll around the city, plus I was coming in early, and Tash allowed me to store it ahead of check-in, then didn't bat an eye when I assembled the bike for riding around the city (and in the 5 Boro Bike Tour) then dis-assembled and packed it up again.
The place is a great setup for the price, and as a solo traveler, I appreciate the separate bedroom to myself plus roomy, comfortable common areas. This is NYC, so you're not going to be sitting around the apartment very much anyway, but it's nice for recovering.
The neighborhood is nice with great brownstone rows and lots of good little delis close by. The C train is a short walk away, with the A just a little bit farther.
The only potential drawback is the two-flight walkup (no elevator), so those with mobility issues probably should not book this unit.
Beth was a super host! Friendly and helpful! Would definitely stay again!

Louann was extremely responsive and helpful. All the instructions were very clear and made check-in easy. The bathroom had all of the things you may need available. The place was clean and just as described. What I loved the most was the parking in the driveway available for extra $10 so I didn’t have to drive around the neighborhood late at night looking for a street parking.

We just spent a great week in Sophie and Spencer's apartment. The apartment is beautiful , carefully decorated to the smallest detail and very tastefully furnished. The garden is lovely , cared for with beautiful flowers ! It is very quiet , we slept very well also because of the very comfortable bed ! Sophie and Spencer are attentive hosts ! Upon arrival we found in the fridge everything we needed for 2 days breakfast , eggs , milk , bread , cookies , jam and even a bottle of wine . There were fresh flowers in the house and everything was very clean. the kitchen is well equipped , besides all the dishes you need , there are also , oil , salt , pepper sugar. tea and a coffee machine with capsules. The area is full of restaurants and cafes , Sophie shares with guests a book with lots of directions on places to have breakfast , dinner , yoga and shopping !We were really sorry to leave and will come back without anything else !

First off, I want to say that the host was very responsive and accommodating, and the location was great; only a few blocks to Grand Central, several markets were within a block, and many great restaurants very close by. The apartment is older with a distinct smell and you must walk up two flights of stairs. There was a full kitchen which was nice to have the option to cook. We had 5 in our family and it was fine for us since we were gone mostly, but the kitchen table does only seats two comfortably in case you plan on cooking frequently. It’s nice they provide all toiletries and linens. Overall, the apartment was great, however, the heat radiator was causing a loud banging similar to a bat hitting a pipe.  This was unfortunate that it is in the bedroom and would occur through the night. There were ear plugs provided but they don’t block out the noise completely . I imagine this banging noise only occurs during the cold season when heat is needed. Other than that, we enjoyed our stay.

The room is very nice, big and proper. It is very calm because the room is on the garden side. It is really easy going to the metro, by 10 minutes Walk. There is an express train to Times Square in just 15 minutes. We didn't seen Wayne much, just to say hello. He seems to be a nice person. We recommend this place. Thank you Wayne.
Nice & clean I like to come back again & again.thanks.
Merci Gin, nous nous somme régalés.
Estuvo bien, en las fotos pareciera más grande de lo que en realidad es, pero es perfecto para llegar a descansar sin ningún inconveniente
Awesome place. Close to almost everything!! Great experience!!!

Wonderful stay.. great location. Very quiet although, you are just blocks to shopping and restaurants, lots of parks close by.. good size apartment.. very clean and comfortable.  Definitely, will return..  Thanks, Geraldo
Great location. Perfect for single or couples.

Jean's place was great for us, we really enjoyed the stay. The place is comfortable, really clean, with really great natural light . In a really nice leafy , neighborhood.
We all slept great, beds are comfortable and there is a topper for the couch/futon so that is too..
Jean is a great host, kind, accommodating, quick to respond..
Would stay again !
Thank you Jean

Kims Haus ist sehr dekoriert,das Zimmer klein und fein,am besten für eine Person.Alles sauber,das Bad einladend.Leider fehlte uns der WifiAnschluss.Ein Zettel mit Info wäre toll gewesen zur groben,ersten  Orientierung.Gleich um die Ecke gibt's Gott sei Dank einen leckeren mex. Diner. fürs Frühstück!

Buena ubicación entre 2 líneas de metro. Rápido se llega a Manhattan. Es bueno tener 2 baños en un viaje en familia. A veces un poco de ruido de los vecinos, y ambulancias sobre todo en el cuarto de enfrente, pero es NYC. Gracias Kevin por el lugar y tus atenciones

Great location, a short train ride to downtown Brooklyn or the City.  Quiet and safe neighborhood.  The hosts were very responsive to any questions I had.  Very cozy and had all the amenities that I needed.  I would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting NYC.
A really great location. Very helpful staff.

Henri is a host of excellence when booking the trip, planning for the trip and during! Highly responsive and friendly. Felt very welcome.
Studio is just as described! We were 2 people and it was perfect - whereas 3 or 4 would be a bit cramped.
Felt safe with security at front.
Our room was very quiet - did not experience any noise from other guests.
Room is nicely decorated. Felt at home.
Thank you!
Everything was just perfect. Thank you so much!
The hotel has great ease of access to various sites, subways, and convenient shops and restaurants.
Perfect place, location and host

This host was incredible! The place was clean and spacious. The only issue we had was finding the entrance since it wasn’t the front door, but the side door (and we arrived at night), but the host was SUPER responsive and answered us despite the time! We really enjoyed our stay here and would consider it again if we decide to come back to Queens, NY!
Beds were comfy, restrooms and showers were clean and welcoming, and there was light snacks for our late night arrival. Definitely recommend!
PS. The queen bed was so comfy!!
Great host
Very responsive and helped with everything needed

Everything was Great!!!
Nice house in a quiet neighborhood, Clean and with al you News for your Atal.
Check in and Out was very easy and Quick.
Is really close from subway and Times Square..
Great experience

Unterkunft war okay. Lage ist so lala… schön war, dass wir ein großes Bett hatten. Nicht so schön war leider der Check in. Eine zweite Decke gab es nur nach langer  Diskussion! Ebenso die Café Maschine, welche angegeben ist >> gab es nur nach Diskussion. Zimmerservice kostet extra…. Alles in allem war es okay, aber für fast 600€ die Nacht leider viel zu teuer.
Location was great!

Faith's place is really cute and in a great neighborhood of older established homes. I felt very safe and its proximity to the airport was a definite plus as I had a late flight into JFK. I could hear the airplane noise but it wasn't that loud and it never interrupted my sleep. The Laurelton LIRR station is about a 15 minute walk from the house and the train took about 30 minutes to get to Penn station. Communication with Faith was easy and she was very responsive to any questions I had. I would definitely stay again.

We highly recommend this airbnb and Spencer! It was a really pleasant stay and Spencer is a very nice host!
We definitely come back!
Great place, great location, and wonderful host! Would highly recommend!
Good

Carlton was a very responsive host, however, we were surprised to find out the man who helped us most with our check-in was actually a resident named MJ! MJ helped us into the building and informed us of keys for the apartment, we also found him up in the mornings cleaning the bathroom, kitchen, and taking out the trash for those who booked/book the Airbnb! We asked him some questions thinking he was our host and found out he’s just someone who lives there and does it out of the goodness of his heart to make sure the space stays clean. We were so impressed by him!! We had a few hiccups with the actual space and both agreed it was MJ who truly made the stay worth it and made it feel like “home.” If you stay here be sure to say hi to him! He was the best part of our trip!

Vanessa from day one was very hospitable. She made sure  that my wife and I were comfortable and even checked on us each day to see if we were in need of anything. When we needed bottle water it was promptly delivered by Vanessa. Thank you once again and we will make another stay at your place whenever we return to NY.

Svetlana’s place was great. Very well located near central parc. Very quiet.
Svetlana gives us some nice tips for restaurants near her place.
Clean, very basic hostel-style accommodation in an excellent location. Ideal if you plan on being there only to sleep.

I had a great stay for a short trip to NYC. Clean suite, very updated and hotel-like. There was an outdoor area that I didn’t get to see but seemed like a nice private area to enjoy coffee on the morning. Richard was very responsive and accommodating. Would definitely stay here again!

Great space for a big group, lots of beds and a good common area. Close to some restaurants, plenty of coffee shops and bodegas. A block from the G Train, which gets you around Brooklyn, and into Manhattan in ~40 minutes.
Roxanne is a great host! She provided us snacks, cereal, milk, and orange juice. She also accommodated an early check in at 7am for us when we arrived by red-eye. Checkout was also very simple.

Excelente alojamiento en zona norte de Manhattan, a pesar de ser compartido no tuvimos ningún inconveniente con el resto de los huéspedes. Durante la estadía constantemente vimos a chicas realizando limpieza por lo que siempre estuvo todo impecable. Esta ubicado a 5 minutos caminando del subway y rodeado de muchos restaurantes y tiendas en el corazón de Harlem.
Finalmente, el anfitrión el ultimo dia nos permitió dejar nuestro equipaje en la sala de estar para aprovechar las ultimas horas antes de mi vuelo, muy amable. Definitivamente volvería ! :)
Was a short walk from the subway! Was very easy to get around. Hosts were both very nice and sweet the baby was super cute and the dog was super friendly and cuddly
Zero complaints. Location was perfect. It is an older place, but clean. 100% met my needs.

Me gustó el lugar , solo las salida del metro 6 recomiendo no salir por ahí jajaja pueden tomar mejor el 2-3, Román no estuvo pero Sofia fue amable y nos sentimos en confianza , simba ( el perro ) es un amor y muy lindo , fue fácil de encontrar el lugar

Had a lovely stay at Mart Ann’s place. Bus stops, grocery stores, cafes nearby so very convenient. The rooms were all clean and cozy. Would highly recommend the place for anyone wanting to explore Brooklyn on a budget!

We stayed in this Airbnb apartment in New York for 6 nights as two families with five young children. The apartment was clean, well-equipped with everything we needed, and overall provided a comfortable and pleasant stay. It was a positive experience, and we truly enjoyed our time there.
Hotel right next to MSG. Was clean and tidy - the check in process was quite easy.
La estancia con Diego es increíble, fue muy amable en darnos todos los tips y en la atención en llegar un poco antes del check in
Amazing place to stay in NYC if you want a private comfy room.
Spacious and homey apartment close to the action!

I had a great time staying at Regina’s place. The instructions on how to get inside were very helpful. She was attentive and responsive. The place was bigger than I thought. Very clean and organized. I definitely recommend this place.
Exceeded my expectations! Such a beautiful hotel with great service.
Overall we had a great experience.

I enjoyed my one-month stay in Sara's apartment. It had a homey feel--unlike many airbnb's which are corporate, this is somebody's actual apartment. It is more spacious than your typical NYC studio. There is a nice bedroom with a comfortable king bed that looks out onto 1st Avenue; there is also a living room area that I found nice and quiet for my reading. Sara responded promptly to my few questions when some small issues came up. Five stars.

I came for work for 3 days. While I usually stay with friends, that wasn’t possible this time. Fortunately, I found Susan’s place! The location was perfect, the entry was easy. The space was amazing. I utilized the dance studio prepare for auditions, to record an audition, and to do a workout. In it’s an amazing place for artists to stay! The sleeping area itself was very comfortable and cozy with access to the beautiful garden. Convenient to multiple trains, and street parking wasn’t too bad. Susan was very kind when we saw each other and when we communicated on the app, but I also had total privacy during my trip. I highly recommend and will absolutely stay there again! Very appreciative!
Impecable toda la estadía. Muy atento y pendiente a cualquier consulta. Perfecto el departamento

Rishad himself is a great host. He was responsive to our needs and took our concerns seriously.
However, the place admittedly feels like it was purchased and put on AirBNB right away. The finishings on the house are lackluster and it doesn't quite feel homey. The blankets didn't have any covers which we didn't like and there were no extra towels or linens.
We also had a problem with moths and flies constantly being present in the house which Rishad told us hadn't happened before. Because we were always in and out of the home, we weren't able to get anything to address the issue.

Very basic place to stay. Ok to crash for a night or so. Minimal amenities, not even a box of tissues. When inquired about tissues, I was told to use paper towels. Bed was super comfy however that was about the only positive.

I really enjoyed my stay at Jenine’s listing! The place was nice and clean and perfectly spacious for 2 people! I wish the location was a little closer to downtown but nothing like a few subway stops to get you there!
Great area. Place works well as a crash pad to explore and experience the city
Great place to stay in between apartments! Amazing location with an easy commute to midtown on the 6
Très heureux de notre séjour chez Hanna !!

This was a great spot for our family to stay for 6 weeks over summer. Lots of nooks to work or relax in. Well located to easily get into manhattan and explore other parts of NYC using subway and buses. Area was really nice to walk around and felt extremely safe - very family friendly. The apartment stayed cool even through the extremely hot July weather. Glenn and Sonja were very pleasant to deal with and we wouldn’t hesitate to return here if we come back to New York.
We loved staying at René place!  It was comfortable, exceptionally clean, and in a great location. René was a wonderful host!

We stayed here with a total of 3 couples on a budget trip. This place does the job; it was clean and provided us a place to sleep and get ready! It is definitely not "luxurious" but was ideal for our group. We enjoyed our stay here and would definitely stay here again the next time we come to NYC! It is in the heart of Koreatown, close to the subways, close to popular tourist locations and had great food options around! The reception was easy to find and attentive! Only down side was we wished we could have done early check-in at no cost.
Very good place and the host was so kind and helpful. Definitely recommended!

Amy's place is perfect for a family vacation. Everything was as pictured. The small things provided (tissues, condiments, dishwasher detergent, etc.) gave us a worry-free stay.  Amy's communication was great.  The neighborhood was very peaceful and quiet.  It was a nice place to come back to after a day of sight-seeing.

A few of my family members and I stayed at Christlyn's Airbnb and we really enjoyed our time there. The place was better than advertised. The unit was very clean and everything we needed was in the apartment. The furniture and beds were very comfortable and getting in and out was not a problem. Christlyn's responses were prompt and she answered all of our questions in detail. Christlyn was so accommodating too. Luggage drop-off was permitted but only after a certain time. However, we landed early and decided just to walk by the location to check out the surroundings. Somehow, Christlyn heard us walking by, came outside and asked if we were the ones who booked the Airbnb, and when we said yes, she welcomed us in while the place was being cleaned and let us leave our luggage there early. Thanks so much for that!  The Dekalb Metro is just 2 blocks down to the right and there's plenty to do around the area. Thanks so much Christlyn for your hospitality!!!

Catia’s place is beautifully decorated with lots of plants and color.  The vibe is cozy and welcoming.  Catia provides an abundance of helpful information about the city, shares travel instructions, and is generously available for communication.
Great place to stay. Bed was super comfy.

My friend and I stayed at Arielle’s beautiful oasis of an apartment. It was centrally located, and there are a ton of local fun spots just a block away. We will DEFINITELY booking again next time we decide to go to NYC.
Had a great time at mint house. Rlly liked the interior of the building and the room.
Excelente anfitrión. Todo tal cual se describe en la publicación.
Diana is a welcoming host, who made great local recommendations.  The place is just as pictured: tidy, comfortable and well situated.  Highly recommend !
Nice place for a long stay in NYC

WONDERFUL and UNFORGETTABLE experiences. The landlord Joseph is a kind, warm-hearted, and knowledgeable person. He cooked spaghetti for me, which was my first meal in the USA, and I really enjoyed that. I know I am like a stranger and alien here, but he treated me like his neighbor and friend. Besides, he recommended me many proper places for shopping to set up my apartment.  In general, I highly recommend you choose his apartment when you first come to NYC.
She was available, friendly, helpful - perfect hostess!!
Second time staying at Untitled and both stays have been fantastic!

me quedé más de un mes en lo de Manuel, esmere me sentí como en casa en todo momento.Manuel es muy atento y correcto. la ubicación es única cerca de todo pero a la vez en un barrio pintoresco y tranquilo para dormir en la noche.
la habitación es más grande que en la foto cuenta con gran armario y ventana grande a la calle con balcón
sin dudas volvería y lo recomendaría siempre.

Very beautiful and unique place! Everything was good and we had very pleasant stay. Thank you :)
I will recommend place for friends during trips to NYC.
it was a wonderful spot.  would use again  is it come back.

This is a great apartment. Everything you need is there for a great stay. The host Beto is great. Check in is so easy, communication bang on and he leaves towels and soap which is a nice gesture. The apartment is very clean and  it has the comfiest bed which is wonderful after 20,000 steps a day! The location is perfect. Two blocks from Central Park and 5 minutes walk from 110th street subway where the 6 takes you right down to Brooklyn. Only thing I would say is there are 2 flights of steep stairs which aren’t fun with heavy cases and/or you have mobility problems. We coped though and had a brilliant stay. All credit to Beto.
Great Place to Stay for a short and quick visit.

“My stay at this Airbnb was absolutely outstanding! From the moment I arrived, everything was spotless, beautifully arranged, and fully equipped with all the essentials I needed. The space felt warm, peaceful, and incredibly relaxing — exactly what I was hoping for. I truly appreciated the comfort, privacy, and quiet atmosphere throughout my stay. The host was thoughtful and clearly committed to providing an excellent experience for guests. I highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone visiting Brooklyn. This place is a true gem, and I would gladly stay here again without hesitation!”
Lovely apartment

Lovely location with great public transportation nearby and easy access to the beach/boardwalk; cozy, private and comfortable accommodations.  We enjoyed our stay very much and would rebook this location on our next visit to Rockaway.

Inna’s place was easy to find, clean, and very quiet.
Inna was very helpful and responsive!
Great little boutique hotel right in the middle of Times Sq, Broadway, etc. Great amenities including complimentary afternoon snacks and breakfast.
Fácil acceso entre Brooklin y Manhattan
Right balance for AirBNB of remove and connection to host and her young daughter and guest, given rental space is in a walk-up loft space. No regrets!

Although the location wasn't the most exciting to me, it's perfectly fine for a starter living situation in NYC.
It was easy to communicate with the host and maintenance and I generally got what I expected.
HOWEVER, they didn't give me a working AC remote which I asked for from day one, they attempted to charge me for fixing a hole in the wall which was there upon check in, and they were not prompt with fixing the non-working fridge, making me use a small bar fridge and no freezer access for several weeks of my stay.
You can also expect little to no room for your perishables/frozen, as they were not proactive about disposing of these items from people who had moved out.
For what I paid, I would expect a lot better. Having to swelter in a NY summer apartment for month made it not worth the price, and that doesn't include them attempting to get away with charging me for a hole I didn't make in the wall.
Location is perfect for theater goers!

The flat is really good and clean. Angelo provides everything you will need for the stay. He is really helpful and quick to respond. The flat is located in the nice quiet area of Brooklyn with on street parking. We were really happy to stay there. If we come to NY next time we will definitely stay there.

Great central spot to explore NYC, clean room and very excellent service from the time you walk in, till you leave!
Very responsive hosts, anything you needed or questions were answered immediately!
Appreciate the stay and would love to come back

El apartamento está genial, muy amplio y limpísimo. Un remanso de paz. El metro está al lado de la casa, lo que le da otro punto a mayores muy importante. La privacidad, aunque el baño esté en el pasillo de la casa, esta garantizada. El problema de la casa son los zoombies que abundan por la noche por las bocas del metro. Eso también contribuye a que cuando entras en el apartamento, la sensación de alivio sea mayor aún. Pero, las sábanas, colchones, toallas y almohadas hacen que compense el punto negativo de la ubicación. Inmejorables!

Very nice house! Everything is clean. You'll get everything you ever need here. Even have built in hot and cold water dispenser plus the bed is superrrr comfy I don't even wanna leave each morning! Amaya is very kind and attentive. Definitely will book again if I'll be around in Bed-Stuy!
Perfect stay I was just confuse and thought that I was getting a  room with a closet until after I was inform on to which room I was getting until after Booking . Overall she is a great honest
