We had a wonderful stay at Shoreham : the place is very well located, our room was spacious enough, clean, at a good temperature and quite. We were missing a bit of light but didn’t bother us at all since we were out visiting all day. Thanks

We recently stayed at this beautiful property during our two-week family holiday in NYC. The condo is beautiful, clean, cozy and tastefully decorated. It looks even better than the photos! We arrived in the middle of the night from a couple of long flights and two young kids. The self check-in process was super easy and got in without hassles. Beds were comfortable, kitchen well equipped and the hosts were fantastic and attentive. They ensured we had everything we needed and were happy to answer any questions we may have had. We took the subway daily from Queens to Manhattan, the station was about 15-20min walk, but at times we did take an Uber (it was only around $10USD to the station), otherwise there is a bus just around the corner (which also goes straight to the station). The area was safe (this was a must, travelling with young kids) and the neighbourhood was quiet, safe and really lovely! A couple of parks nearby as well. Highly recommend!!
Nice clean room and main space. Easy to check in and out.
Very clean rooms, close to industry city, good breakfast included
Very easy to check in and find. The host sent me all the information I needed in advance and everything went well! Highly recommended!
This will be the second time that I stayed at Miriam’s place.  Miriam is warm and inviting.  She makes it feel like home.  The space is wonderful and the location is ideal.

Heidi’s 2 bedroom was amazing! Just like the pictures. Spacious. Takes about 25 mins to get to downtown BK. We felt right at home in the quiet neighborhoods of Canarsie. Loved the decor. The full kitchen had everything you needed to cook if you wanted to as well! We did not have issues with parking on the street personally. We will stay here again.

Had a great stay, Henry was super helpful and communicative. Apartment is located in prime area, walking distance to Time square, Flatiron building, MSG and the Empire State Building.
Definitely recommend when you’re in NYC.

Typical NYC room, very small, but mostly adequate. Common space is in the basement. Just some plain coffee and a communal fridge. Private fridge and microwave in room.
My door code did not work, but they were able to respond to get me another code in about 15-20 min. Very reasonable price on Airbnb.
Bed could be more comfortable. Lots of noise outside (it’s nyc). Walls are a little thin, so you can hear your neighbors talking.
I had a change to my work schedule, but they were unable to offer any amount of refund for leaving a day early.

cher Christophe!
merci encore pour ce très beau séjour !
nous avons eu beaucoup de plaisir à rayonner dans la ville depuis ce formidable appartement niché au cœur de ce brooklyn si calme et si accueillant.
bonne continuation
et à bientôt j espère !

The apartment is super nice, cozy, modern and clean. There is everything you need, the kitchen is perfectly equipped and the beds we’re comfortable. Michael was immediately available for questions, the check in was uncomplicated. The apartment is located in a quiet residential area with good access to the A/C line, which takes you to Manhattan within 30 minutes. I really enjoyed my stay here.

Notre deuxième séjour chez Yvonne. Le logement est à 10 mn du métro, le quartier est animé, proche des magasins, restaurants, épicerie, tout en étant paisible.
Yvonne est discrète mais très disponible, je recommande vivement 😊
This place is perfect!  Hosts are helpful and responsive, place is super cute and well appointed, and neighborhood is fantastic. Highly recommend, especially for a couple or small family.
It was a great deal with the price. Everything is new and clean in the room. Phylicia was always responsive, allowed us to check-in earlier. would recommend the stay!

DO NOT BOOK ANYTHING HOSTED BY THIS MAN. He is renting out spaces that are NOT authorized to be AIRBNBs. SHADY staff that does not speak whatsoever, no control of temperature, took our bags and locked us out, LIES after LIES!!! THANK GOD for the housekeeper who spoke Spanish and told us the truth. AIRBNB is refunding me due to such an awful trip and hopefully this man's account gets shut down ASAP.

Convenient location to Times Square and many restaurants, nightlife, shops and theaters! Great area. Felt safe. Room was fine. Small lobby. Elevators are very unreliable and take a long time so allow yourself extra time to get down or up! Not the host’s fault. Hotel needs to work on them. Overall I would stay here again for the location and the price.

This room was very good for our 4 day stay! The only unfortunate thing that happened was we checked in at the assigned time and the room was dirty. The host was quick to resolve our issue and sent someone to clean. The front door was tricky. The water in the shower would randomly get cold. The bed has a small lump. The wifi is good, not great for streaming YouTube or Netlfix. Also, the electricity was shut off in the hours before check-out which was odd. The fridge and small kitchen was useful! It is a convenient location, fairly close to Time Square and other popular NYC attractions. We would definitely stay here again because of the convenience of the location. Thank you to the host for resolving our issue at the start!
Enjoyed NYFW this place was clean affordable and easy to get to everything when needed will stay here again when I come back 🔥

The location is fantastic, with easy access to the Megabus and Moynihan Train Hall within walking distance. However, the accommodation itself is a bit small and lacks privacy, as it follows a vegetarian-only environment.
For light sleepers like me, it may not be the most ideal option, but the provided ear plugs come in handy. Considering the price, I'd say it still offers good value."
Wonderful stay in Brooklyn Heart. Really nice accomodation in the near of the metro and groceries. Perfect!

It's simple and to the point. The room is clean. I appreciated the heater/fireplace, it kept me comfortable. There are two other rooms in the unit. The area and the in it are pretty quiet. The common areas were clean. I was pleased.
Great communication from the hosts. Made the stay seamless.
the windows and balcony is amazing!

El alojamiento de Khatia es uno de los mejores donde me he quedado, ella y su esposo nos recibieron, fueron muy amables y nos dieron recomendaciones que nos sirvieron mucho en nuestra estadía,a nuestras inquietudes Kathia respondió casi de inmediato.
En cuanto al apartamento, excelente, todo como se ve en la fotos, super bien equipado y las habitaciones muy cómodas.
El entorno del apartamento muy lindo, con supermercados y mercados cerca, restaurantes, droguerías, tranquilo y seguro.
En cuanto a la movilidad existen tres estaciones del metro cerca, la más lejana a 6 cuadras, de allí te puedes mover fácilmente.
Sin lugar a dudas en otra oportunidad en NewYork tendría de cómo primera opción el apartamento de Kathia.
Agradezco a Kathia por permitirnos a mi y a mi familia hospedarnos en su apartamento.
Sara’s apartment was a great place to stay and experience all there’s to do in Manhattan! We stayed for a month.

Clean linens and towels. Busy neighborhood. Parking was a challenge but there is a 24hr garage around the corner. Expect to pay accordingly.
The apartment was spacious and comfortable. The host was responsive and helpful. Would recommend.

Justin’s place is in a very nice area by the South Street Sea Port.  Lots of restaurants and walking distance to Wall Street and a number of other attractions.  It is as listed in pictures with a very nice view and very clean.  Would definitely come back.
Superbe Chambre ! Merci pour votre accueil et votre gentillesse !

Spotlessly clean with everything you need in this sweet space. Comfortable bed and well equipped kitchen made it perfect for our needs.
We hope to return again.
Cool place in a great location with a super responsive/available host
Place was easy to find and Trong was pleasant. Checked on us frequently and was available and responsive.

Had an AMAZING stay!!! Not only was the room homey and comfortable, it had the most comfortable bed I ever slept on! 10/10 service from the front desk and area was safe and close to so many different things to do.
Foi excelente! Tudo limpo. Bairro tranquilo. Fácil de chegar em Manhatam. Voltarei sempre!

Ghazal place was well located, cozy, clean and we also noticed they put extra supplies free to use such as steamer, hair iron, etc. overall we love the place and happy we book it - maybe only issue I could think about was the parking but it’s also so close to the metro that you actually don’t really need it
We had a great stay at Matthew’s place! It was very convenient being next to the subway line. The backyard area made peaceful and the apartment was cozy. We felt safe and comfortable here.
me encanto el departamento , la iluminación y la facilidad con la que encontré todo , volvería de nuevo
Jonathan always quickly responded to any questions. Room was spacious and clean upon arrival with TV included. Surrounding area can get sketchy at night but it's fine to walk through during the day.
Great room and host, bit of a walk to subway but v close to local shops and places to eat/drink.

The room is small but close to 2 subway lines and the area felt safe for a solo female. The place was clean, super quiet at night. I barely saw other guest (there are 2 other rooms in the apartment). Great values for the price.
Can you please copy the private review I wrote to this space. Thanks!
Right in the middle of Times Square. Very accessible and convenient to walk around.

My family and I had an incredible stay at 17John's place. The apartment was exactly as pictured, with modern accommodations that made our stay comfortable and enjoyable. The location is extremely convenient - literally steps away from every major subway line and close to some great parks. Rachel was an amazing host - extremely responsive and easy to communicate with. I would absolutely love to stay here again.
James is an awesome host with a great place that is PERFECTLY located in Greenpoint! What an awesome neighbourhood. Loved our stay and sad it's over!
A gorgeous space with warm and welcoming hosts. The dog is super sweet and cute. I highly recommend staying here!

A huge thanks to Busser and Mike for hosting us in their amazing home. The location was central to everything, the home was clean and comfortable and we enjoyed the company of our hosts who were helpful and friendly throughout. We’d have no hesitation in recommending this Airbnb to anyone looking for a stay in Manhattan.
Easy to find and near the metro. Clean bedroom and bathroom.
Edgar's place was really nice and he was very kind. Digi is the best cat in the world.

Lucas and Elena were extremely responsive and easy to deal with. They're friendly, even invited me to a little party they had. The space is big, clean and has most of what you need. The location is fun and next to subway. It's a Caribbean neighborhood, so the food is great.
I stayed for a month and I'd say the space is configured best for a shorter stay. There's no couch, so there's a lack of area to relax in outside of lying on the bed. Also the kitchen is hard to use as it has no counter space. All this to say, if you're staying for a few days and exploring the city it's a perfect place.
The value is great and the hosts are wonderful, definitely stay here.

Paul's place was very convenient for us because it was close to family.  The place was withing walking distance of restaurants, coffee shops, grocery stores, etc.  We found kitchen had what we needed.  Paul communicated with us in a very timely manner.  Would definitely stay again!

I had a wonderful stay! The host was always quick to address any issues and worked hard to ensure I was as comfortable as possible. The kitchen was well-equipped with appliances like a blender and toaster, which allowed me to cook delicious meals and save on New York’s expensive food costs. Overall, a great experience!”

This was my first Airbnb experience. I had the most wonderful time in New York! Grace was a big part of it , providing a safe, clean and beautifuly comfortable place to stay. She is a wonderful communicator and so kind. Literally, everyreview was true. I can not wait to come back and here is where ill stay!
Posizione ottima nei pressi di Herald Square. Letti comodi. Qualche problema di scarico nel lavandino del bagno

Perfect month long stay. As described - spotlessly clean, private, great access to everything in the city. Location wise it’s in the thick of it but good sound proofed windows and a secure building. No complaints, would stay again next time I’m in NYC.

Absolutely fantastic stay. The property is just as it appears in the Photos. Beds and bedding are first rate and everything is equipped to a high standard. Jeannie & Everett are nice people and the deserve to succeed
Thoroughly recommended!
The apartment is tastefully furnished and clean. Samanta is an excellent host who goes out of her way to make sure that you are comfortable and your needs are met during the stay.

As a first-time visitor to New York, this place truly felt like home. I was initially concerned about how my 4-year-old would adjust, but she absolutely loved it. Mo is a fantastic host, and I highly recommend this place. We’ll definitely be back!
Perfect！
A lovely little place in Bed-Stuy. Close to the subway, food, coffee--couldn't ask for a better location. Semhar was a great host! Thank you!

Lovely space with an incredibly welcoming and friendly environment. My room was spacious, clean, and very comfortable. The host was easy to communicate with and made the stay feel effortless. The location was convenient, the apartment was quiet, and everything was exactly as described. I had a great stay and would definitely come back!
The location was outstanding. Good restaurants, concerts, interesting shops and a pleasant atmosphere. Karen's house is comfortable and has character.
They are great hosts. Loretta responded promptly to our inquiry and request. We enjoyed our stay at their lovely place.
Briana’s place is in a good location, and we were able to use the subway to get to most places. We were comfortable, and we really appreciated the stocked fridge.

Monica was a great host. The place is in a great location with a lot of conveniences nearby. The apartment was small but clean and had everything needed. I travel to the city often and plan on staying again.

My girlfriends and I loved staying at this Airbnb. It was super spacious and comfortably fit our party of 8. We loved the location and how easy it was to walk to nearby coffee shops, bagel shops, grocery stores, restaurants, and subway trains. Although we loved our stay, there were a few things that could be improved for next time. The WiFi didn't work for the first 12 hours of our stay, and we had to enter a different Maison Bella unit in the building to retrieve our air mattress because it was missing from our unit. As for the WiFi, the team initially gave us an alternate network, but it didn't work. To our surprise, the next morning, a WiFi technician entered our unit with a code given to him by the Maison Bella team. We were taken completely by surprise, and we didn't receive a message about his visit until after he arrived (with no mention that he would have a code for our unit). We wish both of these situations could have been handled better.

We had a wonderful stay at Arthouse. Everything was clean with lots of room to store and hang clothes. It was quiet at night and the black shades kept the light out. The bed was comfortable and the covers were all washable, so I knew it was clean. The lights were dim and calming creating a lovely atmosphere.
Really nice place near soho, Chinatown and little Italy really close to grand St metro station! Nice room clean and comfortable it’s worth it
The place is definitely worth it. Edmund is a very good communicator and always helpful. We would book it again for our next trip to NY
Small room but very clever design, including bed that raises head. Lobby is mostly automated with somebody nearby to answer questions.
Great location, clean and spacious apartment. Host was very responsive to my questions. Would definitely recommend this property!

The home was comfortable, cozy, definitely perfect for a party of 2. The kitchen was beautiful, had everything we needed for our stay, and the bedroom had a large wardrobe that fit everything perfectly. The sofa was extremely comfortable, definitely did not expect that. We felt very safe, rarely heard any outside noise. The host was gracious enough to allow early check-in, which was not expected, but greatly appreciative.  I would highly recommend this place to others.

We had wonderful stay at Lieshas place ! The apartment is very spacious, well-equipped and clean - situated in a cosy area in Brooklyn with great restaurants nearby. Liesha was super attentive and helpful. And we highly recommend staying here.
Nicole and her family provided a flawless and exceptional experience. So timely with communication, very helpful with questions, and very clean and enjoyable space. Would definitely stay again!
Location is perfect, but no reply after taking a reservation

Nias place is perfect! It’s just a few minutes walk from the subway station so it’s very easy to get to manhattan. There is also a really nice grocery store just a few blocks away that we walked to and grabbed a few things from. The apartment was very clean and comfortable. I would highly recommend this airbnb to anyone looking to visit New York
Very nice location
Exactly as expected and Carmen was great! I would definitely stay again.

Annmarie really provides a home away from home! Wonderful setting, nicely decorated,
very clean and spacious. This place was exactly as described and looks the same as the listed photos. Great hospitality and she was readily available. Place is located near public transportation and stores but no worries Annmarie had the refrigerator stocked with all the basics, very thoughtful of her so no need to run to the store upon arrival.
Truly a great accommodation in Brooklyn NY, would definitely stay again, Annmarie keeps it real!!!!
Eric’s property was very welcoming and homey. We felt very safe located on a quiet and litter free street. Easy to walk to and from Yankee stadium and train stations.

Maddalena was very communicative, flexible with the times we could check in and check out, and you could really tell she put a lot of effort into making our stay great. Would definitely stay there again!
Check-in was easy and quick, room was clean 👌

We had a wonderful stay at Rohena’s home! The space was absolutely spotless and clearly well cared for. Every amenity we could have needed for the night was thoughtfully provided, making our stay comfortable and stress-free. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a clean, well-equipped, and welcoming place to stay.
I really enjoyed staying in the apartment! It is perfectly located and close to Columbia!

We were pleasantly surprised with our stay. The apartment was clean and very comfortable, with fast wifi and a dedicated workspace. The 2 bedrooms were nice, and I appreciated the little dishwasher in the kitchen.
I’d highly recommend staying with Christopher and exploring bedstuy. There are plenty of coffee shops, bars, and restaurants within walking distance.

This was a great home base for my week in New York. Jay was very nice and easy to stay with, and the room was nice and peaceful. The location was great, super close to 2 subway stops that made it so easy to get around.

Very clean and organized! Nice little space here for traveling and extremely convenient for subway stations. (Closest is a 6 minute walk)
Would love to stay again. Thank you!

Great value in walkable neighborhood. Hosts were super responsive anytime we needed anything and the place was nice and quiet. Plenty of room and all of the modern appliances were nice too. Would stay here again
Ok but not great

Not to bad, it’s relatively close to time square and has some stores close! Wish breakfast was included for the price and there was no mini fridge. All around a good little spot! Staff was always amazing and nice!

Christine es una anfitriona amable y atenta. Su casa es cómoda y muy bien cuidada. Todo tiene indicaciones de uso y ella esta atenta a los detalles y lo que necesitas durante todo el viaje. Gracias por hospedarnos!
Spacious clean accommodation with helpful staff.  I’ll stay here again!
Chef Step is such a friendly and kind host. It was fun meeting other guests and everyone was super chatty. Delicious food!
Cathy’s place was exceptionally clean, and was well-located just adjacent to Prospect Park. Highly recommended!
Alfred is absolutely a wonderful host, very welcoming and friendly. And the place is clean and cozy. Definitely recommend anyone visiting NYC to stay!

The apt was very nice --- clean, comfortable, great decor, lots of amenities, quiet and very private. It was possibly the best airbnb I have stayed at over the years. Robert was a nice and helpful host as well. My husband and I enjoyed our stay, and would highly recommend it.
Great stay at Igor's place. The apartment is comfortable, extremely well located, and Igor is super responsive and helpful. Would definitely stay there again.

I’ve been choosing Sharon’s place to stay at for very long time now and I’m still a very strong advocate!
Clean, convenient location that’s absolutely perfect for solo travelers.
A very clean / quiet area! Very nice rooms!
Great place walkable distance to Madison Square Gardens. Great restaurants nearby.
Todo lo que pueda tener no aceptable, lo vale la ubicación. Fué excelente, aunque pienso que puede ser más flexible a la hora de entrada, especialmente aquellos huéspedes que viajan desde tan lejos.

Great stay, lovely apartment for 2 people. A fair bit out from Manhattan if you are going to explore the city everyday. Would definitely recommend, subway stations are around a ten minute walk and easy to find. Would definitely recommend getting a mirror, some space to hang clothes and a couple more mugs! Just little things though, overall great stay.
Clean space, convenient check-in and check-out, well located, easy access to the city with the 7 train. I recommend Jose's apartment.

The stay at Kaitlyn's apartment and New York in general was fantastic! Kaitlyn is a great host with lots of advice for where to eat and what to do. The apartment is clean, the room is spacious enough to unpack some luggage. For the naive European that thinks windows are not only a source of light but also isolate or ventilate the room: not the case in the US. They only ventilate. (Yay for climate change!) Ask for heating instructions when traveling in colder months.
The traveling to Manhattan was easy to do using the subway. I also recommend using the citibike system to go e.g. to Brooklyn Heights or Williamsburg or in Manhattan. The neighborhood is so-so, lots of litter on the street, but seemed relatively safe even at night for people with minimum level of "street smartness". Overall, I am very happy with my choice.

This unit was perfect for my family of 4. Master bedroom is huge and everything is clean and in new condition. Great location with the express bus to Manhattan stopping just down the block. We were in town because of a family emergency and this unit made things really easy for us. Hosts were very responsive and fixed our one issue immediately.

Piedad was easy to talk to and provided amazing amenities :) we were allowed to check in pretty late since our flight had some delay which was awesome! The neighborhood was peaceful and we had a good stay.

El apartamento no es recomendable para largas estancias. La única ventana del apartamento muestra un muro a un metro de distancia, por lo que no hay luz natural. Faltan algunos elementos básicos para la estancia de larga duración (menaje del hogar, utensilios de limpieza, etc.) Hay insectos en las inmediaciones del apartamento, por lo que es necesario utilizar insecticida a diario. No resulta fácil ventilar la estancia, lo cual repercute negativamente en la salud de los inquilinos. Las lavadoras y secadoras, que son de pago con monedas de 25 centavos exclusivamente (No hay máquina de cambio en el Laundry Room), no están especialmente limpias y a menudo están fuera de servicio. Adicionalmente, si los vecinos las usan por la noche, el ruido es molesto en el apartamento.
Pese a todo, el piso tiene una localización buena (a 10 minutos de Times Square, a 15 minutos de Central Park, etc.) y el barrio de Hell’s Kitchen es actualmente un sitio seguro. Aún así, no repetiría una larga estancia.
Alejandros apartment was wonderful. Great location and super cute and clean inside. I would 1000% stay here again.
Great place to spend a night or two!
Great place to stay for our trip with great hosts. Will recommend to everyone. Thank you for a great stay.

Le séjour chez Ronnie était formidable.  je recommande à 100% . il nous a conseillé sur l'ensemble des activités que l'on peut faire sur NYC avec une visite jusqu'au brooklyn bridge. très serviable . Nous étions 6 personnes et l'appartement est très spacieux.  Au niveau de la propreté tout était nickel.  Le ménage est fait 1 fois par semaine mais vraiment à fond . Merci ronnie

This place was super cute! Everything was completely clean, and well-stocked with all the necessities. The neighborhood is totally walkable and I always felt safe on the street. Law is extremely hospitable and quick to reply. I would definitely stay here again!
Best Hotel In Brooklyn!

Mark was a great host! We enjoyed having conversations with him about football, and recommendations for places to visit and eat. He was always fast to respond and provided more information when communicating with us making us feel welcome and safe. Location of the apartment was also amazing, walking distance to the subway, various eateries and activities. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here.

Great place to stay! Bed is comfy, AC works great, easy check-in/check-out, close to the subway. Lovely area close to the bridge, and has some good restaurant options nearby. Only thing to keep in mind is that street parking is tricky, but there is a garage not too far. Would come back again!

Great little spot in Brooklyn! Perfect for a couple. Very walkable with lots of coffee spots, food options and mini markets. Even though the owners are just upstairs. The place felt private. Great responsive host that was very easy to reach. The backyard was cute but unusable for us. It’s an older place with an old charm. My favorite thing was no Airbnb chores! Thank you so much for that! I’m at already stressful checking out and rushing out. Appreciate you guys! Thank you for hosting us.

Wir wurden wunderbar in Empfang genommen und haben uns direkt im Zimmer sehr wohlgefühlt. Das Klavier im Raum haben wir genossen. Es hat Spaß gemacht darauf zu spielen. Ein Supermarkt für Kaffee und Teilchen ist nur wenige Minuten entfernt. Haben wir sehr viel genutzt. Frühstücks Restaurant auch sehr nah. Wir konnten mit offenem Fenster schlafen. Kaum Verkehr dort. Gerne buchen wir wieder bei Leslie und Ihrer netten Tochter und dem sehr angenehmen Nachbarn Patrick
Thanks

Louise's place is very easy to find and access. It is very close to bus stops and metros, and very close to Times Square and Broadway shows. There are several restaurants around. We like the bagel shops right across the street. There is an Amish Market nearby where we can get grocery and food to cook ourselves. The rooms are clean and quiet. Although the apartment is right on the 9th Avenue, we hardly could hear any noise inside the house.
It is on the 3rd floor and we were a bit worried about bringing up our luggage but then Louise sent a friend to help us bringing up our stuff when we checked in, and it was at midnight!! We were so comfortable in the house, and had great fun during our trips. I definitely recommend the place.

Manolo and Karen were a very hospitable couple who were kind and responsive with their service and attention to my needs as a guest I would highly recommend staying here it is close to the J train which makes it easy for anyone to commute in and out of the city in minutes there is also many places to eat and shop if need be. it's a quiet place to get rest and very peaceful.
it was really easy to access once you are completely booked for stay I would definitely visit again if I ever need to be in this area in the future.. my experience was very nice pleasant and enjoyable Manolo and Karen were great hosts.

Great place to stay! Check in was very easy, 24/7 front desk so you can check in whenever you arrive. The staff was very friendly and helpful, the amenities like the gym, rooftop bar, and restaurant were all 10/10!

El apartamento es más lindo y cómodo de lo que se ve en las fotos! Estaba todo limpio, súper equipado y la comunicación fue muy simple y buena. Está a unos 500 metros de la estación de Metro Prospect St. desde donde podes comunicarte hacia toda la ciudad. El barrio es tranquilo, si regresas muy tarde puede que no haya sitios abiertos para comprar comida, por lo que deberás saberlo antes de volver! Todo perfecto 👌🏻

Kenneth is an amazing person who cares about his guests and does his best to ensure the best service. He was of much help and guidance during my month stay in Brooklyn and made my experience better, as I was visiting NYC for the first time ever.

Incredible hosts (very responsive and zero invasive), amazing place (huge
Studio) near the subway. Everything super clean, comfortable bed.
Best place to say with an amazing price!
Excellent place!
We had a great stay! Everything was clean, and the location was amazing.
Wonderful apartment, great host, great location!
We had an amazing stay. I can strongly recommend to stay in the apartment. All you need for a full NYC stay is available and the hospitality of the hosts is outstanding.
loved it! would definitely book again!

This is a great place to stay if you are in a budget. 5-7 minutes walk to both subway station and M60 buses to LGA. There are good number of restaurants as well. 10-12 minutes to downtown and same time to LGA. Bill is helpful when you need some information regarding directions and anything in the room.

Me hicieron un cargo doble, y no me han aclarado porque, tengan en cuenta que  yo solo me hospedé una noche u pagué aproximadamente $7,000 mxn ya que me cobraron la reserva de Airbnb y aparte el hotel  me cobró otros $3,900 mxn que nadie me ha aclarado porque ni cuándo volverán a mi, la persona que me ha atendido de Airbnb si me responde pero realmente no he tenido una solución MEJOR EVITEN PROBLEMAS Y NO RESERVEN AQUÍ, dinero es dinero y a nadie le gusta tirarlo a la basura

It was very easy to work with Angy. She was very responsive to my questions before we arrived and also responsive when we had any questions or needs during our stay. The sounds of the city definitely come into the apartment both day and night, so I don't recommend staying here if you want a really quiet experience. It was fine with us. There is a restaurant and a bar at street level below the apartment, which might be a plus or a minus to you. We experienced street noise on a weekend night but it did not bother us. Also, there are two bedrooms in the apartment but no living area per se, which was just fine with us since we were mostly out. Overall we had a good time and appreciate Angy's apartment and availability for communication.
Andrew’s place is really beautiful and tidy and Andrew made me feel at home. Would highly recommend it.
We enjoyed our stay. The building was safe and we were able to walk to many places. It was also a short distance from the subway.

Had an AMAZING time at Shani’s place. The place is super dreamy. The interior design did not at all disappoint .The host is so friendly, communicative and understanding. I would definitely recommend for a cute Brooklyn stay!!
Perfect location for exploring New York. The subway station is just a short walk from the apartment, and you can reach Union Square in about 20 minutes

We had THE BEST time during our long weekend in NYC/Brooklyn to attend a wedding in Williamsburg.  Patrick's place is so conveniently located - we were able to walk or subway to almost everything we wanted to do - restaurants, sightseeing, the wedding activities we attended.  We also took advantage of the East River ferry to get to lower Manhattan and DUMBO.  Very convenient!  Two couples fit in very nicely during our downtimes.   I am not sure most couples would be happy on the futon, but my husband and I were just fine with it.  The whole place was very clean and the kitchen was well stocked.  Nice little touches like an umbrella - which we only needed on our last day!  Will definitely stay again when we are in Brooklyn.
The place was great and exactly as described and the directions to get there were spot on. It was very quiet and i would definitely recommend this spot to anybody staying in Brooklyn

Staying at Ames place was awesome. The place is exactly as showed in the pictures and Ame is such a welcoming person. We only came with a light jacket as we spent 10days in Florida and experienced a very windy and cold NY. One of the first things Ame told us after arriving is that we shall help ourselves and chose a warm jacket from her wardrobe!
The house she lives in has a lot of character and it's an extremely clean place. We also loved the neighbourhood as there are quite a few nice restaurants and coffees close by (close for American standards). There are a few metro stations close by too and it only takes about 15-20min to go to Manhattan.
The room faces a one way street which has a car passing by now and then during the night, which does not really bother.
Definitiv will stay here again and highly recommend the place to anybody.

Apartment was exactly as described. John was quick to answer any and all questions. There were two airbeds that my children used. Only downside was the futon/couch in the living room was very uncomfortable.

Brianna was incredibly responsive and helpful throughout the entire trip. We drove 6 hours for a show in Brooklyn and we were kind of out of our element, so to have her support on how to get around and what was around the area was super helpful. We look forward to coming back!

It is a very nice place, the apartment was very clean, fresh linens, convenient kitchen and bathroom. I recommend everyone to rent this place if you need to visit Brooklyn for a few days. Convenient location in terms of distance if anyone wants to visit the ocean and also from the metro stations.
Thank you Irene and Sam!
Maria was wonderful! Very sweet and caring. It was great to stay at her place before heading home from my work trip.
nice stay

Love staying at Gisele’s. Great neighborhood with every restaurant option you can think of. Right across the street from the A/C and 1 trains. I had stayed prior and it was so convenient to everything that I decided to extend my stay. Not fancy… but everything you need. I’d absolutely go back.

Apartment is very new looking. It was clean, spacious, quiet, and private. Parking was easy. Travel to Manhattan was also quick and easy plus the immediate neighborhood is a lot of fun in itself. We enjoyed our stay and would easily recommend it.
Super friendly host Sunny, flexible check-in and luggage storage service time, very reasonable price, kind staffs with responsibility.
Fair price. Friendly staff.

Han sido unos días increíbles en New York, y el hotel ha contribuido a ello, con una muy buena atención del personal, una habitación amplia, unas camas grandes y comodísimas. Además, se han cuidado todos los detalles.

Ok air BnB . We had a few teething problems such as a broken AC and a toilet that didn’t work which for the price you pay you wouldn’t expect such basic issues. However maintenance man was nice.
Location was good! Location was very safe. Bathroom was amazing! Good storage
Cons: Apartment felt very stuffy but again perhaps due to the broken AC. Apartment is small but for nyc this is normal.
I enjoyed my stay at Art House enormously. My room was a bit cold the first night but it was sorted the following day
Sam was a very accommodating host. The space wasnt glits and glammer but it definitely had all that one would need.
Everything was perfect. Thank you so much for everything
Great place to stay. Was a little hot the first day, but after a few hours of the ac units with bedroom doors open it cooled down. Amazing location, nice neighborhood. Highly recommend.

This is the perfect place to stay if you're completing clinical rotations anywhere in Brooklyn! It's cozy and comfortable. Robert and Tanya are incredibly welcoming and quick to respond. The area is very safe, and the room is spacious, exactly as shown in the photos.
All the amenities are provided, so you won’t have to worry about a thing. There's a grocery store directly across from the apartment, and the subway station is just 30 seconds away. A laundry shop is also just a minute's walk from the house.
Overall, it’s a 10/10 stay with amazing hosts. Highly recommended!
We enjoyed our stay. Clean spacious apartment and great location!
Adam is a very kind and cozy host. The apartment was clean and spacious. The neighborhood is beautiful and has the authentic NYC vibe.

Our stay at Silva’s airbnb was wonderful! The apartment was very clean with a good location close to a subway station, walking distance to Central Park and a cute bakery right around the corner for breakfast. Silva was a very friendly host and the communication was good too!
Had a great long-term stay here. The apartment was clean and has a nice WFH setup. Jeremy was very responsive and proactive, any minor issues I had were quickly resolved. Would definitely recommend!
Very clean and well maintained, in a great location, with access to the full kitchen and living room. There is a cleaner who seems to come daily.
Had a great time!
Great place to stay while settling into the city!

Thanks soooo much Sigi and Tania for the lovely stay! Super séjour chez Alberto. La localisation est idéal ! Merci pour votre réactivité et l’état de votre logement. Bonne continuation. Je recommande!

Elliot & Nicole had a lovely room in a great location. We could tell they really cared about having a great place to stay and we were thankful for the well-stocked amenities and the easy communication. I would definitely recommend them and I would stay again if I get the chance!

NOT private, only a heavy curtain in main doorway and bi fold doors-no locks to unit from theirs, NOT clean, Cobwebs, Mirrors “ tiles “ placed chest height in bathroom, No hooks or shelves for items in bathroom, Broken items such as faucet knobs in shower, tiles coming off shower floor, poor lighting, Awkward feeling while you are in unit, smells from their kitchen are in the unit.

Donna is a wonderful hostess, attentive, caring and responsive. I had a wonderful rest and dream of coming to New York again.

Very smooth experience. Thank you for hosting!
Excellent super comfortable & convenient
Good stay. Okay price. Just the necessities

We loved our stay with Chef Step! He's the best Airbnb host we have stayed with. He's warm and very welcoming and he made us feel like we belonged in Brooklyn. Liat’s place was perfect for us and we would have extended our stay if not already booked!
Great location, close to shops, restaurants and only 10 minutes walk to the subway.

Miriam was super friendly and helpful. We had a wonderful stay in her beautiful home. Her dog May was so sweet and friendly also!
It’s in a great location in Brooklyn, the host is incredibly nice, and they have the best coffee and bagels in the world! Highly recommended!
Definitely come back!

The apartment was as described, quite lovely even though the building is old and the stairs were noisy. Host gave loads of clear instructions on check in, check out, and how everything works. The coffee machines were appreciated and there was loads of space in the rooms.

Carlos and his wife Yvette are the kindest hosts who would go above and beyond for you to enjoy your stay, and we really appreciated these efforts. We spent an amazing 8 days in their lovely home in Queens, which was exactly as advertised: very clean, very comfortable and very quiet and cozy. The house is located near public transport taking you straight to Manhattan, Brooklyn or wherever you want to be. Carlos and Yvette were also very helpful in giving us directions to find our way from the airport, or giving us suggestions to find the nicest dinner places around. We are very thankful for our stay with you, Carlos and Yvette. We will sure recommend you to our friends, and hope to visit you in the future! M & H

This was a really great place to stay with my kids. We were close to the concert venue and it was such a peaceful and great home. Suemattie was very responsive and I loved the little touches that made it feel very zen!!

This hotel charged me a smoking charge. I do not smoke!!  Charged me $666.71 for cleaning and i left the room spotless. Do not stay here. This is a scam. I opened a case with my credit card company and air b&b. Scam hotel. Beware

Ashade was a wonderful and friendly host. She was extremely attentive and responded fairly quickly to my messages. We certainly appreciated her hospitality and flexibility. The apartment is so cute, warm and cozy. If I had to stay in Staten Island again, hands down, I’d definitely stay here!! Just book It y’all!!

the room was good but the furniture was not good at all , you can feel the springs on mattress

The apartment is spacious and conveniently located on the first floor, making it easy to move in without the hassle of stairs. The A/C works well, and the kitchen has a gas stove, perfect for daily cooking. It's just two blocks from the boardwalk, and I loved taking walks there on sunny days. Parking was never an issue. I always found a spot within 2-3 blocks. Ed is very responsive and communicative. I stayed for a month and would happily stay again!

Nous avons passé un bon séjour chez José. Le logement est fidèle à la description et facile d'accès vers Manhattan (environ 35 min en métro). Ernesto a été très gentil et accueillant et n'a pas hésiter à venir pour nous demander si tout allait bien. Un séjour agréable !
Amazing spot. Close to everything, clean and great host communication.

Perfect place for our little fam of 3 to use as home base while exploring New York for 3 days. Cozy, felt very safe, able to find street parking within 1-2 blocks. Easy walk to multiple playgrounds for our toddler. Great selection of cafes and Greek food!

Modupe and Don were very friendly and inviting to their home. Don gave me reccomendations on public transport and Modupe helped me with anything I asked. Very great people and place to book. Great!

My wife and I enjoyed our stay at Justin's place. It was easy to get to; a quick walk from the nearest subway station. It was very clean and the check-in process was very smooth and easy. The best affordable bnbs in the area!  Very spacious inside. Host was very helpful & responsive with questions.

Christopher's place was excellent in so many ways.  It was pristine, nicely decorated, well-organized and quiet.  The wifi functioned well. We had some great conversations, and I was even able to watch an NFL playoff game with him for a bit while drinking a craft beer.  I highly recommend his space.
Such a beautiful hotel and the staff was all super friendly and helpful, great location, and would definitely stay again!

I can't say enough about how great the home and Richard were. The home was just as beautiful as in the pictures. Everything in the house had upgraded details; from appliances, toilets, vanity mirrors, and even door knobs. The details let you know what a great find this home is. The bonus is Richard as a host. He is very communicative and wants to make sure your stay is excellent and comfortable. Plus he had snacks and drinks for us. Above and beyond. The location couldn't be better. Close to restaurants, shopping, parks, and nightlife. This will be our first choice from now on when we visit NY.
great place, very close to JFK

This place had a great location really close to subway and bus stops. Very clean! Host was great during check in and check out. Great communication. Only thing is that the beds were too firm for our liking. Other than that we had a great stay!
Great Trip to New York :)

It was a very rushed last minute trip to NY for the weekend. But Duane’s place was delightful. Spacious and clean! The house is gorgeous and the AC was super nice and kept me nice and cool from the New York heat. Would definitely love to stay here again!!

En resumen la experiencia ha sido estupenda. Había mucho espacio y la casa estaba muy bien equipada. Las instrucciones de acceso eran claras y sencillas, y de todas formas Corisha ha sido muy atenta para solucionar cualquier duda.

Definitivamente volveríamos a alojarnos aquí!
Great location. From there you can easily go everywhere. The staff was really friendly. The housekeeping was impeccable. 👌 a little bit small but cosy.
Great place and amazing communication ! walking distance to some great food and coffee. Would stay here again!

Jules es un gran anfitrión, aceptó recibirnos desde las 8:30 a.m. sin ningún recargo. Su casa queda muy cerca a una estación de metro en la línea J que llega directamente hasta manhattan, aunque en varias paradas.

Very responsive, respectful, kind. Room was amazing, nice furniture and decor.

Excelente lugar!!! 100% recomendable!!!

quick and plainless. nice place to stay if you need something

Great deal for the area. It was just as described, the amenities in the kitchen, laundry room and constant responsiveness of the host and building super were all added bonuses. Looked even nicer than the photos in real life.

I stayed at this apartment for five months. The space was okay but needed maintenance—walls were scratched, had holes, and didn’t match the photos. I had issues with pricing; a promised discount was only offered if I paid outside Airbnb, which never happened and violates Airbnb’s policy. It felt unprofessional. Perfect location! Lots to do in the area with a subway station right by the door.

Beautiful home, inside and out, with warm charm and art throughout. Stay comes with a large bedroom with closest, own sitting area, private kitchen, and spacious bathroom with tons of natural light. Great location to get around, with subway minutes walk away.
More than that, hosts are wonderfully kind, considerate, and helpful. Would highly recommend and hope to stay again myself!
Romil’s spot is the perfect place to experience the Caribbean culture of East Flatbush! Highly recommend for anyone wanting to experience the Brooklyn culture!

Je dirai juste que le parking est difficile à utiliser puisque l'hôte l'utilise aussi et il y a juste une voie, mais à par ça rien à dire.

Great stay in the center of Brooklyn! The hosts were very kind and helpful, and the place was very neat and tidy.

Michelle was an incredible host and extremely friendly and accommodating with us. The place is a little far from the subway, but we were aware of that coming in. Overall it worked great for our needs.

Friendly and responsive Host, even allowed an early check in also notified when the room was ready before check in. Convenient location from jfk and LaGuardia both airports plus lots of food and other convenient shops around over great experience thanks Kumar.

Our recent stay at an Airbnb property surpassed all expectations, leaving us with an unforgettable experience. From start to finish, it was nothing short of excellent, and we felt compelled to share our appreciation.
First and foremost, the communication with our host was seamless. They promptly responded to our inquiries before and during our stay, making sure we had all the necessary details and ensuring a smooth check-in process. Their warm and friendly demeanor put us at ease right from the beginning, creating a delightful atmosphere for our vacation.

This place was a great value for spending a few days in NYC. It was convenient to take the subway, only a 10 minute walk. The bedroom was comfortable and clean, as well as the common areas of the living room and kitchen. The street was a bit noisy, but that is to be expected with city living. The AC in our bedroom was helpful to drown out the noise, and also kept us very cool throughout the night. The host was very welcoming and communicated well throughout our visit.

The house was an incredibly beautiful place to stay, in the heart of Brooklyn. Our hosts were fantastic, attentive, welcoming and willing to help with anything.
Highly recommend this air bnb and would love to stay there on my next trip to NYC.
great hit , beautiful place.
Thanks Michael
Great location! Very walkable to subway stations and Times Square. Lots of restaurants and cafes around!

A group of us stayed a Lourdes’s top floor apartment and it was perfect for our one-week stay! It was just the right size for our group and was very cozy during our December stay. The building itself is very secure. It’s so nicely decorated, clean and has the basic necessities you’d need for any length of stay. The location is also extremely convenient for exploring the neighborhood (loads of cafes, bars, and restaurants within short walking distance) and is just down the street from the AC line metro stop—15 minutes to Dumbo and about 25-30 minutes to Midtown! Lourdes was an extremely accommodating host and was very proactive in assisting us during our entire stay. She’s a highly responsive host. Would definitely recommend to anyone that wants to explore Brooklyn, with easy access to the city!

This is not my first time here and I absolutely love this place! Walkable amazing restaurants nearby, easy to get to the L and J trains, and Reut is a welcoming, responsive host! Williamsburg is one of my favorite places in the world and this place puts you right where you want to be!

My mother and I had a lovely stay. Beds were comfy and the place was clean. Yes, it was a little loud as others have mentioned- but it’s NYC and to be expected. I brought earplugs and it wasn’t an issue at all - I slept like a dream. Would stay again.
Great location and easy to find. The beds were comfortable, although I think they need new pillows because ours were flat. Other than that, great shower pressure and amenities.

Very comfortable place safe, clean and pretty. Its 100%recomendable to stay there. Anne is very nice person to deal. Thnx sweet home to make of my family to feel that they are by a sweet home literally

clean and beautiful view! really enjoyed our stay!

Robert and Linda were both very accommodating and responsive. There was an issue with the reserved parking but they solved it, and we got an even better place.

Gabriel is a really good host. Excellent communication and extremely specific with his directions. He was very polite and easy going. The place is cool and cozy, close to everything you will want to see.
Wonderful spot to stay while attending a few shows at the nearby Brooklyn Bowl. The location was excellent, with amazing restaurants. I would stay here again if I find myself back in Brooklyn.
