Staying at this property was great! Really clear helpful instructions for self check in, the apartment was great, just as described. All the amenities were there. Would recommend this to anyone staying in New York for +30 days.
Perfect location. Beautiful quiet neighborhood. Easy to get around.

It is easy to see why Johnny is a Superhost. He is welcoming, friendly, helpful, accommodating. By the time my weekend ended, I was saying “see you next time” to a friend. I look forward to my next visit.

One of our top airbnb! Laurence is such a great host, very helpful and welcoming. We felt like home. The apartment is situed in a quiet area in Brooklyn, with one of the best backerys next to it ;)
Highly recommend this place, we will come here any time again!
very nice place for a long layover in JFK, very close to stores and restaurants and also very close to a train station in the route to Manhattan
Communicative owner, place was beautiful and very clean.
Good places!
Awesome place to stay for New Year’s Eve! Close to everything

Overall, Elaine’s Air B&B was lovely ~ clean, spacious, and a very comfortable bed! Also, the distance to the Staten Island Ferry was very convenient.
A few suggestions would be : repair the broken blinds, make sure the amenities you state you offer are available (there was only enough coffee to make 1 small pot), and it would be helpful if Elaine would be more responsive to message. I wrote her the second day of our trip with a question, and by the time we checked out she still had not replied.
I would recommend this place, but believe it could be even more enjoyable with the above suggestions taken into consideration.
Nice, clean place. Host was very responsive and accommodating.
The place was fantastic! Very clean, and plenty of space! Highly recommend!

Encontramos nuestra habitación ordenada, limpia y confortable.
La ubicación es buena si no te importa caminar 10 minutos (aprox) a la estación del metro.
Luosong siempre estuvo atento a los mensajes y no tuvimos ningún inconveniente.
Una estadía que vale completamente la pena.
Wonderful place!
Great place. very clean and quite

Sina’s place was located in a great area; near by the subway, times squares and the downtown of Manhattan.
The space was perfect for 2 people with the needed amenities to make the stay ok.
We had a few issues with the wifi and electricity but Sina was really responsive and very kind about it. He tried to help us with everything he could.
There is some improvements that are needed with the bathroom, the electric system and some of the cleaning needs to be more deep.
Overall we enjoyed our stay, we appreciated the location of the place and the kindness of Sina as a hostess!

Nous avons passé 1 semaine en famille à 5. Logement situé à 2 minutes de la station de métro, très calme. Très facile d'accès à Manatthan.
Le père de Shuhana est vraiment sympathique et rendant service.
N'hésitez pas à réserver !
Clean and in the heart of NYC.  Everything walkable from this location,  especially Broadway shows.
Beautiful, and cleaned space. Sara was very friendly and provided great recommendations

Julia’s place is in a prime location. Easily accessible to the subway and ferry. Restaurants are within walking distance. Her place was very convenient, comfortable and clean. We had everything we needed and was way better than a hotel. We would love to stay here again the next time we visit Brooklyn and NYC.
Great location. Perfect spot for our family of 5. Four beds comfortably slept all of us. Bathroom tight but functional and clean. Great value. Perfect location.
The condo was great. Clean, organized, and great price. Abby and Jesse were great hosts. They were kind and helpful.

Quirky old space but nice finishes and amenities. Appliances are new and reliable, nice little patio balcony space outside, comfy beds and reliable WiFi. Very convenient for public transit. Carlos was very quick and easy to communicate with. Would stay again!

Мила кімната в прекрасній частині Брукліну. Всього пів години до манхетену. Поруч з квартирою є все необхідне: супермаркет, ресторани, кавʼярні та станція метро.
Крістофер був дуже милим, та дав нам можливість заселятись в помешкання на кілька годин раніше зазначеного часу.
Рекомендую!

This location was great! Times Square was about a 10 minute walk, & subways located close by on every street!
Host was easy to talk to, & informative.

Rennie was an awesome host! The listing was exactly what I expected and more. It was my first time spending over a month in NYC, and staying at this place was totally worth it. Rennie was super responsive, usually getting back to me within minutes whenever I had a question.
The room was surprisingly spacious with plenty of room for all my clothes. The bathroom was spotless. The best part? The apartment is just a 30-second walk from the subway, making it super convenient to get anywhere, even if you're coming back late at night. Plus, it's only a 5-minute stroll from Columbia University, so it's a great pick for students still hunting for housing.
I highly recommend staying here, especially when you consider the price compared to other options in NYC.
Devora was an amazing host! Available, responsible, and very kind. Her place was also an amazing deal!

Roger was a great host and was quick to respond even though he was in Europe during our stay. The location is excellent close to subways and very easy to get around the city. There are three flights of stairs to go up to get to the apartment. The apartment was very clean. We would definitely stay at Roger‘s apartment again.
Jennifer's place was cozy and welcoming. We felt welcomed and had a nice stay.

Asaf's listing was exactly as described. It's a 3 minute walk to the bus stop or 15 minute walk to the train. The space was very clean, and the kitchen was well equipped. It is near a busy street so you will hear some noise, but it's not bad at all. Overall, it is a great space, and I would highly recommend booking it.
We stayed for two weeks - close to several subway stops, kitchen stocked with essentials, and the rooftop view is incredible.

Place in excellent location, but the apartment was very dirty, the covers were horrible and smelly, we made two requests and unfortunately the owner promised to provide it and on the day of check in she disappeared and did not communicate with me anymore.  Only 1 roll of toilet paper was left in the bathroom for 8 people.  We love the location, but unfortunately the experience with the apartment was terrible!
Loved staying here for a budget airbnb in midtown :)
Polecam .wszystko ok !
Great location to explore Brooklyn, quiet and clean.
Great find! Perfect for my NYC needs. No complaints whatsoever!

I’ll be repeating a lot of earlier reviews but hopefully the additional testimony helps. Eduardo and Austin are excellent hosts. Communication was prompt and they went above and beyond to help us with a “self-created” tricky booking. Judging by the music collection, we’d get along great.
The unit was neat and tidy - no complaints.
As mentioned in other reviews, it’s a noisy location owing to it being at the corner of two major thoroughfares. Obviously this is beyond the hosts’ control so bring ear plugs and/or a white noise track unless you are a very heavy sleeper.
The trade-off for the noise is that it is perfectly located. Easy walks to almost everywhere: theatre district, NOHO, SOHO, Bowery, Union Square etc. etc. And if walking isn’t your thing, there are two subway stations and a PATH station all within a five minute walk including one that is literally 10-15 steps from the building’s entrance. 23rd St bus route also right outside.
All-in-all, great place and great hosts.
Absolutely perfect place for our team to connect in person for our launch event.
I had a great stay.  This will be my go-to AirBnB anytime I am in New York.
Beautiful, cleanl home in a great location that's even more spacious than the photos made it look. I gave an easy 5 stars to all the categories. Liesha is an ideal host.
The flat is exactly as pictured very nice and unique.  The sauna was a nice plus and the massage chair was very relaxing.  Place is airy and bright…..enjoy!
Everything was perfect and as described. Great host and property. Will stay again.

We had a fantastic stay here! The room was exactly as described and made the best use of the space available. Bathroom was great as well as the bed. Many little touches around the room including innovative hanging space and Bluetooth speaker, coffee machine. Breakfast included at the cafe downstairs was fantastic, a pastry and cake with a coffee each morning. We were very happy with our stay, thank you so much :)
great location, and responsible host. but the house should be more clean and the host provide private cabinet. thank you Francisco.

Everything was found as advertised. Easy to find and easy to access. A basic apartment with the necessary things for a quick stay. Communication was very clear and prompt.
No regrets, worth exactly what I paid for and for the area in which it is located. Clean, quiet, comfortable. A very pleasant stay overall, very polite host.
Thank you!
Carlos has a great apartment in the middle of NYC. He provided great instructions and was super helpful.

Overall, nice place- clean, spacious, nice bathroom. Check in was very difficult- the staff were unorganized and could not find our reservation for 25 minutes which put us behind schedule. Host helped to find it and get us moving.
Room was exactly as described and bathroom was very clean. Thank you VK!

Host fixed the problem with my bed very quickly and made my stay very comfortable. Left me more water and snacks. Also offered a dinner at end of stay. Every thing was comfortable and quiet. Just as I wanted.
The place was great!! Loved the front desk clerks and the hotel room was very comfortable. We enjoyed how close everything was including the the trains! I would definitely stay here again 😬
nice place! would stay again :) x

Zenobia is a very responsive and kind host! We stayed at her place a week while visiting our son who lives nearby. Her place is perfect if you intend to be out and about most of the time; subway stations are within a 10-15 minute walk and we had no problem using Lyft either. The location is great in that you are equidistant to many attractions /parts of Brooklyn. Prospect Park is about a 15 minute walk away; a great place to picnic and walk and enjoy people watching. The Brooklyn art museum and Botanical garden are within a 30 min walk.
The neighborhood area is a funky mix of older, classic Brooklyn bodegas and assorted small shops/eateries interspersed with newer cafes and shops.
Manhattan is about an hour away via subway/car.
The space itself is in the basement; down a few steep steps. You will hear low level noises/footsteps at times; but they were never disturbing. The amenities are fine for one-two people only. Great shower ; the kitchenette is best for breakfast/simple meals. It has a small fridge; hot plate; hot water pot, and toaster oven (no microwave). The small garden area is pleasant (when the weather is nice). Only complaint is we got a bit cold (weather was rainy) and we have encouraged Zenobia to add a safer and larger space heater. She has a nice dehumidifier but as we were there in the early Spring we didn't need that. Internet/Wifi was good and we were able to watch Netflix on the TV . Hope this helps you find your spot to stay in Brooklyn!

Rose was very friendly and helping. She stayed up late on the day of our arrival and welcomed us. She took us a tour around the house and provided clear instructions. She provided suggestions and useful informations about getting around NYC and touring tips and ideas.
The place is in a residential neighborhood and felt calm and serene from the hustle bustle of NYC. Street side parking is only available and depending on the hour of arrival availability of parking may vary. It was very near to LGA airport - about 15 minutes drive distance. Since we had an early morning return flight out of LGA, we booked this place and it was very short drive to the airport during early morning hours.
Overall it was a good experience.
Lovely room in a great location. The bed was so cozy and there’s ac - a must for NY summer. I would stay here again in a heartbeat! The host is so nice and very responsive. Stay here if you can!
We had a great stay easy access to the subway and Paul was always a call away.
Great stay great view
Great stay, nice neighborhood near the train station, the apartment was always clean and Alexander would always answers quick.
Great studio space! Nice furnishings, great location, easy check-in. Loved the luggage hold option. Great communication. Thanks!

Amanda and Tanya’s place was perfect for a short stay with my son and granddaughter. The area is full of history and the place has a ton of character. Great seafood restaurants everywhere on the island. I would definitely stay again.
I can’t say enough about the kindness and hospitality they showed to me and my family.
Great place to stay for a large group! The moderate walk to downtown is pleasant but is conveniently connected by bus. Ivanna was responsive and helpful during our stay.
We had a wonderful stay. Thanks again! 😁
I’m considering moving to Crown Heights, thanks to this stay! Would definitely rebook.

La casa è molto accogliente, con tanti libri d’arte e musica interessanti. Zona residenziale molto tranquilla, con bei ristoranti raggiungibili a piedi. Spostamenti facilitati da una fermata del bus b54 che collegava velocemente alla fermata metro più vicina. Jeffrey è stato sempre molto amichevole e disponibile. Abbiamo lasciato i bagagli dopo il check out per recuperarli nel pomeriggio.
Great place that was clean and in a good area. The communication was very good with the host. I would recommend this place.
superb location in superb appartement with very nice hostest

Muy buena atención, el host muy amable, el apartamento muy bonito, bien ubicado y bien equipado. Thomas nos dió sugerencias y estuvo pendiente de nosotros. La única observsción es que el acceso a la habitación no es muy cómodo, no apto para personas con alguna discapacidad

A great place—as close to a fine hotel experience as I’ve had on Airbnb: the place is spotless, things feel new (unused sponge and soap, for example), and you just leave without stripping beds or emptying trash. And bonus: Adam is super responsive and thoughtful.
Great
Very convenient location for Prospect Park, Brooklyn Museum and the Botanic Garden. Plenty of eateries in walking distance. Exceptionally clean and nicely updated.
Easy stay in a reasonably quiet location. Comfortable and spacious

Stayed here for 8 nights with my mom as we were visiting family that lived nearby the location was perfect for us. Close to the 7 train and lots of bars restaurant shops. Check in was easy. Beds were comfortable and the shower was lovely and hot. Overall would recommend
I Absolutely loved this place♥️
This was perfect for my trip to New York! The neighborhood is lovely and there’s so much to do. Yuki was very communicative and helpful throughout my stay. Would definitely recommend!
Such an amazing spot to stay, very close to Time Square and Central Park. The room I stayed was so clean and spacious. Bathroom clean too.  In the front desk people are very kind and helpful.
Reliable and worth it.
I don’t want to write a review
We had the best stay here! The elevators worked fine when we were there. Everything was very clean and welcoming. We had a nice view of the city from our room. We would stay here again in the future.
Loved this space! Safe and clean! Perfect for what I needed! Close to everything!
Brigida was a great host, always replying fast to the messages. The room was very clean and nice. Good value for staying a couple of nights in NYC.

Très beau condo, très propre! Parfait pour 4 voyageurs car le lit gonflable est très très confortable.
Vue superbe sur Manhattan.
Le bruit c’est su et connu, mais on s’y fait rapidement.
À moins de 5 minutes de marche d’une station de métro. Celui de New York est assez complexe, mais avec Google Maps il n’y a jamais eu de problème.
Gros avantage : le stationnement gratuit. Nous n’avons pas touché à la voiture pendant 4 jours.
Seul bémol : ce n’est pas le coin de Brooklyn le plus intéressant pour passer un bon moment dans le quartier, d’où le prix assez raisonnable j’imagine.
Bref, pour voyageurs avertis, je recommande sans hésiter.
Great spot!

Nice place in a really good location. Centrally located within walking distance to many restaurants, bars and landmarks.
Would recommend!
This place was perfect for my last minute travel. Central. Convenient. Thank you for your hospitality!

I am so glad I found Louann's place. She was really thorough when checking in. She made us feel like it was home. On top of that she was very accommodating. I recommend her place to everyone and definitely will book her place next time.
Great location. Nice, spacious, clean apartment not too far from the subway station.
Súper recomendado el alojamiento, Gaby una excelente anfitriona. Muy buena ubicación cerca de estación de Metro.

Waldemar was quite unfriendly. His and his sister's attitude made my friend and me feel unwelcome and even uncomfortable, at times. He accused us of causing a leak in the house, which had absolutely nothing to do with us. Overall, not a pleasant experience and would not recommend.

Thank you for everything
I enjoyed trip
In a great location. Room was clean but pretty small

Local super honesto com o anúncio .Amplo , chuveiro muito bom , cama macia , quarto espaçoso . Um pouco de barulho mas nada que atrapalhasse o sono. Localização a 27 minutos da times Square de metrô . Ponto super positivo , linha de metrô a 3 quadras , e não precisa de baldeação para checar nos principais pontos da cidade. Outro ponto positivo é que o bairro é popular, de imigrantes que trabalham 24 hrs em NY então a qualquer hora do dia e da noite , tem gente na rua e no metrô . Me senti seguro em todas as horas .A hospedagem familiar , simples mas honesta . Retornarei tranquilamente na próxima vez .

This place was absolutely amazing with gorgeous views of the city, comfy living room, smart TV, comfy bed, lots of outlets, nice clean bathroom, lots of extra towels and sheets. Less than 5 min walk to park and easy access to a bunch of different subway lines. Pictures are very accurate and communication was a breeze. Would highly recommend staying here!
Great stay
Great quick stay. Very convenient location.

joy place is a nice place in a quiet tree lined block. joy responds quickly and was very kind.  The beds were very comfortable.and there's lots and lots of stores in the area and food spots. I definitely recommend this location to anyone and will be visiting again.
Awesome!!! Best Airbnb experience and everything was exceeding my expectation. The hotel decor is fun and in a vibrant neighborhood.
Enjoyed staying here.  Quick and flexible check-in.  Room with extra couch, AC,  and wifi. Close to transit.
Monica is great and I loved her cat.

mieszkaliśmy tam 14 dni. To fajny apartament, przestronny i dobrze urządzony. okolica bardzo ciekawa. można poznać Nowy York od innej strony niż turystyczna. Dolores i David są bardzo mili i pomocni. metro jest bardzo blisko. Koniecznie przeczytajcie przewodnik gospodarza domu. Są tam świetne restauracje w okolicy. bardzo polecam ten apartament. Aga i Wojtek z Polski
Appartement très agréable, super bien placé, bien décoré et avec un accès au toit à la vue sur NYC! Nous espérons y retourner. Ceylan est une hôte très chouette. Merci!
Renato was an amazing host and really enjoyed my stay. His communication was great and he always made sure I felt at home. Would definitely stay again.
A little more cleaning would be a perfect place.  but the rest very well thank you!
The apartment is clean and quiet and has good natural light. It is a good option for a simple stay in the city. Brooklyn is friendly and pretty diligent. Thanks!!

Solid option right in Manhattan, nothing special just a clean solid hotel. Super close to the 9/11 memorial and Wall Street. Check in was later than hoped but they will take your bags and let you go explore. Plenty of uber options in the area no matter time of day or night. Only thing I noticed was not a lot of bars or nightlife around this hotel and area there is an Irish bar going all night long and another bar that closed at 10. I was there to just see nyc, if you’re there wanting to be close to nightlife then this will be little out the way.

This Airbnb was absolutely the perfect place for my husband and I during our wedding week in NYC.  It is modern, clean, spacious, homey and has the added touch of an outdoor space.  There are so many amenities like laundry, air conditioning, dishwasher- all in the charm of a Brooklyn brownstone.  We joked we were going to ask if we could move-in permanently because we loved the neighborhood and home so much. John was hospitable and responsive. So happy with our stay here.

séjour en famille à NY. Le condo est super. Le quartier peut sembler sombre, mais tout a bien été et il n'y a pas de danger à se promener dans Brooklyn. Le métro est à 6 min à pieds et donc super facile d'accès. Je recommande fortement ce condo.
I enjoyed my stay!  CJ is very friendly and welcoming and the place was spotless!
Royal was amazing and he was super communicative and helpful. One of the best hosts I ever had!

We had a nice time here. Julian was a good host and always answered promptly even though he wasn’t in town at the time.
Jesse who lives there full time was really nice and helpful.
The room was stylish & large, and towels and soap were provided which was really nice. Location is good, nice restaurants & close to the subway station, easy access to Manhattan. 👍🏻👍🏻
The only thing was as the house is quite old, you have to turn off all AC units (including the one in Jesse’s room) if you want to use any other electric appliances like the hairdryer, microwave, or hot water kettle. Also the cold water in the bathroom sink doesn’t work. None of this is a reflection on the host but it did make things a little bit inconvenient.
Otherwise we had a great time. Thanks!

Nia's place is exceptionally clean, roomy, and in a great location. Nia and her dad were always available for questions and gave great recommendations for the neighborhood. I wouldn't think twice about booking Nia's place again.

Peter’s place was great. Was nice and clean and looked like the pictures. When we first walked in, I noticed the little things like the bows on the paper towels and toilet paper, so cute.
Really liked the table with the pamphlets of local recommendations. I loved the full length mirror in the room (which I always check for). And the best thing was the backyard!!! We loved it out there. A whole vibe. Area is a bit noisy due to train passing by.
Peter was responsive and sent details a few days early. Which was much appreciated
All in all, I would stay here again.
Loved the place its very private! It was very close to the train and I was able explore NYC. Also good place to stay if youre going to kings theatre
A clean and nice apartment in a convenient location, and with great hosts who were very helpful and kind. I'd be glad to get the chance to stay here again!

This is a very comfortable apartment in a fantastic part of Williamsburg. The space was, bright, open, quiet and had excellent A/C -- all fairly unusual features for an NYC apartment. Subway (G, L, M, J, Z) was easy to walk to. All the major rental car agencies were a reasonable walk away. The  wide selection of restaurants within 1 block of the apartment gave me a different delicious option for each of my five nights. I spent half my trip meeting people all around Brooklyn and Manhattan, and the other half sitting in the apartment reading and working. It served both purposes very well. I would highly recommend this apartment.
great stay, very clean place and close to subway station to get places.

This is such a great place to stay.  If you want the Brooklyn experience this is the place.  Park Slope is a wonderful neighborhood.  I graduated from John Jay HS and being from Brooklyn I know how central this neighborhood is. There is easy access to various buses and trains.  The best part is having Prospect Park just 2 blocks away!  You want to see NYC, stay at this place.
交通方便，周边买食品方便

늦은 시간에 도착했지만 Allen과 Ann은 우리를 기다렸고 친절히 안내해 주셨어요. 방은 넒고 깨끗하고 아늑해요. 집이 참 멋져요. 동네가 평화롭고, 지하철 역도 가까워요. 주변에 식당도 많아요. 아침마다 베이글과 오렌지 주스 주셔서 정말 좋았어요.
단지 방 안에 있는 파이프에서 가끔 소리가 나요. 소리에 민감하신 분들은 이어플러그를 챙겨가세요.
뉴욕 여행을 다시 온다면 이 집에 꼭 오고 싶어요. Allen&Ann은 친절하고 따뜻한 분들입니다. 추천합니다!!
A very unique and comfortable space, I loved it and imagine in nice weather the back garden would be an enjoyable hangout.
Easy check in , very walkable location , very comfortable sheets and bed

The place was very clean and convenient for work, but the host is unresponsive and communication is done entirely through the rental maintenance and on-site management, which is closed on weekends. Before I moved in, I indicated I would not be there the day I was starting payment, requesting that the door code be extended until I arrived into town. It was not and I was left to wait for somebody to be exiting the building to go inside and move all my belongings in. This could have been resolved had the host been responsive. Otherwise, the place was lovely. It is very expensive though.
A nice experience
Giac was a great host. He was super responsive and made my stay enjoyable. I would return!
Good neighborhood and very nice hosts
Thank you for having us, you looked after us really well and were super responsive at all times

I don't know about a masterpiece, but it was in a pretty nice neighborhood. Nothing scary between the Airbnb and the nearest subway station. It's possible to get a parking spot right outside the place which is nice (just got to pay attention to the street signs that tell you when you can and can't park in certain spots). It's sufficiently air conditioned which was nice during the heat wave. Ceiling fans are remote controlled which was cool. Lot of apps to watch on the television. There's a mall with an Aldi and Starbucks just a few minutes drive or 15 minute walk away, which you can use to stock the fridge with supplies. The host was very informative.
I really liked it and may try to snag it again the next time I'm in the area.
I loved this place so much. Imma 1000% be back thank you!

La casa di Brian è stata il posto perfetto per la mia famiglia durante il nostro soggiorno a New York. È spaziosa e confortevole, e i miei bambini si sono divertiti un mondo a giocare in giardino e in mansarda.
La posizione è ideale: un quartiere tranquillo e sicuro, con ristoranti, parchi e negozi raggiungibili a piedi, oltre a un facile accesso alla metropolitana per Manhattan. Brian è stato un host eccellente, sempre attento e con ottimi consigli sulla zona.
Ci piacerebbe tornarci un giorno!

Logement conforme aux photos , bien équipé et propre. Localisation parfait (proche Times Square et Central Parc). Nombreux restaurant ms et bar a proximité bref bonne base pour découvrir Manhattan. Hôte réactif et de bon conseil. Point négatif, le restaurant situé en dessous de l'appartement, on entend la musique dans la chambre jusqu'a la fermeture (chambre avec les deux lits).
Great stay
Best Deal in town.   Good, functional hotel rooms for a great price
Great location!! Excellent costumer service!! The experience was amazing! 100% recommend!!! Definitely a great option for a family
It was awesome. Next time I stay again there. Just as described, we used it to explore NYC and loved it.

Paola was extremely kind to accept our booking on very short notice due to some other arrangements that fell through. She was very communicative, with quick response , friendly and helpful. The place was very welcoming and comfortable - exactly as described. Location is great, very convenient and lots to do in the area. We felt very safe in the area. Thanks so much to Paola- we would definitely stay with her again when in NY. Highly recommend!
Wanted to thank the host for everything. We had a great time there.
Carl was really nice and helpful, went with some girlfriends for a concert and it was exactly what we needed!

Really well placed.
Nice spot close to Times Square and Empire State Building.

We really loved how well-taken of the apartment was. The shampoo and shower gel were also a plus. A/C was great to have in the summer, and the location was very lively and vibrant with access to many things close by. Proximity to a train stop didn't bother us much. Overall, a really nice stay and a great experience. Thank you Tony for being such a great host!
Easy to find. Easy access. Extremely clean. Comfortable and cozy. Included all the essentials and then some. Would recommend and will probably book again.
A nice place to stay!
Excellent stay! Michael was very responsive. Well located in China Town, and close to Soho. Highly recommend.

I chose this place because I really liked the layout. When you walk into the main door to the foyer, there are stairs up to the right and a door to the left leading down this room’s hallway. There are two other rooms, this room is at the end just before the bathroom. You face the back patio so it’s nice and quiet.
The room is bigger than it looks in the photos, the bathroom is also lovely, the pink-ish counter one in the photos. My roommate’s were respectful and it’s was always pretty clean.
Ivan and the other tenant Dan did a great job communicating and responding to requests. I like they care about composting and recycling. Subway across the street.
The main downside, for me, was the intense smell of ammonia from cats. The downstairs tenant rescues stray cats, gets them neutered, and cares for them. He does his best to control the smell. There’s an air purifier in the room which helps immensely. Just the hallway can be eye watering. Some cookware could also use replacing.
Lia was a superb host. Super friendly and provided extremely detailed instructions which was very helpful. A wonderful stay all around; I would recommend!

Great location as it was conveniently located in the heart of the city and many subway routes outside of manhattan. The staff was very friendly, always greeted me in the morning and showed me the breakfast area. I definitely recommend this location for anyone who is a solo traveler and will definitely consider my stay here if I visit NYC again. Cheers!
Had a wonderful stay. Felt like home away from home. Host and family were very friendly and helpful. Would definitely recommend for a homely stay. Thanks so much Mr. Raj and family.
Not so clean

Beautiful accommodation! Clean, tidy and warm room in a charming house in Queens. Great location just a few minutes walk from three different stations that are connected to Manhattan, the airport and other important facilities of the city. The hosts are very kind and approachable. Mrs. Ivette cleans every day.
Kudos to the hosts for their kindness, hospitality, tidiness and friendliness. We had a wonderful time. With a nice trip to NYC we will remember this accommodation as well.

Patrcia was mamaziiinnng person i feel like in my house super friendly very comunicative I could give 100 out 10 she is amazing host i really recomend it the space its so organazed very but very cozy private and lovely. I highligthed recomend the place to others that are looking for quier apace to be close to transportation to move around New York. If i need to return her place always will be a option

The location was very nice and peaceful. The place was very small. The bed was comfortable, but I wish the description noted how small the room was. The bathroom was very small, and there was an atrocious stain on the tub floor

My friends and I had an excellent stay! The place was spotless, well-equipped, and exactly as described in the listing.
The host was incredibly responsive and provided clear instructions for check-in and check-out.
The location was perfect, close to local transport and amenities.
My friends and I felt very comfortable and appreciated the thoughtful touches that made my trip even better.
Highly recommend this Airbnb for anyone visiting the area!

We loved the apartment. The location is great and close to a subway entrance. The rooms are all good size, the beds are comfortable and the A/C works great. The bathroom is clean and functional and the large living room/kitchen and garden are all a great bonus. Vanessa was super accommodating and gave us a late night restaurant recommendation when our flight came in very late. 10/10 we will definitely stay there again when visiting the city.

This is a lovely bungalow in a fantastic location, close to restaurants, transportation, and the beach and boardwalk. It was so clean, quiet and nicely maintained, with all the basic comforts of home on a nice residential street. The beds were especially comfy, and air conditioning was much appreciated during the hot summer nights. The host’s communication and responsiveness were wonderful. A perfect home away from home!

L’alloggio corrisponde alla descrizione fornita dalla host. Il rapporto qualità-prezzo è ottimo e Beebe è un’host premurosa e disponibile. L’unico consiglio che mi sento di dare è migliorare l’odore di chiuso che si sente appena si entra nell’appartamento. Per il resto tutto ottimo.
Stayed here again after a flight cancellation given my first experience was so pleasant. Would come again

Our stay in the apartment was a very pleasant experience. The studio was small but very cozy, clean, warm (well-heated in winter) and equipped with all the necessary amenities, good even for longer stays. Gurlaine was very attentive, helpful and responded to our questions literally within minutes. The location was very convenient - groceries, cafes, coffee shops, pharmacies, takeaways of international cuisines and public transport stops - all at a walking distance. This was our first visit to NY and we felt safe and comfortable with our son in the neighborhood.
Great location, clean place, perfect for our short stay. Good communication from hosts
Another great week at Araz’s. Very clean, comfy and quiet! Will be back again for work soon.
Clean, the place is as pictured. Did not feel very safe outside. I do wish there was more than one lock on the front door. Easy check in and out. Very responsive host.
An amazing, inspired place for a creative traveler.
Ottima posizione, stanza bellissima e pulita al 34 piano.
un magnifique petit appartement et un hôte très sympathique et accueillant. nous nous sommes sentis comme à la maison et nous reviendrons sûrement.

Ha sido una estancia maravillosa. La casa es preciosa, luminosa y la cama es súper confortable. La calle una preciosidad, casas con jardín y vegetación muy colorida. Aunque estemos en la misma casa, hay mucha privacidad y nos hemos sentido como si estuviéramos en nuestra propia casa.  Elisabeth y su familia son muy respetuosos y han sido muy atentos con las peticiones que les hemos hecho. Sin duda repetiríamos y lo recomendaríamos a cualquiera!!!
Eli’s place was just what we needed.   Plenty of space.   Close to several different subways and Eli was quite responsive.
We had no complainants for this Airbnb! The communication with the host was very prompt and helpful. The apartment was very clean and made us feel at home.

Merlberg & Jamaal’s place is a gem! So comfortable, fashionable and clean! I thoroughly enjoyed my stay in their home and would recommend them for anyone looking for a great airbnb experience. The home looks exactly as pictured, is very tidy and has great amenities. The location is favorable as well with so many great businesses near by and a train a few blocks away to make commuting easy. They are some of the most responsive hosts I've had and I would definitely stay here again. Thank you again Merlberg & Jamaal!!

Basic hotel
We loved staying at OD's place. Everything you need for a short or extended stay, very easy-going and only a short walk to the subway. Thanks for having us!

Lovely place! We were there for a little over a week and everything was great. Had everything we needed and the host was responsive and helpful. We forgot hangers to steam our clothes and he was more than happy to lend us some. We had a later flight and he was very accommodating about a late check out time. The place was clean and well decorated. Overall great stay. Would recommend 👍
Very convenient very quiet. Lovely bedroom. Shared bathroom not a problem. Extremely good price.
Great stay in a convenient location! Clean space with nice amenities
Todo genial, una persona muy atenta y servicial. No tengo ninguna queja con Edgar.

Its amazing placement in the city is worth every penny. However, I’d recommend it only for young people who are staying in New York only for a short period of time. Clean and cozy. Lots of cutlery, bowls and electric facilities.

We spent a great week in this cozy, convenient place. We felt at home right away. Our host Frauelein war very helpful and friendly plus easy to reach. It is lovely to have your breakfast outside in the backyard. The street is nice and calm so you are able to get a good rest in order to head out for NYC again. Thank you very much for the best stay, Frauelein. I really wish and hope to come back to your place! Britta
Cozy spot, quiet neighborhood, not too far to walk to the 7/LIRR. AC keeps it cool at night

Un espacio agradable y extremadamente limpio con todas las comodidades que se publican en el anuncio.
Por otro lado se encuentra a menos de dos cuadras del subway, lo que permite un acceso rápido a toda la ciudad. Hemos vuelto bien entrada la noche con el subway y la zona es tranquila e iluminada para caminar.
Quedamos muy conformes.
The room in Donald’s place is right by the front door, making it perfect for solo guests. I was comfortable and it was a very easy experience. I would absolutely recommend this for solo travelers!

Michael and Xenia are very responsive hosts who communicate clearly and in a helpful manner. They were also prompt in responding to requests.
The place is nice, clean, functional and the amenities are super helpful (dishwasher, washer and dryer). It’s also quiet and private and comfortable. Neighborhood is clean and quiet and Subway is 7 mins away by foot and it’s easy to get around.
Recommend for staying!
Visit the rooftop bar! We loved it!
This place was just as pictured and so clean! Carline was a wonderful host, flexible, and very responsive! I would stay here again if I’m in Brooklyn!
Spacious, nice kitchen. Close to the train station.

My friend and I brought her 16 year old daughter to NYC for the first time.  Dominik’s apartment was perfect. The space itself is gorgeous with well appointed design, and the location was excellent. We started our days with a bagel and coffee down the street at Davidovich, and then the Essex/Delancey subway station was only a couple more blocks away.  For late night dinner, nearby Birria LES has amazing tacos. The apartment is clean, cozy, as well as spacious, and Dominik is always a super quick message away with answers to questions.  Highly recommend!
Loved it! Super walkable, perfect pied-à-terre for exploring Manhattan.
We enjoyed our stay at Dorothy’s! The location was excellent, with plenty to do in the area, and it was easy to take the nearby train or bus into the city. I would highly recommend staying here.
The apartment was clean and comfy. The neighborhood is great. Would definitely stay again when I’m visiting NYC.

best place in bushwick!
lovely neighbourhood, beautiful apartment
cant recommend enough
great place, great location and Billy was friendly and very welcoming

Extremely friendly and helpful owner and employees, free breakfast and coffee included and the price is incredible for the location. The bed is a bit small for my size (6‘4) but I slept well regardless. Definitely saving this for my next trip to NYC.

Wonderful stay in a magical space! Well-equipped kitchen, fabulous shower, comfy couches, cozy loft “bedrooms”. Loved the decor and the window filled with plants. Appreciated all the notes and instructions. Metta was communicative throughout. Great location for exploring the city. The swing, ladder, and hoola hoops made for a uniquely fun experience.

Très beau séjour à NYC dans ce joli appartement.

Seul petit bémol: pas très pratique pour manger à quatre mais avec un peu d’ingéniosité, nous y sommes arrivés ! À savoir que ce n’était que pour les petits déjeuner puisque nous passions toutes nos journées dehors!
J’ai lu certains commentaires sur le quartier mais nous n’avons pas trouvé l’endroit insécurisant. Ce n’était effectivement pas très propre mais les gens étaient gentils et serviables donc il faut vraiment passer au delà de la première impression.
Accès très facile avec les bus et les métros.
Bref, pour un petit séjour, nous recommandons !

clean, nice location, not allowed to have visitors

Jessica’s home was clean, very meticulously organized, rooms were furnished nicely, the beds were absolutely comfortable, linen and towels were of the best quality. Definitely a great place with a nice private backyard that you can relax in at night.
Quiet location. All we needed for a great stay! We took a short bus trip then the train into Manhattan.

Great location. Walking distance to many restaurants and  bars. There is street parking outside the building and a spacious parking garage next to building. Check in process was easy. There is 24/7 concierge. Apartment is spacious , however slightly outdated.

I stayed two nights at Daisy's apartment, and I had a great experience! The location is perfect, and Daisy made check-in extremely easy. She was always responsive and flexible, and made me feel right at home in her apartment from the first minute I arrived. The bed was very comfortable, and the space is cozy and quiet. It was a pleasure getting to know Daisy, she was always happy to chat at the end of the day, sharing stories about NYC and her life. I would highly recommend staying at Daisy's apartment for a fun and unique experience!
Excellent place. Better than it looks in pictures. Great location and everything great in the apartment
I could not have found a better place. Ame was wonderful and helpful, and her home was beautiful. Just perfect!

This was a beautiful apartment, especially the artwork.  It is one of the rare AirBnBs that has really felt like a home -- furnishings, amenities, and ample extras throughout. This space is great for those visiting New York. Subways were easily accessible, and the space was a reasonable distance away from the City. This space was very comfortable and safe. It definitely made my vacation more restful and enjoyable.

We were in NYC for a family wedding and really wanted a place where we would get around the city easily, as well as all fit! We're 6 adults and 3 kids. Yves's place fit this description. Super easy to get into manhattan on the 2/3 and plenty of space for us all to have our own rooms, and each family had their own bathroom. The kitchen and living area made hanging out easy and fun, and we had a couple meals up on the upper patio with the big umbrella out surrounded by Brooklyn! Would highly recommend, especially for groups. Tony, the property manager, was friendly, prompt, and helpful.
Audrey was friendly, responsive, and gave us great advice about seeing fireworks on the boardwalk. This place is a gem, as is Brighton Beach/Coney Island.
Больше всего понравилась локация, можно гулять пешком до достопримечательностей. Апартаменты небольшие, но уютные, если вы ищите место для комфортного ночлега, то это отличный вариант.

My wife and I both loved our stay. I was already familiar with the area, and found the location perfect. Our host was very nice, and saw to it that all was taken care of. Thanks so much for everything Andrea!
het was een fijn verblijf. de geluiden van de auto's aan de weg was wel te horen maar we vonden dat niet storend.
Great location, solid spot to stay for a few nights. Patrick was very helpful and communicative.
Great place to stay in NYC. You will feel like a townie and not a tourist as you explore paths off the typical visitor’s trail.

The apartment looks so nice, everything was clean and we had everything what we needed, like towels, soap and something like that

Excelente , me senti como en casa, muy buen ambiente! Instalaciones impecables y comodas

Andrew’s apartment was very conveniently located to lots of restaurants and fun things to do in Brooklyn. Andrew was a great host - very quick to respond and try to resolve any issues. The apartment has a nice kitchen and the upstairs bathroom is brand new with a nice soaking tub/jacuzzi. It’s basically two apartments so was convenient for us to stay there with our in-laws.
A few things to note:
The upstairs is much nicer than the downstairs. The downstairs is a basement unit, so it is pretty dark and a little musty . The bathroom downstairs is tiny, and the stairs to go down are very steep (we didn’t feel comfortable putting our elderly in-laws downstairs so had to stay there with a baby).
Also there is just one AC window unit and it’s upstairs. It’s very powerful and was mostly fine, but in a NY heatwave the downstairs still got warm on the really hot nights.

It was a good stay. Even if it was right by the street, the surroundings were relatively quiet. We might overlooked the renting description.  We didn't know anyone living in the basement. So we stayed inside not going backyard except for the trash bin.  The communication was good with co-host and she gave us a favor to stay a little longer on last day because of our flight schedule.

Brilliant space in a great location. Lots of places to eat nearby and very easy to get into Manhattan and around Brooklyn.
We are a family of five and it was a perfect base for a trip to New York.
Great apartment! Owner was very communicative and helpful. Would definitely stay there again.
Amazing place !
Clean, cozy, as described, good value especially if you are going to be out and about a lot. Very responsive host and clear instructions. Would recommend!

was a great spot if you need to be in the immediate area! amazing matcha spot the next door down, & an adorable vintage clothing spot the next door after that! there is also a trader joes/target about a block away. shared space (living area/kitchen/bathroom) with up to 2 people in the next room over. felt totally safe and secure and it was fun to cross paths with other kind travelers! cleaning could definitely be just a tad more up to par, mostly in the bathroom, but throw on a pair a flops for your shower & youre good. the location was convenient to subways that will take you straight to all the tourist spots, and you can find alot of cool spots just walking too. seems there is people that reside in the building, not just airbnb renters, so that gives peace of mind for nervous travelers, safety wise- i never felt unsafe once in the building or nearby area. if the bedroom had a lil TV on the wall the bedroom would absolutely be complete! all in all would stay again for budgeted trips.
Very clean.
Sharon is the best host I have ever met. everything was great.
Our host was amazing & the place was clean and tidy! The weekend was amazing!
Very good place to stay near to Times Square, very accesible to the subway. Clean and Cousy.

We enjoyed a beautiful and clean stay at Abbygale’s! She was helpful and proactive with her recommendations and answered our questions. It was also great to be such a short distance from the subway. Would recommend!

Natasha’s place was perfect for my short stay. The convenient location and unexpectedly spacious room made it even better. Natasha herself was warm, welcoming, and made me feel right at home with her family-like attitude. I would definitely consider staying here again in the future!”

frank was super great and quick with getting back to me about some questions on the place. He was very polite and friendly. The place itself was very well cleaned, super cute and comfortable stay for the price equipped with a swivel smart tv! Extra blankets / heater. Overall great stay! Thank you so much for having us last minute!
Great location. Room had some odds and ends that were broke/missing. Not bad. 3.5/5.
We had a wonderful time with Baydaa and her family. The room was good and she responded all our questions and requests fast and kindly. We would definitely go back!

The location of the place is excellent to arrive in minutes to different tourist destinations. The place is clean. Even if we had to share the bathroom  with other hotel guests, the spaces were clean. The room is really small, so if you plan to stay there , be sure you use it only to sleep. We spent the whole day out , so it was perfect for us !
Great place to stay and great location! Walkable distance from Times Square and less than 3 mins away from station. Loved staying here!

An absolutely perfect stay in the West Village! The apartment is beautifully decorated, with thoughtfully selected furniture pieces and warm, luminous colors. Everything you might need for a longer stay is there and carefully chosen to make you feel right at home. When you step outside, you are surrounded by lovely cafés and restaurants (including some of the best croissants at L'Appartement 4F next door). Located in the heart of the West Village, the apartment is ideal for anyone who wants to explore the city—the High Line, Hudson River Park, Soho, and Nolita are only a short walk away. The apartment is especially perfect for writers, with a beautiful writing desk next to the window and Jefferson Market Library right across the street, including a beautiful garden with benches for reading. What made our stay especially perfect was the amazing Fenix Living team—Alexis, Emily & Jay—who were incredibly kind and responsive and went above and beyond to make this such a memorable stay.
We enjoyed our stay here, it was good.

Our stay was @ placemaker was fantastic.  Great location in the financial district just off the bike/pedestrian greenway and blocks from the end of the Empire State trail at Battery park.  Room was large kitchen was well stocked and beds comfortable.  The Staff was incredibly friendly and responsive.  The large Terrance on the 7th floor overlooking the east river was magical.   The Brooklyn ferry terminal is a stones throw away and a trip to the Rockaways is a must!
It was perfect!
Nice place in Brooklyn near Prospect Park. Outstanding host.
Beautiful place and very convenient. I will be booking this place when flying out of JFK again ☺️

Magnifico Lugar, Bien ubicado, compro y con todo lo esencial para poder pasar unos dias comodamente. Rafaella es super host. quedamos muy agradecidos y con ganas de volver. de ahora en adelante siempre que vengamos a NY será nuestra primera opcion.
Salma’s place was nice, clean, and easy to find. Parking was a big plus for us, and we really enjoyed our stay
