Duchess and Alan are wonderful persons. The room is super clean. Has everything you need in it and the location is the best you can catch. Will def stay again here.
Josée is a wonderful landlord, she offers a beautiful and cosy loft with perfect equipment. Location is brilliant!
Very clean

I would definitely recommend this place. The space is great, feels very cozy and clean, with exceptional attention to detail. We especially loved their guidebook of recommendations for the area and NYC. The location is great too. There's a lot to explore around the neighborhood, and Astoria park is a quick 10 minute walk away! (It has great views of Manhattan.) It is a pet-friendly building, so there is some barking. If you're especially noise-sensitive, just be mindful to consider that before booking.
Clinton was friendly, responsive, and even checked in periodically in case we needed anything. Overall, the hosts have made the space feel extremely welcoming. You can tell they've put in extra effort and care to meet guests' needs. There's a desk in the bedroom for working, a full kitchen, plenty of books, and lots of other helpful amenities. It's a comfortable place to just lounge around and watch some movies. And it's a relaxing place to return to after a long day of exploring. We had a great time. This place should definitely be on your radar!
Great deal. Spacious, organized, private, fantastic location.

The apartment is big and located in a very nice area full of restaurants and shops. Subway stations are 10/15 minutes away and it's easy to get eveywhere from there. Marie is very kind and helpful, she also let us checked out very late since our flight was in the evening. I strongly tecommend this host!
Lovely host!!!!

Jean was a sweetheart and this was the PERFECT stay for my husband and my honeymoon. It was so nice to be in the city all day and come back to a quiet, VERY safe neighborhood. We will definitely stay with her again next time in NYC. Bus station that goes to the city is 250 feet away.

Amazing place to stay. Great place to come back to after exploring the city. Staff were very friendly and accomodating. Great coffee and pastries in the morning. Would recommend anyone to stay here. Great location - central starting point to all of NY!

The listing is very accurate. It was spacious and clean. The car parking in the back was a big bonus for us. Both Noa and Joe were quick to respond to any enquiries and very helpful.
The unit is located on the last stop of line 3 in New Lots in Brooklyn. We had no issues on the weekend when line 3 was not out of service as line 4 was running instead of it at the same station stop.
We'll definitely be back.
Patrick is a really nice dude. Has a lot of knowledge of the city if you are exploring restaurants and bars! Great location and amazing neighborhood
The place was very nice and the home owner responded to my questions or requests very fast! The main problem was neighbor! The came in 3 a.m and made a lot of noise and scared my kid!
Stay is Ok and safe neighborhood. Great place to stay while visiting NYC. For travelers it’s easy to find Good restaurants nearby.
Great stay, great view! Would recommend!
Excellent place, excellent host !
Nous avons passé un très bon séjour, Nick était disponible pour répondre à toutes nos questions
everything was amazing, thank you very much!!
great place for NYC, easy access to the subway, clean and organized, helpful host.
ez, smooth move in

We loved staying in this apartment. It's in a charming neighbourhood of pretty brownstones, nice restaurants and narrow, tree-lined streets. We walked to the Hudson River park, Little Island, the Whitney, the Highline, Chelsea Market, Union Square, Washington Square Park and SoHo shops. Two subway stations nearby took us everywhere else. The apartment is spacious and bright, and we especially appreciated the large and comfortable bed, the dishwasher, and washing machine and dryer (both new and high quality, not the older-style ones shown in the photos). These are all things that seem to be rarely found in most NYC apartments. Issues mentioned by other reviewers (slow hot water, leaky shower) were minor relative to the many benefits of staying here. It was noisy, but for us that was part of the experience of staying in Manhattan. Good communication with the owner. Definitely recommend staying here, if you're lucky enough to find it available.

Too small toilet room. Which is not possible to use properly... missing toilet tissues...
Sooo dirty and blocked with hair shower tub...
How can someone climb to 4th floor with heavy luggage and narrow stairs like safety issues.. u can not sleep peacefully due to outside continuous voices... no shampoo or body wash in shower room...!
In listing only 1 floor stairs are shown.. not properly mentioned the room is at 4th floor and u hv to climb with luggage through narrow stairs.
I spent 1 night with great patience.
Lovely and peaceful stay. I will definitely book again when I need to get away and focus ✨mahalo for the hospitality and kindness
Hallo bei Ferhat würde ich wieder wohnen wenn ich in Brooklyn bin. Gute Lage und schönes Zimmer . Es war eine schöne Zeit. Peace

The apartment is in great area. Many things and restaurants within walking distance or short Uber ride. The apartment itself is nice and clean, everything works, shower, hot water, etc... Has TV with applications in it, so you can watch your programs or youtube, etc. It's on 3rd floor so you kind of hear the street at night (but it's New York, so to be expected).
The communication from the host was excellent, before and during the stay. Easy to get the keys, open doors, etc...
We enjoyed our stay and had no issues at all. Thank you very much.
Host went above and beyond to help me in every way!
The place was clean and quiet. perfect for what i needed and Michelle was a excellent host.
L’appartement était parfait pour un long séjour, avec tout le confort nécessaire pour se sentir comme à la maison, et une très belle vue ! Merci Stay with Vibes !
A very good place, clean, great location, private, and good for the price. The area is safe and convenient. Definitely recommand!

Jennifer and Grace created a peaceful, welcoming space as the perfect complement to the Manhattan experience on the other side of the river. It is tastefully furnished and offers a fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher, a brandnew and powerful aircondition as well as the luxury of washer and dryer. The street is really quiet and offers free parking. During our week in August we always found a spot close by, especially easy twice a week directly after the street cleaners had left. The neighborhood and subway station felt really safe and the access to Manhattan really is easy. Although I never had the chance to meet Jennifer in person as she lives somewhere else, the communication with her was always lovely, she is a wonderful, kind, considerate and generous host.

Ich habe vorher in Midtown gewohnt und dementsprechend war Harlem für mich erstmal weit weg. Die Wohnung liegt aber zentral und ist von der Eingang ist von der Straße einsehbar, sodass man sich nicht unsicher fühlt. Im Hausflur ist außerdem eine Kamera installiert. Die Linie 2&3 sind in ein paar Minuten zu erreichen, zu den anderen Bahnlinien muss man durch die Straßen Harlems laufen und an viele kleinen Straßenshops vorbei. Ein WholeFoods liegt auch in maximal 5 Minuten Entfernung. Die gesamte Wohnung ist sauber gewesen. Latonia stellt einem einen kleinen Korb mit Pflegemitteln, Handtüchern, etc. zur Verfügung. Außerdem haben mich ein Heft mit Reisetipps und eine kleine Karte erwartet, wodurch man sich gleich willkommen fühlt. Für ein paar Tage oder wenn man an der Columbia Uni studiert ist die Lage super, für einen Städtetrip muss man sich bewusst sein, dass man eine halbe Stunde bis Stunde an Fahrtweg einplanen muss. Der Central Park ist fußläufig zu erreichen.

Menachem a toujours été présent et réactif
Nous avons apprécié l appartement et ses volumes.
Facilité de transports vers Manhattan avec la ligne 3 et 4 du métro.
Seul bémol pour un européen…manques de restaurants et de terrasses dans le voisinage ..a moins que nous n ayons pas eu l occasion de les découvrir.

This is a lovely house, very well-maintained. The kitchen is well supplied with cooking equipment. Bathroom shower has good water pressure (not always the case in older homes). TV lovers will enjoy all the large TVs in the bedrooms and living room.
Convenient on street parking. A/C units kept the house comfortable in the hot, humid weather.
Divain is a responsive host, interested in making sure you’re happy with the house.
We’re booked for a second stay already.
Great unit! Perfect size for a family of 4. Loved the location. Walking distance to subway and a Walgreens across the street.

The accommodation is clean and there's a subway station just a 5-minute walk away, well-connected to Manhattan. The room is exactly as shown in the photos—spacious and comfortable.
Overall, my experience was very positive, except for a couple of communication issues to improve:
On the first day, Jasmine forgot to send me the check-in instructions. I waited 10-15 minutes until her kind uncle luckily showed up and sorted everything out, so, not a big deal.
On the last day, I paid $10 to leave my luggage for a few hours, Jasmine said "leave it in the living room". I placed next to a sofa in the living room so it wouldn't be in the way but not hidden. However, Jasmine later said she hadn’t seen it, which worried me as it contained very valuable items. The luggage was completely safe, but clearer instructions like “leave it in plain sight” or checking a little more closely before leaving would have been better.
I would recommend staying here to enjoy New York
Was a very nice place. Lots of little stores you could pick things up that you might have forgotten.
Mi-a plăcut foarte mult

Io e la mia amica, abbiamo soggiornato da Irene e Gregory per 5 giorni. Ci siamo trovate benissimo, in una camera confortevole con bagno privato. Abbiamo usufruito della cucina avendo a disposizione ogni cosa. Posizione veramente ottima, perchè vicino ad una fermata express e a pochi isolati da Central Park. Zona ben collegata anche con gli autobus e con scelta di supermercati e locali nei dintorni.
Great location, tons of restaurants nearby, easy access to all of the things we wanted to visit in NYC!
Beautiful  apartment and fantastic hosts, I highly recommend and will be back!

Seamless check-in and checkout. Everything was exactly the way described. Very walkable area and felt safe. The kitchen was very helpful. The only qualm was that we found a few blonde hair strands on the floor throughout the stay.

We really enjoyed our stay at YOTEL in Times Square. The space was cozy and we were very content with it.
Not a complaint, but for whatever reason, our bed was not adjustable as mentioned. We could hear the gears, but nothing was happening. Again, not a complaint, we prefer to sleep flat and the bed itself was very comfortable.
The only other mention I would like to make would be that there is only cable TV. No streaming service apps that we could access. They did have a setting to cast/screen mirror, but we were unable to figure out how to do that.
We really enjoyed our stay though! Perfect location surrounded by attractions. Thank you!
Great place to stay, clean and quiet, convenient with train connections to Manhattan Will use again in the future
Todo ok.

Really enjoyed Miki’s place in Brooklyn. Close to Shelsky’s Brooklyn Bagels, whose pretzel bagel is to die for, and walkable to Prospect Park and the Brooklyn Museum of Art. Close to a metro stop. Miki is responsive and the place is very comfortable. The cool/dark space made it great for sleeping and the couch bed is actually so comfortable. Highly recommend Miki’s spot!
Elen’s place is very clean, and she keeps it that way. The neighborhood is safe and close to public transport. She’s responsive and helpful. Highly recommend!

Bens Airbnb is truely a home away from home and my husband and I had the most comfortable, two week stay. The room is huge - much bigger than any other Airbnb I’ve stayed at in NYC and we loved having access to our own washing machine and cooking equipment (not that we cooked much coz the restaurants in Bed Stuy are SO good!). Ben made the entire process easy and we appreciated all the local restaurant and cafe recommendations. Bed Stuy is such a diverse, fun neighbourhood and although we spent a lot of time in Manhattan, we looked forward to coming home to Bens place each day. Thanks Ben and family!
A fantastic location in a fun corner of the east village.
Amazing host and an amazing stay!

Great stay! It’s a boutique hotel and not an actual Airbnb, but you likely can tell that from the description. It’s a great location in NOHO, well priced, and really convenient (late check in, 24/7 front desk, coffee shop downstairs, etc). Highly recommend!
The place did not match the picture, and they gave me a different room from the city views that I booked.

I had an exceptional stay at Mr. Gichard's place. The room/apartment was incredibly clean and had a showroom-like quality, which made for a very pleasant and comfortable experience. Although there were supposed to be three occupants, I never saw or heard anyone else, so it felt like I had the place to myself.
The location was convenient, with all major spots within an hour's reach by train. Mr. Gichard himself was a fantastic host, maintaining great communication throughout my stay. He also accommodated an early check-in at the last minute, which I highly appreciated for my initial safety in an unfamiliar area. I highly recommend this accommodation and would definitely stay here again! Thank you so much 🙏🏾☺️

Bruce is a nice guy and provided me with a good attentive service, always asking me if there is anything he can do to make my stay comfortable.
The location is in a safe area, with lots of stores around.
What I liked the most is that the bus x28, which runs through between E 57 ST/Madison avenue(behind that famous Trump tower) to Bay Ridge 86st(just 3mins from the property), and you can visit Central Park without changing the transport. All you need to do is just hop on the bus x28 and that will take you straight to E 57th ST, with mere 1h and 20m ride.
We love staying at this Airbnb , safe neighborhood , parking spot , excellent communication from hosts , always clean and tidy . Can’t wait to come back !
excellent host, responded quickly to messages. the apartment was very clean, and quiet, air con and a ceiling fan in the room, which was very nice, would higy recommend.
It was our first time in New York and the experience couldn’t be more pleasant. Although the neighborhood is far away from Manhattan, you can use the LIRR that is well connected.
Great stay and location!
Great place and wonderful host!
Muy buena estadía, tal cual la publicación. Muy buena limpieza ! Michelle y Jackson son muy amables y buenos anfitriones. Buena ubicación, muy cercana al subte!

unsere Gastgeberin war stets bemüht um ihre gäste,hat sogar meiner kranken Freundin zur Seite gestanden,es war die beste Unterkunft,die man sich vorstellen kann.Unsere Gastgeberin Jessica hat unseren New Yorker Aufenthalt in allen Belangen bereichert und wir würden am liebsten wieder sofort nach Brooklyn reisen,allein schon wegen dieser Unterkunft.Ein unglaublicher Vorteil für uns war die schnelle Erreichbarkeit der Metrolinie R,mit der wir an die meisten Punkte in Manhattan gelangten...
Der Gartenbereich ist ein nicht zu unterschätzender Faktor.Eine Ruhezone,um Kraft zu tanken,zu frühstücken und um den Tag mit einem Glas Wein zu beenden....
Höchste Punktzahl für Jessica🤗👍👍

I really wanted to give 5 stars but there were a few things that were unfortunate. The lock was extremely difficult to get into and we had to do a call with Amy and use a screwdriver to get in. The apartment is wonderful though - and Amy graciously gave us a late checkout which was much appreciated. The apartment has everything you could need and is near some great restaurants. My issue apart from the lock was the train noise - the subway runs out the front of the apartment so if you’re sensitive to noise it may not be ideal. We found the back master bedroom to be very quiet but the room adjacent which is where our daughter slept was louder and disturbed her sleep. But if you’re not fazed by noise then this is a great place to land!
The space is private, neat, and clean. Thoughtfully organized, including a microwave, water filter, and electric kettle (does not have a real kitchen). A great quiet place to stay.
A very clean and nice place with a good location

We really enjoyed our stay here - Mick was helpful and accommodating by providing us with information about how to get to the apartment and responding to messages quickly when we needed to ask about check in /check out. The apartment was just as listed - it was spotlessly clean, beds were super comfy and there was plenty of space for us as a group of 5. Would absolutely stay again 😊
Shorts extra money after checking out
je recommande vivement
Perfect spot for a NYC getaway. Location is perfect and the price is a bargain for NY.
The place looks like the picture, had everything needed for the stay. Little loud upstairs.
Great deal

I often use Airbnb when traveling, and this was one of my favorite experiences. The space is beautifully and comfortably decorated, with great light. AC is in every room, the kitchen was ample and well-stocked with necessities for a short stay. Beds were comfortable, as was the living room furniture. I also thought the location was great! Two blocks from a street that has almost anything you would need, with lots of restaurants and dining options. It was an 8-minute walk to the subway, and then you're in Manhattan in 15. Will definitely stay again when I'm in the area!
good place, near subway, easy to get in and out of Manhattan from
It was a great location and a very convenient stay

Lovely place in a beautiful and quiet neighborhood. 10 minutes walk to the subway. Perfect place to enjoy New York if you are more of a calm person. Apartment was just like in the pictures, or even prettier. And the host was great and helped us in everything we asked.

I can't express how great this place was for me and my family. Angelica's loft is the standard for Airbnb's. Everything was just perfect! We would love to come back next summer and use the same loft, if available, again and again!. Thank you Angelica for being a great host and for the quick replies to any of our questions.

We had a wonderful 10 night stay at Mira’s place. It was our first time to NYC and we found it centrally located. We are great walkers and were able to walk to most places we wanted to visit. If not, Grand Central Station was only a few blocks away. Mira was a joy to deal with, very accommodating and a great communicator. Nothing was too much trouble. We would definately recommend staying at her place.
Place was very clean and spacious. Also was good for transportation with the train and bus being near the location
Henri was super responsive and helpful! His place was cozy!
great stay!
Absolutely loved it

Hemos estado muy agusto, tenía todo lo que pudieras necesitar, cocina super equipada.
tal vez un poco justo para muchas personas ya que has de poner el colchón inchable en el salón, pero era un colchón super cómodo y se dormia muy bien.
el anfitrión estuvo atento a cualquier consulta y respondía rápido.
me volvería a alojar aquí.
The place was everything! I felt comfortable and welcomed I would book again, thank you!

I made the reservation and cancelled immediately after because my spouse had already made the reservation directly unbeknownst to me - the cancellation apparently did not 'take' but even after explaining airbnb said they were unable to refund as up to hotel - contacted the hotel they claimed its up to airbnb - THAT IS TYPICAL - PASS THE BUCK AND DON'T ASSIST THE CUSTOMER!!!  Unable to get refund. Have gone back and forth to no avail. this is TERRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE.

Très bien situé, hôte très réactif . Cependant le prix est trop élevé pour le type de logement (sanitaires partagés, pas de fenêtre) et un chauffage qu’il n’est pas possible de régler, seule possibilité mettre de la Clim en hiver ..

Mon séjour chez Yara a tout simplement été merveilleux. Je pensais prendre un simple Airbnb pour mon premier mois à New York et j'ai au final eu ma première expérience de colocation, et elle s'est extrêmement bien passée.
Yara est une personne extrêmement accueillante, gentille et attentionnée.
Chez elle, vous n'aurez pas une simple chambre mais une vraie introduction aux charmes de la vie "brooklynoise" mixée avec une ambiance plus latine et la délicieuse odeur des arepas tout juste cuisinées.
Le quartier est vraiment génial, avec tous ses commerces de proximité, ses parcs et son ambiance.
L'appartement est un vrai cocon et on s'y sent instantanément comme à la maison.
J'ai vraiment adoré et si vous en avez l'opportunité, je vous recommande vraiment de profiter de cette expérience.
Easy check in  - best location. Will stay again
Great place to stay for the weekend!
Priscilla si è dimostrata un’ottima host , pronta s soddisfare le nostre esigenze. Consigliata.
Beautiful stay I had such a great time.

Christina was a fantastic host. Every detail was handled immediately and she was always responsive.  I highly recommend this place when you are working or visiting NYC. It was extremely safe and quite! The best!
Had another wonderful stay at Amy’s place!!! I will be booking again.
The place is great and spacious!! We really enjoyed staying here! Bagel just steps away, as a dunkin donuts, it was perfect for us.

Doug war sehr freundlich und hatte gute Empfehlungen für Unternehmungen.
Die Anbindung an das Metrosystem ist sehr gut und man kommt sehr gut nach Manhattan.
Die Unterkunft war sauber und auch sehr ruhig.
Würden auf jeden Fall wieder kommen.

Thank you for your hospitality.
Welcoming house, clean, great value, all tv channels provided.
Room very nice decorated.
I like it the sounding area.
Highly recommend it.

Very nice comfy apartment, more spacey than the photos suggest, high ceilings, great to unwind after a day of walkting & visiting. Excellent location,  safe and rather quiet, 5-10 minutes walk to subway stations, convenient bus stop to reach LES and East Village, lots of restaurants and cafès nearby, Meatpacking district literally down the street. Victoria was a very responsive yet unobstrusive host. We can totally recommend to stay there.

Second time staying there and her place still doesn't disappoint. Her home looks exactly the way it is shown in the pictures - stylish and cozy with a sense of character! Daisy is a great person to talk to and even a much better person to listen to if you enjoy learning about history and pop culture. It was such a joy to see the birds and squirrels in the courtyard again. She just reminds me of Snow White with the way the animals were interacting with her (and that's because they trust her)! Thank you, Daisy for being a kind host.

Mona’s place was a great time for my partner and I. The location is exceptional (Very very close to Times Square while still being far away enough to not hear any of the noise). The view from the apartment is also a nice view of Manhattan buildings (decently off the ground). The actual space was nice as well, very clean, but don’t be fooled by the mirrors in the pictures as it is smaller than it appears.
Mona was a very responsive host, however there was some confusion about paying utilities, and inconsistencies between what the electricity and cleaner had to be paid each month. The separate cost of these utilities can also be a steeper cost on what you’re already paying AirBnB.
Overall the stay was nice and I would recommend it to others. The cleaner could do a slightly better job preparing the space as on arrival some of the linens smelled used along with a dead cockroach in the kitchen cabinet. (We did not see any living pests during our stay).
Great place and space for a single person or a couple. Enjoyed my stay!
Clear communication and a responsive host made this stay easy and enjoyable. We hope to return again soon!

Super hôtel ! Nous étions très bien situé comme indiqué sur l’annonce. Sur place il faut compter les taxes à rajouter et un caution de 100€. Idéal pour un cours séjour sur place de trouve eau chaude, café, frigo, micro-onde, thé … De plus, n’ayant pas l’âge requis pour la majorité américaine, nous n’avons pas rencontré de problème pour cette réservation.
Super communication toujours sous surveillance ! Quartier idéal ! Merci

I throughly enjoyed my stay at Myriam’s place. She was a wonderful host & went above and beyond to accommodate my needs. The house was very clean. It was very quiet during the day & at night. Myriam was very responsive with any request so had. She made me feel right at home & safe. I appreciate Myriam for allowing me to book and stay at her home. 10/10..would definitely recommend.

I have stayed in a number of bnb's in Brooklyn and this one is, by far, my favorite. Most of the places I've rented were third floor walk-ups, so it was a treat to have a ground floor space. The loft space was easily accessible, spacious, clean and near the subway. The outdoor space is amazing although we were not able to take full advantage of it due to weather. This will be my first choice when I return to Brooklyn. You REALLY want to stay here.

This Airbnb was a lovely stay. I’d strongly recommend. The hosts were so lovely they let us keep our bags and suitcases in the apartment for the day as we had a late flight. Great people and a great stay.

This airbnb is great for large groups. There are plenty of beds, bathrooms and a lot of amenities that make this place a great home base for exploring New York. Gordy is very generous and responsive. It was great to meet him in person on the first day when he brought us water and showed us the backyard. He was very flexible with early checkin and late checkout. If I were to visit NY again with a large group, I would not hesitate to stay here again.
Great location and fantastic view. Debra was very responsive when we needed to get ahold of her, usually within minutes. We will definitely stay there again next time in Greenpoint if it’s available.

Had a wonderful stay at Dawn's apartment, a beautiful quirky place with stacks of character and everything needed for a great stay. Dawn very kindly allowed us an early check in and was helpful throughout.
Loved the location, 10 minute walk to Utica Avenue Subway, a wonderful jazz bar 2 minutes walk down the street called Lunatico, and lots of places for food and coffee nearby. Would 100% recommend for a true authentic New York stay.

We spent a lovely extended weekend at Chris' place. Great location to explore the neighborhood and close enough to the subway. A lot of stores and restaurants nearby but the loft is nice and quiet as it is on the fourth floor.
Loft is as described and nice and clean!

Rooms were exactly what we were looking for—clean, comfortable, and cold with the AC. Black out curtains were also a plus. Great place to have as a home base while we headed into the city. Very conveniently located to the C.
New York is a crazy real estate market but this space was great. Exactly what I needed and wanted.
Wonderful place! The rooftop was amazing, the room was spacious and clean, the whole building is nice and cozy! Easy check in, location is fantastic! I would love to come here again in the future!

Michael is a very friendly and communicative host and I loved staying at his place! It is beautifully decorated, super comfortable, very conveniently located, and Pepper is the BEST roommate ever...by FAR the BEST amenity of any Airbnb I've ever stayed in!! I'd definitely stay there again!

O apartamento e exatamente como descrito no anuncio, so sentimos falta de troca de lençóis, pois foram 15 dias de estadia e esta nao estava inclusa. Foi uma estadia muito confortável e o apartamento e uma delícia
Comfortable stay

My 14 year old daughter and I enjoyed this great neighborhood vibe of  Brooklyn apartment located on the bottom floor, underneath the main house. Totally private entrance and secure apartment. There are 3 separate lock doors to go through. We had trouble with the first gate but eventually figured it out. The linens and decor are simple and stylish. Laundry washer and dryer is a big bonus. We appreciated they left detergent for us too. It was easy to take the bus or subway to anywhere we wanted to go. We visited Brighton Beach, Manhattan, Dumbo and Williamsburg the 4 days we stayed. You really never need to leave with amazing restaurants, cafes and grocery right around the corner. I definitely recommend this listing.
I think it is a value for money deal, the host is very responsive and very flexible.
Cozy space; great choice for staying in Bay Ridge, with a lot in the immediate vicinity.
Had such a wonderful stay! Would recommend to anyone traveling to New York.
Untitled was excellent! Great location and very new and clean. Comfortable bed, nice shower, cool little alleyway with lots of decor!
This place is gorgeous, very private, large, and on a beautiful street. I would love to stay again, highly recommend.
Wir haben zwei Monate hier gewohnt und uns hat es sehr gefallen. Die Lage ist super, mitten drin aber nicht zu viel und in der Nähe zum Central Park, sodass man oft Spaziergänge unternehmen konnte.
Really enjoyed my stay. Very clean and welcoming vibe! Enough subway stations nearby and the neighborhood has lovely restaurants and coffeeshops.
The apartment was in pretty immaculate condition. Well stocked. Decent view. Washer and dryer in unit. Terrific building. Photos were completely accurate.

The place we great and close to the 3 which took me and friend straight into the city. My only problem was the bed sheets. The cover had stains on the inside and smelled kind of funny but other than that the stay was what I paid for

We really enjoyed our stay in this beautiful appartment. Everything was as described. We slept very well in this calm area.
The heating was perfect in the icy january weather.
There are good bus and subway connections to Manhattan.
There are some nice Cafés in the vicinity. I can really recommend this Place.

Marco is a great host. He responds very quickly. He goes the extra distance to help.
Regarding location, I wish the place was a little closer to a subway station.
Great apartment, very spacious. Teedo is very reactive.
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour et un grand MERCI à Brenda pour ses délicates attentions !

I spent so comfertable in his house. First, he welcomed us with so kindness despite the late check-in time. And his house is near downtown, station, and airport.The location is perfect!!! I want to stay it again when I go to NY. I'm looking forward to see you Mr Orestes again. Thank you so much!!!
Incredible location, fabulous stay will for sure be back.
Sharon's Tranquil Haven is exactly as the name says. The best stays I ever had.
I had a really wonderful stay! It was so beautiful  and clean. I felt really good at this place. And Tash was amaizing! He helped me in so many situations ❤️ great host!!!

Amazing stay! Marc is a gracious, kind, and responsive host.  The unit is cuter than even pictured and has exceeded expectations! The neighborhood is wonderful and I personally love the bakery just a bit down the block.  5 stars all around!!
Все детали соответствуют описанию квартиры..воспользуюсь еще раз

Pauline’s place was perfect! My partner and I booked for a month and we have nothing but good things to say. Both Pauline and Baptiste were exceptionally kind and made us feel incredibly comfortable staying with them. The neighborhood is also very cute with so many different restaurants and shops within walking distance. The whole experience was such a delight– we would most certainly stay here again. Thanks again!

Lugar perfecto para los que nos gusta viajar ligero y en solitario, tiene todo lo que necesitas: cama, baño, wifi, desayuno incluido, cerca de líneas del metro, guardan tu equipaje antes y dsps de poder ingresar a tu reservación.
Si tienes problemas en conciliar el sueño, debes pensar en alojarte aquí (habitaciones pequeñas y continuas) pero si como yo, no hay poder humano que te despierte, no tendrás problemas alguno.
Sin lugar a dudas volvería a hospedarme en este sitio, recomendado para amigos viajeros

La casa es preciosa, más bonita incluso de lo que esperaba por las fotografías. Las camas son muy cómodas y el vecindario es tranquilo, con lo que se descansa muy bien. Todo estaba muy limpio y había todo lo necesario para la estancia. Elizabeth es muy simpática y nos ha hecho sentir como en casa.

We spend a great time at Carlene's place. The location is perfectly communicated with Manhattan, as the G Metro Line is really close to the apartment, also very close to Bushwick in Brooklyn, which is a very cool place. The flat was clean and the space is cozy. Carlene and Malose have attended us very well during check-in/out and with any request that came out from us during our staying. Totally recommended!!
It Was the prefect place to stay for our trip to a concert at citi field

The apartment was comfortable, in a great neighborhood (first time staying on the east side) and Allison was an excellent host. She communicated in a friendly, welcoming way and made me feel at ease. I was particularly happy with the very comfortable bed. I look forward to returning to Allison’s place when I return to NYC.

Really supportive host. Wonderfully helpful. Apartment was beautiful. Very well kept. Have nothing bad to say about it!!
Just double-check that you head to the right location and confirm where that is. We ended up going a block around the corner. Just need to update that.
lots to do around, would go back
Great stay at Eren’s place, who was very responsive and helpful. Location is excellent near bars and cafes of Williamsburg and a short subway ride from central Manhattan
Great host and great stay
Omar went above and beyond to make sure my stay was comfortable. I'd definitely stay there again when I'm in the area.

Stayed at Oleg's place for a few nights in August 2023, it has all the listed amenities in the unit, check in process is easy, Oleg met us in person, gave us the key and introduced the basic info about the unit.
The unit imo is not spotlessly clean but acceptable as a basement unit.
Location is great, 12-15 mins walk to the ferry pier for the 24/7 free ferry to lower Manhattan. It is in a residential area which I find quite safe even in the evenings. Free street parking available.
Oleg is a very friendly host and super responsive whenever I have any questions.
Overall this unit offers great value for anyone who wants to stay away from the main action but has an easy accessibility to it.
Its a private space but such a perfect spot! Had the best time here! Made me want a small but cozy studio space back home. 10/10 would recommend

This is a beautiful and comfortable Airbnb.  Having 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms made it perfect for us.  After a day in Manhattan it was nice to return to the house. The back yard is a lovely place to read. The walk to the subway is easy and there are some really good restaurants in the neighborhood. Hannah and David are excellent hosts who responded to questions right away.  A wonderful place in Brooklyn!
Excellent séjour passé chez Julia. L’appartement est très confortable, bien équipé et propre. Il est situé dans un quartier calme à proximité de 3 stations de métro et d’un supermarché.

Our stay was lovely and the directions to get into the building/apt were very clear and thorough! Restivo was super polite and helpful. We did arrive later than expected and it was incredibly difficult to find parking so that’s the only “negative” thing I have to say about our whole stay. The apartment was spotless! Super clean, tidy and very cozy!! Overall, we were very comfortable and happy with our stay.
At Salma’s place I was able to feel at home. I would recommend staying here.

The apartment was clean, modern and well appointed. Marina was easy to contact and quick to respond. The neighborhood was easy to walk and the subway way very close by. I enjoyed my stay and would stay again.

Terrible experience. We came to NYC for US Open and when arrived to the hotel to check in were told that our reservation was cancelled. Tried contacting Bruce and he basically told us we need to find another place to stay. Our reservation was cancelled without even notifying us. We had to scramble and find another hotel to stay. Terrible experience!

Liesha’s place was great! Short walk to mass transit to get you anywhere you need to be. Ron checked in made sure we had everything which was nice. It was a great place for short trip. Would stay here again!

Both Wanly and Basma were amazing! When we got to new york, the weather was unpredictable and it went from super cold to super hot to cold again. Thankfully they were able to accommodate all the seasons we got in the 5 days we were there. They were so accommodating and super quick to respond, even late at night.
Super friendly and will literally help set up stuff for you. Can't wait to come back and visit. You are in walking distance from the C and J. That was the best part is the metro was so close!

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié notre séjour chez Christopher. Le logement est très bien situé, à 8 minutes de la station de métro et près d’une foule de restaurants, épicerie, pharmacie, liquor store, café, etc. Tout était parfait !!  de Montréal!

One of the best airbnb I rented in NYC!!!
I will rent again this spot. Thank you

Bel appartement, larges espaces! Nous avons eu accès librement à tous les espaces du logement. Nous n’avons pas croisé notre hôte et nous nous sommes senties très libres et à l’aise. Globalement le logement est propre mais la cuisine nécessiterait peut être un petit peu plus de nettoyage. Le quartier n’est pas le meilleur de Manhattan en terme de fréquentations (nous étions 3 filles) mais le logement est bien situé juste à côté du métro 6. Joo Hee est une hôte extrêmement réactive et a répondu à tous nos besoins.
Merci beaucoup !

Good room in a nice and quiet neighbourhood with good connections to busses and metrostation. also there's a convenience store and a supermarket nearby.
but this neighbourhood is about an hour away from the manhattan and newyork city parts, which assures a quiet and comfortable stay all and all I can say if you want a nice stay this would be the place to be.🙂
Nice place. Good location.

So glad we stayed here. Daniela was very responsive and made sure we felt comfortable and welcome. The area is very safe and was very close to the train station making it easy to get places quickly. Loved it!
Mizanur is really amazing host and know the needs of the guest well before they need.
Samuel was very accommodating. I needed to check in early due to an early flight and Samuel made it happen.
Kartika’s place is excellent for that price. It is a big, clean, and sunny bedroom. She was friendly, helpful, and responsive. I definitely recommend this place.
Great place and location! Very responsive host. Had an amazing time with friends!

Jon's location is as good as it gets. Nothing is more than a 10/15 min walk from the best restaurants, bars, and parks. The train access is also superb.
The unit's soundproof windows mask the sound of the bar downstairs, it is very quiet Sunday - Thursday (in the best way!). On Friday and Saturday nights you can feel the vibration of the music, but between the fan and the white noise machine, you'll be good to go.
Working from home here is not the easiest, and I'd recommend exploring a WeWork membership or coffee shop if you plan to WFH full-time (wifi is just ok, there is not a ton of natural light, etc.) The unit is in an old building, which means character and unique architecture exist, and it has some quirks that come with an older unit.
The furniture and decor are minimal - some kitchen supplies, worn table/ chairs, and very used sofa/pull-out couch. It's all useable but could use an update to freshen up the space and make it more liveable for longterm stays.
Great neighborhood, very walkable, subway nearby. The host were also very responsive at almost all times of the day which we appreciated very much.
Great place to stay very close to the J train, only issue was the doorbell goes off frequently

Gracias, Ray por poder hospedarnos en tu alojamiento, fuimos 12 personas para la graduación de mi hija, la pasamos increíble regresamos caminando del Yankee Stadium, el metro y una súper tienda de abarrotes estaban a la vuelta de casa, podíamos desayunar todos juntos, la cocina, la sala y comedor estaban conectados, espero volver pronto 💜

Die gemütliche und persönlich eingerichtete Wohnung hat alles, um sich dort auch über einen längeren Zeitraum wohlzufühlen. Schnelles Internet und umfangreiches TV-Programm verfügbar. Es gibt Plätze zum Arbeiten, die wir aber nicht genutzt haben, da wir zu einem Familienbesuch in der Stadt waren. Die Küche ist voll eingerichtet zum Kochen, wir haben allerdings in der Wohnung nur gefrühstückt. Das Treppensteigen sollte man als tägliches Workout betrachten. Ivy war immer schnell erreichbar und sehr hilfsbereit. Wir kommen gerne wieder.
Great stay at Alan’s place. He is a great host, very welcoming. Very conveniently located to everything you could need. Good bed and fully stocked kitchen. Would definitely stay again.
very clean and comfy, convenient location close to LGA
espectacular el nivel de detalle 👌 muchas gracias por el esmero para que estemos cómodos. muchísimas gracias

This is a great apartment in an ideal location for exploring New York, walkable to many places and a short distance to the local tube line (which was very easy to use)
The beds were super comfy and the living area very spacious for 6 people.
The Kitchen area is quite basic but was more than adequate for our needs, great coffee maker, big fridge / freezer and a large cooker.
There is only one bathroom but we managed fine with this (3 couples)
Some lovely local restaurants / breakfast places too, nice coffee shop and pastries just around the corner.
All in all we had a great week there and felt very safe and comfortable
Great location.  15 min easy walk to LGA.  As described.   Make sure you call host if you have issues.  Especially with other guests.
This was very clean and comfortable place very close to jfk

I stayed two nights at Allison’s place: it was very close to where I wanted to be which is the upper east side of NYC. I had a quiet and comfortable bedroom which is within a shared apartment space. Considering that most NYC apartments are a hole in the wall so to speak, this was considered spacious and I appreciated that Allison was very accommodating. Checking in and out was vey easy. I think the only difficulty was the stairs - you do have to go up five flights of stairs and as they are quite narrow and slanted, anyone with mobility issues will likely find this hard to navigate. Other than that, this place met expectations.

Wir hatten einen super tollen Aufenthalt bei Tracy! Die Wohnung ist sehr zentral, keine fünf Minuten zum J-Zug entfernt. Hier war alles sauber und liebevoll eingerichtet. In dem Bett schläft man wie auf einer Wolke, so bequem ist nichtmal mein Bett zuhause! Wir haben uns hier sehr wohl gefühlt und können es nur jedem empfehlen! Tracy hat Snacks, Eis, Kaffee und warme Gerichte in ihrer Unterkunft die man benutzen darf. Und frische Eier von ihren Hühner gab es auch noch. Super!
Thoughtful, amazing place. Recommend staying here, and the other properties of the owner I know I will.

We had an excellent stay at Karen’s place. It is very close to a metro stop so getting around is pretty easy. The apartment itself is very nice, looks almost brand new inside. There was juice, water, coffee, and snacks when we arrived. Would definitely recommend for future guests!
We had a great stay at Jason’s place, he went above and beyond ! Great location! Looking forward to staying there again!

Jessica was really helpful and super responsive to all my questions. Her place is very suitable for public transportation and amazing range of restaurants (Chinese, Nepalese, Indian, Bangladesh, Colombian, Peruvian, etc..), my taste buds have never been so spoiled! There was some issue with WiFi, but she had already let me know about it before accepting my request, and I think she will get that fixed soon. So all in all, a wonderful experience!
Aminah was very helpful with the booking process and the property is as described. She gave me tips on transportation, food, and the like and it was appreciated.
El primer día que llegamos no había agua caliente. Estuvimos dos días sin agua. Luego lo solucionaron. Lo demás todo perfecto pero una vergüenza lo del agua con el frío que hacía.
Great place to stay in Brooklyn with an amazing pool and lounge area
Great location close to subway in Union Square and walkable to good restaurants. Having the toilet closet across from the room was odd but I never had to wait. It was also very quiet.
Very prompt communication, property as advertised, convenient location, and within walking distance to the subway (longish walk). We’re very satisfied.

We loved the house - it was well located, large, super comfortable, very well equipped, the internet worked and it was spotlessly clean.
We were 16 people who stayed a week and we never once felt like there were so many people around.
Phillip was wonderful about accommodating our early check in and late check out request. In fact, before we arrived, I forgot to get check in details and since we were already at the doorstep, Phillip sent someone over right away to get us into the house. After a long journey from India, we were very grateful for his responsiveness.
We will definitely be back next year and we hope the space will be available!
Anyone thinking about booking this house should jump and get it. It's fantastic!

We loved our entire experience with Placemakr! Location is perfection, quiet, safe, bustling with stuff to do. Customer service was amazing. The apartment was just as advertised. The bedroom is very peaceful and comfortable, I don't usually sleep that good on beds that aren't mine. Our 2 grown sons shared the other bed with no issues. The curtain closes, making it a private space to sleep soundly.
I will 100% stay in any Placemakr location again without hesitation. This apartment was just perfect for a wonderful trip to NYC, easily housing 4 adults and our local son stopping by to hang out and chat. Very, very pleased!!
Great stay. Exactly as advertised and very nice staff
Amazing room in a hotel in Chinatown. Well connected by public transport. The rooms are so incredibly spacious by nyc standards with gorgeous views. I will definitely stay here again.
Pretty loud but cool

I wouldn’t say I didn’t like it, it was a nice little area. I can say it wasn’t exactly clear that the family lived upstairs from the room. A lot of stomping and movement, they started their day fairly early and the slamming of the door outside the room might be triggering to some. Overall very easy to get to the location and it’s in a very convenient area, very clean and accommodating nonetheless I’d book again.
Nice appartment in the perfect area, and even nicer host. Totally recommended!
Nice accommodations. Clean and bright. Great host.
definitely decent for the price

Great location.
Safe neighborhood.
Convenient coffee place next door.
Responsive host
Very noisy upstairs neighbor at 11 pm every night.
Squeaky hardwood floor in living room
Thin walls in building so noisy inside building
Spartan kitchen
Great location, very comfortable and very quiet. I would definitely stay here again next time I'm in town!
As described
Very tidy, and very close to the subway stops. It is on the top floor so be mindful if you plan on bringing any large luggage, it was a challenge to get stuff up the stairs but not a huge issue!

Nous avons séjourné chez Fernando et Paul pendant une semaine avec mon conjoint, pour découvrir New York, nous ne sommes pas déçu !
Le logement se trouve à quelques mètres de la station de métro.
Nous avons eu aucun problème à rentrer le soir tous les deux.
L’appartement est fonctionnel et propre.
Nous avons très bien dormi !
Merci encore, je recommande ! 🤗

My husband and I enjoyed our stay at Holiday Inn in NY. It was so convenient to the subway and local tourist spots. We also liked that we could leave our luggage in the lobby before our flight back so we could still do some sight seeing.
My second stay here and will be back! Host was super flexible and accommodating with last minute travel changes due to weather / flight delays. Very clean, quiet, and great neighborhood!!
Very good communication with the host. Convincent place to stay.
Great stay
Great property, hosts are friendly, helpful and very thoughtful.

Want to feel like a real New Yorker? Then stay in this spacious "real" (not staged) apartment! It is filled with incredible art, afternoon sunshine, and good vibes! Location is awesome too! Close to Riverside Park with sunset views over the Hudson and a short two block walk to the 1,2,3 subway lines. Host was quick to respond with the few dumb questions we had! We will be back!
nice staff!
nice and clean room, in a nice neighborhood

It was a great experience on my first trip to NYC, all the neighborhood is a little gem, with great restaurants, bakeries, and coffee shops all around, very safe with a subway station in walking distance. Be sure to take some time to explore Astoria.
Hal, it's such a gentle guy, always asking if I need something and making sure that everything is in the best form. The house had simple rules that everyone followed, even with other guests hosted i did have a problem using the bathroom, and barely saw the other guests. The room had lots of sun during the awesome day, good space with furniture to put on the clothes, AC, and refrigerator. It's an excellent choice for travelers on a budget looking for good value, providing a less gentrification experience.
In 25 minutes you reach Manhattan by the Subway station, it's very near to the La Guardia airport and not that far from JFK ($50 - $70 trip with Lift/Uber).
Wasn’t there for long but it’s a good place to rest up and Sharon has a good vibe
Nili’s space was just as described, only better! She was responsive and kind, and had the space thoroughly ready for the baby. She had everything we needed. We would definitely stay again!
It was very comfortable space,  peaceful and green atmosphere, cozy bathroom, I felt like at home !! I recommend it 100 %
The host is very responsible and will respond to your need quickly and effectively; the location is good, and the price is worthy
Jess is a wonderful host and the apartment is exactly as advertised—clean. It is also comfortable and well situated in central Williamsburg, just a short distance to the Bedford subway station.
Great place if you are looking for a few days stay near Chinatown, Little Italy…

Henri was an awesome host. Responsive and flexible, and even though we stained one of his chairs, he didn’t charge us for replacement or repairs! Walls are a little thin but that’s to be expected in NYC. Great shower pressure and central heating/AC. Location can’t be beat as well. Will definitely rebook in the future :)

Great stay at this place. Picture do not do it justice it was much nicer than described. Lots of space. Very far from the subway ride shares are necessary back and forth to the Stilwell station. The wine and waters were a nice touch. Would def go back.

Great place to stay, a home from home. Loved the supplies left such as coffee and filters and washing up liquid and loo roll. Filter water ready in the fridge too.
Fab shower with super soft towels.
The apartment was immaculate and very comfortable .
The area felt safe ( we were four ladies). The locals were friendly and it was a very short walk to the underground station.
Highly recommend staying here.
Well worth it! Great part of Astoria, responsive hosts. Place came exactly as advertised and would certainly stay again.

Really enjoyed our stay! The apartment is very spacious and comfortable. The location was great, just blocks from great brunch options. Street parking was very easy, and the hosts couldn’t have been more lovely. Definitely recommend and would definitely stay again!
문의사항 때마다 피드백이 빨라 좋았습니다!
Todo bien.

I had an absolutely wonderful time  staying with Lisa and her family. I was made to feel as if I was part of the family almost from the start. Great conversations and recommendations, which I truly appreciated. Their home is very lovely, quiet and comfortable. You're  very close to great restaurants and a very quick walk to the train. In short, while in their home, I felt as if I was at home. And that should sum it up nicely. Thank you for a very comfortable stay, I sincerely look forward to visiting again soon.
Great spot. Very clean, true to pics, quiet, well connected, easy communication with host, great neighborhood. Highly recommended.
Everything about this home was so cute and lovely!!! Thank you ramia!!

I really enjoyed staying at Yuval’s place. He’s a lovely guy - very communicative, helpful, warm, and interesting.
As a longterm Airbnb host, he’s addressed a lot of small details that others don’t. Simple things like hooks for your towels, an extension cord so you have enough plugs for charging all your devices, a garbage can in the bedroom, a box of tissues by the bed, enough hanging space for your clothes, etc. It’s also nice having a desk and chair, not just a bed.
Talking about the bed, the mattress was extremely comfortable as were the pillows. I slept well. The room is compact, but really well laid out.
The common spaces were great too. I enjoyed hanging out on the couch and working at the dining room table.
Yuval’s place has a lot of character. He has art on the walls and many plants. I really liked his aesthetics. It was a great place to feel like a local.
There’s an excellent cafe right across the street that made this coffee snob very happy. I went every morning for 4 days. And it was fabulous to have the subway nearby as well the restaurants and shops on Franklin.
Yuval was also really accommodating about letting me keep my luggage there after my check out time.
Why 4 stars on cleanliness? The apartment interior is really clean and I had no concerns about that. But the building hallways and 2 flights of stairs to get to his wonderful apartment are a bit grubby. That’s a building management issue, but just know that everything will be lovely once you open Yuval’s front door.
Anthony很热情，房子干净整洁，设施齐全，位置好，离中央公园和地铁站近，出行方便。

Though pretty far from downtown Manhattan, the location is easily accessible via subway. We found the place very tidy. Hosts were highly responsive, and the place was well-equipped with all the tools that guests may need. They were generous enough to ensure the availability of coffee, tea, milk, and some instant food, besides bottled water. However, the neighborhood can be a bit noisy at night as some passionate neighbors show their car racing skills at night (I hope it was a temporary phenomenon). Overall, it was a good experience.

My mom and I I had a delightful stay at Lia's apartment. The space is both cozy and charming, with a quaint ambiance that instantly makes you feel at home. It's conveniently equipped with all the essentials, ensuring a comfortable stay. Lia is an exceptionally responsive host, always quick to address any questions or concerns. Another standout feature is the location—just a short walk to Central Park and in close proximity to some of the best shopping areas. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a lovely place in the heart of the city.
We had a great stay! The room was very quiet and the bed was really comfy.
Alvin is an amazing host. Above and beyond what i have ever experienced with any other host. Very responsive, friendly, and accommodating. Book with Alvin. You won't be disappointed.

Samuel was always there to answer my questions by text. Communication was very good and fluid.  I was very grateful that he gave us water, coffee and other snacks.  The beds are very comfortable and the rooms in general are spacious and confy. The laundry area works perfectly.  Thank you very much for the hospitality!
Super communication and easy to follow instructions. Apartment was exactly as described and very clean. Easy to walk to the subway as well.
Great location, easy to walk to subways and supermarkets. Seth is friendly, his home is cozy and a bathroom is clean. Nice to book again.

Nice comfortable stay here.  Convenient to subway (but we needed to check construction on the lines as one of the key lines not working during our stay...they supplimented with shuttle busses.  great).  For older folk I would note about 10 ??  steps up from street level   and then another 10 -12 steps up to the nice apartment.  Quiet. Very clean.  Enjoyed our time here and would stay again.  Thank you.  Great memories with our granddaughter.    Oh,  nice book of ideas, info, and recommends about NYC in the room with some guide books and maps.

do not book here they over sold and it was a complete nightmare getting everything straightened out. if we had not used air BNB we would have been completely stuck paying for a terrible experience. air BNB did right by us and gave us a full refund but I would not book again with them .
Emplacement bien indiquer, il avait du parking dans la rue juste en face. A 15 minutes à pied de central Park. Nous avons adorés. L’endroit était très propres.
Excellent stay
Loved it here !

Daniel and Thaisa were perfect hosts. Very friendly and made our stay enjoyable and very relaxing because all details were covered. The book on Brooklyn and the box of neighborhood tours and maps were a fun surprise…. We would stay again when visiting our daughter at Pratt!
Studio agréable, très bien situé (métro à 3mn à pied), lits confortables, vue sur l Empire state building, dans une rue calme. Seul point négatif : l insonorisation (appartement du dessus).

This place was quite a find. It is in a quiet and safe neighborhood, however it is far from Manhattan, especially by public transit. But the place is a 5/5. clean, affordable, and terrific host. would stay again
Great, responsive host!
Such a spacious area in New York! Awesome host, had a wonderful time.

We had a great time staying here. The location is great, walking distance to the train so easy access into Manhattan. It's also very clean and comfortable. The only small issue we had was other people in the building not following instructions and taking the key from the front lock box to get into the building. That's not the host's fault though. Perhaps the sign needs to be bigger and more clear, or else switched to a code instead of a physical key. We got locked out in the middle of the night which was nerve racking but someone let us in pretty quick when we rang the bell. Overall, we would stay here again.

I met Niel briefly, and he was very friendly. Even though the pictures are not up to date his place is immaculate. When I walked in it smelled so good, I could tell that he cooks with love and treats his home the same way. Would stay again.

BOOK IT!! This place is stunning and Grissell is very helpful.  It's on the 6th floor but there's an elevator. The lobby is clean and the elevator is clean. The place is exteremly close (8 minute walk) to Montefoire Hospital for all of my fellow travel nurses plus the unit comes with a WASHER and DRYER IN UNIT!!! Need I say more?  Very close to the train so easy ride to the city.  I really enjoyed my stay :)

For New York, that was really top. It was a very quiet environment, and very clean. There was coffee and tea, and granola bars. And my room was very clean and matched the descriptions and the photos. There was air conditioning in the room, which I used. I am very satisfied and I will definitely be back.

Apartamento como en la foto. Dos camas. Con un microondas y una pequeña cocina y nevera si uno desea preparar algo no tan elaborado. El baño es pequeño pero con toallas suficientes y con champú, jabón y acondicionador. Me gusto que tenía plancha y secador de cabello. No tiene armario pero perchas para guindar la ropa. Es verano y tiene un aire acondicionado y por mi parte nunca pasamos calor. Es verdad que no tiene ventana, es decir la pequeña ventana que hay es solo para dar luz y aerear la habitación. Pero para nosotros iba bien visto que era para dormir. La TV y buen Internet. Nunca escuchamos mucho ruido y no necesitamos usar nunca los tapa oídos. La zona espectacular tiene el metro cerca y buenas conexiones. No es lujoso pero volvería.
The place is small and nothing fancy, but I felt it was very reasonable for the location.  We had a good stay.  Free coffee makes a "good" move to "great" in my book.

We had a wonderful stay at Sam’s place. The apartment has a lot of charm to it and the beds were comfortable. I loved walking to the coffee shop “loud baby” in the morning and coming back with croissants! Also, so close to the park. It’s a great deal for a good location in Brooklyn and the owners are also super easy to work with.
Host is very responsive and excellent communicator. Great stay. Highly recommend.
Great value , very clean enjoyed the one night
We had a great stay at Edwards apartment! Lovely space with everything we needed. Close to the subway and a great deli just up the street. Thanks for having us!
Enjoyed my stay. The place was clean, private, and had everything I needed. The hosts were amazing — very responsive and helpful with anything I needed. I’d definitely recommend staying here.
Perfect for big groups! Location is nice.
I always enjoy my stay, the host is always friendly and the house is welcoming.
Loved the place, will definitely come again!

This spot was not only affordable and in a safe area, it was just as described in the description. The host was awesome and very communicative when I needed assistance. I would highly recommend this place. The location was in near walking distance to Times Square and several great spots to visit. 5 star hands down thank you for your hospitality. 👌
Great host!
Brian is a super responsive host and the room was safe and comfortable! Totally recommend!
The gentleman at the reception made it nice and easy to check in. Breakfast was actually really really good.

Dee’s place was absolutely AMAZING!!! Squeaky clean & super cozy (with all of the amenities)—it felt like home! Dee was also a fantastic host! Super friendly, welcoming, very helpful, AND helped me out immensely during one night of my stay when I ran into a bit of a personal issue! My experience at the “Luxe Suite” was 10/10!!!! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!!!

Great host and great home, especially for a family with kids. There is a dedicated parking spot, which in this area, is unheard of! Note that because the parking is around back of the home's entrance, you'll have to navigate to the back side street to gain access to the parking - and will have to take a set of stairs to go from behind to the home's front entrance.
Syed was very responsive via the Airbnb messaging before and during our stay.
The home itself is big and bright, an easy walk up the stairs to our 2nd floor unit. One bathroom, with 2 large bedrooms and 2 smaller bedrooms. There are A/C window units in 2 of the bedrooms (one in one large room, one in one small room) and a window unit in the living room. We were able to get comfortable pretty quickly! There is also a wonderful kids playground right across the street.
We loved staying at David’s place it was wonderful❤️ Travel to NYC often and this was such a perfect spot and great place to stay🥳

Spent a week at Alicia’s place during our trip to NY and we truly enjoyed it. The space was bright, clean and conveniently located. The place was walking distance to the subway stop and surrounded by great local bars and restaurants. Alicia was also very friendly and helpful throughout ur stay.
It’s very nice and clean

Staying at the ridge was great overall. Great location and trains close by. Really loved the self check in feature though it would be nice to be able to get more towels if I need them. Would stay here again.

Jake's airbnb was clean, spacious, and beautiful. The co-hosts were communicative and friendly. While the airbnb was a shared space, we felt like we had the space to ourselves as it was peaceful and more spacious than we had expected. Their dog was also very friendly. We love Jackson Heights and this space was at a great location-- close to restaurants and transportation. Highly recommend.
Great hotel.
머무는 동안 불편함을 느낄 새 없게 꾸준히 케어해주어 감사합니다. 호스트 개인 일정이 있어 강아지를 못 본 게 천추의 한입니다...ㅠ 메세지를 보내면 바로바로 답장주는 덕분에 무리없이 일정을 소화할 수 있었습니다. 친절하게 대해 주셔 감사합니다:)

Very nice.  Be prepared to find the key before you go in as it’s a bit to digest. After that it’s great. Very famous building.  Bill Clinton was two doors down for me and a televised Democratic Party press conference was held in the lobby.  Neighborhood reminds me of home alone 2.

The location was perfect, being so close to both Times Square and the Top of the Rock. The apartment was pretty small but, all in all, great for up to 3 residents, since we didn't spend much time inside. It's New York, after all. It was pretty easy to find the building and get a hold of the keys. My only complaint would be that, after stepping inside the building, we couldn't tell which apartment was the one we had booked, for there was no letter on the door or any sign to point us towards the apartment.
Great communication. Easy to work with. Small but fully functional and cozy apartment. Easy subway access. I would definitely stay there again!

Nathan's place is great. The location is wonderful - restaurants, stores, the park, and subways just minutes away.
Nathan is very responsive. He communicates proactively and checks in and is quick to respond to questions. He is great and will make your stay comfortable.
The apartment was perfect for my stay - I worked from the apartment & the WiFi was very fast and reliable and the apartment is quiet.
The place is comfy. It does not have a lot of amenities but it is a nice and safe apartment in the middle of the city!

Die Unterkunft war genau wie beschrieben. Besonders gut gefallen hat uns, dass sie zentral liegt und man sich in der Unterkunft und der Umgebung sicher fühlt.
Moying ist eine sehr gute und hilfsbereite Gastgeberin. Wenn man ein Airbnb in New York sucht, würden wir sie weiterempfehlen.
This was my second time staying at Jasmine's place and as the first it was cozy and welcoming. The apartment has everything that was needed. I would highly recommend.
Great location and value!
Nice place! Great location, very close to subway. Clean and accurate. Very comfortable for several people. Note there's no kitchen, but there is a fridge and microwave.

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans le logement de Kevon. Il est vraiment semblable à la description, le quartier est tranquille. L’hôte est sympa et toujours à l’écoute.
De plus, nous n’étions pas si loin du métro qui nous a permis de visiter Manathan sans souci.

Wir haben die Nähe zur Subway und die gute Erreichbarkeit verschiedener Orte in Manhattan geschätzt. Das Badezimmer ist sehr geräumig und die zeitweise Nutzung des schönen Gartens sehr angenehm.
Orestes ist ein sehr angenehmer Vermieter, der Kontakt war nett und unkompliziert.
great location for sure
Location is great. Very helpful host.

We had a wonderful stay at Mia’s place! The property is spacious and well-maintained, offering a comfortable and relaxing environment. One highlight host allowed us to store our bags for a few hours after checkout, which really stood out and made our trip much smoother. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking to stay close to nature while still enjoying convenient access to Manhattan.
Needed a place to stay for a concert. This was easy and reliable.
A very small place. If you only need a spot to sleep and shower, it’s good enough for a short stay. I wish the floor was a bit cleaner.

Located in a great situation being a short walk from Times Square. The staff were friendly and I had excellent dealings with them. I would recommend staying at this Holiday Inn Express for those people wanting to be close to the action of Times Square with great public transport options to easily move around the city also located within walking distance.
Y

Our stay worked out great! The apartment was extremely clean, really appreciated that! Communication with the manager, Yuki, regarding luggage drop off, and check in… all went very smoothly! I would definitely stay there again. :-)
Great place to stay very good neighborhood easy access to subways into central manhattan in 20 mins would love to stay again if I come back thank you

Topi was very nice to my father and I (advices to visit the city, friendly talking, very welcoming etc.) and the description of the place was perfectly conform (2 bed, clean room and bathroom etc.). This 4 days were really enjoyable! Thanks again Topi (:

The place is very clean and looks exactly like the pics. Very easy to get to different tourist places. Josh is a responsive host too, and Frank, the property manager, is very helpful and responsive and arranged an early check in for me too.
Recommend this place for sure!
Super host!

Appartamento ampissimo, pulizia tutti i giorni, letti comodissimi e grandi, abbondanti asciugamani, ambienti lussuosi, reception 24/24, colazione buonissima, supermercato comodissimo, zona tranquillissima. Prezzi introvabili altrove. La perfezione. Stupendo

We will try to come back here every time we are back in New York!  Neil was super kind and responsive, and the space was exactly as advertised. We had never stayed in Washington Heights, as it felt a little far, but it was so quick to get downtown. Two major subway lines are super nearby, and even if you're in a pinch late at night, an Uber won't be too expensive.  Definitely recommend.  Such a great value for the city.

Recomiendo el Airbnb de Eric cumple con todo lo que indica, es súper amplio y cómodo para una estancia agradable y que tenga cocina privada es un gran plus.
Eric responde rápido es paciente y servicial super claro con las indicaciones.
Volvería a hospedarme ahí sin duda.
BEST BNB IVE EVER HAD , NONTAWAN IS REALLY A GOOD PERSON AND IS REALLY FRIENDLY!!!! 20/20 WOULD RECOMMEND AGAIN
This is a fabulous place to stay in Brooklyn, Shelley has created a lovely home for travellers to New York. Very well connected to the subway and in a quiet neighbourhood. Highly recommend!

I absolutely loved my stay! Andrae’s courtesy and great communication especially after a long trip was much needed &  refreshing. The listing is a quick ride to & from the AirTrain or JFk directly and the neighborhood was clean, safe, and quiet. The entire apartment smelled so good and was really clean, which is the first thing I noticed & look for. My room was perfect, definitely spacious enough for one or two people. The bed was extremely comfortable, I slept in & slept well every single night of my stay! I would happily book with them again.
Great apartment in an amazing area close to everything you need. James is a fantastic and very helpful host!

I had a wonderful time here! It was a perfect location with all of the amenities for a semi-long term stay. The host, Ampere, was extremely responsive and friendly and helped out throughout the house. Overall, the house is pretty quiet and peaceful, and you get to meet new people here and there. I would highly recommend this place to those looking for a longer term stay in New York, whether it's for work or visiting.

Had a wonderful stay at Carla’s, she is very warm and friendly and shared lots of great recommendations. The apartment is in a really convenient location and it’s easy to walk to many sights or otherwise access the subway.
Very warm welcome after a long flight. The airbnb was well-equipped with different snacks and drinks, facial masks and other toiletries. We liked the pretty and quiet neighborhood. Thank you :)
Beautiful and clean space in a great neighborhood. Host was very accommodating, short walk from a very nice coffee shop. Will book again next time i'm in Brooklyn.

This place was  clean. and well kept. The private patio was a great bonus area.  Our host, Henry kept in touch before, during and after our stay.  He had very clear instructions for check in and check out. Was thoroughly impressed with his communication. Great place, excellent host. Well definitely choose this place again.
Carla's place was welcoming and a great place to stay the night. Would book again!
ich habe mich sehr wohl gefühlt und die lage war sehr zentral. man konnte mit der subway überall schnell hin. kann ich jeden weiter empfehlen:-)
房源地理位置优越，房东回应及时

I had a great stay! The place was clean and comfortable, and the host responded quickly to any questions I had. She kindly let me drop off my bags early, which I really appreciated. The location is very close to JFK, just a 10-minute drive. Overall, it was a great value for the price.
You couldnt get a better location. A short walk to Times Square, broadway and plenty of places to eat.
Great place!
Perfect
Cute bungalow! Super easy, nice stay. Alex is wonderful. Exactly as pictured and listed :)
Great stay everything was pretty clean it was it a good location as well I liked staying there.
Great location, great host.
The place was very spacious for the city and it was super easy to get around the city from this location.
Good place to have a peaceful stay.
it's really hard to imagine not being completely satisfied. everything was perfect.

Bushra’s place was an amazing stay! The apartment building was easy to find, her instructions on how to get into the place were very simple. The building was quiet, and the apartment was amazing! The place was clean, and comfortable. Bushra was very responsive, and made sure that everything was accommodated during my stay. I definitely recommend Bushra’s place to stay. Thank you so much again for having me!

Essa é a segunda vez que fico hospedada nesse bairro, a primeira morei por dois meses. Assim como na primeira vez, amei o bairro. Obviamente você levará um tempo maior pra chegar a algumas atrações, mas nada melhor que voltar para “casa” em um bairro tranquilo, fora do tumulto dos centros turísticos. A hospedagem é ótima, o quarto tem um tamanho ótimo, chuveiro maravilho, a anfitriã teve cuidado de deixar itens como água, chás, mingau de aveia, shampoo, condicionador e sabonete! O check in e check out é super fácil. Ótima escolha

I had a great stay during my brief time in NYC. The location is close to everything (subway, restaurants, coffee, groceries, etc.), and the entire stay felt like home. Brian is a very attentive host and proactively sends check-in messages to ensure my stay is going well. He is also quick to communicate with me regarding any updates about the building.
The unit was clean; I didn't even see a shadow of a bug during my time there. There were plenty of extra towels, blankets, and a good workstation, and I could effectively work from home. A washer/dryer was available to use, and I could receive packages without having them stolen. Overall, I'm really happy with my stay and had a great experience renting the unit. I highly recommend it to my friends and family if they need a temporary stay in NYC. The only downside I would share with them is that the NYC streets are loud, and they should bring earplugs.

dit was een zeer aangenaam verblijf. Ik ben hier 4 maanden gebleven voor mijn uitwisseling en had niks tekort. Het was ook heel handig dat er al beddengoed aanwezig was en een handdoek voor in de badkamer waardoor ik dit zelf niet meer moest aankopen. Zeker een aanrader!
Great cheap place near jfk to spend a layover.
Great stay, would stay again , thank you for having us

Super,
