Pleasant stay!
Perfect for us while visiting the the city and family. Extremely clean and very comfortable.
Great place great hosts.  Highly recommend.
The stay  was great and well worth the money paid. Laurence was very helpful and accommodating. I would definitely stay again.
We were really satisfied with the flat. It’s newly renovated and everything is modern. The location is perfect and it’s located just off Union Square which was fantastic! Can definitely recommend!

Loved staying here! As a former New Yorker, it is conveniently located, great deal compared to surrounding hotels and tucked nicely.
The check in and out is straight forward. Central location to many trains. There’s a spout on every floor for drinking water + utilities closet is such a smart feature to prevent to need to wait for housekeeping. Def my go-to when I visit NY.

The location is stellar. You're minutes from the loveliest parts of the West Village in one direction and minutes from Washington Square Park in another. There is a Stumptown Coffee Roasters around the corner with some of the best espresso in Manhattan. Peter is a wonderful host, incredibly responsive. And there is a brand new Nespresso machine in the kitchen if you get up early and need a shot of espresso before the cafes open.
Excelente la ubicación muy amables y predispuestos los ascensores funcionaban los 3 muy bien el desayuno personal excelente.

I enjoyed my stay at Julia and John's apartment. They are wonderful and accommodating hosts even though I didn't talk much to them. I always feel a little nervous living in someone's home that's why I'm used to keeping a low profile, but they made me feel comfortable. The room and the ensuite bathroom (perfect for more privacy) are compact but very cozy and very clean and there is all you need. The bed has a comfortable memory foam mattress.
Time Square is a 1 hour walk via Broadway street or 20 minutes by metro line 1. Central Park is a 10 minutes walk. This place is definitely worth it.
The place was clean,  comfortable and with nice roomates. It can get a bit loud during the weekend's night, but this is Bushwick! Laramie is  very responsive and helpful host.
Very good hotels, the personnel too and very good bartender.
Perfect for sleep and shower. Ultra-convenient spot in the city right next to a subway station and perfectly central whether your activities are up or downtown. Highly recommend!
Great place and friendly host!

Perfect place for small group at the heart of Time square, Manhattan. The place has everything needed, clean and convenient. Host was very friendly, helpful and welcoming. Two blocks for subway and bus stand right at the corner. Convenient store on first floor of the building, cafes and restaurants are within the block. Perfect place!

Hotel 3232 was a great place to stay! The location and the staff were amazing and very accommodating.  I would recommend this hotel to my friends and I would stay here again next time I come to visit.
Phillip and Juan were both very quit and easy to get along with!

Ricardo and Clarisa are awesome! We had an incredible time. They are always quick to respond and super friendly. The place is beautiful too and close to a metro station. It is easy to get around and the neighbourhood is good too. Best hosts! & cat ;-)
thanks man, see us around :)
Spacious, cozy apartment with brick walls and great view. Walking distance from the subway, convenient and central location, I enjoyed my stay here <3

Awesome time staying in Fakhar’s place. Even though it was cold and snowing, the room was always warm and welcoming. You can easily get to downtown Manhattan with one train, and super close to a lot of pubs and bars. Highly recommend and we’ll definitely stay at Fakhar’s place once we’re in NYC again.
I was a wonderful Airbnb hoster. She make us feel at home, even give us full list of recommendations
The host is quick and amazing with any help you need. The place is very clean, and cozy just like the photos. I definitely felt peaceful and will be there again for sure !!
So communicative!
A really good place to stay at!

The place was nice and clean and had everything we needed. Originally we planned to stay for one week but Jonathan was very accommodating to extend our stay for 5 more days. Also very quick to respond to messages. Overall a really nice place!
will for sure stay here next time I'm in NYC, it was super clean and quiet!
Had a great time hope to visits again soon!
Great stay. Everything was according to the place description.
The room was super clean (but, there are several regulations to follow) and their responses were so fast. Everything was good and if I come again in NY, I would think about this place again :)
Great place. Great host. Nice area. 4-5 good places to eat. More within walk-in distance. Groceries within 6 blocks. 12 min to A & C. Bus routes right there.

Very charming place in a quiet neighborhood. The apartment has a lot of character is very spacious abs has a lot of light.
Very much enjoyed it
was very nice place

Encanto el apartamento, muy acogedor y muy bien ubicado , comunicación efectiva .

Great location, well equipped house, great host. Enjoyed our stay here. Only surprise was that this was a fourth floor apartment (3 flights of stairs) , so carrying luggage up was a bit of a challenge.
Hosts are friendly, the place is clean, very peaceful.

This unit was peaceful, and I had a great stay. The location was easy to get to. This truly felt like a home away from home, with thoughtful amenities provided throughout the unit.
I did have a concern during my stay, and it was addressed immediately. I felt seen, heard, and treated like family. I would definitely stay here again.

This place was the best and cleanest Airbnb I have ever stayed in. next time I need a place in NYC to stay, I hope it will be available. Great placeSandra. I wish I had a chance to meet you personally. Maybe next time.  Best Bang for my Buck. 👍👍👍
great location and quality
Great stay

would recommend, great deal! location was close to transportation and essentially on/near columbia's campus so the area has a lot of students, food options, etc. the hosts were also very communicative :)

Absolutely loved Bianca’s home. Came here to celebrate my husband’s birthday, house is exactly like the photos, so clean, well equipped with everything you need, spacious and bright. Check in was a breeze. Beds are comfy! I appreciated the little things like fresh fruit, cold waters in the fridge, coffee pods for the machine, every type of toiletries you may have forgotten. Great AC system too!  Neighbourhood is perfect for getting around on the train, station is a 2 minute walk that takes you straight to manhattan. If you’re driving, there’s ample street parking right next to the house.  Walking distance to food, convenience stores, liquor stores. Neighbourhood is full of culture. Bianca and Sherry are truly amazing hosts. Very quick responses, helpful with any questions about the city and truly sweet and kind. I can’t wait to stay with them again!  Thank you for everything!
Hemos tenido muy buena estancia. Ruth ha sido muy agradable y flexible con nosotras! Ya se lo he recomendado a familia y amigas para cuando vengan! Muchas gracias:)
Bel appartement, bien situé!
It was a great place to stay in

Maria is the best❤️ honestly I got sick while being out in the city. She made me tea, got me meds, and she and I always would hang out in the kitchen. She’s the sweetest almost like I’ve known her for so long. She will totally capture your heart❤️ totally recommended. Will stay again ❤️

We booked Reut’s place in Brooklyn after our original rental fell through just days before our trip. It was a blessing in disguise because Reut’s place was absolutely perfect!
Everything was very clean, & bed was super comfortable. We especially enjoyed the Nespresso machine, & the sweet & thoughtful gift that she left for my birthday! What a great place to stay for my first visit to NYC!
We had no issues with noise or feeling unsafe at this location. On the contrary, we found the location to be safe & quiet.
The nearest subway stop to get to Manhattan was about a 15 minute walk away, with plenty of restaurants & coffee shops to choose from just around the block!
Don’t hesitate to book this spot!
Awesome location, very nice size that comfortably fit a family of three.

I stayed with my friend at this Airbnb for a week. It was such a great stay! Chris gave thorough instructions for check in/checkout. I loved the cool art and playbills. The shower is very relaxing as well. Definitely interested in staying again!
está.muy bien la relación calidad precio, muy buena comunicación con el anfitrión.

Unit was neat and clean with basic amenities. Neighborhood and unit were quiet. Appreciated the comfortable LR couch with large screen TV.  Window A/C units worked well. Small grocery, Starbucks, CVS, Long Island RR station and restaurants within walking distance. Able to obtain Uber rides within minutes. Only complaint: when I requested a smoke detector for the unit (as described in the ABNB posting), the host perceived my request as an attempt to scam them. A smoke detector was provided the following morning.

Paul est réactif et arrangeant, le quartier est agréable et proche du métro ainsi que de central Park

Leon and this place was great! It was clean and organized the neighborhood is quiet and modern. I will recommend to anyone curious and I will definitely stay again. Thank you so much Leon your place felt like home!

We stayed for two weeks at Linda’s place. It was a very clean and spacious apartment for the two of us. It is a 8 minute walk to the subway, which takes you directly in to Manhattan . It does take 40 minutes to get into the middle of Manhattan.
There is a very nice deli / supermarket at the end of the street , they are very friendly and provide som nice breakfast to go.
The neighborhood is very diverse and it’s got an array of different kind of people.
Around the subway , there could be some sketchy people. But the people around the neighborhood seemed friendly.
Uber eats works great and food can be delivered from a great number of resultants within 30 minutes.
Linda was very friendly and answered all our questions and accommodated us nicely.

We loved the flat exactly as described clean and amazing bed !!!
Communication was really good and would recommend 100% thank you 😊

This was one of the best stays I've had in NYC in a long time. The rooms are spacious, perfect for a family or a small group of friends. It was easy to check-in and check-out. They let my group leave our luggage at the hotel on the last day while we walked around. Very accommodating!
This place is truly a gem! Comfortable and clean apartment in an amazing neighborhood. Adam is so responsive and accommodating. I cannot recommend it enough, and would definitely stay again.
Very convenient location between Bushwick and downtown Brooklyn, it was perfect for my work trip!
Stay with the locals 😊

I decided to book a last minute overnight stay at Carline’s  and Hans home and let me just say .. beautiful . The apartment looks just like the pictures , is clean and smells WONDERFUL .  Response time  was fast, especially with me doing a same day booking ,I was amazed at how seamless the process was. You won’t regret booking with them ! Lovely home , lovely people .
Tuo was an amazing host. I’m so glad we were able to find this listing. The location is great and close to a bunch of attractions.

Nick and Claudia were exceptional hosts! Their apartment was spotless, comfortable, and exactly as described. We accidentally broke a glass, and they were so kind about it (thank you again!).
The location was ideal for exploring NYC, and small touches like leaving some pantry items made it feel like home. We’d 100% stay here again and highly recommend them to other guests. Thanks for everything!

뉴욕에서 묵을 숙소를 결정할 때 위치나 청결, 안전 등을 열심히 고려하며 고민했는데 이 숙소는 그걸 다 충족하는 곳이었습니다. 생각보다는 작았지만 깨끗하고 침대도 넓어서 좋았습니다. 요리할 수 있는 모든 것이 준비되어있고 수건 같은 것도 넉넉하게 있어 좋았습니다. 부족하더라도 근처에 Megawash라는 좋은 빨래방이 있어 거기에서 빨래를 하면 됐습니다. E나 F로 급행을 타면 맨해튼과도 거리가 짧아 관광을 하기에도 무척 좋았습니다.

This apartment was so nicely decorated and cozy. The apartment was just as the pictures described. Marianny was so nice and wonderful to work with and she answered all my questions quickly. I would definitely stay here again when I return to Brooklyn!

Ha sido una estancia muy buena, el apartamento tiene todo lo necesario. Está muy bien unicado, con estanciones de metroa al lado, restaurantes y supermercados. La única pega es que por la ventana del dormitorio entra aire, no sella perfectamente y en invierno se nota. Por todo lo demás muy bien.
You can try this if you are looking for something cheap in this area. Jakob is a cool guy. Hope you will enjoy staying here.
First getting an Airbnb and it did not disappoint

El apartamento estaba muy limpio, las camas eran cómodas, muy bien comunicado tanto para coger el metro como para ir caminando, todo perfecto!! Lo recomiendo 100%

The place was wonderful! Tara was very accommodating and quick with responses so communication was never an issue at all. 安静，近地铁，周边有很多餐厅和超市，非常有生活气息，房间干净整洁，可以做饭，洗衣服，我们入住的非常愉快！
Peterson was a friendly person.

Great stay at Waldemar’s place. Room and bathroom were spacious and we enjoyed the deck outside as well. Communication was quick and easy and the location is fantastic. Kind and friendly host, would definitely recommend and stay again.
The place was super clean and the host was very responsive.  I highly recommend this place.
Alles gut!

Mary Sue est une personne accueillante et très gentille. La chambre est grande pour un appart New-Yorkais et la literie est top.

great stay! Sharon's place was clean and she was very responsive and friendly

Elle’s place is accurately described and ideal for solo travelers to NYC who want to be situated in Manhattan with good subway access. Elle is friendly and accommodating, and the check-in process was easy.
Very clean, great location, and Silva is awesome!

I loved this place! It was super clean and so cute! Marianny is a great host any question I had was answered quickly, and thoroughly. We had no trouble finding it and the driveway made it even better. I would definitely stay here again!

Michelle and Jackson are great hosts! And Leo the dog will always make sure you’re welcomed :)
The location is nice and quiet with easy access to the N/W trains to get into Manhattan.
Overall, a good spot with friendly and accommodating hosts!
Very central location and surprisingly quiet neighborhood. Apartment is perfect if you don’t plan on spending a lot of time there.

The communication with the host was easy and he was always accessible. The apartment is well furnished and equipped with kitchen utensils, hence cooking and cleaning was very easy.
Unfortunately, the location is not so good. First, the neighborhood is unsafe. We heard gunshots multiple times and saw a shooting in front of the apartment once — we had to run to another street.

we had a really nice stay at Jewel's.
the room is comfy and well located .

I definitely recommend staying here for your next visit to NYC

We used the rental mainly for sleeping (two adult sisters). Brian was a gracious host and let us drop off our bags early. We had a good stay. Bathroom is great! We were hoping to spend time hanging out in the outdoor space but it was not as well-maintained as pictured. Overall, spacious rental in a fantastic location.
Awesome hosts area and place I was very satisfied
Go to spot

I booked this place for my supervisor who prefers an Airbnb over a hotel to get a more comfortable stay. While the location of the flat is good, the host had to be chased to get the check in instructions. Apart from location and self check in there is nothing else good about the place. Would not recommend or stay again here, my boss was very upset with the place and confirmed the pictures are heavily edited. So please be see other options if you have.
Nice place to stay in the heart of Harlem

Kevin’s place is very clean, welcoming, and is well located between the 125th St. subway stations (1, 2, 3 lines and A, B, C, D lines). For staying in a large city, it was also surprisingly quiet! I didn’t wake up to street sounds or traffic. Checking in and checking out was easy. There is a laundromat just down the block for getting laundry done. The place has ceiling fans and window air conditioners. Overall, it was a wonderful stay and I’m glad that I ended up at Kevin’s place.
Very Professional i would recommend this stay. Very clean..very prompt. Would stay again!

Great place to stay when visiting NYC.. so much cheaper than most accomodations and such a lovely place to stay. The host is very responsive and helpful. The house is marked with clear cut instructions, its almost like I was inside a game where the instructions pop up when I need to use anything. Drivable distance to lot of restaurants as well as to the subway station when you want to got to NYC grand central station or JFK airport. Definitely recommending to friends and family.

Great location and very close to the subway. The studio was packed with everything you could possibly need. Very nice location!

This Airbnb was everything that I needed it to be; perfectly located, very clean, great aesthetic, very quiet. I come to Brooklyn every summer to facilitate wellness programming as part of a festival and love to stay in this neighborhood. This location was perfect. The only complaint I had was that there weren't more towels available within the unit (when I inquired they dropped an additional one off). I also didn't realize that this unit was on the third floor and I had incredibly heavy luggage and a musical instrument to carry. Other than these details, this was an amazing experience and stay. I will absolutely rebook.

We had a great time at Manuel’s apartment. To echo other reviews, the apartment was modern, extremely clean, in a great location and Manuel was friendly and easy to communicate with. Yes, at night, you could hear the subway go by, but it didn’t bother us at all and we are light sleepers. We would definitely like to stay again in the future!
Host was amazing, place was clean, so many things to do walking distance away, the subway was 10 feet from our front door.
The place is perfectly located. Comfortable and clean. Definitely a place to return to.

Daniel & Stephanny’s air bnb was very clean, well lit, location perfect and quiet. Parking perfect and secure. We had our toddler with us and there was ample space for him to run around and be a bit free and the gated yard allowed him to play and decompress from the constant long car rides that he wasn’t used to. Saw that someone said that it was a strong air freshener smell which I think is cleaning product in between stays which was a little bothersome but it died down. Overall a great and comfortable stay. :)

Spacious, light-filled loft-style apartment, but AC needs work. Great location right at the subway so easy to get anywhere and we walked to World Trade Center area, Chinatown, the Ferrys and Wall Street. A real New York City experience of a gritty and lively neighborhood.

This apartment is a beautiful oasis of luxury in midtown Manhattan. The host is a true gentleman. The apartment is equipped with everything anyone could want. At one point I thought I might need an extra blanket (I didn’t) and my host offered to have one sent by Amazon the following day. Furthermore, on my arrival he was not only there to greet me and carry my luggage up to the flat, he then returned on my departure day and carried everything down for me to put in the Uber. Amazing.
The bed was so comfortable that I asked the host for the link to purchase it. The linens, soaps and decor were all top notch luxury. This will be my New York home from now on.
Many thanks Labeat. What a wonderful experience and thank you again for all of your kindness.
Ce logement a un emplacement incroyable !!! Tout à proximité.je recommande vivement
Very enjoyable. Easy access to the city. Great value. Will stay again!
My wife and I had a great stay. We enjoyed a bottle of wine on the roof. It's a beautiful spot. The house plants were amazing. Reka was so kind throughout all of our communications.

Clean and bright, in a super location. There is a bagel/coffee shop just steps away, as well as a small grocery. Great communication from Hamza; easy check-in and check-out. Would definitely stay again!

Liesha and Ronald were such fantastic hosts — they were extremely attentive, and responsive to our needs and questions. The space was absolutely stunning just like the photos, and it was such a treat to have so much room especially when staying in New York! There were tons of corner shops and cafes around the apartment so we were very happy with the accessibility of the location! Couldn’t recommend this spot enough :)

Melissa and her husband were the best host you could ask for. Anything you needed was recieved asap and they even provided toys for my child. There’s a park across the street and the location is next to amazing restaurants and 2 min walk to the train that takes you to the heart of the city. I would stay here over and over again give. The chance
Great room and easy to get into

There are definite pros and cons to Emily’s place.
The pros: You really can’t beat the location, it really is the best feature of this apartment. Communication is terrific with the host. Having a washer dryer in the unit is very convenient.
The cons: It’s not that the apartment is bad, it’s just very run down and weary. The coach and pillows really need to be cleaned! The shower takes a full 10 minutes to get hot and every faucet in the home is loose. The air conditioning was nice in the heat, but be aware one of the bedrooms does not have air, so if you need all 3 bedrooms, one person will have to sacrifice their comfort.
It was fine. Only thing available at a slightly affordable price during marathon weekend
Love central location.

Great apartment. Good location. The only issue we had was communication. We were told to message the host when we landed, which we did and he didn’t respond with check in details for 2.5 hours. We had to contact air bnb confirming he wasn’t answering but I told them not to worry about it when he eventually responded. Kevin then turned up unannounced asking why we’d complained. We didn’t complain, we simply selected ‘air bnb host not responding’ because he wasn’t!
Clean and secluded area! Easy check in process. Nice neighborhood
We really enjoyed staying with Sandra and Jorge, they are so sweet!

Room is so clean. I like the smell of fresh sheets. Receptionist were very helpful and accommodating to my requests. Loads of restaurants nearby. They also provided recommendations where to eat. Thank you!
Great place to stay. Air purifiers and air conditioning work great. Comfy bed. Plenty of space for 2. Great amenities. Bathroom ceiling is low if you’re over 6 feet.

So grateful to find Vida's place!
Maybe my favorite NYC stay yet! Beautiful quiet and cozy apartment in a great neighborhood near my friend's place. It was so rejuvenating to open the shades up and wake up slowly in the sunny bedroom but then step out on the quiet back patio in the mornings! Apartment was nice and warm while NYC itself was very very very cold during my stay. Super comfortable bed and great bathroom. Easiest walk over to the Subway ever on a calm residential street! Vida recommended a great coffee shop on the way to the A train just around the corner. (Rita & Maria's on Halsey).

Everything was great, especially for someone who considers themselves a bit of a germaphobe. The only thing that pushed my limits was the shared shower. The curtain was a bit gnarly. But all in all, the bed was comfortable and the room felt clean. It’s also an effective use of space.

Osyma was a very good host! She replied quickly to anything I might have had to ask. For example I asked if there could be a hair dryer I could borrow, and a very good dryer waited for me in the apartment when I arrived. Thank you for this!
The location of Osymas place is very nice. It takes of course a little time to travel to and from Manhattan, but on the other hand, it's very close to the subway station, and the R-train reaches many of the central locations in Manhattan very well. I (a woman traveling alone) also felt really safe to walk around the area. The check in went really smoothly as well! The place itself is clean and practical, I had everything I needed and more.

Very nice House, clean, smell good.
The rooms are very nice, the mirrors are making even more cute.
The leaving is very nice for a movie Night.
Very nice Host with a good communication.
I enjoyed my stay there.
Thank you
Great place , want to come back !

I had a great stay at this Airbnb!  The bed was really comfy, the living room sofa was firm but relaxing, and the shower was hot and powerful. The host was incredibly attentive throughout my stay. Highly recommended!

Had a great stay. Very comfortable and roomy, especially for Brooklyn. The smart mirrors and shower were cool and nice modern feel. We were surprised though that some basics were missing. No coffee pot (just industrial one with no basket, towels were flimsy and no wine glasses.).
Those are all easy fixes. Otherwise place was great and we will likely stay again.
excellent place close to wall street and activities
Enjoyed my 2 night stay here, very close to the Subway/F Train. Very little street noise at night.
Very good place, very clean
Such a great location! Its was always kept clean. The stairs were just a bit of an issue. Other than that the stay was great!!
There was a “destination fee” of ~$40, charged at the desk, which I did not realize beforehand.

My wife and I had a great stay at Noelle's apartment for the past month. Noelle is an amazing host and we really appreciated her responsiveness and helpfulness during our stay. She is totally a Superhost!
The apartment is the right size for a couple and has a great relaxed vibe to it. The building is modern and has an elevator, gym and easy to use laundry. The balcony is perfect for soaking up the sun on warm days.
The location is wonderful and we enjoyed exploring the different Greenpoint cafes and restaurants nearby. Sweetleaf and Bakeri are fantastic, and I love delicious enerugi ramen just a minute away!
Thanks for a great stay, Noelle!
Great location. Close to restaurants and the train station

Nice and spacious. Had a private entrance with outdoor space and separate full kitchen and bathroom-all private. Super clean! My only gripe is you can hear walking/movement upstairs. Otherwise perfection.

Merlberg is a great host! She was very responsive, helpful and friendly. The place was clean and cozy. Perfectly located not too far from the L train and plenty of bus routes. Definitely will stay at this spot in the future!

Marlene’s airbnb was amazing very comfortable felt right at home and I would come back again most definitely best part is all the restaurants are right there close to each other give this airbnb at shot you won’t be disappointed
Wonderful apartment in an amazing location!!!
Josy was a good host.  She made sure we had everything we needed. House was very clean and matched the description.
Great place especially for the price!

This is a lovely, charming, quirky place. It's most definitely NOT one of those modern conversions so frequently listed on Airbnb. This place has been around for a very long time and staying here is like stepping back in history. It has character!
Yes, there are some quirks, but we felt they added to the charm of the overall experience.
The neighborhood is wonderful, with fantastic access to all the necessities and Central Park.
We'd happily stay here again.

Place was clean, cleaners were really nice. Good location. Description was misleading it’s $300 due at check in. Also breakfast is $30 a day per person. They charge you $10 dollars a day per room automatically and call it a “drink credit” but their drinks start at $15 so feels very scummy. If you need more money just charge more for the room.
great location

The best to my friends in The Bronx,
