Clay's place was great for a week long stay in the city. Check-in was easy and he was a fantastic communicator. The space is clean, private and ideal for remote work since there is a desk and extra monitor. I would recommend Clay's place to anyone looking for a comfortable place to stay while exploring NYC.
good location , mostly safe although , not close to the city.  Excellent for driving , safe on street parking, which is what I was looking for when I picked this place.
All was great. I would love to stay there again.
Easy to find. Just as described. Perfect for a weekend in NYC.

We had a beautiful time in Park Slope visiting family nearby.  This 4bdrm place was perfect for my family with kids and the grandparents too.  Host was responsive, checkin was smooth.  It’s  quiet and close to a lot of things.  We really enjoyed the balcony off the kitchen.
Beautiful place, great location, very clean. I really enjoyed my stay and will book mark this same location for next time. Highly recommend!
A wonderful stay , with excellent location in town , highly recommend this place for your next trip to NYC if you need something in budget and a decent amount of amenities.
Perfect location, close to the metro station. There are so many food options and a target grocery store in walking distance. Safe neighborhood. The apartment is clean and Brian is so responsive.
Will definitely return for future days and NYC!

Vanessa's apartment is not only perfectly located but it is also kept clean and comfortable. Communication was great and everything went smoothly. Definitely a gem if you are looking for a space to stay in the city.
Great spot for a great value!
Great spot, easy check in, very clean spot, amenities were great for New York. Perfect location. Easy in and out! Has me wanting to rent a spot in NY for real.

We loved our stay at Jane’s. It was so much better than a hotel. It felt like home. We slept in, walked to several great restaurants, worked remotely, took phone calls while enjoying her garden, and watched tv in the living room. Just really relaxed and enjoyed our time. The shower was lovely with great hot water with strong pressure. I really hope to stay here next time we come to town!

The best host !! The room is perfect for one person and Thaya is always kind and helpful with everything, she will give you lots of advice about the places to visit and also restaurants! Thanks again ❤️

Hatte eine sehr gute Lage, in der Nähe des Time Squares und war einfach zu erreichen (U-Bahn Station in der Nähe). Leider war das Apartment nicht sehr sauber und sehr hellhörig, die Heizung hämmerte die ganze Nacht und es war leider sehr kalt in der Wohnung.
Sehr unkomplizierte Kommunikation und war immer freundlich.

Fraulein was a very welcoming host, the place was impeccable. The bed was high quality and confortable.
The neighborhood has a lot of options to eat out or get groceries, the subway stop is about 5 mins away.
Really great chill time
Appartement is ruim, Linda heeft haar best gedaan om het zo comfortabel en gezellig mogelijk te maken. Heerlijk rustige buurt, restaurants en supermarkt dichtbij en ook dichtbij de trein.
If you are looking for cheap accommodation in the centre of Manhattan this is a place for you. Room was really small but suitable for sleepover.

Diese Unterkunft bietet alles, was es für ein paar Tage in New York braucht: Schlafmöglichkeiten, eine funktionsfähige Küche, ein sauberes Bad. Bemängeln würde ich nur die nicht abschließbaren Zimmer.

I thought Oyo was amazing!
Great place, awesome desk receptionists and friendly service. I’d definitely like there to have been more security but overall outstanding!
Really nice and clean place at the best location for exploring the city and brooklyn.
bien sitio por el precio,  el.aseo podría mejorar .
Amazing place in a vibrant and central neighbourhood. Joanna is a wonderful host, very welcoming and responsive.

Overall, this was a great stay! My boyfriend and I had a good time here and it was only a few minutes away from everything we needed. I just had some suggestions as far as items needed in the airbnb that would make this even better which I have already informed the host about. Thank you for the great stay!!    :)

I must divide this review in two parts one about the host (Blueground) and the other about the unit itself.
Blueground is a well established company and they clearly know their business, the check in was fast and easy, the unit was pristine clean, they give you a welcome kit with some house essentials (dishwasher soap, laundry soap, coffee etc) they communicate you any issue with the building and in general you will have a great renting experience with Blueground
Now, about the unit itself; honestly it’s very disappointing considering the price range, even for NYC standards, the building is old but not in a charming way, there is a pest problem, hot water sometimes doesn’t work, furniture is extremely cheap and generic, walls are extremely thin and you can clearly hear the conversations of your neighbors and that is just to name a few.
Bluegruound has several units available in NYC you should be better off choosing another one.

Great host! Very responsive, friendly, and communicative. The place is fairly spacious and quiet, and close to transit/groceries/etc which made it easy for day-to-day. Great neighborhood, and great access into Manhattan as well! Ran into a few malfunctioning amenities, but the host is super quick and responsive to fix them. Overall, would recommend!

We love Park Slope and this is an ideal location. The street is beautiful, the apartment is kept up well and we could walk to multiple restaurants, shops, etc. (Our 8 year old loved the proximity to the toy store!). My wife lived in the area for some time and enjoyed returning to her neighborhood.
Great spot!!!

Super cute and clean, close to LGA and citi field! I would recommend booking here. If we come back to NY, we will book here. Good neighborhood. Only con - would be that the shower is kinda small but other than that, I recommend and good place to stay at. 10/10
Great host! Easy and excellent communication. Brilliant location.
Very comfy, very clean, very amazing property mgr, and host had very good communication. The stairs were no joke so pack light! But definitely worth it.

I loved this place. It smelled and looked so good. Ana was very helpful and friendly. also, there are great restaurants and bars closed by. Very close to the city. My commute was super simple. I loved it.
Great place. Perfect for a group of 6. Right next to the Hammerstein Ballroom where we were going for an event.

apt was nice and as on the pictures.
big plus was the sports park just on the other side of the street.
windows in bedrooms are not too good.

Beautiful and comfortable available apartment in a beautiful, safe and walkable neighborhood with easy access to public transportation. The host was friendly, responsive and helpful. Would stay here again in a heartbeat and recommend it to anyone.
Nice if you want to be in the middle of the city ! Hard to get Uber
I enjoyed to stay.

I had a wonderful stay in Miki’s place and it was totally perfect for my solo travels in New York for 6 days. Situated 5 minutes from the subway and with lots of amenities nearby, the area was a perfect base from which to explore Brooklyn and journey into Manhattan. The space itself was exactly as described and Miki was super helpful throughout - I especially appreciated her flexibility in letting me leave my suitcase on check-out day, which I was able to collect before heading to the airport. I would have no hesitation in booking again and this listing will be my go-to next time I’m back in NYC.

Lordan has been a fantastic host, very helpful and cooperative. Communication was never an issue. He was always one text away. The apartment is absolutely like what is shown on the website. Very convenient and close to JFK and NYC transit. Restaurants are nearby. Located in a very quite neighbourhood though on a wide road. There is a dedicated and convenient parking sport though shared with other tenants. Street parking is free and easy to find. The apartment is clean, bright and airy and smells good. Thank you Lordan and Haidy.
Buen hospedaje, nos gusto bastante, no dudaría en volver a hospedarme allí

Pour notre 2eme location par Rb&b, ce fut un vrai bonheur. On s’est tout de suite senti comme chez nous
Beaucoup de petites attentions bien chaleureuses nous attendaient
Magdalene a toujours répondu présent pour nos différentes demandes essayant au maximum de nous satisfaire
Très souriante et chaleureuse, ce fut un plaisir de la rencontrer
Nous la recommandons à 1000%

Gabriela is a very accommodating and helpful host. She has helped us with all of our needs.
The place is very nice and spacious, and our family of 5 felt right at home. It is 2 min. walk to the bust stop and about 5 minutes walking distance to the subway with express connection to Manhattan.
Would highly recommend it!

We enjoyed our stay at Shemi’s. The instructions were perfect. They were extremely responsive before we arrived and when we had a question after checking in. The apartment is perfectly sized and the hall and main bedroom were spacious. The pictures on the listing were accurate, including the coffee! There is a washing machine and dryer in the apartment and they had stocked some essentials for us. The location is great, with many stores a short walk away. I walked in Prospect Park every morning.
There is ambient noise from the street, but it did not bother us at all. The radiator can be noisy, but we slept very well.
We hope to be back.

Patrick was a great host. The room was very clean and he provided all necessities. He made me feel very welcome. The only negative I would say is that the subway is very close which made it a bit difficult for me to sleep.
Perfect spot. Amazing accommodations.
Impeccable room in a lovely brownstone.   Room was big, bed comfortable and the private bathroom with shower was a bonus.

Wonderful hosts! And the place looked just like the photos. The neighborhood is nice and it was a wonderful welcome to Brooklyn. The hosts were very responsive and proactive with information. We also received great recommendations. It was truly a treat to stay here. We would definitely recommend. Wonderful stay!

Our stay here was excellent! Ranita was very helpful with any questions we had and communicated effectively! The place itself was lovely, we had a great time exploring the area, the apartment is a great base to come back to. Will definitely stay here again!
Patrick's Airbnb was amazing! Patrick is very friendly and his response time was so quick when needed.
It was a great place! Highly recommended!

I spent five weeks in the Lexington suite and had the best time exploring the Upper East Side from such a historic vantage point. The beauty of the 1871 House is how conveniently located it is to multiple subway stops, making it easy to navigate the city. Being on the top floor, I loved waking up every morning with a cup of coffee and people watching from the living room. The brownstones make you feel like you're in a movie. Lia's family was incredibly warm and welcoming over the course of my stay. In fact, it would be hard to stay anywhere else now! Because Lia and her husband own and manage the whole property, you not only feel safe, but you know that if there is anything out of order with other apartments, they can and will take care of it. I never heard a peep from my apartment, but I did get great exercise ascending the 6 flights of stairs every day. I didn't mind the forced activity as it allowed me to eat whatever I wanted (and I did). It's easy to recommend this charming stay.

I highly recommend this listing both for the space itself, the incredible hosts, the value, and the location! Communication was superb and all needs were anticipated. Thanks so much! Highly recommend. Busy neighborhood but was quiet and no disturbances.

Was very nice, location prime to
Soho and noho. AC worked fine, and response times were pretty quick.
Hannah let us check in early and check out late which was blessed.

Amazing location, right by LaGuardia, and is a minute walk from a convenience store. The space was clean, and I felt right at home! I would for sure stay here again. You are able to take the bus and subway to the city, which was incredibly convenient. Marisol was super communicative and helpful! You will not regret staying here.

Appartement très pratique à quelques stations de métro de middle Town, ce qui est très confortable pour les différentes excursions vers Manhattan, Coney Island, Brookling, etc..
Très bonne communication avec Sammy avant et lors de notre arrivée, que nous recommandons pour votre séjour à New York.
Enjoy It
Flo et Cyrille
What a lovely, peaceful place to stay!  Just minutes from places to eat, shop, etc.  It had everything we needed for a restful reprieve from running around the city.  Thank you!
Beautiful part of town real home feeling only about 15 mins to the subway station
Nice secure location

Very nice accommodation where I got what I read in the bio.  Not only close to Times Square and Central Park, but also close to nice grocery stores for you to cook home if you wish. This was a good choice!

Tings place is a beautiful space with easy access to the subway. There are four locked doors you must go through before entering the apartment - we felt very secure during our stay! Only thing to be aware of - the upstairs neighbors come and go quite a bit, and you can hear them walking/running around, it woke us up in the middle of the night. The king size bed was incredibly comfortable though and made us feel at home.
Enjoyed the stay. I would recommend booking. Great communication, comfortable and welcoming place that was clean!
It was affordable and convenient, the room was clean, tidy and well prepped. The hosts good communication and description of the location made it easy to find.

This place suited us for what we were looking for. We were looking for an inexpensive place in Queens to crash and this was the place. It’s not the most luxurious but we just needed a nice safe place to sleep. The neighborhood might not give you the warm and fuzzies but it seemed pretty safe enough for us.
Комната была очень чистой и уютной! Близко к метро! Очень легко и удобно заселиться и выехать в любое время, благодаря кодовым замкам
This was an amazing stay for my family and I. Eliza is the best host. Would stay here again
We had such an awesome stay at Beth’s Place! It’s in such a nice walkable safe area! We would definitely stay here again 😀
great place
Great stay in Brooklyn!

It was a very good stay. The room felt smaller than what we expected from the pictures, but it had everything we needed, as described. The neighborhood is noisy, but from our room in the 7th floor we didn't have much problem. Staff was super helpful and answered really fast. It's super close to the subway and it has a lot of restaurantes and nice places around. I'd stay there again.
Always a pleasure returning to my home away from home.

Amazing place and value. Near a couple train stops in quiet neighborhood. The dogs take a little bit to get used to you to settle down from barking but there totally friendly and adorable! I highly recommend
In a great part of Brooklyn, easy to get to the city and take in the local area and enjoy the artistic vibe

The room is huge compared to any other NYC airbnb I've ever stayed in. He decorated the room in a very neat way. The bed was very comfortable, check-in was seamless, and I absolutely loved the common area (living room, front yard and back yard). It was such an easy going and low key stay with a comfortable environment. Def will visit here again! Thank you, Jiyoun!
Great stay. I would recommend to family and friends.
Great place!

I really enjoyed staying here and I felt at home. It's spacious, had everything I needed to live out of for a while, and good natural lighting.
Some specific things I liked: great shower, comfortable bed, a variety of things to cook using (stove top, air fryer, microwave). There's also a ton of good restaurants, bars, and cafes in the area.
Nico was also very communicative and helpful throughout the process: I would definitely stay here and work with him again!

Dans l’ensemble un endroit idéal pour un budget « moyen » à NYC, central, facile d’accès.
Les parties communes (cuisine et salon) magnifiques !
Accessibilité à la cuisine toute équipée ainsi qu’à la laundry.
La chambre est petite mais suffisante pour visiter la ville, et propre.
Malheureusement, certains hôtes ne jouent pas le jeux et les douches et toilettes (aux différents étages) ne sont pas très propres. Merci pour l’accueil !

Roberto ist a great host that is kind, give great advice regarding the neighborhood and even helped us with the luggage. The apartment is beautiful and situated perfectly between Williamsburg hand Bushwick.
Pretty and quiet. Very nicely decorated house. Would stay again
Place was great ! Finding parking was the only concern but other then that the place was well maintained

Karla is a great host. She really makes an effort to make sure that you enjoy your stay. I had to get out of my reservation early under some difficult circumstances and Karla was very understanding, all things considered.
The location is decent, though a little out of the way. Not too difficult to hop on the subway and get to downtown Brooklyn in 30, Manhattan in 40, etc. Unfortunately, it's just outside of the range of the rentable city bikes.
The apartment itself is nice, fairly spacious, and just as advertised. There were some minor issues with the electronic lock on the front door, but I know Karla is working to fix that as soon as possible.
Peaceful

The Gregorian was a great find for us! The staff is super friendly and helpful.
The location is convenient, close to plenty of food places to walk to and close to a bus stop and subway station.
Considering the busy city, the stay was peaceful, too! We rested very well.
If we go back to NY, this is the place for us!

Lee's Wohnung ist die perfekte Unterkunft für einen Besuch in New York. Wir haben uns von Anfang an in der schönen Wohnung wohlgefühlt. Die Wohnung ist in echt noch besser, als auf den Fotos und Lee hat wirklich an alles gedacht. Eine so umfassend und komplett ausgestattete Wohnung haben wir bisher noch nie gehabt, sie muss sich vor sehr guten Hotels nicht verstecken. Es ist alles vorhanden, was das Herz begehrt. Wir wurden mit einem mit Getränken gefüllten Kühlschrank und Snacks und Kaffee/Tee empfangen. Wunderbar.  Die Wohnung selbst war makellos sauber, alles ist neuwertig und top gepflegt. Hinzukommt ein besonderes Händchen von Lee für Details und Dekoration, richtig schön! Die Lage ist top, ruhig, aber mit guter Anbindung an 3 Subway-Linien. Lee selbst ist die perfekte Vermieterin, immer ansprechbar, die Kommunikation über Airbnb/E-Mail lief super.  Wir bekamen wertvolle Tipps und Hinweise. Alles in allem sagen wir danke für den Aufenthalt und Lee's Engagement.

Michelle is a wonderfully kind woman, who does everything in her power to make sure your stay is the best it can possibly be. On top of that, her apartment is a lovely, quaint apartment in the heart of the west village in quite possibly the best location. I would highly recommend it.

Pour mon premier voyage à New York, j'ai été satisfait de mon séjour chez Jean ! Elle a été réactive dès que j'avais une demande, discrète me laissant de l'espace dans les espaces de vie. Le quartier est sympa avec pas mal de restaurants et commerces. Je recommande 😉
Erika's communication was great, and very helpful. This was the perfect place to stay for my work trip, and very convenient to the ferry. Thank you, Erika!

My ONLY actual complaint is the bathroom. ice cold tiles, and the tiniest shower, with the tiniest gap to get to the toilet. This accommodation is not for overweight or overly tall individuals. With that said. The host? phenomenal. From the second I booked the place until it was check-out day, they were in communication in seconds if I had a question. There was water and champagne in the room when we arrived, which was at about 12 am, and we were near desperate for water.  The bed was the perfect firmness, which is exactly what I needed every day after 30k steps in the city. All in all. I would probably book again.
Great place

Juliette was a wonderful and welcoming host who was open to sharing about her life in NYC and also respected our privacy and down time. She has wonderful decor and the house is very conveniently located near the train station.

Caio’s place was great. It was spacious and accommodating for our big family and Caio was a gracious and helpful host. It was easily accessible to the subway and there were plenty of great restaurants in the vicinity. I’d definitely recommend.

This listing is a gem in the heart of NYC! I booked for a week of work and bought my family along, so I was looking for something that was safe, lots of space, and modern. This place was that plus so much more. Who knew you could get such great space in New York.
The front desk staff was helpful, friendly, and responsive.
Highly recommend this location. Clean, spacious, trendy, safe, great location! What more could you ask for?
Emily and Saul’s place was a nice cozy spot. Very much enjoyed my stay!
It was as advertised
Muy organizado amplio y limpio

Great location and neighborhood to explore.
Alejandro was very responsive and helpful.
Loved it.
Koichi was very responsive, and the place was exactly as described. The individual unit was great. The bathroom facility was as described.

Stephanie & Andrew were so friendly and very responsive.  It was so nice to be welcomed with cold drinks & air conditioning on a very hot check in day, thank you Stephanie & Andrew!! Their place was exactly  how they described it and well equipped for our use.  Home in Queens was  in the perfect location for exploring the local area, a short commute to Flushings as well as easy access into Manhatten!  We would definitely stay here again the next time we visit New York.

The place is exactly the same as the picture. The direction to go into the room is very clear. The place is cozy and it’s not small. However, I still can hear people from upstairs walking at 4 am. But it’s not Estefania’s fault. The neighborhood is safe. I walk to a supermarket in 10 minutes.
I really liked staying at Duchess and Alan's place, they helped me with everything, the room had everything I needed and the location is really convenient. Thank you! :)

I enjoyed  my four nights at flushing. Everything was just as it said in the description and photos. The space was very clean, the neighborhood safe and the staff very attentive and friendly. The only con was shuttle was only provided for La Guardia and not JFK and the breakfast was an extra cost.

Jean’s place was exactly as described. More than enough room for 2 people. Very clean and equipped with everything we needed. Great neighborhood and walkable to some restaurants and stores. Only about 30-40 mins depending on traffic to major city things. The place could use a full body mirror taken it was 2 women in there and only mirror was the bathroom lol . Everything else was great, would definitely stay here again.

Awesome place. It was a bit drafty and cold the first night, but once the heat was running for a longer time, the space got warmer. I suggest taking taxis to the city for safe travel. parking wasn't bad. we got lucky and found a spot 3 blocks away. The space was 9/10, and I love the privacy. 2 days was our stay.
La estadía fue perfecta, Abby siempre estuvo para resolver nuestras consultas. El apartamento fue acorde a lo esperado, volvimos muy satisfechos por suerte.
Todo resultó agradable, está muy bien ubicado,  agradable y bonito

It was an amazing stay. Super nice apartment, very clean and very cozy. It was one of our best experiences.
Thank you Jonathan and family! 👍

Perfect Airbnb with OG hosts, friendly people who rent out a room in their real homes. So please note there are no hotel amenities, but Celina and Felipe's place is super nice. Private bathroom is an extra bonus.
Nice hotel, close to Times Square
Good host, clean place

I had an outstanding experience at Dwain's Airbnb, "Da Spot," in Brooklyn. The location is perfect, just a four-minute walk from the subway in a tranquil neighborhood. The domain is impeccably maintained, offering a clean and private entry that exceeded my expectations. Dwain, the host, was incredibly responsive to all my needs, making my stay truly enjoyable. Five stars without a doubt!

Oh, where do I begin?! We absolutely loved the vibe of Victoria’s place….. so artistically decorated and details throughout to make her guests comfortable. Walk to yummies in minutes. Location, perfect. Beautiful sunlight through the trees in the morning, yes trees. Peaceful block… thank you Victoria!!!

Ótimo lugar para ficar. Ryan foi bem cordial e nos proveu com todas as solicitações que pedimos.  Apesar do bairro não ser tão limpo, nos sentimos seguros caminhando nele, até durante a madrugada. O quarto e o banheiro privado estava impecável, limpo e bem confortável, apesar disso, como a acomodação é compartilhada, as áreas comuns, principalmente a cozinha, precisariam de uma limpeza. Claro que isso depende muito da organização e higiene de com quem  você for compartilhar a acomodação, nesse sentindo não tivemos muita sorte. Em um geral tivemos uma ótima experiência, pois o quarto confortável  e a hospitalidade de Ryan, fizeram valer a pena.
definitely recommend 👌,  great location and a very comfortable place.

I absolutely adored the neighborhood and the location was close to a wonderful park and a metro stop.
I was able to walk to Whole Foods for all of our groceries and spent the each day traveling to Manhattan with ease.
The apartment is comfortable, homey, and perfectly met our family’s needs. My children and myself had a wonderful time during our stay and I would gladly book this Air bnb again and again.
Matt was responsive and accommodating. The place was as advertised.
Great for short term stays in Brooklyn! Very close to a vibrant neighborhood and connecting public transit allows you to visit all over the city easily. Ample space and privacy. Overall great stay!
Exactly what we needed in the area we needed
Awesome staycation

Notre séjour chez Toufik était parfait. Son appartement est très proche du métro et l’on rejoint Manhattan très rapidement. Le quartier, plutôt populaire, est sympathique et accueillant. Il ne faut pas nier les problèmes de drogue qui existent mais à aucun moment nous ne nous sommes senti en danger ou menacé d’aucune sorte. Je recommande fortement Toufik, un hôte très attentif, discret, érudit et agréable à connaître.

William was very responsive and instructions were clear. The place looks like the photos. Everything was clean, it was a great stay.
The location was so much better than we were expecting. So many bars, restaurants, other shops, yoga.. whatever to do in a very short walk from this place. It can be loud on a Saturday night but you should be out partying anyway.

We were very disappointed because we had originally paid for a queen bed & we called & confirmed it each week for confirmation.
Then when we finally get to check in late after a series of untimely horrid events - in which we had called again before hand and were reassured again…
The room was sold to someone else!!!
How can that be???
We had prepaid…
Be on your guard - we have never had a problem with an host with Air B & B until this happened-
In our dream trip northeast at New York City - Manhattan!
fantastic space, wonderful amenities. perfect for a week in NYC!
Majoittuminen sujui hyvin vaivattomasti. Olo tuntui kotoisalta ja aamiaiseksi olleet bagelsit olivat maistuvia. Jos menemme uudestaan New Yorkiin, majoitumme ilman muuta uudestaan heidän luona.

Genevieve's flat was a perfect place  to spend time visiting our son in New York.  Close to a subway and great cafes and restaurants.  It is a very relaxing, spacious and comfortable flat with all the amenities one needs. We also enjoyed looking after her two adorable cats.  Genevieve was always on hand to answer any  questions and I hope that we get another chance to stay there again.
We loved the place! It was in a great location and was comfy and we felt at home
This is my second stay, it was excellent. I will continue the location was great.
Other than the bathtub in the main bathroom been a little un clean all else was fine.

Great location, right behind the boardwalk and beach. Very practical, one block away from many stores. Parking is quite a challenge, after some searching, we found a parking garage called Ocean Pkwy Garage, price was reasonable and it's a 5 min walk from the place. (Check the date on the ticket they give you, they tried to charge me an extra day!)
The place was larger than the picture show, beds are comfortable, and the kitchen is good.
The playroom was a good bonus, the kids loved it.
The AC didn't work but fans were running so it was hot but ok.
Overall, we had a good stay, and we will book it again next time we go to Coney Island.

We had a great stay at Julia’s place. Thank you very much for accommodating us while we were in New York! Julia’s place was clean; the kitchen had everything we needed to make breakfast; cute neighborhood and the place was only 10 minutes away from the subway station. There is also a great Thai restaurant just around the block.

Check in was easy, and Aguiar was responsive. I really enjoyed staying at his place! It’s clean, safe, and in a super convenient location with stores, a mall, and great restaurants nearby. Overall, a wonderful stay!

I stayed for 8 days and had an awesome time! The host was super helpful — he really knows the best restaurants and bars with a great vibe. He’s a total foodie, and since I’m also pretty picky about where I eat, his recommendations were perfect.
The apartment was spacious and had an incredible 180° view of the NYC skyline — the Empire State Building was literally right in front of the window! I got some amazing photos.
He was also really attentive, offered me coffee in the mornings, and helped me figure out the subway and transport. Overall, it felt like staying with a friend who wants you to have the best NYC experience. Highly recommend!
Great check in Was inside my room in less than 5 Minutes , I didn’t speak to Alan because there was no need to reach out everything went smoothly ! Thank you for the stay I would stay again
Everything was really perfect 👍🏻
Really enjoyed my stay

Jen's place is great in so many ways -- it was clean, stylish, and well-located (in a quiet neighborhood in Brooklyn Bed-Stuy, a quick walk from the subway). Her place is nicer than some hotels I've stayed in and much more affordable, especially in New York. Jen is also a fantastic host. She responds almost immediately to messages, gives lots of helpful suggestions, and is very accommodating. Her dog Ozzy is also very sweet and well behaved. I almost wish we were here for a longer trip, I loved her place so much. Thanks for a fantastic stay!

Pablo’s place was easy-to-find and 1.5 blocks from the subway. The apartment was very clean with plenty of hot water, towels, and extra blankets.
Thank you for the terrific stay, Pablo!
Very comfortable and not loud felt like i lived there.
Nice and affordable as well!

Tash is a super kind host!
The room is small but cozy.
I had a good time for 2 weeks.
Train C is close from the place so I could go to Manhattan in 20 -30 min and Deli is very close as well.
I will miss the beautiful scenery of Hasley street long time.
Outstanding.
Great area, beautiful brownstone, delicious restaurants nearby. Recommend!

The room was as described, not very big but clean and confortable. the bed is good. Vincent is very friendly and happy to help.
The location is better than I expected. The lines E and F are very convenient and can take you to pretty much all the main touristic places.
I would recommend the place to my friends.
It would have been nice if the room had been cleaned at least once every 2 days.
Fantástica ubicación en pleno East Village. Muy cómodo el apartamento.
Localización excelente. Es un poco pequeño para 4 adultos, genial para una pareja.
We really liked the place, close to the subway, nice neighborhood.
Great host and apartment! Excellent location and neighborhood with so many restaurants and shops nearby! We had a great stay!
Great location! Short walk to shops and parks. It was very clean.

Majoittajat olivat erittäin ystävällisiä ja kohde oli todella uniikki. Alaric oli erittäin joustava ja auttavainen. Sijainti oli erinomainen, metrolla pääsi helposti manhattanille. Brooklynin palvelut olivat myös lähellä. Puhdas, kotoisa ja historiallinen majoitus. Kulku huoneeseen ja puutarhaan on heidän keittiönsä läpi.

Very nice place for a big group we had 8
So nice to be able to all be together in the Big City!

Beautiful area in central Harlem — a super nice and calm neighborhood with no tourists and a lovely park just next door. The building and apartment are both beautiful and equipped with everything you might need. It feels like a good hotel with a touch of home.
Thanks, Jordan, for all your help and support during our stay.

Anthony was a great host and the apartment was a perfect Brooklyn get away. When our original AirBnB canceled at the the very last minute Anthony was quick to respond to get us in. The apartment is so close to great  food and entertainment. The apartment was clean and large for a NY apartment and the neighborhood felt safe and full of diverse families. The bed was very comfortable and for a bonus Anthony left beer in the fridge. We have friends in the neighborhood and will defiantly be returning.

If you’re looking for a private, quiet, but beautiful place to stay, i highly recommend! It’s close to different food spots regardless of your tastes & is close to the Bus line that takes you directly to the station off Utica & Eastern. Overall a wonderful stay!
The location is fantastic, and it’s nice for the price. Bonus point that you can leave your luggage for 7 dollars per 24 hours
when I arrived I couldn't check in with my reservation had to wait a while

Jehan was a great host, the place was clean and well located. It is a cozy home. The check-in was smooth as it was made with a key lock. I totally recommend the place as it was close to the subways, 15 min walk too.
Great place! Great location, comfortable bed, good AC, good shower. It’s compact but it works when you’re not spending much time there.
Cozy, clean, comfortable for my short stay.  Safe area, very walkable, and lots of stores which makes it convenient.  Would stay again!

Perfect spot with all the amenities for a home away from home trip. Close to subway, local shops and restaurants, easy to get to everywhere. Great backyard area for morning coffee. Easy communication with Katherine on check in and out, thank you!!

Marie's place was great and she was an excellent host. Checked in with us to make sure everything was ok, very easy to communicate with, and provided clear instructions. Perfect location, clean, accurate to the listing - highly recommend!

The room was perfect with everything we needed.
Melissa is a great host as well as her mother.
The Airbnb is 8 min walk from the metro station and you can reach Manhattan in about 45min.
I will definitely come back if I need a place in New York!
Great place with quiet rooms
Perfect apartment, in the heart of financial district! Very nice experience with check in and support when needed. We felt like home. Thank you!

Reserve este apartamento por su cercanía con el aeropuerto, para alojarme una noche, no esta tan alejado de la estación de metro, tuve que pillar taxi por la hora en que llegue, pero si no hay mucha prisa existe un autobús que le  deja muy cerca de la casa el Q6, que tiene una parada justo al salir de la estación Jamaica Van Wyck. De la anfitriona solo tengo  palabras de agradecimiento, y que llegue a las 17 horas y mi vuelo salía a las 19, ella me llevo  al aeropuerto al ver mi preocupación, sin su  ayuda posiblemente  hubiese perdido el vuelo, la sensibilidad y comprensión de la anfitriona lo mejor.

Der Aufenthalt in der Wohnung war wunderbar. Die Gemütlichkeit und Sauberkeit der Unterkunft haben unseren Aufenthalt sehr angenehm gemacht. Dean hat bereits vor unserer Ankunft sich um alles gekümmert und bei Fragen stets schnell geantwortet, sodass wir unsere Zeit hier wirklich genossen und die Unterkunft uneingeschränkt weiterempfehlen können.
Vielen Dank für alles!

Excelente lugar para hospedarse, un barrio tranquilo, la mayoría de la gente habla español. Bastantes lugares de comida y supermercados en la zona. La línea del metro esta a unas cuantas cuadras (6 minutos caminando). Obtuvimos excelente respuesta del anfitrión, muy buena comunicación.
Great spot with lots to do close by
더없이 다정하고 친절한 호스트와 그의 작은 강아지덕에 뉴욕여행의 기억이 더 완벽해졌습니다. 2주가량 묵었는데 아주 편안하고 즐거웠어요. 호스트 keturah에게 감사하며, 그녀의 엄마에게도 안부전합니다!
Very enjoyable stay at Alan's brownstone apartment.  Close to where I needed to go and comfortable amenities!

Staying at Petronas was nice and quite. The room was spacious and sharif the bathroom with the other rooms was not a problem at all. All the rooms that we is renting are on the same floor which is separated from the household and it gives you the freedom to come and go whenever you want without disturbing anyone. It’s like having a separate home where only guests stay! Great deal! Would definitely recommend if you are travelling on a budget!

This airbnb is incredibly overpriced for what it is and is in need of serious maintenance and deep cleaning. I’ve traveled a lot from my early 20s, including to NYC, and for the first time in my life I decided to leave a property after check-in.
The property is in poor condition with low-quality stained pieces of furniture, and many scratches on the walls. AC units and bathrooms have visible dirt. The 3rd king bedroom in the basement has moldy smell and no bathroom despite being accessed by narrow steep stairs.
ACs and the washer didn’t work, despite the host sending somebody to fix them, they couldn’t manage. We even saw a woodlouse in the living room.
I was most shocked by the condition of the Patio, it is covered with moss and leaking water, making it unusable.(I hope I could share the photos here)
FYI, you can find more guest reviews on Maison(the main host)’s profile, based on my experience the communication has improved but similar issues mentioned there are still occuring.
Overall comfortable stay and accurate listing that offers the necessary amenities.  Host is very attentive and responsive.

The house was very inviting. House was clean with plenty of room. We had 1 small issue. Due to the rain the landscaping company did not mow the yard before we arrived. I contacted Anna and she had it taken care of the same day. There is construction going on across the street at night. There’s not a lot you can do about that. Neighborhood was nice and peaceful otherwise. This was my families 1st time in New York so we did not know what to expect. All amenities were as noted in the listing. The 2 bathrooms were a must for us so they were both clean and as described. The home is close to the beach and subway. However if you have long thick hair you may want to bring your own hair dryer. We would stay at this home again.
Thanks Anna

There is really not enough words to describe how satisfied we were with Marlyns place!! Everything was sooo clean and the house was stocked with breakfast food for us to cook and eat!! We loved this house so much!!! Marlyns hospitality was top tier and I couldn’t ask for a better host!!! Literally the best Airbnb I’ve ever stayed in!!! Book this home, you will not be disappointed!! Can’t wait to visit and book this home again!! If I could give 100 stars I would!!!
We had a great stay. Very clean apartment, lots of space.

Perfect for two people. It is walking distance to deli, shops, central park...
It gave us a nice sense of home away from home.
Outside walk way is too dark at the night. After that it’s really good I will recommend this place.

Visiting family in Bay Ridge and Nassau County. Found Olivia’s place it has a great location with easy access to the subway. Trips to the city were quick and trips throughout Brooklyn were a breeze. The neighborhood is cute, safe full of bars, shops and restaurants…
Pro tip: Frankies 457 is an institution and delivered in every way. You’ve seen their olive oil in stores and they are steps away from Olivia’s front door.
Will stay again.
Great place for a quick NYC stay! So close to everything!
Excellent location and very high quality rooms!

Nate was a fantastic host and the place was wonderful. I would highly recommend staying here! We had a suite with our own bathroom that was equipped with everything that we might have needed. The common room between suites was always stocked with coffee, snacks, etc.. Nate was kind and accommodating during our stay. Would definitely stay here again!

Very convenient for walking and subway. Some street noise during the night due to proximity to street. Justin was very friendly and responsive. The linens and towels were high quality cotton and much appreciated.
Super séjour chez Untitled. Petite chambre moderne et agréable, avec tout ce qu'il faut à disposition. Très bon petit dej et barista!

todo muy bien
esperemos regresar pronto al alojamiento de Jennifer
The stay here was great! Very accessible and easy to communicate with the hosts! Will book again! :)
Hamid was very friendly and made my stay in this beautiful area even better! Seriously one of the best Airbnb experiences I’ve had, highly recommend!

I really enjoyed my stay here. The location is on a peaceful street in Williamsburg, which meant that I had a quiet oasis to recharge at the end of every day. It's about 20-30 minutes to the East/West village, and the surrounding area is walkable and safe. Note there's no kitchen access which is clearly stated and communicated, and was perfectly fine for me as I go to NYC to eat out. The room is spacious, which is hard to find in this city.
I would definitely recommend this place to a friend.
So great🙂‍↕️

Amazing place and amazing host!! He was very flexible, helpful, responsive. He made the stay amazing and the place is amazing. Very clean and spacious. I stayed here with my wedding party and we had an Amazing experience. I would recommend this place and this host!

David's appartment is in my favourite part of New York :-)
It has New York flair and was quite old, but we could even spend a few days with 4 people. David gave us many recommendations that we could use during our stay. Thanks for hosting us, David!
Muy céntrico.

perfektná poloha nebol problém z ničím
za túto cenu v NY C topka
Todo genial.
Beautiful view with lots of space—local grocery stores to get what you need without driving. The building has excellent amenities. Very responsive and proactive host.
Wonderful place to stay near JFK Airport! It save me after my flight was delayed! Highly recommended!
Lovely environment and the place was super clean.
absolutely wonderful person. great spot to stay at. couldn't ask for a nicer host
Good simple spot in midtown nyc. Hosts were great, easy check in, great communication.
O luke é um anfitrião perfeito, sempre muito solícito e prestativo.  A localização da casa foi ótima para conhecer todos os pontos turísticos
Très bien situé, dès que nous manquions de quelque chose notre hôte nous à toujours répondu rapidement tout en répondant à nos attentes
Elsa and her husband are great hosts - attentive and hospitable, while not being "in-your-face".
Quiet neighborhood, well-appointed kitchen, comfortable bed. We enjoyed our stay here and would recommend it to others.

I enjoyed my stay at Leah's place.  She made it easy to enter the house and was instantly available whenever I needed to contact her.  The room is at the top of a flight of stairs, was nicely furnished with a single bed, desk and bureau, and had comfortable heat and a window AC.  Unfortunately, there was a plumbing emergency shortly after I arrived, and the water had to be shut off for several hours.  Leah made it a priority to communicate with me about this, and she gave me a partial refund to compensate, which I had not asked for.   Her family had their own things to do, so there was not a lot of interaction about touristy stuff, but I know the area and didn't need help.  The house is right on a bus route and is a half mile from the subway station where there are some restaurants and stores.  It's a nice residential neighborhood and I enjoyed walking to the house near midnight as well as during the day.  I'd be happy to stay there again.
Inez's place is a great place to stay. Highly recommend it!
Estuve allí 5 noches. Todo bien, personal amable. Lo unico regular o mal fue el café que se sirve en el desayuno; café muy malo, flojo. Por lo demás, estuvo bien
je vous le conseille

Very good location. It is 20 mins away from Times square when there is no traffic. The room is clean and has everything (fridge, water, microwave,…). The building itself is ok and Juan keeps in touch with you to make sure everything is ok and if you need anything.
Quiet, private room with a comfortable bed, this was a nice place to stay after long days out and about. However, it wasn’t very clean when I arrived, which was dissappinting.
Great and clean, very nice place

I enjoyed staying in Laura’s home. I was able to meet her when I arrived and she was flexible about letting me check in a little early. The shared bathroom was large and charming with a large updated shower. The bed was very comfortable and I slept well every night. She was very friendly as were the other guests.
Awesome place lots to offer. Great location. Thanks so much🤙🏽
Great!

I had a 2500$ rates for 4 days with 2room
And finally I paid 3500$ !!!! 1000$ of extra vost with 85% of them were fees.
It’s not a fair way to proceed

Florrie’s place is an absolute must stay! The apartment is spacious, light and airy and very tastefully decorated. It’s within walking distance easily to dumbo and York metro station so perfect for getting into the city. Florrie is a fantastic, super helpful host who made my birthday stay in New York just perfect. Would definitely love to stay here again!
Always totally responsive, Louise’s is all you could ask for in a host. The place is thoughtfully outfitted in a great location for visiting my family.
The place was very cool. It was pristine and homey. Ron was very accommodating to our check in time and needs.
No issues what so ever.  Close to the Subway.   Quiet at night.
It was delightful to meet Cynthia and her family. She was a perfect host and very accommodating. The room was spacious and the location was perfect for us.
Very cozy space located next to a subway station. Good coffee shop across the street and a good neighborhood

Hotel room was great, very clean, and all the amenities spot on. The location is great, very close to Times Square and all the other attractions in Manhattan. The staff was very friendly and host our luggages some hours before the check in. Definitely recommend it for the price and quality. Thank you for hosting us😊

Yvonne showed good hospitality and was very communicative. The place was neat and tidy but it was cluttered with so many air fresheners and room fragrances everywhere, it was very intoxicating and hard to breathe. There's no need to have 5 air fresheners inside a bedroom. The other issue was it was a bit noisy.
Great stay, great host. Highly recommend!
We were very happy with the apartment. It was a great place to hang out with our daughter while visiting her in Brooklyn.

Ode is a very helpful and friendly host. Ask him any questions and he will do his best to help out. He really cares about making his guests feel welcomed and comfortable. The location is quiet and peaceful. The room is cozy and has a nice balcony which was a great addition. A lot of stores and restaurants are within walking distance. There is a beautiful park 30 seconds away from the place. I highly recommend Ode's place and look forward to staying here again soon. He and his wife ensure to maintain the cleanliness of the property as well.
I appreciate all the attention, he is a great host!

We really enjoyed the apartment. It was clean, comfortable and had all the necessities and amenities and some nice touches - cold bottled water in the refrigerator. The street the apartment is on is light industrial, so not the greatest. It did feel safe and was quiet.  However the location is decent for south slope. It is an easy to walk to all the great stores and restaurants around Park Slope. The apartment was a 20ish minute walk to Prospect Park, so that was great. Subway and bus access are good so we had no issue getting around. Overall, we were very happy and Jose was a responsive and helpful host.
Great stay. The host was available and willing to help w all the questions I had. The space was beautiful and very clean & we felt extremely comfortable
Good location and well connected

Nette, saubere Unterkunft in guter Lage. super Preis-Leistungsverhältnis. Die Kommunikation ist leider sehr schlecht, die Rezeption ist meistens nicht besetzt, man hat bei Problemen keinen  Ansprechpartner. Auf E-Mails wird nur zögerlich reagiert. In unserem Zimmer piepste der Rauchmelder 18 Stunden  lang (teilweise im Sekundentakt und sehr schrill), bevor  man Abhilfe schaffte. An Schlaf war nicht zu denken.

We had a great stay at Ame's house, beautiful cozy home with spacious and bright rooms. Also the kitchen is very well equipped you can see she is passionate about food. Convenient location close to 2 metro stations which we used quietly even late in the evening. Ame very helpful and kind, we will come back to her on our next visit to NYC.

Ester's house is the best you can find. The room was nice, clean and the bed really confortable! Roosevelt Island is quiet and safe, and you'll be able to reach Manhattan in just a subway stop.
You'll be warmly welcomed by Ester, an amazing host! It is hard to find some better place than this.

Tony ist ein äußerst angenehmer und freundlicher Gastgeber. DIe Unterkunft ist ein pittoreskes, großes  Haus, so, wie auf den Bildern zu sehen ist. Die Umgebung der Unterkunft ist sehr stilvoll und ruhig. Tony hat mir eine ausführliche Tour durch das Haus gegeben, so dass ich über alles bescheid wusste. Die Unterkunft und Tony als Gastgeber sind sehr zu empfehlen!
Lovely light-filled apartment--great location and well-priced.

Våra dagar hos Joaquin och John var fantastiska. De bjöd på ett vackert boende, ett superbt värdskap och mysiga omgivningar! Boendet var väldigt rent och området kändes tryggt. Joaquin var ytterst omhändertagande och hjälpsam. Han var väldigt mån om att vi skulle få en så bra vistelse som möjligt och tog sig tid att hjälpa till med alla våra frågor och mer därtill. Joaquin förgyllde verkligen vår vistelse i New York! Vi kunde inte önskat oss något bättre boende och kan varmt rekommendera andra att boka detta ställe.
Amazing place! Really clean, silent, and amazing location
Spacious and cozy house in a great location!

Wayne’s place was perfect for a holiday weekend getaway. Upon us arriving Wayne was outside and greeted us. The accommodations are pristine, the furniture is so comfortable, and everything that I thought I forgot was already provided. I will certainly stay at Wayne’s again.

We had a fantastic stay at Maria’s AirBnb. She was extremely prepared and responsive, and she had no problem accommodating our last minute change in guest plans. The apartment was beautifully appointed and spotless, and it had everything we could need. The kitchen had all the necessary cooking utensils, the linen closet was fully stocked and the bathroom was relaxing. We would absolutely stay at Maria’s brownstone apartment again the next time we are in Brooklyn.
Angela est tres réactive ! Et la chambre est très propre, et Angela avait mis des petits gel douche et shampoing c’est très gentil de sa part ! Et des boissons aussi ! Je recommande

Michael and Busser are great hosts. We enjoyed our stay in NYC. Everything is close by and easy access to subway to get you through the city. The bed was very comfortable and very big that provided us with the much needed rest after long walks throughout the day. Would recommend this place to others! Thank you for having us!

Super beautiful apartment! The place was spotless and very clean. Only thing is two flights of steps for anyone who has a hard time to climb. We were able to get up the just fine! Daniel was very nice and made sure to call ahead to make sure we were ok and ready for checking! 10/10 recommend!
Immaculate, lovely apartment. We enjoyed our stay very much.

John and his wife were a super host that ease our stay in New York! They were super responsive, the neighborhood is amazingly beautiful and their place is super clean, organized and can accommodate two people without any issues! Surely when I’m back, I’ll stay at John’s again!
Great as before once again the only issue was parking but once we got there it was a great time and a great place

Jakir is an outstanding host. Very proactive with great communication, directions, and recommendations. The Apartment looks exactly like the photos and is spotless. I’d highly recommend this place to everyone who is looking for a wonderful apartment in Greenpoint/Brooklyn.

Really nice condo in Bowery, near Chinatown and Little Italy. It was clean and has everything what we needed. Also the staff was very helpful. Just one remark, apartment is on the second floor, and on the other side of the street there is a club so it's quite loud at weekends, other days are fine. Besides that I really recommend this place

the place was comfortable and easy to access when visiting NY, the host was very open to accommodate us in early and laye check outs. However, a good improvement for the place to perhaps change several of the furnishing as some of them looks a bit old. Overall an easy and nice stay!

It is the perfect size and location.  Laura was kind enough to move out the dining set up so that i had an office space to work from home all week.  The welcome wine and little touches were very much appreciated!

Great place to stay to walk to the Apollo and close to subway. We felt safe and secure and the home was very nice and clean. Anitra and Steven were very responsive and helpful. We would definitely stay again!

The place is in Upper West Side, right next to Central Park with easy commute to downtown and uptown. We had some difficulty in finding exact location since airbnb map indicated adjacent building. David was always responsive. The dryer did not work. David's worker took clothes to another place and got them dried. However, it required last minute running around to ensure we are able to receive the clothes before we leave. One needs to make adjustment for luggage, If sofa cum bed is open, the space to move around is limited. Kitchen is virtually non-existent. Even prior to booking I had asked about kitchen space  based on an earlier review. The stove is at one end of the room, the refrigerator and microwave at another end. There is no kitchen slab to work on. The sink for washing dishes is a bathroom sink and not a typical kitchen sink. It requires some jugglery to wash the dishes and keep them clean. I wish David had been fully transparent on this aspect before booking.
A perfect location - 15 doors down from our son's flat.  Short walk to the subway.  Quiet neighborhood.  It was a great Brooklyn experience.
We had a great stay for the week. The place was comfortable and nice. We loved the fact that it was very close to subway. Devora was very communicative during the whole trip which we appreciated.
My wife and I loved being able to walk anywhere or hop on the train in minutes. We really enjoyed our time at David's home. It had a real NY feel to it.

The place is nice, right in the middle of Manhattan, half a block from Madison Square Garden. It is clean, it is affordable (considering the prices of hotels in the same area) and it is nice.
I could have used a second pillow, as the only way to watch the tv is to use the one and only small fluffy pillow they provide to lean against the opposite wall. No space in the room for a chair, a desk or a place to work on a laptop, except for a tiny side table with two small drawers.
The sink in the room is practical and almost (but not quite) compensates for having to share the bathroom with 4 other rooms.
They provide cool water bottles, coffee and tea 24/7. That is nice. The hostess are neutral and friendly and know their way around the reservations.
The location is simply difficult to beat, you can walk eveywhere from the hotel.
Really great neighborhood. Close to everything. Easy to check in, was plenty comfortable for our family of three.
Good price, nice accommodations, very communicative host!
Great place to stay!

Le logement est grand. Cuisine et salon agréables et bien équipés.
Salle de bain partagée entre 3 chambres et 2 toilettes, tout à fait gérable.
Transports en commun efficaces pour Midtown.
Great place and very close to the Park. We would definitely stay here again!

Super séjour dans la location de Gabriel ! Tout était top!
Chambre et douche spacieuses 👍🏼.
Emplacement idéal.🇺🇸
Quartier sympa tout en étant au calme.
Nous reviendrons 👍🏼🇺🇸✈️🇺🇸

Our stay at Kirsten’s apartment was truly exceptional, it was truly one of my best Airbnb experiences. The space is even better than the photos suggest: well-equipped, and thoughtfully arranged to ensure the comfort and well-being of guests. The location is excellent, just a short walk from the subway. Kirsten and her husband were absolutely wonderful hosts: warm, attentive, and always available whenever we had a question. We will definitely recommend this place to others and look forward to staying here again on future trips to New York.
Great location! Quiet, comforting, and wonderful hosts!
Good place
Everything was superb!
Highly recommend for staying in New York City. The views from the suite were breathtaking. The location was right in the middle of it all!
I had very pleasant experiences stay at Andrew’s place, the house is nice and clean, matches the description. Andrew was nice and responsive, thanks Andrew! High recommend this place!

Me and my husbnad had a great stay at Nana and KY's place. It was walkable to the subway, and so we awere able to viait ao many iconic places in NY.  The room.was small as described in the listing. The host was quick to respond to query during check in. The reatroom.and toilet were very clean and feee of clutter. The neighborhood was fair and i felt safe walking. I would go back to this place when i visit NY again .

Great stay. Rooftop bar was our favorite part of our time here. The room was small, yes. But this is NYC you’re not paying for space you’re paying for location and amenities. It was perfect for what we needed. I actually liked the luxurious but cozy feel to the place, it wasn’t overwhelming. The hotel was very close to where we had plans. The hotel staff were very friendly and responsive. Had a minor issue with the toilet early morning and maintenance came right up immediately and fixed it in no time. Check in and out were very easy and simple. We didn’t get a chance to try the restaurant or any food at the rooftop bar but the drinks were great and worth the price. The place is beautiful top to bottom. We will definitely be staying here again.

great place for short time staying in NYC, esp for zen and yogis. The staircases should be noted if you are not young anymore and struggling with your luggages. In my case, i was helped to bring up and down by the managing staffs. Thanks a lot. Absolutely recommend!

The room is quite large, which is a good thing since there isn't any other communal space in the house. The kitchen is quite small and is located next to one of the bedrooms, which makes it an unpleasant place to be. The main door was faulty and was easily left open by others, which made me feel anxious as I had difficulty opening it once and was stuck for about 20 minutes until Tina, who was fortunately responsive, told me to kick it hard to open it if it got stuck again. There were some stains on the bed, but there were enough blankets and sheets. Despite the lack of heating, the location is great and the room is large, so I didn't feel uncomfortable while there

We loved our stay at Anthony’s place! A pretty apartment on a quiet street in East Harlem and 10 minutes walking from the subway, it was the perfect base for us to explore NYC during our stay. Anthony and his wife were both lovely, proactively communicative and great with recommendations for places to go. It was the perfect Airbnb experience - would highly recommend!

Greg was very nice and helpful since this was my first time staying in an airbnb. A beautiful home, clean and decorated nicely..
I would recommend staying at his home.
Very clean, quiet, and nice place to stay. Super close to JFK, which was really convenient. Eliana is very nice and easy to reach. Had a comfortable stay and would definitely recommend.
Place was very nice and fulfilled expectations!
Sábanas de cama limpias, lugar muy limpio y cama y almohadas muy cómodas, excelente ubicación, si lo recomiendo.
Great location
Fantastic location,  great to have the outdoor terrace, host was responsive to us immediately.  I would readily here again.

The room was exactly as advertised and was very comfortable. The bathroom glass had a glass color that allowed privacy. The location was very convenient. I would definitely book it again, it was exactly what we needed for our stay in NY.

Great location and space. Even extended an extra day!
Thank you
Host is super, super good check-in, unit is super clean and convenient and stylish.  Neat safe area in Brooklyn.  Would stay again. Thank you
Excelente lugar para pasar la noche en NYC

This was the perfect place for our NYC visit! Great, quiet neighborhood with plenty of shops and restaurants to explore within easy walking distance. The place was immaculate and the hosts were so nice and responsive. Great choice for families!

Great location and very clean. A couple things to consider before booking, $5/day for internet, $25 for an extra key, $7 per bag if you need to drop your lugage a bit earlier than your check in time. Other than that, it’s ok, the description is very accurate.
Had such a great time, the place is perfect for 2 people. 5 stars and will definitely be going back soon.

Location location and location once more! Close to Empire State Building, MSG, walkable to Time Square, Flatiron and Bryant Park. It’s small apartment and despite having a window it was dark inside but it doesn’t matter since we were there only at nights. Host is extremely responsive and helpful. AC didn’t work first night but it was fixed immediately. After it was fixed it was cooling the room well but it’s a bit loud. In the offer no hair dryer was mentioned but there was in the apartment. All in all, it’s a great value for this price. Thank you, Eliza, for being so supportive!

What a beautiful home! I loved all the details and thought into making our stay as wonderful as it was. The space was immaculate. Seamless check in and out. It was a pleasure staying here and it was conveniently located near great shops and a subway station so we got around the city fast. Thanks for having us, would definitely stay again.

내가 겪은 에어비앤비 중에 최고였음

Ame’s place was a delightful place to land after a long day of traveling.  The room and private bathroom were very clean, spacious, and comfortable. Ame was lovely, gave great local recommendations, and was very accommodating. Will definitely stay again next time I’m in the area!
Fantastic spot right next to the subway, couldn't recommend it more for a trip to the city.

Appartamento come da descrizione, le camere sono enormi e comode, la cucina piccola, il patio poco utilizzabile, andrebbe ripulito un po'.
Ciò che ci ha colpito negativamente è la via in cui è l"appartamento. Via abbandonata, solo pochi negozi locali, homeless ovunque. La possibilità di uscire la sera per mangiare in un posto vicino é pari allo zero. Bisogna prendere la metro sempre.
Abbiamo preso taxi e Uber per arrivare e tutti ci hanno sconsigliato quella zona, purtroppo....
Se decidi di prendere questo app per vedere new York secondo me è un po' scomodo, Manhattan, Williamsburg o Dumbo distano almeno 40 min di metro ogni volta.

I'm a fan of the area. The proximity to the park is unbeatable. The lodging itself is fine. Although the bathroom and kitchen are shared (as described in the listing), the room I stayed in was spacious. There were two other guests and a renter on the same floor for at least one of the nights I was there.
While I was there, the cold water knob of the shower didn't work. Since this didn't bother me, I never asked Javier to fix it. He may not have been aware of the problem.

Excelente anfitrión, nos encanto, muy recomendado, el lugar, el sector, cerca de la estación y muy seguro el lugar. Mi próxima visita a la ciudad que me encanta me quedaría muy tranquila en este hospedaje
Great
Perfect place to stay in manhattan under budget.

Un petit studio très bien situé à 10min de Times Square et de The High Line. Hôte très sympathique qui donne toute les précisions nécessaires pour trouver du premier coup l'appartement. Un très bon rapport qualité-prix !

Super accueil par Mark alors que nous sommes arrivés tard. Le logement est très bien situé et facile d’accès pour se rendre sur Manhattan. Il est aussi très propre et dispose de tout ce dont on a besoin pour le petit déjeuner. Nous avons passé une très bonne semaine.

on maps, two blocks away from the airbnb, you can walk around what is called little dominican republic. theres a nice park you can walk around and let your thoughts flow. the place was very comfy and the host is hella coo! coo place to play a bunch of retro games and chill.
Very nice stay in a clean apartment with a nice view from the porch

Staying at Untitled was a great experience overall. You can’t beat the location — subway stops all around you — and since you’re further back the alley, you can’t hear any traffic throughout the night.
The staff was so kind and helpful. And the room itself was just what we needed. We’ll definitely be back!
Really nice apartment and ideal for what we needed. The information Geo gave for check-in was really clear. The location was ideal for us to grab the subway or walk.
Great stay in nice area
Amazing Brooklyn stay—close to Prospect Park, transportation, shops/restaurants. Clean, comfy and great hosts—we’ll return!

Place worked out for perfect for us. We basically used the apartment to sleep. We had other family events taking place. Apartment was a short walk to the subway. Very convenient in that regard. We didn’t do any  cooking at the apartment, only used the coffee pot. Apartment was very neat and clean. Great communication; fast response to any questions we had. Apartment was smaller than we anticipated, but that was OK as we really didn’t spend much time there. Would definitely rent from them again.

This was my second start here — a good indication I hope of how much I love this place.  It’s a perfect Brooklyn walk-up — somehow peaceful and quiet and just outside of the bustle of Greenpoint but also right in the thick of it too.  The apartment has a lovely layout, light, and views.  Beds were comfy, kitchen was good for us, and the outdoor patio felt special.  Hope to return here again soon!
Beautiful place in the heart of Williamsburg. Would stay again.

Tee’s Oasis is truly a home-away oasis. The house was spotless and without clutter, but it was still furnished like a home where people live. The decor was on point and everything felt amazing. All the rooms had either a fan or AC unit or both so it never felt claustrophobic or too hot.
One comment my group of friends made was that it felt nicer than a hotel and better than their own house. And truly it was. I genuinely have nothing bad to say about the place and I most definitely would book again if I had to stay in the area again. By far, my best experience with any Airbnb or hotel. Truly recommend and the pricing is quite reasonable if you are a group of people.
Do be conscious that it is close to JFK so you can hear planes a lot during the day and quite loudly, so if you’re a light sleeper maybe take that into account.
Otherwise this stay was a 5 star, absolute recommendation.
Andy was very helpful and the room was very clean!

Shanti and Mohd were terrific, responsive, and helpful hosts throughout my stay. Shanti provided clear instructions for check-in and was available to answer any questions. The bed was extremely comfortable, and the linens were high quality. The kitchen was fully stocked with everything needed to prepare meals, and the living area was cozy and perfect for relaxing after a long day of exploring. I also appreciated the fast Wi-Fi, which made it easy to stay connected.
Overall:
I highly recommend Shanti’s Place to anyone looking for a home away from home. Thank you for a fantastic experience!
Sids place really exceeded my already positive expectations. Spacious and very well decorated and kept up. The location was prime and he was extremely friendly and kind. Great spot!
Would stay there again. Highly recommend!
very good place to stay

Really enjoyed the stay. Spacious apartment and a great location - lots of great restaurants and bars nearby. The Kasa team were also fantastic, the self-checkin process was really seamless and they were always very responsive for any questions.
Hosts nice people, no issue whatsoever, accurate service, I would underline how responsive and easygoing they're

This was my third stay at Diane's cottage, and it was awesome as usual--maybe even better because the kitchen was redone and there is a new washer/dryer! Diane is very responsive and accommodating, and City Island is really a unique jewel in a corner of New York City. The off-street parking is a huge plus for anyone coming with a car, and, depending on the season, the backyard is great for breakfast!
Mi familia y yo la pasamos muy bien, pasamos unos días de relax absoluto, realmente recomiendo 100% .

Everything about the inside of the apartment was really nice and Lisa is super responsive. Many small things like boxes of tissues, lots of towels, smart (although small) TV that worked well with our AppleTV, well-stocked kitchen, and 3 air conditioners, all made for a pleasant stay. Wifi speed was decent (no issue with streaming shows when we wanted).
We stayed for 10 days and found that with nothing to look out at, not much in the neighborhood to walk to (other than a couple small bodegas and a fantastic grocery story), combined with an area that could feel sketchy, made us feel cramped. Subway to other parts of Brooklyn or Manhattan was an easy 10 minute walk but meant that once we left, we were gone for the day. Once we got back, we were back for the night. Not much in this area.
No issues with street parking other than having to move on the two days a week for street cleaning. We could always find a spot on the street, which saved a lot of money compared with a garage.
It is a perfect place to stay for a visit in New York and made our trip really uncomplicated and enjoyable. Thank-you!
fantastic location with easy and simple check in. would definitely stay again.

We had an amazing stay! The unit was cozy and comfortable, and a very short walk away from the nearest subway station. The neighborhood felt very safe and there were many great restaurants within walking distance. Both hosts were very responsive and helpful. Would stay again!

Eric was an awesome host! He responded to all of my messages pretty quickly. The place was very clean and cozy. The location was pretty close to a train station, stores, and restaurants. We appreciate Eric’s hospitality.

I was not happy with the location. Day one had 1 big dead roach & 2 large live ones. I had to sleep elsewhere until place was fogged. The the bathroom ceiling caved in leaving a large hole in the ceiling only slightly covered with a board. The location is an old building infested with roaches and will probably callapse again. Host was not honest about the date of being able to cancel and kept all cash even though I checked out 3 weeks early due to ceiling callasping and roaches. I do not reccommend staying here...
Good clean place near the airport

Slight issue on arrival but Soli was responsive and had it sorted quickly. We spent five days here sightseeing and exploring the city. The apartment was actually bigger than I was expecting, very comfortable for myself, my husband and our two teenage sons. The location was brilliant we walked most places but there were lots of Subway stations close by which allowed us to get all over the city. The building was clean and quiet, no noisy neighbours and we didn't notice street noise at all. Sad to leave the city behind we had an amazing time and would love to return.
Location was steps away from the subway. Jermaine was friendly and easy to communicate with throughout. Apartment had water and snacks on arrival which was very thoughtful!
Très bon séjour au sein d’Untitled, je reviendrai avec plaisir !
Beautiful brownstone house, full of character and comfort. the bed was really comfortable. very well taken care of.

Location, location, location!!! And yes a very lovely/ hands on host who will make sure your always smiling!! Beautiful apartment with tons to do in the local neighborhood. Some of the best restaurants/nightlife all within walking distance.
Kaz was a great host! Excellent stay in a decent residential area.

This apartment of Mary's is wonderful. I miss it already and hope to return. We were in Brooklyn for medical treatment for my daughter and having a clean, private and peaceful place to retire to after treatment was very important for our situation. Whoever cleans the apartment is excellent. I am picky about cleanliness and once was in a filthy AirBnb 5 years ago (that a friend booked) and I will never let that happen again. I take time to read reviews, closely look at photos, etc before I book. Mary was always kind and returned my message quickly. The little back patio is wonderful, the bathroom and full kitchen was clean and perfect for our needs and the beds, pillows, linens, etc were lovely. I highly recommend this apartment, located in safe part of town with a pretty, short walk to the train and other stores through sweet little neighborhoods. We hope to return on holiday someday. Thank you so much, Mary!
I enjoyed my time there and felt safe as a solo traveller. No problems with shared bathroom. Cleaner was lovely and welcoming.  A great base and I would recommend. Thank you Adam
Had an absolutely fantastic stay and can’t recommend the hotel enough. Brilliant location and fantastic staff.

This studio was just what we needed for our getaway.  Safe neighborhood, walkable to bus stops and Grand Central for getting around and near a couple restaurants that we loved (especially Joe's Coffee Shop 1 short block away for breakfast).  My only negative was that it was on the 4th floor so lots of stairs to get in and out, but otherwise a great place.

Khalid est très gentil et attentionné, et le logement est bien situé, le quartier est sympa et très bien desservi. Le logement est assez rudimentaire, mais si on y vient que pour dormir, c'est ok. Vu les prix des logements à New York, celui-ci reste abordable, correct et propre, même si ce n'est pas le top du confort.
Everything was very nice, clean and comfort. I would recommend staying at Win’s apartment. He helped us with everything we need.

Excelente ubicación si tu objetivo es estar cerca de Times square, Broadway, Central Park y esa zona de NY. Hay metro muy cerca para moverte a otras zonas.
El hotel puede parecer algo viejo en las zonas comunes, pero las habitaciones tienen gran tamaño, son muy limpias y agradables. Sí me quedaría de nuevo en este lugar.

Anthony est disponible et réactif, le logement est bien placé et pour le prix y a de l'espace, une remarque le lit n'est pas confortable, d'avoir l'appartement entier Pour une courte durée est très bien merci Anthony

Luchiano's place is absolutely AMAZING! It is very nice and cozy, looked exactly like the pictures, and is only one mile from my son's college. I intend to stay here on every visit, if available. The best part of the stay, however, was how nice, accommodating, and responsive Luchiano was. He went above and beyond to be a hospitable host. There is nothing that I would change about my stay except maybe wishing that I could have stayed longer.
This had to be ine of my favorite stays in Brooklyn thus far. the space was much bigger than I thought it would be. it gave me studio apartment vibe. I would definitely stay here again.
We really enjoyed our stay at Taran and Najla’s Airbnb! Great communication from the hosts! Would recommend!

JJ’s apartment was absolutely perfect. Beautiful view, great location, very comfortable bed.
JJ gave us very thorough instruction, everything was clear and he was available for us, if we needed anything.
We will definitely come here again, if we visit NYC in the future

Owners were pleasant and helpful.  Place was bigger than what we usually get in this neighborhood so a pleasant surprise. Very clean and comfortable apt, especially since on  one of our days,  it rained all day, so appreciated the great TV room downstairs! Really appreciate there being lots of bath towels-one of our pet peeves in other places. Would definitely stay here again.

Danny's place is amazing- it had everything we needed...even things we didn't know we needed (umbrellas haha). Danny was very responsive (and very proactive with communicating) from the moment of booking until after we left; I knew that if I needed anything or had any questions he was there and happy to help.
I would definitely recommend Danny's place.
Thanks Danny!
It was nice to stay there . Check in was easy and location was good. It’s also close to manhattan.

Firstly Mohammed has been such a kind host very friendly. Any help that I needed he was there to assist me. The house was extremely clean and most importantly I felt safe. I would definitely book again thank you for having me
Listing is very accurate
Great place. Accurate description. Timely communication with host!!

Claudine is an excellent host. Very attentive with quick responses. Her apartment was beautifully decorated. Very up to date and spotless.
Welcomed us to check in early since we weren’t renting a car. (Our host at the 2nd part of our trip was not so accommodating so we had to store luggage for that day) Thanks Claudine!
Didn’t quite know how to sum up the neighborhood upon arrival. Felt a little sketchy but neighbors were nice.
5 minute walk to subway/40-50 minutes to attractions.
El apartamento de Migdalia es tal y como se ve en las fotos, está ordenado y muy limpio. Migdalia es cercana, amable y dispuesta a ayudar en cualquier duda o problema que te surja.
Great location and very good for long-term stays. Erik and Jessica were great hosts!
