Nellita’s place was everything we expected and more! She’s also very attentive and understanding. We enjoyed our stay very much. There’s plenty of convenience stores and supermarkets nearby and there’s a metro station very close which is super convenient. We definitely recommend this place!

We had a great time at Gabriel's place. The location works well with a good coffee place right around the corner.
The place is spacious with a well-equipped kitchen. Gabriel is a great host, super friendly and very responsive. :)
Nice and small for a little getaway. My bf couldn’t stop playing with the basketball.

I stayed at Micah's apartment for 2.5 months and really felt at home there. The space is exactly as it looks in the photos: spacious, super sunny, and designed with a lot of charm. By  New York standards, it's quite quiet in the apartment-- pretty sound-proofed from neighbors and only a bit of construction sounds comes through very occasionally and not intrusively. The doormen are super nice and helpful, which is a touch I didn't realize I would appreciate so much. The location is safe and a very close walk to the beautiful and happening DUMBO waterfront.
Definitely a place to stay but more of a motel 8 interior I’d recommend for the area and where it is located in New York but the price is a bit absurd for what you get.

Staff was extremely kind and assertive. Made the check-in process extremely quick and easy. Also, the photos smashed perfectly. I am very picky on perfection and cleanliness with hotel, definitely loved how clean and spotless the room was. Would recommend!
It was great to stay in Coney Island. The apartament was very cozy and comfortable and Ed and his wife were were kind. Thank you for excellent stay in NY!

En general la estadía estuvo bien, la habitación era cómoda y tenía todo lo necesario, la cama era perfecta para dormir. Otra cosa a destacar es que tenía el metro cerca y era fácil moverse al centro.
En contra es que el vecindario era bastante ruidoso, a veces había ruido hasta tarde por música de los vecinos. Y también tuvimos un mal entendido ya que solicitamos usar la lavandería y por mensaje nos escribieron que estaría disponible desde las 11 AM, abierta en el sótano, por lo que entendimos que deberíamos ir, luego bajó un chico que supongo era el dueño a decirnos que no podíamos estar ahí y que debíamos pagar( sabíamos que teníamos que pagar) pero lo repitió varias veces y lo encontramos grosero. En general no saludaba cuando lo veíamos, y desde donde venimos la gente es más amable.
En general la estadía estuvo bien, solo ocurrió ese incómodo momento.
Perfect host and great place to stay that is super close to the airport!  Would recommend! Thanks Fred! :)

Fabulous place to stay in Brooklyn!
Amazing access to the subway. 3 blocks from the Franklin stop (C line) and 4 blocks from the Nostrand stop (A/C lines). And a short walk to Classon (G line). It’s a great location if you happen to be visiting your kid who’s studying at Pratt in nearby Clinton Hill.
There are 2 rooms upstairs which share a bathroom along a hallway. I stayed in the first room for 4 nights and enjoyed meeting a Brazilian and then a Canadian who were the other Airbnb guests.
The bedroom has great light with a view over the backyard. It’s quiet and comfortable. The shower has good water pressure. Everything was really clean.
Downstairs, you have access to the common room (kitchen/dining/couch area) and the backyard. I was able to keep a few things in the refrigerator which was helpful.
The doggies are adorable. They’re small and friendly.
The whole vibe was enjoyable. To have hosts who are hospitable, gracious, helpful and accommodating, To have fellow travelers who are friendly and conversational. That’s what makes for a memorable airbnb experience.
A great place to experience and explore Brooklyn!
Great place for a fair price. It’s convenient as you’re about 10 min away from Central Park and 25 min away from Times Square. Anthony is also a great and responsive host. I recommend.
A lovely comfortable room, friendly and discrete host, and it's a superb location for accessing the buzzy lower east side. I thoroughly recommend!

This was a great place to stay. Plenty of places to eat in the area. We went to a concert at the Barclays center and we actually walked back. The neighborhood was safe. Loved the room very clean, lots of space and very beautiful decor. We will definitely stay there again.
The place has two nice bedrooms and a large living room and good kitchen
Cool place in a great location!

Quarto legal , acomodou muito bem 4 hóspedes e muito bem localizado.
Obrigado
Great And Nice Everything
great

Marcela was an amazing host, the house was fully stocked and clean. She was very welcoming, quick to response and the house is close to a station with a lovely view of the city. I will definitely be booking here again.

很好的住处。
安静，到海滩非常方便
房间里设施全新，很好用
房东回复也很及时。
总之下次来纽约还会再预订
The apartment had all what we needed for our 6 day stay in the NYC area.  It was convenient to the subway and stores/restaurants. Mia was always responsive and answered all our queries very promptly
Lovely stay. Thank you for being responsive and helpful throughout the stay.
Great place! The deck was beautiful

The room was clean, had lots of storage and included a small heater. The kitchen and bathroom were stocked with the necessities and clean. Check in/out was very easy. Host had great communication, was easy to reach and kind. Would recommend staying with them.
Our stay was wonderful! The place was beautiful, very spacious and with a gorgeous view of the city! Perfect location in the city. Would definitely stay again!

Petite chambre. Air climatisé a fonctionné durant la journée et nous a permis de bien dormir la nuit sans le faire fonctionner. Salle de bain à côté de la chambre. Rhita est très proactive et fait tout pour nous gâter. Métro proche avec accès rapide à Central park et ses environs.

This place is fabulous! The photos don't do it justice. It's very spacious, stylish and we really enjoyed the balcony to the back.
A really lovely leafy area of Harlem, literally 2 mins walk from the subway.
Christopher kept us updated during our stay and has set up the space very cleverly. It felt like an entirely private apartment.
I can't wait to stay again!
She was a very great host had a good time would recommend anyone who come across her house to book it it’s a 5⭐️ and it’s comfortable the heat was on point and parking was easy around.

The listing is misleading. It is hosted by an individual who seems to be reselling basic hotel rooms. Communication was very difficult, the host was very insensitive to our situation. There was a state of emergency declared by the governor asking people not to travel because of severe flooding and flights into the city were cancelled by airlines. We communicated all of this with the host. He was inflexible and unwilling to assist us in any way.  Communication was very hard and complicated because the host pushed it off on to the hotel and the hotel pushed it off on the host. I recommend to book directly with the hotel if you want a hotel room and avoid this host.
Very clean and well kept place. Nice and quiet and perfect place if you are rotating at Wyckoff.
Todo bien excepto por un fee que cobran sin previo aviso

fast alles war stimmig und wie beschrieben. Dank w LAN konnte man sich gut in der Nähe orientieren (Essen, Bahn). Abreise war nicht gelungen, da unsere Verlängerung bis 18.00 storniert wurde. mündlich wurde es dan doch wieder von javier bestätigt. Und die tochter nahm die Verlängerung wieder zurück. Für uns gab es zwei ansprechpersonen, obwohl wohl nur haydi was zu sagen hat.
Fabio is a fantastic host, he's always extremely responsive and tries to help out in any way possible. The place is exactly how he described it and he was so accomodating to any of our requests.
Friendly host and amazing place!
We enjoyed our stay.
Very good Stay

Brian was a lovely host! Very responsive and friendly, he gave me great recommendations and was flexible for checkin/checkout! The place is as described with everything you need and lots of space in the bedroom, the location is very close to Times Square. I’d definitely recommend staying at Brian’s if you’re visiting New York :)

Sabrina was an amazing host. She was very friendly and respected personal space. The room was very spacious and had a great view. The location of Sabrina’s place is perfect for traveling the city of Harlem where transportation was extremely convenient.

My stay was well worth it.  Even though the place is not very modern, it has that warm cozy and quiet feeling and that's what I needed.  I will definitely come back again.  Dionne is also a great host.

Nice and cozy place to stay! The host was very responsive. The only thing was that it was a little too uptown for me so going back and forth to midtown/soho etc. took a little longer than I expected. However the location is near the riverstate park which was nice to go to right after work and just walk or bike along the river. Family friendly area, and stores are pretty close by and I felt safe. Laundry was in the building which is great for nyc and there was an elevator.

Ollie was a great host, super accommodating and provides a great space for you. Laundry is just down the block which is super convenient, and about a 10 minute walk to the A/C train. I had a great experience and would recommend this listing to anyone!
Très bon emplacement. Logement fonctionnel idéal pour les groupes. Très bon rapport qualité prix. Hôte très réactif et professionnel ! Je recommande.

I had a lovely stay at Ting’s place. The space was clean, cozy, and just as described. The location was convenient, and Ting was a great host—responsive and easy to communicate with. Would definitely recommend staying here.
The apartment was clean, well-maintained, and in a great location.

Dawn was extremely accommodating and hospitable! She made sure that my stay would be as comfortable as possible. I love hosts that are prompt and overly communicative. Based on Dawn alone, if I could’ve given the place 6 stars, I would. I’m definitely looking forward to staying here again.
Great stay! Super clean!

This was such a great place stay that I hate to tell anyone about it.   But the apartment is beautiful, the location is convenient, and the host very responsive. A perfect place to stay in Brooklyn/NYC.

Willie is amazing!! Truly!! Incredibly helpful, kind, understanding and compassionate. Willie allowed me to check in a bit early due to some transportation issues and was just perfect altogether! Everything was clean and tidy, the bed was comfortable and it was a nice, spacious apartment. Please book him if you’re traveling to Rosedale or surrounding areas!!

Great location - NYC. Penn Station subway/train and Hudson Yards Subway is five minute walk. 20 minute walk to Time Square. We walked a lot in the area and never felt unsafe. Lots of restaurants and small markets in the area.
Accommodation - Check in and out is super easy, parking lot available on the same block. 4 flights of stairs to get to apartment. Place has 4 bedrooms with clean comfortable double/full beds with clean sheets and towels provided. Plenty of space for luggage and clothes. There is no common area/living room for hanging out and no TV. There is a small kitchen area that has a hot plate, microwave, full size fridge/freezer, electric kettle, and a sink - no coffee maker or toaster. Minimal amount of utensils plates and glassware for all of us and one frying pan for the hot plate, but was more than enough to cook breakfast for two adults and three kids. The rest of the meals we ate out in the neighborhood - awesome pizza place and deli right across the street which the kids really enjoyed. Of the 4 bedrooms only one did not have an AC unit which really made that room unusable in the summer heat. It had a fan and if you left the window open you got a lot of traffic noise (building is on the route for the Lincoln tunnel and there is a police station a block away). We identified this shortfall to the owner. Everything in the bathroom worked fine. Wireless was strong and all electronics connected easily.
The listing states not suitable for children, however, we had a 7, 10 and 11 year old there and they were fine. Each have there own tablet and it connected to the wireless so no one missed the TV, plus we pretty much only slept in the apartment.
Building is old and as others have stated really needs a re-model. It was definitely clean enough and everything was serviceable. If you are expecting high end hotel accommodations this is not the place for you.
For the space we had and the price we paid this is an awesome deal. Two hotel rooms to accommodate our family would have been double the price. Add in the great location and the ability to make meals when you need to and this place is a home run for a family visiting Manhattan. At this price point it gets five stars in all categories except a four in cleanliness as we had to re-wash most of the dishes before using them. Will rent it again on our next Manhattan trip.
Martha und Pat gehören zu den nettesten Menschen die ich je getroffen habe. Sehr herzlich, hilfsbereit und interessant. Ich hoffe, dass wir uns wiedersehen.
Easy to get on the subway if you are looking to go out exploring. Room was nice and big.

If you need an inexpensive place for urban camping with some Columbia grad students, this might be your place.  Lots of great food in the neighborhood, like Absolut Bagels (107th Bway), Mama's Pizza (106th/Amsterdam), and the Hungarian Pastry Shop. Very close to the 110th street 1/9.
Excelente ubicación, limpio y muy cómodo

Ian è un host splendido: è stato molto disponibile e al tempo stesso discreto! Ci ha accolte con un piccolo regalo e poi ci ha permesso di lasciare le valigie nel suo appartamento oltre l’orario di check out.
La zona è tranquilla e silenziosa, con tanta offerta di bar e ristoranti. Diverse stazioni metro vicine alla casa (10-15 minuti a piedi).
È stato un ottimo soggiorno!

I’m a native New Yorker and came back for a weekend for a visit. I’m so glad I chose this air bnb! Clinton was very communicative and the apartment was clean and inviting. Astoria is the best neighborhood!
Highly recommend staying with Paolo and Ria. Very sweet and kind hosts and I felt comfortable and welcomed in their home. Thanks for the hospitality. I hope to stay here again.
Amazing host!
Great location great host
Great place. Andrada really cares and looks after you. Highly recommend it.
Enid is very accommodating and understanding! She adjusted and worked out our last minute request/ arrangements. I highly recommend her place! 💜

This charming room is placed inside the beautiful brownstone building. Alaric was really nice welcoming us and also kindly introduced the house to us. There is so many charms inside the house. The room is not big but enough for two people to sleep and it has an access to the cute garden behind the house. It can be a little far from the Williamsburg and Dumbo area but it is located at the safe neighbor, right next to the Prospect park. We had a great time staying there.
todo super padre.... Mill Gracias  ubicación,  servicio..TODO

I took a long weekend trip with a friend and our stay at at Uri’s was great! It’s a clean, cozy place to come back to after a long day in NYC. We had everything we needed in the apartment. Communication with Uri was amazing! I changed my plans on what time I was going to check in several times and he was very accommodating. The neighborhood had everything we needed. There are several shops for anything you need and a couple restaurants close if you are hungry. The people in the neighborhood were friendly and welcoming. I felt like we made some new friends in the shops and the little grill we grabbed breakfast in. The walk to the subway station was a short stroll. I also felt very safe because the lighting is good and it’s close to the apartment.  There is nothing I can complain about! Uri is an amazing host. You won’t be disappointed if you choose to stay there.
It was nice I lost a lot of thing in the room she helped me to get it’s a great place
A great place to stay …..💯🥇
Great deal. Historic feeling building and neighborhood. Close to restaurants and subway. 10/10

Todo fue excelente.
Volvería alojarme.
Gracias Starr!!
Great Value for the Price! The room is very spacious and Johari is always helpful and responsive.

My family stayed to celebrate a great milestone birthday for my mother. Parking was great in driveway. Kitchen large comfortable to prepare meals. Mr. Colin was very responsive to questions asked. It was a very lovely stay. Would go back again.

Great host! Flexible check in, and even had snacks for us. Great location, but a bit sketchy on the street (especially at night).
She even had snacks for us in the room.
Great place to land and rest after a weekend in NYC!  Friendly, welcoming and communicative hosts.  Bed was particularly comfortable!  Appreciated the proximity to the subway.

Nous avons séjourné 4 nuits dans cet Hôtel à l’emplacement idéal: simple et agréable, chambre cosy , trés propre, service impeccable.
En bonus: des échanges et un accueil sympathiques!
Si nous revenons à NY prochainement, je ne chercherai pas à dormir ailleurs. Merci! vous avez aussi participé à ce que ce séjour soit trés agreable. NY est incroyable❤️
Mr. Rawn is a great host. Friendly and helpful. Location is good. 2 mins to metro and then 20 mins to Manhattan. The room is clean. The kitchen is very well equipped. I highly recommend this place.
Menage fait tous les 3 jours !!!!!! les communications téléphoniques ne sont pas passées dans les chambres .... Après plusieurs demandes que le ménage soit fait, personne ne s en est occupé !
The place was very nice and had a lot of character and charm. Lots of things to do in the area and is within walking distance to prospect park.

Dave’s home is exactly as the pics supplied and as described. A hidden gem! We LOVED our stay and would HIGHLY recommend this beautiful home to anyone in search of a comfortable, spacious and relaxing stay. Dave was extremely accommodating, quick to respond and a wonderful host overall. Even the neighbor brought us a bottle of wine just to welcome us. This is a definite 10/10.
Clean space and nice host
She was very kind to me as a foreigner. And the room was very clean and comfortable. No matter where I look, I can't find any complaints. I would like to use it again someday.
Samantha was a great host! My flight was canceled but she was so willing to help and  accommodate the changes in my trip.
Very cozy flat. Nice host and easy to reach via subway.
YOTEL es un concepto muy innovador, cerca de avenidas  principales y restaurantes, para mi gusto si algo pequeñas las habitaciones ! Precio calidad justos por la ubicación !
This is the second time I have stayed here. I will always stay here as it is every thing I want in a place to stay m.
숙소 위치가 너무 좋아요!

This hotel is in a very nice neighborhood! Ideal location. It is a budget hotel, very good value for the money. Probably the cheapest way to stay in Manhattan for a month. Note, however, that the bathrooms are shared. You will not have a private bathroom in your room.

Azeez was a very responsive host and the apartment is in a great location. It actually was bigger than it looked in photos. The kitchen was well-stocked and the bed was comfortable. The neighborhood itself is very convenient and walkable; subway is just a few blocks away and there are restaurants and bars nearby. Light sleepers may want to be aware that the neighbors above are extremely noisy into the wee hours of the morning. I don't know if it was an extended NYE celebration, but it was every night we were there. I would stay there again, just with earplugs.

despite not being close to all the main nyc attractions, gregory’s place was so so pretty. very clean, modern + perfect for my long 9 night stay. gregory was also very attentive + friendly. would stay again :))

My husband and I enjoyed our six day stay in Harlem! Walkable to Central Park and you can always jump on the subway and be in tribeca in a flash.
The space was wonderful. Bedroom was so cozy and comfortable. The room is away from the street so it’s also quiet. We stayed in winter and the heating was ample. We had no issues.
We also used the kitchen to cook and had everything that we needed.
Douglas was not only proactive, but very responsive and friendly when we saw him.
A great place to stay!

This was our second stay with Simon's. It was wonderful to return after four years. We enjoyed the apartment as much as we did the first time. Perhaps even more as they renewed the beautiful bathroom. This is a really beautiful place that provides everything  you need. Afternoon sunlight in the bedroom is something we already miss. You enjoy a quiet place in the heart of busy Harlem, well connected to all relevant subway lines. If you have some time, you can take the nearby Hudson Line at 125th street to travel upstate along the beautiful riverside. Communication, check-in and everything was great. We look forward to our next stay. Hopefully soon.

I loved the location, it was so close to several metro stations and great restaurants! It was within walking distance to Chinatown. If you don't mind the city noise at night, this is a perfect spot (but the front desk does have earplugs available!)
The best little apartment in the most perfect location!

Really good place if you need to be in the Financial District! The staff is really nice. It would've been awesome to have a bigger common area inside the flat and a second shower. Overall really good, I would return!

Luz Adriana es una persona muy acogedora y sus dependencias tienen un excelente transporte público,  una ubicación muy segura,  con parque para treking y para los niños hagan distintas actividades, con mi esposo disfrutamos nuestra estadía y la cuidamos como si fuera nuestro propio hogar.

Just spent a week here and had the BEST time. The place was cozy and i felt right at home immediately. It’s decorated so cute and has almost everything you could need. It’s located in a good spot close to lots of good places to eat, drink, and even has multiple markets nearby. I recommend BK Bagels for breakfast which is just s 2 minute walk from the airbnb.  It’s also a 5-10 minute walk to major subway lines, making it easy to get all over the city. I felt safe in the area, even walking home alone at night wasn’t a problem.I felt EXTREMELY safe in the airbnb itself. The hosts have multiple security measures outside the property as well as a private backyard so even though it’s a busy area, it felt pretty private. The hosts are very kind and friendly. I couldn’t recommend this place enough!! When i come back to the city, i will definitely stay here again!!!!

At first, this was a great booking. Lavonne was very communicative, and I had very clear expectations. But, I became more and more disenchanted with my stay over time. First, I had asked her about her service of airport drop off, and asked her about picking me up from the airport instead. She said she was able to offer that service, and when I asked her about it the day before my flight, she said I would need to get an Uber. Second, she offered early check in for 20 extra dollars after I had already asked her about coming later than the check in time, because I knew my plans would go on until after 4 pm. She then gave me attitude after I told her we already talked about me coming late. This communicated to me that she was not paying attention to my messages. And, when I got to the place, the bathroom had clumps of hair all over the bathtub, and some mats & the comforter had stains. Plus, when trying to relax, it sounded like multiple kids were running around upstairs, for about an hour

Judie and Steven's "Kingsize bedroom in Harlem brownstone" was amazing -- the best Airbnb I have ever experienced.  The house was beautifully furnished and clean, the room was spacious, and the bed was quite comfortable.  The private bathroom was very nice, and I appreciated having access to the gorgeous kitchen space as well. Accessing the space was easy and it felt very private.  I was visiting my daughter, who lives a few blocks away from Judie and Steven's place, and I felt safe walking to and from her apartment on the well-lit streets.  The reservation was very reasonably priced for such a private, spacious, and well-appointed space.  I would definitely stay again if the opportunity arises.
Great place to stay!
Alles war super-gerne wieder!

It was exactly what we were hoping for. A quiet, affordable place to stay at night while we enjoy food in flushing and an event in NYC during the day. Parking was easy on the street right outside. Place was spotless.

Romulo was a lovely and responsive host! The room and bathroom was super clean. The house is also located close to the J train and some bus stations so it's convenient to go around New York. I will come back and stay here if I visit New York in the future.

This review is for the girlies!
Location: Perfect spot in SoHo with easy access to the subway. So many restaurants and cafes nearby. We loved the SoHo Market downstairs (ton of snacks, hot food, and even feminine hygiene products).
Sound: Apart from the occasional car horns and ambulances, we didn’t experience any loud noise. You can hear the other room doors slamming, but it isn’t an issue.
Amenities: Thankful for the full bottles of Le Labo shampoo, conditioner, and shower gel in our room! If you’re not particular about what you shower with, you can easily leave your travel bottles at home. There’s a blow dryer (WITH a hair styling nozzle attachment), robes, slippers, coffee, and a mini-fridge. The only other thing we would have liked in our room was a microwave, but the lobby kindly warmed up our leftovers!
Staff: The staff was GENEROUS and hospitable! They helped us use the subway and gave us tips on road closures.
Will definitely stay here next time I’m in New York!!!

Enjoyed my stay at Mary’s place. It is cozy and very clean. Location is unbeatable. Food options, Prospect Park and subway access within minutes. I also enjoyed chatting and getting to know Mary while living there. This place is a gem!
The stay was great, they were very nice and warm hosts. Thank you for the amazing time.
It is a convenient and safe place to stay in New York
The place was super clean, comfy bed, and amazing water pressure in shower.  Pictures matched the look of the place. Can be a little noisy depending on time - expected, at least for me, in NY.

From our first contact before I booked the apartment and right up to our departure after a 4 night stay, David has been excellent in communicating swiftly with us and providing help immediately when it was needed.
The apartment has worked perfectly for us two sisters, who both appreciate having our own sleeping rooms!
So having a separate bedroom with a comfortable double bed and a comfortable sofabed made up in the lounge area was an excellent arrangement for us.
We spent very little time in the apartment as we spent the days visiting family elsewhere in Brooklyn. However, if one would like to russle up a meal, the apartment has a well equipped galley kitchen for the purpose.
We have been very pleased to stay in David's apartment and can highly recommend it to others!
Great place in NYC, will recommend to friends
I had a terrible experience at Henri's place. The bedsheets were unclean and there was excessive noise throughout the day & night. Did not sleep
Such a nice and peaceful stay. Host is very nice and looks better than photos!!
Felt like home. ❤️
Amazing stay! I got relax in one of my favorite neighbor in New York! Thank you Jimmy!
Emplacement idéal ! Nous y avons séjourné quelques jours et tout été parfait, nous sommes ravis !

Super Host super well located, had great Talks with skippy, he gave us many recommendations, felt comfortable ghe whole time there could use his kitchen to the fullest. Hope to be here again soon for another season

Claude was very kind and an his place is an easy recommendation for a cheap place to stay in NYC. Definitely a no frills type of place but if you are you looking for somewhere just to sleep and nothing else then this place is great!!
Good stay but if you want a parking spot get it early! Street parking fills up quickly

Our family loved our stay. Great location. Beautifully restored brownstone. Absolutely massive space — particularly for NYC — with way more than enough room for our family.
Pat and family could not have been more lovely or accommodating. Highly recommended!

Questa è stata la mia prima esperienza in un alloggio Airbnb con spazi in condivisione, e devo dire che è stata assolutamente positiva!
Gloria è un'host eccezionale, molto accogliente, disponibile e premurosa. Mi ha fatto sentire subito a mio agio, come a casa. La stanza era pulita e confortevole, e l'appartamento in generale è ben curato.
Nonostante la condivisione degli spazi comuni, la convivenza è stata molto tranquilla e rispettosa della privacy.

My wife and I had a lovely time staying at Elizabeth's place in Brooklyn! Having a private, clean, comfortable space to ourselves to retreat to at the end of the night was incredible. Also, we can't talk enough about how comfortable the bed was, which was clutch after being on our feet for most of the day. Furthermore, Elizabeth and Andrew (co-host) were in constant contact with us from the minute we booked, until we checked out, which we greatly appreciated. The only downside was how far away this location was from the L train, so we had to at times plan around that. That being said, we highly recommend staying at Elizabeth's incredible place, and we will def be returning if its available the next time we travel to NYC.

הנכס הכי קטן  שיצא לי להיתקל בו,  איך שנכנסים לנכס יש ריח חריף של עובש ובגדים רטובים שנשכחו מאחור.  חיפשנו שירותים בנכס ולא מצאנו, השירותים הם שירותים משותפים והם ממוקמים באמצע המסדרון.  בנוסף היה לנו בעיות עם השירותי נקיון שנכנסו ויצאו מהדירה כאילו היא שלהם. קיצר מקום נורא לא להתקרב תמורה חרא ביחס למחיר.

Everything was as advertised. The location is conveniently located near the train station and close to all the action. The only issue we ran into was the temperature of the rooms because you are unable to control the radiators yourself. This was mentioned in the listing though so we knew it might be an issue. Otherwise everything was great!

Great location, clean, and quiet. Stephen's place was perfect for our family with three teens. It was spacious and quiet. We were easily able to walk to the G subway line to get into Manhattan. It was really nice to be in a neighborhood with nearby small markets and restaurants. We particularly enjoyed the drinks, coffee and food at BKLYN Blend. Rocco's Pizza was great. And one night we walked to Concrete, an amazing sicilian restaurant less than a mile away. I wish we had more time! We were nervous about finding parking on the street but found something a block away. I would definitely stay here again.
I really liked this apartment and would most definitely recommend booking it .
Sharon was very kind, gave lots of tips about going around NY, and she responded very quickly. The space was very clean and homey. Looks just like the pics.
Comfortable nice place to stay and the host was very responsive
Big enough for two adults and a baby in a travel cot. Nice and functional kitchen. Was roomier than expected

Very quiet and comfortable. Private. Exceptionally clean. We didn’t cook but well stocked with cookware if you want to. Might want to bring any spices, etc. you might need. There are several convenience stores and a nice grocery within walking distance.  The bathroom is spacious. Pleasant outdoor space.
The room was very nice and the way to the ferry was a short walk. Everything was clean and for us 5 people the accommodation was big enough.

We had a very nice stay in David’s apartment. Everything was just as described and furnishings were nice. We had a small issue with the door lock when we first arrived but help came right away to assist. I would highly recommend this spot if you are looking for a quiet and safe area on the UWS.

Julian was fantastic, very responsive and helpful. The location was extremely convenient and the neighborhood was great. The bed was very comfortable. Our only issue was we wished the shared restroom was a little bit tidier. Overall would stay again.

We loved our stay at the Royalton Park Ave. We had the one bedroom suite and it was extremely spacious with a wonderful master bedroom and bathroom.
The staff was also excellent and checked in via text daily to see if we needed anything. Will definitely be back next time!

I like to research a place a lot before going & had only heard great things about The Knickerbocker before my stay, and now I completely understand why.
Friendly staff, excellent service, and a spacious room, especially the bathroom/vanity area that’s perfect for getting ready! The 24/7 room service was very convenient. Located right in the heart of Times Square, you’re just steps away from countless shops and restaurants. 10/10.
Rosie and place she was hosting were awesome! Rosie is always checking in and making sure everything is going well.

Beautiful property in a fantastic location with truly outstanding staff. The food was incredible at both restaurants, including a very cool speakeasy that was a highlight. Rooftop nightclub security was a bit aggressive and not very welcoming, but everyone else went above and beyond. I’d absolutely recommend staying here.
Really cute vibey spot and somewhere I’d stay again when visiting Brooklyn.

El apartamento muy limpio, cómodoy agradable. Lo malo fue que nos tomó 2 horas para encontrar estacionamiento. Manejamos alrededor de la zona por 2 horas sin éxito. al final encontramos estacionamiento como a 15 min, y tuvimos que pedir un uber para llegar.

Roger’s apartment was such a lovely find! Very close to the subway, had great restaurants close by (Brooklyn Barista was a favorite!), and still felt very private and quiet. My mother and I loved our stay, and to top it off, Roger was very communicative and a great host overall! If you are thinking of selecting this listing, do it! You won’t be disappointed!
Great place to stay, nice and new, responsive hosts, good location.  Good times, no regrets!

host was quick to respond and went above and beyond to make sure we got a bistro set requested to enjoy the balcony. The pictures were accurate, it just needed to be cleaned. Also the apartment is on the 5th Floor with no elevator and coming back to those steps after a night of drinking wasn't fun. Another thing that wasn't provided was a iron and wash rags which we had to find from a store being from out of town and stuff folded in a suitcase.

We really enjoyed staying at Christophe and Felix's home. They were always checking in on us to make sure our trip was going well and they had everything they needed. The kitties were the main highlight, as they were super friendly and even laid/slept with us while we were there. It was a great stay!
Aneerban was a fantastic host that was extremely accommodating, responsive, and friendly! The place was immaculate as well! Great location in Brooklyn and close to many things!

What can I begin with? These are the hosts with the most! Yochi was so accommodating to my arrival and exit to start. I came in from Philly via train which was a quick walk to the air bnb from the station. Yochi greeted me with their sweet elder dog, Zuta. Gave me my own set of keys, and showed me to my spacious, air conditioned room with a walk in closet. There was also a mini fridge filled with refreshments and some snacks were on the counter. Yochi was kind enough to make me coffee & breakfast every morning before I started work, and offered me wine & snacks when I returned. Conversation is easy and they want you to feel comfortable. The bathroom is clean and cozy with many towels and bathroom hygienic accessories. I can’t thank them enough for such a comfortable stay. Would stay again anytime!

While the room is not one of those where you would want to spend a lot of time, the location in a very nice part of Brooklyn, close to beautiful waterfront and Manhattan compensates this without any doubt! Amy also goes extra mile to provide some nice extras to her guests making one feel welcomed and taken care of.
Great location and host! It is a small but cute space. Would recommend, if you are planning to walk and use public transportation frequently. Close to lots of good food places.

I had a great week at Katarina's AirBnB. The apartment is exactly what it looks like - and more. I would definitely stay here again!
One thing I would advise future guests: bring earplugs and a sleeping mask. The noise from the street can be loud sometimes (but hey, you're in New York) and the apartment is quite light. But I took both with me and slept like a baby!
Clean comfortable space. Stayed for one night so didn't get much opportunity to explore the surrounding area. Host was very helpful in returning some forgotten items.

Candace is very kind and does her best to accommodate your needs. The rooms are spacious but unfortunately the walls are very thin and it was quite hard to sleep. The bathroom(s) are shared by multiple people so it’s hard to comment on cleanliness. I would only recommend to those who need to stay 1-2 nights and are early morning risers. The location was great and although the city was busy, I felt very safe. I would say it is a good stay for the price. I appreciate Candace’s efforts to make my stay comfortable.
Great spot! Very clean, exactly as described. Lot's of food & drinks within walking distance. Had the opportunity to take the ferry over to NYC, definitely worth it!

Fantastic location on a great block in Clinton Hill with easy access to subways. Perfect apartment for a solo long-term stay. It is a garden apartment, so duration and intensity of natural light to be as expected. WiFi sometimes cut in and out, but overall absolutely loved my time here. Ric is super responsive!
This is a perfect place to stay! It’s simple but has everything you need. The location is great, everything is within walking distance! I will definitely be booking again.

This room right by Canal St subway station was very clean and spacious! Filled with natural light (we got the room with 3-4 ceiling-height windows?). The guy who works at the front desk overnight was also very friendly and welcoming. It made me feel instantly comfortable and “at home”.
The location was also great considering its right by chinatown where you can get tons of good food even late at night! This, however, also means that the street can be a little noisy with some honking here and there even at night. It’s not bad though and we were able to get good sleep on both two nights!
I would recommend this place to anyone!!! Thank you so much :)

Merlin was a very gracious host - super responsive and always helpful. The place is exactly as described/shown in the pics, and in the perfect location for me to be able to visit nearby friends in Brooklyn.
It was just what we needed for our stay on NYC. We are thankful for the room.
A warm and welcoming place in the heart of Manhattan!
Good location for a trip to see sights in Manhattan.  Enjoyable and comfortable place to stay.
Brady’s place was clean, quiet, lovely. Communication was great. Recommend it.

Pleased with my stay at Untitled. Easy check-in, although I would suggest asking for the Wifi password at the front desk as it wasn't written anywhere in the room. Aside from that detail, everything was great. Would stay here again, good location, and comfortable night's sleep.

Un lugar fácil de llegar, ubicado en el corazón de Mahantan, con fácil acceso a todos los lugares de interés en NYC.
El hotel tiene una bonita decoración, y todo estaba limpio y ordenado.
Yaakov was super communicative and helpful throughout and the place was super spacious and nice! He also left yummy treats for us. Would stay here again!
Good host i recommended

My stay at Michael's house was unbeatable.
The instructions were clear and at all times he was very kind to me, he was attentive to every question I made and it was a real pleasure to stay at his house. I only have words of gratitude for him.
The apartment is beautiful, the area is quiet, the place is unbeatable; design, clean and careful. Without a doubt, if I return to NYC I will repeat with him, 100% recommended!
Great stay! Spacious & Had all we needed to accommodate our family! Perfect location. Walking distance to great food and attractions.
Catina was alway very responsive when we asked anything. She checked in with us often. The location was perfect for our visit, and it’s right beside a piece of baseball history.
This was by far the best place I’ve ever stayed in Brooklyn. Easy to access restaurants. Quiet and peaceful.

Ercilia's place is wonderful - clean, well-equipped, with a comfy bed, and feels spacious for a studio. She included so many extras - snacks, wine, full coffee/tea bar, etc etc. And my little doggie was welcome. Ercilia was great with communication and just a lovely person. I look forward to staying again on one of my next trips!
Thank you!
My home away from home. Will definitely stay again, thank you Junior :)

We had a great stay. Everything was like described in the offer. Also the bushwick neighborhood is a lovley place to discover.
We can definitly recommend this !
Enjoyed the stay.
Really great space!!! Thank you for hosting us Michael!
Thanks Koichi!
Very nice and clean.
Sharon was absolutely wonderful and so kind and welcoming.

I stayed at Paola’s place for a month. It was fantastic! So comfortable. And a great kitchen for whipping up simple meals. The location is amazing…. We walked everywhere! I was sad to leave and definitely would stay there again! Thank you Paola!
The staff tried very hard to accommodate us during an air conditioning problem in our room. We appreciated their efforts.
Great place for a great value!
Very conveniently located.
Great location and amazing flat. Highly recommend.
Great location and well equipped for an extended  stay.

This cozy apartment was the perfect Brooklyn staycation.  Stylish with Brooklyn artwork and every room smelled great.  Easy parking.  Carline was a very accessible host.  Would definitely recommend for a couple looking for a place in Brooklyn.
Very cool and clean place in a great location. Bianca was very communicative and helpful!
A fantastic spacious apartment. The perfect place to stay with family and friends for a New York adventure. Clean, cosy and comfortable - would def recommend!!

We feel scammed after staying at Eliza’s place. We checked in around 7pm and were in a rush to get to our reservation in NYC so we didn’t thoroughly inspect the room as soon as we arrived, thinking it looked clean. However when we came back to the room to try to get some sleep, noticed blood splattered all over the walls like somebody was beat up in there pretty bad. Instead of coming to a resolution with us, the host was trying to blame us, and is being defensive. I would not recommend anyone to stay here unless you want to deal with poor management.
Overall, Shedinas place was exactly as advertised and more!! It was spotless and in an amazing location close to all things necessary to explore the city. Absolutely a five star experience.

L'appartement de Christopher est très agréable, grand, décoré avec goût, dans un quartier tranquille, très proche du métro 2 et 5, et un tout petit peu plus loin du métro B et Q, et correspond parfaitement au descriptif. Les instructions de Christopher étaient claires et le système de clés par code numérique très pratique. Seul bémol, l'absence de climatisation dans la plus petite chambre avec des lits superposés. Merci!
The location of the hostel is good and convenient hub, the caretaker Sunny was friendly and helpful. Definitely recommended, would book again when visiting NY.
Nice place
Great Location!

Nice little spot. Comfortable bed and friendly host. The apartment could use a bit of an upgrade. New flooring in the bathroom and kitchen would help and a new AC unit. Other than those minor issues the stay was quite. Would stay again.
Loved The Space and Area , Defiantly Would RecommendThis Place
Exactly as pictured. Easy to check in and out and very close to JFK.

Compton was one of the best hosts I've ever had through airbnb! Super nice people, they were super accommodating, and I felt very safe in my environment. Space was well managed, clean, and fully functional. Would definitely stay here again! Thanks again, Compton!
Great spot! Perfect location!
This bnb is great asf
Great communication, helpful , responsive , would highly recommend.
Had a great time, Arielle was responsive and let us drop our luggage off early!
Excellent Brooklyn studio in the neighborhood. Clean, quiet, and great neighborhood for walking. I'd return and I recommend this spot
Great location, near subway, lots of great spots near by. Just smaller than expected with some normal aged dirtiness.
Great location, quiet and well-presented room.
This a was a great place for the price. Clean and felt right at home. Everything you need is in walkable distance. Host was great with communication. Would book this place again.
Amazing location, will be staying there again next time I’m in Ny
Super logement, accessible facilement en metro. Quartier calme et agréable. Sejour avec mes parents, ma conjointe et un bebe et j’y retournerais sans problème.

This place was a pleasant surprise. As an artist I really appreciate the whole art vibe that is everywhere. The eclectic reantals , camers , guitars , pod cast gear etc. very cool !! Ive never seen these offered in a hotel / bnb.
Eli at the front desk was immediately welcoming and very helpful , he's a credit to the place for sure and a great photographer.
Ive been staying at the Moxy Lower East Side for the last 2 yeas , whenever Im in town and they just dont seem to really get it
I think Ive found my new place.
Would stay again

Le logement correspondait à la description mais il manquait des rangement dans les chambres, le lave vaisselle en panne 2 mois. Tres bien situé et appartement grand. Le quartier est agréable et vivant avec un accès au métro proche. Nous avons passé un bon séjour.
Good experience and worth it if you have a large group
Great location! Nice size especially for NYC.
Great hotel, breakfast included. Close to everything!

the place is great, the room it's pretty big, and the location it's perfect, I only use subway, all the time.
perfect restaurant around it. definitely a good spot.
Chauncey was a great host and has an incredibly beautiful property. Our family loved the elective decor, comfortable beds, and beautiful yard. It was the perfect location for our visit to Brooklyn.
This place was awesome! Located right near a bunch of different fun food options and in a safe neighborhood. Gretchen was a great host and very responsive and helpful!

I had a wonderful vacation at Farhan's Airbnb and would like to share my feedback. Firstly, the rented room was exactly as advertised on the Airbnb website, and it had all the necessary amenities for daily living, such as a television, coffee machine, kettle, and complete kitchen utensils. Additionally, the room had its own free parking spot. The room was also stocked with hotel-style consumables, such as disposable slippers, toilet paper, and fresh towels, which made my stay even more comfortable.
I would also like to highlight my experience with the host, who was not only fluent in English but also extremely helpful and attentive. Whenever we encountered any issues, he promptly responded and quickly resolved them. I would like to share a particular incident during my stay where we faced a sudden problem of no hot water during a shower. As soon as we informed the host, he immediately came to the property and resolved the issue on the spot. Overall, next NYC trip I will choose here.

Our stay at Gisela’s apartment was cozy and comfortable. The street is quiet and close to some great local spots (we loved the French bakery around the corner). Note that you’ll have to cross the expressway to get to most businesses in the Carroll Gardens neighborhood (including the nearest subway stop), but it’s only a 10-15 min walk. The bedroom is really large with plenty of light, kept cool by a window AC unit. All communication with Gisela was easy and prompt. We would definitely stay here again!
On a block of brownstones next to heart of Harlem. 3 minute walk to subway, Whole Foods, CVS. Spacious top floor apt. galley kitchen with all you need. Quiet bedroom, comfortable bed. Well worth it.

Jeaneth is an excellent host. She responds quickly and provides periodic useful information.  The property is immaculate and beautifully decorated. She even provided a welcome basket full of goodies. The home was very quiet with no unpleasant noises from the family upstairs or the neighbors.  I can't say enough wonderful things about the home and my stay there. I highly recommend this property and I plan to stay there whenever I'm in the NY area.
Mit der liebervollen, sehr kunstvollen Einrichtung haben wir uns in der gemütlichen Wohnung sehr wohl gefühlt. Miriam ist sehr nett und es war ein toller Aufenthalt!

We arrived late after our flight from JFK. The apartment is barely 5-10 mins from the taxi pickup area. It is extremely clean. All the amenities you need for your stay are provided. I would highly recommend it for anyone who has a layover at JFK and needs to rest. It is great value for money.
Easy, nice and cheap for a lay over at JFK airport
Overall great place. Very close to Times Square.

Clean room and comfortable bed, nice patio to be enjoyed on warmer days. Mary is a great host, enjoyed talking to her, very helpful. The spiral staircase is definitely a tight squeeze but that’s the way the condo is built. Overall we had a comfortable stay, great hospitality.

As always, we look for a clean and safe place to rest our heads at night, James and Laureta's meet these criteria for us.  We appreciated the quick responses to our questions and all the suggestions to help make our stay even better.

I absolutely loved my stay at Talib’s place. Everything about it was wonderful. The furniture was comfortable. The entire place was very appealing to me. The accommodations lived up to the pictures, which was very satisfying to see. Talib was friendly and checked on us periodically throughout the stay. I would be happy to stay again in the future.
The area is very nice, and the house alone was very spacious and clean. The bathroom in the big room does need a bit of maintenance, and so does the curtain in the big room.

Appartement sublime avec un jardin parfait pour y passer des moments de calme et profiter du soleil. Amy est une hôte exceptionnelle. Disponible et réactive, elle saura vous conseiller plein de choses autour de la maison. Je ne peux que vous recommander ce logement pour un séjour entre New-York et Brooklyn. De plus, il est très bien connecté avec l'arrêt de métro Utica à quelques minutes à pied.
No flaws. Thank you very much for your hospitality.

This was my first experience with a live-in AirBnb host and it could not have been better. I truly felt like I was a dear old friend of his family coming to stay with him while visiting NYC. Very homy atmosphere. Large, commodious bedroom with bath. I like to sleep cool and was able to open a window next to the excellent firm bed he provided.I like to eat healthy when I travel and was able to prepare my own breakfast and dinner. Laurence was very friendly but always gracious and never intrusive.
Laurence is an artist and musician. I’m pretty well versed in the jazz idiom but I learned a lot while visiting with him. If you are lucky you might get to hear him play his pianos. And he has a lovely baritone voice.
All good! Thanks Jerome!!

I flew in from Portugal and needed a place to stay for a night. After a long day of traveling it was nice to enter a cold air conditioned room.
Everything was exceptionally easy from beginning to end. I highly recommend Carlos’ place and will come back next time I’m in New York in a few months.
Thank you very much
great location, relatively clean--not perfect but oh well, a good value.  pretty bare bones but that's new york.  would stay here again and recommend to others.

Bobby’s place was awesome. It was close to the subway and the neighborhood was so beautiful. The apartment was very spacious, even more-so than in the photos. There’s great AC units which are perfect for the hot summer. Just loved it!

Location was close to the subway and walkable. The room was a good size and it was nice having a kitchen space. Check in was smooth and instructions were clear. I wish there was more transparency about the bathroom situation and photos in the listing. It is more of a hostel bathroom situation, you will be sharing with about 5-6 other rooms. They are quite small and I did find a roach in the bathroom during my first night. During the 2nd night of my stay I did notice my room was starting to have a moldy and musty smell to it that was quite disgusting and nauseating when I walked in to the room.  The safety of the area was a little questionable for me, I was traveling by myself and there was one night I did get harass by a man standing in front of the apartment. I understand it’s NYC and there are strange guys on the street but still wasn’t a great situation. This airbnb was significantly cheaper than a lot of other ones so that was nice but honestly wouldn’t stay here again personally.
If I return to New York, I know where I will be staying!  Fantastic staff, great location, comfy room, and I love all the street art leading to the hotel!  Thank you Untitled!

Very good communication & instructions from Nomad. People at front desk were very helpful as well. Easy checkin/out process.
Place was as pictured and centrally located (Herald Square, 5 min walk to Empire State building) to what we wanted to see. 35 min Uber ride at 2pm to LaGuardia airport for 4:30pm flight.
It was small (kitchen, beds & table in 1 space), which we knew, but we were gone most of the day so didn't matter. Had an elevator. Bathroom shower was a good size. Everything was clean. Some noise but to be expected since located in the city. Ear plugs are provided in room but only used them 1st night.
Overall - good value for location, convenience & size of place. We stayed 4 nights which was right amount of time. Would definitely recommend to those who are active & want to see the city. Place was a perfect fit for us!
Everything worked perfectly!

Easy to find, very friendly hosts and nice vibe. The location is perfect for people who want to stay in midtown Manhattan. Time square is literally 15 mins walk from this place. I highly recommend this place!!
excellent place to stay! I would definitely visit again
Comfortable bed, clean, full kitchen. Awesome stay, will stay again!
Overall nice place , just didn’t realize the jacuzzi was on the smaller side. In a beach neighborhood area.

Excellent stay, great location in a spacious, comfortable room. Staff was helpful and friendly. Thanks to Romer’s for making my daughter’s Broadway birthday extravaganza a big success.  Highly recommend this spot!
Bon emplacement du logement , proche de Manhattan!
Peter is a good host, friendly and easy to get in touch with. Would recommend this apartment

Thanks Harvin!
He was incredibly helpful and responsive to all of our questions and needs. Flexible check in and checkout. Comfortable beds, tvs in every room, cooking appliances, and plenty of dishware and silverware, wine opener, can opener, and baking supplies. Convenient location, 10 mins from the subway. We spent most of our time outside of the airbnb, but felt like coming home every time we returned.
I travel to NY often to visit nearby family in Manhattan and Brooklyn. I will definitely book again in the future!
Thanks again for everything,
Erin

I had the best time staying at Barbara’s beautiful home. She has a warm and welcoming space that is decorated so well! I love her creative style and being surrounded by all of her plant babies 🪴
Barbara also gave great local recommendations that I checked out during my stay, and it was so lovey getting to know her a little!
Would highly recommend staying with Barbara, I’ll definitely be back 💗

We recently completed a five night stay. The apartment was perfect and Hugo could not have been a better or more responsive host. We loved the area and will definitely return to this apartment the next time we’re visiting the area.

This is a special place. I feel lucky to have experienced New York as though staying with a very dear, well situated friend. Long Island City is a clean, quiet, and charming neighborhood. We felt very safe walking and exploring. Don’t miss dining at Top Quality, or any place Orestes suggests. He is the best kind of host, talented and humble, gracious and genuinely kind. Very approachable, but not intrusive. Comfortable bed, amazing shower, harmoniously decorated (fantastic art and photography everywhere!!) and an easy train ride from JFK. Was perfect for the two of us; we’ll be back!
Great host. Very responsive when needed or asking questions. Follows up with you after as well.

Jane’s place was perfect for me spending 3 days in New York. It’s in a great area with lots of restaurants and easy access to public transport. Jane was super helpful with check in and getting me sorted.

The apartment was beautiful, clean, and exactly as pictured. Being on the ground floor made it very convenient, and the neighborhood in South Bronx was surprisingly quiet and peaceful. The only thing to note is that there isn’t much noise insulation in the ceiling, so footsteps and movement from above can be heard in the unit. Aside from that, it was a great stay

We LOVED this place. It was in a bustling and safe neighbourhood with bars, restaurants and metro right near by. The place is bigger and nicer than it appears in pictures. Well-appointed with wine or beer already in fridge! Bathroom well stocked and super clean. Both bedrooms open up to a large, clean, private and serene outside deck. It was perfect for a couple and two teenagers. This is not a place for those who want to cook extensively. It doesn’t have pots or pans or large bowls or a cooks oven. It does have microwave, toaster oven, coffee maker and electric kettle. The small refrigerator is just that. No freezer but ample for those who are there for sightseeing and leftovers! This is a great home base. Just know you can buy ice nearby and enjoy cold drinks in the evening. It is quiet and top notch.

Ppl that work there are very nice and helpful.
It is a simple place with low privacy but it is great for respectful travelers.
Amazing location!
Few minutes away from the Intrepid, Emire State Building, Crysler Building, etc.
Bardzo przyjemne, spokojne i ciche miejsce. Blisko metra, co bardzo ułatwia transport. W mieszkaniu jest wszystko, co potrzeba aby wygodnie tam mieszkać.

We stayed for 3 days, and were impressed with how comfortable the bed was, the room had its own AC unit, so it was always nice and cool when we came back from a day of being in the city. I would stay here again, it was the most affordable out of all the hotels/listings we looked at. Any questions I had, they were very fast with responses. Cute shops and restaurants nearby as well, and a parking garage around the corner from the hotel if you need a spot close by to park. Around $90 for having it parked for 3 days, which isn’t bad compared to most parking garages in NYC.
We'll be back! Thank you
It was nice staying at the place. Very good location and clean apartment

The whole place is perfect, complies with what is shown in the photos, only if you are planning a trip, keep in mind that taxes are not included in the price shown in the app and neither are cleaning fees, etc.. But everything super cool
It was a beautiful room and a great location at an affordable price.
That’s such a nice place and I love it a lot. At any time I’ll go back to New York I’ll visit this place.
Suncerae was lovely, and always available when needed. The place is simple, safe and clean. We loved the back porch and easy access to the 1 and C trains!

Chase’s spot in Brooklyn was fantastic. Great central location. Very beautiful and clean. And well running AC which in Summer in NYC is a must.
Chase even saved a parking spot for us right in front of the apartment.
Best AirBnB experience I’ve had in NYC. Go to this place.

Die Unterkunft war sehr schön und gemütlich mit kleiner Terrasse.  Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und waren mitten im Leben der Gastgeber. Auch die Gegend Ocean Hill war in Ordnung. Einkaufsmöglichkeiten,  Bars und Restaurants um der Ecke.

Super séjour chez Miljian, très réactif et accommodant. Disponible quand on a eu besoin de lui.
Appartement très agréable et calme au cœur de williamsburg.
Great apartment and host!

This was my first time traveling alone and I was worried about where I would stay but everything at Gerry’s House was amazing, it was super nice and clean and Gerry cared a lot about my security and making me feel safe and comfortable, he also answered my questions super fast through the app and show me a couple of things around .
There are two subway lines a few blocks away so it was easy to move and the neighborhood is quiet and safe even at midnight. I really recommmend this place and I will stay here again if I come back to NYC
Useful location with good access to subway. Mattresses were a little on the basic end.

Super super super Airbnb, super hotel, super service, super workers, super view… for me it was a 9.9/10 experience. The room was a little smaller than I expected, but take nothing away from this amazing hotel. The pastries for breakfast and the rooftop bar were also amazing! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Tareq was an amazing host and the apartment was spacious and comfortable. We had a long stay, and felt at home the entire time we were there. The apartment is close to Prospect Park and the Brooklyn Museum, and there are many bars and restaurants nearby. It was a great stay, absolutely recommend!
Free street parking and bodegas down the street. A quick walk to the 6 train was easily accessible. Roommates were quiet and friendly. I would highly recommend!!!
Rita let me stay at her place very last minute and it was absolutely beautiful safe and comfortable I loved it thank u so much Rita!
Anastasia is an amazing host, the house is clean and tidy, the room is bright with air conditioning and the bed is comfortable. I had a wonderful stay. Highly recommend

I have stayed here a second time and I appreciated the upgraded room with bigger bathroom. Also very responsive to needs inc. late check out or possibility of extending. This is now my go-to when in NYC!
Good location, nice restaurants locally

We stayed with Nelson while visiting family in Park Slope. The location was good for us. Nelson communicated well. He appears committed to having his guests have a good experience at his apartment.
As with any airbnb I stay at, I wish there was not a cleaning fee.
A easy check in process. Place was clean and pictures of place are accurate. Good privacy and nice vibe. Easy parking and shops nearby.

Nick’s place is perfectly located for a long weekend exploring the city. It’s small but that was expected and didn’t really matter since we mostly just needed a place to sleep. Would absolutely recommend for 1 or 2 people!
Excelente estadia, sem problemas e apesar da obra do metro não nos sentimos incomodados pelo barulho
I loved Emily + Jenny's place. They really go out of their way to make you feel like a resident of the UWS. From amenities to space and communication, everything was easy and comfortable.

If you're wanting a home away, this is the perfect place to stay in NYC. Away from the bustle of Manhattan, the place was so clean and readily accessible. Loved the hospitality and special mention to Rich for the morning Puerto Rican drip coffees and making NYC feel like more of a home. Book and you won't regret!
muito bom!
The oven wouldn’t work and the shower drain did not drain quickly. Otherwise the property was great!
Thank you for everything!
This was the perfect hotel. It was gorgeous and the bed was super comfortable and soft. Highly recommending!
Lo recomiendo mucho! Excelente !
Great space, a good location if you're visiting Brooklyn
Completely redone spot not far from the subway.  Good value if you’re looking to stay near the city.
I enjoyed my time at Allison’s place and I definitely plan on returning. Allison is a very personable and extremely helpful host. Loved her little dog as well.

アクセスがよく、夜も歩けそうなほど安全なエリア。
お部屋は毎日綺麗に清掃してくれるし、清潔で快適に過ごせた。
お部屋にあるコーヒーマシーンで淹れる一杯は朝にぴったりなテイスト。
スタッフの方々も親切で素晴らしいホテルでした。
また訪れたい滞在先。
お世話様でした。

The location of the Airbnb was perfect, with easy access to Manhattan (and of course Brooklyn). The room was really spacious and I loved the attention to detail in the room - it was incredibly comfortable. Thanks Ame!

We had an excellent stay with Kirsten & Mark! The accommodation was exactly as described and shown in the photos on Airbnb, if not better. Very clean, well-equipped, and ideally located. Kirsten was a welcoming and attentive host, always available to answer our questions and provide recommendations. We felt right at home and would be delighted to come back if the opportunity arises.Thank you again for your hospitality!
Location was great . Very comfy , smells amazing

Annushka’s place is spacious, cozy, and easy to find. The place can be reached by public transportation easily. Annushka is a responsive and helpful host. Definitely a place to stay again in the near future!
Very clean place and she is very nice.

I love staying with Ester. I feel safe and it is so easy to get to Manhattan,
You will enjoy each trip!
Super Unterkunft. Sehr zentral und nicht weit von der U-Bahn entfernt. 👍

We found this room delightful. It has good storage so we were able to fully unpack and make ourselves at home. We especially appreciated that the unit was so thoughtfully supplied with just about anything a guest might need.

Very convenient location. All the staff were friendly. They allowed us to store our luggage before and after our check-in @ check-out times. The rooms were a bit smaller than expected but my only complaint is that the towels shed during use so felt too cheap. Also, a bit noisy at night because the night life is very lively in the middle of k-town.

Loved staying here - perfect location to great restaurants and bars, a short walk to the subway, and a peaceful spot with private backyard/patio to escape the hustle. Cute design in the apartment, and lots of natural light. Great Bed-Stuy base to run around the city!

El lugar de Alfredo está en el corazón de Manhattan y tiene lo indispensable, no es un lugar lujoso ni espacioso. Pero si lo que estás buscando es estar en la ciudad a un precio accesible y en una cama personal, que utilizas solo para dormir es muy recomendable. Todos el personal es amable y el desayuno es algo que suma. Recomiendo el lugar de Alfredo.
Greta stay, near bus stops that could help with getting into the city in the morning.
William and Wally were wonderful hosts! They’re place is spacious, comfortable, and well-appointed. They were super responsive. The location can’t be beat. Thank you, William and Wally!
I had a great stay. Host is super responsive. The apt is very welcoming and great for a short stay.
everything was in an immaculate condition
a gem of an appartement and a supersuperhost literally !
Great location! Great Host! Transportation is easily accessible & room is clean and charming. Thank you for a wonderful stay!
Great place to stay in nyc.
Tony is very responsive and helpful host. The apartment is convenient and has lots of Chinese restaurants nearby. Place is very clean as well. 👍👍👍
Great location! Had a really good stay. Customer service was excellent!
We had a great stay! Check-in and check-out were super easy when following the rules. Everything in walkable distance. Quiet neighborhood and comfortable bed.
Very accessible, safe area , close free parking . Viktor was a great host for our short stay -
Great location, clean, comfortable, very friendly staff. will be back
Great stay

This was our best AirBnB experience in many years. The apartment is even nicer than in the photos and it is so close to transit and all other amenities.  It is perfectly clean with everything we needed for a 4-day stay. Plus it is very spacious for NYC, with a beautiful private backyard. Natalie was an excellent host. We couldn't have asked for more.

Nous avons passé 3 nuits en famille, avec un bébé de 18 mois. Le logement est impeccable, conforme à nos attentes. La décoration est soignée. Le quartier est calme.
Aron est très disponible pour la moindre question. Nous avons pu laissé nos bagages jusqu’en milieu d’après-midi.
It was sooooo good

I really enjoyed my stay at Michael's place.  Good location on the east side.  Doormen were very nice, and very clean modern building.  Apartment was clean, and very quiet, especially at night.  No noise from neighbors at all. Almost didn't know I was in NYC!  Michael was great at answering any questions I had.  And was always very prompt.   I would recommend staying there, and I would stay there again.

First Yankee Game! 5 minute walk to Yankee Stadium. If you want the feel of The Bronx this is it! Damien’s Place had everything we needed! I would definitely stay again. Check in and communicate we’re great. Delis are close along with the 4,5, and 6 trains into Manhattan.
Logement calme et lumineux. Belle pièce à vivre adaptée à une famille de 4 personnes. Le métro est très proche.

Dorino's house is a very great place to live in New York. The place is in a quiet neighborhood and is easy to find. Getting to and from Manhattan is also a breeze because of the M train. The house is so cozy and everything you need is available. There is even a Moka coffee maker for hard core coffee lovers.
Just make sure you have dinner before going home late at night because most of the restaurants are closed by 9 PM. There is an Arby's nearby which is open till midnight but it's only for drive-thru (walk-thru is OK :)) since dine-in is only up to 8 PM. I would gladly recommend Dorina's place to everyone.

This place was beautiful. At night the full panoramic view was perfect to celebrate my Birthday. And the jacuzzi is very relaxing. It had blue led light and built in music to the radio or your aux in the jacuzzi. 10/10.
Very quiet and lovely stay in the heart of bay ridge. The area was lovely and right by the water. Would stay here again if I’m in the area, thank you for being so attentive and welcoming :)

Excellent room for a short-term trip - the location makes it possible to walk to many places, metro and other public transport facilities are also not too far away. Kudos to the other guests while I was there, they were all very responsible in sharing the space and not making too much noise (as the rooms aren't isolated). This way, it was perfect!

Especially in a place like NYC, where hotels are outrageously expensive and Airbnb‘s are usually somebody’s basement, this place goes above and beyond your expectations. The listed photos do not do justice to the space you get and the comfort. The bed was extremely comfortable as well as the massage table and sauna. You have plenty of room here to relax and breathe fresh air. The hosts make sure you’re extremely taken care of and are extremely responsive at any time of day. If this place is available during your stay, do not pass up the opportunity.
Convenient location near the subway.
nice place to be living around the city center. Pat is a very professional person

Julio’s place was clean and pleasant to stay in! The room had great A/C so it was nice and cool at night. It was the perfect place to be able to crash for the night and get a good nights sleep. It was also nice to have the amenities like towels and shampoo, conditioner, and body wash! Overall a nice place to stay!
Excellent stay, great and accommodating host!

The home’s location and view were incredible!
Nothing against the home, just a little tip… To wake up the front door keypad hit the lower left corner. 🤪

Lovely landing spot for a few days visiting family nearby. Outstanding location, spotlessly clean, had everything we needed. Would definitely stay again and recommend to friends.
Thanks, Travis and family! 💜

Mercedes was a great host.
Perfect comunication, really helpful and kind person.
She lent us everything we needed.
I recomended for everyone!;)
Great location, super friendly staff, cute rooms, clean, and great price.
Clean bright room near subway and walking distance to a lot of shops/neighborhoods
Great host, great place
The Shoreham was well located
Our stay was very smooth. The place is very well organized and had everything we needed. Great location and close to the subway. Neighborhood is very safe and quiet. Would definitely recommend!

No washing machine for guests use. I left my electric toothbrush ina the bathroom for 5 hours top. When i came back its was gone. I tried to talk with the host. They behaved very rudely like its my fault. They did nothing to find a solution i have to go buy new electric toothbrush for $300.
Never rent this place!
Great stay, great location!
Honestly, their home is perfect and the best environment and aesthetically beautiful too

El departamento de Deirdre estaba tal cual se mostraba en las fotos, el  anfitrión estaba atento a nuestras necesidades, con una comunicación fluida. El alojamiento está bien ubicado cerca del subte que fue muy útil para recorrer todos los puntos de interés. Relación precio calidad aceptable.

Wir hatten einen sehr schönen Aufenthalt zu viert und wir haben uns in der Wohnung sehr wohl gefühlt. Chy war sehr nett und sehr gut zu erreichen. Der Weg zur nächsten Subway-Station dauert etwas (ca. 10 Minuten) - der Weg dorthin ist aber sehr einfach und gut zu laufen. Die Lage ist sehr ruhig und angenehm - wenn die Nachbarn von oben laut sind, braucht man ggf. Ohrstöpsel zum Schlafen. Insgesamt sehr empfehlenswert.
Muy recomendable, acorde a lo ofrecido, volveria sin dudarlo con mi familia nuevamente.
Perfect pied a terre in Manhattan-clean, comfortable, and convenient.  Highly recommend!

​Staying at Celina's place in Brooklyn was simply perfect. I loved having my own private bathroom, and the room felt very open and comfortable. Her apartment was spotless and styled beautifully, making it a great place to relax.
​Celina was a lovely and kind host, and it was so nice to get to chat with her. With the train just a two-minute walk away, getting to the city was easy. Overall, I had a fantastic stay and am so glad I chose her place!
great place to stay

We absolutely adored our stay at Mahbuba's place. Jackson Heights has definitely been a highlight of our multiple visits to NY: the profusion of restaurants has been a delight every time we had to go out for lunch. As was said before, the location is just perfect: 9 minutes away from 4 lines of subway that all lead to Manhattan, the back street where the unit is situated is very quiet and peaceful. It's a small space for 4 grown-ups and 1 kid but for what it is and our needs, which was to sleep and rest, the unit was perfect. The beddings were surprisingly comfortable (more than some hotels I stayed at lol), the apartment was clean and all the amenities were there. We feel very fortunate to have been able to stay at Mahbuba's place, the neighbourhood itself as we said is wonderful and there are not many accommodations available there. We would come back in a heartbeat.

Notre arrivée dans le logement de Yaakov était tardif dû à notre arrivée à l’aéroport et cela n’était pas un problème grâce à l’entrée autonome. Nous y avons passé 5 nuits et tout s’est très bien passé. Le logement correspond à l’annonce, est confort et Yaakov a été très réactif à nos messages. Le logement est proche des transports en commun permettant un accès facile dans Brooklyn et à Manhattan.
Je recommande !
Perfekte Lage, angenehmes Zimmer, gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis
Shayara’s place was great for us. Easy to get around with our stroller and a garage to park the car so we could just leave it. More spacious than expected for the three of us.

Very nice place to stay. We live a block away and needed an additional space for family members to stay and this was an amazing find. Very well kept. I used to work in big tech and the thoughtfulness of stocked snacks and stocked utensils reminded me of the kitchen pantry of my old job…  in a VERY GOOD way. Would say here again. 👍🏼
Our first ever airbnb experience with Muhammad went really smooth. They are very welcoming and beautiful hearted people. Perfect place for two people. Felt like home. We appreciate their service.

We had an incredible time staying a stone's throw from central park. It's a truly beautiful area, just off Madison Avenue with great shopping. The place is as beautiful as it looks in the pictures, with high ceilings and it feels really spacious, especially for a one bed. Fenix was a great host, and it's so simple getting into the building using the app, with no need for keys. I can't recommend this home enough.

Lourdes nous a accueilli avec des collations, fruits et breuvages au réfrigérateur, ce qui a été très apprécié. Les lits sont confortables et la cuisine est fonctionnelle. Il y a 2 petites salles de bain, ce qui est pratique pour une famille.
Le logement est à 10 minutes de marche de 2 stations de métro, ce qui est intéressant puisque ça donne beaucoup d’options pour se rendre à Manhattan. A noter que le stationnement est un peu difficle.
Mais le quartier était très bruyant lors de notre séjour
La 1ère nuit a été pénible. Il y avait de musique démesurément fort au palier plus bas jusqu’à 2 :30 AM !! Lourdes a été proactive et nous a compensé pour le désagrément. Les autres soirées, il y avait des rassemblements et de la musique très forte dans la rue du logement. Surréel.
Mais Lourdes a été une excellente hôtesse qui s’est souciée de notre appréciation et elle n’est pas responsable du voisinage, mais le voisinage bruyant fait en sorte que notre séjour n’a pu être satisfaisant.

Amazing place to stay. My daughter and me stayed with Elizabeth while visiting NYC. We took the train and ferry into the city and it was an amazing view. Elizabeth was very helpful and informative. I would recommend to stay with her if you are looking for a beautiful, peaceful and relaxing place not far from the city!
Bom mas muito caro pela localização e eles não respondem as mensagens
It’s a nice room
Great place to stay. Excellent location!
Eli was great at check in, and everything exceeded expectations. Great location and absolutely great value!
Realmente buen lugar…!
Everything was great - our family of 5 enjoyed our stay.

Our stay at John's place was the best! It was a great price for a really good location in Brooklyn, near the subway and with a lot of businesses in the area. The apartment is private and very spacious; it's a very quiet and peaceful neighborhood. It has all the amenities you could need included.
