John is also very nice, very reachable, and is very clear about everything you need to know about the listing. Overall, if you need a place and can book it, don't think twice about it!
Kind staff and Good location!

Very comfy, and quiet. The neighborhood is peaceful and conveniently located next to the N and the F lines. John is very accommodating, and maintains the cleanliness in the house regularly. He also offers free breakfast cereal and milk! Beds are comfortable; sheets are fresh and clean and the bathroom is kept very clean.
we had so much fun- and the hotel is perfectly located- so much to look at and do while walking around!

Our stay at Yusuf’s overall was great. The pictures don’t do the place justice at all- it’s very spacious. Loved being close to the train for easy access around. We weren’t informed beforehand that the AC unit wasn’t working and it did get humid and uncomfortable inside during the day. He did have someone drop off a fan but it the nights weren’t cool, it definitely would have been hard to sleep comfortably.
Muy buena comunicación, muy buena única y el lugar era tal como se describe.

Yotel is in an excellent location -- very close to Times Square and the Theater District. The Green Fig restaurant's menu is delicious and moderately priced. The restaurant has a very friendly staff and a comfortable atmosphere.
Yotel is significantly less expensive than other hotels in the neighborhood -- and the Airbnb rate is even less expensive -- and now I know why. Their philosophy is a very modern, completely "hands-off" approach, and everything is very slick and "spacey" (like calling the rooms "cabins"). All services are either self-administered, automated, or accessible through a smartphone app so there is no need for a large staff on site. HOWEVER, if there is a problem, there are only 2 people on site to help!
I'm so disappointed that no one from Yotel ever answered the questions I wrote in the Airbnb messenger. It was advertised that there would be a place to store my luggage on the day of arrival and departure, but when we checked-in the Yobot wast not available. I would not have chosen Yotel if I had known this.
When we arrived at the room we noticed that (1) the curtains shown in the photo between the bed area and the bathroom area were missing and (2) our television did not work. I asked "mission control" about these things, but they responded that (1) the curtains were removed because they were no longer necessary and (2) they would send someone to the room with a new remote for the tv. The curtains ARE DEFINITELY necessary to give privacy to the person in the bathroom AND to block out the light from the window. The TV remote never arrived. I finally called to cancel the order because it was very late and I needed to go to sleep.
Other minor inconveniences in the room:
- The shower door is on rollers, but the bar is not level so the door wouldn't stay closed. This meant that shower water sprayed out into the toilet area.
- The hair conditioner was installed by the bathroom sink and the hand lotion was installed in the shower. They were in locked holders so I couldn't swap them.
- The bed did not retract into a semi-upright position, so there was very little floor space to move around.
- There were lines of mold in the corners of the shower, and dust on some of the storage shelves.
- We were there on the Saturday night of Halloween weekend so the building and the street were unusually noisy. (Not Yotel's fault!)
Perhaps if we booked directly through Yotel (instead of Airbnb) and stayed in a different room we would have had a better experience.

I feel so lucky that I found this Airbnb for my month-long stay in NYC!
The location is amazing, in the heart of the West Village, surrounded by cafes, restaurants and good shopping. Even though the location is bustling, because the apartment is located behind a street-front building, it is SILENT, and I was not bothered by any street noise/partying/traffic sounds. The courtyard/pool is so pretty and peaceful, and walking past it as I came and went was my favorite thing.
The apartment itself is perfectly appointed and has been beautifully decorated with high quality furniture/bedding/kitchenware. I was so comfortable, and there was never a time I needed something I didn’t have.
Cail, the host, is very welcoming and clearly cares about his guests' comfort. He gave me a list of restaurants within walking distance of the apartment and I went to all of them:)
I don’t actually use Airbnb very much and would not have left this review if I did not truly mean it. Enjoy!
Clean bright pleasant studio, near fun places to eat etc. I was just there last minute for one night but would return for longer, thanks!

A clean, no-frills place to lay your head when traveling in NYC.
The neighborhood was a bit noisy on Saturday night--as noted in the listing you're close to the train, and the house backs up to a restaurant where folks were hanging out until late. It's convenient to JFK.
The space matched the listing, and checking in and out was straightforward. Bed and linens were clean and room was tidy. As noted in listing, be mindful that the bathroom is shared, and you may hear noises from other guests when staying there - This room, #1, is close to both the entryway and the bathroom, and you can hear other folks living their lives but everyone was respectful while I was there and no one was making a lot of noise. I was in and out very quickly, so didn't really use the kitchen.

Solid place! Loved staying here and would definitely come back!. Amazing furniture and color schemes. Nika was really responsive.
Pros:
Nice restaurants and grocery store about 10 min walk away.
Building is safe
Overall good place to live, and it’s a nice, consistent place to come back to when you’re done exploring.
Cons:
Packages are really hard to find if you’re delivering stuff
Intercom doesn’t give a sound when you get a call
Internet was unusably slow initially, but got fixed
Far from Manhattan (took about 45 minutes to get to soho with the train changes)
Laundry downstairs frequently had machines that weren’t working and other issues.

Batia started the trip off with plenty of information and recommendations about the area. The first day we got there he sent an instacart delivery with all the essentials. Anytime we needed something he was always available. The apartment was perfect for 3 people. The C is literally on the same block as the apartment. The 1 is two blocks away. Very convenient. This was an awesome stay!
We had a great time at Mike's place. The apartment is just like in the photos: very clean, nicely decorated and well equipped.

This is a lovely, well located 2 bedroom 1 full bath apartment located in Manhattan's posh Upper East Side.
Easy access to all of NYC, starting with the "Q" subway, the closest entrance to which is at Second Avenue at 84th Street, literally one block from the apartment.
While the bedrooms are small, they are typical for apartments in this neighborhood. The kitchen is fully equipped with everything needed to cook and enjoy, including a Nespresso machine.
The living room features a 75" flatscreen TV, and 5G wifi is very fast and reliable.
Diana, the host, is extremely responsive and helpful.
Please note that this airbnb does not have a TV.

Had an AMAZING week in New York staying here. Very cool and stylish apartment. Apartment big and spacious, bright and spotless clean. Beds really comfortable. Had everything you would need. The tv area is perfect for relaxing nights in. WiFi was super. Thank you Brian so much for being such a wonderful helpful host. Location was really great. Subway easy and by foot we found it was easy to get around too. Shops and restaurants conveniently around. Great coffee a couple minutes walk too.
The apartment is exactly as the pictures ! We was with 5 persons there, maybe I suggest to go next time with maximum 4 persons. We love it anyway and would book it again if we go to Brooklyn.

Great stay!! Close to every location which was so helpful. Would highly recommend ☺️
Thanks again
My daughter and I enjoyed our week stay in this lovely space. Five stars, no question. If you're looking for a great place to stay in Brooklyn, look no further!
My stay at Shana’s was amazing, she responded to every question, comment and concern I had. The apartment is beautiful and conveniently located I’ll definitely stay here again when I’m in town.

Carlos was very accommodating and very friendly.  Checkin was simple and easy, and communication was thorough.  He even provided pastries in the morning for guests.  the room was cozy and warm with everything needed.  Even extra blankets were provided In the closet space.  Would recommend.  :)
Great value price+location.
This is a great place to stay. Great location, clean, good communication, accommodating. Walking distance to tons of great bars and restaurants.
Would stay at this hotel again

Christina's house is in lovely quiet neighborhood a short bus ride away from the noisy Main St subway area (which has an amazing variety of food for cheap) The room is nice with a fan and a small fridge, and a spotless bathroom across the hall. If you need to do laundry it is the basement which needs a key.  She communicated well with me to make my time there go smoothly! Thank you Christina!

I could not have asked for a better stay. The location is wonderful, the view is stunning, and the hosts were amazing. If you want to stay at a place that feels comfortable and in a great area, this is it. Izaac and Cash were so welcoming and I simply can’t thank them enough. This is a gem!
Hjemmekoselig leilighet. Alt fungerer, og er helt og pent. Sengene var gode! Beliggenheten er fin, med kort avstand til subway og butikker. Takk for oss!

Great location. Was within walking distance of some amazing food. Zeus’ burgers was a favorite of ours and it was only a block away. Also close to many coffee shops and bus stops. Only a ten minute walk to the N train, which was an easy ride into Manhattan. Plenty of hot water and nice towels. Mattresses were adequate for a short vacation. My girlfriend and I felt very safe in this area and on the long walks we took around town.

Nice vintage feel to this spot which has the look of an old time hotel. The location, near 3rd is quite impressive with all the amenities in walking distance. I booked this as an extra day extension to my first time visit to NYC and I’m super happy that I did!
Really enjoyed my stay at Nataliya’s place. It was a nice 30 days there. Place was cozy and had all the amenities you need. Very nice neighborhood and easy walk to the subway to get to the city.

This was an awesome find. The bedroom was a master suite with a private bathroom, both were nicer than many hotels. The cleanliness and privacy exceeded my expectations. Paul was a great host and was very communicative on the app.
10000% recomendable!!!! Volvería otra vez sin pensarlo😁😁😁😁
The hotel is clean, the rooms are spacious and comfortable. Complementary breakfast is very generous, with unusual variety (for US) and is held in a pleasant space.

Nice, safe, quiet neighborhood and close enough to the BJK Tennis Center which was my primary consideration. Non-Asian markets and restaurants were more than a mile away so grocery shopping was a bit of a challenge but manageable.
Even though Christina has a lot on her plate, she goes above and beyond to offer extras, like grocery shopping. She's a long-time resident and knows the area well. The bedroom was very comfortable.

I had a wonderful stay at Wendell's place. The bed was very comfortable, and the spacious room—with its own fridge—was a great bonus. The location is also accessible by train, which makes getting around convenient. Wendell was helpful and responsive throughout my stay. My only concern was returning late at night, as the area is near the end of the train line, and I was sometimes the only passenger left. Still, it was a pretty nice stay.
The place was clean, had good breakfast, and was conveniently located to everything I needed.

Nice and clean place to stay, responsive and respectful host. They have a little fridge there if you want to bring some beverages and it’s close to restaurants and trains. 5 star, definitely recommended…

Die Unterkunft war wirklich unglaublich schön und liebevoll gestaltet. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Man hat ein eigenes Bad und eine eigene Küche. Mit der Bahn ist man sehr schnell in Manhattan. Nachts hört man teilweise den Verkehr. Uns hat das nicht gestört, wenn man aber beim Schlafen sehr geräuschsensibel ist, sollte man das vielleicht berücksichtigen. Auf dem Nachttisch stehen aber auch Ohrstöpsel. Wir würden auf jeden Fall jederzeit wiederkommen.
The cubicles are small but comfortable
As described. Would recommend and stay again
Lovely stay in a lovely neighborhood! Would definitely return here again.
It was exactly as described in the advertisement. You are quickly in Manhattan, a very good price for NYC. Love to come again.

Great location. Great for 8 people as long as you are close family or like to be very close. One bathroom but 2 sinks areas. We loved the location so much. Hotel is very clean. This is a short walk to time square.

We loved this beautiful quiet apartment in the delightful family-orientated neighbourhood of Carroll Gardens. Maura is a fabulous host - flexible with our check-in/out arrangements and very responsive to any queries. We were grateful for the well-stocked pantry staples and ample tea / coffee supplies. The apt is a short stroll to the subway and Court and Smith streets for great food, shopping and coffee. Would not hesitate to book again, we were sad to leave! Thankyou again Maura.

Sue was very communicative and responsive towards our questions and concerns. Check in was very easy and the place was as described/shown in the photos. Convenient with lots of food spots nearby and a subway stop on the same block to get around the city. The amenities like the in-unit washer/dryer were also a game changer. Overall good experience with the stay here.

I’m a solo traveler and this stay was perfect for my needs. Clean linens and a clean bathroom. A VERY powerful fan in the room to stay cool and just a quick walk to the Q10 bus to the airport. Would book again.
Thank you the room was so cosy and quite no noise we enjoyed thank you

very clean and convenient location. So many good restaurants around! It's perfect for me as I was exhibiting at the Javits Center. Think twice if you have a lot of heavy luggages because you will need to walk up the stairs 2 flights.
everything was great, the communication was pleasant and the answers to the messages promptly.

We had a great stay! Essa was extremely helpful and flexible. He went above and beyond! I highly recommend this stay. It was perfect - clean, cozy, quiet - and in a nice area where it’s easy to get around.
We thank Mr. Roberto for everything beautiful about this trip and the fun times we spent at his home
Always very comfortable staying here; there are no stairs to climb, and a parking space for one car is available just outside the door without extra charge.

Everything about this apartment was perfect! It is very large for NYC standards! The apartment has everything you could possibly need- extra blankets, pillows, blender, coffee maker, etc, etc. I have 3 small children and we chose the location due to the proximity to Central Park.
The property manager and owner were very responsive and assisted with every question or anything we need. I highly recommend this property!!!
Sing 是一个非常棒的房东。给我很多实用的旅居建议和纽约攻略，住在这里很舒服自在，交通方便，街区安全。周边超市、餐厅很多。如果想吃中餐，附近八大道有各种中餐，华人超市。39街还有cosco。展望公园、 布鲁克林博物馆、植物园步行30分钟可达，沿途的历史保护建筑街区和公园风景都很漂亮，周六展望公园的市集值得去看看。下次来一定会再次预定。
It was a lovely staying. The apartment was clean, quiet and very well equipped. Great area as well and super reactive and caring hosts!

I had a family emergency in NYC and I was to stay at Mrs. Janet airb&b it was peaceful to stay and it's not to far from stores. Communication with Mrs.Janet was every good when I text her she always responded. The one bedroom apartment was very clean. 💯💯💯
It was a very nice experience my time in Alexandra's place. She was very kind , the apartment was great and the perfect location to move around Brooklyn and go to Manhattan.

Tony and Anna were great hosts. Always available to answer my questions and gave us great recommendations. Checked on us to see if we needed anything. Anna left two umbrellas for us when it rained. Overall great hosts and lovely neighborhood. I’d highly recommend.

Very well communicated with Manhattan.
The place is absolutely spotless.
Nicole is very kind and friendly.

Muchas gracias por todo Brady, a pesar de que no pude conocerte personalmente, estuvo dispuesto siempre a responder mis preguntas.
La habitación confortable y los espacia comunes muy limpios.
Totalmente recomendable
Great location and great service, would make this a stop for next time as well. 🙌🏻

We enjoyed our stay, everybody was very welcoming (even the cats). We got a lot of recommendations for the neighborhood and the apartment was in a great place to explore Brooklyn as well as Manhattan.
Totally recommended!

Nice little unit. Theres plenty of room in the bedroom and a decent ammount in the common areas. This room has lots of sunlight, and faces the street (can be noisier, but not outrageous). The bathrooms are fine and stay clean mostly. The kitchen is minimal and does lack ventilation, so care must be taken with cooking, but it's nothing out of the ordinary for NYC appartments. Location is pretty good with laundry and groceries both very close by. The subways aren't too far either. Ollie is a good host, responsive and will try to make your stay a comfortable one.
Amazing place for a staycation with a loved one and explore the city. Great location with an amazing heated pool!
Nice quiet place nice walkable stores and transport.
Liked our stay here. The rooms are much smaller than the pictures lead you to think, but aside from that our stay was great.
Everything went well, very nice host, great apartment and good location!
Nice apartment beautiful view

I booked Lawrence’s place for my family to comfortably stay while visiting from out of town (I live right down the street). They loved the space and proximity to all the shops and restaurants on Tompkins. Overall they were very happy and mentioned this will be their “go to” for future trips.

A Hidden Gem in Manhattan – Absolutely Perfect!
I stayed at this beautiful apartment for a full month and didn’t want to leave. The location is unbeatable – nestled right by Riverside Park and just minutes from the subway, it made commuting and exploring NYC effortless. The neighborhood felt safe, local, and authentic. The apartment itself is spotless and thoughtfully furnished with everything I needed for a long stay: fast Wi-Fi, a fully equipped kitchen, a comfortable bed, a washer-dryer. I appreciated the natural light and the peaceful vibe after busy city days.
Vanessa was responsive and professional – every question I had was answered within minutes, and check-in was seamless. It’s rare to find a place that feels both homey and high-end, but this listing nails it. Despite a previous guest’s less-than-ideal review, experience was fantastic. Vanessa consistently goes above and beyond, and the best room in the apartment offers a stunning view of the river and the GW Bridge.
Was an okay stay. Would recommend
Had a wonderful time.  Easy access to subway.

supernice staff and very quiet despite so many living there under the same roof. If you go in the summer bring a lot of clothes to put on and a mask as it gets quite cold from the AC, but other than that its really great and close to everything (!) :) my second time staying and will def stay again

What a charming Harlem brownstone! No frills (as we like it) but everything you could need, and large for a New York rental. I loved the green view from the bedroom window. My son and I were very happy for our week at M. Elizabeth's place!
Perfect as always :-)))  I cant wait to come back again! Thanks Fay and Pascal for everything!
Another great stay!

Value for money.
Street is noisy, but we went in Spring, so AC was on and drowned the outside noise and it was ok.
We had wifi issues at first but the Nomad staff were very diligent in solving it. Also helpful with the laundry when I asked.

Clean and amazing with all the amenities you’d find at a hotel
I’d recommend this to anyone looking for a peaceful place to stay with safety and parking option (affordable)

Very close to the starting point/final stop of the R-line and hence an easy location to get to the rest of Brooklyn and go to Manhattan with the subway system. A few stops away you also have the ferry at Bay Ridge Avenue which can bring you easily to Manhattan.

What a wonderful place to stay. It is beautiful, roomy, and very well equipped. The back yard was a major plus. We even got to do laundry.
Communication was excellent. We were in Brooklyn for a family wedding and had booked two places to stay - this one for my husband and me, and a different one for my mother and daughter. The other place cancelled the day before we arrived!! We couldn't find another place nearby, so I contacted Marycatherine and asked if we could add the other two people to this booking. She said no problem, and set up an additional queen bed in the bedroom and the living room sofabed. It ended up being much better having us all in one place and was plenty big enough that it didn't feel crowded. We had a wonderful stay. Highly recommended.

Miriam is a great host with an ideal room for those looking to stay in Brooklyn. She is responsive, friendly and offered us plenty of recommendations for the local area and beyond. The accommodation itself is as described, with loads of character, a large bedroom with AC and all within walking distance of the Brooklyn bridge should you want to avoid the subway. Would highly recommend.
The location worked really well for us. The place looks exactly like the pictures, overall good experience. The area was quiet and peaceful. Would definitely recommend!
房东很亲切，对我们帮助很大。
Mark was a wonderful host! Super cozy place to stay in NY! Highly recommended!

We really enjoyed our stay at this lovely brownstone apartment. It's well located and close to some great, cafés, restaurants and bars. The hosts were friendly and gave lots of recommendations which was a nice welcome.
A couple of things we would note from our stay which lowered the score a little were the clutter right outside of our door inside, and to the left of the stairs leading up to the house outside (for the price point we'd expected the entrance to be cleared and a little more welcoming), and the fact that when the heating was left on in the apartment there was a persistent dripping sound throughout the night which made it quite difficult to sleep. The hosts were however super responsive when we raised this to them and turned the heating off the following night.
The location is really well connected to all of NYC, which made life easy. We had the best week and this was a really nice place to come home to!

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour.
L'appartement était très bien situé.
Je recommande sans problème.

This is a great spot in Harlem! The pictures and descriptions are accurate. Yongsoo is extremely accommodating and responsive to his guests. The home was clean and there was ample space for us. We would recommend Yongsoo’s home to anyone visiting NYC, and we plan to stay here again if we come back to NYC!
Had a great time at J.’s and will be back the next time I’m in Brooklyn. Great communicator, easy check-in, perfect location, cool apartment, and a lovely backyard space.

This is by far the best AirBnB we’ve ever stayed at. It really did feel like home away from home. We got in after 11pm but Marlyn said it was no problem. The refrigerator was stocked with so much good food that helped when we got in late and we’re so hungry. The place had everything we needed and wanted. Plus Marlyn gave us some goodies from her garden. We’ll definitely stay here again when we come to NYC!

Exactly as pictured!
Great little spot!
Lovely place to stay at

The room was very clean, and looked exactly like the photos in the listing. The AC was much appreciated considering I visited during a heatwave. The building is very quiet and the people in the area are very nice. Even though the apartment is a bit far from New York’s most popular attractions, the apartment is very close to two subway lines and getting around was very easy. All in all I enjoyed my stay.
Great spot with easy access to the 1 train to get you anywhere in the city, very accommodating for our two dogs. Beds were comfortable and rooms were clean. We would stay here again. Thanks y’all!
Book it

The space was confortable, though we ate a lot outside, the kitchen had all we needed to make breakfasts and there's really good latin food in the area. The sofabeds are not for tall people so we put them together and 2 tall persons slept across without any issues, they were comfy.
The heating had an issue on our second day and Mustafa was quick to answer and resolve it the very same day. 2 blocks away from one subway station and 4 blocks from the other, it's a quick ride to the city and go back late at night. We'd definitely stay here again!
Room is basement, small room and everything also small

The host, Jozef, was great—very responsive and easy to communicate with.
The apartment is in a fantastic location and was very clean and quiet, which made it perfect for my stay.
There was no noise at all, and the high-speed internet made it easy for me to work remotely.
The kitchen was well-equipped and even had a separate dining room, which was a nice touch.
The building itself was quiet and comfortable, and the location couldn’t be better.
I highly recommend this place!
It's really nice place❤️ the cat is so adorable
great stay! host was very easy to communicate with and very nice. the only issue we had was that the bathroom window was stuck down and wouldn’t go up. everything else was great!
Wonderful stay at the Millenium, Hotel staff was really kind and responsive, even helped me get a cab to the airport.

Casa fornita di tutti i servizi ed indipendente. Posizione tranquilla, peccato esserci fermati troppo poco. Rhonda è disponibile e gentile.
Lo consiglio!
The place is lovely, quiet and clean. Great neighborhood with lots of walkable restaurants.

Buena ubicación. Nos cambiaron 4 veces de cuarto, ya que todos los cuartos tienen temas de limpieza y falta de mantenimiento. Se encuentran en mal estado y condiciones. Si no te gusta el ruido, es recomendable solicites que no te den un cuarto que se encuentre cerca de las calles que dan a Times square.
Only complaint was screens were ripped and spider eggs in kitchen area which need to be taken care of.
This booking was a great experience. The neighborhood is wonderful with lots of shops and restaurants. It was quiet and very comfortable. We'll book here again.

Laurence was the ultimate host!!!
Comfortable accomodations, great location. Would definitely stay here again.
My stay at kasa was really solid. Had a slight issue with the door not locking, but reach out to customer support and they took care of it. I would stay again

Really nice authentic building, very well located. Not so far away from the water front, with a few parcs, great on the evening especially for the spectacular view. Rosa is great, flexible and very good advice and available. It was a pleasure to stay there.
I would recommend urban furnishing! They address all your needs and beyond. They’re very nice and professional! They’re always communicating!!!
Great place to stay. Easy to find and worked great for us as we came out to meet up with family.
Great place to stay in New York!
Frank and Maria are very kind and friendly. The Airbnb was very clean and very modern. We will for sure come back for another stay!

Amazing! This was easily the best staycation ever. Blair and Brian are very gracious hosts, and are eager to make your stay enjoyable. The marina and surrounding area are a little gritty (you never forget you're in Queens), but they've created such a cozy home on the water that it makes the whole experience that much more memorable and fulfilling. We want to stay longer next time!

Excelente ubicacion del apartamento. Muy cerca de muchos medios de transportes. Internet muy buena, en caso de tener que trabajar.
La cama super comoda. Muy limpio. Me encanto mi estadia. Nina siempre pendiente de mis mensajes y respondia enseguida! Muy recomendable.
If you’re looking something in the heart of the town for reasonable money- thats the place
Great location, questionable space, appreciated being allowed to cancel.
Bayan was an amazing host. Very friendly, responsive to messages. The space was beautiful. Would book again in the near future.
Cheap -very cheap for NY standard-and clean room, suitable if you won't spend much time indoors.

A top-notch quality stay!
Super attention to details like quality appliances, smart tv, fast internet, climate controls, memory foam mattress and gold fixtures all reflect on the care this owner has for their property. We absolutely recommend and would stay again!
Good spot if you want to be in midtown. Right near Grand Central
Great Place!!
this is my 2nd time booking Amanda’s listing and I will probably book another! She’s so helpful and responsive. No complaints

Great place! I felt extremely comfortable, had a wonderful sleep every night and as a solo women traveler, I never felt nervous or uncomfortable - so many nice people! Would totally stay again! Thanks!

I highly recommend Edgar place.
very peaceful clean, confortable and lot of shopping places!

Awe Inspiring, Dreamy, Astounding !
Remarkable, unbelievable and stunning 🤩 is how I would describe this place. If you’re a dreamer, a romantic, a wanderlust. If you’re adventurous, if you believe there’s still something beautiful to behold in this world - this is the room for you. The View will captivate you and tear your heart out from your beating chest !
Everything about this room is deluxe. The bed is king size cloud floating in a dreamscape. The view from the room is almost as impressive as from the living room.
There’s a pullout in the living room if you wanna watch a movie and gaze at the flickering lights of the city.
Shower pressure is phenomenal, amenities were first class. Everything was literally RIGHT THERE ! Everything. Broadway shows, A list restaurants, corner markets, the mall, The Edge, the Sites, the fame, the glory, all of it.
Be keen with this place and be keen on managements directions to the location. It’s a gem 💎 don’t miss out. Thank me later ✌️
Great place to stay. Quiet neighborhood.
Great place and host!

Rose greeted us when we arrived, was very welcoming to New York, and had great tips to help us in our visit. Her place was very handy to buses and the subway so that we were able to see many of the New York sights as well as experiencing the people of the city during our 5-day stay. The neighborhood was quiet and the accommodations got us good rest each evening.
Very great and convenient area, nice how, and cute cat who is also a night owl to greet you from your late night excursions.
great place, with a great location. few minutes walk from the park, in the middle of everything! the place itself was beautiful and I would definitely stay again
Kamran was fantastic as a host! The house was incredibly beautiful, clean and had everything I needed.  100% would recommend staying here.
Great location, close to central park,  times square, and the subway.

Great apartment to stay. It’s very clean, the beds are very comfortable, close to public transportations, shops, restaurants. Great guest service and host responds quickly to guest concerns  Highly Recommend.

The room was as described. I brought shower slippers for the communal bathroom as recommended. Earplugs were provided which helped a bit to block out the loud snores. I didn't feel that cold considering it was mid 30s outside. Definitely great value for a place to sleep and shower in NYC!

Host was great -- Brandon was very responsive and as flexible as he could. The place was exactly what we needed, decently clean (bedsheets and towels did not have that clean linen smell, there was some dust under the furniture, otherwise the place was spotless) with all accommodations you could need. There's a fenced backyard in the back if you have pets or want to enjoy some sun. Neighborhood is safe and quiet/feels residential but is less than a block away from lots of great restaurants and bars. Would recommend staying there!

Can words describe the experience and the place no only feelings and emotion and magic. Best place to stay in Brooklyn best room best decor. I’m not exaggerating I’m actually under exaggerating. Tako was a great host with beautiful cats furniture art and a magical bedroom !

I’m so glad I found this hotel on Airbnb!
The price of hotels online for a weekend in December is outrageous! I saved $600 at the Hilton Brooklyn for 2 nights compared to Expedia prices.
It’s a beautiful hotel and a great location. The room was exceptionally clean, the staff were friendly and we were able to get into our room early on a Friday.
We took the A train from JFK. The
Hoyt/Schermerhorn stop is less than a 5 minute walk away. The Jay St/Metro Tech stop is also close by. So there are many train options to get where you need to go!
Like others have said, they charge you $40 per night at check-in for you to use $35 each day at their hotel. You have the option to use it in their restaurant, bar or mini shop behind the front desk. Items in the mini shop are $10 for beverages (soda, water, Gatorade, High Noon) and $7 for snacks (chips, cookies, candy).
We chose this location because it is walkable to the Brooklyn Paramount, where we went to a concert.
We would stay here again
Great place! Very clean and has all desired amenities. Location is good too, trader joes is right there. close to central park and the n,q,r,4,5,6 station.
Estubimos muy a gusto , la cama muy comoda, el baño con bañera perfecto, ubicacion ideal. Estamos encantados!
Good studio with the basics, great location
Very easy to get in. Was able to get an extra set of keys when asked

Nice place. Far from Manhattan so keep that in mind but if you’re in the brooklyn area definitely book for sure. All it needs is a full body mirror somewhere in there and you’re getting everything you need.
If you travel light is ok. But if you have suitcases keep in mind the rooms are very tight.

They were very respectful of the house rules and left the place incredibly clean. Communication was smooth throughout their stay. I would be happy to host them again anytime!” Friendly and Communicative
Awesome! I can’t wait to come back🧡
The apartment is very nice with great furnishings and clean environment.  I can still book it a million times. A big thank to the host.

Had a wonderful stay at Eric's place and would definitely stay here again! We had everything we needed to be comfortable and decompress from walking around the city. The area feels very safe and the local restaurants were great! Eric was also very helpful with check-in instructions, expectations for our stay and recommendations. If you're considering staying here, do it!
The stay was great! The place was exactly as described and Simon was very helpful.

Cozy apartment, all the necessary, location is great, can be a bit noisy at night on Saturday night but it doesn’t last too late. Would definitely stay again, and Madison was a very caring host, we really appreciated communication with her.
Nico is an awesome host! He’s very responsive and friendly. He checks to make sure everything meets your needs and offers local recommendations. I can’t recommend him enough!
Nice appartment, close to metro station.  Appartment is exactly like the photos. Great host!

Great way to stay at the ACE! Actually love being way up in the attic. It felt iconic.
Loved it beautiful stay , nice view , clean rooms, beautiful design, good food, spacious lobby and fun,  easy check in and check out process , very thorough people .

Check in went very smoothly. I will say the room was smaller than it appeared in the photos. The location is great- only a few blocks from Lee Lee’s one of the best bakeries in NYC and conveniently located next to a coffee shop. The pullout couch wasn’t particularly comfortable. The host was very communicative and polite. Great place for a couple to stay, less idea for adults not sleeping in the same bed.
Everything was so good, we enjoyed our stay!!!

This place was amazing . First time my guests and I flew to New York and we stayed at Joanna’s place . It was a great neighborhood, plenty of Delis around . Joanna was very responsive and attentive , if we needed anything she was a call away . The place was nice and cozy , bed was comfortable . Definitely would book again!
Great stay
Great place to stay. Central, nice decor, clean. Will be back again.

I would be very cautious if considering renting from Ellie. There is double booking going on in her rentals. My rental was not available on check-in day.  Her suggestion for me to check-in the following night was not possible due to my work schedule.  The exchange was not pleasant and she even yelled at me for not being flexible.  In the end, we both agreed that a total refund was in order.  Caveat emptor.
Barb and his son Luke were very friendly, accommodating, and responsive. The place is kinda small but cozy and has everything you need. Had a great stay!

Pokój od strony ulicy, od godziny 21 do 3/4 nad ranem ciężko zasnąć z uwagi na hałas dobiegający z ulicy. Pomimo zatyczek do uszu, które używałem każdej nocy, 3/4 nocy były przeważnie nie przespane. Lokalizacja całkiem atrakcyjna bo samym centrum, jednak hałas dobiegający z ulicy, korytarza sprawiał, że spanie nie było czymś przyjemnym. Jeśli chodzi o czystość, to na podłodze znalazłam kilka włosów. Pozostawienie bagażu na 1/2 h wiąże się z opłatą. W wielkości hotelów/hosteli jest to darmowa usługa. Niestety, nie był to mój najprzyjemniejszy pobyt, drugi raz bym się nie zdecydowała na pobyt w tej lokalizacji.
Our stay was lovely and we felt right at home. Everything was clean and the feel was very modern and upscale.
